6d812f23-cc6a-4051-986b-89628676e0c7: {n}A mechanical laugh creaks its way out of the vox-grille. When he sees that you do not share his amusement, the Rogue Trader frowns.{/n} "Oh. You were in earnest?"
2e41759c-713c-4cf1-b2b6-f47c8b36a88a: {n}Seberian sighs heavily and turns to you.{/n} "I must give you credit where it is due, my heir... While there have been situations and problems we saw differently, and while I have noted mistakes and misjudgements in your actions... you are nevertheless a worthy holder of the Warrant, fit to carry forward the von Valancius legacy. For this, I thank you. Now I can find peace in the knowledge that our dynasty is in safe hands."
9904e275-a730-47d0-9b96-65d97aedde34: Staying on Zarkov to oversee the planet, Governor Izdrig Batoshski pursued a policy of maximum independence from other worlds and remained loyal to only the God-Emperor and the Lord Captain. The soldiers born and raised on Zarkov were renowned as the most dangerous fighters in the Koronus Expanse.
40b7e1b5-ed5f-4c0f-ab1e-c7077c481502: "Juvenna is a spy for the Inquisition. I'm sure of it."
78c66529-0a48-4061-a98e-0a2102007ef1: The character gains +{uip|INTB|e206928f22c24394b953c143e02f5933} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} at the start of combat and +{uip|INTB/2|e206928f22c24394b953c143e02f5933} MP at the start of each subsequent {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
ab2c43bb-34b5-445c-a2a2-c76ca288d047: [Summon your will and walk away, hoping to find a way out of the xenos trap]
cbaef76c-e8bb-4494-83e5-67ddbd2e5a10: "A decisive one! I can detail the composition and humour ratio of each experimental subject, measure the mass of their frontal lobe, or answer with picosecond accuracy how often their heart contracts. But how does one calculate a man's righteousness? How do you weigh diligence of service? You will help me answer these questions by choosing the basis for the Triasomata. Your assessment will be the linchpin upon which this experiment hinges."
404e81e8-31ab-495e-a176-267405f2ca2b: "There are virtually no animals, but every type of plant life imaginable. And all of them try to kill humans. The Drover is just another tree, or a flower, but the nastiest of them."
28295303-260b-4d9e-a642-6496afdbf1e5: The Warrior gains the {g|f:f6d693dbff0d44eb9590684241e63ef3}Slash{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} which costs 0 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and has {uip|Slices|54f73c2523524544a8d7ffc3807056f0} charges for the current round. This ability and {g|f:f6d693dbff0d44eb9590684241e63ef3}Slash{/g} cannot be used in the same round as {g|f:4955b43454f6488f82892e166c76c995}Charge{/g}.
ba7c1385-c8a1-4a0e-b883-ee71db7bb0f2: {n}A quiet click reveals that your interlocutor has turned off the vox-channel at the same time as you.{/n}
ae34c264-cc49-48d7-8077-3a8775359d83: {n}With his silence, Nuncius makes it clear that the communication need for further discussion has been decisively met.{/n}
f10f8cf4-07cb-4045-aaba-bbe279d47fff: "Let the xenos annihilate the xenos. The Merovians can make sure to stay out of their battles."
4c35ee51-7cae-4452-8f30-897591c5dfc2: The Lord Captain has crushed the iron dead. Seberian once perished among these very ruins — what greater reward could there be than the recovery of the long-lost relic blade?
c7958460-9a8b-4385-80de-333be34ef131: {n}Vedka smiles broadly as she raises her augmented arm, admiring her clenching and unclenching fingers. She has not relinquished her bone claws, however — the trophy is now mounted on the wrist of her new bionic.{/n}
37013115-caa7-4327-ae69-45a5728c132e: "The Undying One grants His servants the chances they deserve. Yours is still to come."
9eb09086-1d91-40ab-970f-9f31db74b682: [Address the servo-skull] "Nuncius, I welcome you on board my vessel."
2e36d97f-8898-4e5b-9e66-f09e16f324c4: "I doubt there are many who would wish to find themselves in your personal domain, Master Februs. I, for example, certainly do not."
984906af-21a4-4e5e-9c0b-2c8fa7243b74: "Isn't your face rather too organic? Most Tech-Priests have more implants."
a84cf222-65f5-4e14-bea9-1b79e25cb535: "Juvenna was an exemplary noble. Wily, ambitious, scheming. That is why I chose her as the heir to my Warrant. Until Laria appeared." {n}Seberian emits a soft sound like a sigh and wearily rubs his brow, a surprisingly human gesture.{/n}
62b9d233-0ae7-4f0c-9db8-00fb435032df: {n}You duck under the strike, and the blade cuts through skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Every movement now causes a blinding, excruciating lance of pain. Your strikes lose their precision, only to become more dangerous.{/n}
a4fc51b9-ee64-49b7-96f4-36a2475e0676: A {g|Encyclopedia:DeadeyeShot}deadeye shot{/g} from this long-las stuns the target for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} if the target fails a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}.
5228c43c-a5c9-4e33-afac-c28150f7fe7d: {n}Everything is taking place as it should: the attack by the combined forces of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and the convening of the council. The pivotal moment approaches, and it will either set you free or condemn you to a new round of torture.{/n}
b2ec6f8d-db26-4b9c-b921-415f4fb66c48: "And that is what unites us. A sincere answer — it is a rare ruler who will admit that {mf|he|she} fears anything at all."
e0522fb1-5faf-417a-91e5-001284782dc0: {n}Tense silence fills the vox-channel. It is followed by a short click — the connection was ended.{/n}
ac5a7870-3de5-45dd-8578-3e26788795c4: "Why are you going after the blade alone? The Koronus Expanse needs you!"
cd7a2ecb-586a-49bb-af7c-5cb8aca46a08: "The gifts of the Omnissiah come at a price, one that not everyone can pay. Their machine spirits can rage and reject the flesh with which they have been joined, causing pain or even... indescribable agony. Sometimes the only way to end it is to extract the augment, which often carries the risk of death. My objective is to find a way to mitigate this."
e8668107-61f0-4c47-9615-1bea61dc4714: "Enough. I was wrong to allow you to participate in the council." {n}Before you can protest, the Rogue Trader's inferno pistol disgorges a blast of flame, and the world goes dark.{/n}
809f987d-02af-4e2d-a28e-dfc6c23a29c2: Gnarled corpses form a stomach-churning pattern of broken bones and dried meat. Only the twisted mind of a xenos is capable of perceiving the true meaning of this gruesome display. The squad quickly examines the remains and finds nothing of note.
93674d98-46e7-4f9e-917f-8fa75f25e07b: "Transformations so marvellous that they resonate as almost... heartening." {n}The Manipulus makes no effort to conceal his sorrow.{/n} "It is a pity to realise that, with a high degree of probability, this is merely an illusion, confusing our minds."
3fddf09c-8d42-4a86-8e0b-025db830ab47: "So be it, forget about Nuncius. You may remain on the ship as long as you wish and continue your research."
4b293daa-bad9-47c3-960e-db1f37885ce7: [Turn on your vox] "All matters have been settled? Then this audience is over. Vigdis, send a shuttle."
2d475d7b-88ca-4303-9de9-ec7d03bbe794: {n}Your words have the opposite effect. His augmented joints tremble as he speaks,{/n} "Do not presume to tell me what to do. Your Lord Captain demanded an explanation."
2f574ea9-9a0f-4b1d-a837-f55c37fa8506: "We found a shuttle in this system. It contained a recording of a distress signal that came from the regiment."
fdb28b27-ecae-4d13-a28a-a00facd05ca0: {n}The hunched {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} on the opposite side of the table erupts in a furious binharic trill as he struggles to immobilise the thrashing and moaning patient. After a time, he likewise turns his metal-plated face to you.{/n} "The life form Genetor Majoris Ferrenz welcomes Lord Captain {name} von Valancius. I second my colleague's statement."
1c5da9a6-cb9d-4718-bcaa-9b124e33ff16: Unintelligible voices break through the crackling hiss of the vox.
101bc993-bc92-4f20-b361-2fe5414be15d: {n}The colonel's strength fails him and he drops heavily to his knee. Whatever force drives him, it still keeps the old beast from falling, but he has no strength left to continue the fight...{/n}
3d8e7b1a-e6f8-4b8c-acd4-4548a934c370: "Life is a duty, not merely a right. A person must live as long as they are able to bring benefit to the Imperium."
62386e25-1f45-495a-bfbf-d53365457d5b: "So what do I do now? Charge at the Drover with a knife?"
2aaa900a-1fd5-4769-a399-964ffef90d74: Sparked enmity between the Zarkovian troops and the flagship's enforcers.
406027c3-fb9d-406c-928d-8003217d02c8: Tilt the scales in Juvenna's favour
6bb6fa6b-c4d8-46d2-a4de-d53d85f3e9c8: Deemed the extermination of enemies to be the greatest mission of Humanity.
1fb15b7b-7c50-4405-8a5d-a0ca8d032c6e: "Your acting talent is not enough to refute what is plainly obvious, Juvenna. You have betrayed Seberian."
f6a06b9f-f784-48a2-8ba5-7810c51cc289: The Rogue Trader has discovered a replica of the Dargonus palace under siege.
166b3373-6845-466b-bccd-d6ffdc88b208: "You need not fear the fruits of carnage, servant — the warrior fears only cowardice, which leaves no scars!"
7cf4f2fc-cde4-4346-8302-356fc4949c42: "Quite right, heir of Seberian, quite right..." {n}The colonel thoughtfully grinds his teeth while staring at you.{/n}
5a42c9a4-3a49-455c-8d01-2a87bbb0e1b1: "He said you were going to disconnect the platform from the Motive Force and eliminate the station's workers. That does not sound like the behaviour of righteous servants of the Omnissiah."
4302f609-406d-43c9-9fbf-1f6ded2d85d6: {n}Almost instantly, liquid flame spreads through your body. Pain pierces every nerve. After a few seconds, it begins to subside... but it does not go away completely. The slightest movement sends a scream of agony through your brain.{/n}
adf4f55f-98d5-4daa-81ac-682f6dd5a42e: {n}Your ancestor's final resting place is so simple it would be an affront to the tastes of any Rogue Trader.{/n}
8b0a73f0-c0e7-43ee-97c5-98a7619e629e: "Truth is earned through devotion. Now that we are allies, be prepared to listen."
47a210b3-b766-4ae0-a560-e82c1d98e862: "Do you mean to say that you admit defeat and wish to surrender?"
c58c5a6c-741a-4efa-82d4-fd56d9b5e7d8: When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.
042842ea-0eee-4df9-8346-b2b8c33a9cbb: "It is merely an illusion intended to distract you from the truth. Don't waste your time on it."
36ab3b8a-b764-4f25-866d-71566b6a9ff9: "Finely honed rhetoric means saying a great deal, yet revealing nothing." {n}Eogunn smiles faintly.{/n} "A choice in name only. This summons is hardly a request, Rogue Trader."
d498deb8-08ea-4ba4-894e-1f21af92926c: Chains up to 4 targets within a 3-cell radius.
ebb568ad-17bb-4e11-992c-12e23a7bc745: Shoots a salvo of toxic slime that falls down right before the start of the flower's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}. Any creatures within the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g} suffer 50 {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. The area of effect is marked on the battlefield after the salvo is cast.
e02e61ef-cdc5-4753-81e1-4a6244d38e52: "I didn't know I was serving a heretic! I'm loyal to the God-Emperor!"
911ee395-e3e0-4e0e-8190-3da8bfa0a735: {n}The sheen of sweat appears on Jarub's patchily shaven cheeks.{/n} "I know what you're getting at. I had the same thought: since my life's worthless to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, I've got nothing to lose. I'll swipe the sword and make myself disappear. I'll take myself off to {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, fence it there for a decent amount, and start a new life away from all these horrors. I've never been one for fighting, at any rate, or for seeing the error of my ways."
4a554cda-6cba-467b-b32b-94e835e03022: "I never thought I'd find a {mf|nobleman|noblewoman} having dealings with this scum." {n}The captain narrows his one good eye and glares at Jarub.{/n} "How did you manage to involve {mf|him|her} in your chicanery, Jarub? What are the two of you doing here? Don't play coy with me. This clearly isn't your first meeting."
50e081e0-a4dc-4cef-8ee7-808e324902f8: "Oh, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I beg your pardon, I was distracted and didn't see you right away." {n}Vedka snaps to attention and clicks her heels.{/n} "Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski is ready to serve!"
d0c97016-2174-4918-a5ab-04075b7ba23a: The freed prisoners clashed in a furious battle for the slimmest chance of escape from the eerie halls of the Museion.
9d83e873-d6ef-4737-9400-485e54bd0510: "Seberian is the one who should be upset. If my Seneschal allowed this to happen to me, I would be deeply disappointed."
5def9f97-0ad9-4c51-8388-16c67922b540: [Introduce yourself as a {mf|lord|lady} of House Gaprak]
dc037b3d-daca-420b-86c1-92f89ccc017d: "Thank you for your vigilance, {name}. We have just eliminated one of the most significant threats to the dynasty." {n}Laria gestures toward the enforcer.{/n} "Lady von Valancius's safety shall be your responsibility, Lieutenant. Do not leave her side even for a moment." {n}The Seneschal turns her attention to Juvenna, who is trying to protest.{/n} "It is for your own good, noble heir."
5fbfe147-dd4e-4de0-8c46-82af2979097f: "So I see. Many of the sermons and dogmas of the Ecclesiarchy and our Handbook have now taken on a new meaning for me. I will share it with the Zarkovians."
874882f7-139b-46c1-b275-bcf628afc4d8: [Connect your data-slate to the memory module]
43829db3-da56-4ae4-a286-d350ec1ef0aa: {n}The body to which Nuncius is connected is a crude parody of a human being sewn together from various body parts. The hands, with their long, graceful fingers, appear to be a woman's; the angular feet suggest they came from a man of low birth; and the powerful torso, with its well-developed muscles, might have belonged to a soldier or an aristocrat. Beneath the translucent pale skin lies a network of dark tubes running through the muscles and ligaments. When you peer into the gaping trachea, you see the quivering folds of the vocal cords with wires attached to them. It seems they have been trying to make Nuncius speak.{/n}
e22505b0-9f78-48b3-bde3-bb7f314475da: For each stack of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, the energy and {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt by Eogunn is increased by an amount equal to the increased shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} he suffers from this effect after applying all modifiers.
d8dec7db-88d9-41d9-a5ff-d421d6645613: "It's a shame not all the commanders made it. But we will scribe their names and sing a song in their honour."
405a53a6-c6d2-4c94-a1c5-253d2144c95e: [Signal to Exalt-117] "Careful preparation for the battle is sensible, isn't it?"
920d4694-fd27-4f5d-a82f-dcb9cca9f245: "Pardon my impertinence, would Your Lordship care to hear from your vassals before the battle?"
fbbd9566-1fef-453d-b70e-9218959c494e: "The sword depicted on the canvas was forged by xenos. It is an Aeldari weapon."
0adcf4c8-b971-4267-b734-1bf8f617006f: The retreat instantly became a panicked flight. Even the Rogue Trader's retinue, hardened through hundreds of battles, did not escape unscathed: I heard the groan of servo-motors as the creatures ripped off the mechadendrite of one Magos, and saw other creatures tear stragglers to pieces. As we fled, leaving a bloody trail behind us, spurred on by a faint hope of salvation... we did not even notice that our pursuers had fallen back. My scion and I were left among our wounded comrades and a handful of thoroughly exhausted humans.
54f7033a-8e77-4eda-b169-7b2ad33a11d6: Chosen warriors of Zarkov shall undergo the ritual of extensive augmentation, vastly increasing their combat skills through rare and powerful implants. These elite fighters shall become known throughout the Expanse as the Giftbearers, preserving the memory of the von Valancius dynasty's largesse. The sacred duty of the Giftbearers shall be to extract implants from fallen comrades to pass them on to future brothers- and sisters-in-arms.
c218d7e5-d558-4e86-be79-65e82665af08: {n}Camilla Drivestem meets your eye and raises her delicately defined brows enquiringly.{/n}
fb9efc27-b019-4ee6-87e1-2e41eef99f60: "He will live, but the stimulants won't replace that part of his brain. If we implant the sacred cortical augment in his skull, it will restore his lost ability to think and act. Lord Captain, please! Your subject has a genuine need for this augmentation!"
62d8d212-a8aa-4898-b052-fbe5500c2fef: "Very well, I will let it pass. This time."
730ecea3-cbf8-4432-9deb-f10c9e9bc8e0: "I suppose I can keep your secret. But remember, you owe me."
eae2df01-9668-42c7-a5c0-b19829da964f: "Sauerback was on guard at the outpost today with only his people."
be09acb5-b1c8-46d9-ba06-65b3f43dfe72: "Nuncius has drawn my attention to the fact that this creature possesses a distinctive signalling system, together with a host of behavioural rituals. The Omnissiah teaches that Comprehension is the true path to Knowledge. If we are to subdue this creature, then we must first learn and correctly interpret its reactions to various... stressors."
c7b6a2a4-d9c0-4dad-9e18-e0798785afc9: "I think you have drawn the wrong conclusion from all this."
8ff35167-5fde-4ae9-9da8-717691328f9e: "Keep your hands where I can see them, and perhaps you will live long enough to stand trial for your assault upon my title."
c41fb3b8-19b2-4b76-b996-1a1bb0cc087d: This creature's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} are reduced by −25. Can be removed and fully healed on the voidship's bridge
b7994ff8-83c6-4c93-be60-852be5f55b52: Eogunn grants the effect of {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} to an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cells. That ally becomes immune to Eogunn's attacks, some types of which will always ricochet to random enemies. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.
462463e2-980c-440f-883c-fc98ae10f3a4: You must obtain the access codes to the palace gates and give them to Juvenna.
1bc4a1a7-4e85-4a59-91e6-dd69e391a1b2: [Address your ancestor's retinue] "I might spare Seberian himself, but you shall be executed as common rabble."
fe567dd0-3e30-46e8-90d4-407f6da34da8: "The inspection protocol indicated that the sacred machine was contaminated with xenoheresy, identified as the 'anchor-core,' at least 30 full turns ago. Artisan Decabalus-4-16 was in charge of the station for the entire time specified. He communicated with the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the drill complex and personally consecrated it. He could not have been unaware of the tech-corruption powering its internal mechanisms."
da86c97b-5f76-436b-b5fd-b7f634a86eb3: {n}The erudite and complex construct opts not to comment on your witty remark.{/n}
934f64cc-68f7-4644-b52f-ba9d5d516402: "Why did you want to talk to me?"
96e4aeb8-89fc-4f98-995d-65b918992009: "You had the nerve to place Camilla Drivestem under arrest! She is our ally. Her years and position grant her the right to speak quite directly to Seberian. You have deprived us of much-needed support!"
62712dd4-2ecc-4f56-a135-15985198e8b6: "Seberian is mired in heresy. Sooner or later, he will fall. I do not wish to waste my efforts on a doomed man."
5d695582-b266-45b4-a857-a71951d61ff7: "The dynasty's banner... Enforcer... Lorrrinque!" {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "Ch... check the arsenaaal! The slashing sword and... bulwark of the dynasty! I gave my life... because of... my duty. My duty..."
6f2a617a-69a8-47a5-ab10-b64dd2f4b727: "Do not reproach yourself. It is just that you and I have played this round before."
1be9b8ce-64c7-42bb-9b40-224543898ae2: [Point at Trazyn] "Death to the xenos! Enforcers, to arms!"
71c86c1d-9e01-4c6e-87e5-e6a9a3bd048b: "Solomorne, help the Zarkovians to organise the defence of their settlements. Danrok, provide the colony with supplies from the outside. We will wait until this is over."
0b17c8dc-4bf7-4975-bbca-c2db3eee8740: [Nod to Camilla] "The duchess has always supported Lady Juvenna."
266db649-21d1-4fe4-a604-250754ab4e9e: [Show him Seberian's diary] "If you don't believe me, then look at this. The truth is written in your own hand."
1a99f363-9d03-4a52-a701-fcdae8f61696: "I am pleased it's over and done with. I hope we never meet again."
8555e11e-9261-499c-95f7-229d07e0f5ef: {n}The Tech-Priest bows decorously.{/n} "Then all that remains is to find a way to Amsanct."
70def697-9dd4-420d-8d23-8b87baf2c251: "My physical integrity has been restored. I had to closely inspect my flesh and augments, purging the xenos corruption from everything I could... But I fear that the only way I can expel the foulness is by performing purification rituals on the ship under the holy machinery of the Sector Bionica. I suspect that many more of my implants are tainted, but I, at least, am functional. My mind, however, is in turmoil — the flaw of irrationality veils my thoughts like a shroud. But I will cast it off — to succumb would be to concede the xenos's victory. I will not allow it!"
0311f45e-e88f-4e95-a696-d5e4bca65d38: Legitimising the governor's authority with a noble title will hasten Zarkov's integration into the Imperium. To honour the newly appointed ruler, the factions of the Expanse shall dispatch offerings to Zarkov, fostering the planet's prosperity.
a710659a-e98a-4814-b061-337e0c3454ab: "Now, then. Was there something you wanted to discuss?"
d4fc61de-2247-4c2c-86a3-8ada35517bec: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Your arrival is bound to bring change, and few people are fond of change. Some believe that rejoining the Imperium will lead to trouble because of the regiment's history. There are others, like myself, of course, who have no fear of meeting His servants, and we look forward to the day when we can return to serving Humanity. These disagreements have never been anything more than a reason to chew the fat on patrol, but now... Regardless, all of us will swear the oath, you can be sure of that! If anyone refuses, we'll grant them final atonement ourselves."
49e57ce7-27a7-4898-862d-13dab5eae759: "Chorda is getting sloppy. He used his {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} connections to give me utter dregs, whom he tried to pass off as elite troops. But I can only thank him for his lack of judgement. Those with nothing to lose make the most loyal servants, once they feel but a modicum of their master's good graces. Lowly scum no more, they will be the sword and shield of House von Valancius, in faithful service to me and my descendants."
f717b0f3-0b79-4a8e-8f7b-a9dea5849189: As soon as you pick up the blade, the guards rush from their places. You raise the sword to defend yourself — and it shatters like glass.
963d584a-523b-4392-86fe-4f7d514dd558: "Leave me al— to my duties, if you please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
cfa36fc5-f101-40de-b432-b6333108775e: With the monster defeated, the Lord Captain is finally able to inspect {mf|his|her} ancestor's crypt.
299d2689-1b17-4d38-82ac-6d3b828ab73f: "No, mon-keigh. This world belongs to the enemy."
69a0a53a-dfbd-4ae8-816f-0cc54e24002f: "Inform them that the Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself} has graced them with {mf|his|her} presence, and will permit them to raise prayers to the implantation throne."
04ea93b5-dee8-4dfe-b419-7b24967b0810: "And truly, it is none of my business."
3c652bf6-e0c4-44cb-ace6-6cc5ca9412e2: "You are the Lord Captain. The decision is yours alone."
08c29482-4ca7-4521-b485-d914f210d1ba: {n}Batoshski only grunts wordlessly by way of reply.{/n}
f11043a4-a6b8-44c2-9a24-51140ad667b4: "I will keep your secret, but remember — your good name and your life are in my hands now."
e1bca273-7223-41a4-9eb3-b1a61aeab59d: "As an engine generates motion in sacred mechanical nodes, so your instructions guide the servants of the Sector Bionica. The medicae officers share our gratitude. Know that if frail flesh should betray you, the iron shoulder of the ship's Tech-Priests will be here for you to lean on."
ffb1e9c0-9505-4871-b9fe-bc796f41c997: {n}Crimson furrows stand out upon your ancestor's lumpen brow as his living eye narrows in anger.{/n} "Is that so? Your response reminds me strikingly of Juvenna. So, her spirit endures across the centuries, while my own endeavours have faded to nothing. I shall call you heir, {name}, but only because I see no alternative... for now." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."
b142d073-5657-485f-af32-4c2a697ece16: "Yes. Gnotec. He would have made sergeant of Deck 2 Voidsman Unit someday. The pride of the Schwartz family. You were there too, as I recall... and you let him die." {n}The expression on the woman's face shifts strangely.{/n}
0bae65cf-02d1-42ca-86ff-1864aa9e8156: "Deliver it to the ship and make a weapon."
2e69e03b-2760-4ce4-9907-b5bcf9c41a7a: {n}Batoshski's intense gaze presses against your chest with almost physical force.{/n} "The First Call-Up. Our predecessors swore an oath of loyalty to your ancestor, heir of Seberian. We intend to fulfil it. One way or another..."
982b21d3-c840-4bad-9259-979501aee6c8: "We should all be taken into custody and tried for such a crime against this sacred relic..." {n}Solomorne is completely still, not permitting any new movement to further damage the Warrant.{/n}
2553e12f-2349-4822-a109-0022c5bf4218: Eogunn fell at the hand of his former comrade, along with many of the Adeptus Mechanicus in the Expanse. All his accumulated knowledge of xenotechnology was nothing against the monstrous power unleashed upon him by the one who had formerly borne the name {name} von Valancius.
d96b9894-9350-4f80-b81d-64b4985a6a81: "The duchess decided to settle some old scores with the Gapraks. She needed an agent who knew how to hold a gun... and their tongue. I agreed. My payment was to be a hereditary title of nobility. I may have made myself a criminal, but my heirs will be aristocrats. My conscience is a small price to pay for such a boon."
ed0ee7a0-82ed-486c-a0ca-af9b7209578b: {n}Laria looks at you like an interrogator about to question a suspect.{/n} "I do not know how you got here, but I won't let you distract the Lord Captain with any nonsense. I know all of Seberian's closest subjects. You are not one of them."
7d596608-4a20-40ac-a345-9d25340fed88: {n}Argenta gazes bitterly at her fellow Sister of Battle, frozen in eternal imprisonment.{/n} "We should have found a way to free this noble sister... but all these years in unholy captivity may have riddled her soul and body with corruption..." {n}She shakes her head and turns away.{/n}
86cae530-d679-4f62-8e3d-b0f5648a97e6: "Perhaps your kind may yet one day learn to live in harmony with the worlds it has subjugated."
8278dd8c-196e-4294-b7e7-efa38323732e: "Every day it gets worse and worse."
1185e172-f29b-4788-85ac-fae91d548f7e: A creature standing in this area suffers the {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductivity{/g} effect.
92645ea9-bc1d-4b91-b400-2db3064f7bf5: {n}Drifting toward the servitor, Eogunn runs his auspex across the servitor's entire frame with surprising meticulousness, staring closely at the readouts.{/n} "That is indeed true. The behavioural patterns of this servitor have severely degraded due to an irreconcilable conflict between consciousness and augmetics. It is imprudent to leave a personality within a vessel whose volition is entirely supplanted by the imperatives of the sacred iron."
ff9afefc-8eeb-4757-bd89-62c15ef83b8b: "Clarification of terms — or rephrasing — is intended to make the context of statements more easily understood by unordained individuals." {n}Decabalus spreads his hands slightly.{/n} "Statistics — calculations performed by sacred machines — show that it has a positive effect on communication."
82411eed-d449-4b79-841a-0ecd473c6f7d: "An obvious solution, one would think, colleague." {n}He taps the casing of his battery with a mechadendrite.{/n} "But, alas, an inapplicable one. All the Motive Force stored within my galvanic coils would sustain the lift for but a moment, since its hunger is too great. Only the generator can truly sate it."
e679908e-d0c8-4d04-9d1c-a7ac8ea48b57: {n}The autopistol in the woman's hands shakes, the sight that was previously pointed unwaveringly at the Vivisector's head now veering away.{/n}
b5d2a7ab-d531-4755-9db4-096b1f4d1fb8: "This statement is false. The construction of a spaceport upon Vheabos VI is without utility. For the needs of the Cult Mechanicus, the logistical support of forge worlds holds the highest priority." {n}Pasqal's optical implant flickers several times.{/n} "I acknowledge, however, that for laypeople this particular chain of logic is not entirely self-evident."
b43e9104-9e1e-40d2-a3b0-a10a7efa8245: {n}Heinrix pitches his voice low so that only you can hear:{/n} "He seems to have mistaken us — you — for an agent of the Inquisition."
a62aa2de-cf6b-4ccd-aadc-83b13113a390: "I shall come, and I truly hope this relic is indeed worth my attention."
fadd78ce-529d-40fc-ba04-4376d12faa54: "Because you're going out there to kill the Drover. If you pull it off, its death will be a gift to the entire regiment. If you die, but my advice helps you wound it first, then at least we'll have a chance to finish it off later."
d1a9f468-e322-448a-b587-b7ab61584894: "Nothing." {n}The captain replies dryly and succinctly.{/n} "I don't know their numbers or their possible time of arrival."
16d3b572-29ba-4b51-ae6c-aec92be005d6: "That is all I have for now."
590af031-2366-486a-8b1f-c0a78f8066c0: {n}The flames do not take hold immediately, as if the portrait were resisting its doom. The face of the ancient hero first becomes covered in a layer of melted paint, as if drenched in horror, and then curves in a malevolent snarl and collapses in on itself.{/n}
900b2b3f-c779-4c4f-9d45-fa5136682e57: "When we return to my ship, you will be having a serious chat with the Master-at-Arms and her power maul."
3a39bc96-a84c-439e-873b-314b02be4527: {n}Those standing before you look utterly spent. Dark circles ring their eyes and their movements are jittery and frantic. Every sign speaks of people pushed to the very brink.{/n}
4a5a63a4-f105-491b-ae3b-7b4987c52b63: "I have had the honour of knowing many Gapraks in the course of my long life, but I do not recall you. You must be of the younger branch, my dear? You most surely have the severity of Subord Shab in you. But then those eyes... Kalivin branch? No, no, I'm losing my touch — you are decidedly Noblis Minoris Uratli!"
2e096307-bdba-4fd6-b041-a2ee04a3eafa: "No one outside this Chamber must learn that the Warrant has vanished until I find a way to recover it."
3ea39e90-5dbc-4c76-9e80-7e1f145408aa: The Manipulus is ready to begin the experiment — he is waiting for the Rogue Trader by the operating tables.
d26f74df-f2cb-4751-926e-8c1bebe5903f: "Not the worst way to take power, I suppose. Less destructive than a rebellion, at least."
c367d40f-8a2a-44e3-9a1f-b2a33337513e: Ruthless and hungry for redemption in death, the Merovians, dubbed the "Zarkov Penitents," became one of the main strike forces in the von Valancius protectorate in the eternal struggle against the enemies of Humanity.
ada3a9c3-76e8-4a9d-b6e0-38bb8fae7315: [Take a closer look at the crowd]
891ce2f2-40c2-40a6-aa28-0c80f5505720: {n}Colonel Batoshski scowls at you. His bright green eyes are bloodshot and a low growl escapes through his teeth.{/n} "I am Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. I welcome you to the Cage, heir of Seberian."
c1e2aeca-48df-478d-b3f6-f600bed9c268: {n}Eogunn meets the Cold Trader's words with unexpected approval.{/n} "Suppressing the central nervous system with socially approved toxins is indeed a peculiar ritual of the laity, in which it would be fascinating to engage — most notably under the guidance of Mistress Heydari! Isn't it better to let loose the reins on our neural pathways and face doom with joy and excitement, than to let existential dread swallow us whole?"
0a509e24-ffec-40a6-8a8b-d18218e91b5b: {n}Sauerback wrinkles his nose in distaste at the smell of burnt flesh, and returns his plasma pistol to its holster.{/n}
396fa156-6496-4fb4-b4a6-058bc47b7e66: "You already have your reward, Trazyn — Nomos. The C'tan will remain in Humanity's possession, no matter what tricks you try to play on my mind."
10c26a72-3492-4242-b037-92a4e4c7097e: "We are in a trap, Laria. Something is happening to reality that is causing it to repeat itself forever."
4211efa9-dde5-4853-b173-591b12998c18: "Lord Captain, you... you came!" {n}The one-eyed man hesitates and bows awkwardly.{/n} "We have a request! A petition! To authorise the {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} of workers below the rank of junior officer in the Sector Bionica due to the need to increase the efficiency of the workforce." {n}He blurts out the obviously memorised words in a rapid stream, then adds peevishly:{/n} "The vermin don't want to give us iron arms and legs! But we just want to work, for the good of you and the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}!"
ac283e27-4b19-49b2-82b7-885161531048: "Colonel, what are these leaf cocoons with the bodies inside?"
557a7d1b-d837-47a3-887e-47a168c09dec: "Everything is clear to me. Let's talk about something else."
1a51d65d-172f-4d56-9866-4d215e15340a: "Juvenna's progeny in all its glory." {n}Seberian's iron hand involuntarily grasps the empty air at his hip, as if searching for a missing hilt.{/n} "Boasting, verbal poison, and barren intrigue in place of deeds. Deplorable. My word is this: prove yourself worthy of my name, or I shall deem the Warrant unlawfully usurped five centuries ago and take it back for myself."
a460492d-9681-4d48-9ba0-a753518d59d1: "Merely spice for the meal, heir of Seberian. This poison will tingle the nerves, nothing more."
cf6aa44e-30d0-41ff-89b6-961e50315606: "They shall wait. I have more pressing matters at hand."
27c7ba82-b77c-47c5-8876-1e0a74dd4bd1: The fluid curves of the xenos creation are unlike any piece of machinery you have ever seen.
6d921482-8e45-4783-8746-bff3627c44a2: "My personal comm-bead isn't working either. Normally, the flagship can reach me, but now there's some kind of interference."
8980184c-2d12-4870-abe1-0d733cde115f: "Pain and an unquenchable thirst for life... This ship reminds me more and more of a true reflection of mon-keigh nature."
e5b3de48-e9ca-4848-a5fc-b99eff412445: Until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} for each {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} scored if they have an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in the cortical insertion.
7fd67a24-8283-4bb6-aceb-404157b04f48: "And what horrifies you exactly? The fear you feel is awe in the face of something far stronger than you. Become stronger, and the Archenemy will become a weapon."
c63ecf77-1b2a-4f16-9feb-564d82c7908d: "My, quite the oddity he has become! Send him to the upper decks, and let the officers marvel and make sport of him."
dbae048d-a7d2-411b-9caa-dde4d19afaea: The sacred archeotech is damaged, and it can only be repaired by a servant of the Machine God possessing high rank and the blessing of the Motive Force. Such a person may be sought on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 in the Furibundus System.
d88f8566-ddb3-4d31-b0ad-2d86fd1eb27b: The proper functioning of the anti-aircraft battery serves as an additional argument in favour of defence.
c203189a-9186-42dc-9cb6-86b7faeec86b: The cogitator's vid-screen flickers and then falls blank.
b6ddc7af-b8a8-4614-bcf5-06e073fe61a8: {n}Eogunn's vox-speaker emits a low-pitched hum, in which you can discern the Manipulus's binharic identifier.{/n} "Identification recognised, esteemed Magos Exalt-117. Curiously, my archived data-logs have deactivated this identifier due to the expiration of the holder."
caa4616d-d1ae-488a-909f-682af61e8169: "What do you think my next step should be?"
2848b9d1-329c-4d69-bcb4-fee62c43f1ce: "How is your military responding to these accusations of heresy?"
a92b6d4c-719f-4fa2-9c0f-11129b8b4c67: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty faithfully for decades, inspiring the fighters of Zarkov by her example. Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. Vedka died suppressing an uprising on one of the protectorate's new colonies, killed by the commandant she had trusted to oversee the colony's security.
36895948-e078-4312-bf37-8dea9075b396: The attack dogs of the champion of Chaos, the 32nd Merov Regiment was written into the annals of the Koronus Expanse with a red-hot stylus. Brutal and merciless killers who drenched entire planets in blood, they struck terror in all who dared oppose their commander-in-chief.
ff3640f2-d4da-4f14-be19-dff2eaff26e7: "Why did you wish to speak to me?"
7054e7a1-3714-4abe-852b-8a9ba317b0e7: "Why not just hand over command of the regiment, since it's been foretold?"
6fa34554-4364-4248-b90c-ced1c08c6c0d: "You ought to be celebrating the fact that one person has actually managed to come to your aid."
75519234-36ed-4568-b82c-d1442db9c0b5: "The bet was over us making it to the stars — that hasn't happened yet!"
885d55ad-e596-4fc3-a5b1-320de091ad08: "A grox still knows more than you. What if I'm telling the truth?"
ee00ede7-d2f8-44f9-b851-3143c06bbd8a: "'Tis a strange feeling. The Sauerbacks — no one worth knowing in my day — have ascended to noble status, while House Affinati, glorious in my time, has vanished without a trace..." {n}Seberian's vox rasps and goes dead, as if his augmentation has momentarily stopped working. Whatever the reason, your ancestor clearly has no intention of continuing.{/n}
6021caf5-5059-4689-954c-00269e36863e: {n}Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski's voice rings out crisp and clear, as if on parade.{/n} "For centuries, we have awaited this moment, hoping to witness it. And now we are here. We have survived, from the First Call-Up unto our own!"
c85154db-5185-4fd9-bcac-caa869cfe79f: "Jocasta, take him away. And make sure his suffering lasts as long as possible."
c22f081c-d37b-467b-a0ff-dac81750e944: "Our agreement ended when we fulfilled our obligations." {n}Trazyn turns to you, vicious satisfaction seeping into his voice.{/n} "Your trophy belongs to me now, and our paths part here."
0c945a47-a16d-49de-af76-1407f4ced3a1: {n}The console that controls the monstrous device seems to grow out of the metal floor. The matte black panels are dotted with chains of glowing glyphs and a few protruding orbs.{/n}
d86ffe3c-bac9-4eca-a3b2-2aac9887be65: "Omnissiah preserve all those who fell defending His word to the last spark, though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all."
2bd09a60-2cf9-4cc7-8b7e-cf1f4f3091b6: "You will not be alone. We will do this together."
a0657984-a2bd-446a-8eb0-a6b51470c78a: "Calcazar. That kin of yours, whose footsteps led you to this region. He is hiding something on one of the Tomb Worlds... something valuable. Something for which the so-called 'Yoke' was created. The Lord Inquisitor's ambitions are ludicrous in their grandiosity and doomed to fail, which is why I am making you an offer: I will help you deal with this human and the consequences of his deeds, and you — you will give me what he so covets and fears."
bb5663b4-1062-46fe-b0e4-fd1d46655156: "An expendable life form to be utilised in void battles, one of thousands."
750e6a2d-62d9-4da2-9513-056dd54e1a73: "Wait, Pasqal was also serving on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 back then! You two weren't acquainted?"
9865a988-4e79-4cd2-8a17-02ad8680dcd2: "What happened does not give you the right to kill my people. They are subjects of the God-Emperor, who bleed for Humanity — just like you!"
39ebb825-0a45-40e8-9e10-9cf9942fe897: Standard scanning could not reveal a route to the selected system, but you can still get there by spending points of Navigator's insight to plot a guaranteed direct path. Click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on the system and use {g|Encyclopedia:NavigatorsInsight}Navigator's insight{/g} to chart the course.
9de62284-55d8-4a65-8fa2-4a67e82e4a98: "Let go of any hope of glimpsing the soul of the Lilaethan. You are clever for a mon-keigh, but your heart is as shrivelled as any other's."
b2bd6173-7d29-44a7-99bf-1800b53a50c4: "Oh, are we on first name terms now? Very bold." {n}Her plump lips spread into a sardonic grin.{/n} "I'm intrigued. Let's say you're right — and what of it? It is your word against mine, and I doubt Seberian will believe you."
56eed171-0934-4191-a061-59953734acab: The cogitator is little more than a melted shell, with its frost-covered circuitry laid bare. This kind of damage is usually caused by plasma weaponry.
347d7207-fed7-4182-b9bc-5946753d13e6: [Yawn obviously] "To wait for you to stop asking me questions?"
8d88a8a1-a260-4436-bb9c-d941d00b956c: {n}Eogunn closes his organic eye, deep in thought. Finally, his face breaks into a smile.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. This is it, the solution to our dilemma. I will begin the triasomia procedure. May organic flesh and sacred machinery be one!"
c6524891-c94b-41d0-8ed5-d4090d102801: [Pull out your chrono] "I shall give you one minute to explain yourself."
ede8830e-c461-42d2-b8d8-270fb20c0f14: {n}What Tervantias has left of Eogunn is a pitiful scrap of a still-living creature. Most of the Tech-Priest's {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} have been roughly torn from his skull, and the ragged edges of his shredded scalp reveal glistening white bone. Everything below the chin is gone — nothing remains but a segment of augmented spine, resembling a bloody spike with wires and tubes snaking from it.{/n}
222c700b-3e41-4da0-bcd8-136cf4c47fef: "This entire platform is suffused with evidence, layperson. The impossibly low metal degradation ratio, the Motive Force being supplied with no identifiable source, the complete absence of thermal overload described in the sacred tech-designs. When you see the anchor-core, you will understand."
de15fac1-9eb7-4ccd-ac25-9e1221a20a01:
Eogunn can target himself with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
He does not gain {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} but can make an additional attack instead. While under the effect of this ability, Eogunn gains +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.
78a88574-94ce-46ff-b110-909f433603e2: {n}The vox-station apparatus has been expertly built into the wall, with slim cables and miniature levers that perfectly match the colour of the stone. You can only find it if you know exactly where to look.{/n}
f424548f-891c-4f4a-9634-a97ae88222f6: "He is my dearest colleague and indispensable assistant."
ce268150-a07b-493c-a3fd-3e5dec702389: {n}Your officers reach for their weapons and look around in surprise. Trazyn laughs acerbically.{/n} "Your subjects have no power to harm what is not there. You see and hear only a projection generated by my tampering with your brain. Accept my presence — from now on, you will serve as my viewpoint."
bd4d816b-023c-4f49-a7fb-dbd46ba95c84: "I never dared hope that you'd care about us wretches!"
46931204-04d8-48d1-a850-8155548d5525: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn returns his attention to you.{/n} "I have a request — I need to prepare before this journey. Before I joined the clergy of Altar-Templum-Ext-17, I had a small laboratory in the Aviorus System. I was forced to leave it in haste for my own safety, and important samples and records of my experiments remained there. If we want to help Nuncius, we must retrieve them."
8afa2027-6730-450b-83e0-1e16fdc0048d:
The user immediately gains +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.
At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they suffer {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} until the end of combat.
de8ef6ce-cfa3-456a-a586-11aa3b458ffb: "Alert the Sector Bionica: I wish to have a new augment installed."
7f4a653c-7370-42f7-b69b-cc7af192970b: "I hate wasting time on fruitless endeavours."
ffd96deb-618b-41a4-a7fa-6229975e8be9: "Error. The requested identifier 'Nuncius' is not recognised."
92993bce-82e2-4acb-bb36-0b71ec5c9fe5: {n}The clerics of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMinistorumGlossary}Adeptus Ministorum{/g} would deem such an act the heresy of oathbreaking, for you would be refusing to continue in the service of the God-Emperor. But in this case, duty does not end even in death.{/n}
60f034fd-2caa-4f5b-a2cb-0e94ae7c3250: "I, too, believe you should attempt to achieve a peaceful outcome."
b9860a24-0177-43d1-a003-2723f01d9815: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I have my orders, but Captain Dunawski's death would mean the end of the Cage as we know it! Please, by the God-Emperor, send her back."
722d2e44-e409-40ed-bcaf-f6f907d59111: [Touch the glowing orb in the frame on the left]
d1817b72-b06e-4b48-9674-48e68aa1492c: "I will inform the crew of your decision. Should you wish to bless the procession with your attention after all, please speak to me on the bridge."
ec0f5bf4-0c44-48a2-8f9f-b3ee1b98fe98: {n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder. After traversing the now-cleared path, Decabalus's hastily bandaged Tech-Priests come to stand behind you, along with the Artisan himself.{/n} "Gratitude: your assistance in clearing the path of traps was extremely effective."
4041156e-dbbc-4fde-8af3-a52fbc66714a: The decapitated serpentine xenos stands upright, its claws splayed wide in a vicious gesture. By some means, life is still sustained within it.
06db251a-07ba-45ae-a7cb-b87d9591bcbd: "The service life of this life form lapsed long ago, but the installed augmentation is of rare quality — it will be functional for hundreds of cycles yet to come. The sacred machine's efficiency is seriously compromised by the substandard biological part." {n}The Genetor's visors are directed unmistakably at the old man's gaunt frame.{/n} "The principles of maximum-efficiency service require immediate replacement of the augmetic carrier."
9c2a8c6b-dac7-4ce6-be74-6b1bd96f2f05: "O wisest of men, if you ever need someone to keep an eye on your chambers, I'd be only too pleased to oblige! You wouldn't mind giving me a tour, would you?"
aed76fe6-c3c7-43c3-8f63-35b5125da5a2: "The flora displays heightened adaptability and aggression that is rarely characteristic of its kind. I suspect external xeno-interference. Nuncius, make all the necessary preparations for collecting test samples."
102d124a-e0d9-4a22-898e-95f95280f0fc: "Seberian von Valancius...? What do we know about him?"
c47f8ab7-f3bb-4162-9c7a-924cc00a7075: {n}And so that cursed place became home to xenomonsters, who packed themselves into the corridors of the tomb. For the iron dead, regaining their freedom will be no easy task.{/n}
f137e45c-7f43-4a64-94a3-c14127cfb495: "I see no convincing reasons to reassess, much less interfere with the permanent establishment of these nascent bonds. Harmony is born out of disharmony, such is the alchemical principle. Just wait, colleague, patience is a virtue."
69f03874-cc87-444e-b46e-820e58f47b93: "You say we are in a time loop? My people have not yet managed to learn anything substantive about the Gaprak reinforcements. But with such advantages as infinite time and margin for error on your side, you are bound to succeed. Find out what happened to our allies' army, and then I will be able to call you a friend of the dynasty."
8700384e-af50-4c87-9752-a04e159e5ba4: [Turn to the helm of the Imperial vessel]
31e25f39-6c17-4c28-ba37-2f67723d029b: "Your arrival is a sign from above. Of this I am certain."
97a073d7-5f7d-40b0-924f-9c5b3be66624: "Inquisitor af Irramon furnished me with this call sign. Elana the Unshaken was a true martyr who perished while remaining steadfast in her faith. She teaches that one must never doubt His light even in the darkest hour, for there is always a disaster more terrible, and the Imperial Creed is the only thing a person can rely on."
cf67c246-2bb6-478e-a2eb-6342a84809c0: "Your friend's skull that you keep beside you, priest. It serves as your eternal tribute to the Undying One, does it not?"
368aa146-d547-4f08-b857-02fa978c39b8: "Death walks beside the new priest in the crimson robe, I can feel it. The word of the Undying One has touched his ears as it touched mine. But has it been heard?"
447982d6-8148-47b6-be0f-101f44a3d95e: "Why do you wear black robes? Don't all Tech-Priests wear red?"
9407edfe-134b-4094-8974-fc6b8c873b19: "Janur, keep out of my way. I will not have you underfoot."
9025e559-2220-42ff-84d2-2a967ef05ad8: The creature gains +80% {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} reduction, +3 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}, +20% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}, +25% damage, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}, and +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.
46df8117-7ef9-492e-ab01-c2c83c709b82: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Governor Batoshski{/d} is to the north-east, holding the red robes' chapel. They say he's run out of ammunition, but that hasn't stopped him from breaking those xenofiends with his bare hands."
299f84c8-1963-45ac-885e-575b4ecdca6b: "I knew that nothing human was alien to you, O wisest of men! Let's get on with suppressing the central whatever it was!"
7aa5998d-1e49-4bbd-b29c-b52fe742c091: "I struggle to trust a man whose life has been sustained for hundreds of years by unknown xenotechnology. Temper your exultation, Seneschal."
2a2d7389-5894-46d7-8b0a-85f7e59648e1: {n}Seberian's optical augment focuses on you, almost blinding you with the bright blue light of the lumen.{/n} "As for you... You had {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}something to do with the disappearance{/d} of my blade, didn't you? You are a stranger here, yet you persist in meddling in the council's affairs. I have only myself to blame for allowing you to loiter about my palace, but your schemes end here and now." {n}Turning to the enforcers, the Rogue Trader commands in a formidable tone:{/n} "Seize {mf|him|her}!"
85c557b4-532e-4c68-964b-3ef9b19587d1: {n}The Tech-Priest fixes Eogunn with a piercing stare, shaking his head from side to side.{/n} "You are mistaken. But I will save you as well, for my sanctity is absolute..."
3790287e-244e-4197-bb13-5e48fe6e55c2: [Make it clear: you are scared to death of defying the Inquisition and wish to be on the right side of history — the side where you survive.]
c6e8cfe2-cba0-42ef-a884-74b64ee57584: "No... This isn't right... It's all lies! It wasn't like that!"
7ddca357-1236-4484-85d5-08e8140a0865: From the scouts of the 32nd Regiment, daring volunteers shall be recruited into a specialised reconnaissance corps known as the "Shadows of Zarkov." They shall bear the lifelong duty of charting maps and searching for safe passages to the planet's lower levels.
d360cf82-41e2-43d4-b78f-dc88f7f27c21: {n}Eogunn's voice quickens eagerly in fascination.{/n} "Astounding! Nuncius, are you recording this as well? A union of the Omnissiah's sacred machine spirits with xenos algorithms. Yes, it is heresy most foul. But what phenomenal heresy! How have they achieved this? I must unlock its secrets."
d6f21e76-e854-4c96-ae41-f5b9d1afcccc: {n}Eogunn twists a piston on his beard, lost in thought.{/n} "I thank you for the interesting discussion, Rogue Trader."
c9f9f98a-bcda-4e71-85fd-c15a435746b6: When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} for the first time in a {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 round. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.
ed25dafa-e96f-4aae-ade0-9337e2ca340f: "You have accomplished a great deal over the years. Why do you still doubt yourself? You will succeed in saving Nuncius. The end justifies the means, so now you must move toward it."
f79d489e-850c-415c-997a-5dab0de7501a: "Of course, Master Februs. One sigil for you, the other for your colleague Nuncius. I've been in post long enough not to be surprised by even the most eccentric guests on board."
3e1b96c4-3e58-4775-a825-0b1f4ce2fd7c: "Lord Captain, one of our experts from the Sector Bionica wishes to speak to you. Transferring to an incoming vox-transmission from the corresponding deck."
d940b267-781d-44d4-a1b5-146ab1a43187: {n}The vision of the xenos disappears, and you are left on the bridge, surrounded by your officers, who are staring at you with astonishment. The sight of their Lord Captain talking to empty space has clearly made a lasting impression on them.{/n}
9dc2f68f-72fc-4b7c-8bf8-2bc11dd8918e: "You are mine now, Izdrig. Your life, even your soul, belongs to me. Swear on my blood, and your regiment will never fall into the clutches of Commissars or nobles."
5f829464-878d-46e2-a8d0-09d481febd02: "Based on the research, it also appears that the present behaviour of the Drovers has nothing to do with the thinning of the veil between realspace and the Immaterium. The mysterious signal irritates their nervous system, driving them into a rage — it is a means of controlling them. In theory, it is capable of more than just sending them into a frenzy, but so far the Adeptus Mechanicus is unable to uncover its secrets. The Tech-Priests suppose that some sort of planetary security system was triggered, which riled up the local biosphere."
95e45027-86d9-4907-ac92-be0651f65723: [Smile sardonically] "Since you are so clever, perhaps you would share your wisdom and set me upon the true path."
807465f8-1f23-46c9-a92e-b7e6e9c6bfdf: "When the time comes, you will support me in my endeavours, regardless of anyone else's displeasure. I will give you a sign."
63767fa7-12c7-45f8-96c4-35adba728736: {n}This sounds like more than a belief — he has encountered these mythical xenos, or come very close to doing so.{/n}
be920805-e66d-4d49-90f1-4c5d1a40cef5: Ancient non-functional augmentations have clearly become objects of reverence.
957b145b-72ce-4516-a653-de8b71234a84: {n}The patient's clouded gaze is locked on the woman's face, the corners of his parted lips stretching into the faint semblance of a smile. His mother stares back, almost without blinking.{/n}
2994bc76-29e1-4296-af66-791190e98e2e: Deemed the pursuit of pleasure to be the greatest mission of Humanity.
2747fcf3-7ae7-45a4-b2a4-51e8da846ca8: "A cursory medicae scan shows a level of mental exhaustion that poses serious risks for you, Mistress Tlass. Is the manifestation of psychic phenomena imminent?"
d9dbdacb-bc67-4ce3-b4f3-64f6998cf6de: "...and until Holy Terra calls me home. {name} von Valancius shall be His voice, until the God-Emperor speaks otherwise through the mouth of the Adeptus Ministorum."
3232f41d-8f21-4353-9637-7c7fe0d267a2: {n}The response to the order was the rumble of many excited voices on the vox-channel. The transmission ends, and your fighter armada, obeying the orders of the commanders, assumes battle formation.{/n}
ec856c25-1400-4e86-aff4-5de3dc09718f: {n}This device was made by private commission, surely violating about a dozen tenets of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Its owner is staggeringly rich and has one foot outside the law.{/n}
f5555cc6-ec79-4c93-ba00-0c4a996afb48: "Welcome to my former abode, Rogue Trader. Though time has proven far less merciful to it than I anticipated. I only hope that we have arrived in time, and the irreparable has not yet come to pass."
2558327b-31a7-43bc-9d27-ab7e3ca5632e: "This place is deceptive. Beyond the translucent streaks of white lurk flashes of something huge, dangerous, and predatory. This place makes me... uneasy."
84bd9434-5c93-47de-af89-3bf313c3d408: Tools tossed aside in a hurry. Some have bloodstains on them, others have broken handles, as if they were used to fend off an attack.
56e981c7-30b9-4b0f-b059-863739ec79fa: "{name} von Valancius, who descended from the stars, stands before us now! Fighting for the right to command the 32nd Merov Regiment!" {n}Vedka's voice rings out over the crowd.{/n} "Tell us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what use have you for us?"
1c61a32b-0a6a-4b0d-9a79-9b0a90d205fa: Every breath brings agony. Every exhale carries the taste of blood. The next breath might never come.
e356ab64-1fb1-49ef-afc7-e39819ac51b1: "What about a warning? All our reinforcements are logged — what use is this {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} otherwise?" {n}The sergeant nods at a nearby panel and speaks into his vox. After a brief exchange of remarks, he barks to you,{/n} "Go on, then. Just don't forget to present yourself to Lady Juvenna, she's waiting to hear news about this Elana of yours."
49b9a978-0ad8-4178-8604-fd3cac995dca: {n}The soldiers surrounding you visibly tense.{/n} "As per the tenets of the Holy Handbook, if you fail to identify yourselves, we open fire."
3d20c4f4-fffe-4ba6-9039-37f3d10d6cb9: The crane is well oiled — it seems the local Tech-Priests tend to it closely.
83ee4266-e6d8-49bf-b64a-401ea0ec6024: {n}Janur looks you in the eye, the mutilated side of his face twitching strangely.{/n} "Well then, good luck on the hunt, even if it is your last."
eca8a3d0-d6d5-4b45-87f6-04cdc22c282f: "I wish to know more about augments."
844d2a81-4594-4f8e-b1ee-6d2ef1c88c28: "I was pleased to share my thoughts, deeds, and silence with you, {name}. There is no higher good than to know oneself and to be known by another — for knowledge is the providence of the Omnissiah."
0a17509e-19af-475d-9d78-c09de2acc4ad: "Watch out for Captain Sauerback. He's got his eye on you."
71b29d7a-c02d-402f-ae43-9c94441297ca: "We have nothing to thank each other for — it was only a whim of fate that brought us together. But you are right about one thing — it is time for us to part ways."
46394dbb-ec5b-4aa1-8da8-caf963cfe0ab: "I... broke free, {name}. When the bombardment began, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} no longer had time for me. I fled into the galleries, further and further, searching for a way to escape this place, but..." {n}Laria is seized by a coughing fit and spits out several bloody clots.{/n} "I did not reckon on the other fugitives here. The servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:ChaosGlossary}Archenemy{/g}, the ones you destroyed, they caught me. The results you can see for yourself."
2c88ea25-80a2-41d1-947f-527896d22c63: "Have the 32nd Regiment move into a full-scale attack on the enemy at the earliest opportunity. It is time to put an end to this xenoscourge."
d68e5034-fc0d-4224-a4e5-62bdce967ae6:
The user deals +{uip|Melee|699a3d6aff944acfbcd915ecab36ab4a}% more {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}, +{uip|Ranged|699a3d6aff944acfbcd915ecab36ab4a}% more ranged {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical damage{/g}, and their base {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} is increased by +{uip|Direct|699a3d6aff944acfbcd915ecab36ab4a}.
The user suffers −{uip|DR|699a3d6aff944acfbcd915ecab36ab4a}% less damage.
78327aeb-4602-4f44-bbf2-90e5395218db: "What will become of the workers left on the station?"
9fedc51e-888a-44a0-9b0d-5601d9230540: Isimond is prepared to go to any lengths to ensure his house receives the title.
177706ea-8f53-4d2f-a49f-f48cccb0f4b8: The God-Emperor sees that you have tried to settle the matter peacefully. Your allies have also witnessed this, and their spirits have been bolstered.
e1ee6d3e-7c72-4212-8112-9fab2b47f323: "In the name of all that is sacred... is that the palace of Dargonus down there? It can't be! Lord Captain, on my life, I assure you, it cannot be the original! We have received no word from the capital that your ancestral residence has been... misplaced!"
9c80bbf7-9d22-4ef1-82dc-8ee2b2290487: Long-range {g|Encyclopedia:LanceWeaponSpace}lance weapon{/g} dealing <u>(from 78 to 96)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} to a chosen enemy within a narrow {g|Encyclopedia:FiringArcSpace}firing arc{/g}. The target hit has −10% {g|Encyclopedia:EvasionSpace}evasion{/g} for 2 rounds.
ed247023-373d-4fdf-b3b3-01fb697b47ae: "Log the coordinates in the ship's journal, I mean to return here later."
ac0ba49e-3fa8-4186-9d1d-e8d477089eae: After {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsOverdriveFullGlossary}galvanising{/g} an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g}, the user gains +{uip|BaseDamageGranted|45449e93227647d2acc6dc38437ed1f0}% base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
2e279369-1f4a-4e2d-ab84-dbe6499fc2e9: "You have learned something valuable, which means this experiment was not in vain."
863b1472-ffa3-4535-8d42-4c9926f0412c: Seberian and his sword vanished deep within this blood-drenched tomb. But he could not have perished without a trace.
6b3c433a-6465-4d5e-80a0-f5308b012af0: {n}The Necron subtly steps back, holding out a skeletonised hand clutching a staff.{/n} "Visitor, you show a lack of reverence for Lord Trazyn and his collection... which is to be expected from a member of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to block the path of anyone who might damage the exhibits."
af353ad5-ad45-4b25-8bfd-b38d0005a510: All attacks made by Krieg officers {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} automatically.
9f3b2176-ee53-49e7-bedb-b44e3d050aa8: "Flowers? Sounds harmless enough. Deceptively so, I assume?"
50438807-ded2-4770-a831-49e085a1680e: "Who is this Seberian that you should obey him?"
83107f91-329c-48b2-8fa3-d67ea48eaac2: "Together, we shall go to the stars and defy the terrors of space for the glory of the dynasty!"
7baeb6c0-03f7-4660-9b02-1e6e52feb00e: "He could have saved himself, but he chose to sacrifice himself for the sector. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."
508627e0-15aa-4848-9484-426ce36ef240: {n}The governor smiles with relief.{/n} "I never thought you'd be so... understanding. Thank you! As they say around here: work is easier when you don't have a Commissar in your way." {n}He stops short.{/n} "Not that you are a Commissar of course not, no."
7415e35c-849e-4587-8085-3fed58761176: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core multiplied the treasures of the von Valancius protectorate many times over, but a hundred years later it was stolen by a nameless thief who vanished without a trace.
5e66fc21-6331-41ea-b90c-6c599ab08cbf: {n}Governor Kuravich reads the data-slate thoughtfully while sipping from a bulky flask. The image of a diligent clerk is belied by a bruise spreading across half his face and the Astra Militarum uniform drenched in gore.{/n}
3cf20d1b-f8e3-4aa2-8574-f9961792c1af: Eogunn has revealed the truth about Nuncius, and now the Rogue Trader must find a way to the mysterious planet Amsanct to help the Tech-Priest determine the fate of his esteemed colleague.
e227451b-5226-42ef-a82d-71696cbae275: "Induced insanity..." {n}Eogunn shifts his gaze from one refugee to another with interest.{/n} "Could a mere sequence of transmission waves have so cruelly crippled the minds of these people? I doubt it. The source of such a destructive vox-signal merits thorough investigation, and this is an incontrovertible fact."
6e3de238-f2b3-4774-aa40-12ed123092e6: "I want to know more about you."
2c9b2e61-dd59-4fd0-9370-72a2dcb7028c: {n}The pilot speaks through clenched teeth, fighting the urge to shout.{/n} "Movement on the port side, that's the last thing I saw, Lord Captain. Something massive, like a tree trunk. It was either thrown at the shuttle or... it attacked us itself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
5550511e-7ba1-4333-9435-847bab65f6bc: "I'll change my rags later when I have the time. Order is what matters here." {n}He taps on the data-slate, which is smeared with blood too.{/n} "God-Emperor help us if those iron beasts return and the troops' bellies are as empty as a Commissar's head. There's a joke on Zarkov: atonement is for the one, but rations are for all."
8217445a-92b5-4570-867a-1ab66f15a1f2: "It is an honour to meet with you personally, Lord Captain!"
dd70b667-75e3-4838-ad23-987fca2bf123: "...but you, xenos, are a mockery of knowledge. A pathetic butcher incapable of creating anything new. All your so-called 'research' produces nothing but dysfunctional cadavers, monuments to your own vanity. In the name of the Omnissiah, be damned, vile spawn! May your works turn to dust and sink into oblivion!" {n}Eogunn speaks these words with sudden, startling volume, the skin of his mangled throat bulging from the strain.{/n}
7875fc02-7429-47fc-afc5-c1215e90c681: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. It will take something truly significant to make her support negotiating with the Inquisition.
841d0481-0432-4b1b-80c9-10c7e61f319f: "Eogunn cannot acknowledge your obvious superiority. Perhaps a gift of flesh might compensate for his ignorance?"
b02e019d-0c00-4ff4-a2d1-95f54d10e857: {n}She holds up a second finger.{/n} "Two: we must find a way to circumvent Seberian and open the gates. The easiest way to do that would be with the access codes, but my father has not shared them with me. No doubt because I am not his favourite," {n}she adds with a smile.{/n}
5adc8357-4798-487d-9134-31c87c8bfd91: "You and Martinax do not get along?"
0a0d2710-6b21-4948-b834-be61059d3a8c: "Genetor Ferrenz had nothing to do with your implant. You may consider your mission complete."
6df03cdc-0e37-42ba-be15-b06c485d9cc8: When the wearer suffers damage more than or equal to {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, this armour unleashes a blast of energy, dealing (from 25 to 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}power damage{/g} (with 10% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}) to enemies in {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g}.\nBase armour property: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}.
1531a0aa-9bdc-497d-975a-db50e2d7000a: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you've spared me a lot of work." {n}The chirurgeon gives a tired smile, wiping blood from his face with his sleeve.{/n} "A new augment arrived for one of our soldiers, but she has no more need for it. Please, do not hesitate to take it — it might suit someone in your retinue."
047f4d61-8b3a-4933-b2c5-4e250bc76ad4: {n}Batoshski nods to you, looking you straight in the eye:{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
3ff46798-5e4e-4f5f-9b15-165682dc918d: {n}Eogunn lets out a deep, malevolent chuckle.{/n} "He who deems himself a great thinker has transitioned from intensive practices to extensive ones, only to propagate his own incompetence. A true irony of fate."
c69fd37d-cf91-494a-ba6f-61ee5f029a49: "Eogunn, do with him as you wish."
856920ba-1afd-4ad3-826d-6b36d46d4331: "With the highest priority, I notify the Lord Captain that the sacred archeotech is still in an agonal state caused by the malicious actions of the rebels. The functionality of the Sector Bionica is limited. The life form 'Genetor Majoris Ferrenz' humbly awaits your assistance in purifying the reliquary mechanism."
7d772037-3a23-4eb0-bd01-b1ffe40e9cb7: {n}After a brief tone, you hear a high, rattling voice speaking in a single note:{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}'s blessings! Rejoice! There is no randomness in the probabilities that brought you here, for I am conveying to you a proposal for lucrative cooperation: Pact TR-3. In view of your past deeds, the clergy of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 are disposed to perform binharic rites of the fourth grade over the machine spirits of your vessel. The terms will be specified further..."
7347bb84-336e-4dc6-bd1e-cf618c5881e1: "It is calmer and quieter here... but there is a different spirit in the air. A spirit of greed. Of lust for excess."
4fa4b1ed-4179-4c4f-a0fc-a85cf284cc41: "Lord Seberian, I am {name} von Valancius, current holder of the Warrant of Trade, and you are aboard the dynastic flagship."
6eebbf49-3794-4b31-b2b2-50ba6eb3f071: The platform is moving away from you. The algorithms controlling it are too complex to be understood by any passerby.
00387e6f-6791-465e-95e3-15aede6241e9: "I will never abandon servants of the Imperium in need." {n}The Astartes says these words calmly, almost indifferently.{/n}
145c423c-b74e-4de0-8496-32bb2bcbb908: Camilla Drivestem and Isimond Sauerback support the heiress's plan. Their backing must be preserved.
7a3f8d11-f9c5-4ed2-a213-857bc98d8f73: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}Sauerback immediately leads Seberian away, respectfully but firmly gripping him by the shoulder.{/n}
1be6d9b4-65f5-4d2a-b7d4-14f7c3c2b05d: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn managed to come to terms with Nuncius's ultimate demise.
e317ca44-5c28-48b4-99fe-e4df656b4f62: "Something only the two of us would understand. Allow me to keep this mystery unsolved. I want to have a memory of him that belongs only to me."
aaebcf36-cab6-4942-821e-149be5dfdfc3: {n}Eogunn listens and raises his eyebrows.{/n} "That cannot be right — that often? Yes, Nuncius, I would be obliged if you would assist in monitoring my vocabulary. But watch that superior tone of yours, please."
aaf6d9ad-ca62-451f-96e3-c05554f2fec5: "Eogunn, there is nothing to stabilise. You have created an unsalvageable invalid."
e951ed39-69de-41e8-a859-084cd846cb52: Chirurgeon Jaze Martinax was wounded in the attack on the Sector Bionica, and you failed to prevent it.
e063aa87-8fb8-471c-9c22-89d429f48d65: "Sister Argenta, your wrath is highly effective in crushing the enemies of the human race. But does it not cloud your judgement? Does it cause you to lose sight of the details that comprise the larger picture of the world?"
7425a0e7-628e-49a0-b7d5-dd6aad4a78f5: "Hold off on the arrest, I wish to speak to him."
409dc271-e9e6-4e0c-aba3-052d575daaba: "So the whole station was running on the energy provided by one small xenobattery?"
f0119d55-35ab-4f0b-826a-a6c3531e16cb: "If your lord has deemed you worthy only of a captain's rank, then it is with good reason. It is not for you to question his decisions."
02dc1118-fabd-4cd8-b57f-7c3c7f1ccef8: "Is this some kind of test? Our domain has always been Dargonus."
cb5690ea-24f4-42ee-acef-06cdcfc460c7: "My control over the Motive Force knows no limits! I can cause generator circuits to overload without even touching them, and unleash the Omnissiah's wrath upon the xenos!"
b4c02aee-7b28-43aa-aa05-ef20a59c3660: "Why this sudden interest in the Fusion Reactor?"
446ddbcf-3f3a-4878-9093-a6c87174764d: {n}Your lungs refuse to obey, no matter how hard you try to bring them back under your control. Your lips remain frozen, sealed shut by an unknown force.{/n}
72899c06-cd02-4a74-8f34-462104f5f7bf: {n}Eogunn purses his lips tight in stubborn silence. At last, he speaks, his voice so faint it can only be caught by leaning in.{/n} "No. Not the only way. There is liberation in death, as well."
22ef31e5-e49b-4e3d-8656-c65c73981174: {n}Batoshski looks gravely at you, then nods to himself.{/n} "The time has come to renew our oath. We are going to the square now, and in the presence of the fallen and all my people, we shall face each other in the Trial Match."
240d3bdd-c370-4268-bf55-f1a5d76367f8: "Flesh is weak. But its efficiency can be improved with blessed metal. According to the directives of the Omnissiah, pivotal life forms, like pivotal mechanisms, must withstand maximum stress and produce the best results — my duty lies in improving them."
46a239b0-3e21-4cfe-841e-3e16b8d4e230: {n}Your will, forged in the countless trials of the Rogue Trader's path, remains utterly powerless against the xenos enchantments shackling your body.{/n}
4508f9aa-a29d-4e2e-89e8-b5f5e06c7aec: "The simple logic of primitive predation. The more dangerous the rival, the stronger the imperative to eliminate it. I had time to carefully study the Haemonculus Tervantias, and he exhibited precisely the same behaviour."
1b3a965d-9d60-4f27-9c50-c501518da3b8: "...only makes it all the more pathetic that these members of the human civilisation, supposedly endowed with as many privileges as their culture allows, leave remarkably few traces of historical significance behind them, preferring to engage in petty squabbles and quarrels with their contemporaries..."
6a0fa6e2-0c28-4eb2-956d-ed3124a9aa78: "Ready the shuttle. I wish to descend to the surface myself."
83364c02-baa1-48cb-aa64-20ceb96b774d: A desiccated mummy lies curled in a foetal position. The man died long ago. His face has begun to crumble into icy dust, exposing yellowed bone. His frozen hands still clutch a data-slate engraved with the sigil of the Inquisition.
ba6a3d7b-5814-465e-9d0e-91fc187577b4: {n}A few seconds of commotion, and the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."
2115fecd-db90-4039-b056-15b83aafc61f: "I wish to speak of the events on Dargonus."
e78223fa-f9dc-4f5a-85bf-4ed087a472e3: "An extremely atypical presentation for the Rogue Trader, dearest colleague." {n}Nuncius, hovering nearby, expresses his silent agreement.{/n} "The cadence of the voice differs from the norm, and such indecision is uncharacteristic of {rt_mf|his|her} personality... Psychosis? A curious hypothesis."
8bdc5b88-1bf9-4013-ad6d-a834a6e8b3f5: "That xenos still found a way to have the last laugh. Even after losing in battle. But I believe the God-Emperor will forgive us for treading on the sacred Warrant." {n}Incendia's voice is cold and quiet.{/n}
e2e274b1-c9fb-4150-8b75-dbf782cf8d50: {n}The medicae officer and the Tech-Priest exchange glances.{/n}
7ff95835-47d2-48a5-867a-eaee37e7937e: "So, the people who serve in the funereal detachments are some of our most respected experts. They're even willing to risk their own hides to return a fallen soldier's body to the regiment. It's our means of survival."
208ad0c1-83eb-4988-9e7b-243e12ca823d: {n}Trazyn the Infinite lapses into a brief silence.{/n} "The display I designed is ruined, and the collection has lost one of its exhibits — and this after I lavishly rewarded Seberian for his exceptionalism. I am stripping the von Valancius dynasty of the honour of being part of the Museion exhibition. Take your ancestor. I will seek out a replacement."
a2a87688-aef0-4ae9-bdda-ba7455cb51f0: The mystery of Seberian von Valancius's disappearance has been solved. And not merely solved — here he now stands, in the flesh, on the flagship's bridge. Indeed, the God-Emperor has been merciful to him.
8da92594-e457-4663-8bec-7f0181088a54: The user gains +3 stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}.
f9e28329-e8a0-4825-99b0-5509dd644c7b: The device is designed to diagnose and repair arm augments.
de64c999-0eb3-43e2-92df-9c11e58ca88a: "I claim priority right to perform sacred diagnostics on the relic. My research of the xenos data will expedite understanding and the curing of the machine spirit's ailment." {n}After exchanging a few sharp, prolonged binharic trills, the Tech-Priests seem to reach an agreement.{/n}
699f07fa-be88-4382-ad70-990462c91e93: "A descendant of Zbrestshchysh, are you not? I do see a certain resemblance. Only the colonel's bearing was somewhat more... refined."
45efe015-69e7-4301-91c4-6798731febbb: "Your L-{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}The young man drops to his knees.{/n} "I w-would do it myself! I-I swear! But — they won't let me turn everything off. It'll take too long. They won't refuse you! Turn off the power to anything!"
261b4f03-00b4-416f-a7a8-1a05e3470255: When this creature dies, it explodes, dealing {uip|Damage|99450542c2a94224bdc65708c38cfac4} {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g} (minimum 1) with 30% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures in a 3-cell radius.
952065c6-8aae-4feb-b056-d75b081e6cb9: "So I will find the Crimson Dance of Khaine, and together we will vanquish the xenos." {n}Seberian raises a hand and clenches his fist, as though the detested blade were already in his grasp.{/n}
eb73f2d7-c7cf-4f7b-966e-d3d559089d1e: "Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I will await you in the Sector Bionica, Rogue Trader."
01274982-124f-4aba-8216-165ae82a0fe9: "We have shared a cell since our novitiate on Stygies VIII. 138 planetary cycles and 72 days have elapsed since then. It may not be accurate in a temporal sense, but you could say we have been together my whole life." {n}A warm smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n}
40fbbaec-bf57-4f3d-a8c6-425ca4488f93: {g|f:7b1ab2c9456a44febdc41b71f14d8df5}Voidship Ram{/g} restores 50% shield strength on the most damaged side.
586e3436-95f1-4890-a948-288931ab4f7b: "Assigning priority of the highest order to the vector of convergence with the enemy."
b3f711d5-354f-4de6-90d9-fd9ce5caa069: "It is time to end the experiment, Eogunn. What will you do?"
95165304-d3f0-4549-9465-c375fd6573e2: {n}Eogunn lowers his gaze with relief.{/n} "So, our options are not yet exhausted."
cd4fccfc-23d8-43fb-ab15-98d24ca23a0e: This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} affects both allies and enemies: Allies: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recoil{/g} is reduced by half for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Allies' {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} is increased by +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round. Enemies: dodge is reduced by −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round. Enemies must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}сonvulsion{/g} until the end of combat. If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it makes a check with a −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g}.
8ce1d21e-64d8-41a6-a106-072383b4e2f1: {n}Chiselled features, dark brows, and a gaze full of inner strength. You also notice the finely worked furrows of stubbornness on his forehead and at the corners of his mouth. The artist strove to capture the complex character of a strong-willed man, and seems to have done a superlative job.{/n}
3ade2e29-0171-41a9-a1d2-04c4bb1320f1: {n}The muscles in your eyes refuse to obey you, just like the rest of your body. However, there is little chance that anything in your surroundings could help you in your present predicament.{/n}
240dc138-4cf2-4c1c-9cc4-f8417abbf0f5: "My heart soars when I behold the servants of the God-Emperor praising Him through faithful service. But I did not see any common folk among those gathered for the procession... Could they not have been included?"
