This autopistol can be used as if the wielder has the {g|f:1b26e486d9974b9ca26d055413fb3e01}Dual-Weapon Combat{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Talent}talent{/g}.
<indent=3%>+5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}</indent>
<indent=3%>+5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}</indent>
1d8333d6-205a-4ccc-9d2f-9cedefe4ea11: "So be it! Enough of us have watched von Valancius trample on the Creed. It's time to burn the heresy out of every corner of his castle!"
5ea328d5-57df-4a76-aeb8-626fe37e9dc5: {n}The Rogue Trader, lost in thought, does not answer you.{/n}
9b709258-4da6-4f46-8376-e8dde7dc7354: "You are either very perceptive or very well-informed. I appreciate both qualities if they are to my advantage. Report."
06fb14a9-6e58-4e7c-ba2b-89e1976ea263: "We shall use good old-fashioned explosives. They have never failed Humanity."
84745a92-63f6-4651-835a-fbde0b2043ba: "I am delighted to have earned your attention, gracious Lord Captain. What exactly do you wish to know?"
9d43febd-0d99-44ac-9800-e867a453038a: "The deal is done. I will collect my new acquisition from your ship when the time comes."
51496ff0-58cb-44e6-ab89-c16273068393: {n}The last thing you hear is the repulsive, wet crunch as the needle pierces through your bones and into your brain. Darkness engulfs you.{/n}
f07d8409-6f2a-487a-badc-828b038b5b38: "Blasphemous cunning, to be sure. Does the very spectacle not sear itself upon the mind, colleague?"
180efb9a-86ad-463e-be0b-4e58b3ca75c9: "No, Nuncius, on the contrary, asserts that such phenomena often occur if the current of the Motive Force inside galvanically-active circuits— wait, you're not listening to him at all, are you?" {n}Eogunn's voice carries a distinct tinge of reproach.{/n}
d89f5c8f-f681-4ed7-abe2-d88f2f06ebc6: Platform Tirkuaz-4, left afloat by the Rogue Trader, supplied Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 with resources for many cycles, turning the planet into a full-fledged mining world under the leadership of now elevated Artisan Decabalus. The loss of the station was all the more grievous when the xenarite sect that had seized control of Tirkuaz revolted and cut off supplies.
4dd26424-23aa-4f50-9f7e-b3f370156e5d: "Look, this is an excellent medicine, I prepared it myself. Yes, it doesn't have an immediate effect, she just needs to keep taking it!"
f8032604-1ca6-4410-b238-1f52d6c2ea35: "Captain Sargona and his flagship, the Heartless, are concealed in the Mundus Nullius. The exact location can only be determined with your ship's augurs when we enter the system."
d4aca451-649a-4091-bccd-62622ae09181: "Is it possible you failed to grasp its design?"
ec68bde7-79b1-4f87-9930-41b680fa81b7: This chair, luxuriously upholstered in natural velvet, is clearly the work of a highly skilled craftsman. It is obvious at a glance that it is worth a fortune.
7f063fbc-b9f3-4d79-86be-5b98a3f4422e: "Eogunn, do you begin all conversations with questions about death?"
53de2df8-c920-4127-afdf-129071c8d07f: "I so testify that the unit designated 'Eogunn Februs' has committed a sacrilegious breach of the defensive circuitry safeguarding the shuttle from intrusion. The evidence of his abhorrent deed have not escaped the vessel's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} and are plainly recorded in the shipboard systems' logs. In the name of the Machine God, I hereby impose a techno-penance upon said unit, to be enacted upon his apprehension."
24c64f9d-4cc6-4b54-ac88-7843ebcc3763: {n}The Necron's speech is akin to a metallic clang, interspersed with strangely dissonant notes.{/n} "Once again, the vale of ignorance is full of those who prowl in its darkness, but now thrice as many lowly have come as before."
33f8127a-00c1-4c69-9050-a1e8bdb1a995: "I, in turn, strongly advise you to no longer keep anything in the laboratory that would tempt me into visiting. For the sake of your... 'colleague's' mental well-being."
61a46549-711b-47a4-a016-27e81bb18b73: "Throne of Terra, it hurts! Have mercy! Please, I beg you, make it stop! STOP IT! Mmmmmggghhh!"
1d0f5630-be12-487e-ab1a-a9d8658a83ae: "For several cycles, {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} extraction station Tirkuaz-4 has been late in its shipments for Altar-Templum's sacred rites. The action required in exchange for our services is this: you will undertake to cast your gaze toward this station and compel it to open its vox-channels."
a2af5f46-9866-46e6-aade-8cd9722199ab: "Thank you for that decision. The Zarkovians are brave, but there is no sense in throwing their lives away."
6fd36ab2-2a34-4572-ac9f-c5df13db7eaa: "Right you are, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! As long as you are with us, we are safe, and we are with you forever. The matter is settled. I won't raise it again."
42d6d567-cd22-45c4-b942-79c9ca7b6e7f: "We have prevailed and retrieved the Warrant. The xenos capitulated and cast us back to the flagship."
28342d03-46f7-4fba-8e8b-ba0405ff6957: {n}Izdrig watches the Rogue Trader with a heavy gaze.{/n}
500bdf69-6563-400c-8315-420281e3ddd8: "Very well. I will adjust my plans to include a visit to the Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum."
7161793d-4700-4386-83a1-6db79288b6e1: This structure collects moisture from plants, which later drains into the tank.
897022b8-6236-4007-bd53-74743f506e32: "You see... I had to save myself. I do not know the fate of the others."
f47efda1-c6be-43f7-b349-924aedea9127: "The endorsement of the Cult Mechanicus will be an unbreakable bulwark for the dynasty, greatly increasing its prosperity."
9e9f2bb9-30ba-4295-a58e-a8523e8d19ab: "Who could've guessed, my {mf|lord|lady}—" {n}Jarub breaks off from his confused stream of excuses and looks down at the ground.{/n} "You're right. I'm listening."
06a3f038-d523-4eff-9c61-5d959f0972de: "Yes. For the first time in a long time, my mind is completely clear. I have no regrets about what I have done. Nuncius is free of corruption at last, and I am pleased that I had the fortitude to end his life myself. I have learned a harsh lesson that I will not dare to forget, but should my memory begin to fade, I will always have a reminder of what deviation from dogma leads to." {n}Eogunn looks mournfully at Nuncius's head.{/n}
ca45831f-852d-4838-ac98-6c328cee71a9: "What? Y-you... you wish to join us? But of course, Lord Captain! You do us a great honour! You lot, clear out! Make room for {mf|His|Her} {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"
092ffc88-8923-4294-b5a7-ef63f6322c43: "Survival is no excuse for cowardice, Guardsman!"
fe560754-65f1-44cc-8815-6edecafd32ef: The wearer regains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} when they fire the first shot from an arc rifle or use {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Magnarail Blast{/g} or {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}Transonic Wave{/g} for the first time.
0aa94c67-cbae-4b17-afcc-b287467a3b18:
The user can perform only basic attacks with two-handed weapons in this hand.
When the user suffers trauma, this augment does not malfunction, but the user's maximum hit chance is reduced by −5%.
6512143c-1c33-4aed-a6cd-bd790f622a98: "Pull yourself together, Captain. What does the Handbook dictate? Endure hardships and execute the commander's orders exactly."
14eaf1b6-666b-49da-868d-3d7ffb7b9dd8: {n}The High Factotum adjusts his monocle with a satisfied look.{/n} "I thank you for your favour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Before you depart the Sector Bionica, I would also like to present to you Genetor Majoris Ferrenz and Vivisector Jaze Martinax. They are currently performing an urgent procedure and therefore were unable to attend the inspection in person, but I am certain they will receive the Rogue Trader's visit as a great honour. If you will follow me."
ac2e15f9-3b0c-4394-a7a8-123e7b7d43a6: "I will not answer you! Get off my ship, or I will make you!"
2a129360-2449-4760-9b91-556bbb84c55a: "Headstrong, the both of you. How has your regiment not died out yet?"
5de1b1a5-fb5e-4cc3-b9b6-ecf479d62682: [Raise the cup before drinking its contents] "You know, it's normal to give a toast first."
d5f64b0c-9024-4b5a-9fb1-668077bbc8bd: "I did. The cranial shackles keep you from sleep, keep you from oblivion, but take a heavy toll. The one who put the iron in me has already gotten his due, though killing the crimson priest is harder. But don't worry, I've got a nice little gun ready for him."{n}The man eagerly points at the weapon with his chin.{/n}
650dbeae-3991-4a6f-92ae-d8c97c067aa4: This creature gains +25% damage and +25 temporary wounds.
31ece696-c4fa-46ef-bc93-8d692e26d436: "You endured a great deal in Commorragh. How are you now?"
20b959fc-cddc-4117-bf29-cc73086aa821: "Have you seen the chief xenos? What can you tell me about him?"
c11bb8d1-e284-41e9-a3f7-5c0ffca8bf9b:
{g|Encyclopedia:DeadeyeShot}Deadeye shot{/g} deals an additional +{uip|DamageBonus|0b113627def5404cb1d94310c85edfb8}% damage.
The following ranged attack abilities gain deadeye shot benefits (× 1.5 range and the additional damage from the talent itself):
-<indent=5%>{g|Encyclopedia:CareerHunterGlossary}Bounty Hunter{/g}'s {g|f:8930d6ba62ca4bc3a30a9900e741d87c}Claim the Bounty{/g} </indent>
-<indent=5%>{g|Encyclopedia:CareerTacticianGlossary}Master Tactician{/g}'s {g|f:e627e3fb653840dab9661093828432c5}Finish the Job{/g}</indent>
-<indent=5%>Assassin's {g|f:33214b7215b442519f4303bcd4a8ab34}Death Whisper{/g}</indent>
-<indent=5%>Assassin's {g|f:c9dba0331212410dabe7dd2e19c52cd3}Killing Edge{/g}</indent>
-<indent=5%>Assassin's {g|f:fca9f7a27d664ca2834d91822ca34663}Dispatch{/g}</indent>
-<indent=5%>Operative's {g|f:c4c25ebbdea341c5a153c073240d574d}Dismantling Attack{/g}</indent>
-<indent=5%>Bounty Hunter's {g|f:39809f7335f542c587678086db6ce338}Wild Hunt{/g}</indent>
0ef7458a-a072-44cf-b278-896785752a30: "It's the Drover, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Its cry is inaudible but is like a weight pressing down on your mind. It causes pain, nightmares, and drives you mad. Anger, fear... anything is possible. If you give in, you lose control of yourself. Not long ago, one of us snapped and knifed a recruit just because he dropped his rations."
e3ca5b30-c539-4213-9185-264f1356d7ac: "I have come here on a mission from Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 to find out the reason for the delay in promethium shipments."
1fe771af-659b-4f34-a25c-44309df7f93b: "Come with me. We will find the one who captured you and your brothers and bring him to justice."
28111a08-7eab-454c-9747-e3cc6b15d436: "The enemy who has challenged our bloodline is deceitful and cunning. If we cannot establish even a fragile trust between us, he will surely use that to his advantage. Thus, I am willing to converse more openly than before."
73319afb-0551-47d6-84a6-c33b2332c521: "Admit it, you're really the clever one in this partnership, aren't you?"
059a3a61-16ab-4f8c-80da-a6ee82ab0779: Whenever the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g} is healed for the first time in a {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, they are healed for an additional +{uip|heal|a9c5a3fddff74273bbfcb9431260b95f} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} and gain +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} until the end of combat. Stacks.
d753cc24-0af0-453c-b768-0aae3411d76a: The Rogue Trader's engineers shall construct a production complex designed for Zarkov's harsh conditions: hive-like manufactorums will cling to the monstrous roots, while long-limbed factory servo-platforms crawl between them like titanic spiders.
536d1f0a-43ae-41bf-bb28-73d00b3aff39: The user gains the {g|f:453162d5db644e25a5b22e598128ce0e}Furious Assault{/g} ability.
7a27422a-1a10-440d-9c5d-bdc1e8cb53b3: "The troops stand ready for deployment. I will oversee the liberation of the minor settlements. You, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, should head for the Cage — the governor must have the complete tactical intelligence."
2224cda9-6f4d-43aa-8573-b5e7b9bc742e: Traces of a battle long ago indicate a confrontation between some xenos and the expedition of Seberian von Valancius. Was this the place where he fought his last battle? That remains a mystery.
757af942-ad23-483d-8e5b-7ff9d0e07ecd: "Of course, Lord Captain. The first plan involves a small group of soldiers carrying high explosives. Their objective will be to penetrate as deep into the xenos ruins as possible, close to their energy source, and blow it up... along with themselves."
8637f5df-70cd-4f9b-a241-076c1e6c0f44:
The target's damage is reduced by −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
The target must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or become {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or the {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it suffers {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} shock damage with {uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% armour penetration and makes the {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g} with a −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} penalty.
f445c717-333b-4ebe-bbb0-0ad1245f0186: "This xenos..." {n}Like a predator on the hunt, Kibellah tracks every fleeting movement of the Drukhari's face and body. The steel claws of her hand open like the teeth of a trap.{/n} "I hear the dark whisper of blood that flows through his veins. I see the ugly shadows of his designs on the other side of his pupils. I smell the scent of his footprints, spun from the pain and hatred of thousands of victims. How many threads have been severed by him — and how many more will be..."
1c0e0e64-e33d-46b1-b9b9-f12f0f097fc2: {n}The stately nobleman is wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. Augments cover his face, the only surviving part of which is a taut scrap of grey, inflamed skin and a bright blue eye. The Rogue Trader watches you with interest as you take in his appearance.{/n}
b51edada-9cd1-4556-aabc-32359bfefd5b: {n}The Manipulus moves swiftly to loom over Atilius, examining his cranium with curiosity and completely ignoring the prefectus's stricken expression.{/n} "I must note, this is an exceptionally well-preserved xenos specimen. Rogue Trader, observe the flattened edge of the incisors, the smooth brow ridges, the absence of the third pair of molars typical for the Aelda— what is it, Nuncius?" {n}Eogunn stops abruptly.{/n} "Yes, I did indeed get carried away, forgive me."
1ba0a299-bcca-4d60-baca-093e2136d24f: "An impressive variety of flora, unique air chemistry, and highly unusual psychoactive properties of the crystalline impurity in the soil. Nuncius, we simply must investigate its source!"
b738b54e-6696-44f0-868f-54f38254de9b: "Subsequent to his servitorisation, he was assigned to the lower decks and resumed his service to the dynasty. In their ignorance, many of the laypeople see his return as a miracle of the God-Emperor, offering him gifts and draping primitive talismans over his carapace. Naturally, as an instrument of the Omnissiah, he is only capable of executing his programmed protocols of diligence, remaining oblivious to the occurrence of these... rituals. That is an incontrovertible fact."
edad9c22-ebd7-49a0-9ea7-c0f68f5b432f: "No. But I will be, {name}. You could have left me there, after all, but you chose to talk an old man round. Against all odds. You have the heart of a true Rogue Trader — bold, hungry, fair to a fault. I... misjudged you. But now I am proud of you. You are an heir worthy of the dynasty's crown."
a3714325-5d41-4605-8cbc-c6d17cb9c1cd: "You mentioned an anchor-core. What in the Throne is that?"
71e15ed1-41e6-44d9-bf4c-51788d971c6d: "A true Rogue Trader requires no one's permission." {n}In the rasping, voice-modulated tones of Seberian's vox, a shadow of mockery can be heard.{/n} "Focus, heir of mine, and continue your inquest."
63c799e4-e81e-4c61-ac37-d2d552b7944a:
Eogunn targets an allied character and reduces their {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} by −{uip|Stats|de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}, gaining +{uip|UPE|de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d} {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks.
! Can only be used once per target (except Eogunn himself).
e7fad1fb-8806-4e36-98b9-fd6a80ce8ef6: "We have come to bow before you, Lord Captain, to show our gratitude for your {mf|fatherly|motherly} heedfulness over each and every one of us! Now even the lowliest cripple knows that he can serve the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} with a decent prosthetic. This bolsters our faith and spurs on our toil like never before. Thank you." {n}The man is clearly trying to maintain his lofty style of speech, but he still falters at the end and simply bows.{/n} "The light of your mercy leads even the most hopeless to righteousness."
0e1dec81-cc61-4282-8ed1-5443dce84e8f:
Pasqal gains the {g|f:95cdd5f42ef5480d9fadd9e0acee641b}Machine Spirit Communion{/g} ability.
Pasqal's {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g} is increased by +{uip|TechUseBonus|48c593a5caff4e75b1bbf2a076dc2df4}.
089576d5-9316-4dcc-a4f8-3a43bcf6b534: "First and foremost, we must deal with the xenos and recover the Warrant."
9c36916b-c51d-4867-80cc-5c28aa0b33ce: Ordered Tech-Priests be sent to the wreck of the Black Ship to recover all that was worth taking.
ffddf7a8-7da8-4cc1-87c7-440fdf2ed0e3: {n}Your counter-attack hits Batoshski square in the chest. Any other man would have howled in pain, but the old soldier only lets out a raspy snarl, ignoring the bloody froth on his lips.{/n}
7446d293-4304-47dc-93d8-e2b6a7378734: "These upgrades are based on xenotech, aren't they?"
6d43f877-fcad-4aad-b0a1-b0afca151a75: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain." {n}The Genetor focuses his visors on you.{/n} "The augment carrier's efficiency class will increase exponentially."
446bc27c-8f2f-4cc9-8d2b-9228c02c47c5: "I thought it was a result of the impact... Like a hum or some kind of high-pitched screeching. It's a struggle to think straight, to keep from losing it. My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}..." {n}The pilot's face is sweating and shaking with tension.{/n}
c6a9efd2-8174-4391-b4e8-6a7e118f8a47: Tracks of a body being dragged have been discovered, indicating someone deliberately tried to throw it over the precipice.
afd72fbf-118b-44e1-9801-c33f7f4a1561: {n}The Drukhari noisily sniffs and makes a face, examining the door with distrust.{/n} "To fall into such an obvious Oghyr trap would be foolish. If you enter there, it must be when you are prepared and on your own terms."
72f9a47b-56a8-433a-a1e1-2d7b0e564bed: "Lord Captain, the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} managed to push the xenos back to their lair in the ruins, but the battle for the ruins themselves was lost. Inside is teeming with clawed monsters, and they are led by a creature that can instantly regenerate others like it. However, they are no longer attempting to leave their unholy tomb... at least, not at the moment. Three strategies have now been proposed: creating an exclusion zone around the tomb, blowing up the ruins from within, or setting the Drovers on the xenos lair."
cb5e35d1-40d7-4638-bd4e-d79f7a399eda: The followers of Saint Drusus shall carve the image of the God-Emperor upon a gargantuan root. Each cycle, fiercely devout Zarkovians shall set out on a grand pilgrimage to purge moss and creepers from the stern countenance of the Master of Mankind. Many shall face a martyr's death, yet their sacrifice shall ignite the fire of faith within the hearts of the subjects.
dbfc89e8-0bd8-4895-a13e-a85f5f2ff69b: "Idira, if you must demonstrate your personal interpretation of the rules of courtesy and manners, please do so with less enthusiasm. Master Genetor Februs is a valued ally and guest of the Lord Captain."
0937df14-d4d0-402a-9956-40481fd956de: "I do hope your question is rhetorical, Rogue Trader, or I will be most aggrieved. I am a conduit and a receptacle of the Motive Force, for so the Omnissiah has spoken." {n}His mechadendrites latch onto the panel, directing power, accompanied by reverberant words of the First Galvanic Hymn.{/n}
5b87d1d2-801e-47e8-867d-41a0d9351c68: Thanks to the Rogue Trader, the scales tipped in favour of Juvenna von Valancius.
8e144bae-948a-4d01-9f45-acccbed7c00e: Gain Laria's trust by solving the case of the missing Gaprak reinforcements.
5bdb3435-d125-480f-8296-c192f438c623: "I find the choice of venue for our meeting somewhat unconventional, but I don't deny that the setting is conducive to philosophical contemplation. So tell me, {name}, what topic is currently occupying your inquiring mind?"
47c3c2af-f2c6-42ca-9ab3-1ce25fc497d3: Dispatch an armed squad to the missing group's location.
2f883b43-6254-4a20-9055-9ce5d13550bf: "Is this the entire procession? I thought there would be more of them."
bb7d0ffd-1c20-4d67-91e7-6e0ac71cd95e: "Those words are filled with conviction, Domin'{name}, yet Seberian's name has not yet passed the Undying One's lips. Is his execution truly so timely?"
45bae00e-4162-47e0-ae5e-b88d0baa9264: {n}A complacent smile plays across the Haemonculus's face. He is visibly pleased by your subservience.{/n} "So, that is how it is? This scrap of flesh is of such value that you would grovel in the dirt to secure his release? Truly... entertaining. I think I will grant your request, purely for the pleasure of reclaiming him later and savouring the spectacle once more."
d4815c72-6ff0-45c1-94da-e36376fb821b: Jarub is spoken of as a man possessing criminal talents.
c4662227-77e5-497e-a992-8e088c92095f: "Inquisitor af Irramon dared to accuse me, a Rogue Trader, of heresy! He reckons that the influence of the Inquisition is so great that he can disregard the privileges granted by the Warrant and attack me in my own palace. Diodas thinks he's above the God-Emperor Himself? Well, he will pay for his hubris."
c182d4c9-dedb-43c2-a086-1dbfb77d8e56: {n}Eogunn's galvanic coils crackle, and a powerful discharge passes from his hands directly into Nuncius's chest in a flash of azure. Nuncius's entire body shudders, then goes still forever. Gently removing the dead man's hand from his own, Eogunn stares at him for a time. Finally, with a decisive swing of his mechadendrite, he cuts off his colleague's head, and takes it. Then, he takes the servo-skull that has been hovering at his shoulder and sets it at the foot of the stasis sacellum.{/n} "I have done what I had to do. Now I am ready to walk the path of atonement myself. I excommunicate myself from the xenarite sect and dedicate myself to the Quest for Knowledge as it has been established in His covenants. {name}, thank you for being with me."
5a160fdd-fe34-4721-9a49-97439c70b692: {n}Seconds before the disgusting swill arrives in your stomach, you feel something unimaginably nefarious, majestic as death, and as disgusting as a decomposing corpse turn its gaze upon you.{/n}
d239ffb5-afe4-42b9-bffb-6eada16207a8: "This man does not have long to live — let him walk the rest of the way on his own two feet. He is unlikely to survive the augment removal procedure." {n}The Vivisector casts a sympathetic glance at the patient.{/n}
a7f6c2a2-acae-409a-b531-01c32635fdea: "My name is {name}. I am here at the behest of Juvenna von Valancius."
ad866d68-59df-4194-9b09-c8850c7413a2: "I rescind my words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. This world has just risen in value and gained some interesting prospects."
2ce7cbcb-e65c-401e-ad0d-03d03894af55: {n}Abelard noisily inhales as if roused from a stupor.{/n} "Throne of {g|Encyclopedia:HolyTerraGlossary}Terra{/g}! Lord Captain, I haven't the slightest idea what happened. We are already back inside, aren't we?" {n}The confusion on his face fades gradually, giving way to irritation.{/n} "Cursed {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} conundrum."
302c8adb-e1da-438c-8ff6-b53aeed85ad4: "A strange remark from a friend of Lady Juvenna. You ought to learn from her foresight."
8abe9e97-d4f0-4959-8299-70e475647b07: "Thank you for your trust. What can I do for you?"
97657635-8a10-461f-849e-46dcbd396c3f: Shipments of sacred promethium to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 have been disrupted. Whoever is responsible should answer for their transgression and be punished most harshly.
c5f1648b-bb52-43e2-bedf-d0d5bca87323: {n}After pausing, he adds,{/n} "The decision to eradicate a newfound knowledge is never easy. I understand why I must, but each time it feels like I am killing an important part of myself. I am afraid of knowing the truth about Nuncius, but I'm also afraid that if I forget it, I'll never remember it again. And that fear is not groundless."
73d8edb1-b3a7-46c1-839f-f9e42caccdf7: In the ancient ruins on Zarkov, the Lord Captain managed to find an ancient, but still intact augment.
c1a3fdb6-c1f4-429b-9740-3a8c4f9d606c: "The hierarchical data-coordinates specified grant access to sensitive data."
7ce4ec33-dbd6-498b-a465-fc274a6e5f0a: Whenever a creature dies or falls unconscious, Trazyn gains {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} equal to {uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa}% of his {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
481847a7-45c5-4709-81b7-63fd7866ff19:
{n}Janur's face twists into a contemptuous grin:{/n}{br}
"Commissar words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But suit yourself. I won't weep for you. None of us will."
81d36977-d246-4ba9-8214-a40618f1ef67: "The current of energy granting life to the airlock has run dry, Rogue Trader. Only the generator's machine spirit, awakened from slumber, can charge the metal with the Motive Force. I believe it is housed somewhere within this compartment."
2b5474ff-f3d7-48a3-8d6a-b6543c2448e7: Jarub promised to wait for the Rogue Trader by the hospital to hand over the blade.
e48cc2a8-9f22-43ee-a53a-9b67d31fd383: "I find it fair to assume that those who belong to a high and esteemed clan have some privileges over those who can barely read. Our augments require careful maintenance as they are directly connected to the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the ship's vox-stations."
bb7749e9-28c9-4d5e-97e1-e9444bc00cbe: Green light is reflected in the lenses of the unmoving Adeptus Astartes war machine. Every now and then, a quiet hiss like the sound of weak, laboured breathing, comes from the vox-speakers.
a91a3a5e-d2d7-4b07-959d-a90b4de4124a: "Your decision is the greatest reward for a faithful servant."
bf06b08e-755a-46c6-a765-4ebb639bd5c8: {n}Cassia raises her hand to her mouth and freezes.{/n} "Those... those are not their colours. It is as if something vile has been smeared over them, blotting out the usual hues, concealing the truth!"
4069dad6-4653-4573-affe-4655c8988ec0: {n}Seberian regards you with a mixture of dejection and disgust.{/n} "Pray to the God-Emperor that you should not live to find yourself in my position, {name}."
483d7e2a-ea03-4905-9ae2-532edbfdf30a: "We have destroyed your foul trap, xenos!"
d2d6f3e8-4121-4687-aa08-dd4d37533561: "Nuncius, have you ever seen such masterpieces of architecture before? The mere sight makes me wonder at the mightiness of the mind that could conceive of such a thing, and the skilfulness of the hands that realised its design."
5ff5badc-19e8-4903-9318-41d22cac8864: "Intriguing. So your galvanic cell not only stores energy, but also redistributes it to wherever you direct it. And you power it, seemingly, by drawing energy from other sources."
e94f8a9b-0842-4d5d-a2d3-87808a3b4b26: "Be on your guard, Rogue Trader. The machines here are consumed by madness and are therefore unpredictable."
ecf17015-1e08-4d56-be96-d590ebe270c5: "Your illustrious ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, saved us from the terrible fate of obscurity and took the First Call-Up into his own service. He gave us good uniforms and weapons, and then there were the von Valancius gifts. Stories passed down from our ancestors tell of how the Rogue Trader removed these gifts from his own body and offered them to soldiers who had proven themselves better than all the rest. These boons made them even stronger."
004c9e34-970a-4cef-afec-1ada388e33c5: "But of course, I did not come empty-handed. I would like to present you with this augment. Now that the machine spirit of the implantation throne is awake, I can bestow its blessing upon you or one of your retinue, should the Rogue Trader will it."
79251f05-1b1e-4ab0-8b78-048b7df8487b: "The probability of finding an individual with similar psychophysiological characteristics is close to zero — no, less than zero. In other words, it would be easier to create a genetic duplicate of the lost Sage than to seek out a new one. But it is unlikely that you, esteemed Interrogator, would sanction such an experiment."
a36c82bf-6d79-41ce-9527-3a45b1fbcc49: {n}He closes his eyes again.{/n} "Spleen... tucked in the left hypochondrium, behind the stomach. Organic. Right lung..."
6ba217b4-e285-4149-9879-1258c875721f: {n}The colonel's stifled growl makes the surrounding Merovians shudder.{/n}
a3db8295-66c6-4ac4-a42a-91d322d84b9f: "I doubt I would succeed if I tried. I feel Khaine's rage is consuming them — blood is bound to be spilt."
beb8cf0a-d6e8-4463-b028-06454b41e2da: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, don't strain your circuits! Even my little whisperers don't know what this Harlequin's going to pull next, your cogs stand no chance!"
e91833fb-36fd-489c-a66b-1b1f034f9898: "What do you intend to do next?"
eccefd4c-e3c6-4700-8be6-1a920cab5405: "What is the connection between your regiment and my dynasty?"
d008da4d-7ae0-4629-8ae9-4c3637ed8d89: The Rogue Trader has unravelled the control principles of the anti-gravity slabs. Each one bears a control glyph. Activating it triggers arrival beacons on the accessible slabs.
400b0066-ff97-4a9e-b600-f372be733f9a: "I disagree — a person chooses what they live for."
38fa7cb5-b440-4a76-bb57-5dd07858762c: Detach the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> from your <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr> to activate mouse controls. Place the mouse sensor face down on a flat surface and slide the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> around to use it like a mouse.
9597d5ca-dea9-4b0d-8a2a-676d669cf15b: "And why should I believe that?" {n}Juvenna gives you a charming smile, tilting her head to the side.{/n}
629e26b9-d2c2-4f59-bf08-aa51eb817a31: A short time later, scouts report a cavern-filled asteroid with a giant vein of valuable metal inside. It will be hauled to the flagship immediately. The Tech-Priests serving on the shuttles do not recommend drawing any closer to the core — the death of pilots from radiation will inevitably lead to the irretrievable loss of sacred machines.
606287f0-5d81-4a03-812c-7e49472ee89b: "But... colonel-governor? Here? I mean... As you command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
29801e0b-1651-4739-ac5d-09b4ae871bf0: "I see. So, in a couple of Call-Ups, we'll be right back where we started. Officers sipping amasec in their private quarters while the common soldiers rot in their filthy cots. You do what you want, but I'm spending the rest of my life making sure the Trial Match tradition continues. It's the only chance we have of keeping the regiment from forgetting its roots."
2df57ab5-44c3-4fb1-8b74-e6a0efc3f6fa: "Foul xenos wretch!" {n}Abelard turns bright red at Trazyn's words. The Seneschal is clearly fighting the urge to get into an altercation with the projection, which is entirely indifferent to present events.{/n}
2311f35b-9ab1-4966-8832-1fd90429014a: A makeshift workbench designed for both handcrafting stubber rounds and carpentry.
ac430fad-347d-45bb-a474-736689a1420e: Completed request form to the Departmento Munitorum for the requisition of military forces, signed by Seberian von Valancius.
d04ed625-4f4f-4796-8663-e4b03d2f39cc: {n}Flickers of light streak across the matte-black surface of the console. The xenos creation is silent.{/n}
7728cd45-698a-4a8a-970c-de6f22fe951e: "Colonel Batoshski, permission to report?" {n}Janur steps forward and gives a salute to the huge man, who looks at you sternly.{/n} "The 3rd Supply Platoon deployed on a mission and found survivors from the downed flying machine. The leader of the group identified {mf|himself|herself} as Rogue Trader von Valancius!"
70d2b77a-c1cd-4f8f-b33d-bb2a46fbb6a0: "You are right. I am not ready for the weight of this title."
f6d323cb-aa82-4e6a-9f96-13d2160263ac: Vedka Dunawski ruled Zarkov as governor into old age and founded a new aristocratic dynasty. Her apparent naivety did not prevent the Merov Regiment woman from holding the newly ascended nobles in an iron grip, while her ability to bring people together secured many valuable alliances for the von Valancius dynasty.
2a4a7ad7-8aef-4d70-886c-37069f2056f1: "Attesting: according to the logs of the Sector Bionica systems, Genetor Eogunn Februs is undertaking unauthorised use of the implantation throne contrary to its designated purpose. Recommended sanctions: imposition of a techno-penance combined with temporary rank reduction."
94dc6d30-6716-4517-98b1-d71a1651f3c1: {n}Your eyes catch the glint of Batoshski's knife, coated in something greenish. The colonel has used the moment you spent answering Dunawski to coat his knife in poison.{/n}
f5868cbd-5916-4a41-8150-60cab32a2d98: "Are you sure he is all right?"
eb445fee-7cb5-4284-9867-eeca173c7c6c: {n}The moment you speak these words, a familiar figure coalesces from emerald-green light beside the Warrant's resting place, and a voice dripping with mockery sounds within your mind.{/n} "What a striking demonstration of the differences between us. To you, a centuries-old relic is nothing but a dust-covered scrap, left unattended in a pathetic, unsecured storeroom. To me, each of my exhibits is a precious witness to its era, carefully preserved in stasis for millennia to come."
0c27dde5-91e9-4456-9956-2a98f5bc77a3: [Try to understand the purpose of the buttons]
c763f76f-6577-4078-8ed4-aba1f4800a15: {n}Truly, you detect not a whit of jealousy in the servo-skull's gaze.{/n}
9016df87-4f49-4b0e-b112-223ee2ec8b0a: "This proposal goes beyond the patterns of what is acceptable during a state of war." {n}After a moment's silence, the Magos adds, more quietly, {/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Regicide{/g} is a closed system with deterministic outcomes, requiring no sophisticated navigation skills. I only play triple-blind vector regicide: one round of this entertaining game contains logical fun compressed to thirty seconds."
d13c3043-3e46-493c-9c96-34cc522bdf89: "To lose the sword now? Unthinkable!" {n}The aristocrat before you wears a uniform in von Valancius colours. His face has been disfigured beyond recognition by implants — only his lone surviving eye and the taut scraps of skin hint that the monster before you was once an attractive man. The Rogue Trader stares at you with suspicion, and the vox-synthesiser embedded in his skull crackles:{/n} "Who in the void are you?"
38d3749d-ef05-4358-866e-1d4feaaac655: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You treat his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, and apply targeted stimulants to alleviate his pain. His frenzied breathing begins to even out.{/n}
66aacd1a-5208-4836-975b-a262601d305e: {n}Eogunn goes pale. He opens his mouth silently, unable to find a response. When the shock wears off, he closes his organic eye and the wrinkles on his face smooth out.{/n} "You are right. I cannot run forever. I keep insisting that this is all for Nuncius, but I am not only a coward, I am a consummate liar. I think only of myself. I choose a phantom to hide from the pain. It is time to finally choose my dearest colleague. And... to say goodbye."
57f34bf5-b547-4969-90a6-051c9b7e2e41: {n}Noticing Ulfar, Seberian's face brightens.{/n} "By the blood of the God-Emperor and all the saints! What brings one of His Angels here? But that hardly matters. What matters is that your presence will surely turn the tide of battle!"
eac5326f-713d-4296-88a1-d43db57cfa1e: During the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} of combat, this creature gains +30% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} against ranged attacks.
b28739c8-403f-4700-b71f-b34d1105a7ae: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! An urgent dispatch from Zarkov. Xenos ruins have been discovered near a small settlement on the lower levels. Scouts attempted to penetrate them, but were met by the enemy: terrifying iron {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} with long claws emerged from the dark halls. Your soldiers valiantly repelled their assault until something unexpected occurred — other iron xenos appeared, without claws, and instead of aiding their own kind, they began to slaughter them."
739b8b02-6577-4f88-b23f-a32a4aa9a206: "I have changed my mind. You can still be of use to me."
7e3b3100-8e76-462f-b58d-d2bd3b63cd50: "The primary functions of the Genetor life form were fatally compromised. But the Vivisector life form managed to replace the damaged mechanisms with a cortical implant in time. Functionality has been restored." {n}Ferrenz is silent for a few seconds, then adds indifferently,{/n} "The auxiliary visors were damaged and removed. Diagnostic scan efficiency has decreased by 30 percent."
1bbed669-8aab-47cd-8a8e-8e3377385a9c: As a metallic being, the Chronomancer does not attract Necron Flayed Ones.
9f92b68b-e9e0-4c4c-81f7-e848ac7f441c: {n}The blades on his fingers slowly extend, emitting an ear-splitting screech, as his mechanical limbs start reaching for you.{/n} "The sounds you make during dissection please me, mon-keigh. Try to survive the procedure, otherwise I will have wasted my time."
5c726c03-6b46-4b1a-89de-2435e08ea80a: "As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the devastated settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offence, but everyone knows it was on your orders that we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies. I suppose I should thank you for not abandoning us, at least."
8e9a5a9c-e02a-4659-8202-347829485c17: "Analysing the necessity of offering praise in response... the result is inconsistent."
67f5a23f-6771-4bed-94dc-1b0bd80c8a00: "Acknowledged. May the God-Emperor protect you, Lord Captain."
0031c431-49cb-49e2-8b59-684d0951f355: "I will personally dispatch this miscreant to the void."
59989585-3dec-4c38-bc79-6211103ef785: "I was just resting my eyes, my {mf|lord|lady}! I'm awake!"
477554aa-6ebb-48c5-b26e-fd53fea418c1: "I usually love legends, but in my experience they always have depressing endings for some reason. It would be stupid to expect anything different here."
73116810-7134-48d2-a656-979a3e9df423: "Sauerback and her fighters are already there? Is my intervention really that necessary?"
cf20e8db-b6bc-4c5d-beab-4b128013576f: {n}For a moment, you hear nothing but static from the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}, then the sound suddenly becomes clear. The voice that emerges is not human — it is a xenos speaking, an Aeldari.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Mon-keigh{/g}, this is our first and final warning. Leave the orbit of the doomed world and begone. Here, we shall exact our revenge against the ancient enemy. This world will bear no survivors."
7d7214c4-1bf9-4074-b3f7-e61a69364d6a: "Lady Cassia, we will turn your knowledge against the iron xenos."
94944f44-ba8c-4b62-a8bc-f5bd9fff223f: "Truly said." {n}Ulfar nods gravely.{/n} "On Fenris, the ones sent to the Deathwatch are those who have fought thousands of battles and returned victorious. Few can boast of such a feat."
04f92d78-b9ca-4627-8d06-7bb8c41bd921: {n}Juvenna's sharp cheekbones tense — she stoically maintains her expression, but her jaw clenches fitfully, betraying her agitation. All at once, the serenity and cool self-assurance vanish from her gaze, giving way to visible strain. She was involved in whatever happened to the Gaprak troops — that much is clear.{/n}
f93824e4-ebee-4572-9405-70baf6c3bc6a: "To our grief, the enemy forces have a qualitative superiority — they command large numbers of specialised Skitarii. This has allowed them to inflict major damage upon the righteous forces — our group — and divide it. The enemy has planted mines along the approaches to the central unit and has cut us off from our allies, making the mission to eliminate the threat difficult. The only factor that can alter the situation is intervention from a third party — Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
0c6ed361-d542-428d-a5ef-98b36befb46e: The one responsible for the disappearance of the Warrant of Trade is Trazyn the Infinite, from whose captivity the Lord Captain previously liberated Seberian. The xenos has relayed that he will return the Warrant in exchange for {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s ancestor — and he now awaits the Rogue Trader in one of the systems beyond the forbidden warp gate to conclude the deal.
4f63cb44-ea99-42bf-b819-82bb4902a03e: {n}Eogunn clicks his tongue in irritation, clearly displeased that his colleague was able to provide a more accurate answer.{/n}
9818ecc9-0e80-40a0-b0ac-c30ec971cd7b: {n}Argenta pulls off her glove before picking up an unfinished wooden figurine of a soldier, as if afraid of damaging it. She turns the toy over in her hands, her brow furrowed in concentration, then suddenly grins.{/n} "Carve a smile upon his face, master craftsman. Let the children know that a soldier must be stern toward his enemies yet merciful toward those he protects. Just as you are toward these little ones."
3a781fb5-0a58-4f62-aabc-48260af16fba: Everyone was looking about, bracing themselves for a fresh attack, when the walls around them shimmered. Their contours flowed and shifted, forming shining curves around us. Many of the squad recited prayers, hoping to banish the visceral terror that gripped their minds at the sight of this strange phantasmagoria of lifeless light.
2dc7ddaf-f2e0-4524-ad5f-07ac1ee27f06: "Thank you for your help, Eogunn. Where will you go next?"
420a3c9d-bc7e-461c-ab3d-b87413d02090: "If a loyal warrior of the {g|Encyclopedia:BloodAngelsGlossary}Blood Angels{/g} were to speak lightly of the mysteries entrusted to him, that would be the moment to worry. I honour your silence. We prove our faith to Him not with words, but with deeds, and that is sufficient. May the God-Emperor strengthen us!"
94cd165c-da0b-4997-8665-08845795df00: {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers. After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius, I am being too hard on the Rogue Trader. The strain of that place has taken a toll on me. I ought to strive to emulate your fortitude. I will make my apologies, and then you can help me mend you."
267ccee8-6d25-415a-8bdf-974eba6adad3: "Have you seen anything unusual near the drill complex?"
fea90cb4-2ed4-4861-b0da-82f8bb68fb53: "The perpetrator has severely wounded one of our prime experts and taken the other hostage, demanding Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence. The enforcers have the situation under control, but the lives of the esteemed medicae officers are still at risk."
e831f8f7-21be-41ed-9509-88571830b006: {n}The air defence battery, now {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}appeased by Exalt-117{/d}, stirs into action in perfect unison. Each gun fires several bursts, forcing the Valkyries to drop their shells early and retreat, so their strikes land only on the approach to the palace.{/n}
81cfd643-d45b-4c4e-8639-7ef40aa7bd05: The planet, riddled with huge tunnels, resembles an ant hill of gigantic proportions. Even looking down on the eerie landscape chills the blood. The ship's {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} do not detect any signs of life on the surface.
fc8e4061-b149-486c-b98e-cbd366b0b5c6:
Be careful! Companions can get hurt by your {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} attacks or {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area attacks{/g}.
To avoid {g|Encyclopedia:FriendlyFire}friendly fire{/g}, keep an eye on the trajectory of the shots and the area of effect of area attacks and melee burst attacks.
f6992329-4883-4915-a50b-c0a208af6c1f: "I am no less tired of this battle than you. But if you do not retreat..."
8811d72a-aba4-472d-b152-60ab2f7936ff: "Aett-Vater, I know of such creatures. Hiding dishonourably until you lure it from its lair by blood and by force. I have not vanquished these monsters before, but we shall see — perhaps this Drover will prove worthy of a verse!"
c9ed2c98-72b0-46b0-b4fb-f8a077f11321: The command headquarters surviving the bombardment is a strong argument in favour of defence.
bb2cbda3-0c37-4487-b6c1-759788733a7e: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspex{/g} readings scanning certain areas of the planetary crust are extremely unusual. They indicate that the world is undoubtedly of natural origin, but that many millennia ago, something happened here that turned the upper layers of the tectonic plates into a smooth layer of glass. Only partially melted tracts remain of the mountains, and the less noteworthy elements of the natural topography have been erased without a trace.{/n}
953e73d8-92b2-43e3-9512-26c942068b6f: {n}The firing stops as the soldiers turn and look your way. You are getting accustomed to frightened and inspired looks on these faces.{/n}
602e5f08-92a4-47b3-9c90-529328153e47: <u>(number of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks × number of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks)</u>
cedc24a4-40bd-4150-9a19-d3567dbdb706: "Do not listen to those blinkered fools. Continue to believe in that which grants strength to your body and soul. Do what is right for you."
9f1366f8-d29b-4e74-aae2-211957760aa6: "As I said, it is an acquired taste. Let me examine you after your bath."
ac8d3a1a-7209-408f-b790-95f784f240eb: The bridge of the von Valancius flagship has witnessed a conflict between the Rogue Trader and {mf|his|her} illustrious ancestor. The tensions between the two members of the dynasty have risen, and Seberian fully intends to settle this matter in the near future.
0bca5cfd-7188-4bf3-8bf8-e6d0b336f8d9: Something falls, with a smashing sound followed by someone's muffled cursing.
ff77be0b-9cc0-44d7-ab4b-c32b193ef5da: "Shall I bring the flagship onto an orbit vector, Lord Captain?"
3dc6d426-1ce4-4b74-a3f6-b2d014e9e45e: Camilla Drivestem is on Juvenna's side — her support should be maintained.
5a6ca8aa-34d8-4aaf-904c-b040336f9984: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} steps slightly forward. The multitude of visors hidden beneath his hood move almost silently, surveying the deck and you at the same time.{/n}
13986af4-72ba-4199-bfd0-e06f0f00ea78: {n}The lance gunners did not miss a single shot, while the Merov Regiment finished off the maimed creatures if the monsters had been lucky enough to survive the strike. Abelard later described this campaign as a perfect example of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}
ed237dac-c24a-42ba-a28d-a01060043fd0: "...that have undergone unpredictable changes under empyric influences. I have been able to find several mutated specimens in this region, which has allowed me to fill numerous gaps and complete other exhibits where such creatures were present."
00b40cf2-e922-467f-a5f4-5cac4ff3588a: "Magos, do you not smell the malaise in the sacred currents of the Motive Force? Do you not hear the moans of the blessed machines? Leave the psalms of praise and lend your voice to the initiation of purifying prayers, esteemed colleague."
945c50fa-d302-481d-87a0-3ce81f64d214: "There is an object by that name among the exhibits in this gallery. It is located just beyond the historical diorama in the centre of the room, the one dedicated to the primitive who once stole that same object." {n}The polyhedrons hovering above the Chronomancer's head shimmer and rotate to the rhythm of his measured speech.{/n}
17c26895-00de-4238-ab55-4382261bd837: "This problem is imaginary, Rogue Trader. The Imperium is optimally structured, and your inexhaustible resources are already serving it well, expanding its borders and influence at the frontier. Truly, Nuncius, I did not expect such frivolous leanings from you."
3b838c51-f84f-4d67-a30a-afeb9819619e: {n}The vox-array is silent: the speaker grilles are tightly encased in noise-dampening material.{/n}
d09c0565-3c08-484f-abe1-98f90c3ecd07: "It's nothing but a cranium stuffed with crude imitations of bionic devices. An utterly useless construct devoid of any ability to converse or cogitate to any extent. I will not trouble myself to ponder what exactly made your primitive minds consider this object to be endowed with a personality."
45b78680-c359-4215-a803-7a5de95e2192: "You work in tandem with the Genetor, don't you?"
9679a9d1-44ab-40fb-abc3-27f0b471fbc0: "I am {name}; I serve Laria Voigtvir. I wish to ask you a few questions."
c74ae5c8-5061-40a0-9d6e-1b1b36c7edbe: {n}The skull contains only a control micro-cogitator, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. All organic components are completely absent.{/n}
a768da95-2d60-4684-a4e8-e289957b9275: "Wait until one side emerges victorious — and then finish them off."
dd3f3961-e22f-4c4e-a5c4-9cb7591058c0: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski refused to accept her commander-in-chief's betrayal. For six days she shielded herself from the new reality in her quarters, firing at anyone who tried to enter. On the seventh day, having lost an eye and all hope, a scabbed and broken creature emerged from her quarters and obediently returned to her post as Arch-Militant.
1f71aa4e-4680-42e9-aaf1-186b26c9bb2b: "On the one hand, we can now observe xenocell development under close to native conditions. On the other hand, we are dealing with extremely dangerous genetic parasites. The decision taken is hardly clear-cut."
245fc970-e68a-4b35-8d07-f8fed37d3b24: The xenos trap was destroyed by the explosion of the Palace of Dargonus replica, allowing the Lord Captain to break free.
fa5154bf-0fe0-4941-8f2c-a807f5f7af3d: "The soldiers of the 32nd Regiment have occupied their assigned barracks in accordance with the Code and have commenced scheduled duties, Lord Captain!" {n}Vedka catches your eye and continues in a lower voice.{/n} "I mostly selected those who, like me, wanted to leave Zarkov. They are glad to serve you, glad to be among the stars. Everything here is still strange and frightening, but we will adapt. We always do."
d8f9f465-62fe-4ae3-860b-d34baa61c138: The machine spirit of the lift has awakened. It is time to meet Nuncius and help Eogunn determine his fate.
d1e8165f-6ad0-4af3-967f-a0828a9f7db1: {n}The colonel moves smoothly, precisely, hiding a potential strike in every move, but you're one step ahead. As he lunges forward, he finds your blade already waiting for him.{/n}
8fbdd3c5-dd0b-4858-887f-9e81574698f6: "The Cage needs you both. What happened to you is the fault of my dynasty. It is time to atone for the wrongs committed against your ancestors."
c0bf802e-1140-44df-9a7d-3a210540744e: "Isimond?" {n}Seberian seems to lurch back.{/n} "If you are right, there is nothing left for me to do but execute someone I considered one of the dynasty's most loyal servants."
d9dba607-df5a-4990-a689-4ac06e69af3c: "Isn't your regiment a little small for you to bear this rank?"
7e442859-8954-4ce3-b84c-8d053d325638: "Your mind thirsts for knowledge, and your words lack the hatred inherent in your fellows. It is... unusual. Your lack of detachment will one day turn into a fire that will burn you to the ground, iron sage."
2ce04866-2d9d-4523-8117-11f5f53ef2d2: "I must be on my way. Do you know how one can leave this hall?"
2877f548-9fbf-41cb-a2a2-688b6f6929ec: {n}A familiar sequence of numbers draws your eye. Few in the Expanse would recognise this combination, but you are one of them: this frequency belongs to the band used by the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}.{/n}
0d5b1e8d-6a17-43ca-802a-8305fa0ffceb: This bolter's {g|Encyclopedia:RateOfFire}rate of fire{/g} is increased by +{uip|RoF|b7c0d4663e9c4c01b6a5622aeaf1079e}.
47fcb938-5685-4fcc-b259-9e25524e1341:
"Expected reinforcements:
HOUSE DRIVESTEM REGIMENT: arrived in full
2nd MEROV BATTALION: arrived in full
HOUSE GAPRAK ARMY: delayed."
29ef4ae2-972e-40fb-92ab-9e57a2288260: "Healing people is your domain. Why should I solve your problems for you?"
ae6241ce-47d2-412b-90fb-942f746edcaf: "You are mistaken, Sauerback. The Gapraks' patrimony lies in a forge world where the dynasty's steel might is made under the eye of the Adeptus Mechanicus. However, you are forgiven."
291f9952-e382-4a34-9598-f7bd42fb9261: "Your attempt to delay the inevitable is as obvious as it is ridiculous. I will allow you to speak not because of your title: in the eyes of the God-Emperor, all heretics are equal. I am only giving you this chance so that you may realise for yourselves the futility of your intention."
eea49fe4-ccf6-4dc5-a812-c500089fd08b: "I will check the door and the guardian immediately."
2303d7ae-ae67-47f9-8de4-c1f784345a2c: "I am the Rogue Trader, not a soul healer. How much longer do you expect me to entertain him?"
d6cfb7d9-e244-4dea-b471-0e204c6cb43e: [Persuade Isimond to do as you command]
8baf54ab-5fd2-4b1d-a805-eae1bc4f057e: "Laria!" {n}Seberian's fingers reach toward the fading portal, but grasp only empty air. For several moments, the Lord Captain stands motionless, his hand frozen in the air. When he turns to you, the hem of his heavy coat billows and his augmented joints exhale noisily, releasing steam.{/n}
85564dc4-c89e-4a47-b143-7a2be8bbd5b7: {n}Seberian's gaze bores into yours and then, receiving no answer, he sighs.{/n} "When the time comes, we shall resume this interrupted conversation. Sooner or later."
67cf67c7-f86e-47f5-87bb-da5a9192dd5d: {n}The maimed man flinches only slightly at the injection, but his breathing starts to even out. Despite the oily film clouding his eyes, the faint ghost of gratitude shines through.{/n}
2ebc3e64-3bb1-4668-ba76-3a4ac3054dc0: <u>(Eogunn's Tech-Use / 10 × number of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks on the target)</u>
630df996-ff2d-42a9-8557-06111ee43d5f: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. The unique technologies from Altar-Templum allowed them to create augments that could completely replace the delicate processes of the human body and save lives even in the most hopeless cases.
9235bc19-7c06-4492-8119-b807c77a7c80: "Once you are restored to health, I beg you to meet me on the bridge — a disaster has struck: Nuncius has stopped speaking! Genetor Ferrenz volunteered to inspect my esteemed colleague, yet he now dares to assert that he is fully operational!"
a666088e-b4de-44a5-8ff5-b883f364d4f6: "The way you marvel at my kind's superiority over your own, human, might almost inspire a measure of endearment. In theory. In someone else."

2c205cb7-6eb7-4e71-9418-001cc465a3ea:
You have received new equipment for your ship!
To install it, open the voidship management screen from the panel on the right. Double click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on the equipment's icon or hold {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} and drag it to the desired section.
b415e1ed-bfd7-4e71-b525-fc92aaa73d01: "The remnants of exhibits I acquired in this stellar region, but which have not been distributed among the other displays. Some day I must find an opportunity to deal with them... although the significance of this section is so minor that I find the usefulness of such a task to be highly questionable."
a5b28dd7-93e6-4447-be67-7e5dc068c065: At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the enemy with the largest number of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g} suffers +{uip|INTB2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c} more exploits. If two or more enemies are tied for the largest number of exploits, one of those enemies is chosen at random.
fb0792a2-9d06-4502-92a7-8a2c9aa8ead2: "Carry on with your drills. I'll leave you to it."
ef4d571a-0008-44ed-b8f4-1e9e1de1680a: "Genetor Extremis Nuncius, by the Emperor's Mercy, I hereby end your algorithms and cognitive processes. By the right granted to me by the rank of {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g}, before the all-seeing gaze of the all-thinking Machine God, I name you a martyr worthy of sanctification as a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g}. Your Quest for Knowledge has come to an end, but your service is not over." {n}Laying both hands on Nuncius's chest, Eogunn asks gently,{/n} "Are you ready, dearest colleague?"
c6ae4f5a-914d-4223-97dc-2fe1823e8689: Took the unique augment from the veteran worker.
379a516f-9d90-4eb5-9e14-b1e161fbdcbc: "I know a vantage point where we can get a look at the Drover and plan our attack."
c0626b6b-1744-4d00-b881-10a5e94cc5f4: "Don't you dare! I'm on the verge of a breakthrough!"
7180a00d-f323-473b-89a3-7654399c88af: [Show Laria's ring] "This is a request from Laria Voigtvir."
18cca473-e30b-4bd9-af50-f6552775f530: Throughout its long and glorious history, the annals of the legion have recorded many resounding victories, but these victories have been bathed in the blood of countless fighters. Striving for redemption, the Merovians volunteer for the most dangerous tactical missions.
75de320d-562c-4e41-b993-32001882f30c: "I understand you have experience in such cases, Eogunn? Can you save this man?"
244f8c44-bd57-4514-b456-bfce89b6e6d0: "The Allfather smiles upon warriors who receive their wounds in battle. The songs of their valour reach Him before all others."
bc8d90d6-a68e-4165-9973-07d234fb338d: "I have grown bored of watching Seberian attempt to insert himself into an age to which he does not belong. I suspect you feel the same. It is time to set things right. The Warrant will return to your domain, and Seberian will return to the Museion's exhibition. All you need do is travel to the territory of the Yekhmet dynasty, which lies beyond the very spatial gate you are already heading toward. The system's coordinates are already within your mind."
31ca577a-2fdb-4793-b81f-e6cf7f9769ed: Juvenna proposes seeking an alliance with the Inquisition through negotiations, and she needs the Rogue Trader's help to convince Seberian.
da4ed268-192a-4134-85c9-f71517613b43: "Of course, Sergeant. I do not intend to further test Izdrig's patience. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll await your triumphant return to the Cage."
36ac0ffc-74c8-4062-b6cc-b02993552301: The Custodian of Implantation Rites, Genetor Ferrenz awaits the visit of the Rogue Trader within the augmentation ward.
38e36f4b-b00d-40f0-b137-1cea43796ae3: {n}After repeating the command input sequence thrice, Eogunn huffs in disappointment.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that I interpreted the machine spirit's response correctly. It is guided by the simplest binharic logic, as well as a strict hierarchy of protocols. And right now, it would sooner die than open the way for us."
1ca2f063-1e1f-4a22-bf90-306431869aca: "An Aeldari blade, and an ancient one at that. A xenos relic, without a doubt."
5b66a897-dae3-4a46-9b9c-d350a72530fd: {n}The Genetor nods gravely.{/n} "A worthy endeavour. Only statistical data, when compiled with sufficient diligence, can serve as the foundation for hypotheses worthy of consideration."
45515566-fdc1-43bf-81b9-6a0bb1b0ab0a: "This means that we are often compelled to ensure a certain level of secrecy in our work, which only increases suspicions about our world. But for the sake of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}'s victory, we are prepared to live with this stigma — that is an incontrovertible fact."
53b56e20-804e-4cbe-b5cc-7d2351532f14: "How long do we have to wait? I'll die of old age before the disease at this rate!"
cb567141-cbba-4b46-a54a-87831f4dbe37: The decayed body could be mistaken for one of the Merovian guards, but the symbol of the Inquisition on his chest reveals him to be an acolyte.
b1abdf20-95d3-4203-929f-81d815afa520:
The soldiers of Zarkov were not in the habit of faltering in the face of monsters.
A sergeant charged forward. I did not know his name, but I shall always remember his face: weary yet utterly calm. The creatures' claws ran him through... but the dying soldier managed to activate a melta charge that incinerated both himself and one of the abominations. Several other Zarkovians followed his example, and their surviving comrades finished off the damaged monsters.
75223050-dcc1-4627-a9de-a9cbee719c02: "Izdrig Batoshski, I sentence you to lifelong exile on the penal world Vheabos VI."
24d19300-74be-48d0-8b75-58db8e0dbd70: "A penal regiment, then? Full of riffraff, no doubt? Brigands, robbers...thieves?"
24f5c0b1-7307-40b5-a98b-ee9829781cd0: "You have moved from simple reasoning to objective facts, yet you have still failed to state the conclusion." {n}Tervantias speaks almost tenderly, openly relishing the humiliation of his opponent.{/n} "Do it then. Admit that you are a mentally deficient nonentity, whose entire body of knowledge is nothing but a pile of dubious guesswork and foolish rituals."
4a45a187-a3a2-4c10-948a-add30ea3c73c: "That means I must have tasked you with this matter already, yes? Any progress?"{n}Laria reaches for the {g|Encyclopedia:Dataslate}data-slate{/g} attached to her belt, preparing to log your report.{/n}
3763d527-999c-4b4d-aa93-8b50377b7bdb: "Then the debate is concluded." {n}He softens.{/n} "I appreciate your efforts, but few ever manage to best me in an argument."
bd76f899-1ef7-44f5-aeb9-9129ebac3ab1: The traces reveal that, once long ago, xenos fought among themselves here. The heart sings at the knowledge that the inhumans are capable of destroying each other, lessening Humanity's burden.
2d667361-f2de-4ffc-af31-a0b66b299cdd: {n}Alas, gaining entry has proved impossible. The entrance to the xenoruins is entangled in roots so dense that even a melta charge has failed to breach them. You command the governor of Zarkov to clear the thickets blocking the path to the site where your legendary ancestor perished. All you can do now is wait.{/n}
5ca220bc-9603-4e4d-a12b-6f27224593ec: "When I departed on my final expedition, I left Janus a prosperous world, where governance was conducted honourably and the authority of the protectorate was beyond question. Now, you have plunged it into decline and anarchy. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."
1ab5cc27-0cbb-428d-956a-9fd5f9cf600a: {n}You see the sense in the young man's words. As much as you might dislike lording it over the common people, you alone have the right to disconnect any device inside the settlement. {/n}
64ff4608-d209-4502-98f6-609a20a4818f: {n}The melta charge adheres to the dark metal with a hollow click. For a moment, the mechanism seems to awaken: a tremor runs through the casing. You arm the charge and make a hasty retreat.{/n}
b9faf336-00b6-47fa-9cb8-63904bfe15a3: "I see. You are just an old man who lives in the past and bemoans his long-faded glory."
65e81529-ff0e-4690-a35f-3486e08f2dc8: {n}In the end, the xenos pyramid came tumbling down, strangled by burning roots. Only then did its colossal scale become known. Humanity had won this battle. The only question that remained was whether Humanity had won the war for Zarkov as well.{/n}
d4343b7f-353d-4a8d-b89d-999741459f19: "My vox-augment operates on the Ruststalkers' frequencies. It is not intended for laypersons."
60a2e530-011e-4d7d-a251-fefcca980469: [Finish Laria] "God-Emperor, may Your mercy grace the dying."
ebcc8f07-750c-4f8f-8ac7-e45ebb5f6c30: Genetor Ferrenz, who was left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.
43201b62-e255-4d70-950a-39788a55d05e: ...I ordered my soldiers to hold off the enemy onslaught at any cost.
3a719590-8e10-4fb5-8904-569bf2b113d7: Attend to the Sector Bionica for a viability assessment. This compartment is reserved for mending and augmentation of the ship's elite. The procedure will be conducted by the two specialists in charge.
702311b1-7a46-449e-8604-b51b8367cf03: "We offer up our thanks to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} for the intersection of events with a margin of error within the confidence interval. In the infinite branches of the future, this outcome will be marked as favourable! I am Tetria-Lemma, Logis of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, and I appeal to the Rogue Trader for sacred knowledge: what is the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor from Rykad Minoris?"
8332cc69-740a-4401-959a-067e5f995232: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but we shouldn't stand around here for too long."
4584d22a-52c5-4d35-83fb-1b34854229e5: "I wish to know more about the Drover."
2ba53f94-72a1-4bcc-bd04-bef810007d8d: {n}The sturdy, well-crafted leather with expensive embossing has hardly faded with the effects of time. The von Valancius coat of arms stamped on it is embellished with large gems. The book is covered in many scratches and scuffs, as if the book has survived more than a few adventures. At the bottom of the cover, the name "Seberian von Valancius" is written in florid script. It appears to be a personal diary.{/n}
a25ce44f-dcf5-4c5c-8d3a-494fdbf3807d: {n}The sergeant freezes instinctively, as do the soldiers under his command. He stares at you, biting his lip. In the stretching silence, you can practically hear Zarkov's thoughts turning heavily in his head. At last, he breathes a loud sigh.{/n} "Trying to trick me, are you? You want to be taken to His Lordship? That can be arranged. In the proper fashion!"
13854414-7d1d-4c26-a828-38f401bfcf33: "I apologise, Lord Captain! Genetor Ferrenz and I will endeavour not to trouble you again." {n}Martinax bows deeply before you, doubling over until he touches the floor, and Ferrenz follows suit, pitching his body as low as the mechadendrites at his back will allow.{/n}
d59c9a38-1ca3-4582-a5a1-c9430a66ac12: "That is true. Battle tests not only the strength of the body but also the power of the spirit." {n}Argenta raises her fist to the sky, clenching it with such force that she seems to crush the very idea of cowardice.{/n} "Triumph belongs to the most worthy, to the one whose faith is stronger and whose intent is purer. And is it not such that should lead others? There is truth in this tradition."
c21fd1b7-acba-42cf-885f-ce5a24d24490: {n}The skull-topped structure looks like nothing more than a hideously disfigured corpse with hoses and wires attached. Dark tubes wriggle sluggishly beneath the skin like fat worms. The body is so ravaged that it is impossible to discern any practical intent behind these mutilations.{/n}
3a2380d4-45f1-4c72-832c-a04e15f2f4a5: "Junior Lexmechanic Carr-Ain, operator of auxiliary terminal 289-0 of the lower workshops of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. A pragmatist and a bureaucrat who saw the world solely through the prism of statistics, endless parades of outflows and inflows — he had little interest in anything other than keeping track of valves and vents. But, now and then, he would drop pearls of wisdom such as these without even noticing it himself. I felt it was my duty to pick them up."
eb596a4f-4565-4931-b9c1-3d30a98e7538: The weapon's plasma core blazes with emerald light. By Eogunn's genius, the monstrous power of entropy the xenos possess can be turned back upon them.
d2684125-2c0f-4bd7-a160-96a3347b070c: "What do we know about our enemy?"
2585aad2-5b5c-4b6b-a00f-6e4aadaf9593: "God-Emperor? Take pity on me, take me... to the foot of Your {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}... My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk... I am lost... so lost..." {n}The old man squeezes his hands in the sign of the Aquila. He presses them into his chest so hard that you hear the crunch of his organic hand against the augmetic.{/n}
8994076c-f1f7-4add-8e91-d8e16eb14a95: All targets {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} by an arc rifle, {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Magnarail Blast{/g}, or {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}Transonic Wave{/g} suffer a −{uip|Bonus|7abd1558db0b4bfaa49f96ef48ef1e00}% {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} until the end of combat. Does not stack.
026bf9c1-db47-4a86-82ed-eb9e5dd11428: "I am ready to listen to what you and Ferrenz have to say."
0a8f62bf-669d-4b9f-98a5-c1d4cd65a8fa: {n}The Genetor speaks rapidly, his words almost merging into an indistinct buzz.{/n} "Lord Captain, operations in the Sector Bionica have practically stalled. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs is unilaterally experimenting with the implantation throne, drawing the Motive Force from the compartment's circuitry and thereby hindering proper administration of the augmentation rite."
38acb7d4-a5df-4a73-8b75-21877f3ea67c: "Excellent!" {n}Enthusiasm kindles in Juvenna's voice.{/n} "I'll see to it that they reach the right people and are used immediately."
acb08ae7-d041-436b-a1cc-e72f8c7ddf64: "I confirm the discovery of technologies not listed in the sacred standards on this platform. And I admire Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s knowledge of them. Access to further details is both denied and impossible, since the requesting layperson's rank is insufficient to establish communication." {n}The Tech-Priest responds with the measured and unyielding nature of a soulless {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g}.{/n}
3d263dfa-6335-4a19-9074-6c5534548df7: "All these creatures, both unintelligent and alien, are marked by the Undying One, but they balance on the edge between life and death, doomed to the eternal torture of half-existence. The one who turned them into this makes a mockery of the laws of being. I burn with the desire to correct this..."
2ea7f462-0bca-4c51-82f4-8b754b1a1f84: {n}A steady hum comes from deep within the Tech-Priest's body.{/n} "The map of sacred knowledge is full of gaps, and only by refining them can thought advance. Tell me, what critical discrepancies have been recorded?"
2ef2f83f-f919-4690-aa61-51ba4823d635: "An interesting choice of words — 'death to the enemies of von Valancius.' So you are indeed of Seberian's bloodline. Whether it was a naive desire to save him or a similar propensity for avarice that led you to follow your ancestor's trail, I do not know, but I'm sure you won't object if I explain how he — and now you — came to be here."
2baf0d8b-e931-4647-b01d-dc9a52375647: "Is that so? Then I demand a duel, here and now."
aae9a70d-c318-4d3c-a7bb-951d9c188df2: Examined the worker's soul with an unholy gaze to seek out traces of corruption.
2dd26266-3c11-488e-880b-f63349cf8320:
The user can equip two-handed {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws).
If the user has a ranged weapon in their left hand, the first {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack per turn{/g} made with a two-handed weapon in this hand costs −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
116e74c4-2e7d-41f6-910b-688ae394aaa1: [Take possession] "I am your new owner, Nuncius."
976b3990-a27d-4bf7-9a38-df6384e20ceb: Eogunn wants to discuss the results of the experiment — he has asked the Rogue Trader to seek him out on the bridge.
e5862066-d9fb-47a0-8187-5a677d4bef11: "You're right, it sounds like a rare brew."
b339ca53-ebd8-4c14-a422-3fb2d8a0f10d:
The user gains +1 stack of {g|f:3a3202273a334a989eee9d85b2df93f0}antigrav charge{/g} for each cell they move.
When the number of stacks on the user becomes {unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}, all of them are removed and they gain +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
The user cannot suffer the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.
ab90658b-d39f-410d-b08e-054b8324264b: The crater is now so deep that you can see some strange metal gleaming through the dirt.
260fdde8-d0ef-4e50-a59a-5fda79242d08: Any attempt to draw attention to yourself is fruitless.
161b6bf6-77d3-4b36-ae72-5ad2587b3241: Around the fire, you see many cryptic markings scrawled in soot, as well as a few neatly arranged power packs.
847eaed3-8c11-46e8-b5b5-41e5ca62c66b: {n}The noblewoman's smooth, melodious voice sounds familiar. It is the same voice that you heard on the vox-station of the dead Sister of Battle you discovered outside. The von Valancius heir is playing both sides, communicating with the Inquisition under the call sign "Elana."{/n}
89bddf13-dc2e-4861-b917-9ad355127539: "What happened here? Why has promethium extraction stopped?"
ecc408be-1406-448d-a5ef-4db7b966c045: "Your vector indicates a request for contact."
65ed47ab-9c2f-4f74-ab98-c0a140dfcabc: {n}Your intentions to inflict no damage on the Warrant of Trade are not panning out. However, given its size, it is unlikely that anyone will notice a few small holes, right...?{/n}
c9fb5e57-bdd6-46b4-a1d9-a8d8e8907f92:
The user's attacks gain bonuses based on the type of weapon used:
-<indent=5%>Attacks with melta and plasma weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with bolter and solid-projectile weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} chance.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with las and flamer weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with chain and primitive weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}parry reduction{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with force and power weapons gain +{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}{g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}deflection negation{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with exotic weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% chance to inflict a random common {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.</indent>
f35d9022-948e-4a4b-a139-4320e1ab06cc: "Just to confirm: you aren't going to dunk yourself in the bath and begin your cleaning protocols, are you?"
442583d6-d54f-48dc-bec3-423828dc3d68: "I suppose you are rather proud of such crude and flimsy reasoning. A lamentable sight to behold."
194f7b13-0623-47c5-92cf-55ad07cffc05: "That's the beauty of it — I don't know!" {n}Eogunn says this delightedly, as if not knowing something is an intriguing novelty for him.{/n} "Ahem, allow me to specify. It includes objects of mostly regular forms — cubes, spheres, cylinders — made of unknown black stone or metal. Many are covered in glyphs or patterns that cannot be deciphered. Fascinating trinkets that I have spent years studying, but have never progressed beyond flimsy theories that cannot be confirmed experimentally."
317a6c2d-7dfd-4c97-882f-00d75c5ab9db: "Why are the servants of the Golden Throne laying siege to Dargonus?"
a8c0a90d-9829-4e3d-89fe-2fa4add0df4c: {n}Eogunn bends his entire body in a deep bow.{/n} "I understand, and I thank you for your merciful judgement, Rogue Trader. I will treasure the time we spent together on the path of Knowledge. Perhaps someday this experience will help me find a solution, and I will be able to tell Nuncius about you."
7ae8f977-d707-411b-919e-bdfa0bf7c5c6: {n}The projection disappears, not even giving you a chance to reply to the xenos that just robbed you.{/n}
e3b580e4-5b36-4240-8d96-e62a1a001e6a: "The Yoke... Such a primitive name. And yet what has been said of it piques my curiosity. A secret weapon based on forbidden knowledge and forged by the joint efforts of dozens or even hundreds of people left in ignorance..." {n}Trazyn hums contentedly.{/n} "You should find this thing — I'd like to take a closer look at it."
780c71d6-cba1-4207-9349-23ff9e0267d1: "Please listen to me, Magos. I know of what I speak."
8258e4ef-7aaf-4d0f-8bd1-89b677b7a0f0: A clandestine vox-transmitter has been discovered. Its cunning workmanship indicates the high station of its owner.
f28b38d9-f162-4368-8a0e-a0576a85d5ec: "The Throne of Terra, blazing in His light, turning aside every evil..." {n}A quiet chant emanates from off to your side. Turning your gaze from the patient, you see Sister Argenta, having made the sign of the Aquila, raising a prayer to the God-Emperor. Her melodic voice is soothing and instils confidence.{/n}
65d8f763-e358-46bd-8c5d-e28ef1f79963: {n}Eogunn casts a wary glance toward the laboratory beyond the chasm and nods.{/n}
a26ae034-83e7-4138-b935-029fc18f023b: "Since you brought it up, Sergeant, the Handbook does not obligate me to report my actions to you. And as your direct superior, I did not give you leave to join {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s operation."
26caf1df-1018-43a2-9199-01a405cc4328: Seberian von Valancius was never again seen in the Expanse. His name, however, was raised several more times by the dissatisfied noble houses on Dargonus, who were conspiring to oust the Lord Captain under the pretence of "finding the lost sire." But when the last of those schemers died off, Seberian's return became nothing more than a strange tale once more, the kind that flagship officers would tell each other in their rare moments of leisure.
bb9ddac8-33ed-4e38-b0dd-2ef332cfbbb8: "Your experiment is an abomination of human suffering. I demand that it be stopped."
d7bab5f8-7531-4356-aca9-e1fc1e6fbd62: "You have upheld your end of the bargain. I will now withdraw to attend to my new exhibit. When the appointed hour comes, I will fulfil my promise to you."
2bba57af-534b-4918-a0ce-318103dcd61b: "Lord Captain, a procession of the ship's workers is holding a gratitude march on the decks, pleading to be allowed on the bridge. As I understand, this relates to your decrees regarding {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}. What are your orders?"
0c32a88e-81c1-4d87-b181-e96386680519: {g|f:95c75fde7c314366b771bcd0b116feee}Manipulator Push{/g} now damages and {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushes{/g} away additional enemies adjacent both to Pasqal and to his target.
7cb3c37b-afa2-4521-aebf-dc37b4f4add5: "Shereen, you know I've never been afraid of a fight. But even the thought of us having to go into that thing's lair gives me a bad feeling... Wouldn't it be simpler to just hit it with a targeted salvo from orbit?"
7ef146e9-1bab-42da-a059-0297a2a6dd8e: An electrical manipulator designed for burning sacred microcircuits and destroying mortal flesh.
a3aaf534-e5c0-4d1d-b3e7-49717006c687: "True devotion is revealed not in a servant's life, but in their death. So teach the Tenets of the Web." {n}With a discreet motion, Kibellah touches the bloodstain on the wounded man's head and draws a crimson sign upon the metal of the cot.{/n}
a0ec4857-742d-40a6-8680-2c47a31b1401: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} had long waited for this chance — to finally avenge those who died in the Cage in the first attack of the clawed xenos. Filled with a thirst for vengeance, equipped with weapons and armour provided by the von Valancius dynasty, they unleashed all of His wrath upon the enemy. Truly, they became a living reminder of why the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} is known as the hammer of the Emperor.{/n}
ebf37160-925e-4de6-9abb-b0f9e72ac2f5: {n}Izdrig's face darkens. You feel, rather than hear, his low growl through your whole body.{/n} "I will speak with Jocasta Sauerback about joint drills. We'll show them the meaning of fear and weakness."
