b5d53333-fbb4-4a6d-96f9-43fdd44c06ae: "What will you do with the artefact?"
10656e12-68c2-475b-9db4-718a6af3e2f5: "Yes. Outside the loop, you are dead, and have been for a bloody long time. I've seen your remains."
78f9df64-a7bd-473d-b87d-b2c031c6928f: Permitted the governor of Zarkov to make knives out of the corpses of the iron xenos.
49299fca-37c4-48db-84e6-4ec00807ba45: [Address the patient] "Your mother is here, Gnotec, and she is very worried about you. Hold on for her."
91dc0d89-a5cf-4f8e-8598-36e3347e353c: [Speak the code phrase] "The wax is still warm, Seneschal."
1289dd1b-f9db-4930-86ed-c2f493116af7: "Very well, I will help you. But what role am I to play in this experiment?"
f9ba9ce3-30a4-4dbd-ae53-7f78effd087e: "Aeldari, your life among members of another species is a phenomenon that demands study. I wish to perform a cursory scan of your body to see how the effects of warp translation are affecting your flesh."
2604f607-b224-4063-b7a7-7a00452ef016: {n}Vedka gazes into the sky with a smile, her features illuminated by an inner radiance.{/n} "Here is my atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It... it was an honour to fight by your side. Vedka Dunawski stands relieved of her post..." {n}A hand tipped with bone-claws rises to salute you, but death claims Vedka faster.{/n}
0293dbd0-4d60-4cee-899e-2f3f6fd79415: "I see no point in negotiating. It is too late for that."
fcd1ddd4-e17c-47f0-a3cb-d09b8d6fbdf2: {n}The Merovians are well trained to survive in a hostile environment. With outside aid, they had the resources they needed to do so. Their settlements and outposts became fortified areas, and losses were kept to a minimum.{/n}
7eb35063-24c9-4a3c-847d-5ab6f0a36c63: "You might make a proper soldier yet. So long as you breathe steadier."
d7e5591b-e3be-48ef-9a48-6ca3a8547670: [Call Laria by vox] "I have found someone for you to arrest."
a97c9b13-f169-4f50-95fe-51e5539b96e1: "Hardly. But it is what was on my mind when you approached, and I thought it an interesting topic for discussion."
398e8909-ee54-4656-bda9-64f42993982d: Seberian von Valancius's ship vanished without a trace in the void beyond the bounds of the protectorate. For some time after, the flagship received Astropathic messages with reports of Seberian's encounters with ominous wonders and inconceivable horrors, but after a few years they stopped as well. In the final dispatch, the resurrected ancestor of House von Valancius promised to deliver a farewell gift to the dynasty, but his ship never again crossed the borders of space known to Humanity.
71067615-eb13-4302-9844-6081a45df84e: "Experiment somewhere else. I shall make do without you."
1d0f30a4-6287-4922-875b-4ab0f354a451:
The target suffers −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}, and −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. Stacks up to 6 times.
If the character has {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Heretical{/g} — Adherent or above, they are not affected.
8081954a-d717-4f83-a8fd-947a4cbeb95a: "What is your impression of Kiava Gamma?"
d488d0f2-7466-4ef1-8389-11067601d83f: {n}From an alembic, Eogunn pours a green, oily liquid carrying an acrid chemical odour into a goblet and proffers it to you.{/n}
71ad887d-f0c3-4c82-adf7-517b1f99bc53: "Lord Captain, urgent vox-transmission from the Sector Bionica."
2f663a2a-48ef-4432-a7a9-a1c0952a0486: "Where did you come from? Get out of my head!"
104b8ae3-2b30-45de-b2b4-75e690627e24:
Psykers are dangerous not only to their enemies, but to everyone around them (including themselves).
When using {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPowers}psychic powers{/g}, the psyker and their allies can be subjected to {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}psychic phenomena{/g} that reduce the level of the party's {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g}.
Each use of psychic powers thins the veil between realspace and the warp, increasing {g|Encyclopedia:VeilThickness}veil degradation{/g}. When its value reaches 15, each subsequent use of psychic powers has the possibility of triggering {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}, a random and dangerous event with unpredictable consequences.
543bb074-a9b4-4cb8-8a9d-68a7a46c3715: "I see. I will head there with my retinue."
c4d66a07-4207-4766-9843-8a22aa3d9f2a:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, 1 Tactical Simulacrum appears in the cell where they started their turn and remains for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. For every 10 points of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, +1 more Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.
9b437edb-1ebe-4477-af65-49e2561b0b12: "I don't know. But he was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."
357c64d8-5d92-4e44-ab66-099b770951c9: "Indeed. After processing all the data, including your invaluable contribution to the outcome of the experiment, my dear colleague and I engaged in a lengthy debate. My cognitive block has been resolved at last."
c82c22de-a26a-40f8-962f-83fdb4ff860c: "Found out about that too, did you? No point in hiding it — I did indeed have an artefact in my possession, a blade of incredible power. Laria insisted that I place the artefact under guard and not agitate the soldiers. I confess I felt more at ease with it in my belt, but the Seneschal's argument was more sensible."
072078f8-e1b0-47bb-b960-534946f60573: Seberian's retinue is too frightened of the Crimson Dance of Khaine to go against him.
04f5c38a-95a3-45d7-842c-1687acf1d4dd: "I... I cannot believe it. The Rogue Trader's Warrant stolen right out of the Lord Captain's vault. On my watch."
073a6c2d-69b1-48b4-8222-f3e73cc8441c: {n}You tear the servo-skull out of the cadaver. Its visor flickers, signalling a change in escort protocols.{/n}
82d93a39-8ee3-4844-8076-888a1d5690e7: "Mon-keigh attach so much importance to things they themselves have endowed with significance... and now the disappearance of such an object chills your hearts with mortal terror."
7785c2fb-2f61-49d5-a623-25ab6370008e: "Thank you. I will do what is right."
fc2c964f-e278-479b-88c5-104f0bec82c6: "Greetings. Have you come for fault correction?"
95832fd3-1831-47a0-bbe4-4fbb0e012e3c: [Cease your examination and return to the conversation]
9dbcc559-fb0e-477d-a0bb-789221c4a141: "If you want to live, join my side!"
7e3f67f1-e42c-4a9a-84c9-8aff72e10676: "The xenos is just... obligingly sending us home?" {n}Disbelief rings in Heinrix's voice.{/n}
11faf0d6-6dcb-4aee-8166-cbc0893527f5: You have obtained an augment. They cannot be equipped like weapons or gears. To insert it into the body, you need to use an Implantation Throne in Sector Bionica.
c3baa999-e8b7-455a-ad66-f99c7cb3c0a9: {g|Encyclopedia:MaxHitChance}Maximum hit chance{/g} for attacks with weapons in this hand is reduced by −10%.
eafbd95d-d763-4bd4-881f-a5708d6598fa: The user inflicts +1 stack of {g|f:678380188cb646a68a153703638c9f55}penance brand{/g} to all creatures within a 3-cell radius.
0ba67811-f53c-4bbc-b9c8-19236cb4b184: {n}Trazyn the Infinite is absorbed in complex manipulations of a mysterious cubic device held in his hands. With each movement of his metallic fingers, the cogitators around you whine ever louder, as if their machine spirits are suffering great torment.{/n}
feb36dcf-4ed4-4ba7-bac4-afbacb851dc3: "I found a ring with the Gaprak coat of arms."
363fb976-b937-4d1b-be49-3f4da1b0f078: {n}The High Factotum, who has been silently observing the altercation from the sidelines, looks anxiously from you to Seberian's retreating back, then bows hurriedly and departs.{/n}
4b2de11e-b892-490e-ae19-54003e3116ba: "My colleague and I can confirm: the autopsied cadaver is a genetic abomination of the highest order. Hardly a coincidence, Rogue Trader. The results of the samples I have taken show unequivocally that the exterior of the cadaver is but mimicry of the human form, while its flesh is the epitome of alien vileness."
7a22a337-e617-4b26-a650-0d2a3bd797ea: "The neural implant I had installed has not yet fully synchronised with my memory. I must cease to speak on personal matters so as not to mislead you."
dd61f873-3bcb-4e46-95c8-be1dcb49ca0f: "Negative, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The order came from the colonel, and you are not, as of yet, our commander."
a46b99d9-ead2-48bf-927e-7b27dd343da5: This creature gains a {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} equal to its {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Heretical{/g} rank.
d3ac20cb-f1df-4fd8-97da-c21ec7507c2f: "Such talk of deviation from canons and mysterious components sounds suspiciously akin to heresy."
227eb462-13c5-4ef4-9cf8-7cd5d2c6b498: "First, you dare to call yourself a Gaprak, and now you don the mask of righteousness? No matter how many you put on, He sees through you."
af8e5a95-2de0-4d59-be9d-a6afc1ba4de7: {n}Eogunn thinks to himself for a moment.{/n} "So I will speak heresy, yet find my atonement in the irrationality it provokes in the enemy. That is... acceptable."
260c53df-e2ec-46b1-9999-7425ca2a7531: "Take these upstarts out of here and have them flogged. That will teach them that, on this ship, the only person with preferential privileges is me."
afdaad6f-e82b-4645-bc24-1561458cd265: {n}Nuncius stares silently at the Vizsier through his empty eye sockets, his gaze echoed by the hundreds of skulls adorning the temple.{/n}
625eeec4-8864-4421-b19f-5fa62f5d0e8f: "Where did Decabalus obtain the xenos device?"
070aeb9a-b1ae-46a8-93b5-9fa602202ee8: "This vault of rarities belongs to Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories, Archeovist of the Solemnace Galleries. A multitude of historical artefacts that have been deemed worthy of the Overlord's attention are gathered here at his will. The hall you see now contains remarkable artefacts from the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g}."
7b4dc180-c4a2-4dd9-ab68-1828264c8137: {n}Suddenly, the Manipulus's voice drops several octaves,, vibrating with an ominous thrum.{/n} "Omnissiah, sole in truths, may Thy Motive Force crush evil, and may it root out the source thereof..." {n}Coils built into Eogunn's heavily augmented core drone in time with the prayer.{/n}
ca1d0841-b82c-4fec-bdda-bb1a4a754f2c: "Atonement for the one is a complicated thing. I do what needs to be done. And I have no complaints about Vedka. Before your arrival, all this was just an excuse to babble. Besides, Izdrig's my uncle. He raised me after my parents died. Turning on him would be as bad as what the Brother-Generals did."
1194d343-f08b-4667-944f-6ff3564582b5: "I may have been too hasty in my accusation."
214cf885-8bae-4d12-99ed-3c8a09a947ea: "You are suspiciously silent, esteemed colleague. Do not tell me that my victory in our latest debate has sapped your desire to continue our highly stimulating dialogues?"
cd4c46a5-94fd-48cf-94ed-9935c5032f33: "Thank you for your help — and understanding. May the all-knowing Omnissiah guide your mind."
e8f2079b-19dd-469a-9e98-0e17b2f53ccc: "Greetings, Lord Captain. Have you come for fault correction?" {n}Without his usual mechadendrites, the Genetor's hunched form looks strangely gaunt.{/n}
b78b47b1-c833-47cf-bed4-3723f44888bb: "The fact that you are alive and inside the loop, Magos, is its own strange detail in this anomaly. Do you remember how you ended up here?"
1e939636-7039-4531-95bd-fd39e21baba6: "As the flagship's Chief Enginseer, I veto any procedures of sacred augmentation involving substances of xenotic origin."
d15c0dc7-48d8-4c6b-b29d-39f3b8d93770: "Humility is a virtue before the God-Emperor. Are you certain there is no heresy buried within your desire to elevate yourself?"
ab572fe7-2600-4630-98c4-98ec669e8326: {n}Judging by the marks on the soldier's uniform, he has survived an encounter with the metal xenos. Who is to say which he found more terrifying: the sight of their iron claws, or the prospect of being an obstacle in your path?{/n}
9eca7787-2070-4640-a8cf-ff2cad6da389: {n}The pathologically emaciated build and spindly, almost transparent limbs indicate that this is a voidborn. A glance into the open ribcage reveals signs of damage — the sac around the heart is torn and the vessels have been reinforced with metal staples. The poor youth's heart is half {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augment{/g} — both ventricles have been replaced by pumps, which are connected to opaque tubes that run to the medicae device's reservoir. The young man's neck is tattooed with his bay code and job title. It seems he is a common worker from the lower decks.{/n}
099732b1-3d4c-485d-93e4-a50de3023b42: {g|f:7b1ab2c9456a44febdc41b71f14d8df5}Voidship Ram{/g} increases the damage dealt by macro-cannons by +15% for 3 turns.
0b35af73-7432-4a1f-b521-8c2a5a36121f: "The spirit of this machine is in grievous anguish. Proposing a renewed attempt to appeal to it. Method: recitation of a Litany of Invocation."
5cc2acc7-be0a-44a4-8755-40062545724f: "You're taking way too long to aim! The Drover won't wait."
940c3c59-b5b5-4ff8-8ce9-9d5de87b521c: "Do you think this artefact is enough to strengthen the position of the von Valancius dynasty?"
d0927e82-f97e-40b1-91dc-c5c9b71109fa: "I believe, Rogue Trader, that in this case we can base our actions on empirical data alone. And also on an intuitive understanding of logical principles, which the laity call 'gut instinct.' This exemplar of xenomachinery is too large and complex to be comprehended in a moment."
2b388254-689e-4e0e-8859-780c68702c1f: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Seberian reaches for his vox and commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."
734f18d4-3774-473e-a8ea-adc89c0b0012: Also known as "Constructors," Artisans are members of the Cult Mechanicus dedicated to designing machines and equipment for a wide variety of purposes. Most Artisans take an orthodox approach to their craft, using tried and tested components in approved configurations. The work of renowned Artisan craftsmen is highly prized by commanders in the Imperium, and Astra Militarum leaders are always eager to enlist them in organising military operations throughout the Imperium.
141cd73d-7398-4d42-83b7-1034c094b9b9: The familiar's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} are increased by +{uip|WoundsBonusMaster|45a8fc6ef837483a98fabc8d954b5682}.
01cdc673-b059-46fe-ae5d-3d8cc5178fe3: {n}Sparks surge around Eogunn.{/n} "Perhaps it was my pride that decided the outcome, but you are the source of this evil, foul xenos. You, and your entire kind. And you will share the blame with me, whether you wish it or not."
37b8361a-5370-407d-9959-08a0f509e0d1: Prove to the Seneschal that the time loop is real.
85aaa4cc-2191-45e2-88c7-1fbc3c964216: {n}Juvenna falls gracefully to her knees, careful not to make any unnecessary movements. Her voice rises to a ringing cry:{/n} "Everything I do is for the sake of the von Valancius dynasty!"
8f30ffb3-bd3a-47be-b7f2-7a79ee5d7f81: {n}The woman's face contorts into a crazed smile.{/n} "Spare me? No, people like me don't need mercy. That's not what I'm here for."
def629e8-8256-40d6-9d0a-f695e4b48458: The central generator lies deep within the research camp. You must find it so Eogunn can perform the necessary rites to awaken it.
721289fb-1abb-47ac-93fb-a7b84d48cac5: "Oooh, what a treasure trove! I thought the last room was full of fascinating things, but the splendour here defies description entirely! Shereen, we must explore every nook and cranny of this place immediately."
463c662c-44f7-4cd6-a385-708df58a779f: "Not quite. I humbly ask that you hear my petition."
b070ceaf-9c29-41db-a7d6-ceb25d8f51c5: You feel you have seen these symbols before. You have definitely encountered these images in the Sector Bionica.
98f7cc38-3925-4556-a8e3-8cb4acba23b1: "I wish to learn more about Zarkov."
c5766564-4135-4587-860b-a273e20d1d40: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain," {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Straightening up, he fixes his robe and bows deeply to you.{/n} "You are a blessing of the God-Emperor descended to us mere mortals. I would thank you more, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."
9f372b1e-345a-492a-8ad5-a6540fcb0e4b: "Analysis..." {n}Ferrenz pauses briefly.{/n} "Insufficient data. A high influx of the Motive Force to the Sector Bionica's implantation throne has been detected. Violations of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation have been recorded, along with restricted access for other Tech-Priests. However, the rank of the life-form designated 'Eogunn Februs' is too high to be impeded without intervention from the life-form designated 'Lord Captain.'"
92dfffcd-aaed-4ec3-9f2d-19ad416e4477: At the start of his turn, Eogunn gains +1 AP if he has at least {uip|EnergySpent|e2892494765548f984b6173cb7f1b340} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
2c95ad41-2ccb-4e4d-a715-8d79fed63f35: "Follow me, and you will see for yourself."
edbcbc6a-d174-4785-9f51-f87eb1a3d29e: "Have you forgotten the meaning of discipline?" {n}The Arbitrator's voice is deceptively calm, but his tense jaw betrays his irritation.{/n} "Rogue Trader, these people are wasting their time arguing. Bring them to order, or let me." {n}Glaito lets out a soft affirmative growl, almost blending in with his master's words.{/n}
b33209a0-8215-4354-9421-56e43dde2b08: "Enough. According to data-protocol Calixis-Sigma UX 11-4, this Mu-class planet, type 'feudal,' {g|Encyclopedia:AestimareGlossary}Aestimare rating{/g} E874, with an assigned {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGradeGlossary}tithe grade of Solutio Extremis{/g}, has not provided its due tithe amount in full. You have violated the Lex and are hereby under investigation. You are to present all related customs reports and shipping manifests. Immediately." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:ProctorGlossary}Proctor{/g}'s voice carries no emotion, and Glaito silently bares his teeth, completing the image of the implacable hand of justice that has arrived on Thassera.{/n}
af03c3ea-cf19-4ced-99db-9a7400f8e16b: "Hunting is sacred to these parts. I will perform this ritual with reverence to honour His design."
7c03c075-cb93-4ff2-a3de-fe3e5421f3f8: To ignite the zeal of the subjects and reinforce their devotion, the Rogue Trader will allocate funds for the erection of shrines where the Zarkovians may pray to the ancient augments bestowed upon them during the First Call-Up. Tech-Priests invited from the Explorator Fleet shall maintain the sacred iron and recite litanies of metal fortification over it.
f27d542d-d322-4473-b8d0-bd6ab7090507: "Three minds cannot coexist in one body. Setting aside the fact that even I would not be capable of achieving such a feat in practice, in theory it would certainly lead to the complete deconstruction of all three minds. Some... less flexible thinkers might even consider it heresy."
4f3a1b29-ce82-4edf-9d50-f2ee3c51b6ea: "The majority of laypersons who have lost limbs or organs are at best furnished with the most rudimentary prosthetics, if any at all. The exceptions are those who hold key posts in the Imperium or who cannot perform their duties without replacing their organics with more efficient equivalents."
95d77d4f-a554-4dc2-930f-05bee194087a: "An inadequate description denies a full understanding of the proposed action, and consequently... leaves too wide a margin for ambiguous readings to our disadvantage. I recommend obtaining a data-crypt with a copy of Protocol 39-42 for subsequent investigation, {name}, while refraining from immediate execution."
f5e0a851-d625-4b29-b1f1-8065851b0c67: "You're joking, are you? Right you are. The lads say my sense of humour was shot off by a lasgun when I was a kid — I only laugh when it's a direct order." {n}Zarkov smiles, but his broken jaw makes it look more like a snarl.{/n}
0119d5ca-3251-4384-9940-da4fcbdb4544:
Whenever attacked, the Inquisitor orders a member of his retinue to attack the offender.
The same happens whenever a character uses psychic or Navigator powers.
70d233eb-2ef9-4001-beef-9800401b1c1e: The Zarkovian soldiers faced the enemy with grim and stoic determination, not even a muscle twitching on their faces. A barrage of shots rained down on the oncoming xenos swarm, but the squad's firepower was not enough. Finding no resistance worthy of the name, the Necrons charged silently forward, eliminating the defenders with merciless efficiency.
5449bb4a-fc20-496a-99ac-43f09e607f09: {n}Calming down a little, Juvenna nods approvingly at you.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. Your contribution to what has been accomplished is {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}truly invaluable{/d}, and it will not go unnoticed... I am sorry, Father, that you could not resist this temptation, but, the God-Emperor knows, I tried to lead you back to the path of righteousness." {n}Without waiting for a response, she heads for the door, and turns back to you just as she is about to exit.{/n} "One last request, {name}. Keep this heretic in your sights until I return with Inquisitor af Irramon."
5794d297-6bfe-42ef-a194-24949479f585: {name} von Valancius, after entering the portal opened by the duplicitous Trazyn the Infinite, found {mf|himself|herself} on {mf|his|her} own voidship — but not at the end of {mf|his|her} glorious story, but at its very beginning. However, the xenos's technological sorcery prevented the Lord Captain from realising the full extent of the catastrophe of {mf|his|her} situation — instead, {name} continued to fulfil the role assigned to {mf|him|her}, performing in a play inside a temporal-spatial capsule intended only for an audience of one...
0a112110-6ec4-476b-82e6-1074d5c14132: "Eogunn, I am certain that together you and Oksilda will uncover Zarkov's genetic secrets."
e0af9779-8807-42fd-88aa-a7c0ec0ad4b0: "I have only ever come into contact with one other Tech-Priest of such rank. A servant of the Omnissiah with the same title was involved in the creation of Glaito."
64b54050-d8e9-4c75-b93f-c32f7ba244ef: "Yes, dearest colleague, you are certainly correct in asserting that death is the natural and inevitable cessation of life processes." {n}The Genetor presses his lips together.{/n} "But is that not why the Omnissiah granted us the gift of reason and the ability to comprehend existence, so that we humans would submit to the natural way of things? You accept death as a fact, but I believe such fatalism is incomprehensible to a servant of the Omnissiah — do not machines strive for eternity in His image and likeness?"
dbc273c6-ee34-4560-8e7b-5a8f9192b3cb: "If you care to see it for yourself, you will find it beside the cages with the decapitated specimens. I have repurposed that skeletal eyesore for communication."
d36db2b5-d528-48fb-bd27-b077cd7eca62: {n}Some of your companions have a mixture of contempt, rage, and unadulterated pleasure on their faces. To besmirch a relic touched by the Master of Mankind is, for some, an act of pure hatred.{/n}
f449c15d-86e2-499d-b197-8682c972bb62: {n}Over his shoulder, Eogunn tosses the words:{/n} "No, Nuncius, I was not trying to hide anything from the Rogue Trader. I only reasoned that the squabbles of Tech-Priests would scarcely be of interest to {mf|him|her}."
52fd1a5e-8648-40cd-badc-e8d8a48345fb: Vedka Dunawski looks to be at peace. Her eyes are shut and her hands are folded serenely over her chest.
608c08e5-e50d-4948-b4b7-aa07b7620838: "Fascinating. I have never seen such operations performed on oneself before."
1efb6bee-07d0-41b6-b0f4-44922e5ea7fd: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, soon discovered that the bay's junior medicae officers had succumbed to the heresy of xenotech. The Vivisector's authority was ended by means of a quiet and swift poisoning, rumoured to have been perpetrated by his partner, Genetor Ferrenz.
7c49edd5-aaa0-4aec-9128-dde05b6e3977: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, and reciting binharic litanies filled with righteous anger until their last moments. Their deaths granted us the precious seconds we needed to reach the soaring platforms.
3cf27064-9e04-4930-8f64-8e3e0e28c8cd: The user deals 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cells. Then, they are pulled to that enemy. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.
30b373a1-743e-46ca-8b00-78c3a1e253b9: Uralon gains a deflection bonus equal to the total Heretical ranks of his retinue.
83d15f8c-1a33-4745-990c-59d6e06a998f: "A convenient landmark for me. For your own sake, you would do your best to understand what I am speaking of after you depart through the gate."
a2d5bdcb-b082-4854-b722-07b4d9beef9b: "Do you mean the way that they seem to be trying to live in harmony with their natural surroundings? Well. That is genuinely amusing. And pitiful."
888de9d1-51bc-47e0-b28e-55d4ab16282a: "I insist upon rejection of the request. Augmentation is a sacred gift of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} that requires careful monitoring and maintenance. The Sector Bionica's resources are finite and, as such, our focus must be on servicing the key life forms among the crew. Violating the established directive and wastefully distributing the gift of augmentations among the unworthy would be an outrage to the Omnissiah and barely tolerated by the Tech-Priests aboard this vessel."
a284e28e-3c22-4bfd-b2ac-60a1f89e68ca: The drill complex looks clean and well maintained despite the rain, wind, and corrosion covering everything around it.
fd77c2dc-96a8-481d-a7d2-62adff989fd2: "I am a Rogue Trader, and it is you unholy fiends who will show me reverence. I will take whatever I please from this place."
27363ad6-9db6-450b-9899-75003f3d58f8: "The Necron Overlord is on your side? Impressive. Alas, it will not change the outcome of the battle."
9934655d-850b-4b0e-b573-884e6e991cc9: "It's hardly surprising, Ferrenz. You're trying to cut off the poor man's legs."
d8e0b752-6dd7-47ed-9f5f-5f92de2a62f9: "Only from the stories of the old Call-Ups. People there are nothing but property. And minor mistakes are grounds for imprisonment. Our regiment was once formed from such unfortunate souls. In short, it's a cursed place abandoned by the God-Emperor."
5e1ce22f-b0ab-4c23-a82e-afc4f7159c03: "The Colonel-Governor has sent several possible strategies. Mobile units with psykers that are constantly on the move and thus draw the Drovers away from settlements. Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."
6237308f-d2fd-402d-830b-9d59a9eb85eb: [Execute him] "I sentence you to death for heresy."
3df0977b-80db-453c-b4cc-61595445b395: "If the end is always the same, then all we can study are the trajectories of movement toward it. I would determine the vectors of movement of each of the participants, and in the quest for truth, I would not reject a single tactical manoeuvre, even if it required stepping into the line of fire or following the course chosen by the enemy."
b9cc2b83-5929-46c9-ac13-1cf3db6803b1: {n}With a roar of fury, Ulfar's giant body rears up, and then he brings both fists down upon the panel, leaving dents that quickly begin to repair themselves. He raises his head, his chest heaving.{/n} "Every one of the iron miscreants will pay a wergeld in blood!"
c1f23fec-c54e-4321-8242-248fcc33ab2b: Another platform with frozen silhouettes is visible on the other side of the chasm, but it is impossible to reach it.
806d6ee7-0501-47de-bc6f-4df04828437a: The remains of the great hero of the Imperium, sealed in an ornate casket.
da8aa647-ba66-443d-bb17-2cbea3002f95: [Address your retinue] "Does anyone feel anything odd? As if something is pressing on your mind."
049fadde-8225-41ff-bdd3-a77bb8b9aaf5: "I aided you simply because I do not forgive deceivers."
8e63ff6a-374a-48f3-8b0b-04acc9eec35a: "You are in no need of instruction from me, {name}. I've been observing you, and I have to admit that I have nothing to teach you. You have made mistakes — but so did I. What matters more is that you meet your foes' challenges and are firm in your decisions. My presence at your side would only stir up those who wish you ill, thus weakening the dynasty — and that's not what I want for the protectorate."
ace98e14-6e48-493c-acd4-a6ca5d6f9a12: {n}The reconnaissance squad soon reports that they have located the crashed shuttle with a barely recognisable Astra Militarum insignia on the hull.{/n}
e94a2d59-b510-4beb-adab-79b5acb9871c: "Bad news, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll call for the red robes, but they're busy as can be. If you find something to switch off, maybe we'll get enough power to start the lift."
a5c08403-2f23-4f99-b07b-d1eab96501f8: "Tau-Phi-0098 once began his journey as a specialist assigned to the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. I suppose that is what left its mark on him. Since then, all of his research has focused on combatting nature and the creatures of various planets and biomes. He is seeking to expand Humanity's habitable space, so his work is practical in nature."
1a4efcc5-94a9-4f11-ba56-0757b521b100: Each subsequent {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} scored by the cyber-mastiff against the {g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}apprehended{/g} enemy deals +{uip|Damage|c406fc4338014f25bf5cbc7234685e5e} more damage. Stacks. Stacks reset when {g|f:078bea05041540fa87a53b93d639f243}Apprehend!{/g} is used again.
95020426-e00b-4160-b44c-3b9590f3d1a4: {n}The Tech-Priest alters the pitch of his hovering torso in an attempt to mimic a bow.{/n} "Rogue Trader, your halls are filled with sacred metal and the ship's Tech-Priests must be commended in observing the sacraments of augmentation, that blessed union of flesh and Ferrum Sanctum. Beholding this charges my galvanic coils with exaltation. I, {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis Eogunn Februs, greet you and thank you for the opportunity to grace these ancient mechanisms with the gift of operation."
d74c4e19-22f5-406c-adc1-73d987375d2f: "The Lord Captain...? I serrrve the dynasty!" {n}With an unpleasant clang, the man slams his augmented hand into his chest implant in a military salute. He freezes, like a stalled machine man — then an agonising shudder runs through his entire body, and blood trickles from the corner of his mouth.{/n} "Is this a p-p-punishment? Am I not permitted to... to die? I will not fear! Eiderdown and shroud..."
8f5fecb6-94e3-4eca-b659-1b460a44574b: [Hold your weapon at the ready] "Fall to your knees and beg for mercy, xenos!"
98e0cc27-49da-46e7-bd35-9a8981e61c09: {n}You hear Laria grinding her teeth.{/n} "This is bad. Very bad. Thank you for the information. I hope your source is reliable."
0ffcbf11-ee54-41c2-be6a-95820fe08844: "It's simple. I'm one of the most experienced fighters and I'm familiar with the Drover's tricks. And I'm willing to risk my neck to save the Cage. Atonement for the one."
df856f5d-bf78-4ff2-b162-39d3e07aea24: [Address your companions] "Do you have any insights to offer?"
8947af2e-c1a8-4ab6-96cd-64e28a3cf452: "To exterminate the enemies of Humanity. Xenos, mutant, and heretic must fall — only then will the Imperium rise."
83720035-d7dd-4f12-afcc-6521d84e2b36: Squad members fell to their knees, unable to withstand the power unleashed upon them. The rumble became a drone — a noise that seemed to penetrate the deepest recesses of the mind, reducing anyone who heard it into a panicked animal. A wave of dread in the face of certain and most horrifying death washed over every one of us. An eternity seemed to pass before I heard...
54fde668-f22b-4eac-ae3e-6ef0b4d74af1: "Where did you even find this old man?"
e078676a-ba13-4693-995c-ddedee6044ee: "It is my sacred duty to stand vigil to ensure the faithful operation of the technology I restored. Beyond that, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is an enclosed community. Many wisdoms can be found within its walls, but I seem to have exhausted their supply. Theory lays the foundation for exploration, but only practice can open the gates of knowledge. Nuncius and I have always been practitioners first and foremost.
e16f160e-1462-4039-ba5a-6af041194660: "I see. At any rate, that means that my entire line won't perish today."
731b4f3b-6642-4a05-b657-6e89bc6366a3: {n}A triumphant binharic hymn pouring out of the implantation throne's vox-transmitters interrupts the Manipulus's musings, signalling the completion of the procedure. Eogunn's anti-grav generator stirs to life once more, and the Genetor floats smoothly into the air. It appears that the gory experiment he just performed on himself has had no catastrophic consequences. Nuncius rises after him, a silent shadow.{/n}
48a33a25-9d85-4179-9a47-bbc9abd815d1: Recent calamities have subjected the Rogue Trader to the most vicious of ordeals. It must be determined whether they have taken their toll on the scion of an ancient dynasty.
a6eeac54-edf2-438e-b94f-bd0ecf9c68a1: The shackles of corruption forever bound the engineers to the bulkheads of the ship, turning it into a daemon-plagued leviathan trapped in endless torment. The principles by which the vessel's systems operated now eluded the comprehension of any mind.
abfdc99d-c85b-4cbd-9e97-d1e0a14ebbf6: "Interrogator van Calox, share your experience in the creation of isolation zones."
366dfaa2-dad1-4bec-8aec-9b6c50032dda: "I am seeking a Genetor from my retinue, Eogunn Februs."
1555f939-e0d8-44de-a610-e8016bade462: This creature has the {g|f:dc5350ede0bd454394e636035a8ead47}stalking{/g} effect until revealed.
6a7db44c-1835-4a3d-929b-6b505529fef6: {n}Eogunn nods briskly, sparing a look at the lines of data running across the data-slate. The mechadendrites, bristling with needles, begin to rapidly stitch together the wounds on his body.{/n}
ced27bd9-3113-48c9-ba29-7a53c12c95f9:
The user gains the {g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Force Couple (Enemy){/g} and the {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Force Couple(Ally){/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}.
{g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Force Couple (Enemy){/g} allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after the pull.
Using either of those abilities sets both of them on {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g}.
Each of these abilities costs −1AP less.
bd8e8168-9760-4b42-bcea-251f24c84575: "I have heard enough. You have my word, I will keep your secret, Juvenna."
304a036a-358c-4940-b172-6604d2fa3d72: "Trazyn let us go just like that?"
5480d5a4-ab40-41cf-b199-40a95f31a652: "Naturally. This is part of my path on the Quest for Knowledge, just as the creation of Triasomata was, but I have taken a different approach in my current experiment."
7bccc52c-aef9-43f0-bc98-992353f1085d: "...who led Humanity's campaign in the region this race calls the Calixis Sector. These remains of Drusus — unlike those held by others of his kind — are genuine. Had they been in Humanity's possession, they would have been lost after a scant few millennia..."
ecbb067f-6b53-4cc7-99d7-c1095a472a33: The voidship deploys a Necron boarding team that deals <u>(from 20 to 25)</u> damage to the flagship, blocks a random post, and inflicts internal fires, both lasting for 2 rounds.
ef3312f8-02e3-4727-ae81-b11b5366ca0d: This creature is blessed by the machine spirit. The {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recoil{/g} of their weapons is halved, and all their targets suffer −<u>(2 × {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}INT{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g})</u>% to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} against this creature's attacks.
fa8fd9a0-cef7-4f56-8d9d-9024bb7363e6: "Fact three, the last. My research is directed solely toward advancing the Quest for Knowledge and strengthening the Imperium. Though a certain boldness may be inherent to my work, I do observe the dogmas and follow the righteous algorithms of the Cult Mechanicus. Here ends the presentation on my position."
54314dee-0284-4b19-aef3-9f2be5e0a96b: {n}Before Calcazar can do anything, Trazyn clicks his fingers — and the Lord Inquisitor disappears in a blinding flash.{/n} "I will assess the value of this human in a less disruptive setting. Perhaps he will reside in the same display where I will place the day's main acquisition."
69b62ab3-7922-4356-8c56-1c6445febdd6: {n}Laria's eyes widen ever so slightly, yet her voice remains perfectly even.{/n} "Father, these people are part of my agent network. The servants of the Inquisition could not have obtained the code phrase."
819dc371-8297-4efc-9112-26ea2b1d59eb: {n}The spikes and blades adorning the outlandish {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} aircraft glint menacingly in the gloom that suffuses the passage. This abomination of {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} engineering has miraculously escaped the destruction of the barrage.{/n}
e1e23e4e-dd71-4d3d-b712-e494437bedcb: [Hold out Juvenna's order] "It seems Isimond has gone to some lengths to earn himself a noble title."
cf820c71-4007-4831-9c0d-09e9d6e83d79: {n}Seberian's vox-synthesiser emits a chuckling trill.{/n} "Your opinion hardly signifies. I have history on my side — and it will show that I was right."
41bc16be-43c4-42c3-b4d2-f5ada4a381d5: {n}The colonel nods, then gives a familiar predatory grin.{/n} "I swear by the blood that has been spilled, the blood now being spilled, and the blood that I will spill, that my life, soul, and loyalty without reserve belong to you, {name} von Valancius."
ac18db1d-9de9-47ae-9ef7-13e447a5fe85: Once per combat, instead of falling unconscious, {name} falls into black rage, gaining an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} with 5 additional attacks, after which he falls unconscious.
04fcc565-9b1d-4055-bc2d-fc1a29ac7812: For each stack of this effect, all Eogunn's {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are reduced by −7.
d0037ea2-0a10-4b46-be38-c9930037c4c2: This creature's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} are reduced by −15. The {g|Encyclopedia:MaxHitChance}maximum hit chance{/g} of their secondary weapon is reduced by −10%. Can be removed and fully healed on the voidship's bridge.
8dd99402-c7e7-4881-a195-080fbfe10d0f: Gain entry to the secret chamber
8281ee6b-004b-404a-8ce3-13d6f53d6fb6: "I have fulfilled your request and am not moving. Now identify yourself."
8e29c4f5-4d8c-4999-8433-2520a76fdcd9: "As an exception, I will enter this data into my observations profile."
b3836790-5bb4-4750-91be-3ba3818a43f8: "Suspicious in the extreme. But the only thing that stymies us here is that we do not know the time of the Gaprak scion's death. We cannot connect it with Isimond's stint on duty."
134421f2-25fc-4ba3-b0cb-134b50885282: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrites do not stop rooting in his insides even for a moment.{/n}
1df0fe1d-a6ab-4fb5-8d6b-c0c2871289dd: "The triune essence, the amalgam of the best constituent parts of three individuals who have excelled themselves in service. Metaphysically, it consists of three beginnings — mortal flesh, Ferrum Sanctum, and righteousness. By creating the perfect combination, we will achieve a totality that is vastly superior to its components in its qualities and usefulness to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."
0446afe7-7a12-458d-90a8-671c3b731213: "We will make a stop there if it's on our way."
e2eaf3fa-17b8-4ee1-b3eb-a6334e54412d: "Hey, I'm trying to cook here — Oh, it's you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Just keeping quiet now, keeping quiet..."
a0fc3ab9-fdc9-4873-a1a8-8003410f9423: "I seek their counsel and assistance with the equipment in the Sector Bionica."
183ae8c3-a9ec-4164-8e98-517eb60d807a: "I have pondered this a great deal — do death and terror define our existence from the very beginning? Like a kind of fate, a raised blade since our conception, that governs our lives. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, do you fear death?"
92ffc8a9-5272-4562-ad9e-fb3df4a16c3c: "Suppose I believed you. Say what you know." {n}The Seneschal gestures to you with her hand.{/n}
f31560e1-73f7-48a2-a1b5-276236e70487: "Oh?" {n}Seberian straightens his shoulders slightly.{/n} "What do you wish to know?"
5a13e078-df29-4f7a-94ef-fc7848c58132: "Augmetics..." {n}Izdrig snorts, but doesn't elaborate.{/n} "We need the equipment, no doubt about that. Firing a lasgun when you've got a spare battery or two is the closest thing to real joy."
7d455520-dbbc-4bc8-9981-df19f1bf6944: "I am not sure this time and place are well-chosen, Rogue Trader." {n}The Manipulus solemnly shakes his head.{/n} "Are the laity even ready to absorb the teachings of the Biologis in this place and hour? Gaze upon them. Wisdom is attained in contemplation; whereas their minds are consumed by matters of an utterly different sort."
8b89b9e0-c9fd-48fd-b884-1e9dbcbf3281: "Help me defeat the leader of the xenos."
a200f233-8673-4623-b55e-1095440ab423: "Wrong. But if you insist..." {n}The xenos raises his weapon.{/n} "Let us continue."
6f19fa19-6524-4163-a3da-936f13134f64: "I heard that you seek to strengthen the dynasty's position with the help of a valuable artefact?"
101038b9-ede8-400f-823f-d5eeea6a82de: "Petition registered and approved. Anticipating the opportunity to exchange knowledge with the esteemed Magos."
3aceabe1-43fc-4301-851a-ab5a8f75a3d1: "Protocol 12.45 dash 2!" {n}rattles out Alva, and the Ruststalkers subtly change position.{/n} "There is little time for communicating with laypersons, but I will explain."
6c302e0d-facc-4fcd-94a4-065dbc023a82: Juvenna's voice as heir carries special weight. A way must be found to remove her from the board.
73c4ba33-95d6-4f37-8815-668d0db2afcc: "I believe you, Alva-9. Artisan Decabalus seemed suspicious to me as well."
d45355b1-d074-4e5a-ac17-9de7e2b4251d: There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. I refused to risk the safety of my person for the purposes of reconnaissance, and so my scion had to give the order to commoners. With no blessed augmetics to rely on, the servants lost their footing and slipped into the chasm. Nevertheless, the ones that survived managed to discover hidden passages in the walls.
bc5afa83-9081-42f7-84c2-dd36a44a50ee: {n}The guard glances around doubtfully, but still leaves his post for fear of falling into disfavour with his superiors. You remain still for a while longer to see if anyone takes an interest in what you are doing.{/n}
8549b6f8-1b44-4e72-9fec-c3fb156d692f: "The God-Emperor Himself must have been watching over me... Ferrenz personally saw to it that I was brought back to life. Of course, arm implants of the configuration I require have not yet been found, but..." {n}The Vivisector's voice trembles.{/n} "I'm still doing my duty to you and the Imperium. Helping medicae officers with diagnostics, assisting with complex cases."
6ab250d8-70f6-44ba-bc3d-195dd99e22fd: "It sounds utterly mad, Father. But it isn't hard to test that hypothesis either. The wax is still warm, stranger." {n}Her last phrase seems devoid of meaning, but Laria's tone is serious. She catches your eye, waiting for some kind of reaction — but what?{/n}
59bddc64-4743-4bc8-84dd-cc1eff363e1f:
When the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect is removed, the user suffers the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect.
Can only be equipped by the Rogue Trader.
8dddeb28-a322-4874-bbee-1a6ea05da083: "...of the world torn apart by the influence of the Reaper's Eye star in the Processional of the Damned. Its greatest value is that the anomaly that created it is as old as I am."
574b3f1c-d349-482d-bfe1-97257a114587:
Once the combat is over, the wounds of all party members are replenished automatically, but any {g|Encyclopedia:Injury}injuries{/g} they may have sustained remain — those can be healed with a medikit.
Medikits can only be used by characters who have the {g|f:9aefa8d7db3349358e23b2106578353b}Field Medic{/g} feature, {g|f:37363b46061e46218f40e01ed81e9189}Base Skill: Medicae{/g}, or have taken {g|Encyclopedia:SkillMedicae}Medicae{/g} skill advancement at least once. Whenever a character uses a medikit in battle, a {g|Encyclopedia:SkillMedicae}Medicae{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Skills}skill{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g} determines the number of {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} that will be restored as a result.
Abelard can heal your character's injury. Click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on Abelard's portrait, select the medikit on the panel at the bottom left of the screen, then use it on your character. Abelard needs to be standing right next to your character for him to administer the treatment.
c6c2cc26-3826-4c5c-a1ce-001cc57c0956: "Listening to more foolish talk! The God-Emperor is on His Lordship's side."
7ac655b5-b232-457c-b210-90d88a38b3fe: In order to get the Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 to agree to work on improving the implantation throne in the Sector Bionica, the Rogue Trader must help them resolve the matter of the disrupted promethium supply.
f40e7586-ea9f-42e2-8cec-75c5ba314df6: "Easy there, old man, easy. It's not the real palace, it's just a little toy house that someone's tried very hard to make out of illusion and trickery. But there's definitely someone alive inside, I can feel it in my gut."
b0e7e80f-99bb-4968-bb77-2b0d8fe25cbc: {n}The Motive Force sparks through Exalt-117's augmented arm, but fades into the isolate protruding from his metal limb, causing no visible harm to the Tech-Priest. The Magos's shoulders jump in surprise — it seems his security systems are more finely tuned than you realised.{/n}
a930dec0-0c19-425b-9aab-0e91fbf3ca7d: Stopped the knife fight among the Zarkovian troops by reminding them that life must not be wasted.
3d9ea8db-d9f6-4b17-bbf5-c8e0efa7a4da: "You know, sometimes out of the corner of my eye I see a strange mirage that comments acerbically on my actions."
f7d34d5c-2b56-44ec-9a83-8309fc9a8d8c: {n}Trazyn's irascible grumbling sounds in your head a little before the glowing silhouette appears.{/n} "Rudimentary, very rudimentary. This hoard of rotting banality does not even approach one hundredth of the scale of my collection, and yet Humanity cannot even cope with such a paltry little... how to label it... dust heap."
febfcf58-3de0-4701-b719-97546621668f: Treading a fine line between being a horde of howling cultists and being a disciplined army, the Merovians remained the largest armed cult in the Koronus Expanse for some time, before internal strife brought the ill-famed regiment to an end.
f38a2e74-1e72-48f4-8bcc-b843013b6f26:
{n}The path is blocked by a military cordon. You stop at a respectful distance, a reasonable response to the rifle muzzles pointed at your chest by way of welcome. Your gaze slides over the faces: their expressions are so eerily similar, they must have been issued along with the uniforms. Serving in the{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} brings with it insomnia, a stomach for slaughter, and a touch of hopelessness. You can tell who is in charge even before he speaks, and not by the big fellow's insignia, but by the crushing weight of his stare.{/n}
"Sergeant Branek Zarkov. Whoever you are, my {mf|lord|lady}, I advise you to recognise the present circumstances. And come to the only right decision. This is no place for a stroll."
c3e55b48-af13-4194-890d-39617fcdbe9c: {n}The faces of the crowd brighten: some begin to pray fervently, others to shout out their thanks. The one-eyed man wipes his nose, and the one-armed man makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n} "Long live Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius!" {n}The joyous cry is immediately echoed by dozens more voices.{/n}
9b57fa6b-3fc1-468d-b9cf-5a0178751582: "There is no other evidence to confirm my suspicions."
57b73aa1-1b61-4a5d-a3f7-076b8dd1c1d2: "Members of the council! Every word spoken in support of Juvenna will increase your chances of victory!"
4273b4ba-9903-4dda-a8ab-6873d0424743: {n}In the perfect silence that follows, you distinctly hear the grinding of Sauerback's teeth.{/n} "Yes. It was I who killed him, but not of my own will, but at the behest of Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus."
e018c4d2-402a-42d7-a13e-6e37a27c8819: "I do not wish to be hasty. We shall create an exclusion zone around the xenos' lair."
f46c07a8-2f49-482f-9a53-824d466c5773: "Not even a maggot or two for some crunch?"
82bed9e7-987b-4697-a8ac-dac00f5c1ad0: "I... concur. I do not wish to deliberate on the potential value of his experiments or samples, not on this occasion. Everything touched by that foul xenos spawn must burn. Everything."
82c0217f-cfe3-4406-a48d-ef8864f7012d:
We as developers are always striving to improve our work. To do this, we need information that we can only get from you. By sending game statistics and bug reports to us, you can help us learn more about the way you play and what difficulties you encounter in our game.
Since this game is based on Unity technologies, we use Unity Analytics to analyse your game experience data.
You can opt out of data collection at any time from the options menu.
Would you like to opt in to sending game statistics?
By clicking "ACCEPT" you confirm that you have read and agree to the terms of our <link="eula">End-User Licence Agreement</link> and <link="pp">Privacy Policy</link> as well as the <link="upp">Unity Privacy Policy</link>.
6e5db913-670f-499e-bca7-2f1e207f56aa: {n}The man looks up at you, and you catch a glimpse of surprise behind the grimace of suffering etched into his face. But it does not last. Moments later, the criminal's stare becomes empty once more, hollowed out by unrelenting pain.{/n}
397d1747-56e9-4d64-b65b-5bc1c72f82aa: "Do not speak words you may come to regret."
62412dbc-164b-43fd-bb84-b9fb2b468890:
The user's weapon {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.
The user's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} deal +{uip|Xenos|b1ec2d35c67747699b9684d6b93a5731}% more damage to xenos, +{uip|Imperium|b1ec2d35c67747699b9684d6b93a5731}% more damage to humans, and +{uip|Warp|b1ec2d35c67747699b9684d6b93a5731}% more damage to daemons.
558bc526-54a0-466a-8dfc-e4fd4f205f89:
The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerVanguardGlossary}Vanguard{/g} and all their allies in a 3-cell radius around them gain +<u>(3 + number of {g|f:fc83a8ac57e54db59c3bb70083dc385c}unyielding beacon{/g} stacks)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g}.
All affected targets suffer −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} from the next attack. The effect lasts until the start of the Vanguard's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
e40ad548-2363-448e-b778-6f8253655a4f: Jae knows better than anyone that the freedom to breathe is more precious than all the riches in the world.
d3d930a8-4655-4bed-b66f-5a0f46d5ab69: "I can only encourage such a thirst for knowledge! Ask away."
f674bbbe-b03a-4329-8e9d-8a008ceb5745: This creature is immune to all {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g} of daemonic {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g}.
70dbde85-7cb1-4149-b183-af658e22fcf0: "I seek not the benefits of faith for my body, crimson priest. I fortify my soul and cultivate my will through mortifying my flesh and rejecting its temptations."
7d626c14-d138-4fee-af21-ea28a66f260e: "I accept your offer. Take Seberian von Valancius."
4f1bd1d7-74fb-4a2f-b8cb-80f5973821b9: "Colonel Batoshski, you are hereby appointed the Colonel-Governor of Zarkov."
cbd86a1f-080a-416d-a6b1-c423b1e3ae91: "Not in the slightest. Merely an invitation to discuss. A means by which to get to know you better."
38f19575-af34-403f-8074-af52333c015e: The user cannot use {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}psychic powers{/g}, except those granted by force swords and psyker staves.
d6e282dc-3653-4ebd-bc4e-6fea6ea7077e: {n}Eogunn smiles through the pain.{/n} "I must assume that you have never met a Genetor of my calibre, Rogue Trader. The procedure is utterly trivial, if one observes the rituals of vivisection and the operational covenants of the Omnissiah."
3bfe45b5-f15a-4f8e-a7c2-80b0a31c627d: "Oh, how long it has been since I engaged in a spontaneous symposium of this nature! The intellectual sustenance you offer, colleagues, is of immense worth."
b54bf4d4-0f63-4774-8ced-302a2a641467: "Oh, my precious executioner, you cannot imagine how long I have waited for this moment!"
43a7a70a-7296-47bf-9e06-b62e259c6ba4: "Do you realise where we are? Why there is a strange energy barrier around the palace perimeter?"
5bcb1e9a-0641-48fc-80cf-8d756b1acaee: "If I may distil it down to its barest essence... the galvanic cell not only gives out Motive Force, but also allows me to take and then redistribute it to wherever the Omnissiah's will bids. To awaken your relic, for instance, I had to drain the power from one of the non-critical small workshops on Altar-Templum."
596a7c8c-f78f-4c27-9bc3-54fa069c2000: {n}He fiddles with the procured sample.{/n} "This is a disproportionate price for the insults he delivered, but..."
3c6c8e05-3f7f-4a66-b29e-902ffd91f214: {n}Batoshski makes a sound of agreement and glances around the Cage.{/n} "I never really wanted to leave. So that suits me just fine. Don't worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I won't let anything happen to your new colony."
93379da2-5554-4b10-9e9f-c21ba0fb528d: "You're the von Valancius? I thought you'd be taller."
bf98aee9-496d-4055-957f-099946d6cec9: You compelled Genetor Majoris Ferrenz to repair the heretical augment.
86a75998-4927-449c-b895-a5f2a14018c4: "An ill-fated day. Ask your questions, then let us leave this topic."
8e627db5-4764-4218-90b7-9d9daa7a99be: "I assure you, Captain, I'm just as capable of doing that much."
ef189eb3-ccaa-4666-967b-a3104bc650f1: "Lord Captain." {n}You can hear the rattle of irritation in {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz's mechanical voice.{/n} "Attempted sabotage of sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} has been detected. Requesting intervention of the highest level to prevent undesirable consequences."
5104d5d9-4f00-4256-9bb0-6ed28b9f607e: "As my dearest colleague rightly notes, we have encountered many such... points of contention... over the years."
029fa203-8598-4fbd-95c3-cddd2ce94d94: Colonel Batoshski decided to send the Lord Captain reinforcements in the form of Sergeant Janur.
cb790ff8-9643-4d60-a61e-b3c0a9c82737: "The prerogative of oversight to ensure compliance with the rites is accepted. I request full access to Magos Februs's research. Under these conditions, cooperation will be deemed productive and feasible."
29d77088-fac8-4d6a-8ae8-7f0ead9f0f9c: {n}Ferrenz's visors lock onto your face, as if scanning for the slightest shifts in your expression.{/n} "The threat of tech-heresy outweighs the likelihood of the Vivisector life form seizing the Sector Bionica. The conclusion is immutable — my answer remains unchanged, Lord Captain."
e389391d-94ed-4688-b8a3-ba46221bedc3: The mechadendrite screams of tech-heresy. Its entire design is a crime of innovation and a desecration of the sacred schematics of Mars.
22a9a298-9633-4d9a-9368-5f0429687ce3: "Let me think... The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g}'s words are definitely more than just wasted air to Seberian. Exalt-117 would be a valuable ally for us. And the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} are another possibility: strange as it may be, my father values his fighters and often converses with their commanders personally. And, of course, there's Laria." {n}Juvenna winces, as if her sister's very name disgusts her.{/n} "But her dogged devotion to my father is unlikely to be shaken."
94f25462-85db-4fdd-aa1b-65f7efc2988c: "If that is your will. By your actions, you have earned the right to be called a friend of the von Valancius dynasty. And it is customary for friends to be accommodating in such matters."
08672bad-ee0a-4407-889c-50829a12ec2c: "You may keep your ear mufflers. I shall make do without them."
e3cb4e30-8cd5-4b3a-a03b-f641e4e20bd1: "That abomination is a testament to how xenos influence twists and defiles the very nature of all things. In the light of the God-Emperor, thorns should serve only as protection for fragile blossoms. But, with xenos involved, these barbs pierce the earth and drink its vital humours. Not for the sake of life, but for the sake of desolation."
aec28856-4b48-4977-afa9-38e0f272741c: "Their very nature is blasphemous through committing the heresy of invention. Genetor Februs was supposed to completely eliminate the source of the malign code that had infiltrated the servitors' neural implants. Instead, he altered their mortal flesh in such a way that it is no longer subject to the Machine God's imperatives as transmitted by the implants."
59b6deaf-f509-49ef-8550-277db846e050: "I wish to know how you are faring in your duties as governor."
35c72b53-ce72-47e6-a9ee-0fe3b1088084: This creature is considered vital for the settlement. When it suffers lethal damage, it doesn't die immediately, and gains {g|f:68ec1bbab36344b69aa8b644ff7c8663}the last gasp of duty{/g} effect instead.
db4f7859-c5ca-4b0a-8521-ff1c556e1431: {n}Another wave of pain overwhelms the criminal. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the seam between his skull and the implant.{/n} "Don't..."
7e074534-c9c0-4a4f-b667-617a19657f71: The heretic Astartes renounced the God-Emperor of Humanity in favour of serving the Ruinous Powers.
8d03159f-70eb-4262-91cd-4194f6a6a29d: "I have an augment that cannot be installed on the implantation throne. What should I do with it?"
ce807977-9b42-4131-938b-245f2f251a7c: If Pasqal and the target of {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Medicae Mechadendrite{/g} have a total of 10 stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} or more, the ability becomes available again.
3e084403-947c-4224-8b21-037dbc436d16: "Yes, I was the one who transmitted coordinates for air strikes to enemy troops. You have unmasked me. Are you satisfied?" {n}She enunciates each word crisply.{/n} "But know that I am doing this to save the dynasty."
f3f186ef-6938-4547-876b-59d4ce05918f: {n}The creature emits a series of staccato clanking sounds resembling laughter.{/n} "I marvel at the limitations of your reasoning — if one who is captured and driven into dysfunction is even capable of such a thing. Only the knowledge-hungry primitive standing beside you is guilty of..." {n}The Necron pauses, as if choosing its words.{/n} "Extinguishing the vital functions of the intellect that complemented him. It's irreversible."
113a5226-fa30-4753-b438-f5835bcf3515: "Trazyn the Infinite, I am {name} von Valancius, and I have come for my ancestor."
2cc815c3-03f9-4b8b-a91c-d029bce158af: "The power contained within this blade is a most mysterious one. Even Exalt-117's keen mind has failed to comprehend it fully. Nor have several Aeldari xenos captured on my orders been able to tell me anything illuminating, save for the weapon's name: 'The Crimson Dance of Khaine.' I know Khaine to be an all-obliterating embodiment of war itself in their abominable belief system. A fitting name for it."
9c31b797-279a-4dd3-b0da-b35c1bd0f356: {n}Eogunn replies to the Lexmechanic with a brief phrase in Lingua-Technis. Vinzelex bows respectfully before the Manipulus in return.{/n}
371ef93c-8a31-4514-91d6-f92b5217652d: "Kneel, for before you stands {name} von Valancius, bearer of the Warrant of Trade and anointed of the God-Emperor."
49b71aa1-16da-47d5-9c52-f5e1b496a92d: {n}The disk of the planet is shrouded in a translucent haze of atmosphere. Its icy surface gleams and sparkles in the starlight like a huge diamond with thousands of facets.{/n}
8a56a10e-c829-4756-ad23-8aafc4bd9668: Whenever an ally affected by {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}teamwork{/g} suffers damage, the user also suffers damage equal to 25% of it.
97193a62-743d-4120-98da-2b870216392d:
The user makes a galvanised attack with this augment, creating a zone of melted ground for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} and destroying all {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} within it. Creatures in this area cannot be in cover and suffer +{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}.
At the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user suffers {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}.
c44ee15c-e048-4c74-94fe-cacb2001986b: "You were recommended to me as an exceptional conversationalist. Could I beg a few moments of your time?"
0de370a3-81aa-440b-9796-24ca8cf2b893: "Hatred, Mistress Heydari. By musing on the xenos' mutilating experiments and recalling the components of my construction, I diverted my mind from the pain. But it was hatred that stopped me from surrendering."
fb62ed2c-e434-446f-b748-6fc3ac40c98c: "Father, Inquisitor af Irramon is no fool. I do not believe these lunatics serve him. We should give them a chance to explain themselves." {n}Only the colour of the woman's eyes betrays the kinship between her and the half-mechanical monster beside her.{/n}
ace5f839-5ce0-4309-8fde-7ff5eb91c95f: This creature gains +5 deflection, +20 to all characteristics, and deals +100% damage.
68634479-fe9f-4208-96f2-fff1291e8c9c: "The servants of the Omnissiah are ready to proceed, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The detachment includes both Skitarii and explorers."
f32a2d09-89f6-401c-b81c-54373a5b802b: "Why are all three subjects so horribly mutilated?"
2ec7764c-efef-4002-9046-2ea6566696d9: Exalt-117 listens to Laria — his support should be maintained.
77f9dc5e-256f-4c63-8908-6282386f9fd0: "I found a replacement. 'Ruoldo' wanted to play at power, and I graciously let him. Shame he didn't rule for long." {n}Bluff's jeering laughter carries no hint of pity.{/n}
0a3ab43c-52d1-4c89-b8e9-6bfef63c309a: "Nonsense. Unique phenomena can be found on worlds such as this one, and thassertium is a case in point. However, esteemed colleague, if you prefer to indulge your own pride rather than explore all of creation, far be it from me to interfere."
f26946e2-a925-4f25-8bcc-6a1a522ca50f: {n}The soulless projection twitches and flickers, but Trazyn the Infinite's voice comes through clear and distinct — and the cold, bone-deep spite that drips from his every word freezes the blood in your veins.{/n} "You... primitive... pests! I could spend centuries explaining the catastrophe you have wrought by violating the integrity and hermetic containment of this place, the repository of history itself, but your limited synaptic connections are not even capable of processing and absorbing this information in all its monstrousness."
04cc0381-f039-4f62-afb4-2d2bc6bb08eb: "The request to diagnose the machine spirits of the air defence battery has been received and prioritised."
ddab9f7a-8caa-4244-bcfb-cacbed8c6aae: After an enemy makes a ranged attack against this creature, that enemy must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −25 penalty. If failed, the enemy immediately makes one more ranged attack against their ally. This effect can only be triggered once per {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
0dce57e3-3551-4651-805a-51951fe29415: "You are a disgrace to the Astra Militarum. When faced with a common enemy, you bicker and stall for time. Instead of uniting and fighting."
c03078b0-f9ed-4486-a0ca-543b74d09430: "I can see you have already made your decision. I will not try to dissuade you."
7396d086-3cb2-4c10-a044-811cff28c442: "They are not gesticulating at me and clamouring for me to be burned... These mon-keigh are broken."
f4307af0-0a8b-4c6d-9082-787449d72655: "Genetor Extremis Februs was summoned to pacify a group of frenzied servitors. Given his rank and presumed breadth of knowledge, the risk of disruption to the sacred rites was deemed minimal. However, the Genetor exceeded his remit and performed rites on several servitors that do not conform to the paradigm of the Cult Mechanicus, replacing some of their blessed implants with organic matter."
da4a1e5e-a868-4d4b-85fa-22d3a658cb32: {n}The flight down to the planet proceeds as normal. This changes when the pilot announces atmospheric entry, beckoning your gaze toward the viewports. The shuttle glides through colossal roots and vines, which swathe the planet in a vast, quivering mantle. Spellbound, you watch the movement within the growths, before the pilot reports losing vox-contact with the flagship. And then a heavy blow strikes the hull...{/n}
78feb2a7-5000-45c1-a48c-b197adefa9b2: "To save Seberian, at the right moment, you must walk away from him and trust Juvenna."
b27eb563-2acd-443d-80fd-ee7969f3274a: "I shall give you atonement for the one!"
513b908d-6adf-448e-9327-49284c66a734: "Request for augmetics installation accepted. The Omnissiah blesses the removal of the weaknesses of the flesh."
d112ff67-d7b9-4604-ba86-55e01cd7c074: Targets affected by {g|f:8a3834391538418fa35ad73861da942f}Captive Audience{/g} have their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} reduced by −{uip|agiB|da7849a95bb04d44978710ca711ad4d7}% until the end of combat. This {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} is doubled for targets failing the {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}.
99a38928-3fb2-47b2-873c-c166af6216ed: You forced Decabalus to give you the anchor-core, destroying the station and all its inhabitants.
65432422-dc18-4a33-b0c4-9ecd78d3b6e7: "Lord Captain, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created. Now their {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magi{/g} Biologis are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."
cd5b2d4a-9c08-464a-9a3e-8ac6f8895815: "Madness and genius are two phenomena of the same order, and this is an incontrovertible fact. Ask yourself, Rogue Trader: are you truly so close to the latter and so far from the former? The path of your ascendance is paved with countless sacrifices, yet you avoid looking down, lest you lose your mind."
e838114e-2fc2-4b46-b30a-501622e1eda8: "Confess if you wish to remain alive and unharmed."
6ae856e6-e370-4eb3-95b9-00d10e8329b9: {n}You feel the poisonous spikes scratching at you. Like rooting creatures, they search for any gap in your armour — and fail to find one.{/n}
16633e4e-28f5-4067-ac9a-b2f5c3cf5aa7: [Glare at the Genetor] "I do not fear the forbidden. I know it all too well."
b9d74814-8dc3-43b7-ab22-03686823fc83: Activate the old lift. This is the only way to reach the laboratory where Nuncius's body rests.
7d766d79-ec16-4988-9cd0-b70112916861: {n}The sergeant frowns, but picks up his {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} — and soon hands the transmitter to you. Your apparent knowledge has rattled Juvenna. Gaining her trust will be difficult.{/n}
5b5cd51f-cff3-4984-bbab-c4693bcafe5f: {n}Colonel Batoshski snarls like an enraged animal.{/n} "{name}, Zarkov would not ask for help without good reason. We have survived out there for centuries on our own."
2c8ebe7f-dcc4-4a32-a60b-5d8e2fc5fa52: {n}Eogunn's soft and strangely cracked voice comes over the vox-channel.{/n} "This is the place. This is where I did what I have regretted every second of the last fifty years of my existence. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, let's finish this as quickly as possible — I fear my soul's resolve is not as great as yours."
77d0f7f3-144c-4687-a9df-d3edbe0701e4: "We can only hope that your gift, Lady Navigator, will plot a trajectory toward liberation. This xenos stronghold is overflowing with ignorance and malice, and my internal chronometer counts down the seconds until we can finally depart this dismal vale."
2b50a7c7-5c11-4573-b52d-76937efe6c1e: {n}Batoshski scratches his beard in thought.{/n} "The Handbook says 'vox-stations,' as you call them, are for inter-regimental communication. My grandfather said he saw the casing of the last one on this world, but the roots swallowed it long ago. So, we have no 'vox-station' here."
51478057-1a78-49ae-b781-695c0e0dbd8a: "Survival, {name}. Among myriad enemies who seek to exterminate us, among cruel stars that harbour unknowable horrors, among traitors who promise death to our fellow humans. We want to survive. Death is inevitable — it is an incontrovertible fact. But to survive long enough for those who remain to achieve what we failed to — that is an endeavour worthy of Humanity."
aa6acf00-7bfe-4bbd-b322-0bf21d069243: Eogunn grants {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}blessing of the Omnissiah{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cells for 1 round, increasing their armour and damage dealt. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.
c06391bc-c774-4547-b400-04280ee9199c: "Now I can speak freely. Let me tell you this: I have no idea who you are, but you made a mistake when you tried to interfere in my plans!" {n}Juvenna snatches a needle pistol from its holster and presses it under your chin.{/n}
65c605db-1a25-4613-8318-1013f5116b65: Order the squad to examine the bodies.
d9296268-63f0-43f6-b8d6-146ce81b4084: Several melta-torpedoes are fired from the side of your ship, aimed precisely at the pyramid. It is not long before they make contact with the surface, when all the warheads suddenly change trajectory and smash into the nearest obelisk. There is no detonation — the giant monument absorbs the charges without any sign of damage.
368ae221-49b7-41b1-a34b-5af5ec193d59: "It is a fine thing to entertain the son of the Allfather with a good hunt! My hands yearn for battle."
5c00a5bd-ec35-4077-89cc-94210b8b4d9a: "What about my implantation throne? Will Altar-Templum oversee its enhancements?"
d53d3126-f686-48e4-9d11-9e13047abf78: "Let the Merovians go on the attack. Supply them all with what they need, and Humanity will conquer the world."
840444fb-bd22-4eeb-96d5-afc65d4c89e2: "I apologise if it seems like I am mistaken, but I think we are seeing a direct result of the decision to deny augmentation to ordinary workers. In the long run, restricting the use of implants seems... unwise." {n}The Vivisector's high, determined voice is audible even over the clamour of the crowd.{/n}
05bebb60-bc8c-49b9-b887-70f1ab516abd: "Scanning... Request denied. Unknown technologies are not among the gifts of the Omnissiah, are not subject to restoration, and must be disposed of immediately."
ed146748-97b3-463e-9405-bbe3a99136e6: "Even under the most intolerable conditions, the servants of the God-Emperor are warmed by the faith in their hearts! And by the desire to smite His enemies wherever they lurk."
c277870d-d7f1-4d0d-b957-f0129a59c597: "Who is this wiseman who theorised on the nature of the machine spirit? It would be interesting to read his work."
d114500b-4e3c-4434-af2b-7066c010abae:
Against all odds, the old data-slate activates in your hands. It displays only a sequence of text entries that repeats over and over again:
"Mark this: the Omnissiah's sacred colour is green. Green indicates the Motive Force is sufficient. Not blue, not red, and never black! Only green reveals the truth."
+++
"The Machine God punishes me for my lack of diligence. What am I missing? The second button always provides one charge for one level. The third gives two charges, but only for the second and third vid-screens. The first... I have only grasped that it grants a different charge to each screen. The first receives three, but what of the others? I must test, I must comprehend!"
+++
"Omnissiah, All-Comprehending and All-Knowing, reveal to me Thy wisdom in the weaving of calculable probabilities. Grant me clarity of thought and freedom from all temptations of the flesh."
+++
"Memory module is damaged. I must decipher it. I will make records so as not to forget."
+++
"Mark this: the Omnissiah's sacred colour is green. Green indicates..."
a12bce96-ed91-4532-92fa-702cd4bba951: {n}A prayer for the dying machine spirits grants them the fortitude for one final act, and the voice becomes clearer:{/n} "Merov... Penal Legion. The one who requisitioned us.. Seberian von Valancius is dead. We have no means of comm... not found in orbit. We have been abandoned... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, have mercy... Claim us... before the warp... finishes us off!"
98e62ac6-ee37-4662-aed2-0de29717400f: "God-Emperor, infinite in Your mercy, touch my son with loving hands, for I believe it is Your will that he become healthy in mind, body, and spirit..."
680ceaf1-01ce-48ae-8a32-27fe49d4bfc8: "Hmm. I'll think about it. Let's set this conversation aside for now."
39a6ba73-b801-44e2-a307-e35b19f2d7f9: The device is designed to diagnose and repair head augments.
73fd0e1a-7035-4d2f-a6b6-2ff1d05a10bc: "One day, an entire planet will be named after you."
9ee2ad18-ba10-462f-b2f0-dd8c63146a25: "It is doubly regrettable that her corpse is badly damaged. Nuncius and I performed a cursory autopsy to determine if the brain was suitable for stasis-preservation as a test sample, but we found only a conglomeration of tissue deformed by the injury."
f6ffffac-47a6-4609-b501-9adb96166bd4: "This is not a matter of politics, but oaths. You swore an oath to the God-Emperor, not Seberian. Now you are going against His servants."
e910a76b-19e9-4b1a-ad5a-e9afe21b1648: "We have an incoming vox-signal, but I cannot identify the source."
4f547a90-dfeb-4654-b084-2099a22f590a: "You." {n}Ice cracks in Seberian's voice as his accusing finger points at you. The skin of his face twitches convulsively, unable to form a grimace of rage.{/n} "Explain yourself. Now."
83766ebf-dde3-4c24-bfb5-4186b8d2f3d7: "I am afraid you will have to accept the status quo, esteemed colleague." {n}Eogunn makes no effort to conceal the smugness in his voice.{/n} "Thank you for your agreement, Rogue Trader. I will immediately resume my work of implementing the formula in the remaining servitors."
d7563677-a513-4d11-96a1-63fff5bf0d1e: "Apologies, we didn't recognise you. We thought you weren't coming. I'll let them know you've arrived."
1464f39a-c325-4018-8c76-47cb09eea89c: "How remarkable that this unnatural creature endures while those more worthy have fallen victim to it." {n}Eogunn floats over to the {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} and flicks a few brass toggle switches in its skull.{/n} "I hope the cogitator of the integrated Elucidator is still functional."
9c8135f2-4fa1-4128-a7db-98052f19e44d: {n}Abelard, scowling jealously at Nuncius, mutters:{/n} "Allow me, Lord Captain. Triasomata, before you stands {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, Lord Captain of this vessel and sovereign of its crew. Solely by {mf|his|her} grace do you still live — one wrong word, one wrong movement, and I will personally call the enforcers down upon you."
d1a2757a-e982-43f9-bddf-73ca311e2316: "I agree. The Handbook dictates that we always leave some of our fighters in reserve."
b2213908-b554-447d-9fef-3dd8c329ac2d: "Remember: there will be no forgiveness for those who betrayed the von Valancius dynasty."
a6dc7939-74f1-4309-bfe8-068dccbac316: [Adjust your grip on your weapon] "Let's see what you're worth in a fair fight, you devious wretch."
299a1e30-d715-4f50-be2e-0aa6db7df3bf: "My path has always aligned with Seneschal Voigtvir's, but I see no need to answer hypothetical queries at this juncture."
f1f63ab2-8a3d-429a-9563-3bbf8a68a44e: A special Chapter of the Adeptus Astartes dedicated solely to the extermination of xenos. The Deathwatch is made up of those Astartes who have distinguished themselves in battles against the aliens. These warriors are one of the most powerful bulwarks protecting the Imperium from the constant encroachment of the enemies of Humanity.
6f779c3b-f054-4029-b8c2-194469b98619: ...the Arch-Militant and {nc|her|his} loyal fighters from Zarkov sacrificed themselves to buy us time.
08c566e1-1f2f-4f73-ac9e-3d01738ac930: "I shall give you an enemy you've never faced before!"
0460c6f7-d257-465b-bb92-6b9bb9fd5c1b: {n}Nuncius is as sanguine and impassive as ever.{/n}
a06ef059-ab31-433a-b4b9-87afb126e002: "Deftly deduced from my deliberate vagueness in my last thesis!" {n}Eogunn tries to smile, but winces in pain as the throne's manipulators, obeying the will of the ancient machine spirit, begin to return all the extracted implants to their previous positions.{/n} "You are correct — the one you and I created was the second attempt. The first was the starting point that whetted my thirst for the mysteries of the machine that is the organic body. A most fascinating story, Nuncius's telling of it most engaging!"
895b3b50-5886-4e5a-bd3b-3917351850a1: "The blasphemous runes of the vile Aeldari inscribed on the sword are proof that this artefact exudes heresy."
1d3429ce-55b9-4aef-80ea-478a0d8ae924: {n}The implantation throne is majestic in its antiquity. The metal bench, surrounded by countless injectors, manipulators, and vidscreens, leaves no doubt as to its purpose. The very nature of this machine is designed to transform living bodies by fusing them with blessed iron. Even to the naked eye, it is clear that the machine is ailing, grievously so. The manipulators' segmented tubes hang limply, bleeding unguent, while the dusty lumens are only dimly illuminated. As the Tech-Priests try to revive the relic, each swing of their censer is like a pendulum ticking down the moments until the throne's untimely demise.{/n}
d88ab62c-258f-47f4-9d96-7c9f063810ba: "One is compelled to carry a certain stigma, living on Stygies VIII. Certain... theological disputes often lead to conflict with our fellow clergy. Black symbolises our guardedness and otherness, while with red we emphasise the purity of our faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} and our fellowship with the rest of the Cult Mechanicus."
f45e93ce-08ee-4d32-8968-d701e3faec4f: In a half-lit armoury, with no grand ceremony or public fanfare, the dagger adorned with the skull and pillar was melted down and reforged into an Inquisitor Insignia. Xavier Calcazar granted it to the Rogue Trader and inducted {mf|him|her} into the Koronus Conclave, a fellowship of guardians of the Imperium privy to Humanity's darkest secrets.
2a6c4119-d7e7-4c2a-8fc4-9e3f8bcf44b9: "I imagined you differently. There is so much of the man of servitude in you and so little the man in authority."
f7d8f211-b54f-4b6b-a277-cf5ce9d010e9: Convince Eogunn to apologise to Tervantias
