99e13891-442d-4a81-be9d-bf54c5134b73: [Throw yourself at the Haemonculus's feet] "Have mercy on this lackwit, Master Tervantias!"
3231ada4-2d83-42f2-bc02-af93fe3f7b49: You leave the planet behind in your voidship, cold and empty, like an unearthed grave.
9d4af0cc-b78b-4e3d-bc99-b03f5dd9d5d3: A few years later, the Expanse quaked under the onslaught of enemy hordes. Heeding the orders of their arrogant overlords, the tombs of a long-dead civilisation awakened to bring the inferior races back into submission and rule with an iron hand. Victory over an enemy that knew neither weakness nor fear drove both the Winterscale and Chorda dynasties to the brink of extinction. Only the von Valancius protectorate survived the xenos unscathed, and rumours that the Rogue Trader had somehow managed to negotiate with their leaders plagued the minds of the survivors for decades after.
06784098-fe04-4e8d-abb0-251e56423379: "The life form 'Genetor Ferrenz' is extremely disturbed by the discovered addition to the genealogical tree of the von Valancius dynasty. I request permission to make the appropriate changes to the Sector Bionica archives."
3f7f1775-08c6-4afc-8d68-5ef0d0a675d3: {n}The colonel grimaces and sweeps a furious gaze over his people. Under his glare, they flinch, straighten their backs, and nod.{/n} "No. Not sick. Not really. We're hanging in there. We can't be broken."
1c5e394a-068e-4b4d-8844-f2149b776b6e: The creature gains +80% {g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}piercing{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}power damage{/g} reduction, +3 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}, +20% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}, +25% damage, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}, and +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.
a4d03888-427e-471b-b977-d7d2452026a6: "Not quite dead, not quite alive, right... but where'd you get the idea that you absolutely have to finish them off, eh, Skully?"
bc720400-d9cc-4de9-a9f4-33eab457b3a3: {n}No matter how hard you try to dredge your memory for any facts about the siege of Dargonus — surely a major historical event — only the word "Senai" comes to the surface. It seems devoid of any meaning.{/n}
358a296f-3f44-4a92-9613-74db7405d770: "The Deathwatch is a Chapter dedicated to the extermination of xenos. That is all I can tell you without violating my vows." {n}He lapses into a pointed silence.{/n}
169a9f37-8df0-40df-8648-9f30b84c63e3: "Well, as we say in our regiment, to your good health." {n}Batoshski watches as you tip the contents of the cup down your throat.{/n}
6e78757a-a9a2-4715-88e7-f91f4c1a62d0:
The user's weapon {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.
The user gains +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}.
b9737d1a-1fdd-4e8a-8ed7-4e08b5e836dc: An unholy preacher of Chaos and keeper of forbidden knowledge, well-versed in depraved rituals.
b6eb40de-baee-4d95-b8a9-674968607496: [Take a closer look at the bodies]
291ea640-20fc-4f05-957d-afe43986b8cc: "I noticed several highly unusual mechanisms on my way here. Are they the heretics' creations?"
31a1210a-151b-4127-b23d-e7ec7dff9f54: "Frontier world. Danger level: high. Tithe grade... Solutio Tertius."
2a11d9bb-3667-43d0-9829-4f1534f6e008: "Done. Awaiting a response." {n}A prolonged silence fills the vox-channel.{/n}
30404ac1-4dca-4067-9307-45c99cd52ef8: "What was it you wished to discuss?" {n}Juvenna looks at you enquiringly from under her long lashes.{/n}
97a85b50-b596-473c-9174-235a030ee330: If Eogunn has not used {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} during his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he uses it targeting himself at the end of the turn.
30da7768-6913-45f9-b285-6d32d30d99f1: "It turns out that some of our traditions disgust the other servants of the dynasty. Some are even whispering of heresy... People are especially unsettled by our funeral rites. We brought shroud-leaves with us and have already placed a few free-thinkers inside them, and your servants started an uproar."
6f39348f-8b0c-4246-9471-590fdf69da1d: "Sort it out among yourselves. And if you interrupt me again for such trivialities, I will have both of you strung up by your thumbs at the entrance to the Sector Bionica. Understood?"
1cf0f6e2-1b81-4be6-b922-2a682c55e471: "Detecting a critically incorrect selection of a flesh-tongue lexeme by Genetor Eogunn Februs. 'Eradication' is the correct term for manipulations involving the described source."
7d61d18b-6e88-44c1-bb1b-b54e5e37e82d: From the depths of time the name Seberian von Valancius has resurfaced, a Rogue Trader of whom no mention survives within the dynastic archives. The Lord Captain must discover what terrible secrets or priceless treasures this enigmatic ancestor left behind.
6f98d5c1-e3b9-4708-8dd1-ba63fd623e67: Reduces the chance of triggering {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}psychic phenomena{/g} by −10%. If any {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g} manifest, the wearer gains an additional +2 {g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}psy rating{/g} until the end of combat. Base armour property: +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} if the wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} is more than 50.
2043a9b2-a9a4-4949-9e0c-c8486a6cc9ab: "That's right. It's a penal regiment." {n}The sergeant shrugs.{/n} "But you know, we make for damned good soldiers. Of course, you can't beat old habits out of all of them: once in a while, they'll swipe a {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}lho{/g}-stick, and what of it? But they'll endure anything: hunger, cold, injuries. They'll plug a breach with their own bodies if needed."
c4cb276f-a233-4e6d-a244-cd69420978b1: "Emperor, guide my hand, for I am destined to cut and heal the flesh of the suffering. Let not my hand or heart tremble..."
58ea1a3e-867a-4480-9ce5-9c8bee88d488: "Sauerback, take her away. And see to it that she dies slowly."
9c9b5563-4d21-4a12-b68d-01b499efd803: "Astounding!" {n}Eogunn does not appear frightened or shocked, but rather utterly captivated. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} Nuncius hovers sedately at his shoulder.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is a wholly extraordinary violation of the law of causality. Oh, if only I could discover a machine that could realise such effects!"
6b028c26-7f31-4753-9884-a07f19039e4c: {n}A mocking trill emanates from the vox-grille.{/n} "I should have realised at once. Diodas knew too much and was overly confident in his superiority. Juvenna was always ambitious, as was her mother. This... clarifies a great deal. What I mistook for incompetence was betrayal. How vulgar, Juvenna..."
d9b025b2-3777-4a2b-ad44-a164dd9cd921: "Private Tsevchik!" {n}he snaps, without looking away from the screen.{/n} "Have you lost your mind? Or lost your way? Well, you..." {n}He lifts his sharp, cunning eyes toward you and straightens up.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't recognise you. Quartermaster Kuravich, I mean, Governor Kuravich, at your service." {n}He gives a clumsy bow, and the reek of sweat washes over you.{/n}
7ab36e72-38aa-4c8b-b201-bb7ff2f01640: "No. I command the enforcers as part of the palace defences and hold the rank of captain." {n}The man shows you the insignia embroidered on his sleeve.{/n} "I lack the noble status required for a higher appointment. A minor setback."
a5cd905b-58d2-4806-b01b-9d1eb194c32f: {n}The scouts report a lengthy search for a safe passage to the given coordinates — the predatory xenoflora greets these uninvited guests with poison and thorns. The vox-scribe spoke true: deep beneath, nestled at the base of the roots, lie bizarre xenos structures.{/n}
8656a321-3835-4679-a469-3b6696b41c0e: {n}The madman fires without a second thought, but you are faster. The deadly plasma blast is deflected, incinerating everything in its path.{/n}
5967015b-8b41-4fa1-939d-724bbcaffc9b: {n}Eogunn makes a low, resonant grunt filled with frustration.{/n} "A deplorable situation. The lift's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} has lain in deep hibernation since the grace of the Motive Force abandoned it. We are stranded on this side of the chasm without it."
539b4321-115c-47db-8162-e964789fc292: "Negative deviation from the optimal outcome has been registered. The cumulative completeness of knowledge has been reduced. The Omnissiah mourns this loss!" {n}It is difficult to catch any intonation in Tetria-Lemma's solemn voice, but the binharic exclamation that follows seems genuinely sorrowful.{/n}
5cf9cbd8-a9a2-4967-80f6-28c025940a9b: "A blade of Aeldari creation, dubbed the Crimson Dance of Khaine. A relic from an epoch before the fall of that flawed species. It has historical value — not that a primitive human could perceive it. No, Seberian was driven more by his vanity and desire to oppose his masters."
cdebae33-a8e1-4f77-ad25-2d34d8cfc585: "I'll answer just as plainly: I can be useful to you. Just tell me how."
0d870722-f8b2-4032-9b2d-b4fe13f60247: Eogunn selects the main target and 3 cells within a 5-cell radius around it. All creatures in those cells and in the cells between them and the main target become additional targets. Eogunn unleashes an energy bolt, dealing {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} shock damage with {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} armour penetration to the main target. Then, lightning bolts from the main target deal the same amount of damage to the additional targets . The main target suffers +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} more damage. Additional targets suffer half of this amount. Damage dealt to the same creature is reduced by −50%. All {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks are removed from Eogunn.
d283a4d2-c5df-4d24-9d80-745eadc23db4: "I do not intend to waste my time dealing with some creature."
43385fa8-935e-4add-91f3-f6b292fda9bb:
{n}You take the sword from Jarub and hand over the payment. The sergeant's face lights up with almost childlike joy.{/n}
"It's a pleasure doing business with someone like you, my {mf|lord|lady}! Thanks for your help, then. I've got a safe spot nearby — I'll wait until the fighting's over and your people arrive to take me to Footfall. We'll see each other again, if destiny wills it." {n}Jarub offers you a low bow and hurries off toward the gates.{/n}
5a5ef138-8a9e-4140-8cf9-f678bf5c16ff: [Address the patient] "Your mother is here, Gnotec, and she is very worried about you. Hold on for her."
a955168d-0d02-4e3b-b2e4-5c16aebbb8ce: "Aim these blades against the enemies of the dynasty."
a777e14c-66b3-45cf-a72c-a30eac5d4c06:
The user gains +3 stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}.
Whenever the user suffers a {g|Encyclopedia:Traumas}trauma{/g}, this augment remains active.
e5468910-f3ba-4f27-b41c-ba158ce7045d: "Not at all, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Life here on your flagship is confusing and difficult, but we are not afraid of challenges. We're used to them. You have given us a chance to achieve atonement, and believe me, every one of us will fight for it until the end."
42389682-c4fb-4a5c-bd11-7bd421150dce: Eogunn has a unique background. As a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g}, he can accumulate a special resource known as {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} for each AP spent. His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies through Eogunn's special abilities and unique weapons. Eogunn combines Officer abilities with his own unique features and powers. Many of his abilities scale on his key characteristics — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} — as well as the {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Logic{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g} skills that are increased due to his background.
a9e06b8f-7f96-4cc2-84f3-8b9c6ef0d51e: {n}An entire vox-array has been cleverly concealed behind the outer portion of the ferrogranite slab. The level of delicacy required to place the device discreetly in such a place is difficult to fathom.{/n}
fc87517e-4617-47f1-b6f2-a4563093be0e: "Oh no. His body is more metal than flesh, although his mind is still very... human. He will be able to overcome his negative physiological reactions. Once he has acclimatised to this new reality, you will be dealing with a Seberian von Valancius who is in full possession of all his knowledge, quirks... and outsize ambition. Let's see if that proves to be his fatal flaw this time around."
7111664c-acf3-4fcb-bd9c-b11098a5a0da: "You mean he makes up quotes off the top of his head, ascribing them to fictitious sages?"
bdfce055-e424-46bd-902e-cb7b99d30539: "I am plagued by one question... Why are you speaking so loudly?"
d51161f8-09b9-4ccc-9701-e34840968876: "Not enough power to start the lift. We need to cut power to something else."
608b8261-2434-4a95-92a9-ddfa98c0c598: "I did wonder what caused those bright flashes in the fog around you every time you left the bridge. They truly are less frequent now."
6f818221-0c9a-4506-adf2-369fe242d809: "You are cruel, {name}. Cruel, but correct — I was rash and self-absorbed. I cannot afford to behave that way again. Only calculation and preparation will help me this time."
321c2e3b-082c-4cf7-9c6c-bf8518478012: "Many years ago, when I took the Crimson Dance of Khaine out of that crypt, I attracted the attention of an abominable xenos. Centuries later, the dynasty is still paying the price for the mistake I made. So, I am going to search for the Crimson Dance of Khaine, {name}. It's only fair that the sword that started this conflict should put a long-overdue end to it as well. There is a pattern to it, don't you think? As though this was destined to happen."
c588cc2b-efe3-4822-b57a-f9e43029198f: "I can hear your heartbeat. You are not a xenos illusion. Help me, human."
03a2b063-a8b3-411a-9d28-aa24e1a116a7: {n}The inflamed skin on Sauerback's face stretches tightly in a gleeful grin.{/n} "Wrong answer, spy. Whoever you are, you are not of House Gaprak. Or else you would know that the Gapraks have been associated with the Adeptus Mechanicus for decades." {n}He points a plasma pistol at you.{/n}
c7251e8f-430a-403d-a6b2-abde62c836c5: "I wish to know how you came to be imprisoned, so that I may avoid making the same mistakes."
0a3cf0c0-8ab5-4b72-9cda-ca2d9fb3d1a2: {n}The colonel's face twitches as if in a spasm, and the budding respect in his eyes gives way to hatred. He says nothing, but as he is led away, he does not take his gaze off you.{/n}
953d9d02-e8e8-45f4-9f4e-42ca93de8aeb: "Lord Captain, your decision is assessed as extremely prudent — the safest. The station will continue to operate as normal."
19af6069-d0c8-4250-9a77-cb7c9248c42e: "According to the letter of the Lex Imperialis, the lack of a supporting document revokes the right to style oneself as a Rogue Trader. The status of worlds already conquered by the dynasty, meanwhile, is... is unclear."
2d69367c-0c00-4b6b-80a7-380c48367fa3: The cables conduct energy of enormous power, but you cannot see a single fuel tank nearby.
567c473b-6bb7-4798-ad1d-d92384aa02e4: "The mechanism within it — the anchor-core — embodies the unique knowledge granted by the Omnissiah. It has increased the productivity of the main mining units by one hundred and fifty-three— correction, one hundred and fifty-four percent."
30114612-6839-4645-bdeb-1defa3fc3320: "On the contrary, Mistress Heydari. I know all too well the fear of a predatory past dogging my steps, and the desire to flee until the ground itself runs out beneath my feet. I do not care in what guise you appear before me, for you retain your keen mind and sharp tongue."
b6dc51e0-4480-4cde-ba2e-57ef1a5c8d90: "The appearance of a second Rogue Trader has seriously shaken the hierarchical structure on board. A review of the chain of command is required. I am not sure a corresponding precedent will be found in the annals any time soon."
91260a59-33be-49bc-892e-14b22ba9c161: [Contact the Vox Master] "Whoever brings me the person who stole the trophy from my study will be rewarded! Relay this message to all decks!"
9b9651b5-2d14-470c-bab0-3d2946ca553c: "Never thought I'd... As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Atonement for the one. And today it's definitely not going to be me."
2d129f5b-96bb-4f73-99e3-f4e6a911c9e5: [Remain in the open and close your eyes]
d8169640-6a7c-4b12-aba0-2d12529bb683: {n}The Triasomata begins to shriek:{/n} "Pincers red and black! Heretic glitter! He wants to disassemble and reassemble me again, disassemble and reassemble, disassemble..."
c31cfdd3-32b8-477b-9ce1-b1f0e523737d: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g} send out alarm signals as soon as your ship enters the planet's orbit. At first, the cause is unclear — even though the planet's volcanic activity is immensely high, it poses no threat to your ship. However, when the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} analyse the data more carefully, they discover an unusual finding. The northern hemisphere of the planet is spanned by a ring of cyclopean obelisks lined up at the same latitude. In the centre of this ring, at the planet's pole, stands a black pyramid. Faint traces of organics are present near it.{/n}
61c9cbe3-3e02-490d-a766-534b17717a63: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}You turn around to see the captain-quartermaster catching up to you. Dunawski comes to a halt in front of you, stands to attention, and salutes.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski reporting for duty. I am here to serve as reinforcement. What is the plan of operation?"
dbfad64f-55e7-4be7-960f-145ff1d612cf: "I hate these courtly games. But if you think it is best, so be it."
b753a41c-99f9-49fb-8e35-ebaf518c1574: Isimond Sauerback's words run counter to the Seneschal's plan. He must either be persuaded to side with Laria or neutralised by other means.
d05e78d8-1921-4d77-af0b-3a03c00c694a: "Why do you care so much about curing the throne's machine sickness?"
98ed54a4-405a-4671-aed1-0d7bf8822825: "What nonsense! It is obvious the protectorate would have crumbled had I not assumed command."
f4317f8b-c6ed-42a1-9f9f-68f4578eae9e:
Your new companion is a Warrior. Abelard specialises in melee combat and drawing the enemy's attacks.
{g|f:4955b43454f6488f82892e166c76c995}Charge{/g} is a unique Warrior {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} that works only when they are using a melee weapon and is not considered an attack action. Use {g|f:4955b43454f6488f82892e166c76c995}Charge{/g} to close the distance between you and the enemy and deal damage. Click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on the ability's icon and choose a direction to charge in. If an enemy is in the direct path of {g|f:4955b43454f6488f82892e166c76c995}Charge{/g}, Abelard will attack them and will still be able to use an attack action afterward if he has not used one this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
Note that {g|f:4955b43454f6488f82892e166c76c995}Charge{/g} can only be used if the character is 2 or more cells away from their target.
4e1997c0-7fb6-412d-b13c-83d1f21170b1: "Lord Captain, the station has broken vox-silence." {n}You can hear the slight surprise in Vigdis's vox-distorted voice.{/n} "The {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Logis of Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, wishes to speak with you."
207512ed-a48a-4804-a15f-0b1af688089f: {n}Kuravich heaves a weary sigh.{/n} "Sometimes I think a grox is more likely to become a Rogue Trader than I am to be a decent governor. I can barely write — I'd make three mistakes in the word 'lho' — and do you have any idea how many petitions to the Administratum I have to file every day? I'd rather spend a month slurping broth made of bark and leaves than fill out another requisition for supplies on Form 12-B..."
a1e8ef64-10bf-496f-a90b-dc33373a5299: {n}After Eogunn regains his composure, he raises his finger.{/n} "I honour the Crimson Accord of Mars and swear before the all-knowing, all-seeing Machine God that Nuncius is no spawn of tech-heresy. If I lie, then let me be struck down by the electromagnetic pulse of His wrath, and let the Motive Force desert my limbs forever and ever!"
b276cb81-7559-466a-a350-052c90ceb967: "Information received, priority changed. For some reason, the probability of critical errors continues to increase in proportion to the necessity of the function..."
5c6fe31c-ef20-49f7-9bd8-08db312e27a0: Press {mouse_icon|RightMouse} on a prerequisite to see it in the current feature list
bf6cf55f-4c91-45b2-9147-ce6cb659315b: {n}Janris wipes the sweat from his brow, then sets to drying his fleshy hand with a silk handkercher.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Has your search been successful? Have you learned anything about the fate of the mysterious Seberian?"
aea2a622-e32c-4610-8ff3-6ec0e97f6b04: This weapon grants its wielder the {g|f:8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}Khaine's Rage{/g} ability, which can be used once per combat.
288e296b-9a42-4ab3-b65f-57fa169eb4af: "People are divided into the useful and the useless. All three of your test subjects were piteous rubbish. Repeat the experiment with worthy specimens."
8ebee719-2fd8-4988-a2f5-390e0ca779a6: "Genetor Februs, technomats on several decks have reported spontaneous power outages across auxiliary ship systems. Synchronous with this, an influx of Motive Force has been recorded in your laboratory. As the Chief Enginseer on board, I request an explanation."
c87b39dd-a6b0-4491-bb86-57bf8dbfffa5: {n}Eogunn snorts.{/n} "That mutant skull that Mistress Kibellah has chosen to establish familiar relations with is a crude anatomical aid and nothing more. I suppose her conversations can be characterised as a primitive means of meditation, where the individual projects her state of mind and thoughts onto some inanimate object and thereby achieves a certain degree of introspection. Nuncius, by contrast, contains a machine spirit, which we know every creation of the Omnissiah to possess, and he also happens to be a highly erudite and complex construct."
3416241f-d7fd-4042-bc5e-81dede6e34a5: "I refuse to call the servants of the Golden Throne my enemies, much less explain my reasons for cooperating with them."
b2783ca6-b261-4873-a906-410085017e8c: {n}Laria Voigtvir lifts her weary eyes to you with a glint of cautious interest.{/n} "I'm listening."
2f7d7be1-da54-4ed6-b819-43e67ed150f4:
{n}A tall wisp of a man hurriedly turns to you. He is wearing an apron covered with dark splotches, and his thin arms are sheathed up to the elbow in medical gloves.{/n}
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I apologise for my appearance." {n}The medicae officer bows low.{/n} "My name is Jaze Martinax, and I serve as Vivisector in the Sector Bionica. It is an untold honour to welcome you to our deck."
14706558-e6e9-49f9-85a2-864c88a8049c: "My new foot makes an odd sound when I walk. Is it supposed to do that?"
1dec5d45-55d7-4d31-80a1-c2b150712723: "And how do you suggest I prepare myself?"
803690d5-ec18-4e9a-a258-fa00059d4eb0: This creature's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} are reduced by −25. Can be removed and fully healed on the voidship's bridge
2f200931-b7e6-4276-8d90-2410c1a81b45: "Mistress Heydari, I am flattered by your boundless generosity, but I would like to point out that the word 'donate' implies a gift given free of charge. However, I am sure we can find a consensus."
24869a5d-a3e5-4179-83e7-d20752990be8: {n}The giant points to a massive block hanging on the trophy board.{/n} "This is testament to how the ancient enemies of my kind were defeated at the hands of your primitive people. Do you know how this object came to be here and why it occupies a place of such honour?"
e7a40b10-1f55-4eac-a614-8f663c969303: "So, what is my function and the meaning of my life?"
fd874b8d-2e8b-436b-baff-cbf6dbd2bc2b: The plating on the voidship's starboard and port is increased by +2.
0e9bfec1-3e77-417e-8a21-0af39f797eee: "I will notify the Sector Bionica of your imminent arrival, Lord Captain."
6f2da3e8-1d78-490a-aa95-6bea8f541717: If the user does not move during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they gain +{uip|WS&BSGranted|858001cc93974c8da24aaa0d02c453aa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} at the start of their next turn. Does not stack.
c793ce12-6550-4988-90cb-a93fadbda4d9:
{n}During the scan, the planet rotates by a few degrees, revealing the outline of something lying on its surface, flickering with deathly fire. Lines and circles, visible even from orbit, come together to make strange-looking symbols, two colossal chains spanning the planet in the shape of a cross. The symbols are not merely impressed into the planet's crust, but scorched deeply into it. Starlight refracted in the glass facets is what makes the glyphs sparkle.
Right where the inscriptions intersect, the auspexes identify some kind of massive structure.{/n}
79c69dbc-5bdc-412b-9d90-5d42757198f6: "As for the blade — at my request, Seberian is keeping it under guard. The artefact is eroding our soldiers' morale: some fools see the blade as the reason for the siege. Stealing it would be pure folly, would it not? And finding someone brazen enough to steal it would be an even greater folly," {n}Laria says, with a barely-there nod toward the outpost.{/n}
2e4b2d97-b823-4c21-8369-d4a508448ff5: [Signal to Camilla] "I think this plan will seem worthy of the Duchess of Dargonus."
8e60609c-7c3d-42f2-b51d-77b7233686c7: "Initiating expedited completion of the operation." {n}The upper, almost melted portion of the patient's skull closes over the brain matter with a crunch, and the drill at the end of the Tech-Priest's delicate {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} emits a shrill whirring sound before digging into the bone and crudely putting it back into place.{/n} "Requesting assistance from the Vivisector life form by performing composite suturing of bone. No further operative intervention is required."
4bbee036-3db6-4bb9-8cbb-8566c935c1aa: "So from your perspective, life is devoid of any intrinsic value or purpose. When I attempt to assimilate this idea, I feel lost, as if my galvanic circuits have been drained and even the Motive Force cannot compensate for it. I might want to explore this state further."
85fde677-c47c-43dc-a40c-d121e8a517d4: "I am certain that this will help destroy the time trap."
16d842c3-b517-4134-a915-e51dc46d0184: "Today the name Sauerback will {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}ring out alongside{/d} that of von Valancius!"
a0555da2-2061-4cbf-9ec3-a58b5abbf76d: "Consequently, we have a most dangerous entanglement of the real with the unreal ahead of us, requiring extreme caution. Nuncius, shield the external vox-scribes and be ready to record on my command."
0d7666c7-adfb-4f17-b9a6-3024b295bead: {n}Eogunn looks at you dully.{/n} "Yes, it is long past time. I only ask for the privilege of privacy — this admission is difficult for me to make, and I can confide only in you."
95ff25d9-ba36-4864-8367-b7569f8c52fc: "Tell me, Lord Captain, will the traitor to the dynasty be punished?"
d6dffa50-f070-4130-a97f-9eb57b39bf88: {n}The foreman frowns, calculating something in his mind, then scratches the nape of his neck, tousling his grey hair. {/n} "For as long as I can remember. All of us here, you might say, are hereditary labourers. Been working since we could walk and talk." {n}He casts a quick glance at the Tech-Priest.{/n} "It's a great honour to work under the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I'd be a wicked man to complain."
cf77b899-80f6-4bcd-afeb-8cd4316d03cd: "A heresy-obsessed ruler will lead the dynasty to ruin. I wish to purge the von Valancius name of this corruption."
8541c4a8-6845-45b8-a972-aa23468b6886: "Something foul. The Inquisitor seeks to use us to obtain a mighty weapon. And that he kept this design even from us, the Allfather's warriors, sows suspicion in my heart. Does he keep his lips sealed because he knows that we won't support his game? Does the worm of treason lurk within his mind?"
7691ca4c-afdb-4e7b-9330-5d5e0d6ed589:
Special attack that counts as a major {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}psychic power{/g}.
It deals an additional {uip|damage|8f63a3008a614bc085b6fb56443d3f92} {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}, but may trigger {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}psychic phenomena{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}.
0ff604a0-fcb8-41ea-bbf3-3aa9bc61620f: {n}The captain-quartermaster turns around and walks off in the direction of the settlement.{/n}
579e8652-36d2-4206-9a14-288eddb0a412: "This collection was assembled to receive an individual who dared to challenge me as I was hunting for a certain precious artefact: Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. It was his unusual conceit that earned him the chance to be forever preserved in history. After brief consideration, I made him the centrepiece of a dedicated exhibit capturing the siege of a planet over which he once ruled. The human name for this planet is Dargonus."
f51340da-f594-4b42-b6da-c41b2942878e: "Forces from House Gaprak were supposed to arrive here. Do you know what happened to them?"
3b6084f0-6af2-4134-98ac-60918d055c23: The sophisticated minds of the Tech-Priests of Kiava Gamma have developed a wondrous device capable of dampening the mind-maddening shrieks of the Drovers. Erecting these psycho-signal suppressors near the settlements will allow the Rogue Trader's subjects to labour for the benefit of the dynasty, unaffected by these sanity-draining wails.
daa11d8d-e754-412a-aa47-58cd8e128b3f: "Lord Captain, the Master-at-Arms has reported disturbances in the vicinity of the Sector Bionica." {n}You hear the tactfully disguised disquiet in the Vox Master's voice.{/n} "The rabble from the lower decks have blocked the exits, demanding that you appear before them."
f1e827e1-0cc2-4337-a529-ca6f59d40af5: Ordered the unique augment to be left with the veteran worker.
a381c1e3-c993-4c07-96de-0cbe6d84ab32: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "If my physiognomy offends you, there is no need to hide it behind feigned interest. However, I will answer on the hypothesis that your question is sincere. My face looks as it does because that is how I prefer it. A vox-grille is practical, but there is something about speaking my thoughts aloud via an organic vocal apparatus. Consider it my little extravagance. Besides, appearances are deceiving — my internals have been extensively augmented, and I am fully fluent in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} and binharic."
2546447a-9498-4c93-a462-7866683ead49: "Gracious Emperor, I pray you grant me an easy death in the coming battle."
2723eb8b-147b-4b61-8e03-83a637029265: "I refuse." {n}Pasqal raises a {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} in warning.{/n} "This decision leads to an irresolvable conflict. Cooperation is impossible."
860c517c-e084-4bbe-9da0-82286453c562: "I am not convinced." {n}Juvenna swiftly draws a needle pistol from its holster and presses the barrel under your chin.{/n}
611abb5c-9f11-4974-bf51-dc0149325ae2: "The Merovians should utilise their mobility, knowledge of Zarkov, and the environmental conditions. They must divide the enemy and destroy them in small groups."
127ce5d9-37c7-4b4c-bcce-56af47535e3f: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The medicae officer dressed in protective attire briefly looks away from the table to welcome you with a solemn address.{/n} "Vivisector Jaze Martinax, at your service. The Rogue Trader's visit is a momentous event for the Sector Bionica. Will you grant us the honour of observing the operation?"
805a8dd6-d986-4a9d-8695-d9aa75cb1c73: "The same as always: I'm looking out for the dynasty. In this case, getting rid of a suspicious person who dared to enter the palace under a false name."
cb487132-e3da-44e3-a3d1-530dfbff9fc9: {n}Izdrig nods, casting a glance over your shoulder.{/n} "I do."
b7ff3b6f-4cb6-42ba-8f9d-45f344768b25: "My colleague Nuncius is keenly interested in discussing the results obtained with our esteemed colleagues among the Magos Biologis... And I fervently support his initiative." {n}The Manipulus looks intently at Vistenza.{/n} "After all, the metagenomic research is being conducted under the auspices of the Cult Mechanicus, is it not?"
5e6fda96-f1c8-45ce-968b-fb5714db8b5f: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, forgive me, but I need to get my wounds stitched up."
88567ebf-4f70-4010-8659-95ee613741f4: {n}Eogunn's passionate speech could be mistaken for pride and conceit. But something else lies behind it, a doggedness born of some deeply personal experience. This man carries a heavy burden, and the experiment is but one of his many attempts to relieve himself of it at last.{/n}
4cbaec8e-60dd-437d-97b7-aed213f40742: "It is rather more crowded in here. And the smell of blood... Ah, forgive me, I'm feeling slightly ill."
43b8d157-eba7-460e-b532-f28f74a6ab7b: "Arsenal is open! Gear up and engage!"
c6ab53a9-e5bb-45e9-b370-e5a4388f58a3: "We have managed to reach a consensus on the root of the problem — the rest can be overlooked. He is not convinced by all my conclusions, but that is no terrible thing — he and I share a common path, but we each have our own methods of comprehending it."
1f7bac62-5707-4df0-9e2a-66b179cd6624: Whenever {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g} are triggered because of Idira's actions, there is a {uip|IgnoreChance|756503152b154609a675f2d786bcdea0}% chance they are not triggered.
74920b94-9a44-4b3b-8a3a-5a398e3f8843: "Illuminating, but still, describe in words what you were trying to demonstrate."
4e3b501e-e603-4dc8-8fdc-6d5dda947aa9: The user's attacks with a weapon in this hand inflict +{uip|Toxin|7369c964be18443db5c990fb8332e14e} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and the {g|f:1b7dfda30e5e4c9d87dcfd0bb9cfefe8}toxic saturation{/g} effect.
f3e4992a-c243-45f3-8e38-ad555ca2c4e4: "I, Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius, command you to open this door."
d6c4f5eb-8a56-4fd6-9e7d-a06aa5a6a051: The machines move freely, despite the burning promethium all around them. Cold seems to emanate from them, along with something else — something inhuman.
2d54439e-8d74-4265-8521-fca38e76ea38: "Maybe they messed something up when they fitted it?"
3a246737-4468-4ed4-88fe-561a1966fede: "Zeta-42//33-Mu, I repeat! I, Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, am requesting an escort to the flagship of the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorator{/g} Cognisance Fleet."
b60ca438-0a95-42b9-9307-304555612881: {n}Dunawski raises her prosthetic clawed hand and examines it for a time.{/n} "Correct, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they are. In remembrance of the von Valancius gifts. Seberian von Valancius used prosthetics to make the entire regiment stronger. When he died and we were trapped on Zarkov, it was only because of augments and prosthetics that our ancestors were able to survive. Without the maintenance of the esteemed Adeptus Mechanicus, our augments fell into disrepair. But we have learned, and now we do what we can to replace what is lost."
621256fa-9121-4c73-a4d0-55eec8d0e2ff: "This statement is true. Rationality was never a key element within your calculations. If you were in fact seeking the protection of the Explorators, then you could have addressed this unit directly and thereby eased the logistical burden of our movements. My response would have been as follows: Genetor Februs, your competencies are worthy of a measure of respect, yet your reasoning is flawed and the recorded cases of your tech-heresy are beyond enumeration. Access to the archives of the Cognisance Fleet is hereby denied. The extraction of your knowledge and your subsequent disposal are formally recommended."
1767e406-b72e-4132-95ff-ebaeefe441fd: {n}A tall {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} arrayed in extravagant red and black robes greets you solemnly, his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} moving sinuously around him. His garment is damaged in several places, and marks from weapons charges are visible on his augmetics, but he does not seem to care.{/n} "I extend greetings to Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius. Your presence within this temple of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} is a great honour to its denizens."
757dba09-c04a-4ce3-af7f-42a666ac1833: {n}Captain — now Arch-Militant — Dunawski does not immediately notice you. She is looking around the bridge in awe, wandering among the majestic statues and command alcoves.{/n}
39f90ced-bb52-4370-a1cd-0c8037d6351d: "Don't worry, I'm perfectly mindful of my duty."
1679bb47-5a22-4c40-aadd-9217b9c5e96c: Enforcer: "I escorted the Lord Captain to the observation chambers and yelled at the servant for leaving the shutters open, but then I was told it was on the Rogue Trader's orders."
46c7e84d-d185-4d6d-b9d1-1b9a14e69fa4: "Your interest in my dynasty is endless, isn't it? You should know that my plans are far more ambitious. House von Valancius will soon be the most powerful Rogue Trader dynasty in the Expanse. But do not hold your breath for details of my plan. You will have to wait and see."
e326cf54-26a8-4fe2-85d3-5c0ae18b9f14: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, news from Zarkov. A passing Chartist ship has brought word that the planet has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity, and its inhabitants are requesting assistance from the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}!"
3986efc6-ae44-4b5e-8279-855bd5949c78: In the secret chamber of the Sector Bionica, the Lord Captain found the records of {mf|his|her} ancestor, Seberian, who perished in the Koronus Expanse alongside a potent artefact. These records revealed the access code to a classified section of the cogitator on Dargonus.
653bbcdf-945f-4b4f-9da3-2a99ee7a93ac: "For centuries, that vile creature robbed the Aett-Vater's forefather of the joy of serving in the name of Humanity. That warrior deserves to at last find glorious death in the boundless Koronus Expanse!"
da92c4d3-bd49-4184-92fc-e027aae4174c: "His orders mean nothing to me. From this moment on, I am the one giving them!"
38233e82-cf7a-4240-bda5-42c975b2804e: The user suffers −3 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}.
f08d38f1-9903-4450-9b9e-d92b2c13c710: "This is how things are: soldiers will live in barracks and receive rations just like the rest of the crew. Officers will be assigned private quarters. This is the order of things bestowed upon us all by the God-Emperor."
80afbef9-708c-49c5-8d6c-80454fc18ef1: "Your swiftness is commendable, my heir. Which, alas, is more than I can say about your foresight or your readiness to bear the burden of power. But I will let you save face. Wait here and pretend you were a little late." {n}Under the vox-synthesiser distortion, Seberian's voice sounds sincere. How genuine those emotions truly are remains to be seen.{/n}
23514d1b-5fd8-46e4-ae30-35ed85203e28: "We will be waiting, Lord Captain. Omnissiah's blessings."
edc85b74-32d2-47b2-a2e4-6eba2d56c761: "That's just pretty nonsense. Atonement is only for the one, see. If something happens to the captain-quartermaster and I survive, I'll wish I'd never been born."
0d266867-c808-4867-87b8-cec331f06a6f: "Just think about it: how could I have infiltrated the palace when it is surrounded by the Inquisition?"
b3dc8ad6-f064-4eb8-9d82-39224b17fc52: {n}Eogunn reaches out toward the creature with a diagnostor mechadendrite, only to recoil immediately as the beast greets the Manipulus's extended limb with a menacing snarl. The Tech-Priest does not make a second attempt — suddenly going still, he gazes upon the creature's agony with a strange expression, as though his mind has wandered elsewhere.{/n}
989321c6-4293-46a8-b494-14327364a9cb: {n}Abelard lets out a discontented grumble.{/n} "All the more peculiar, then, that the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicus}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} would so readily hand over one of their invaluable brethren to us. It is unlikely that such generosity is motivated solely by magnanimity."
e2b86c54-c7a6-44e0-86bd-e695be6126bd: "Do you have a spare target? I would like to learn shooting from you."
68b77b57-95c7-408b-b588-32cc570fa375: "Knowledge is of supreme value for a researcher. This state allows me to gather fresh data on {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} biology... and to analyse it from a very personal perspective. One must not ignore such a source of information. That is why I took it upon myself to... pander to the vanity of my esteemed colleague. The experiment must continue."
fba1f3b6-5fac-4026-835a-606d131e45d4: "What? This is inconceivable! That damned xenos must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"
56a2acf6-0a1f-41fe-ad0a-6baec68919bb: "The memory of an organic brain is not as malleable as mathematically sound data stored in cogitators. Memory cannot be fully exterminated, only... mutilated. Moreover, it is not my goal to forget Nuncius completely, but rather to obscure my memories of him. I usually can recollect that there is someone in a similar state, and that this experiment is a priority for me and Nuncius the servo-skull. The sense of time slipping through my fingers, the thrill of research, and an inexplicable sense of the import of the outcome all urge me to conduct these experiments, even if I do not remember for whose sake they are being done."
499c9363-97a9-46c8-b224-6731e982b00a: A list of expected reinforcements has been found at the outpost. According to it, the Gaprak reinforcements have been long awaited.
4c7a20fa-dfca-472b-86e8-adceb40868a2: {n}The High Factotum pales slightly and looks away.{/n} "I see. This is a strong indicator that the blade's wielder was a most distinguished individual. Even among Rogue Traders, not everyone can afford to possess such an... item. It must be a genuine portrait of Seberian."
14ff757f-fe6a-4fc1-aad7-61a7768ea291: {n}Attempts to translate the strange inscriptions only lead to the {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} casing overheating — the device's {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} begins to buzz plaintively.{/n}
4baf733d-c877-4a6b-b4f3-6764f55ea6f6: {n}A ragged man in his forties spits a mouthful of blood and scowls while fixing his mangled armour.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't get the chance to thank you for saving me. Colonel-Governor Kuravich, ready to serve the dynasty."
3e588104-0fde-4154-8e4b-ef52a0e45164: The Chronomancer is not affected by the {g|f:37a95446c4e74c77bf46439923527646}Dominate{/g}, {g|f:17077e37decf427db1a049ea25bb2b66}Notch of Purpose{/g}, {g|f:b0d4e6b6b3534497bb21590826c34d13}Point of Curiosity{/g}, and {g|f:d2a3ffe8100b4e7983ca87b2b76a6cc0}Zone of Fear{/g} abilities. He suffers −30% {g|Encyclopedia:WarpDamage}warp{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}mental damage{/g} and re-rolls any failed resistance test once.
68e46469-d998-488e-8ea5-25730455b13d: "There are no unimportant people on my ship. Everyone will be treated equally — and based on your place in the queue."
39d150ab-bed4-47b1-ae54-a5d5de01253c: {n}The group makes contact after quite some time. Their report states that the structure is a monolith of one solid block of black metal, erected by some powerful {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} civilisation. It is empty and abandoned. The only notable discovery was a huge, human-sized, shimmering prism on a plinth of black stone, with vague images flickering around it.{/n}
7308795f-6f8a-4fbf-b8bf-eefba834732c: "Your calculations are regrettably flawed. I am performing a priority function at the current physical coordinates."
07924219-8d9a-45a2-b560-8aacc7185f8a: The Rogue Trader has escaped the time loop, freeing {mf|his|her} ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, in the process.
f2fd56b0-d973-4f7f-9e97-4bc9b1319e69: A unit of the Astra Militarum, recruited on the hive world of Merov as a penal force. The legion fills its ranks with hardened criminals conscripted into the Emperor's service to atone for their transgressions.
7ffb87f6-9d07-4c4e-af9c-5b4f2ef111bd: Whenever damaged in {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee combat{/g}, the Inquisitor orders a shieldbearer soldier to attack the offender.
091d0c33-a5ab-44c5-adcb-71476c92b08c: You caused offence to the Merovians by refusing their help in the fight against the Drover.
0ca91d51-a399-45e9-b349-e7a6e5b7fc0d: {n}Drill Sergeant Dankosh greets you with a nod.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It was well worth starting a fight with those iron bastards, just to get a chance to fight by your side!"
83787587-b6d3-4114-8f24-128c8afb1d43: "Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus. Is there something you need?" {n}The elderly lady who catches your eye is more sanguine than the rest. Her bony fingers steadily work through a string of jewelled prayer beads.{/n}
60535ef0-12e9-4982-ad67-f42a4964dc5e: "The Adeptus Mechanicus report that they are most aggrieved by the misfortune that has befallen the ancient relic, and they are prepared to dispatch to the flagship a learned man versed in the restoration of archeotech machines. His name is Eogunn Februs, and he is ready not only to personally assist the dynasty, but also to teach the ship's Enginseers all the necessary rituals. In return, the crimson priests ask only that you visit the station and inform them of the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor from Rykad Minoris."
d3600c77-97d8-4adf-a535-373dc119faab: "I needed to get past the outpost, but I come with good intentions."
f2778708-5582-41f9-a064-87fbf45d8327: The user can equip two-handed {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons in this hand.
5782f675-11d3-46b6-ad28-240d79962678: {n}As soon as the body touches the deck, the figures around you begin to move: Sauerback commands the enforcers to examine the room, and medicae officers begin to bustle about, bringing the Sector Bionica into some semblance of order.{/n}
4ee89343-ec62-432e-bf71-8cf501b71b13:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6b0a35dc57fa455a99658b1092feba43} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Allies spend no {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} when moving through oiled cells. When a creature enters it, the oil is removed from the cell.
42da2d0c-767a-4eed-a994-f3a861553642: "I think I have changed my mind about helping you."
a49a2a4c-d971-4127-b6b5-2914eb26275f: "Perhaps providence can send us a hot bath and a half-decent dinner. Let's get this over with as quickly as possible."
0dc8d540-2959-41e4-bedd-84709c6571f3: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to follow {mf|him|her}, the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength.
f362ba4b-5d9c-45af-a50a-3d534194034e: "I do not know, heir. But I am certain the Inquisition was involved. Scrubbing inconvenient events from history is undoubtedly their handiwork. Perhaps the Holy Ordos did us a service by erasing the siege of Dargonus from the records, for along with their defeat, they also consigned my transgressions to oblivion."
93806c41-108d-4088-8488-0273cb9d5dc6: Whenever a character gains an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, Trazyn gains one as well.
8085ed68-492d-40da-ae4c-31850671ba75: "I see you, son of the Imperium. May you be granted the Emperor's Mercy."
188b4cb7-7098-4625-9b19-00c05f15bf9f: You suppress the self-destructive impulse — it is not worth attempting in front of the guards. You need an accomplice with nimble fingers.
45e43a65-f962-4f17-a742-d45afdbc92ba: {n}Vedka only presses her lips tighter.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I cannot. It would be a transgression against the God-Emperor if I did not protect you in battle!"
58a013fc-d454-44c2-a09e-0cf6ba359890: {n}A new suspicion creeps into your mind, alien and terrifying: the beast is too strong. The Yoke cannot withstand such a powerful energy source. Humanity's creation is not enough to keep the galactic predator leashed... and, in that same moment, you notice a faint green glow out of the corner of your eye. These thoughts — they are Trazyn's. A message. A final warning while {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}there is still a chance{/d}...{/n}
54897eae-d97a-465e-b938-7c4af3393c2f: "Dargonus was magnificent! Back there, all kinds of nobles approached me. I gather they're interested in becoming patrons of the Zarkov Regiment. I think it might be beneficial, since that seems to be the custom in your protectorate, but I know nothing about them. Please, what is your advice?"
2741f4fe-220a-441a-be18-3e5d80a04fda: {n}The Necron stills, regarding you. After several moments, the voice of Trazyn the Infinite slices through the silence:{/n} "I must commend you, human. For one your kind, you fight with remarkable determination — or amusing hopelessness. Perhaps you possess some quality after all that will one day earn you a place in my collection."
1cc27dda-15c9-41a7-a632-c8cc1846476c: "Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} seem to have gone mad, Lord Cap'n. Every reading contradicts the next, and their data is in disarray. Either this is some new anomaly, or someone really does not want to be found."
7240507a-2fd4-45f9-ab16-6fa4a8300358: "My name is {name}. I am here at the behest of Juvenna von Valancius."
6e440083-d9be-4175-b3f4-84087a24fa5c: "Lord Captain, our guiding light! My son, Gnotec, he's injured and dying. I carried him here in my arms, on my own, so the chirurgeons could pull him back from the brink, please don't leave us..." {n}The woman's gaze swings from you to the chirurgeons and back again — her mental state is obviously unstable.{/n}
1e1f0007-2b2d-4432-8054-106b62595fe2: "Leave it be, Seberian. I have no need of your approval, nor did I do this for your sake. I simply wished to escape that place."
43e738bd-a606-4836-bfdf-b33cb74bc83f: "F-f-forgive me, Lord Captain! The order was issued by your ancestor in the dynasty's name! It never even oc-c-curred to me that you might be unaware!" {n}Janris chokes on his words, barely mastering his own vocal cords. The Factotum's gaze darts from you to Seberian and back again, then fixes upon the floor.{/n}
88ee2c6d-d90e-4314-a614-a14a9bb2d6a0: "I have arrived to witness this turning point in history... and to fulfil my end of the bargain."
47f4d347-931f-4242-a530-d25a399b87f9: In the Footsteps of a Legend
8f0e88ef-2785-4f7f-992b-bd165d6c0d51: All shock damage taken is reduced by 80%.
cc52fc90-dad4-4481-9c30-ad780b4c2f82: This object is immune to mental and warp damage, but suffers +25% more fire damage and shock damage.
a71027b9-f735-41f9-bfdf-87064ce6aeb6: "I do not think that is within my abilities."
0c547755-5e2b-4793-9168-17e4af9dee8b:
Augmentation directly modifies the character's body. In contrast to equipping gear, installing an augment is permanent.
An augment cannot be unequipped and is replaceable only with another augment. If removed, it is replaced with a basic augment. The original body part cannot be restored.
To install an augment, drag it into the corresponding insertion on the character diagram and press {console_bind|Func01} "Install".
3e13e266-ba5f-4b34-879c-9d38c0ef7616: <u>({g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}WS{/g} bonus + {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}INT{/g} bonus + number of Tech-Priest's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks)</u>
299f3fae-a4e5-424c-9f35-1022880a5c6a: All attempts to open the gate came to naught. When the servants of the Omnissiah overloaded the battery of the plasma cutter, hoping to burn their way through, their calculations proved fatally inaccurate. When the blinding flash faded, the survivors saw the charred bodies of those who had failed to take cover in time. The way was clear, but at high cost.
afb4d15c-f602-4330-90a8-6965168d4964: "I am sure that you had your reasons. I should like to hear them."
52c42227-c2db-43bf-8e12-62803d2b3acd: "Let me ask you, how do you plan to conduct the analysis? What will you use as reagents? What criteria are you using to determine the presence or absence of contamination? I am willing to provide a sample if I can thoroughly record the process from beginning to end."
6401040d-076f-487e-a803-8162de8e2aa6: "I have." {n}Zorael's face turns to stone.{/n} "He was the one who ordered our capture. The Necrons obey him without question."
2b715274-86fe-4ed6-9bfa-da604c949ecb: "And so the document signed by the False Emperor, the basis of all your power, Champion, lies beneath your feet like a vanquished foe. What does this mean to you now, {name}? What does the symbol of the dynasty and the favour of the corpse on the throne awaken in your soul? Listen to yourself — and you will hear the whispers of the Pantheon."
7d26061d-b2d9-49c2-a41f-d96b1037475b: "Seek out the servants of the Ecclesiarchy and do as they instruct."
f4dbe437-df60-4ca5-8a47-9571d4829610: "Language is the livery of meaning, and this livery directly reflects the architecture of the speaker's mind. By comprehending your language, I also comprehend your thinking, bringing me one iota closer to comprehending you as a concept."
ace7ebb6-4397-4fa6-b32e-9b3d8a0b8e1c: The scouts wander through the huge, empty tunnels for a long time, sending infrequent and mostly uneventful reports back to the bridge, until communication with one of the first groups is cut off. The vox simply can no longer pick up the right frequency.
b878242f-beaf-4c37-98fd-6569f3e268a2: {n}The madman fires quickly and expertly, without hesitation. But thanks to your quick reflexes, the deadly plasma blast hits the Tech-Priest's implants to the left of where he was aiming. The robed man falls to the floor, clutching at his side, and his hands are instantly covered in black and crimson.{/n}
ed875c1b-b045-41aa-a2cb-5688f2196d02: "It will be done without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will summon the ship's chaplain to come and organise a cordon."
01ca822f-736c-4a4b-b1dd-8425ac589a56: "It attempted to end the agony. Yet agony is the constant of its existence." {n}Eogunn grimly averts his gaze, and for a moment, he fixes it on Nuncius.{/n}
bbbde992-0b4b-421d-a438-4f601a13469b: "Your reasoning is partially false. Deception of the Lord Captain was not the purpose of our previous conversation — our request for assistance. The objective was to ensure that the drill complexes remained operational with minimal expenditure of resources — to save sacred technologies and station workers. Now that this objective has been achieved, I am prepared to disclose more complete — more closely guarded — information."
c4e552b1-c63f-450a-9a8d-2ad65697d6ab: "Side effects: optic nerve damage, heart rhythm disruption, coma..." {n}Eogunn offhandedly lists the potential consequences.{/n} "Nuncius and I will prepare the resuscitation rituals. I believe that upon consuming this substance, an unforgettable transcendent experience awaits you."
4fd6cdcc-e15b-4e04-aabe-4d7cf8d879c0: "Debating such a trivial matter..." {n}Marazhai arches an eyebrow.{/n} "It would be simpler and quicker if, instead of arguing, you let the implant owner assert his right to it in combat against the challenger."
6945b85c-2ba4-4189-b0b1-75789806f569: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the turret gains multiple {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turns{/g}. For every attack, it gains +1 stack of {g|f:7733be9627bd41ce83b43dc4438df22c}overheat{/g}.
a397675e-933e-436d-bc88-dcb81f269c34: "The xenos... they have perverted death itself!" {n}Never before have you seen Kibellah's pale, almost inanimate face so transformed by a vivid expression of horror mixed with utter revulsion.{/n}
21ca38b9-8b81-4790-9eeb-e1d3daf58ee9: "Until my duty is done, I will remain in these halls." {n}Grim determination sounds in every word. You know that, if necessary, Zorael will remain here until the end of time itself.{/n}
a71e7dae-4bd6-4dea-b18c-e44a257758e5: By studying the flora enveloping Zarkov, the Genetors of the Adeptus Mechanicus have harnessed its genome and achieved the most holy selective synthesis. The resulting invasive hybrid shall sweep across the planet like a withering plague, turning native species to dust and exposing hidden deposits of rare metals.
708b1841-f56d-4c54-81dd-5d560269a14e: "The destruction of xenos creations fills my heart with joy."
582da46c-911a-4132-ba4b-6f31794ed0fa: [Present the evidence] "Gaprak fell by the hand of Isimond Sauerback."
9ce3b3af-07cc-48fb-8f08-4377cf2d1901: Enemies that enter cells adjacent to this unit or start their turn in such cells must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g}.
ccbdbc03-f319-4fea-a1bb-f6bbc873ffad: "Before the visage of truth, everyone is compelled to manifest their genuine self. In this... subject, I see only an uncontrolled thirst for entropy, making his existence meaningless. This is an incontrovertible fact."
5d34d17e-e3b4-48fc-86d9-cedac61d5585: Whenever the Ministorum Priest uses {g|f:c647c1c4a1a14c9cb31217ee439164ff}War Hymn{/g} or {g|f:85e6ce25a6d64313b9ff39a8013d1b43}Furious Recital{/g}, each daemon and xenos in a 5-cell radius suffers {uip|Damage|94b7a24311684783b34e0c53c41c58cf} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} and +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}.
c481a694-b6a8-4c2c-992a-fb441fd70985: [Present the evidence] "The Gaprak offspring is dead."
fc644953-a19e-4c85-8c7b-484e5a85adf7: "That sounds most mysterious. I would like to know more."
a45bbf78-23f3-4a9a-b3fb-456160d99d97: "My... daughter, Juvenna, on several occasions voiced her concern that Inquisitor af Irramon could not be defeated in open combat. She was adamant that I treat with him. Are there any among you who share this sentiment?" {n}Although Seberian tries to keep his composure at the mention of his heir, not even the hissing of his vox-grille can conceal the tremor in his voice from you.{/n} "Speak freely, and think not of Juvenna's grievous fate."
ec0c3dd9-b650-48e6-8855-a0b895e57671: "As it turns out, the Inquisition was on Zarkov. I discovered their bodies."
c1a204ad-1ff6-4e2a-982a-b20e549ac545: "I shall appoint a representative from among those who yearn to return to the Imperium's embrace — a new era has dawned, and it is time for Zarkov to emerge from isolation."
cbe97763-fe63-4efc-9ab8-4040b094b170: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, permission to speak freely? Without any formalities?" {n}Kuravich goes pale, while a dark vein bulges on his brow.{/n} "To survive, our regiment has to stitch trousers out of our own dead. That's how things are on Zarkov! Why can't we scrap these xenos for some knives? Or should we attach some wooden Aquilas to them just to put your mind at ease?"
a77cdbbe-7a7c-4bd8-aaa7-6e4e6fc1c86a: "This is how we survive, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Die, or grow stronger and smarter."
7987c6c3-2b1c-4220-8649-e36ff4675103: "I demand an explanation, Eogunn. Why have you abused these bodies?"
4f92cc94-ea27-4c5c-b49b-5a5502397844: "Marvellous, High Factotum — particularly the fact that I am learning of the mutiny only after it has already been suppressed."
a96c9b68-cbb1-45aa-84ae-064b70997145: If Seberian is deprived of his sword, yet his retinue continues to pull him in different directions during the council, he will accuse the Rogue Trader of theft and execute {mf|him|her}. Both the sword and the retinue must be dealt with.
09d73605-f544-4065-a3a3-c73ebb674710: {n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. Only certain details draw your eye — some elements of the ornamentation and the archaic script. They indicate that the coat of arms, as well as the wall itself, is several centuries old.{/n}
505289d6-70d8-4af7-8a34-2fcf23db1575: Stopped the knife fight among the Zarkovian troops by appealing to their regiment's honour.
3a5d28c7-9a7a-45ab-b1ec-d072186bce0c: {n}The planet's crimson disk quickly diminishes in size, receding into the distance.{/n}
66727526-4f2c-4994-b395-a1e493c9948d: "That xenoheresy-wallowing scum... Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting!" {n}Her shout forces the Ruststalkers to remove their sights from your chest. The Tech-Priest's powerful voice grows fiercer.{/n} "The traitor Decabalus has deceived you! He has cast our sacred production into heresy, and is leading the station's work units into tech-schism. Do not trust Decabalus! His corrupted code penetrates the processors undetected. What did he say to you?"
1853220f-6309-4424-92f4-4d1132b5a69f: "The rank of {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} grants me the right to study their foul anatomy and behaviour for the purposes of identifying their weaknesses. I have personally dissected more than one specimen and have even preserved specific body parts for further investigation. I research and study their technology to the same end. There is no shame in using our enemies' weapons against them, no matter what some narrow-minded colleagues may say!"
e19963a9-8524-4917-bcec-34ae932694be: "You have violated sacred dogma. That is enough for me to deliver your sentence."
b148401f-f6fd-4e38-9a72-746b4601f39c: The infirmary turned out to be excellently provisioned. You have managed to obtain a useful substance.
f941d37d-6ef4-4bc5-b180-c0aa9bdc6278: "There have been a few run-ins between your soldiers and Jocasta Sauerback's enforcers. Now they're looking at the 32nd with suspicion. Your people want to know: how should they conduct themselves around the enforcers?"
afb3aea9-9754-4150-addb-ad42c9866381: {n}The xenos turns its head toward you with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "I hear the lowly creation of the ancient foe has comprehended a speck of the great. The zeal of a limited mind is remarkable, albeit futile, and capable of providing amusement for now."
81b3315e-cc3c-4a84-9644-c4966a2a943f: {n}Xenos vessels appear out of the void like graceful ghosts, immediately attacking you.{/n}
482b5758-9d0c-4128-aa0c-79beece2121a: "Because I am one of the sons of {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}. The Deathwatch selects the finest xenos slayers from all existing Chapters of Astartes."
0d90a200-0b2c-4a94-9f3d-300cafeea238: {n}The dry hiss that normally comes from the Genetor's vox suddenly becomes higher: {/n} "Registering an unprecedented increase in the functional efficiency of the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}! Rivers of sacred unguents wash over their iron flesh, and the mechanisms sing the praises of the Omnissiah! Bless the decision that led to this miracle of rebirth!"
c58bf3c7-fc1e-4a8c-8948-371171ed9e0d: {n}The Tech-Priests bow and depart together, conversing quietly in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}. It is uncertain how long this fragile peace between them will last, but there is hope that their collaboration will bear fruit.{/n}
bf6e68ab-2c47-4e6b-bdce-888f6488b250: "It's not often you see grateful crowds of invalids on the bridge of a voidship. Such behaviour is considered potentially dangerous in the Adeptus Arbites. I will increase the deck patrols based on this new data."
9ae99947-b81d-4669-a335-85510924e44b: "We have nothing more to say to each other. Begone, and take that thing with you."
5e3dffc3-7701-46ef-94ca-858c0cd18c74: You saved Drill Sergeant Jovakha's life.
df9a26e2-5a44-42a2-bba0-74e2baf55dcc:
The user inflicts +{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}, +{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}, and +{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} on targets in the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g}.
The user removes bleeding (haemorrhage is not removed), burning (warp burn and soul burn are not removed), and toxin, but suffers {uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g}.
b36d99a4-021a-4905-ba43-422e1cb8ef38: "Allowing the presence of rabble on the bridge is a questionable decision in terms of security. So is handing out augments to commoners. Any one of them could be a criminal or a madman with a grenade in his hand."
24c4a918-d2f0-4eca-9756-6bba04cd8d2b: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh was just checking out the sentry recruits at the machine-spirit chapel in the north-east."
62af0f17-965a-48fd-a1bf-f05ee6bc5ea1: "I believe that talent always finds a way to rise to the top."
7d9ad31b-9f59-42ab-9f93-9ccc24e8da16: "You never were quite civilised enough to be a truly capable ally. There are limits beyond which it is impossible for your kind to go."
f6305911-de8f-4aff-a0a0-c92ab0fe973f: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I don't understand. Do you doubt my loyalty? Or my prowess in battle?"
a2e9e394-62fc-4bee-99b3-7132ea89fd57: "I have lost my appetite for debate."
239cc1b4-50af-483f-a9fc-1b03e280fd35: "By breach of protocols, we mean grossly tampering with the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} of one of Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s passenger shuttles for unauthorised personal use. However, the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} continued to pick up the shuttle's navigation beacon signal for some time. The latest data indicate that it docked with one of the merchant ships bound for {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, after which the broadcast ceased."
3a96fefe-499c-4468-8852-83d8e808a3bd: "Your flagship scares some of them. Too many new faces, new sights, new smells. Some were happy to put Zarkov behind them, but all this novelty is disorienting. But it's nothing. Give us time, and we'll know this vessel as well as the roots around the Cage."
356e934a-b6ac-47ca-a0d5-24e400b02a60: {n}The pieces of the puzzle suddenly click into place: they are talking about House Gaprak, who sent an army led by one of their scions to Dargonus's aid. It seems the Gaprak forces were eliminated by this "Elana," and now she is relaying coordinates for an orbital strike on the command headquarters.{/n}
22a691c8-201a-4088-b756-479224ca8d1e: {n}Silent until now, Solomorne suddenly nods and says,{/n} "Very true. An enemy that stands out due to some unusual feature is likely to present an unpleasant surprise. Or several."
a000e335-9f7d-48f4-80ab-7f52227a208e: "In any case, it is you who are now my heir, and I acknowledge your right to that title. My memory has been restored without the influence of xenos mechanisms, and I am certain that the counsel of an experienced kinsman may prove of use to you, {name}."
e7e6b67a-5ff6-401a-aa45-4e9293536ccb: Uralon loses {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} equal to 20% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}, granting an ally +<u>(wounds lost by Uralon + 2 × {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Heretical{/g} rank)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g}.
c9002fde-e2d8-43b9-ad03-1f4768020251: {n}She turns to the vox again.{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne: Code Entr'acte."
2cf121d2-5d3a-491c-b6a3-c86dbeb540a4: The traitor operating under the call sign "Elana" proved to be none other than Juvenna.
42eb90ed-b6b7-4687-ac70-0fea4d36e67b: "Don't blame yourself. Who could have predicted this outcome?"
c30aaff4-bca2-4abe-96ec-181039bdb711: "Interpolating an area of uncertainty... The calculation does not produce clear results. But why the interest in my memory map? Are you familiar with some of its key data points?"
42e7bf11-f346-4fc0-a2c3-4ab46972c362: {n}The typical sounds of the medicae facility are cut off by a bone-chilling scream. It is coming from an old man, who has sprung from his bed and is now using it as a barricade against the medicae officers. He is partially disrobed and the scraps of the bed restraints hang from his wrists. From toe to hip, the old man's legs have been replaced with high-quality {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g}.{/n}
c2f28ff6-d7cf-4ebf-9e2c-b323f12f0185: [Signal to Isimond] "A cautious approach will surely be welcomed by the enforcers as well."
c15db985-247f-43dd-9023-650c6c93e97c: The Chronomancer is protected by Necron obelisks. For every obelisk still standing, all incoming damage is reduced by −10%.
7977073e-caa7-4501-8395-53ce0ccf7d0b: These obelisks were erected much later than the original structure. What is written on them? A panegyric? An epitaph? A warning?
bfe2d1c9-de18-4f8f-9130-19ce807fc0cc: {n}Yet this time, the influence seems weaker. The {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_TookDumpers }earpiece{/d} Vedka gave you is doing its work.{/n}
ea13694d-cc12-4cde-aef3-61e0f73cc7d0: "'Provide the commander with comprehensive intelligence appropriate to the situation.' So states the Handbook."
bcf1f3ae-3d83-4423-958a-f61884ac62b5: Arch-Militant Batoshski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die. He fought against the inevitable with staunch ferocity, and before his death, he said through gritted teeth, "I knew all those stories about the stars were Commissar words."
98866982-5489-479b-9716-987c83bfed2a: No matter how many scouts wander through the endless black of the xenos tunnels, they fail to find the smallest hint of the wondrous structures that greeted you the last time. The vast museum is gone, as if it had never existed, leaving only darkness and dead silence in its wake.
ad78880b-28bd-4c51-a2d6-5f802dc3926d: Part of the destroyed world of Zarkov is believed to still drift in the void of the Koronus Expanse. It is said that slumbering deep within it is a cursed lump of the ancient temple of the Necrons infected with the terrible Flayer virus.
b13aceba-18d2-4aa7-929f-69fb42f759f2: {n}Covered in dust and blood, the Zarkovian soldiers crowd around Seberian, quietly talking to each other. Seberian himself hardly looks better: some of his augmetics are damaged and his sacred unguent slowly drips onto the floor. He sees you and gestures the soldiers to be silent.{/n} "{name}. My time has come."
e90489f7-8bd5-48b3-a2f5-92bb0df9a05f: {n}Long moments pass before Seberian moves again. A rough, almost growling, command issues from the vox-grille:{/n} "Arch-Militant, soldiers, remain here and secure our rear. Follow me, my heir. It is time for the foul xenos Trazyn to answer for the wicked schemes he has wrought against our house."
f23733ca-1cbe-4900-b73c-3b6b931e27e2: "Honoured Haemonculus, he has proven his own irrelevance and dullness by resorting to insults. I am a witness to your triumph."
7937f3cc-f98b-484b-a819-5c870e37a103: {n}Tervantias fixes you with a piercing stare.{/n} "Triumph can only be won over an equal. I lowered myself to this miserable specimen's stature by calling for its admission, yet it is nothing but a thing. Now, this thing has grown as tiresome to me as your whimpering. Take it away."
c7a6a668-90c3-4944-9d58-3b86a71408db: "Marazhai, perhaps you can dissuade your kin from fighting us?"
6ec55abb-6db3-478e-a4e5-97ae69c3d23f: "Analysis of the situation leads to unequivocal conclusions. Zarkov is a highly dangerous world. The cycle of Drover attacks must be broken. Allow the esteemed Magos Tau-Phi-0098 to lead the research efforts and secure your colony. In turn, I will lend him my expertise in developing technological solutions to the threats he identifies."
0c903ede-b33c-40da-9758-e47d73389f0a: "How do you find your new role as governor?
002a4c5b-a939-4268-bb51-37c42da89394: "And I am beginning to doubt whether we do share a common goal."
3ae4911b-98fe-42f6-b291-95de4fd4c359: "I... doubt you will like it. These alchemical concoctions are designed to be injected directly into the bloodstream and are laced with bionic tonic supplements that are not intended for laypersons to consume. They may be harmful to the unprepared body."
1c6b81cb-dc0b-429f-8386-6158819c8f2c: The user can equip two-handed {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws).
871be888-6453-4d3e-bfc5-98899faad3f0: "Only a servant of the Machine God endowed with the high rank of Genetor Extremis, versed in all the necessary rituals, and learned in the mystical currents of the Motive Force, can perform the reparative sacraments and reanimate this mechanism. The only place where one might find such a servant is on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."
501041c9-21a0-418c-b75b-4dd796455ba4: "Hmm... there is nothing on the pedestals with origins in the Imperium. The selection of xenospawn, however, is remarkable."
c78df705-b39f-4017-89cc-14f3f8fdb87a: "Sauerback, see to it that the rabble remembers its place."
4fa1ef39-bf04-4616-85d9-6b2aabea825f: "Sure, I'll just carve it out of wood for you! Get real!"
33e29f9b-7a68-44ae-958a-602098791847: Abelard deals +{uip|AllyCountDamage|2001c9618db8434f82225b37892bce46}% more damage for each ally within a 3-cell radius around him.
3b6c76ae-e972-4ba6-96e8-68b8177fb38a: "That's your Seneschal Abelard's family, isn't it? I've heard a lot about the man. Well, if his clan are like him — honest, with no Commissar claptrap — then they're worth dealing with."
d9ad9e49-b33f-4a43-85da-531e4c80569e: "My confidants understand the utter baselessness of these allegations. How could they not?"
4e2b3270-2f92-4b6a-9a6c-656deb1c3c48: Eogunn becomes {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}. Until the end of combat, as long as he remains {g|f:4f13e446713f440bbc30e8d216bc9f1e}immobilised{/g}, he ignores {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} while attacking, and the maximum range of his weapons is increased by +100.
76edd470-2754-4351-9ebc-8372120e3ab5: {n}Seberian's gaze falls on you, and Laria hurries to introduce you:{/n} "Lord Captain, {name} is here at {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}my invitation{/d}. {mf|He|She} has proved {mf|himself|herself} in the matter of the missing reinforcements."
90219c5f-0080-411d-990e-473d32aaa8ea: "Ashmags! The filthy azhi! {name}, we'll get your Warrant back for you! Just don't forget, shereen: as long as no one knows the relic is missing, no one can use that knowledge against you. So everyone present had best keep their mouths shut."
b6f5b488-46d7-4ba5-9a5f-2857a52a9118: The corpse is bisected at the waist. The cut is unnervingly clean, as though the blade passed through without the slightest resistance.
d38dc4b9-92bd-4bcc-9273-0ae9a1dbb518: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d}, along with a detachment of soldiers, has secured the eastern main gates and is holding the line. He was right in the middle of receiving a supply drop when it all started."
023c48ea-be6b-444d-9431-2ef4683f112f: {n}Your fingers close around the augment's metal and you tug it slightly toward you. The corpse's old bones break with a dry crack, and you gently pull the implant out of the tangle of roots.{/n}
820f8c67-1f0d-4329-ab21-c0cede37e66f: "So, this servant will suffer no punishment for his grave transgression? With such a careless approach to authority, it is astonishing that you still retain mastery over this dynasty, my heir."
0991951c-c59c-47c3-986f-3ff75f08b086: "You will learn no secrets here. Only the pure truth."
3fa22de9-f195-4299-9657-aba1f0232f54: "I am not here to get involved in a medical dispute. Settle this without me."
1488d9ff-bcb8-4d2a-a2ac-fe4bcd463c10: "This constitutes a violation of the sacred directives. The value of an individual life form is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. Augmetics of the specified class are rare and are restricted to senior officers. Thus dictate the regulations of the Sector Bionica."
9fe3788f-c66a-4391-9fdc-66748dd54e29: "Scanning has revealed two lower-priority life forms in the operating area. Request: dispose of less effective crew members to make space for valuable officers." {n}Out of the corner of your eye, you notice that the Genetor is already standing near the cogitator that controls the mechanisms of the individual beds.{/n}
9f6fa1c0-a31b-4b49-b289-cf14a933a498: "This man can make do without expensive augments."
5f42e82f-71fa-42fa-9b9d-5af62a4b73b3: "I... I cannot, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Forgive me, I was wrong. You helped me see that I have no place in the world beyond the stars. I should stay... Someone has to uphold the Handbook, after all..." {n}Vedka lowers her head.{/n}
1e0f92e7-085f-4a71-918a-415d4f92bdd2: The Warrant of Trade, the most valuable relic of the von Valancius dynasty, which confers all its most fundamental rights and liberties, has vanished from its sacred chamber. Without the Warrant, the dynasty simply cannot exist. Its recovery is essential if you wish to remain a Rogue Trader.
7e21eebc-d41b-46e5-a1c2-cecfcff6e9c9: "Such a tormenting sensation. Something is conjuring painful, angry hues within me, as if splashing crimson and black across my canvas and ruining it. Is this how those I influence feel..." {n}Cassia looks more surprised than angered.{/n}
06460307-32d1-4294-ad85-d29786ec6a00: "The naivety of lower consciousnesses is fathomless, and the gullibility boundless. Or perhaps the primitive's memory is damaged, and he does not remember how, hungering for knowledge, he sought to wrest it from my immortal flesh? How he stole my instrument without understanding its essence? How he destroyed the other, whose value he now bemoans, and awakened the sleeping ones so that they could rule the planet unchallenged?"
1dfcd79a-a334-4522-a03f-a4560f2eccb4: "An attempted unauthorised breach of the security perimeter created by the xenos intelligence may cause a critical increase in the risk of detection by the enemies of Humanity. Exhorting the unit Jae Heydari to observe standard protocols when encountering suspicious objects."
bad979fc-3666-482e-91a4-5717b3b38cac: {n}The member of House Gaprak, as a true aristocrat, must have been fairly skilled with a sword, and managed to wound his attacker before death.{/n}
640b524d-3081-445c-82f1-9f72ccfaa1cb: "Perhaps the loop will be stopped by a critical correction in the usual course of events within. Regrettably, I cannot perform the triangulation myself — I lack even the data to indicate exactly how long I have been here." {n}The humming inside the Magos's body becomes irregular.{/n} "Do you have a plan capable of altering the current trajectory of events?"
7eb8743b-c362-4eb1-a764-fd243ec3f028: "The idle queries and profane insinuations uttered by Genetor Februs are rejected. I am pure before the Omnissiah in deed and thought. Can you say the same, Manipulus?"
fead4269-80ec-414f-8b16-13f669e473ac: Installing an augment is permanent. Do you wish to continue?
eafd0e99-5814-4f98-ad65-4362e0c49332: "These colours are strikingly similar to the shimmering hues I have encountered in certain predators. Only more vivid, more unusual. It is as if they are... beckoning us closer."
dc849415-e049-4c5c-b51f-559d8abd3c7c: {n}The Valkyrie wing appears in the sky yet again, faultlessly obeying the laws of the time loop. A moment later, the bombardment begins.{/n}
