4fbc1e64-145e-4293-9d35-ac2494c91fd4: "Regimental tradition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To take command, one must best the existing commander in combat. And that man is Izdrig."
a6a48191-7c65-4fb0-b67a-f1d4ea4fd872: Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} are reduced by −5 if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he does not have the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} or if the familiar is deactivated.
c2a1a96b-0a5b-468d-bae1-742245f7f887: "You could have made some arrangement with the Inquisition's soldiers, tricked your way past the guards at the gates. Hardly extraordinary." {n}The Seneschal says this as casually as if she herself had done the same thing many times before.{/n}
787ee230-5c56-4d6c-8634-0a7f721371ff: "The Drover, obviously. Or its growths, if you want to be specific. But don't get distracted, go on."
318040b1-c259-4a72-b2d8-dec3f4f27ecc: Pasqal has cleansed the Ferrum Sanctum in his body of the xenotech defilement. Beneath tattered flesh, twisted augments gleam and drip with sacred unguents.
edbed7f6-0cda-409d-9579-581c4140a757: "Who knows? It's not really a beast, more of a weed, though it shows more wit than your average recruit, in the way it uses bones... And how it's always popping up here and there. We've even got legends about this thing."
e89548a5-82c5-45d0-8e77-ec70e3165c4f:
The creature uses the {g|f:a42ec63134464c518f21d63ec6260a20}Crushing Blow{/g} attack if there is an enemy on the left side of it.
Otherwise, it uses {g|f:2c05b1a0654b4e77a6522226930a5619}Acidic Clot{/g}.
eb203612-407b-4777-8a67-5492c1c6b771: "Regrettably, the information you seek lies outside the circuit of knowledge accessible to the laity."
f6713fe2-811e-46c1-8bb1-cf1cede2288a: Rumours of the Rogue Trader's love of physical augmentations spread far and wide across the Koronus Expanse. The sacred healing machines installed on the ship allowed many of the Lord Captain's entourage to continue their service to the protectorate, either willingly or unwillingly.
6618e2b4-faed-4ac4-afe6-66641fa88d3f: "Unification... A risky, extremely laborious creation of symbiosis between identical individuals. I believed it to be a legendary technology, deemed lost. Perhaps it could have been the key to the creation of the Triasomata... I regret that we have only met now, upon your deathbed." {n}Eogunn watches the Tech-Priest without looking away.{/n}
8dda99e6-774a-481b-85b9-87241caf51d0: Single-target weapon hits deal an additional +{uip|ShockDamage|4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d} shock damage to all creatures within a 1-cell radius of the initial target (excluding the attacker).
ee366774-9322-44dc-93af-a529beeaeb95: A crude copy of the Astra Militarum Handbook with lines mangled by repeated rewriting.
00a3d7d4-bbda-41da-86b7-25ddd490f0d7: "I have no intention of identifying myself to a pack of outlaws playing at being Guardsmen!"
074f3cb8-3499-4cef-aa56-8279ad767a4e: "Thank you for making that clear, Lord Captain."
63edd955-0ba5-4ceb-b1ac-af87a7508a10: {n}The Manipulus raises his gaze to you, looking weary.{/n} "Everything has its breaking point, Rogue Trader. Including my patience. As I am now... I cannot... I cannot govern my feelings well enough. I am sorry."
620c63b2-1489-4b2e-8a4b-e5355948d638: The colossal hall has proved to be a xenos mockery of a museum. The Lord Captain must now uncover traces of Seberian and reclaim the relic blade.
23272036-5ce3-4378-90ea-eaab1adfe535: "There is nothing we can do here now. I'm sorry, Jovakha, but your chances are slim."
09b89c58-75a0-481d-aa8c-449b50b24ba7: Your counsel helped Janur secure the camp's supplies.
a529e7f1-f643-4a69-a15c-da723a29c395: "What will happen to the implantation throne if I turn you away?"
9e73d887-5c56-47fe-b121-48f5c576ab09: The plasma burn found at the outpost looks more like a mark from a single shot than the aftermath of a sustained firefight.
a448662e-57b0-4134-8571-7a9dbc799628: "I concur, Mistress Heydari. I fear that even my skills would have been insufficient to restore our corporeal integrity had we failed."
171c2f8e-32b0-49e1-b28a-9d46b2b46e53: "Impossible. At the present stage, the process cannot be interrupted, not even at the behest of the Rogue Trader." {n}The Tech-Priest shows no hint of surprise, as though he had been expecting your visit.{/n} "I will be ready to speak with you in approximately one minute."
3f84e226-214c-4ffb-9424-1e021ebcd05e: [Spend the time before the war council in listless rumination]
7690ae75-3354-436d-a73f-907b026269ef: "Why have you attached a vox to him?"
cee06963-1e4d-46ed-8504-974ca7674075: "Such is the fate of any who calls himself the servant of a heretic. His army fell to the onslaught of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g}, guided by Elana's wisdom. It does not matter what house they belonged to. We do not fight against humans — we fight for humanity."
c6745ed0-0534-406f-9757-05094d5bfe62: [Do not intervene and let Eogunn speak]
ea30b884-26cb-4c1a-a208-6d4708957a07: "Layperson, within the limited scope of your abilities, describe precisely which xenos technologies have defiled this vessel. Any specifics would greatly serve the Quest for Knowledge and the vessel's purification. Nuncius, record all of this, omit nothing, and strive to avoid excessive liberties in your interpretations."
618a9451-1d58-4cff-ba16-412d8f4c2cd7: "Lord Captain, are you certain this is wise? I cannot let you take part in a fight to the death... It's reckless!"
2e0996bd-4fff-49f4-9220-94c0eaa10535: Vedka Dunawski's sacrifice did not go unnoticed by the people of her homeworld. Vedka was remembered as a holy martyr who had given her life for the 32nd Merov Regiment and the Rogue Trader. For decades afterward, her example inspired young soldiers to follow in her footsteps of selfless service.
f6880f11-ab12-4d5a-b6a8-3d9b57f63041: "Is that so? My daughter has a great many servants, but you are the first to dare speak to me directly. As a reward for your loyalty, I will not give you any lashes today. But I am curious what you have to say in your defence."
5d5256bd-aa94-441d-b91e-be5269f173fd: "I demand an explanation. You are on my ship."
6674dc1b-b480-4bca-98c8-68643827c5e9: {n}Silence reigns, and then it is broken by the xenos's gratified laughter.{/n} "Well done, human — your ability to draw conclusions from experience does you credit."
5e65c30a-aabb-4d22-85e4-eba433597a49: "Lord Captain! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is ready to make contact to discuss the agreement between you."
326a8084-06cd-4bc8-b163-106f6a7b9756: "I refuse to endure this humiliation any longer, {name}. There is lying, and then there is the desecration of oneself. I... I simply cannot."
44a0c1a1-2428-4ff4-9a1d-5b58594cb38d: "Yes, Lord Captain!" {n}Dunawski's voice rings with excitement.{/n} "My soldiers are completing the final preparations before the assault. On your command, we are ready to begin the operation!"
27815003-f9f5-4e73-ac1e-5894e2a3088a: "So may it be. But one should always rely on oneself, first and foremost."
894b74c0-1066-4939-b22f-3ed1489d28df: [Look around for any signs of Seberian himself]
ea623479-f631-43a5-989c-ae4367018e03: Within this Tech-Priest's abdomen resides a galvanic battery, a reservoir of the Motive Force that grants life to all machines. The Manipulus's mechadendrites channel this sacred energy, empowering allies and punishing foes.
5715f9f3-b5de-438b-b617-feb10edf88c2: {n}The Manipulus uses his auspex to scan every contour of the machine's casing with unhurried attention.{/n} "The ergonomics... are far removed from the sacred canons of the STC. It is evident we are in the presence of xenos technology. Yes, Nuncius, let me be more specific: the xenos in question is the Drukhari species. If my hypothesis holds true, this blasphemous device is governed by the nociceptive systems of a living donor. In other words, the machine is powered by the pain of another."
8840af9f-39b9-4326-a27e-d98eed7630a7: "Skallarox the Destroyer, member of the Night Lords, who terrorised the fringes of the region during the period of mass conquest of the region by human civilisation known as the Angevin Crusade. A defective piece, which has sustained significant damage due to resistance to extraction, but it is of too low value to find a replacement."
bf95e602-19fa-4755-b709-7423250c50d9: "God-Emperor, it's getting worse by the hour..."
122401d2-cfc5-403e-85ca-0e386059cec8: {n}You notice the Seneschal's pupils contract for a second.{/n} "All right, I'll play along. Tell me."
be3ac242-bb1e-4d6e-b9c4-9f536efc6754: "A soldier from a voidsman combat unit and a devoted servant of the Emperor. Lord Captain, this young man has been fighting for his life, even through horrendous pain. If you allow the augmentation to be installed, his perseverance will become an example for others to emulate."
f670a450-6c84-4002-9e39-7b174ee28163: Justified the flagship's enforcers' contempt for the Zarkovian troops by their duty to the God-Emperor.
884892e6-ca17-468c-ab99-49be2aa13024: "Not another word. I shall go there immediately."
19c8475a-7657-4d1d-a8ef-f8c14e4050c4: At the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature enters {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}hard-light stasis{/g}.
8e7feff4-0513-4a8d-962f-47bda17c8602: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} turns to Nuncius and listens intently. After a few moments, he nods.{/n} "Yes, you're right, the Rogue Trader is concerned with the ethics of the matter." {n}Eogunn turns back to you, bowing his head.{/n} "I will endeavour to temper my enthusiasm in the future."
fca06120-9ff3-48c0-8ca6-4bcdbf977fab: {n}The world around you is frozen — the people, mechanisms, even the very breeze, absolutely everything has stopped, transfixed in eerie poses. You blink — and a wave passes over the world like static on an ancient {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} screen. The only creatures spared this strange stasis are your retinue and Seberian.{/n}
2f7d96ea-d4c3-4b7d-b95a-0fc0123bb388: "What luck to find this transportation precisely where it is needed most. How reckless we would be not to suspect a trap." {n}The Drukhari's lips stretch in a predatory grin.{/n} "But no matter. The Oghyr awaits us up above. The time has come for us to meet, so why delay?"
7653aec4-3d84-4a4c-9ad7-763a77d07bfb: "Intervene? Of course I will intervene. The heretics will be destroyed."
49d16e3e-875e-4aa5-b3aa-b24218a7458a:
On {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, attacks with weapons inflict {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
This effect deals {uip|Damage|eee6b4e4fe5141c5bd529f260c8184de} {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|eee6b4e4fe5141c5bd529f260c8184de}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
97acdbe2-4301-415d-9216-29130c822ec7: {n}The cadaver jerks convulsively on its wretched bed and goes still. The servo-skull seems to react to your presence, but its {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} is utterly adrift. A thought occurs to you: perhaps praising the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} and a litany of maintenance will help the sacred machine regain its functions?{/n}
854d8670-4a7f-47cf-b033-156b931e81da: "Why is the Inquisition moving against the dynasty?"
7c42d41c-3d29-41dc-a10c-09c7df54a82a: "I am {name} from House Gaprak. I want to talk."
81e58f26-210c-465b-a2d5-386f68be15eb: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge — but it was not enough. Alas, only a few mustered the strength to rally, with the rest still paralysed by the terror that had drained the last of their strength and snuffed out all hope for salvation.
875b6f8b-fc83-46dd-a26f-c4bea35d36c5: "Eogunn, you haven't seen Necrons yourself, have you?"
3fab503a-d051-43d6-b0e0-e5f363dee55b: "I appreciate your concern, Rogue Trader, but the experiment is completely under control. Moreover, Nuncius is carefully monitoring my condition. If you will excuse me, I will be able to continue our conversation in just a moment."
2c00c274-7d1d-4319-a326-5713e2b2d9e1:
"Rogue Trader. I... I must apologise to you and Genetor Ferrenz. I... see now. I see everything clearly again. The {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} has granted me a revelation, but I feel no gratitude, only heaviness and pain. Would it be a heresy to beg the Machine God to take back this knowledge? Yes, perhaps it would. It is not Nuncius who needs repairing. No, not him at all..."
{n}He looks at the servo-skull as if for the first time.{/n} "I'll take him back, and afterward... Find me on the bridge — I'll share this revelation with you. But for now, I need time to gather my thoughts."
c2d5da1e-4cc1-40a3-9d6e-9bf798524387: This creature's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} is increased by +{uip|ArmorBonus|d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}% (up to a maximum of {uip|MaxArmor|d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}), and the damage it deals is increased by +{uip|TotalArmor|d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}%.
50709a6d-27a3-4d8d-9510-0accd68fc447: "I suppose, Elana, we ought to return to the others."
d68c7050-3cee-47ec-a88d-318fe9c617b0: "The prognosis is unfavourable, Rogue Trader. I could... " {n}Seeing the look in the young man's eyes, the Manipulus trails off.{/n} "But no, I could not. While there is some hope of survival for this man, it is most likely illusory."
c59abf2f-4406-4225-8fd4-856b2ff870bb: [Allow the Tech-Priest to destroy the augment] "Well. If the laws of the Omnissiah demand it..."
3fefc9da-24b3-4869-b17f-7dd30bb89aaa: {n}Something akin to resolve appears in the man's eyes as his face is seized by spasms.{/n} "A h-hero... is to b-be... emulated. A h-hero... overcomes. Where's your helmet, soooldier?" {n}He hammers his fist again into his steel chest.{/n} "God-Emperor, I will not be afraid! Emperor... I will... be afraid..."
f413d00c-cdc4-4fa2-b64d-26e7821082cb: {n}Slowly and heavily, the warrior rises from the platform and walks toward you. Despite his harshly set features, you see genuine relief in his eyes.{/n} "I thank you, human. Your aid was timely."
873cd888-7038-4493-b982-625f9cb5927f: "To destroy the anomaly, you must move against the Seberian."
78a7b1fa-550a-4b39-9344-cab5a1af77c8: The barrier is so powerful that it can withstand a direct hit from a tank shell. You do not want to waste your efforts.
46ae5523-71af-45fa-8473-cf8edabb6866: "I would listen to Pasqal if I were you. Improperly installed augmentations can do more harm than good — I've seen it more than once."
bd83538b-856d-4db9-941f-cf447fbc4380: {n}As Seberian and his retinue move further into the courtyard, the Seneschal bars your way. Her attire is austere and practical, as is the look she gives you. When she speaks, everything — her facial expressions, her voice, her bearing — starkly reminds you of Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n} "I am Laria Voigtvir, Seneschal and close ally of Seberian von Valancius. My father, I mean, the Lord Captain, likes taking risks. I do not. Until you prove yourself to my satisfaction, I will be keeping my eye on you."
45304996-c833-4835-b8ef-a59cbc284de0: We had made considerable progress when a harsh ringing sound echoed through the stale air. The vox-casters erupted into cacophonous screeching before falling permanently silent. The last thread linking us to our flagship had been severed.
04c8b7b0-82a7-44fc-a986-ba910cf1eeff: "Well, it's good that you're with me. Let's go and finish this thing."
42a02617-a5d3-4374-a2d2-ec9496260b2f: "Also, our defensive perimeter is working as it should. The turrets' {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}machine spirits are satisfied{/d} and will stop any air strike."
606d1f92-557e-4c71-b05e-84a37b0c418b: {n}The enforcers step forward, blocking the procession from your throne. Without interrupting their shouts and prayers of praise, the procession turns around and moves to leave the deck.{/n}
5fe06d82-447a-4241-bad5-d13dce649c06: "It does not matter. It's just that my encounter with your descendant was not a pleasant one."
63ab35f7-23dc-4486-883b-2682b9900a7c: "With your permission, Lord Captain, I'll remain here, in case the vox starts working or an evacuation team arrives from the flagship."
3839516f-798d-477d-a83c-c2b0ce1d8e21: "May the Throne be merciful to those whose souls endure the test of will in this hall. From weakness, O God-Emperor, deliver us all!"
8b84e937-c9fd-40f6-8ed7-ad1e04ecbf1d: When the growth is killed, the flower uses the {g|f:e4843238876649f6a4aa0fef3804c14a}Toxic Salvo{/g} ability against the creature that killed the growth.
ccad211b-1408-4425-b762-c2d9a58c639c: "Never mind. It was a fleeting whim."
a00631a0-9ee2-4b6b-8d21-66cf71e07d17: {n}The flickering, disintegrating silhouette of the now familiar xenos appears as if out of nowhere. Trazyn's voice resounds in your mind.{/n} "My former exhibit's brain is trying to make sense of reality. Being transferred from my collection to a living environment is a shock capable of disrupting the neurohumoural regulation of a physiological species equipped with a simple form of higher nervous activity."
8790f72b-d8f9-4560-b11e-1908772ab1a3: "So that's how it is..." {n}Seberian sighs, and his entire metal-threaded body rises and slumps like a giant wave.{/n} "And what do you think about his offer?"
ba4ae4c3-4983-4f36-894f-6c1987997ac4: {n}The smell of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} and burned flesh stings your nostrils. The usually crowded medicae facility seems empty and quiet. Shrapnel mixed with bloody debris crunches under your feet. Enforcers cluster near the site of the explosion. Sauerback quickly turns to you, exclaiming,{/n} "Lord Captain! You're already here!"
4695ebee-2cee-4740-9e62-cea9fdddacd7: "It will be over soon? All right... Nomos... will be quiet—"
62619b2b-a904-4249-beae-6c5a3eb0c49b: {n}His energy flagging, Eogunn sighs.{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, perhaps the story is indeed too long for our current circumstances. But enough of the lyrical digressions. I have since made significant progress in understanding the wisdom of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, and the failure of both triasomia procedures will remain merely another setback on the path to comprehension."
65126026-50b3-44c3-b783-b5d57d57f154: "In that case, time is of the essence."
3b5f6043-7275-42cd-8582-f8e41306d778: "I wholly concur with your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Experienced soldiers are a valuable resource that should not be squandered."
e1e037be-9ed4-4188-a7dd-dfe717811ea7: "In the name of von Valancius! Soldiers, to arms!"
b47681c3-1927-483b-8a52-c02b3c7bfa1e: "I will make every effort to ensure your people are treated with dignity and provided with adequate living conditions."
afb02c52-8fa9-4059-839f-13219c12d4f7: {n}Regardless of the changes to the Cage, Batoshski remains the same as ever: savage, spiteful, and unyielding.{/n}
9c735a03-b042-4fa7-b400-427b876bc93c: "How did you decide to create a Triasomata out of these three?"
79d931a8-b635-4b64-b4d7-10d4f26d0041: "I deem the results of your scan to be accurate. The Vivisector performs the functions of preparing the carrier for installation of the maximum-efficiency configuration."
a7d0b8e6-d939-45d4-a6a4-cf28d4940226: "But how will I... stand before... His... Throne?" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My aaagony... will wear through... this body! Like a pair of sssandals... I am lost... L-l-lost!"
e6355f23-7144-4a55-8388-2042d7b819b2: "If you accept that I am right about the time loop—"
2511dbf0-966b-4159-bff8-403cfd3fdf28: "...I decided to keep it as a memento after my tampering with the structure of the tomb broke the stasis and caused the inhabitants to awaken and become infected with the blight of Llandu'gor. I had reasons for my actions, of course — I wished to set a trap for the thief who had robbed me... but I have immortalised the dynasty by placing the staff in my Museion. A sufficient apology for my oversight."
ca75fadf-0304-4e60-a9dc-9acff0fe7948: "Frankly, the information is scarce, which is disheartening. The reinforcements should have arrived no later than half a day ago, but something delayed them. We do not know their numbers or the names of their commanders. We had hoped to meet the Gaprak scion on his arrival. That is all we were able to find out — the vox-frequency of the Gapraks is silent even in the rare moments when we manage to get through the interference." {n}Laria squeezes the vox-transmitter in her hand in irritation, as if it were the one being stubborn and refusing to answer.{/n}
7db77bcf-fb3e-41ab-8ba0-dfd407600cb3: "People are replaceable, aren't they? You find yourself new butchers, and let these ones go to the void rats' table, the same place they send their patients, and where they sent my son."
37733c1e-a95d-48fc-8e43-cd6de4f88280: {n}After listening to the servo-skull, Eogunn puffs out his cheeks in displeasure.{/n} "Nuncius, what an appalling thing to say! Our partnership is perfectly equal! Keep your mischief-making to yourself and don't mislead the Rogue Trader!"
24b95463-7f79-4958-9768-1e7b85363e67: "Yes, Nuncius, that is a decent hypothesis." {n}Eogunn nods with an intent look.{/n} "I suppose a thorough examination of the autopsied body and determining the dead man's family ties would help to narrow down the suspects and avoid entropy multiplication. Rudimentary checks may not be enough."
d2b880e1-1e81-409a-86e0-2ac7fdfc8d74: Tip the scales in favour of Juvenna
99445e3f-de35-4f6a-a349-664cf8dbb81a: Help Governor Dunawski fend off the attack.
56856104-95d7-4b4e-a457-faa963e7f1cc: The energy of the strange barrier absorbs your shots without leaving a single trace.
ad9dccdb-f5c2-429b-a8ee-9c861f2f001f: "What is that thing anyway? Where did it come from?"
c7fa7281-7108-4c8e-9f49-55e2429b8d2c: "I apologise, but I lied. I'm not a Gaprak — but I'm not an enemy of the dynasty either."
2970dbdc-313a-4a4a-bd27-6d60b6b5ad31: "I intended to amend the succession and name Laria as my heir. I suspected that Juvenna had guessed as much and may have conspired with the enemy to be rid of me sooner, but there was insufficient proof. If only I had had more time... But it is too late to regret what might have been, is it not?"
9be2e479-f2bf-4e90-a23e-3a0c7366509d: {n}Trazyn sweeps his arm over the space around you.{/n} "You are inside one of the pieces in my collection, the greatest in the galaxy. I assembled it myself, crossing distances of millions of star systems and timespans of hundreds of millennia. To be among the relics, creatures, and events on display in the Museion of Trazyn the Infinite is an honour that I grant to very few."
f3118982-d700-493d-9737-8ad84916af4c: For several kilometres ahead, the tunnels are filled with time-worn fortifications and ancient weapons and equipment as fragile as glass. The scouts are surprised to find several hastily assembled stone barrows — the people who spent time in these tunnels have probably already found everything they wanted, buried their dead, and left the planet.
ee7f9abf-abdf-4958-ad04-13f6ba12f58f: You cannot perform this action in the Preview Only mode
985b58c7-4d6b-41bc-aeb5-43590c8ad854: "May Trazyn and his treasures be cursed." {n}Seberian's voice is hollow with grief. The ancestor forces his back straight, attempting to project at least a semblance of confidence.{/n} "What am I to do, {name}? I cannot leave my true daughter here. But..." {n}He falls silent, leaving you to grasp what he cannot give voice to.{/n}
884cd84b-edec-4fb4-83f3-5ac9659eaa5b: The evidence discovered at the outpost should be shown to Seneschal Voigtvir.
ba16eee5-ac01-4ebf-8da9-103d48ea8f25: "Elantach, be wary. What waits within is hungry. And, like a beast, it senses our approach."
f5f8401b-b580-47b6-b5a1-585b2bb74a25: A letter with a neatly opened wax seal adorned with an Imperial Aquila.
5d5d3b70-4d5f-4d12-a2e3-28985d58746e: "So that means my goal is right under the nose of this Drover. And while it is alive, I will be stuck here with no communications?"
afa32f9a-236b-40c0-905c-4123f0155153: "I have seen what you will become. A hero."
5e2216c8-871f-4dc5-8c47-21183670937c: The Warrant of Trade spreads out across the floor of the chamber in a seemingly endless expanse of parchment.
ea857793-4369-417b-b2f2-c9ed49a4ea61: At the start of combat, 2 random allies gain the {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}teamwork{/g} effect.
1bd71aa2-ffd4-450d-9b3e-60b14ac64db7: "Do not grieve for what has been lost, brethren: those who have fallen in the battle for righteousness will be warmed in the God-Emperor's sight after death!"
8cbe04ac-6f5f-4397-9893-86b514acdb93: [Wave dismissively] "Yes, yes, death, life — it's all terribly profound. Let's move on to my questions."
b4503370-7955-4a8e-9c6e-d73fe656ba04: {n}A quiet, dismissive snort reaches your ears.{/n} "That post isn't even worth the shell it would take to destroy it, but if you insist..."
f01d6ed2-53b7-4f30-81f5-9bcafa0f0e15:
This obelisk is temporarily hyperphased beyond its safe limits. All creatures gain +1 stack of {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}fluctuating power{/g}.
When destroyed, this obelisk deals {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to all creatures equal to 15% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}.
5521b948-413a-4f9c-bbe1-61e895f01332: Trazyn creates {uip|HardlightZones|e98a70ec4c7f42cd80c814680218de3a} areas of {g|f:e2115f8202cc472796d48a6d42aad7c5}hard-light condensation{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. At the end of the round, all enemies within these areas enter {g|f:be5ba3cf999341368aeb7dd2b82b541a}hard-light stasis{/g}.
7a73ecad-4ac5-4643-acb1-a588576422a2: {n}It is painful to look at Dunawski — she looks lost, staring at nothing with an unfocused gaze.{/n}
7f61f3d0-a89d-413d-91c9-ced1aa7411ec: "I would not. I'm right, and that's all there is to it."
3f7c4d0c-c0d8-4e07-bd4f-373d1a8f9a3d: The Rogue Trader has finally cornered Trazyn the Infinite. Now is the time to recover what the prideful xenos stole.
e6163b45-e848-4b05-96e5-66e157eef5ec: "Die." {n}A sizzling lump of plasma slams into your chest, turning the world around you into nothingness.{/n}
588e7ce6-6bf8-406e-a4b7-39c4d6b0ab4d: Were it not for the dynasty's servants forming an impenetrable shield between us and the Necrons, I doubt any of us would have been left alive. Only a handful survived — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.
8a50e266-ad75-4abc-9239-5327370421f4:
The user cannot use consumables.
As long as the user has a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they throw one random equipped grenade into the current cell.
5c562e29-a9ee-45ed-a0f1-0b5263df97f8: "Wait, wait, wait, wait... So you're here talking to your imaginary pal, and you're completely sober? I don't think I will offer you a drink after all. Who knows what you'll get up to if you have too much amasec?"
e2055b26-6cc3-4d28-a12e-b67207d5aaba: "So as not to forget what I am. I will have to piece myself back together when... if I get out of here."
eda53021-cb1c-49e2-aa9c-f509025d234a: All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|6c7def955d1341429544addea4f98113} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|6c7def955d1341429544addea4f98113}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
cda6565f-43ff-4b9a-b71a-81cc7258fd88: "No, not all. The robes of {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} often vary from world to world — they are imbued with symbolism that reflects the principles of a particular branch of the tech-priesthood. Red is the colour of {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Mars{/g}, it is present in the robes of each world as an homage to the Red Planet. White symbolises the purity of machines and sacred augmetics."
f5a1ac80-841d-41f9-9113-64625e8d5fcc: "Danrok! I have found a portrait of my ancient ancestor. I wish for it to be re-hung in my chambers."
00f0b963-3ea1-4389-993f-4257a7fe8d32: "What kind of heretical nonsense is this?" {n}The woman tiredly rubs her temples.{/n} "Yes, we have our difficulties with the Inquisition. But they are of a somewhat different nature."
77f62ec1-8bbb-45a9-a053-20ad096ecc62:
Whenever the target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, that ally also gains this effect.
916401c9-78c5-4571-9bd3-5037084f1552: {n}The xenos turns his gaze on you, the gaze of a being so ancient and powerful that you almost feel it as a physical weight.{/n} "The very fact of your finding your way here sets you apart from other pests. Curious determination and lack of foresight... then again, perhaps you had no notion of what you were getting into."
1975f00c-009c-48af-8372-b6248882140a: "You are speaking too rationally about your insanity."
cb98210a-50e4-4eba-b936-473e69e04816: "The simplicity of the design borders upon the primitive, yet the device fulfils its intended function. I register a degree of interest in the material responsible for sound attenuation. Analysis indicates a local organic compound of vegetable origin. A more exhaustive study is recommended prior to the device's application."
d4f23ad1-0677-41b5-81f0-d1796d16e3f1: "And we have no idea why he resorted to such an act?"
a13e6f3e-b56e-416c-ace4-ebb3c054582f: If there are no other Veterans left, this creature gains the {g|f:fc53f4670cda489ab399c53da47af6ca}cornered beast{/g} effect until the end of combat.
fa8f093a-2d2d-4cf3-b7b8-f730b2c43fbe: "I am giving you one last chance, Izdrig."
de5d049e-e0d1-4c5b-ba91-441b2f2e03b5: "Laria is not only my Seneschal, but also my daughter." {n}The Rogue Trader's tone hardens.{/n} "I will not allow you to even ponder the possibility that she is not on my side. Though the dubious circumstances of her birth bar me from recognising her as the heir to House von Valancius, Laria has served the dynasty faithfully. As Seneschal, she deserves my full trust and will support any decision I make. Speak with her and you will see that for yourself."
fea66989-ac98-4f2f-95dd-7140cefd2097: {n}The young man, who has remained behind his father throughout the conversation, suddenly cannot restrain himself:{/n} "I saw an armless man being loaded onto an operating table! Why should he be treated at all? He should be disposed of, the ship is full of trash like him!"
ba8c72fb-6754-48a6-a543-4ed0823bd63b: {n}Alva-9 bows her head, saying nothing. A surprisingly quiet and melodic binharic trill comes from her vox.{/n}
ee5c0d31-d97c-4c7f-9b5d-d9a0320592df: "May the God-Emperor warm the souls of the repentant."
a1474c3e-5cd0-43d6-bc32-722c30ee347f: "Hmm... That's a great idea, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The casing will burn on its own as long as you clean the barrel once in a while. When we have time, we'll do some tests."
7cad7220-4889-4eff-ae17-588b8fd3bcf6: "May the Omnissiah lead us to our objective."
f0182c34-f5b6-406d-ad25-ae43b68d990f:
Sector: {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g}
Region: [data redacted]
Location: [data redacted]
Material: Personal log
Recorded by: Seberian von Valancius
6ab17f7f-349e-4ab3-b31f-08f895a6fa44: "You consorted with the xenos. You arrayed yourself in their pieces of iron and lost your human aspect. You dared to point a weapon at me, Diodas af Irramon, faithful servant of the God-Emperor."
9ef1fd6b-e8a2-4f21-acc0-6555d038198e: "I do not seek a confrontation with you. On the contrary, I propose we join forces."
74e83951-a691-478f-af23-85c95189308a: "She became an eternal testament that, for all my power, I was unable to raise a worthy successor."
1e7b1b8b-23f4-45cc-810b-d2d4fc8d0a84: "I am ready to settle the dispute between you and Eogunn."
cb153a9f-0617-448b-a550-31e714cea854:
This primitive journal is assembled from processed leaves and is covered in text scrawled in an uneven hand. During a quick perusal, you notice several entries without dates:
"Vedka says I am a psyker. A cursed one, like in old legends. When I learned the truth, I wanted to end it all on one last mission. But Vedka said that the God-Emperor has a different design for me. The Handbook says that psykers can reach out to other worlds. I must try. Atonement for the one. For me."
"I am trying, the God-Emperor is my witness, I am trying. I draw the symbols I see in my dreams, I scream without words, but there is only silence in return. I thought it would be simple and easy: you call out, someone calls back. But I've waited twenty nights by the campfire now, and nothing. Vedka comes by sometimes to encourage me. She said next time she would bring something special."
"The extract worked! I'm not sure what Vedka put in it, but I fell asleep almost instantly, and in my dreams, I heard the call! A scream, a howl, a song, all at once! It answered my pleas, it heard me! All this time, I had been doing it all wrong!"
"There is no atonement. Not for any of us. No one will answer us from the stars. What sang in my dreams came at my summons. It is the Drover. The creature Izdrig warned us about. It is getting closer, slithering toward me, reaching out with its growths."
"I should have left when I learned I was a psyker. Vedka, if you read this, damn you. It was you who gave me hope, you who made me scream into the void, you who brought the Drover to the Cage. Only one thing remains for me now. To try and kill it before it reaches the Cage. My final mission."
5247539c-7f11-483a-ae3d-607937c3bae5: "Am I ready...?" {n}For a few seconds, the vox-link seems to break, but then Eogunn replies.{/n} "No. It is impossible to prepare for this — such is the cruel science I have had to learn, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But where it began, there must it end: there is no escape from fate, one can only face it head-on and accept the inevitable. I must see the work of my hands and put a stop to it. Lead the way."
85bce530-e18b-4f0b-91eb-44cb9cf7f8b0: {n}He removes an unusual-looking blade with a softly glowing edge from his belt.{/n} "You helped me, and thus proved your loyalty. This sword belonged to one of my brothers who fell in battle. It must be returned to the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}. Now this duty is yours, for I have little hope of leaving this place."
116588ce-877a-47b6-893a-e2026a8a1dbb: Use the key below an insertion to set an augment
30c58f94-2036-4bee-8241-cba5c5d943d1: An Imperial Guardsman's flak vest, reinforced with bone plates.
e7c8341f-bb0e-4589-a6e4-6c3cebeba2cb: Isimond Sauerback's words run counter to the Seneschal's plan. He must be persuaded to side with Laria, or eliminated by other means.
5ee96829-8ea8-49ed-9548-55167326405e: The wearer deals an additional +{uip|Damage|8125408b1a014e40aab96c7d3069d92f} shock damage.
779517ad-b8ff-4762-9fe1-596de04a4221: "Warp take you, Captain! Are you a soldier? Then follow my orders!"
bb1629be-9680-4a1b-90a5-f6dbfeeba81b: "His refusal to repair Nuncius is an outrage and a violation of the vows he has sworn to the Machine God. I will summon him to the bridge immediately, in the hope that he will not dare to prevaricate in the presence of the Rogue Trader!"
54897cc2-b266-4ce2-93a4-eb46b6be7b57: "I do not understand how a xenos can describe things that the Emperor's Angel is not given to see? You mean to cloud my judgement."
0124dae9-fde8-41f7-a9f6-163260a34687: The most fearsome of the followers of Chaos Undivided controlled by {name} von Valancius was a beast-like, bloodthirsty fighter — none other than former Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski himself.
39465514-f894-4b2c-b6f9-4a60f01342da: "The Sector Bionica is a special part of the medicae facility where we employ augmetics and implants to give life back to those who have been irreparably injured. We replace lost organs with consecrated technologies and offer the maimed the chance to serve the God-Emperor once more. The sector's assistants and medicae officers report to me, while its Tech-Priests report to Genetor Ferrenz. Few vessels can boast a medicae concilium of such quality."
5e81f02c-1c1b-456a-9a61-f58d70e9ca00: "And now you're going to ask me to find out what has become of the missing reinforcements."
51fab033-018b-4212-9b58-3a64e137551e: If the target of {g|f:502b9195c84c42c5b180f3f63ed7955c}Analyse Enemies{/g} has 2 or more {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g}, that target suffers +{uip|INTB2|014b6572e19946ae8bc74fc8cbe0f92b} more exploits.
1b27edba-ab96-4ff1-b850-f722fba4da2d: "Vigdis, can you translate this... speech... for me?"
940fdcfb-fc41-49d4-998e-d1fa588ff5f7: {n}Ulfar's thunderous laugh makes Batoshski start.{/n} "I like this mortal, Aett-Vater! Had he been born on Fenris, a Wolf Priest would have chosen him. What a joy it would be to watch him take the Test of Morkai!"
a7673885-6928-400d-b169-497374d3c7b6: "I saw the markings on the fallen machine, Sergeant! It's {mf|him|her}, exactly as it has been foretold! Von Valancius has descended from the stars. Our service..."
0a8061b4-2120-43d2-bfe5-5dd5e624d855: {n}Seberian ceremoniously bows his head as he hands the sword into your keeping.{/n}
a609e5ba-e9f4-4341-846c-0c43b4676b01: "Yes, I suppose so." {n}Juvenna returns to her deliberately formal tone.{/n} "Now remember — you were merely accompanying a noble lady on her daily constitutional."
142fce99-53a8-484d-b665-146832ce5b9c: "Seberian, let's not give these fools the chance to open their mouths — only poison will pour from their throats. To battle!"
adc90d85-450c-4852-900c-c73002c79918: "So this is where the von Valancius blood in the Voigtvirs comes from!"
b66d1feb-eb40-401b-997b-24138da08828: "The fate that befell Seberian was to be expected. The time of the great Rogue Trader has passed, and now the xenos' connivances only disrupt the ordinary course of events and time, and do not reshape it completely.
d63115c1-44eb-4e44-8570-f45b274907fa: Awakening the ancient archeotech in the Sector Bionica revealed a path to a secret chamber blocked by a genetic lock. The Rogue Trader must venture inside and uncover the truth behind the chamber's mysterious owner.
757f2dd5-2fb1-4e34-a3d0-32e835c5204b: "What must I do for you to reassemble Eogunn?"
3c7ace67-1166-44f5-be12-220ee377b168: "What is it that Nuncius disagrees with?"
54c78547-d6d3-4c10-b8ac-97ffc797eabb: Seberian's sword within the temporal loop proved to be a brittle counterfeit, not the precious artefact it appeared to be.
e72e61e0-4750-456c-b908-e156cdb30ea5: {n}Zarkovian legends say that the polar cap of the world has long been a cursed and malevolent place. Now otherworldly laughter and whispers of strange voices can be heard there, carried on the north winds. But this sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers were helpless to resist the bait. Let the enemy devour the enemy.{/n}
7538e6b1-215a-459a-bfdc-4d52a7ceab82: "Exactly right, my {mf|lord|lady}: I'm this {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}regiment{/g}'s first ever sergeant. With other Guardsmen, high-born and trained, maybe you'd need someone smarter than me. But with this lot, I've found the knack: you've got to choose your words carefully if you want good results. They're human beings too, after all, and soldiers of {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."
65799d34-e963-4e94-94aa-2dfa61d45ac0: {n}The platform emits an unsettling otherworldly buzz, after which the light shackles on the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}giant{/g}'s limbs unlock.{/n}
e4e1bf7d-e7a5-4e78-8db9-7c2bf145992b: "Excellent. I will make my appearance in the thick of things — may my arrival be a surprise to your Lord Inquisitor."
2b126f17-c338-40b4-ac7c-fa405efdcf77: "We've spoken before, remember? All of this has happened before!"
038d99a7-9765-4fa5-9db1-060f03c41054: "I have already explained to you: we do not give preferential treatment to anyone. Your implants will be serviced according to your place in the queue, which is in turn based on the urgency of the required procedure. While you're too slothful to coat your own head in sacred coolants, someone else is dying for lack of a lung." {n}The Vivisector exhales heavily: judging by the dark circles under his eyes, fatigue is making it hard for him to maintain his usual cordiality.{/n}
de2b8098-324e-421a-870b-5e26078cc159: "I, Isimond Sauerback, am prepared to undertake the mission of protecting the negotiator during a diplomatic visit." {n}The enforcer gives a curt salute.{/n}
e32a4804-b978-4fab-96c6-a387e999530f:
For every 1 AP spent, Eogunn gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
These stacks are used to activate Eogunn's unique abilities, such as {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}.
Each stack increases all energy and shock damage dealt by Eogunn by +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%.
8875decd-eb92-4b80-8134-4eed242d64ce: "Do you know anything about the Gaprak reinforcements?"
75eb8d21-3582-4ffc-814e-b4856f11cb15: "No violations of the established {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}Imperial Tithe{/g} collection procedure have been recorded in at least the last ten iterations of the production cycle. There have also been no violations of the production facilities' operating conditions." {n}If Decabalus has noticed the Arbitrator's inspection, he does not reveal it.{/n}
e013a217-9de6-496a-882e-7a59401109b2: The character's FEL bonus is added to their Strength. Whenever an ally deals critical damage or kills an enemy, Uralon regains <u>FEL bonus</u> wounds. If the ally is a daemon, or Uralon himself performs the action, he regains twice as many wounds.
35658ce7-5d7c-4cfa-a11e-c4212ba22930: "It is gratifying to see, esteemed colleague, that the breadth of your thinking is sufficient to understand and appreciate the working principle of this creation. I cannot guess why you decided to demonstrate it only now, but I am extremely satisfied to see the developing changes in your approach."
c09343bc-a4fc-4802-9baf-7b92b7705fb8: Faded chevrons on the sleeve of his overcoat identify the Guardsman as a member of the 138th Mechanised Infantry Regiment of the Death Korps of Krieg.
229b6371-502c-4fbc-a5d5-10a31e5cbe8a: The Rogue Trader has fallen into a temporal loop, one that recreates the siege of Dargonus again and again. A way must be found to avoid becoming part of this spectacle for eternity.
cae8c662-760b-4f2b-a786-12afb67a92d5: {n}In a jerky motion, the sergeant stands at attention once more.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, there have been no incidents in the commission of the task!" {n}With a sidelong look at the passing officers, he continues very quietly, so that only you can hear:{/n} "Lady Drivestem, may the God-Emperor prolong her days, has been favouring Captain Sauerback lately. I overheard her giving him some orders, but I couldn't make out what."
7201802b-b8ce-4671-981b-ab6bc0aff35d: For each stack of this effect, this creature suffers +15% more {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g}.
12d52be3-f234-49d0-a0f6-d9c2ad13dedd: "Who granted you the authority to command the 32nd Merov Regiment without informing me?"
d6e7f4f3-4a94-407e-a002-42d368761aa0: This character's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} are increased by +<u>{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}TGH{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g}</u>.
35593e35-d2c4-495c-802b-28792dd76025: {n}A strangled roar erupts from the unfortunate man's throat just before he lunges for Eogunn:{/n} "Better death than that! Begone, begone, begone!"
f6856906-0656-44f8-8c9e-3eec04353228: "A combination of factors, I am inclined to believe. The failing of narrow-mindedness is a characteristic of many Magi and Archmagi, leading to unpredictable and, alas, unfortunate consequences. I hope on this occasion, esteemed colleague, will not succumb to it."
17ee6d0e-e1d6-4d0f-9031-5d03f1ea36ea: "I determine your position in the hierarchy to be insignificant."
03c7e53e-b470-407a-93ab-47a376f59f1e: "The composition of the nutrient substrate is unbalanced. Large amounts of lipid compounds and complex amine chains. Nevertheless... the organoleptic values are excellent, although this method of nourishment is highly irrational." {n}Eogunn dubiously places a piece of roasted fowl in his mouth.{/n} "Most acceptable."
b3a55c68-bc43-49dc-8336-d88503075b78: "As we discussed, the Merovian post will take the hit."
798927d9-b9b9-4b66-83c5-65cccb1b1d57: "This is merely a necessary measure, Seberian. You have departed your prison, have you not?"
e23fe637-93fe-418d-9af5-f4736f624928: "The Archenemy on that metal planet... I can't stop thinking about what I saw. We had no idea of the horror it truly is."
ffcbd250-0b7e-44fd-b572-f0c2bc9e730c: {n}After examining you more closely, Sauerback's eye brightens with interest.{/n} "So you're the one House Gaprak sent to Seberian's aid. The scouts reported your company was destroyed on the approach to the residence. A regrettable incident, but nothing to worry about — the Gapraks are famous for their {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}Astropaths{/g}, so they must know you survived. New troops will be dispatched shortly."
83e04170-229e-411c-96a0-91e8da21ac93: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they all hadn't swarmed me, I might have spared someone."
71054dcf-00ca-4f92-b2c8-82016b59b8a8: {n}This attempted display of your indomitable spirit is an instant failure — your eye muscles are completely immobile, just like the rest of your body.{/n}
d2e0164a-b637-4b81-92c5-289442766a34: This creature prioritises attacking injured enemies. If the target has less than 50% of their maximum wounds, this creature makes an extra attack.
f187b9cd-ffe0-4f2b-bece-7e7ed3c03453: "I only have one wish, and that is to preserve and bolster the greatness of our dynasty. We are Rogue Traders, and that is what we must remain. A rare few independent thinkers, unconstrained by Adeptus Terra dogma, inquisitive, and bold enough to oppose anyone save the God-Emperor. We are the crusaders of Him on Terra. That and nothing else. I cannot allow you to reduce the dynasty to a shadow of what it is meant to be! I simply cannot." {n}Toward the end of his impassioned speech, the modulated emotions in Seberian's voice sound almost real to you. You can almost hear the voice he spoke with before his terrible injuries.{/n}
1d39344b-7327-4653-9553-7a5b76e34346: "I'm afraid not. They were wholly unique. It would take me years to find new samples and regain what was lost. I am certain they are still there, which is why I am asking you for this courtesy."
dacdbd0a-97b6-4daa-a36a-8507a3178bcc: The augment is in poor condition, but perhaps your flagship's technical officers can repair it.
3c185bde-7ad8-487b-8fef-3528957920aa: "Executed a von Valancius? Don't be absurd! We have a fair few black marks against our name, but shedding von Valancius blood isn't one of them. The opposite, in fact. If something had happened to Lord Seberian or his daughter, I wouldn't be standing here talking to you. We're their shield. The first strike lands on us." {n}The sergeant squares his shoulders as if he is genuinely expecting an attack.{/n}
0e68175e-13fd-4a43-9bae-4fe02f2ebcb8: The smooth operation of the air defence system is an additional argument in favour of defence.
9ae8e100-3bdd-4346-b4c5-28174e331e6e: [Open entry titled "The Crimson Dance of Khaine"]
9675000e-e1b3-4bff-8b3d-0a1161877ea0: Whenever a creature crosses the wire, it loses −2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.
62b8833d-95f1-4c7e-8386-d363fec0e359: "I have come for the relic that belongs to my dynasty, and I will not leave without it."
1c79be84-c8f3-42b6-8c69-0f03b0da154e: "It is a sad state of affairs when loyal servants of the God-Emperor are forced to fight one another like hounds at the whim of a cruel master." {n}You do, in fact, hear regret in Seberian's voice as his fingers close around the hilt of his weapon with a metallic clank.{/n} "And your master is truly cruel."
d9f5eeda-81c6-4753-88ae-0b74f3652ec2: "Your methods are highly original, Eogunn. What experiment are you conducting?"
a9d5a232-fa4e-48e5-b2fc-15702eef70ae: {n}The squat man, his neck almost sunken into his broad shoulders, lazily makes the sign of the Aquila in front of his chest.{/n} "We meet again, my {mf|lord|lady}. Sorry for not letting you in right away — that's the job."
a38b082b-6d2f-4e09-a89f-3894142523e8: "If beating you is what it takes to end all this, Izdrig, then I am ready."
fa7153e2-16c7-4d6f-84a5-89cd75cd4452: {n}Heinrix frowns slightly and nods, making some sort of mental note.{/n}
562fe2f4-0df4-4c46-8eca-aec8138fdde0: "I wish to know more about you."
87a82200-53f7-4414-b8ce-9d7a876cfc31: "A dispute has arisen between Nuncius and me regarding the anatomical differences between Drukhari and Asuryani. He argues that any differences are biological in nature, while I am convinced that the environment of Commorragh is the determining factor. To settle the argument, our only hope is to analyse a live specimen."
03b9d564-db4a-4d29-a672-9537fca9c758: "An excellent observation! My technical designation is Manipulus." {n}His {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} spring to life, pointing at his augmented abdomen.{/n} "And here is the galvanic cell, the repository of the Motive Force. It — no, that will take too long, better to give a demonstration. Observe!"
7522b90f-08e7-4dd4-9238-1f9f45f70614: {n}Jae sighs.{/n} "Eogunn, shereen, we all sometimes feel that fleeing is the only way out. But the past has a way of catching up with you. Trust me, I know."
3b1fd3c9-2283-4429-b6fe-0791e8a29601: "That's for sure, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Atonement for the one. Let's move."
e9bc208d-f6a6-4b28-bff3-5ff9381e365a: Whenever the user performs a single-target attack against a target within a 3-cell radius, they make a {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} shot with this augment immediately after. It deals {unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g} with {uip|Penetration|54bc9cc07a394f11b3abf5d01543b08f}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
7e2e8840-d156-4660-bac9-636e4182e0ac: "I grant you one minute of life. Explain where this 'gift' came from and what happened with Janus. Your time begins now."
c9f9e7df-7a09-4005-b08b-f7d741d04568: Pasqal's attacks and effects from the {g|f:197b8a8a12b0442db7ffee1067cf3d97}Expose Weakness{/g} ability gain bonuses against enemies under the effects of {g|f:95cdd5f42ef5480d9fadd9e0acee641b}machine spirit communion{/g}, as if those enemies had +<u>(2 + target`s {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}convulsion{/g} stacks)</u> more stacks of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g}.
b7bef2b9-45c1-4a64-adba-edaf07dfba71: "Yes, and why is that relevant now?" {n}Her expression sharpens, her jaw muscles tensing under her skin.{/n}
63111171-5c84-4616-8778-32d63a97d5fa: "So, back to work again. Do you all remember which machine you're at?"
800f0953-ad85-4b31-a935-8f3c5ee842a6: Head to the flagship's Sector Bionica and open the genetic lock behind the implantation throne.
134dd422-6746-41ac-8e0d-8c17c9f52c37: The machine has recovered from the decadence in which it has lain in previous centuries, and is once again filled with conductive charge.
0d797dfd-6a48-4d95-b29a-ce4472ff27e8: {n}Encouraged by your attention, Dankosh launches into a thorough explanation of shooting in Zarkovian conditions. It is striking how much aptitude for instruction this near-feral fighter from a forsaken world displays. As you put five shots exactly on target in a row, the surrounding Merovians erupt in cheers of approval.{/n}
f8e74cf6-a72e-4ba8-93fd-5072f35371a3: People from every corner of the Koronus Expanse dreamed of joining the ranks of the Merovians, as they knew that serving in the 32nd was a ticket to a better life. But the Zarkovians only accepted recruits who sincerely wished to pledge their fate to serving the dynasty and its subjects.
ff0fc18f-c1c5-4121-b293-70d7523e706d: {n}The metallic scraping that serves as Trazyn's laughter grates on your ears.{/n} "Then fade into oblivion when you have lived your brief span... and do not become someone who leaves their mark on history."
dff24a52-e647-4ea3-b536-a5c7fe75a348: "That would have been the truth — if a sad one — were I not alive. But as things stand, your claim to my flagship is dubious at best, don't you think?"
96531a8b-964d-4b0d-be49-36f3543cf814: You ordered the installation of a cerebral augmentation in a flagship soldier.
adc9d59d-a5f0-43e0-af2b-29c2e83105c3: "I would comply, Lord Captain, but I have unfinished business." {n}The woman grins viciously and tips the barrel of her autopistol toward the hostage.{/n}
3d5447a9-a340-405c-b811-216bb8d4e27d: Annals of the Deeds of Glory and Fidelity of the von Valancius Dynasty, Volume 30
de14c219-09b7-452d-b1d8-671cf3145d8f: Imbued with the xenos's unholy technology, the very metal of the triangular gates seemed to resist our intrusion. Every attempt to clear the way proved futile, so the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} resorted to desperate measures. Sacrificing their stock of melta charges, the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} managed to melt a large enough opening for the squad to enter.
a508d8d6-7123-4c3c-ad5d-a2f3f313e4a7: "You have distracted me so long with your pitiful attempts at resistance that I am now able to soberly consider the fate of this Museion and even resign myself to its loss. After all, it is only a small portion of it, an insignificant collection in an insignificant corner of the galaxy. So I will repeat my offer: Seberian von Valancius in exchange for the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}. I will even let you have the Crimson Dance of Khaine. It will be somewhat ironic: the little thief will have gained a legendary weapon for his dynasty after all."
44a6ddf2-dbb1-49bb-a187-c4ffa4164cb4: "Why have you changed your mind? What do you want with Seberian?"
c5c6f6c2-5645-4d7b-a2d2-88730bf4c185: {n}After lapsing into silence for several seconds, Exalt-117 finally declares, {/n} "Your comment is notable for its surprising accuracy. Constructing a new trajectory of movement."
f8a816a0-c642-45b0-855d-1bb5a7ac7de2: {n}Zorael furrows his brows briefly and shrugs irritably.{/n}
33cb88bb-0ba2-4316-aa86-7736f53c21c9: "I am registering sacrilegious interference in the rites of servicing the gifts of the Omnissiah by the laity. I insist upon the cautionary servitorisation of those responsible for the arsenal's upkeep."
0a2cd033-ba0b-40e5-9b68-643f6d849c33: "So your refusal is categorical? How regrettable! The complementarity of your personality with your current post carries an inconceivably positive coefficient approaching one hundred percent. Maintaining this rate is a matter pleasing to the Omnissiah."
52d25e16-7915-4ceb-9316-83a3e6114e4d: "Request for escort received. Valid response found. Attention: request cannot be processed. All vessels of the Explorator Cognisance Fleet have been called to strategic location Eufrates II. The request may be considered after operations at the location have been completed. State your request. Glory to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."
6e9a0fc8-f022-41ac-96b3-9208e401abed: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite seizes Pasqal's own tentacle-like limb.{/n} "Stop, Magos. The blessing of the Omnissiah has touched neither these slabs nor those intended to use them. The ones you call Nephilimechs are xenos, more insidious and dreadful than Humankind has ever known." {n}Despite his words, he does not look away from the finds.{/n}
ffaa2400-e11c-4358-9415-9969b88f1405: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Izdrig nods to you and begins to softly hum a familiar melody.{/n}
4b6f6599-81e0-44ce-b3ab-5e39315d8bfc: [Walk unceremoniously over the Warrant] "Enough quaking. It's just an old writ."
b37853f8-3f05-4233-8e34-1a39ea4fc5f7: "You do not understand — everything you see is just an illusion. You are imprisoned in a time loop."
b464094c-cb12-48d5-915e-851fe2d8aca4: By operating secret manufactorums to produce the bionic hands found on Zarkov, the dynasty can greatly enrich itself — not to mention the fact that Cold Traders will surely be interested in said implant. The heresy of innovation carries great risks, and innovation involving xenotech, even more so, such as the dynasty being declared anathema by the Adeptus Mechanicus — but the potential profits are just as great.
b9fa8d19-3bd5-40e6-816f-31f2ff073ffd:
Some augments have galvanisation abilities with powerful effects.
Only one augment can be set for galvanisation, making its ability available in combat.
Augments cannot be set for galvanisation while the character is in combat.
0314bdbc-14b2-4c52-a2f3-2fc54e76d0de: {n}Juvenna's interest is piqued. You share her views — you may be useful.{/n}
3136fb57-dbda-4216-81ee-cacb84d46502: "Let me see if I understand this correctly. One segment of this planet's populace exhibits all the hallmarks of heresy and defiance, while the other is busy canonising any soul that crosses their path? Saints' blood, this report is going to be problematic..." {n}A grim amusement colours Heinrix's voice.{/n}
270a3863-6a6c-43f9-ae48-86de7790994a: "A remarkably well-timed question and, as such, a rhetorical one."
2b58aea9-bf62-47ae-953e-a2036860dc8f: {n}A stifled rasp comes from somewhere inside the Tech-Priest, as if the augments in his body have entered into some kind of conflict.{/n} "Inefficient! The Vivisector life form lacks the requisite competence!" {n}Ferrenz's visors quickly sweep over the area around him, before he practically snatches the strange augment from your hands.{/n} "The technology will be brought to maximum achievable efficiency."
ded80b8d-c9f4-457f-8a27-2397fef51e41: "To convince you, I would have to do something extraordinary, wouldn't I? Like beat you at regicide, for instance."
b7515a9a-a0cb-466b-8d1f-a8175bf9a720: "The central drill complex mechanism is what keeps the entire station afloat. If you destroy it, you will doom all the workers, the equipment, and yourselves in one fell swoop."
d8cf5eb3-1fd9-43ab-afa5-8721ec9ec770: {n}Seberian is silent for several seconds.{/n} "Regret for what has been done is a path to nowhere. Focus on the present, however grim it may appear at this moment."
1dda9511-1cd3-4aee-ac3b-5248b201e78c: {n}The Merovians surrounding you seem tense. Although you no longer feel any pressure in your head, they seem to still be suffering from the lingering effects of the Drover's screech.{/n}
48c9e3b0-25e7-40d5-a650-a9a2e19ef06a: "I beg your pardon?" {n}Camilla presses her thin lips together, a look of mild revulsion in her gaze.{/n} "You poor thing, you must be in shock. Be sure to see the chirurgeon."
17aea373-c1d5-4cf0-85de-0418ca4143ca: {n}The Tech-Priest steadily exhales and opens an eye.{/n} "You are correct, Nuncius, I risk boring the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} with my protracted ruminations. However, I will not allow the semantic analysis of my utterance to go unanswered — I will log your thesis for further debate. Now it is time to make my obeisance."
1734535b-d212-4fc1-9c73-3a205ea14436: "My heart is heavy with sorrow, Lord Captain. There is no greater torment than to stand opposing my own sisters in battle. Only my faith that all this is a false and unholy apparition strengthens my spirit."
9ed0ba10-1346-4e2b-a1de-f1dfc340a6f1: {n}Murmuring a short prayer under his breath, Abelard opens his chirurgeon's kit and bends over the prone figure, but after a minute he shakes his head sharply.{/n} "Forgive me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but all my experience is not enough to help with such wounds. A whole host of chirurgeons and their assistants would be needed to heal these injuries. All we can do is pray to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} that He grant Laria a dignified death."
2ee5ac00-02d2-436d-bdf8-556ccfe6709f: {n}Eogunn breaks off and casts a confused look at Nuncius.{/n}
8ae3a23d-8136-4d7b-b578-6d8934d848af: "Why did you do it, Camilla? The Gapraks' man was supposed to help, to bring an army!"
abd79405-0595-4c3c-8ba5-d5719bc669e0: "I will help you return to Nuncius. We will go to Amsanct as soon as we find a way through the gate."
5b08f2bc-2aee-4149-b4bb-3f6a9c0e2770: Upon landing, there is a {uip|Chance|c5798a6a51a64085bf31d5db4f40c7cc}% chance (up to a maximum of 100%) that the user falls {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g} and deals {uip|Damage|c5798a6a51a64085bf31d5db4f40c7cc} shock damage with {uip|Pen|c5798a6a51a64085bf31d5db4f40c7cc}% armour penetration to all adjacent creatures.
60084b53-7dc4-4db2-8015-7da3e0efc6d6: "What do you think of our new equipment, Martinax?"
268e19d0-e629-4791-a3c3-c588f3d43b68: "Let this heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."
5ecbfafa-aa69-4fc1-9d45-311227cdfff2: "Ahhh... Some of these devices could extract quite a bit of suffering from those who use them to... what do you call it... 'treat'? Fascinating place."
e9477b9f-b78a-469c-a08c-02d252b7d488: "At last, a worthy opponent. The mon-keigh will not hold out for long. If you wish to partake of the sport, I advise you to make haste."
232f7f92-6ab2-45a7-9bee-6b30fb32d91f: "Ah, so my accuser does not know the full story? Allow me to enlighten you. It happened at the changing of the guard — terribly convenient timing, it was. That skilful Sauerback fellow dispatched the surviving Gaprak boy and returned to the outpost as if nothing had happened. I do not know the rest of the details: such things spoil the appetite."
04d054bb-bdd9-4855-a6ae-add29cc5b396: {n}Batoshski grins broadly.{/n} "Sounds just like home. Strength is something we understand and respect. I'll pass your words along to the troops."
a119d39d-1aad-4626-823c-15ce58d42b73: {n}After a few long seconds, an inhumanly melodic voice answers you.{/n} "Do not come any closer, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. You must not interfere in our search. The ancient enemy lies dormant, but we shall find him and claim our revenge. Leave now or we will be forced to attack."
f7788010-d924-4e5b-ae79-7da935cb30dc: "My life is not the only one at stake here, but all of yours as well. I will listen to anyone who has something to say." {n}With a quiet whirr, the lens of his optical implant focuses on Laria.{/n} "The Seneschal will be the first to speak."
bcf0a340-7de7-40cb-a803-98f910571f05: "Congratulations, Vedka. You got what you dreamed of."
f36a4ce7-f16b-449b-837c-187948b5d6b1: "We call it the 'snap-strike,' Lord Captain. It's not about shooting or stabbing where the target is, but where it's going to be."
7349b542-2ec7-4c67-891f-78aaebba6839: "Yes. Under the Lex Imperialis, only the bearer of the Sacred Warrant has the God-Emperor-given right to possess such an artefact. This strongly suggests that the portrait depicts Seberian von Valancius, the lost link of the dynasty."
9911cb94-cb39-4986-92d8-8f857e06fc5b: "In tallying Seberian's deeds, there can be no doubt — he restored House von Valancius to glory in its darkest hour. Seberian was granted a Warrant, along with the great name, fortune, and history behind it, but with so few holdings and resources. And yet he went on to become a living testament to the God-Emperor's benevolence, an example of how Humanity can endure any trial if it carries His light in its heart. A great leader who strengthened the position of House von Valancius in the Koronus Expanse, beginning a new chapter in the dynasty's illustrious history. In the blood of the xenos, he signed an alliance with House Armengard. He is praised by the Explorators for his aid in finding archeotech in the Unbeholden Reaches. And the handing of the vicious heretic pirate Worgen Gald into the custody of the Navis Imperialis is written in the annals of the Koronus Line Fleet. And even when the time came to reap the fruits of his righteous labours and the gifts of the God-Emperor for his faithful service, Seberian von Valancius did not rest. So seldom did he sit in the palace on Dargonus that the ruling of the protectorate's holdings and the management of the dynasty's trading ventures fell to servants and stewards. Alas, this honour did not always find its way into worthy hands. More often than not, the dynasty's subjects forgot to whom they truly owed their loyalty. After ascending to his place as a mighty lord, the noble and brave Rogue Trader remained an adventurer at heart, preferring that to his other duty. Perhaps after a dozen years, the needs of the protectorate would have compelled him to assume his rightful mantle as viceroy of the God-Emperor, but we shall never know. During the latest risky venture in a series of many successful exploits, Seberian disappeared among the alien stars that called to him. The worthy succeeded the worthy, and against the heresy of infidelity or the decline of trade in the hands of the unrighteous, the dynasty was preserved by the new heir to the Warrant, who bolstered what His Lordship had won. Thus began the reign of the glorious..."
ce0db80f-a2b1-4a91-af59-1abeca736f4e: Branek Zarkov follows whatever orders Laria gives. He must either be given a different command or neutralised entirely.
abfa1114-1f5f-40c2-a2e3-d6d40b3ae377: "Then we have nothing further to discuss." {n}Affronted by your refusal, Juvenna walks away.{/n}
17352fed-358f-486a-a6ac-7958264f79a7: "Thank you for your intervention, Lord Captain! I always welcome your visits to the Sector Bionica — it brings blessed order to this place like nothing else."
f7ab4099-bfd1-48aa-84dc-308d8ec9b7c9: {n}Calligos rushes about the Warrant in a rage, heedless of the paper ripping and being marred beneath his feet.{/n} "That cowardly, underhanded xenos! I have not finished with you! I have not finished with you! I'll have your iron skull yet, you dishonourable groxshit!"
9514e8d6-61d9-4555-9235-42192ce180af: Each stack of this effect increases all fire or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} damage suffered by the creature by +1.
f00bab45-5886-42e4-8f77-0c3607241343: Order the return of the trophy to the ship
2b047824-ffc7-423c-888f-dd9f14111799: If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} attacks a target with an {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g} stack from a distance of {uip|Range|070ab229e0cb4e88b564e7428e350d03} cells or farther, that attack deals +{uip|Damage|070ab229e0cb4e88b564e7428e350d03}% damage.
08914d1e-5b6c-4d77-b3d7-915a88153df3: "Let us praise the Machine God who has granted us a grain of His wisdom through His anointed one! Blessed be the Omnissiah!"
a1cbf463-12b6-4c15-b1b1-a3b6b42f56c0: "You were there, Lord Captain. I remember. You {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took away the pain{/d}. You ordered them to install... You wanted to do what was best."
cd12c413-2f66-43d5-b35a-c1f61841d7bc: "Registering an increased risk of complications of legitimacy. Registering a change in status for the subject {name} von Valancius." {n}Pasqal gives you a long, weighty stare, then his vox rasps.{/n} "I assume this observation to be self-evident, yet protocol demands its utterance: the security classification of this facility is hereby revised to 'untrustworthy.'"
4965af8e-a3d3-498e-8a4f-d10aea66a9f2: "The report only contains the Colonel-Governor's conjecture. Perhaps the cause was the death of the Drover at your hand. Or there is a special cycle that we are unaware of. Regardless, dynasty representatives on Zarkov have already begun an investigation."
22da04d8-2a2d-4031-95ba-344c3775ed3d: "How long are you planning to run from the past?"
2210fd68-f8f5-4aed-a2eb-d16a00b55ed6: "I am unable to carry out your order, Lord Captain, whether I wish to or now. Forgive me, but I am not graced with such profound knowledge of the Omnissiah's sacred mechanisms... unlike Genetor Ferrenz." {n}For the first time, a spark of excitement flares in Martinax's voice at the mention of his colleague.{/n} "I am compelled to warn you, however — he may deem it beneath him to touch such dubious and heretical technology."
8d90d638-56aa-4b05-a352-7c09b8aea7a5: [Wait for Seberian to invite you to introduce yourself]
0938898a-7620-49f8-9a14-1eb02f85a8f9: The augmetics exude a strong smell of oil with a faint metallic trace.
01b2b2ba-a9e8-4d1d-9325-2fa1ee90c89a: Magos Exalt-117 does not support Juvenna's plan. He must be persuaded, or eliminated by other means.
dbe3eda5-2076-42ba-b540-98624be2aa0f: "Allow me to assist with the repair of the air defence system."
9b71bb44-3a66-4f1d-8b1e-c3ac1f070d87: "Don't despair, shereen! We'll clean it all up! Your Warrant will be as good as new — I know a couple of restorers... scribes? Archaeologists?" {n}Jae curses quietly as the edge of the sacred paper crunches under her boot.{/n}
8ce992dd-c019-460d-aec0-49b7b4d1eeed:
All supporting Master Tactician abilities possess additional effects. Whenever used on allies or Uralon himself, they grant a damage bonus that equals their Heretical rank. If the target of the ability is an allied daemon, it also gains +<u>(2 × FEL bonus)</u>% armour penetration and +3 MP.
Whenever affected by {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Fervour{/g}, Uralon can target others with {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Linchpin{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspire{/g}, and {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Strongpoint{/g}. Uralon's {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}Finish the Job{/g} deals full damage.
b8ea8b55-c078-4877-b51c-fc839b538a00: "Why did you decide to step up?"
27e6d7ce-b1f1-4afb-a339-13cefe0b0ca4: "Why did you capture the ancestor of the von Valancius dynasty and imprison him here?"
f1ed55e6-2558-4efa-8caa-8b7f2804fc9a: Zarkov's rampant vegetation turns the paths between settlements into a tangled labyrinth fraught with deadly perils. The Adeptus Mechanicus shall supply the planet with swift flying machines equipped with razor-sharp blades.
15d15f5c-6e63-4acc-b3a8-1a2f7b1ef515: "You will understand someday, my heir. When centuries of your life have gone by, and every decision you ever made is a heavy burden upon your shoulders. When you begin to feel like a relic of the past, remember my words: sometimes a withered old branch should be pruned to keep the tree healthy. The dynasty before everything, {name}."
293697fa-2712-4f97-8cc8-df259eafb939: "Thank you for sharing your experience, Colonel."
b8463b07-a0d8-4d88-8890-d69784c0a334: "Yes, indeed! Abelard, you could learn a thing or two from this servo-skull."
7b06efeb-d6b8-4485-9533-f413a740410f: [Nod solemnly] "Quite right. The elite deserve greater privileges."
ebd4a7b6-a6f9-42fc-a455-05e634ee178c: {n}A predatory grin cracks across the colonel's heavy features.{/n} "Some sort of huge, overgrown vine? That was the Drover. That vile thing has the whole Cage under siege."
d6b33410-69e9-4053-aa43-084b58de09d2: Eogunn's head has been partially severed from his body. His neck muscles and skin have been cut with surgical precision, revealing withered cartilage and blackened vessels resembling thick worms. The distorted features of the Manipulus are streaked with congealed, tar-like blood.
7d6f6ade-2ad0-4b32-b68f-3125d459a906: "I would like to note that, thanks to your adherence to your principles, the experts of the Sector Bionica have been able to perfect the process of installing basic implants. The operations can now be completed in the shortest time and without having to expend any pain-dulling supplies — and so, I ask you to accept something that should ensure that the resulting surplus instead finds good use in the battles you face."
7bf05dda-69c4-4ab2-bde6-dff3f805ff3d: "O wisest of men, do mine ears deceive me, or did you just call me a miracle? A servant of the Omnissiah willing to exchange knowledge with me is no less rare a find than a speck of gold in the dunes of Efreet! And when it comes to enrichment, I am open to all opportunities. Knowledge included."
8e23a661-9519-4872-a23c-cbd17de08b3d: "That, Lord Captain, is what powers all the machinery here. Its soul, you might say, the most divine thing in it. It gives off energy and glows so bright it hurts your eyes, and it's shaped something like this." {n}The foreman's hands trace in the air the shape of a sizeable cone with a truncated top.{/n} "That's what Alva-9 got really angry about."
7c4b59d4-c187-4968-be3f-675e23661ca3: "I am struggling to quantify the organic material used in the decoration of this cloister. The aesthetics of these creations are undeniable, but their functionality is doubtful."
a9696f6a-4bfc-4db4-9667-ae2a5906cd9d: {n}Nuncius does not make a sound, directing his visor somewhere past you.{/n}
4abbdcf2-5801-445a-9dc5-c008abaec1af: "Correction to Protocol 17.0: wait for the laypersons to leave the platform, then evacuate."
638d3481-7d4b-491b-bff8-a8f9a04fc86b: {n}The amasec spills into the bathtub. Even if Nuncius wished to partake, the lack of a lower jaw, digestive tract, or any other organs prevents him from doing so.{/n}
8ab9f13d-d761-47ad-9ba2-a1a68a83d6e4: {n}The cover of the book is coated in a thick layer of dust. The sprayed edges have warped and are marred with decay. Writing implements lie in disarray — an autoquill, an ornately shaped inkwell, and a paperweight — as if the diarist had made the last entry before leaving their secret study in haste.{/n}
41252be4-f92f-4a77-8a4e-5bbb0d40b82d: "Guilt, anguish, despair — all such sentiments obscure the mind and distort thoughts, elantach. Only the acceptance and comprehension of what has been done can truly elevate you... or destroy you utterly."
7a6bc1f2-965d-408b-a6e7-b9148ae00698: "Enough with the pretence." {n}Juvenna throws back her shoulders proudly.{/n} "I will neither deny my deeds nor repent of them. If you are so mired in heresy that you are willing to follow a heretic into the flames, so be it. One day I will see you, sister, and you, traitor, burn for your crimes at the hands of Inquisitor af Irramon."
a921f209-4eb3-40eb-89ee-105dc576c9c4:
The bone bark provides {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} equal to 75% of the creature's base {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}.
{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Burning{/g} the bark off removes this {g|Encyclopedia:PositiveEffect}positive effect{/g}.
c370b2c6-164c-40f2-9b53-378632aa1175: {n}Batoshski's attack, meant only to deliver the poison under your skin, nicks your shoulder, leaving a stinging itch. You feel a surge of nausea and a salty tang in your mouth, yet {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}no further symptoms follow{/d}.{/n}
1d91d7c9-970b-42ff-87cd-997255f8b131: The only unit that remained loyal to the dynasty was the 32nd Merov Regiment, led personally by Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski.
9c4798ae-1295-4df4-8650-0d1cb075965b: "One more powerful than your limited imagination can encompass. Devastator of planets, it did not reveal its might to the primitives who sought to comprehend it, but bestowed only endless suffering on one of them. The natural end of a lowly intellect."
29db14fb-7f36-47ee-add3-162e2577715c: "If you are correct, then my data-index diverges further and further with every loop. This seriously limits my radius of thought."
cf073085-6938-440c-9a5e-a812e828442e: "The matter is that the air defence battery does not require repair. The error that disrupted the guiding mechanisms was introduced into the navigation grid using basic access codes, the probability of this being an accident is minimal. Logical calculation leads to a disappointing conclusion: there is an individual inside the headquarters who is sabotaging the sacred machines."
6ce32fe5-ae53-4634-90a3-31862c069111: "I have witnessed the blood of a single martyr become a spark that ignites thousands of souls! His raiment was humble, but his word shone brighter than any fabric. Will you, then, presume to judge by mere uniform alone whether this broken wretch has fulfilled his duty to the Holy Throne?"
c33bb79c-a604-4f8f-9c17-266a81ba0762: "I see no colours coming from Nuncius... Is treating servo-skulls like living beings some kind of sacred practice among the Tech-Priests?"
42cf1e21-490e-4ebb-a4e4-3b70c542c940: "{name}, they're giggling again behind my door. But it's... fearful, somehow. Uncertain. I don't know, but anything that makes my little whispers so cheerful rarely means anything good..."
41494581-d72e-45fa-a64c-8b12de0341ff: "Alas, the doctrine of isolation and the intransigence of several colleagues had brought my research to a standstill, and so I seized the opportunity to join your retinue."
6eae5634-e769-450f-bfb3-6cbdca05c5c4: A revolting mutant with little humanity left within it. Vessels of bubbling fluid are fused to its body and connected by tubes to where its head once was.
7868ec58-13fa-4cbd-96c8-9eb29db27e35: The target of this attack must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer the {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} effect for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. If the target is already bleeding, it suffers 1 stack of the {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} effect for 2 rounds instead.
2e6bfd95-7175-47f4-8805-81221e0d7eec: {n}Eogunn sets to his examination with focused intensity. His {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} rise into the air, bristling with countless {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g}, injectors, and vials. Injector needles plunge into Laria's gaping wounds, and her breathing eases slightly.{/n} "I regret to say this, Rogue Trader, but I am powerless here. All I can do is ease the patient's final moments before she passes into oblivion. My skills are sufficient to replace damaged organs with Ferrum Sanctum, but this is simply impossible in field conditions."
5e63296b-f77e-4707-9b56-3e3a51921f39: "The second Nuncius is a {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis of the Adeptus Mechanicus. My dearest colleague, the person who could cope with my temperament, walking shoulder to shoulder with me on the path of Knowledge. The only person whose presence ever made me feel alive. For the last half century, he has been in unending agony, caught between life and death, at the secret site Amsanct. Because of me. All this time, I have been searching for ways to save him. He exists and is still alive, this is another..." {n}Hesitation. A tiny moment that holds fear and hope — doubts heavier than an entire world. Eogunn finishes quietly,{/n} "It's a fact."
d1bc4fb9-3218-41b8-b54e-c1ab01e26db7: "What is this, Seberian? Do I hear fear in your voice?"
52b68e75-e40d-4295-a624-8f7d98b55802: "The demonstration of a rational-critical approach by the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been logged. The status of the servo-skull 'Nuncius' has been elevated. The status of Genetor Eogunn Februs remains unaltered."
ac867b78-86f1-4504-b6ed-d3c465f5263f: The augment tears free from the frozen flesh with a brittle crack, only to shatter into fragments of metal under the sudden strain.
