4b174c47-5b18-4da8-ac58-6788e88ad913: If a creature not affected by the {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}temporal anchor{/g} effect moves to a cell adjacent to the Chronomancer, it will be sent back to where it started its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, restoring all {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} that were lost during the turn.
09eaa1ef-d458-407a-87b5-8e402a037362: "I have discovered that Lady Drivestem was behind the murder."
012daa6d-fd87-4704-88f3-126083e15027: "I am sorry that the xenos heresy has clouded your judgement. You have left us no choice."
f549459e-eeca-4c10-8f40-f5e2b4c39bb8: Renew the oaths of the 32nd Merov Regiment
c1993b0c-f168-43f8-b355-63f11380fee2: The Crimson Dance of Khaine rests under thick glass like a museum piece.
79f2cddf-be25-432e-ae24-f13174b89711: "I require more information. Tell me exactly what the message said."
686a3256-a214-4611-89f1-2c9f7092d119: "Laria Voigtvir sent me. I have something to discuss with you."
b8b34551-e14c-460d-b103-80fa4b6e4d6e: "I sincerely hope this act was born of ignorance, Rogue Trader." {n}Heinrix's voice is quiet and calm, but the vein pulsing on his forehead betrays his true emotions.{/n}
b74d066d-8c1c-47db-b75a-efd48e3b3ab9: The perfect balance of this augmetic makes it not merely expensive, but truly rare.
01e4a151-1351-45b4-a019-93adede25482: "Out of the question. I will not beg for mercy from someone who, in defiance of the God-Emperor's covenants, appeared at the gates of my palace with fire and sword." {n}Seberian looks into Juvenna's eyes as he speaks forcefully:{/n} "The von Valancius dynasty will not bow before Diodas af Irramon. The gates of my house will not open to the enemy."
d7e079a9-92f3-4a7e-90dd-b17c9cf0f473: "The professionalism of the Vivisector life form made it possible for me to regain maximum achievable efficiency. A layperson would say that Martinax brought me back to life. Unfortunately, he was unable to save my vertebral implant." {n}The Genetor emits a plaintive binharic signal.{/n}
bf97bd75-2c0e-467f-85f8-01dd588f4f42: {n}Driven mad by pain, the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} soldier slowly sinks to his knees. His body still twitches with chaotic spasms, his gaze fixed straight ahead. He resembles a broken {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} in his agonised submission.{/n}
59e8a801-8ee8-46f2-ba7d-80d57d397834: Freight cranes securely hold the containers in the air.
50b7af59-95a6-43fd-a1ca-a719a4f885d2: {n}There is nothing but silence from the vox-channel. But you hear no click of disconnection, which means that someone has agreed to listen.{/n}
74d41d07-b2c9-482b-9228-84b87e25897e: "What I'm saying is a fact. You are stuck in a temporal anomaly. In each new loop, you forget everything that went before."
4850ba25-b9c5-485e-8b58-616e57a10cae: [Knock the pistol out of her hands]
88d2d01f-a692-4213-a5f6-f23fda068123: "Don't you dare touch the gene-lock! I forbid it under penalty of death!"
7fcb6b6a-ba69-4ce3-96a6-7e16d10d914b: "I have long observed the precepts of augmetic maintenance, nourishing my flesh with sacred parenteral formulations. Nevertheless, my body is quite capable of accepting mundane provisions. To the glory of the Omnissiah, let the experiment commence."
22ade5d4-2669-4f38-ba1e-9a152121b435: "Be careful, Lord Captain." {n}Abelard narrows his eyes at the outline of the coat of arms, his brows furrowed stubbornly.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous. It is my righteous duty as Seneschal to escort you inside."
5212676a-2fd3-40fb-b040-09046b27b878: "Of course! I am pleased you managed to reach us unharmed. A glittering future awaits a house of such persistence."
e34a9400-ff72-40cd-a7eb-4bd1f6389adf: "A clutch of vermin. Stowed away inside an exhibit, spoiling my masterpiece. And now I am compelled to appear here, on the half-forgotten fringes of the galaxy? Well done — you have succeeded in drawing upon yourselves the gaze of Trazyn the Infinite, master of the Museion you worthless pests invaded." {n}Caustic laughter scrapes its way out of the mask like metal against glass.{/n}
c168c98a-62a7-4cbf-9493-8f429ce2aa3e: You executed Izdrig Batoshski for daring to stand against you.
e60fb883-6381-4c2f-ade4-3fe3c0ac3c1a: "Please understand — is it possible to conduct an experiment without having all the relevant data? I must prepare."
c00547c5-c042-4ee7-b2f6-6674a1667222: "If it improves the efficiency of our interaction."
6666f88c-8381-48bf-afc9-6197a80f75f7: Inquisitor van Calox became the personal nemesis of the disgraced Genetor, relentlessly pursuing him for several decades. The xenarite movement was declared heretical throughout the entire Expanse, and the Inquisition spared neither servants nor promethium in its efforts to eradicate it. When the punitive squad led by the Inquisitor himself finally penetrated the planet where the former Manipulus had been conducting his unholy research, all they found was a vast, perfectly round crater on the site of his laboratory. Eogunn himself and all the foul mechanisms he had produced had vanished without a trace.
fbba0322-1ed2-4faf-9b84-45e99da6d7b5: You received a pair of Guardsman ear mufflers from Vedka Dunawski, modified with local wood.
7bd08855-43d3-4616-b70a-e01772bd265c: "The termination of Opticon-22's life cycle was executed in a most dignified manner, I cannot deny it." {n}The Manipulus gives a slight nod.{/n} "Nevertheless, death, however noble, carries grief in its wake. Let us honour the memory of the fallen with a galvanic hymn." {n}Eogunn's vox emits a solemn, mournful binharic chime.{/n}
b46df84a-3ea8-411a-b210-b70faf8d167f: "Why did you attack that menial? Do not do it again."
9da835a8-9c13-4dd2-aea7-2ec8022f5f97: {n}Laria listens to your story with an almost pained concentration. As the picture becomes clearer, her expression grows darker.{/n}
f50b5342-4deb-458f-ae85-9ea6365f73a7: "I don't know. This device is older than Humanity itself — who knows what else it is capable of? Stasis can only slow its effects."
e941f684-4a9e-4b0f-8571-7acb3ebe61dc: "I wish to thank you. You helped me cope with a situation that was beyond my control and to recognise my mistakes, and that is worth a great deal. I was considering using this implant in an experiment, but I thought it too valuable to waste on the laity. Please accept it as a gift." {n}The Manipulus bows, presenting you with a package.{/n}
81457d8a-1087-4e38-9b83-82509f86e72b: {n}Three nobles, accompanied by enforcers, come out to meet you. They are led by a man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. There is something vaguely familiar about the intact portion of his face — the rest of the stranger's flesh has been replaced with implants that have turned him into a macabre semblance of himself. The nobleman narrows his organic eye in suspicion, its cerulean blue hiding beneath his dark lashes. You hear the hiss of servo-motors and the creak of metal against metal as he casually rests his augmented fingers on the hilt of his sword, which is clearly of xenos origin.{/n}
8636e38a-ae48-4a18-936d-72b301580c38: "Death is for other people. I shall rise above it, for such is my destiny!"
8765847c-13bf-4711-836d-53f4e20b6769: Promised to provide the Zarkovian troops with adequate living conditions.
f65ac163-d446-4897-b98a-d5416c46af12: "What do the experts from the Sector Bionica think?"
03ce5f0c-057b-4409-b897-162045f6645b: The palace gates are sealed, and thus Juvenna cannot act with decisive force. The gate's litany must be learned, or some other means of opening it must be found.
34f30c9d-77a0-40bb-9b7e-90443e84683e: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It's wonderful, just wonderful! I've been limping these thirty years, and now, look, I'm jumping!"
fd4e622d-8e9a-45af-96ad-3b60fca8e649: {n}The skull's eye sockets stare blindly back at you.{/n}
7e2dd68c-8350-4372-9eb8-6f79a74c6d77: "How may I serve you, Lord Captain?" {n}The foreman carefully enunciates every word, swaying slightly on his feet from exhaustion.{/n}
67adc24b-ad3b-4e6a-afc7-029916e9a991: The soldiers of Zarkov had intended to fight back against the countless abominations, but the Necron horde had taken too many with them. Once the seemingly endless stream finally dwindled, the ground was littered with bodies: sons and daughters of Zarkov who had made the ultimate sacrifice for House von Valancius.
0b0c7097-0a98-44bf-b0d6-2cffb73e9599: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. The next step is to find the liaison with the call sign "Elana."
2f1fe695-1b66-4bfb-a345-ed6364703fad: The funereal detachments shall be reformed into the Conventus Veneficarum, a chirurgeon guild specialising in Zarkov's toxins. The guild's works will help crush the enemies of the protectorate while fortifying its defenders.
0e8f77da-3245-45dd-89cc-e0f5b96b1c2b: "All right, all right. Let's just wait and see who they choose to take."
2e990805-e5ee-4456-9b65-bc8d162582ec: "The God-Emperor granted us the Warrant of Trade to expand the borders of the Imperium — to explore the far reaches of the galaxy and annex new worlds. To do this, a Rogue Trader must be flexible where the laws of the Imperium are cumbersome. He must be driven not by greed, but by a thirst for discovery. And, of course, he must be a leader whom others will follow — without loyal subjects on the ground, one cannot maintain one's rule over the protectorate."
28701143-7a59-4d98-ad78-ee65587f9bad: "How could we not get along, Lord Captain? Especially after what he's done for me! I may not like his approach to people, but his exceptional healing abilities are beyond question. Besides, I am now unable to perform procedures fully by myself..."
27a7b06a-125a-4769-8b7a-b9bd147c1e54: "Not yet. But hard times give servants like me the chance to prove their usefulness."
a4e3e727-6fd5-4950-8b2b-b753bf91565a: "The sacrament of Ferrum Sanctum will be made available to you and your retinue. That, too, is an incontrovertible fact." {n}His spherical torso rolls forward again in a deferential bow.{/n}
9ca2a986-bd14-4fa0-9e5d-3b51476a89a7: {n}Laria looks down at the floor, trying to hide the tears that have escaped.{/n} "I do not renounce my words and I will not stand in the way of Lady Juvenna. When the time comes, you will understand {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}the true reason{/d} for my actions, Your Lord-" {n}She falters on the word and determinedly raises her reddened eyes to Seberian.{/n} "You will understand, Father."
d77b2d71-43af-4e91-87e1-a5ad82980c68: "I see. It seems I was misinformed." {n}The captain surveys you from head to toe with a cold, scrutinising look.{/n} "Hardly surprising."
57afb976-8667-483a-8f1d-5b3f99568713: {n}The Necron says nothing, in no hurry to dignify you with further conversation.{/n}
ffdcd2ba-d0fa-4ea2-b43e-0ca334497a42: {n}Not looking up from his examination of Nuncius, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader?"
807c4c07-44b5-44d8-aacc-d73c3c14c8bc:
Grants the soldiers of his squad the {g|f:5ca18e82922f464f8d89d9ea751b0381}officer on the line{/g} effect.
When the commissar suffers lethal damage, he remains in combat until he finishes his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
860ae52f-62e3-428f-85d1-e8d36a1494c9: "This servant of the God-Emperor fought with valour and utter devotion. Do not prolong his suffering. He has earned the Emperor's Mercy for his loyalty."
fb3ea103-378e-406a-8f79-c44e87574d9d: "It used to be simpler. The commander would be right there on the next branch. He'd hand out orders, rations, and targets all at once. Then again..." {n}The governor rubs a hand over his stubbled neck.{/n} "Truth be told, food's not an issue anymore, and the rifles are brand new, still smelling of oil... Life could be worse."
51d5e098-934a-48f1-a615-06ee1af36e34: "When those things appeared, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ZarkovNonameGovernor}Colonel-Governor Kuravich{/d} was personally handling the delivery of the sacred mechanisms to the red robes. Their machine spirit chapel is located in the north-east."
9b2165ed-c334-4dc9-a434-3ee5bbf45180: This weapon gains +3 base damage for each enemy killed using it. Lasts until the end of combat.
fedd6758-55ea-4bf7-a8e5-21fe92562bf8: "I recently heard that some noble positions got hit by artillery, it seems. The banners scattered like a flock of birds. I wish I knew who it was."
db3f46c8-c8c2-49c8-9c18-3f3ff2122004: {n}The hairs on your body stand on end. A tingling, unbearably hot wave of voltage rushes through your nerves, and every muscle twists in a sharp spasm. A powerful pulse of energy propels you backward.{/n}
6bc9e6af-49dc-4894-aeff-a9c5f18a80e1: {n}When you leave the shooting range, your departure is accompanied by respectful nods, shouts, and even friendly pats on the shoulder. It seems you have won over some of the Merovians.{/n}
b4fa4b3f-3816-4948-b8dd-cd4704d3b107: "I heard {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}you saved{/d} Drill Sergeant Jovakha's life." {n}Izdrig is silent for a while and then nods slightly.{/n} "Thank you."
17729baf-723a-4ad0-9e78-d9a2948321b8: "You... You should know what your medicae officers are doing to your people."
67215e6c-77c7-4551-8a9b-a175d025c2ad: {n}The Tech-Priest's visor flashes in the direction of the lift.{/n} "The assessment is flawed. The machine spirits are ravenous, and my functionality does not allow me to satiate them. The algorithm of action proposed by the layperson is correct: it is necessary to plunge the excess machines into a blissful slumber and redirect the currents of Motive Force to the repository circuit."
531868b6-c7f9-4863-9ce6-a4c1fc06527e: "I would like to know more about the Magos's research."
f310c3fb-8283-4a29-8da7-954607b3e235: "Your invasion of my laboratory was utterly presumptuous, though very timely. However, I can hardly blame the Cult of the Bloodspun Web for disrespecting the mysteries of Knowledge — let those responsible for the ruined specimens be held accountable for this... surge of entropy."
300f8564-72f4-4f62-90c3-2cb3e2e2385b: The user's Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill are reduced by −5%.
1c8baafd-2db6-4414-aa9e-2efd97bf93ec: {n}You do not need to finish the tale. A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments and, in a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the life form's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."
d19f53f1-60de-47da-ac4f-bc9e48de8939: "Dunawski, let's just get this over with already."
1cb2e26b-8768-4153-9320-f0118b0ce03b: [Convince Juvenna to let you join the conspiracy]
a0588f0b-b75c-4f10-9fdb-9b0536337829: {n}A powerful shot pulverised the head into a tangle of metal and cables. Your eyes linger on the sprawling metal tentacles. Never before have you seen mechadendrites so peculiarly modified. The killer must have thought the same: one of the limbs is missing, with only a dark and empty connection socket where it ought to be.{/n}
b315e90c-aab9-485e-b0d1-c98d1acfb14e: [Step forward] "I will say it for the last time: stand aside, xenos."
21f0614f-83fd-4d55-8174-6dbfab08ce3b: "Well, that will do. I am now willing to answer questions, my {mf|lord|lady}." {n}The captain locks his fingers together with a look of satisfaction.{/n}
48869c80-d914-4ca4-af2b-125089fc8fc8: "The processing capacity of this unit's cogitator is insufficient to produce a precise prognostic calculation of the consequences. Preliminary hypothesis: deactivation of the xenomechanism will precipitate a localised catastrophe, with zero survivability for all those situated at its epicentre."
0af38a9a-df46-47c2-9fc6-1e5c17c7c62b: [Step closer] "I did not grant you leave to kill yourself!"
eac808a8-2eaa-4e35-86ca-f8d93de6d91f: During the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the Rogue Trader's intervention. Laria proposes trusting in their allies and maintaining the defence.
7db79952-0600-4ce1-84da-ce852dcf44a5: "The accuracy of blessed calculations tends toward the absolute, but the absolute is the domain of the Omnissiah alone!"
b86d21be-795e-4581-9d2d-6979d04dce2d: [Attack] "Get off my ship, enemy of Humanity!"
32d0782b-14dd-4c9b-b44f-a0cebe77a2b8: "Eogunn, your experiments are indeed dangerous. Henceforth, you shall not conduct them outside the laboratory."
3a4a6dfc-639b-477d-8410-78b94d13dcad: "As long as you are under my protection, you are in no danger."
917daccc-24d4-4488-a9cd-eec3a47cab1c: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.
82fa9a84-c70a-49dd-9bb3-0b1f7099ed96:
Whenever the user scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} with a ranged weapon for the first time in a {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, they throw one random grenade from the inventory into the cell occupied by the target, without spending {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}.
Grenade throwing range is increased by +30.
9e7322f4-d0f3-4b1d-a857-cd541d71c006: "No officer on my ship will ever have to stand in a queue. Let them through."
cc1b4106-3f5b-4b03-909f-d51ca93e99d3: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is repeating itself. Now you can decide whether to follow what is predetermined or to try to break the cycle.]
0cd7f6e7-77cd-413d-8588-a28a70974865: "...418, 419, 420. God-Emperor, I can't believe my eyes. Provisions, and not just from anywhere, but straight from Janus itself."
9af8cb93-f6fb-48c2-a0ff-c6fdefb67bb6: "I am a bearer of a Warrant of Trade, Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius. And here, in the wild reaches of the Koronus Expanse, I represent the might of the God-Emperor. And you shall carry out His will."
914427a7-a4b7-4eb3-b83a-134c6a3f4906: {n}Your ancestor holds himself with a relaxed posture, gazing at you defiantly.{/n} "These threats will only cause your loyal servant to expire from apoplexy. They make no impression upon me, so spare yourself the effort."
c85b3b4d-a815-4cd9-90f7-d6a5edda7780: "The flickers of colour, so bright and so frantic, they shift and bleed into one another, forming one ugly blot... He is on the edge, Lord Captain. At his limit." {n}Cassia whispers so quietly that her words reach you alone.{/n}
c7741c78-651f-4458-bcf8-38a235880574: {n}Eogunn fixes the xenos with a gaze so lethal that, were such things possible, naught would remain of the creature but a smouldering pile of greasy soot. He remains silent, his face a mask of steel as his eyes drill into the Haemonculus.{/n}
228e3967-e408-4d14-9642-140b352c947d: "Request... approved. Glory to the Omnissiah and His grand design!"
8e4dd5f0-0f4f-445f-841b-0d381465c621: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat, looking bemused.{/n} "I... shall bear in mind Master Nuncius's eloquence."
4b4cbd0f-d004-4f90-a411-4923ba04de17: Any {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g} attacks made with a sword deal +{uip|damage|d4be859eb6d84504aeed852ef248f6fa}% additional {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}. This bonus damage is doubled if using a two-handed sword.
eb5baff6-0f36-4a3b-a6fc-f7310990f020: {n}You rush away, pulling out your vox and calling enforcers as you run. You hear a vexed exclamation behind you, and then the green gleam on the walls tells you that the vision has vanished in a final flash of light.{/n}
fa985514-7d26-4d31-ad26-af8184b6db6c: "The procession on deck awash with such bright colours, though it consisted of lowly rabble. The contrast seems unusual and even... beautiful. Will my paints be able to convey it?"
f0d7a48e-135e-477a-b9ba-0c68003ff5ef: {n}Jae smiles slyly, eyeing the colonel.{/n} "Something tells me someone's in trouble..."
b59e166b-7d5e-4236-b0ab-2e5a887e3dd3: "Thank you for saving my life, Lord Captain." {n}Martinax rasps, pale as a sheet. Pressing a hand to his bloody head, he bows awkwardly.{/n} "Please excuse me, but my presence is needed in the operating chamber. Genetor Ferrenz is in grave condition..."
d451db67-2389-4860-ba96-603f52e0d369: {n}For an instant, crimson engulfs the blue of Pasqal's visors. A disgruntled rasp trickles from his vox:{/n} "Status confirmed. Rejection of request acknowledged as valid."
0f7e6e31-c2ef-41cd-90d3-64bf4d801b1e: "I note that this thesis is not only true for you. For myself and Nuncius, travelling side by side with an Aeldari is also a source of knowledge that will remain inexhaustible even in the event of your demise."
7a310c75-33eb-4703-a093-81cbdc626310: "I almost thought you were angling to be executed. Please avoid such quips in the future."
0ea1bc53-92b7-4c97-a644-71be24e0ded3: "Camilla Drivestem is responsible for the Gaprak's death."
d6144ec6-1c33-4fa6-a2b1-618d0a123543: "My gran would tell me stories about the First Call-Up. It's believed that your ancestor used to say that even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds. It's not our way to waste our efforts on lost causes, but now... Thank you once again. The regiment will not forget what you have done!"
1f4cd064-cf74-4d99-b45e-12616be90b3d: "O wisest of men, how have you kept a grip on your sanity after the barbarity of that ashmag xenos? I thought I'd had it rough, but he butchered you like a grox!"
134605d4-c32a-4724-9df3-9ecd19235a74: "Look at you, you're held together by spit and prayers. Are you sure you don't need a visit to a chirurgeon?"
3a87e8df-137b-46ca-ad95-bc473f827669: {n}The Manipulus mimics Pasqal's demeanour with uncanny accuracy, casting a sly glance at his opponent.{/n} "Request acknowledged, Rogue Trader."
62dde2a9-fb64-4ffb-8be0-539b961d58c8: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship as long as his hands could hold a scalpel. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector's remains were used in the creation of a medicae servo-skull by Genetor Ferrenz. This great honour allowed him to continue his work for the Rogue Trader.
0a5951a7-0d70-41b4-ab41-1cfe59333e1b: "The overt study of artefacts of xenotic origin is deemed a malign breach of data-hygiene restrictions. I demand the immediate seizure and subsequent isolation in stasis containers of all samples."
cb1e7615-88ce-4340-bd5b-2e5d855a03e3: "I will order the arrest of the duchess. Stirring up trouble when we're already under attack? Sometimes I don't understand how Father even tolerates them."
92cd299b-ac4c-4edf-a7ee-4bafe8bf577c: At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user deals {uip|fire_damage|510cfc47d3d040daa9d85c879943f174} {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g} to all creatures located exactly 5 cells away from them. Xenos and daemons suffer +50% more damage.
9a459e61-464a-48b6-849b-1948af089a5f: "In the name of the Emperor's anointed Seberian von Valancius, I, Seneschal of the Dynasty Laria Voigtvir, sentence you, traitor, to death." {n}The Seneschal delivers each word in a hollow tone, her jaw working stiffly.{/n} "By the will of the God-Emperor, let justice be done." {n}The world is plunged into a sea of gunfire that tears through your flesh, and the last thing you see before darkness falls is Laria's angry, desperate gaze.{/n}
a0aa3dc6-016f-4285-a671-e07b3ff5582d: "You are correct, my esteemed colleague: I am indeed a short-lived, absurd creature with a rudimentary mind and utterly questionable cognitive abilities..."
2742b2a9-6c1f-4ff7-8c52-03c13a3320e3: "You have to say goodbye to Nuncius and let him go. Just be with him. You have to do it for him and for yourself, not for anyone else."
2ad2614b-fe9f-4f89-b7e7-a79fe5c9d9f4: Branek Zarkov is on Laria's side — his support should be maintained.
3e9d72c3-b886-4fb1-885e-d70127cb4958: "You should watch your words. My patience is not infinite."
20802070-ec15-4f1c-8beb-d2ee521f6317: {n}Strapped to the enforcer's belt is a weapon that you easily recognise as a plasma pistol. Despite the expensive finish, the gun is clearly a combat weapon — the grip, bearing the monogram "IS," is covered with scratches and scuffs, indicating frequent use. {/n}
3e43d176-f371-4e80-b891-d65078aa37d2: "What objects do you have in your collection?"
91ad2e20-ed5f-4878-9910-7c396bf2ab15: {n}Abelard shakes his head in bemusement.{/n} "A servo-skull... as your colleague? Right. Well then, I'll take a data-slate for my adjutant!"
101abbab-b29b-4a08-a0a4-e6f777ca8f8f: "In gratitude for the expansion of our knowledge of archeotech, the tech-clergy of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is prepared to perform grade-three binharic rites over the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} of your vessel. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, a Manipulus who has received the benediction of the Motive Force, will be sent to embark your ship immediately. Omnissiah's blessings!"
b18e798b-bc51-4121-ab6f-b492106a1d88: "There is something deeply improper about feeling the inner desire to agree with a disgusting xenos when he is slinging mud at the servants of the Archenemy." {n}Heinrix grimaces, either at the foul sight of the heretic Astartes or at his own reaction to Trazyn's words.{/n}
8a36960f-783b-42fb-8a12-e0c68611c559: Order the examination of the man on the throne.
16942787-4698-4b90-b4c8-8f2b5a5b7ab7: "Another false claim. I believe the reason is that the specimen originally reconfigured the instrument in that way to guard against unauthorised exposure. Would that be... reasonable from the perspective of a rational mind?" {n}The Manipulus strives to suppress the traitorous tremor in his voice.{/n}
726542cc-c185-4813-8111-fd87ee2327df: "The bombardment has been paused. Or have you already forgotten what we discussed?"
e80e8518-bf23-45f1-8159-2a12c706d2a5: We were faster than death itself as we fought back the alien creations while trying to stay on top of platforms that were soaring up toward the Museion. Plasma shots burned rough-edged holes in our foes' metal bodies, but we were hopelessly outnumbered. A heroic death under the Necron onslaught was a fate only a few escaped.
6746a90d-c033-42cf-9b74-2ad591449ffa: "Lord Captain, we have received a transmission from the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}Adeptus Arbites{/g} base of operations on Dargonus. {g|Encyclopedia:ProctorGlossary}Proctor{/g} Solomorne Anthar is invoking a pact made with Her Ladyship Theodora and asks for an audience. How are we to respond?"
41a2c11e-701d-4b34-abff-cd28fec551a8: "If their duty is to serve as the flagship's arrogant figureheads, then who am I to get in their way? Since the custom here is to obey them, we'll do our best to steer clear of the enforcers."
b87dd35f-b531-4507-ab4c-51caa883249b:
The wearer's attacks gain bonuses based on the type of weapon used:
-<indent=5%>Attacks with melta and plasma weapons gain +{uip|Value|0f4b1986d7084a838920648e221c7768}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with bolter and solid projectile weapons gain +{uip|Value|0f4b1986d7084a838920648e221c7768}% {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} chance.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with las and flamer weapons gain +{uip|Value|0f4b1986d7084a838920648e221c7768}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with chain and primitive weapons gain +{uip|Value|0f4b1986d7084a838920648e221c7768}% {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}parry reduction{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with force and power weapons gain +{uip|Value2|0f4b1986d7084a838920648e221c7768} {g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}deflection negation{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with exotic weapons gain +{uip|Value|0f4b1986d7084a838920648e221c7768}% chance to inflict a random common {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.</indent>
1db0ef84-7ece-4560-a727-2f63471f62ae: "Then such is my fate." {n}The captain falls silent and turns away, making it clear that the conversation is over.{/n}
c2db02d6-e1f0-4178-bd58-5646ba8754e7: "It's simple: my shereen the Lord Captain has a nose for profit. You'd be surprised how useful it can be to have a flexible mindset, tin can."
b7c1437f-fa4b-4e61-ac0c-a647619feb7f: "In that case, take your place on the implantation throne, Lord Captain."
31f98e0e-1ece-451f-8456-8ee91793c9bd: "Who among your fellow soldiers carries a plasma weapon?"
58526396-0848-491d-9c65-b4a54e405a44: "To conquer and dominate. We are the blade that cuts down the weak and unworthy."
e48cd394-6e9c-480c-a779-3c0bc8f51ffb: "The request is unacceptable. I predicted that augmenting the voidsman soldier life form above the established baseline would cause the utility life forms to develop a distorted perception of their individual value — that is, irrationally inflated." {n}The hiss of the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g}'s vox can barely be heard over the murmuring of the crowd.{/n}
9439d976-a5f6-4a4f-8644-aae11a90c098: "Mistress Laria sent me to seek your counsel. About what to do if one is trapped in a time loop."
fb3bfad7-2755-4512-b18d-eb7a80a6e009: {n}The Vivisector now has two short, ugly stumps where his arms used to be. Noticing your gaze, he flinches and averts his eyes.{/n}
0ebe923f-a927-4257-a575-ba5fdd9b47d7: "Of course, such privileges for the lower decks are unprecedented. Yet these people are the lifeblood of the ship, Lord Captain, however low their standing in the social hierarchy. Allowing augmentation in the lower decks will enable workers to toil longer and will help older crew members remain of sound mind and pass on their experience to younger generations. I advise you to grant the request — it will only strengthen your crew!"
f9efe06f-a4f0-40bb-996d-a46647246168: "Unthinkable." {n}Pasqal's visor flashes crimson.{/n} "I assess collaboration with Genetor Februs to be counterproductive. His willingness to distort dogma in order to justify his own flaws borders dangerously on heresy."
dc5ac061-4a18-4e07-adb1-1e577b957211: Only one exhibit on a huge dais. It seems this space has been set aside for future trophies.
73f8cac9-2795-4eba-935b-ab5f3eeea450: After the user makes 4 attacks with this {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g}, it malfunctions for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
7ed4af13-0999-46bd-ad0f-a083246348ba: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, dedicated his life to finding and collecting implants. Rumour had it that a separate chamber had to be added to the bay to house a collection of bionic arms bought, found, or cut from still-living flesh.
2a290072-79e6-468f-ae01-a2c742740284: {n}Where the mysterious shard once adorned the wall of your study, there is now a blank space. The trophy board is empty.{/n}
544a81a4-cf83-4ee8-a529-975b52a994f3: This weapon grants its wielder the {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Phasing Strike{/g} attack that ignores enemy {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} and is also used to perform {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}.
a2f4d4d0-7939-4995-871c-61b0d9f977ae: A Tech-Priest who has chosen medicae and biology as their field of scientific research. Genetors account for a large portion of the members of the Adeptus Mechanicus, and they hold great sway in determining the policies of the cult. They are distinguished from other brethren of the faith by their keen research interest in various forms of organic life.
d101c8b5-8ac5-40e6-a1b0-8171502e68af: {n}You see Janur's expression darken.{/n} "That's right, the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment."
2db4c8df-3b7a-43eb-aa74-ad21f968fa6a: "It seems that you yourself have fallen victim to the subtle manipulation of one individual..."
627fa554-2ea9-4cc9-a6c4-49b74cd8d993: "Please do not encroach upon a control radius beyond your competence. A layperson, which you are, does not possess sufficiently advanced knowledge to assign priority to malfunction events."
6b4a7d66-9259-454d-a767-0cbb94688495: {n}After gracing you with one last disinterested glance, the Warden phases out of reality in a flare of green light. The Krieg soldiers spring into motion, turning their faces covered by rebreathers in your direction and raising their lasguns.{/n}
019e46a6-43a6-4533-a1d0-0517783c8ebd: "This code... it looks familiar. I think this might a variant of {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} encoding. Each regiment maintains its own, of course, but the underlying principles are similar. It appears to be a distress call."
bbfa10ab-a36b-4375-85d9-b3d77a224b85: "Blood of Sanguinius! Release me, traitor!" {n}The Astartes thrashes in a futile attempt to break his shackles.{/n}
2680cc5a-8359-4054-91eb-3dea9d1d83c4: {n}Stunned, you return to reality. Something inexplicable just happened, and the echoes of it are still coursing through your blood, causing your heart to clench in convulsions. Nevertheless, you are unharmed, and you once again find yourself standing at the gates of your dynasty's palace on Dargonus. There is nothing around you to indicate that what happened to you was real. Nothing but your memories.{/n}
e661ebf1-8efc-420b-af47-e3b1e1a379af: "Stygies VIII is a {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}forge world{/g} located on one of the moons of a gas giant in the binary star system of Vulcanis. A magnificent place! Stretching from horizon to horizon, mighty {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorums{/g} crisscross the moon's surface, producing armaments and equipment. For the armies of the Segmentum Solar, the designs and patterns we produce are unequalled in the galaxy. The huge Titans of the Legio Honorum tower over cohorts of Skitarii making ready to escort countless expeditions, ravenous for knowledge and lost technology."
42eefd80-2bcd-4e45-9e14-b4eae318b69b: "Staying silent? Perhaps that's for the best."
0e98545a-029a-41f9-be50-e4f9eca38513: Green glimmers undulate across the alien metal, giving the blade the semblance of a snake poised to strike its victim.
928e0e3f-b1fe-47b9-90f1-8ed7025c554e: {n}Argenta hurriedly whispers a litany, forming the Aquila over her chest.{/n} "The righteous mind cannot be broken by the machinations of His enemies."
71bd5d99-dcc4-455b-bef1-5e7b8411784a: "I have heard all I wished to know."
17fa167a-fd1a-4bda-90d6-a221bc6b4874: "My leg feels like it's on fire! How is that normal? Give me the complaint form!"
4ec8725e-2e70-4afb-bc0a-27390c2c881d: You allied with Seneschal Laria Voigtvir and sided with Seberian in the confrontation with the Inquisition.
7cd81819-f46b-4255-aa4c-84b030d9c119: "How dare you!" {n}The cold light of Seberian's optical implant falls upon you.{/n} "For those words alone, I ought to shoot you on the spot, but I will grant you a final chance to speak: what harebrained speculation drove you to accuse my daughter of treason?"
55ca4fb1-c2b9-43a9-a94c-334ae51a64a1: "Your regiment's a little out of the ordinary, I see..."
4fc880d0-cf28-462a-aab9-052c4eba9db4: "Patis Rube of the Word Bearers, leader of a warband that travelled to the region in search of one of the shards of the Final Dawn. He did not possess it for long — the extraction occurred shortly after he acquired it."
63756a0c-c8aa-4679-9a5e-ddf524d9a1ca: {n}Dunawski's gaze wanders, scanning the bridge for a few seconds as if she searches for something.{/n} "Do what's right. I hear you, Lord Captain! We'll stand by our traditions, regardless of what anyone else has to say."
aa34fd0c-62a7-485a-a96d-88618f0aef50: "One should not make such hasty decisions. Diagnostic auspexes have revealed to me that the victim's life currents harbour no corruption. The sacred iron within her body functions with complete efficacy; thus, this individual is untainted by entropy."
19867d5d-6775-4779-8f3d-30a1708265fa: "I'm from House Gaprak. The Inquisition forces are on their way. Rest up before the battle, and I will keep watch."
2688ebc6-0e64-4892-ae72-e052e469b1c9: "How are the seconded troops from Zarkov faring?"
0cae6e04-80d8-4599-9067-3c4634cae14f: The Rogue Trader has discovered a xenotech device and must now choose: attempt to detonate the replica from within, or continue the search for another means of escape
043eb02e-a064-40df-a820-a175909f8470: Whenever a target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|fe63fa43f7a7420e9d79a41317ea357b} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
b1e5c694-5ba4-44d8-9247-1fddc782e8d8:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
The use of stimulants costs −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
1cabb0a8-36d1-4371-a0f3-4b590f4d5eb1: {n}Marazhai's lip curls.{/n} "Your buck— your ship is but a tiny shell in the universe of possibilities that is open to my talents. Though the Reaving Tempest has ended, I can find a replacement for it. Not in Commorragh, but in the other dark corners of this sector. Sslyth, Corsairs, mon-keigh — there are many who long to bend the knee to one who knows the canons of war and the tenets of slaughter."
6752efc0-f01c-4561-af41-22c83c0a2a06: "Do you think that, after you die, I will leave your little fiefdom in peace? I will not."
99d8f4e8-1d46-4187-84d8-c76856c349f2: For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this augment's counter-attack triggers whenever the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}. At the end of this effect, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} until the end of combat.
33e89c35-1026-4627-8de2-fba6435b5ab0: "I have heard all I wish to."
7343ef6e-6b49-4ef4-a10e-b841ef6c9aec: "At present, this specimen is being used in one of my experiments as punishment. I removed all parts that interfered with his participation in the experiment, but what remains is perfectly functional. And it will remain so until his meagre mind submits, having absorbed the true state of affairs."
63c9bf8b-99a5-40d3-8cfd-c3439c14595a: "L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit! Weak! Weak!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My heart... is down there... in the shaft! They gave... my hands... to the rrrrats..."
c9f88a11-7941-43dd-bd38-08506bd011e9: "No one says 'no' to a Rogue Trader!"
3e3683dd-7fbf-4386-9ecd-e04414a5f7eb: Trazyn attacks twice in one {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}. He will attempt to spread his attacks across different targets.
2dd5f89f-638c-4166-b166-1171e99e9f1a: "Primitive civilisations are always amusing in their inability to grasp the full scope of their powerlessness — and their simultaneous insistence on denying it altogether. The path for those in this place is determined by me alone — all the more so now that your actions have forced me to come here in person."
9fe571cf-1d56-44f0-af02-47e1d29eb4be: {n}Seberian's rumbling laughter sounds like the grinding of unlubricated gears.{/n} "Now you have shown your true colours, Juvenna. Have you conspired with Diodas? Was it not you who led him to the gates of our house? I should have known sooner and disinherited you, traitor. We shall see. Who will follow you?"
9e439764-2ce9-4795-a293-7f9b5c7e9d68: "It isn't bleak at all. Life simply is. We do not need to attach any deep meaning to it or explain it."
779d3dec-8af1-4694-86c5-f23f2329c4cd: Isimond slew the Gaprak scion on Camilla's orders, yet Juvenna was the architect of the entire conspiracy. The heiress used the hands of others to divert suspicion from herself.
1c6a5914-a307-4a8e-bc3c-ce9d1d01241b: The user's Weapon Skill is reduced by −10%.
04a99dd9-6e5f-4b95-8199-6a5d078b134c: "Let's dispense with the pleasantries and get straight to the point."
f9c08789-0bc4-4bde-bd84-1bbac612b262: "I refuse to disclose confidential data to a non-ordained entity."
c2967557-459c-471a-b06c-a8b2eff32f59: "To my dearest colleague, Nuncius, who else would I...?"
6fa01804-03c3-475b-bdb9-fcedd2889d96: "Xenos are xenos. Send the 32nd Regiment to destroy all of them indiscriminately."
fe260d05-9c29-4b49-a6e9-4edc67929abc: "Don't try to give me false hopes, my heir. Evacuation is impossible, you know this as well as I." {n}A surge of the Motive Force flashes in Seberian's bionic eye and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n} "Futile efforts only hasten the inevitable." {n}He steps toward Laria and gently lifts her.{/n}
51352884-6fea-4230-982d-e93085c55afb: "Regretfully, no. That is outside the scope of the data-index."
70fa58b8-c17d-4cce-92c4-7633b930faec: "Oh no, these things are not dead. Each of them is surrounded by faint echoes of colours, both their own and those brought by someone...who was here before. They all carry stories of which they are a part, and they were all precious to someone, not now and not here."
1e966d54-5e8a-49e1-a72e-c0ee70c36158: "Nuncius's life does not belong to you. Neither does your own. They both belong to the Imperium. Your heresy has flouted dogma and doomed you both, and it is your duty to rectify what you have done. Go to Amsanct and break this vicious circle."
076031c4-7c14-4fa4-9936-3a2d38faa48e: {n}The mysterious planet continues its leisurely journey through the great void.{/n}
557fa646-3e90-4b1e-bb2b-0dab0a19ada6: A wave of current jolts through your body like a snarl from the ancient mechanism, and it continues functioning as perfectly as before.
457a8a4a-fb63-4013-85cc-daad061699af: "First, present the object for inspection. It might only hold value in your eyes." {n}Eogunn extends his hand with a sharp, commanding gesture of impatience.{/n}
19fb8020-c7ed-4562-83b0-d15e7c3c8373: {n}The Manipulus fixes the woman with a calculating look, as though weighing whether she is a speaker worthy of his time. At last, he speaks:{/n} "I wish neither to confirm nor deny this claim."
8ee079f6-4e56-4be7-9aaf-9d55f92033ba: "You and your soldiers are fine fighters. You simply picked the wrong side. Leave Seberian."
04f578f8-a3d8-4b26-9b84-5daa7dfd3b3e: "I can confirm: the duke's forces have been destroyed. The scion escaped the flames, but I made sure he did not reach the palace." {n}Distorted by interference, the voice becomes quieter.{/n}
0171a1fe-bf56-4ccd-8c65-86de49d35153: {n}Your boots inevitably soil the Warrant, yet each sacrilegious step only stokes righteous fury within you, strengthening your will and your faith, as if the God-Emperor Himself is sending forth His divine wrath.{/n}
a940995d-08ff-4eca-93dc-9ff8b83937f1: "Lord Captain." {n}Abelard coughs slightly.{/n} "Following the rites of healing performed by the esteemed Manipulus Februs upon the implantation throne in the Sector Bionica, the machine spirits dwelling within the relic revealed something extraordinary to us."
ef9ef216-0582-4c23-be48-fa7ff2b9370b: {n}Seberian stares ahead, dumbstruck, helpless to fend off the realisation crashing over him. The light of his cybernetic eye stutters, as though even his augmetics are breaking under the weight bearing down upon them.{/n}
40859bea-b60e-45c0-aeb6-d9525eecea0f: {n}The xenos spews several untranslatable curses that devolve into a grinding, clicking screech as the plasma cutter leaves only melted holes where its eyes and mouth were.{/n}
2b7a50ef-de3a-402d-965c-8f747222f0f6: "Abelard, enlighten these... puppets of this sacrilegious spectacle as to whom they are addressing."
4a2c744f-cf60-4d89-ab85-5624de1fbcaf: "The Gaprak lord's murder is part of a plot against you orchestrated by Juvenna."
7836d451-dba4-4eeb-afac-363a67f67c23: "We separated the damaged vertebral implant and adjacent mechadendrites from the body in time, but the God-Emperor alone kept Ferrenz alive. It may come as a surprise, but even Tech-Priests need blood — and the Genetor required a special type. I put word out over the ship's vox-system and people on the lower decks answered my call — the ones who are thanking you today. It was their readiness to serve Humanity that saved Ferrenz. He himself has come here to offer his praises to you."
1de68455-93b4-465b-bf63-fbd2c8633166: The buds of these plants look menacing.
505fefc2-9577-43c2-829c-9fb2dfd234a6: "More than... imagination... encompass" {n}The Elucidator emits several binharic beeps, having failed to cope with the complex construction of the phrase.{/n} "Did not reveal... its might to the primitives.... only endless suffering for one. The end of... of a lowly intellect."
60eb1cc7-ecce-42ab-9df5-833c533a50f1: "Nothing out of the ordinary to delay you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
84167b46-0f4d-48c9-9b2b-bd5f7d5e2040: Manipulator mechadendrite attacks enemies in {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushing{/g} them up to 2 cells away and dealing {uip|Damage|215371a91c7047abb0fc1acbbbbcf63c} damage. This attack has {uip|Penetration|215371a91c7047abb0fc1acbbbbcf63c}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
319d2408-68a4-4e1f-bcf2-df60d9c91100: Eogunn gains +{uip|DamageBlocked|dc6f47b218804f308ef002560628e43d}% block when targeted with ranged attacks.
a0da81e5-fa51-44f8-8c03-b4464603cbbf: "You truly are the saviour of Zarkov sent by the Emperor! We'll go back to the Cage and tell the colonel the news. We'll await your triumphant return, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
a9850c4b-b542-4a4b-83e5-fa46a4d1f75c: {n}The patient you rescued back on your first trip to Zarkov is in poor shape, yet he maintains a firm grip on his lasgun.{/n} "It seems you have saved me twice now, Lord Captain."
bbaa0ded-71fb-403d-90d9-30a2dc00a8ee: {n}Kuravich turns pale.{/n} "Old habits, my apologies. I don't always understand yet, uh, what counts as heresy here and what doesn't... Yasik! Drop the cutter, better safe than sorry! Just leave it."
7b5a2474-f483-4647-a10b-a9fe08477a65: {n}Eogunn raises his hands in a gesture of solemn greeting.{/n} "My neural implants are overloaded with relief at beholding you in good health, Rogue Trader! I never doubted that the strength of your spirit and mind would triumph over xenos treachery, and this is an incontrovertible fact."
aa747b08-25a7-4529-9105-a32de81b92fe: Whenever a target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|ac47e00cf76b4e64a23077cf53e6b660} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
002c8194-8ac1-43cd-bc8f-825ce8a225be: "Since then, Seberian von Valancius and his dearest Laria Voigtvir have been the protagonists of their own exhibit. Again and again they experience the hopeless siege of their world. Again and again they choose paths, make decisions, and reach the finale in new and unexpected ways. A finale that has already been predetermined. A defeat in which Seberian is inevitably betrayed by his precious trophy, the Crimson Dance of Khaine — the very sword he stole from me. The very sword I took back, leaving Seberian trapped in an endless loop armed only with a hard-light facsimile."
94d0cb3f-6d1f-424f-9003-2887c4b8b83c: "I'm with Colonel Batoshski on this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. There's nothing for us out there in the stars. We were born here, and we must die here. The songs say our regiment used to serve as cover for the cleaner regiments and rot in the mud for them too. Here on Zarkov, at least I know who and what I'm fighting for."
a081ae7b-9f6f-4e0a-ab8f-591607429678: "Something brought my shuttle down. I need assistance."
b56a6afc-ffad-44bf-a60c-98c16f1b8d2a: Restores the turret's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} and grants it the {g|f:45d1e1ea7d6d4684851c237e5463de13}combat ready{/g} effect.
fd75b388-efb1-4d93-ab49-5d01d61f2b7e: "Eogunn, what manner of experiment do you plan to conduct on these men?"
f3a0c3d5-b72f-456f-8bbe-b88c140b53b4: {n}You cannot look sideways at Seberian — your eye muscles are frozen, as is the rest of your body. The fate of your ancestor remains a mystery to you.{/n}
e727b2f9-28b3-45b1-aa93-13cdea7b6a78: "The esteemed Tech-Priests are performing a ceremony of supreme praise for the layperson who divined the path of the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g}. The wearers of {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} are grateful to you for your rational decisions regarding the use of iron flesh. They... have even embedded your name in their Techna-Lingua. To my knowledge, the crimson priesthood rarely bestows such an honour on anyone."
cc85afa8-e855-45bd-b8a7-218c4989319a: "Lord Seberian remained there... I understand why the Lord Captain made this choice. The great rulers of the past are better left in the past."
65ef4366-fad6-45e4-adcd-801ed1c40fb6: "It does cast a shadow over him. Or it simply makes him the most convenient suspect."
875df6e1-dc88-41c1-98c3-38dcdc99bf93: {n}Eogunn is levitating, with his arms folded over his belly and his organic eye closed.{/n} "{name}, on this occasion, I have no words of wisdom, no valedictions, or ready answers. I choose to forget the perfection of statistics, to throw off the shackles of probability, and to reject the cold flawlessness of mathematics, abandoning attempts to calculate the odds of victory. There is a time for contemplation. That time is at an end. May the Omnissiah guide our deeds."
fa2929dc-e739-4b0e-a395-0ba930d5e473: "It is both an honour and a joy, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We have waited so very long for your arrival. Truly, I never imagined I would see this day in my lifetime..."
1353cb16-7a09-4284-8beb-7479115f938d: The descent was long and arduous. Many of the soldiers succumbed to the icy darkness they faced in the bowels of this Tomb World. The unbearable cold, emanating from the very walls of the place, sapped them; their strength spent, they unclenched their fingers and plummeted. Dark oblivion claimed their bodies forever.
2ac342f2-a081-4295-9424-dd08ecac12e8: {n}With his last scraps of strength, Nuncius gives Eogunn's hand a barely perceptible squeeze, before letting his arm fall to the cold metal of the sacellum. One last attempt at a smile frozen on his lips.{/n}
1dbe2181-6f03-427f-b879-f758563c2ffd: {n}The air is suffocatingly thick with the spicy scent of spores. A modest-looking sarcophagus stands before you. At its base rests a desiccated corpse, clad in robes bearing an insignia.{/n}
3051d438-f802-43ae-805f-c92c35124fef: "I characterise the described method of increasing resistance to toxic substances as deleterious and unsuitable for application. Recommendation: avoid profane methods of bodily fortification."
ace38019-c8a7-4b91-b24b-223f1c242276: "For it is what spurs us to do the things that give life meaning and dignity. You are a brave {mf|man|woman}, Rogue Trader."
7f77b1ed-2d40-4119-90af-b1b4a919ed1e: "Lord Captain?" {n}Disbelief is written on Sauerback's face, as if she cannot believe what she's seeing.{/n} "But... you..." {n}Suddenly regaining her composure, the Master-at-Arms throws back her shoulders, standing at attention.{/n}
9fad135c-fb77-4f7b-a205-7669234aa1f2:
The target of {g|f:33c8c9db91694ca6ad3eff26e36dd0af}Finest Hour!{/g} gains additional {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonuses{/g}:
-<indent=5%>During the {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, all their non-attacking {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}.</indent>
23292af2-f47f-4401-bc0e-d95c3760e7d1: "There are these explosive flowers around here. Their pollen works as a substitute for... How do you call it... fyceline! You've got to recite a litany of fury over it and then mix it with some other things. We carve bullets out of bark and bones, either from our own dead or some huge creatures. It's trickier with shell casings, but sometimes you bore a hole through wood nice and clean — it depends on whether you recited the litany of fervent labour correctly or not. If you get it wrong, then the bullets tend to misfire, or even explode in the barrel."
eac9d774-bc59-4ce1-9247-294478fde1ac: "So you're the one destroying my medicae facility... Present yourself to your Lord Captain."
e0e92e4b-2022-4f75-828b-97bf0e54f060: "So this is it, the place where the legend of the dynasty trod. More specifically, the place where he died. Take care, we do not want history to repeat itself."
36ea3541-8d1e-4b60-bb33-3c7d4c5492d2:
This creature suffers no damage from Eogunn's ranged attacks, including {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Magnarail Blast{/g} and {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}Transonic Wave{/g}.
All single-target ranged attacks made by Eogunn targeting this creature ricochet to a random enemy nearby. The damage and critical hit chance for such attacks are increased by +{uip|DamageIncrease|e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}%.
e6e53597-96aa-405e-92e5-d8828430fdda: "A preliminary calculation of the political conjuncture shows that such a manoeuvre may be effective. The probability of a successful compromising conclusion to the confrontation approaches ninety percent."
e2f2d435-b97d-4609-a88c-43fcd2a7f956: Thanks to the Rogue Trader, the scales tipped in favour of Juvenna von Valancius.
d06ff89d-9e6f-46f3-b1eb-795f04199614: "Let us face the truth, {name}." {n}Seberian extends a hand and clenches and then unclenches his metal fist.{/n} "I'm no longer as agile as I was in the days of my youth — not that I avoided grievous wounds even then. Look around you: we are in enemy territory, and the enemy is laying wicked schemes against us. To believe ourselves invulnerable to their cunning would be an admission of our own foolishness. But I am no fool, {name}. And I do not think you are either."
616250d9-6f10-41ab-8b8d-b19ebc7d82e5: "I helped you dispatch your enemy, Tech-Priest. Why don't you give me the anchor-core?"
8185d855-0e48-4ea8-ad97-11ac83a756fe:
On {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, targets must perform a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +10 {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g}.
If they fail, they suffer {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (24) and {g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}melting{/g}. Additionally, they are {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
If they pass, they suffer burning (8) and {g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}melting{/g}.
2cdbbe73-3c15-48cf-afd4-aa34b5da0a09: {n}The Merovians grab their weapons. Before, their chances of defeating you were slim, but now that you know all their fighting techniques, this will be no more taxing than a genteel hunting party.{/n}
0c640b8c-910c-47c5-8205-c5f7a20f4443: "You're awfully confident for someone who is up to his ears in heresy himself, Tech-Priest."
285ad469-15bc-4771-a0d0-1fe5e7c5456b: "I shall have my people transport it to the flagship. I wish to examine it."
51c87c7d-7b29-42ac-9670-0af46916f5c3: [Send a research team to the surface]
1549617c-f30e-4838-90eb-2143d066e05b: "One must never forget that people are as much a resource as anything else in the Imperium. Of course, Nuncius could have been more restrained in his choice of words."
6ab15c0f-bf15-421d-ad60-17e539daf61e: "The enemy also possesses such a weapon, but its owner would have been an immediate target. And besides, there is no way he would have been allowed to reach the outpost. Curious."
e5019fad-62ea-46b1-965f-4944a9e398ef: "Laria was right to point out that we should trust in our people and proceed with caution."
c93b1b3e-4ede-4c00-8441-602fa1a993fc: Over centuries of survival on Zarkov, the history of the 32nd Regiment has been enriched by the names of valiant warriors, each worthy of a monument. Inspired by them, the Rogue Trader's subjects shall find new courage and more willingly embrace the inevitable "atonement for the one."
9f9323c6-b70c-4c7d-9397-7fe15105e50b: "They'll just have to get used to it. We're here to stay. The regiment already squandered one chance to serve the von Valanciuses — we won't make that mistake again."
a97cc826-6033-44a2-82d8-431bfe4ac7ae: "My neural synapses are sufficiently shielded so that their functioning is not affected by interference, but Nuncius..." {n}The Manipulus frowns anxiously.{/n} "...is far less resilient against destructive external disruptions."
d0e1866a-5df1-4a66-ad19-8e9be4c1ced4: The user's Toughness is reduced by −10%.
5c4ffb92-6628-451a-8ce6-6483ba53a635: {n}Zarkov nods, lowering his weapon.{/n} "The Seneschal is waiting for you."
a025752e-9004-47ec-8be5-63ebcccb0552: A bionic arm crafted by an unknown augment smith of the utmost skill. The scant resemblance to established designs and the blatant use of xenomaterials in its creation firmly establish this work as heretical.
29b2e25c-2645-4bd7-b775-079d62841dc2: "Apologies for the inconvenience, Lord Captain! I don't know what happened here, but the main landing pad is completely underwater. We're lucky the secondary pad is still usable." {n}The pilot warily eyes the puddles of promethium burning around the shuttle.{/n}
b37d05b2-d9f2-46b9-aa06-6e95604c9555: "I have had enough of your antics. Go wherever you wish, but I will not be joining you."
f32bdb40-7871-438a-9e4b-8c6b2587da77: "...harbingers of great hunger, a swarming species notable for its impressive control over its members and astonishing primitiveness of instinct and purpose. The species is barely represented in the region, save for a single branch that has infiltrated local systems due to warp storms separating the region from the sector more densely populated by humans."
283c4f0d-1c96-4e80-a643-36dc1249082d: Red sigils have swarmed across the cogitator's vid-screen.
5f63715f-553a-49f1-8bb1-0e268abd82b9: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, thank you for gracing the Sector Bionica with your presence. You are already acquainted with Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar — it is she who has been tending to the ancient relic. She is here to convey the wretchedness of our present position."
e4d08b49-2da4-48b6-a9f0-de5d43b5178a: The flagship leaves the vessel and its dark secrets behind.
3407812f-3530-431d-88e8-5e582c0bfd63: "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} willing, we'll see each other again, my {mf|lord|lady}."
67f3437f-2981-41af-8582-b047f5482099: "No need to hesitate on the threshold when a battle with the enemies of Humanity awaits us. Let me enter first. Wherever these gates may lead, I will not stray from the path He has blessed!"
02b87ad3-59b9-4246-aa85-2023b544009d: The light refracts and dances along the sharp edges of the throne's decorative finish, promising unpleasant consequences for anyone who attempts to sit in it.
a8ef0abc-fa19-4584-a7b5-f0012da70ad6: "Genetor Februs's mind is so multifaceted... Azure, cobalt, indigo — how great is his drive to understand the workings of this world! But somewhere inside, in the very substance of all this blue, there is a cocoon of terracotta that holds within it some grievous feeling. It almost eludes my sight, but it absorbs all other hues — and sooner or later, it will consume them all, leaving nothing behind."
9eb1a76d-1591-4e56-88f9-41c327533ca4: "...before His gaze I swear to be true to my oath and vow, to hold fast to my courage in the face of all enemies of Humanity, and to unflinchingly meet my death..."
5b5cd5e7-e3c9-4b85-b8d1-516f2d9b8063: {n}The Magos is silent for a long time. When he begins to speak again, his voice sounds faint, as though it is travelling across a great distance.{/n} "Knowledge is the key to everything, and comprehension is the path to knowledge. Let us suppose that my data-coordinates are based on a false point of reference. What alternative are you proposing?"
6d925abb-4b46-4806-9344-8505ff4902cd: "Imperial Law is above all ties of blood." {n}She raises her hand in an admonishing gesture.{/n} "My father betrayed the faith and allowed heresy to take hold of him."
e883c702-acb0-40d3-b407-57e730b1af91: If Idira is affected by the {g|f:423e91ce057d4e2489043ded7306f3e2}horrors of the warp{/g} effect, it is removed, and the {g|f:52dd645abf5b43f2a93a325f402fb183}terrors of the warp{/g} effect is inflicted instead.
5dab82f9-d67d-466c-917d-36ef67cbf004: {n}Barely audibly, the frozen Vivisector hisses,{/n} "In the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, hurry... he can still be helped..." {n}You notice that his gaze is fixed on the seemingly dead Tech-Priest on the deck.{/n}
61803573-e585-465e-9153-ed91d4d11d3e: "Now that you have been released, will you answer my questions?"
8070c8a0-f14a-4320-9f56-2bdfab72c502: "I am the Lord Captain, and accusations of weakness will not alter that fact. I ask you to curb your misplaced anger."
c608cbfc-23c9-41a7-a431-c75daf85425a: You discovered a shuttle transmitting a distress signal, with the body of the pilot, Ruban Khoroshkavich, still in his seat.
5231294a-a677-49cc-bbe0-a7dc136bfccf: "Nothing more has survived in the records."
7a594c7b-e2b3-4037-a8fd-8225967e3c08: {n}Eogunn tentatively approaches the Triasomata.{/n} "Righteous Triune, I see you are having difficulty recognising yourself in your new body. Perhaps this parable will help..."
90111de5-877d-4bc9-9bd4-3f5d996cfc5b: Four claw marks are visible in the hard stone... yet their depth and sharpness are more reminiscent of swords or power weapons.
223c9b2e-4ae3-437c-9628-6a1fde0e5057: "I have no reason to doubt you, but Seberian will not believe his daughter's actions have gone beyond the usual palace intrigue. Juvenna might assure you otherwise, but she is too spoiled by everyone's regard even to notice how very fond Father is of her." {n}Laria utters the last words with some effort.{/n}
ba918f23-1cc5-4273-962f-1e85d501eb24: "I must stop you there, Alva-9. Your comrade, Decabalus, also told me of the heresy that has engulfed this platform. But he named you as the source of it..."
18375cf1-37cc-449a-995d-74b84525a160: You agreed to give Trazyn what Xavier Calcazar is seeking.
363ca520-88ad-41c1-9ad5-9202490c309c: "Such fervour. If I had need of a second Rogue Trader for my exhibition instead of one, I might even welcome that. But one way or another, you will bring him to me."
64523f8f-c7b0-402a-87e1-4ccc5b29ed67: {n}The Interrogator takes to circling the members of your retinue, scrutinising each one in turn.{/n} "You are all real, there is no doubt. As are my memories of what just happened. Either the devious wretches are playing with our minds, or there is something else at work here that I cannot explain, Lord Captain."
47673ca4-2f26-439e-8629-8d1ee3205920: "This is how {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g} cloaking systems work, elantach. The ships of my people are unwilling to make contact with outside observers. I believe there are good reasons for this."
b30009d0-a362-482c-a37a-8f64d55589b7: Undergoing a complete medical diagnostic is not a pleasant process, but after the comprehensive sanitisation of your body, you feel practically invulnerable.
76611e90-4cd2-4780-b95b-66eddc45244f: "Let your allies speak their piece. For many of them, this battle could be their last."
41c4426c-1366-46d5-af89-ed0b71b7d257: "Jae, spread the word that we are seeking mercenaries to work with Kais-torr-Shaiga."
cf52524f-48a7-456c-a009-06ee3681df4c: The rot extract that the Rogue Trader risked drinking has left behind nothing but malaise and weakness.
59e0b0ce-6f1b-4ce0-86a2-19be90ebcbb6: "I hope, Inquisitor, that your sentence here will be final."
cb1246d3-777e-4f4c-b9bf-607eb78e6adb: "Your method of attracting attention is highly effective, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn examines the bloody organ, which is being held up to his face by a mechadendrite.{/n} "That rash act almost cost me my spleen. Then again, I should have considered replacing it with a bionic equivalent long ago. Nuncius, log that thought." {n}The flexible metal manipulator, obeying the Genetor's commands, reinserts the lump of bloody flesh somewhere inside his gaping belly.{/n}
a9518c6b-f0ef-42fa-a3b0-1be4faacb531: "You..." {n}Seberian abruptly falls silent. The wrinkles around his organic eye smooth out. When his gaze slides over your companions and comes to rest on you, there is not even a flicker of his past feeling in it, only the haughty coldness with which he met you for the first time.{/n}
9e162e5f-c2a7-4162-8a80-8e43e302932a: "Open access to the latest log entry."
7bde1c9c-0ae3-41bf-8b05-6911d76a664e: "You are a Blood Angel, aren't you? Why do you serve a different Chapter?"
843747f2-44aa-4216-b0a8-3147d6de1dfe: "The colonel has gone off to the xenoruins, where the beasts emerge. I sure don't envy them!"
d753339e-4bdf-448d-a802-8db213567089: "I do, indeed. Do you feel an emotion akin to remorse? Are xenos in general capable of feelings other than insidious malice? Wait, don't answer that — Nuncius, prepare to scan the nervous system, log any abnormalities!"
dba16463-edd7-4007-bb55-dd906d3d3915: Until the end of combat, all allied characters gain this effect. At the start of an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, cells are also highlighted for them. While an ally stands on one of those cells, they are affected by {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g}. While not standing on them, they are affected by {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}severed interface{/g}.
2f577460-eb8f-4837-9f33-4588c08011e5: "So you're deliberately provoking the Haemonculus? Why?"
edd4e2e5-475e-4c95-b762-a084237b19ea: {n}The platform beneath your feet shudders and sinks slightly: the sensation of falling makes the hairs on the back of your neck stand up. Alva-9's shriek can be heard even over the strained creaking of the mechanisms.{/n} "We do not have much time, layperson! The station and all its tech-corruption will be underwater in an hour. Initiating Protocol 17.0!"
907f148d-ca3a-4bc2-807a-3d0eb90e7f79: "Yes, yes, if I remember right — you were there, Lord Captain! You ordered the cranial shackles installed..." {n}The criminal's face twitches more violently than before, and you hear him grinding his teeth.{/n}
be9928f2-e291-4df0-9f84-b7174d31cbec: {n}Guilt and shame crash down upon you like an avalanche. Once before, you {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Shame}endured a disgrace{/d} you'd long considered the greatest of your life. But the loss of the Warrant humiliates not only you, it humiliates the entire von Valancius dynasty, jeopardising its very existence. Your mouth goes dry, and your heart begins to beat twice as fast within your chest.{/n}
a6716d3f-0562-4d42-9c09-0f67753e1dcf: "Would you like to continue this conversation in a more personal vein? A little promenade to take in the theatre of battle won't do us any harm." {n}Juvenna takes your arm, smiling slyly.{/n} "Come."
122025f3-a5e3-4a66-9524-7396744fd6ab: "I examined Nuncius personally. He cannot do the things you claim."
9a70166e-c272-4128-aa74-8bdf13012434: "I suppose you are right. I will make all necessary arrangements for equipment and shuttles suited for the extreme conditions of the local climate and will await your order to make planetfall." {n}Eogunn's tone is one of naked relief.{/n}
7a7fb041-914b-4356-aafb-79906df3fb90: Machine oil seeps from the eye socket of the deactivated servo-skull, leaving a black, greasy trail across the yellowed bone.
9e4a6eb8-d010-44df-9dd0-2f60f7c71678: "Rogue Trader, a catastrophe has occurred — Nuncius has stopped speaking! Worse still, it is compounded by the flagrant incompetence of Genetor Ferrenz! Ferrenz offered to assist in examining my esteemed colleague, only to have the audacity to claim he is perfectly functional. He now refuses to perform any further procedures upon Nuncius! I implore you, find me on the bridge and help me bring this madman to his senses!"
8d3b8251-aa6f-44db-8083-28551bd0dc72: The target must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or become {g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}mindshackled{/g}. Only one creature at a time can be {g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}mindshackled{/g}.
5f39f6c1-2af0-4696-b79e-12be49434a64: {n}For the first time in centuries, the 32nd Merov Regiment went on the offensive against the ruthless world it called home. It wrested victory from the jaws of the xenobeast with much bloodshed — but it was the regiment's first triumph.{/n}
61aeba01-f515-49fb-ac39-343877c382e6: "Tactica Imperialis, Book Nine Hundred and Three, Section Fifteen. No, no, damn it... Book... Book One Thousand Two Hundred and... Two? Ugh!"
ef576776-0aa9-4445-842b-51e6c54f6d0d: After Genetor Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue, his trail went cold among the endless worlds of the Koronus Expanse. On rare occasions, rumours would surface of kidnapped people and strange madmen of flesh and iron, who raved in terror about a maniac who trailed death itself at his shoulder.
16ee9ab7-b2db-4d63-8a15-5c13be267dfe: The Lord Captain managed to establish that the Inquisition's spy was none other than Juvenna von Valancius.
fd50b74e-e910-40ce-8a13-488a69b82b47: "I could not have acted otherwise toward my own ancestor."
a0128860-0448-46c6-aa6b-52e8bb121378: {n}Ulfar, standing behind you, sniffs, inhaling noisily. He tenses, like a predator scenting the blood of another living creature.{/n} "Aett-Vater, look at this. The one captured and chained in iron smells like one of my brothers. If he was taken alive, he must be weak."
209d7238-33aa-4761-b3c3-4f75149ab556: "Seneschal, I appreciate your diligence. My requests frequently present a challenge to the laity. Yet, you ordered two access sigils to the private quarters to be delivered to me, without distorting my request with your own speculation."
b98e6b4e-34a7-452d-a66a-f21c111b317d: {n}The guard's distrust is quickly replaced by suspicion. Within moments, he is asking Seberian over the vox-caster what to do about your inordinate curiosity. The Lord Captain is not inclined to tolerate a stranger showing such keen interest in his favourite toy. Orders are given, shots are fired, and you are swallowed by oblivion once more.{/n}
ba91ad87-f8f3-422b-8d45-ba1194828a0d: "You said that treating your insanity would make it worse — explain."
41a44a0c-d98a-444e-8f87-4f07c8c59bda: "I bear witness to the steadfastness of these {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}, who sing their hymn of functioning even in their death throes."
d3da13cb-bf76-45af-837c-3705c2d1f86e: "The time for diplomacy, tactical trickery, and deals is over. To battle! For the von Valancius dynasty!" {n}Seberian snatches his blade from its sheath and raises it high above his head.{/n}
119d9346-b707-4ec7-9186-ae8c34b3b1dc: "So you knew there was a schism on the station?"
f1b90e39-9e01-46b8-84f0-3b72541cd046: "I am well aware of the circumstances. And my name should be familiar to you, in turn — Gaprak."
37c9ee3e-496c-49c0-9092-a3ac32fe4c03: "You will have to bring me in on your plot, whether you want to or not. Isn't that right, Elana? Or should I say... Juvenna?"
1804adfe-595b-42b1-b7a9-c7fd33a7be74: Another one of Seberian's marks breaks off at the floating xenos platform.
bb26c212-123e-4197-9015-5f5cae296f39: "The data is incomplete. The enemy planet is releasing emanations of unknown nature, which are disrupting the {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augur{/g} scan." {n}The Vox Master hesitates ever so slightly before continuing.{/n} "During the assault, we will encounter at least one wing of interceptors headed by a cruiser."
7735be16-7642-43e3-b9ec-f5cb6f87654b: At the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, this creature gains battle tendency stacks equal to the number of enemies adjacent to them.{br} Battle Tendency: +5% critical {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit chance{/g} +5% {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}
24473b4e-d1f8-40d1-8f36-de4455ee69fa: {n}The autopistol shakes in the woman's hands.{/n} "I... Well. I'll have to change tack, then."
a0bbe40f-9169-4c48-8ce5-7593b87714c9: Isimond possesses a named plasma pistol.
9cbe6ec3-f0be-482f-93d8-35a209ee06b3: "In their current state, each of the subjects is doomed. But just as the parts of dying mechanisms can be combined again to create a functioning machine, so too can these subjects be combined into a single entity, granting them continued life through the correct configuration of the Ferrum Sanctum and organic components of all three. The only thing I require to continue the experiment is a solution to my dilemma: which subject should serve as the basis?" {n}Eogunn turns his burning gaze to you.{/n}
fe3d8bac-0449-45b8-8de6-404b14cc1979: "Nuncius is a servant of the Emperor. His service is over — grant him the Emperor's Mercy and immortalise him in a servo-skull."
bb232827-5e67-4f85-9854-b9221a0aa97c: Access the personal cogitator on Dargonus
73f24c6c-5a65-4a55-87f5-adc3870a6206: "Since you wish to take your oaths, here is my first order: destroy that creature and get me back to my flagship!"
2f1d364f-3729-4483-8484-01fa76190169: "Please help my son, in the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, I know you can! Gnotec has endured so much..." {n}The lined face of the middle-deck veteran is contorted with grief. Every word she speaks comes out in a long moan.{/n}
f88618b7-93dd-4d2c-ad8f-810b479d3c45: "I have no master but the God-Emperor!"
4fa832a8-7efc-4b3b-af68-8c2ea74cc1e9: "Not knowing something is an unfamiliar experience for you, I see, Master van Calox. But there is nothing reprehensible about ignorance — for knowledge always begins with a question cast out into the unknown. I will not supply any information that you do not already possess, so perhaps you should look elsewhere for answers."
384b6b2c-5208-4e16-973d-e4e688e99a7c: "Half the galaxy must be after what he's collected in his pocket museum... and I don't just mean in the Imperium. If we're lucky enough to find our way there again, I'd... appreciate the opportunity to strip that xenos of an artefact or two."
50439065-b2e8-4932-88e8-32a92df54b0d: The armed soldiers nearly shoot the missing team members who come out to meet them. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperial expedition.
8b4ab924-6ea0-4391-a16a-265b745c8e9c: "My purpose in coming here is no business of yours. The denizens of this station stand accused of heresy — are you aware of this?"
7fc5d4c6-9085-48b7-bf21-bb767340ac27: Although ricochet replaces {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g}, the amount of damage dealt and the chance to deal it are still governed by the rules for overpenetration. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration also apply to ricochet.
b958a726-d1ef-4497-b5db-b51eebbd127d: The Wrath of Khaine appears behind the target voidship.
b029498f-cde5-480a-b7cf-db4193462f89: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when the user is attacked, they counterattack (up to {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} times). Allies always {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} their attacks.
997555b4-55a3-4647-b4a6-d6089b23035f: "I am beginning to doubt my decision..."
cc336589-63dd-4d97-b114-b63aae5681dd: "Immediate fulfilment of the request is not relevant. Request deprioritised." {n}The Tech-Priest regards Pasqal with an indifferent gaze.{/n}
6116d40f-6bd2-48f0-be75-b4e50fa58e0e: "...I shall become Thy Wrath, and Thy Fury, and Thy Flame. For from Thy right hand flows only Righteous Redemption against any who raise themselves against Thee and against Humanity..."
a83b5c8d-d64d-497a-abc9-cbb732021279: {n}The emotions engulf you and as if in a dream you watch the scene unfolding before your eyes.{/n}
0115f573-c2a7-4aae-91e2-da0bd986dc4d: {n}The giant lets out a metallic clashing sound, which you somehow know indicates his displeasure.{/n} "Human, I am addressing you in a language you ought to understand. Answer my question."
66d72316-df56-4482-96a1-db8e219a746b: "Trazyn claimed Laria is alive and in his clutches. Don't you want to find her?"
135ff880-6682-4654-8474-30ca9b97d146: {n}The enforcer's thunderous voice commands into the empty air:{/n} "Ch... check the arsenaaal! The dynasty's banner is ooour eiderdown and shroud... Do you want me to throw you in a cell?" {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Please... please... come baaack alive. Where's your helmet, soooldier? {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I will not be afraid! I will not be afraid..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}
5683ec59-889b-48de-9798-f57f8622cb3c: {n}A new wave of pain grips your skull, making you wince. There is something strange about these not-quite-savages, not-quite-Guardsmen — something in their behaviour... But the noise in your head makes it hard to focus.{/n}
61d46b4e-a3cd-4144-9bf2-d7c8083466d8: {n}The servo-skull is grimly silent. His eye sockets are as empty as a desecrated grave.{/n}
2a59e487-8fbc-42da-acc4-072cdae7cedd: "Right you are." {n}The Merovian casts a quick glance at the chronometer.{/n} "Perfect timing."
1cd1ec6f-3e7e-4ad9-a436-5f9b3abb3fea: "Primitive cults. Meaningless, pointless squabbling. Oh yes, and some highly amusing attempts to cope with this world in their own pathetic mon-keigh way. What say you, Outcast?"
ee3adec4-a2d7-40e8-b9b2-c7d5c5007e0b: You eased the pain of a soldier being operated on by Sector Bionica chirurgeons.
2bb4d40d-9801-44d5-ac27-4db4796fa913: "Hmm... Never heard of such a thing, shereen. Must be something from those ashmags' homeworld."
5c0ecddc-61f5-441b-b855-521893df953e:
On {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, attacks with {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons inflict {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
This effect deals {uip|Damage|169cbd9c211c42f9bf5f4c0e7b67ab7b} {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|169cbd9c211c42f9bf5f4c0e7b67ab7b}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures adjacent to the creature under this effect, and two times more damage from the effect to the user.
27fe10ec-e880-4a5c-91bc-85ef00569c8b: "My dearest colleague and I have had more than one consilium, but we have never reached a consensus. Nuncius is a sceptic, and our positions rarely align, but we tend to reach a compromise in the end. But, alas, not on this occasion. The only thing we agree on is the need for a third opinion. Only you can furnish us with said opinion — this is an incontrovertible fact."
9d599304-8fb8-46df-9d6c-15c4d9759b34: {n}Eogunn gazes upon the madman with a look of mournful compassion.{/n} "I pity you, my brother in service. Entropy and falsehood have taken root within your cogitative thoughts, inverting your perception of truth and lies. Your sacrifice is hollow, defiled by irrationality — you are nourishing the very evil you wish to guard against. I shall uplift a prayer to the Motive Force, in the hope that it will cleanse your soul upon the cessation of your functions. Nuncius, prepare to execute the binharic requiem."
e103c2c5-eede-47ba-aa62-43315b25eb2d: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, is north-west of here, along the road to the ruins. That's where the first wounded came, with the creatures hot on their trail. So, he started administering first aid right on the spot..."
c15a68f9-a06b-48a2-b38f-c3799fe0ad08: {n}You hear a low growl from Batoshski.{/n} "Any officers of noble blood we strung up within a couple of generations. The strong and the brave remained. They were my ancestors."
0e0ab2fb-42d4-4e3a-889e-3c0102af6f61: This attack also {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g} all enemies around the main target, dealing {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}mental damage{/g}.
