590f7da3-de48-469e-ba59-f282c4b79072: "You think the Arebennian can be predicted? How naive. Then again, you mon-keigh know too little of his kind to make a sound judgement of these... performers."
21ac4c4e-ee28-4e40-9dcd-45632799e227: "The lives of humans are sometimes horrifying, and anyone can unwittingly fall victim to the Archenemy's temptations."
177ad682-2fbf-4864-a109-2dc03978ea7c: "A signet ring? That is not just a piece of jewellery, but a symbol of power. It is not something to be carelessly discarded. This is the most disturbing discovery of all."
68573cbc-c6a2-4cfe-827f-1f13a721e8b0: "I will give you Seberian in exchange for the Warrant."
fb5f5c3a-1dcf-4ef6-9f37-173fdfbf4738:
This page from someone's diary has been neatly cut out and restored.{br}
"...But that which I encountered on this forgotten lump of dirt... When we arrived, the ship's auspexes revealed the presence of some kind of ruins. Intrigued, my retinue and I descended to the surface of the dead world. What challenge had the galaxy prepared for me this time? What grand deed might I perform in His name and the name of the dynasty? What treasures awaited me, ready to serve Humanity and House von Valancius? Never before had I set eyes upon such buildings. Matte-black, polished obelisks, inscribed with glowing green glyphs of a language unknown to me. Even my indispensable linguist savant could only throw up his hands in bafflement. Beguiled by the ruins' forbidding beauty, the esteemed Explorator touched one of the obelisks — and then it appeared. The creature... I had never seen the like of it before, a startling fact in and of itself. It was as if someone had dipped a human skeleton in molten metal and then compelled it to move. I shudder to recall that monster. It did not understand commands in Gothic, nor could my Enginseer manage to communicate with the thing in any of the Techna-Lingua dialects. We thought, naively, that the creature was a rare kind of servitor or automaton. The only thing disgorged by its vox-synths was "yergmek." Merciful God-Emperor, it was only by His will that I returned to the flagship. The Tech-Priest, may the Master of Mankind receive him, tried both to seize control of the creature's governing systems and to stop it with his tech-miracles — all in vain. I watched as my faithful servants perished one by one. I remember the chilling horror that crept over me as I realised my helplessness. As if I were watching doom itself draw nearer and nearer, its metal skull heralding my destruction. But I am a Rogue Trader. I am Seberian von Valancius! By the God-Emperor's covenant and by His will, it is my duty to brave the unknown and to subjugate the Galaxy to the Golden Throne. And when the thing crashed to the floor with a clang, it was followed by heresy of the highest order. The construct simply vanished in a flash of green, robbing me of my lawful right to claim the trophy. That was the truly devastating loss, even more so than the loss of my closest servants..."
739360b3-7763-4654-ba2b-1f61d426450d: "Listen well: shooting madmen is a wretched business, but if I have to do it, I will." {n}The sergeant makes a point of adjusting the heavy weapon on his shoulder, which clanks menacingly.{/n} "Spew your gibberish somewhere else."
d82b959d-e89d-45d4-8c66-fdd1b0aaefa3: "Eliminate the cause, not the symptom, as the ancient wisdom of the Magos Biologis states." {n}The Manipulus strokes his chin pensively with one of his mechadendrites.{/n} "Nuncius, do you know of many laypersons capable of deliberately torturing a machine spirit?" {n}After listening to the servo-skull's silent reply, he nods.{/n} "I concur, dearest colleague. We are clearly dealing with attempted sabotage."
f0ca8602-c778-4e0d-bf84-569902c2a0c3: "The Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Excuse my directness, but your injury must have clouded your mind. For thirty years, the noble line of Gaprak has been closely associated with the blessed Cult Mechanicus."
4a2bd10f-bc82-4f7d-bb9b-69d835fb71f4: {n}Not a single muscle on the colonel's face twitches as you read out the sentence. When you raise your weapon to do your duty to the Imperium, Batoshski looks you straight in the eye.{/n} "I'd do it again."
ae7f1a5a-9321-4182-bce3-81b4a18b801d: {n}Entry after entry is reported as destroyed by the machine spirits, until finally you chance upon an intact fragment.{/n} "Only the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}'s wisdom enables one to find the true path. But what is one to do if the calculation of that path's vector proves incorrect because of unaccounted-for variables? One such variable is Seberian's fixation on the mysteries of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}. His drive to pass through the sealed temple door is driving the expedition off the path I calculated. Only..." {n}Corrupted and unreadable lines follow.{/n}
4f6420e2-80e0-4dfd-a8ec-81d433b6955b: {n}Eogunn shifts the angle of his frame in a formal bow, folding his hands to make the sign of the Omnissiah's cog. His galvanic cell crackles, enveloping the Manipulus in the Motive Force. Opticon-22 responds with a binharic phrase that sounds deeply reverent in its own strange way. Then, he honours Nuncius with a nod.{/n}
11b50f0f-3722-4019-b775-2c85f65e646b: The device emits a barely audible click. Now it slowly stalls, ending both Exalt-117's recovery process and his life.
c6249a89-b792-451c-bd5b-1e108ec30986: {n}The news catches Seberian off guard, but he quickly regains his composure.{/n} "Good. I cannot have a traitor in my ranks."
72b1ca77-810d-4720-8ce8-4700a5f9def8: "Do not forget to destroy the tech-heresy before you leave the compartment." {n}Every one of Ferrenz's visors is fixed unwaveringly on the mysterious technology in your hands.{/n}
d89c2b4f-ec86-4407-8905-8263e82b4be1: "I am loath to hinder the Quest for Knowledge. Invite Oksilda Tavanti."
b935e740-7733-43ec-bfaf-2660d1752d7f: {n}You feel your gorge begin to rise as your eyes linger on the gate. The carvings seem otherworldly, and the shimmering is slightly hypnotic: you feel as though, were you to touch the gate with your hand, it would pass straight through.{/n}
39a43770-a7ca-48ce-a459-f465eb1f03c4: "I am not doing this for myself, but for the dynasty. It is the only way this damned xenos will not return seeking vengeance."
c751004f-3d03-4a85-a145-d0cb62a9d49d: The xenos have compromised the batteries feeding the elevator. Reactivation requires rerouting power and cutting off settlement devices from the grid.
5b783a13-df7b-4399-b82b-228fd20ee619: Jarub requires suitable conditions. The Rogue Trader can either distract the guards or take advantage of the confusion wrought by the bombardment.
766f7b3d-aa7b-4827-be36-19201b9ae560: "I see you are consumed with anger, but I do not understand why. Kindly explain yourselves."
8494403a-a592-4d30-a88f-674cb44388fb: This strangely shaped weapon, decorated with exquisite carvings, is clearly the work of xenos hands.
ac64073a-da8d-457f-a8db-ebc1736c7c07: "I do not doubt it." {n}It is difficult to tell from the Astartes's tone whether he is being serious or mocking you.{/n}
21b0acc0-a391-4384-a606-30f9926957fa: "Oh, what a laughably clumsy attempt to expose me. At any other time, I might even find it amusing. As it is, our acquaintance will have to end here. A tragic turn of events, you will agree."
e0904fec-0206-4ba8-9758-6aa7e805bdee: "What theological disputes do you have with the other Tech-Priests?"
fc804cbd-ed6e-4c14-b094-6c2090a2aea1: "Nuncius believes that the necessity of an in-depth analysis of this stream is dramatically exaggerated." {n}Eogunn's gravitic core surges with power, and the Tech-Priest ascends majestically above the sloshing sewage.{/n}
6f5b69f5-8fa4-4cde-a229-efa3ee2cdb90: [Connect your data-slate to the memory module]
a1a9e31e-ca3c-4d75-b51c-07090a0b7ad8: "Gold and blood... Luxury doesn't usually stir up such mixed emotions in me."
191d07b3-d21c-4986-bc84-bc6d76ea658e: "Registering machine spirit response to sacred Omega-Seven-Gamma procedure... Negative. Attempted activation: failed."
97783df6-1279-4109-a07f-ecd852d5691b: "The honour of leading the assault is yours, Lord Captain."
676ba3cb-4dda-43d0-bbaa-eee00ea2ced6: {n}With a barely audible crunch, Eogunn's injector mechadendrite pierces the brain tissue. The man's face contorts in anguish, and his back arches in a fit of spasms. His brows furrowing, the Genetor delivers a powerful pulse of the Motive Force, and the unfortunate man drops limply back down on the table. The Tech-Priest's manipulators dart between the three bodies, separating organs, augmetics, and limbs, and transplanting them to the new host. Discharges of energy coruscate around Eogunn's hulking figure, growing brighter and brighter until the final flash leaves you temporarily blinded. When your vision returns, you see the Manipulus carefully releasing the subject's limbs from their restraints.{/n} "The process is complete."
d9747404-5a14-4092-8037-d0a9ebe9bff5: "We serve Mistress Elana, Lord Captain. Has she reached the palace?"
41ba287a-9fb9-406c-b86c-a9870f2f931a: The Drover's growths recede into the gloom of the roots.
3dce90d5-59b3-47a4-888b-4811f818c6d3: "A strange haze has enveloped me, and even the Undying One's whispers are hard to make out. In this land, I must rely solely upon your guidance, Domin."
acc1a52d-73f8-4c60-b571-f35a2114dbe0: {n}A quavering, decrepit voice wheezes a desperate plea:{/n} "Pr-prayer... is not words, praaayer is the deeds... of the righteous! My sandals are w-worn to shreds, but, but, but still I walk..." {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "I lea-lead them, but I myself am lost! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I pray, answer... answer... answer..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}
666d18e5-e79c-4dd8-9c56-40fe76dee649:
While Jae has less than 100% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, she has a 50% chance to suffer {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (7) at the start of her {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
As soon as she starts suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}, bleeding (7) is inflicted on her if she is not suffering from any levels of bleeding. She suffers +100% more damage from bleeding and {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} while suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}.
1fc062ff-32e3-4a84-bcc5-3d1676e23662: "Well..." {n}Sauerback nudges the dead man's arm away with the toe of his boot, picks up the bundle, and looks inside.{/n} "Not just a deserter, but a thief as well. I must return His Lordship's sword immediately. Thank you for your cooperation."
77cbf261-72c9-453c-a487-3d09406731ba: "For the casings, you could use something that burns easily but holds its shape. I think I saw some kind of coarse paper around here."
87e729f0-ca0a-4634-accf-4d11de3e228e: "Can you help me destroy the anomaly?"
22f3fb07-5265-4deb-8c14-7dfe4cd07cca: "The installation of high-grade augmentations greatly increases the efficiency of any biological life form."
c1a2c5a5-0ba6-4861-ab00-f3a0b0124f99: You persuaded Exalt-117 to obey your orders.
056f40f0-c34a-4618-9cb2-31baf2a88b2c: The work of an unknown augment smith of the highest craftsmanship. The unusual combination of metals in its construction hints at its xenoheretical origins.
a6294cff-a642-4f8d-bbe8-439a5615bb5c: "I found evidence of thermal damage characteristic of a plasma weapon."
119b5e9e-1e05-43b2-a0b2-08a9c76023de: {n}Argenta regards the soldier with a bitterness born of witnessing a wound beyond healing. Her voice is thick with solemn fatalism.{/n} "It is unbearable to see these soldiers afflicted by one of the most foul and contagious diseases imaginable: fear! Do not catch it yourself, {name}."
eb36c1b6-bee0-46ab-a73a-149ffd9ba184: {n}It is hard to argue with the simple truth: the subject of the portrait was an extremely good-looking individual. Not one of his meticulously painted scars, which the Rogue Trader bore like medals for military valour, could spoil his noble beauty.{/n}
05cdb444-935e-4197-ae93-30ed1b6ba8f4: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain. Commencing the procedure."
fedd64b4-0201-484e-b3b1-966d31da0488:
Allows Pasqal to use mechadendrites.
At the start of Pasqal's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, {uip|CellNumber|097b2edaba2f489f9860392afe562972} cells within an 8-cell radius around him (one of these cells must be within a 3-cell radius around him) are highlighted.
While Pasqal stands on one of those cells, he is affected by the {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g} effect. The first attack Pasqal makes while standing on each of those cells does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.
017c6acf-b315-49a9-89d2-586aeb8453e9: "Life is the moment between birth and death. It begins and ends regardless of whatever meaning we may ascribe to it."
04479dab-19bc-4d58-8ea2-ccc0327bd622: "I have more pressing matters to attend to. Get everyone off my bridge and back to their direct duties."
17554d83-74ca-4e75-a26d-65e4ab046e93: [Look at the chrono] "Time's up. Is that all you have to say to me?"
38090a5d-a35d-4869-b1ee-7aae531c8f07: "The Great Museion? What is this place?"
acd130c0-1c7e-4c5e-ae4a-789cee26df34: The Word Bearers were the first of any Space Marine legion to swear allegiance to the Dark Gods of Chaos. Charismatic, ardent, and eloquent, they are perfect for the task of spreading heresy among the Emperor's servants.
06f767b7-4fd7-4817-aa88-4f742da60244: "Be honest, with whom did you quarrel?"
d1e90ba5-b526-4a3d-8a08-ad072a9b467a: {n}The realisation strikes you instantly — that is the sword you saw in the portrait of Seberian von Valancius, the one on board the flagship.{/n}
b43861e4-1909-413f-bc06-fcc3785e494f: After finding serenity and making peace with the death of his closest companion, Eogunn Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue to set out on a long journey. He gathered like-minded individuals around him, people who were willing to grant a merciful death to unfortunates who would otherwise be doomed to drawn-out, pointless suffering. The group of philosophers quickly turned into a community, and the community into a sect. Many seeking deliverance managed to obtain it before the Ecclesiarchy declared the sect heretical and subjected it to severe persecution.
09df8952-ea20-4634-a2a6-2afcaa213286: "This is Izdrig Batoshski, my Arch-Militant. He commands the troops during combat operations."
4e512750-6244-468c-83e7-e9a8c2df1722: "I have learned all I wished to know."
e3be3ce9-cbdc-4a35-a960-723a04ea4e7a: "Absolutely. Nevertheless, I still won the debate."
70d0900a-ad5c-4860-8632-24594de43152: {n}You eagerly reread the entry. Seberian was persistent in his efforts to get past the closed door. Did he succeed, or did he turn back?{/n}
1ebaccd2-b684-46a7-bee7-1ac4a3fc2196: "What did you do before you arrived on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17?"
eee17af1-aebf-4b1d-a559-153b411bff7c: {n}The xenos's laughter echoes off the walls, simultaneously resembling a guttural animal bark and the hiss of cooling plasma. It finds your confusion highly amusing.{/n}
b7ec5f1f-bc31-4157-a153-0bad9ca9891c: "How did you manage to escape the collapsing Museion?"
f42e7be4-2cb9-4581-9a66-3c08af91e993: "Lord Captain," {n}Vigdis says, her words oddly clipped.{/n} "The Master-at-Arms has reported an attempted armed sabotage in the Sector Bionica. The culprit used a frag grenade. There are many injured among the staff. The Lord Captain's presence is required."
11eda7cb-1e0a-4341-b378-cfacefecb753:
Each group member can use [ALT] + {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} to highlight a selected object, such as:
-<indent=5%>a unit (in combat and out of combat)</indent>
-<indent=5%>a cell on the battlefield (in ground and space combat)</indent>
-<indent=5%>an object on the map (including location map, system map, and the Koronus Expanse map)</indent>
29caa432-50aa-4ba8-b884-9ba25574acdf: "I cannot help but note that your cranial augments are different from those I have seen before, Mistress Tlass. Such implants are usually more extensive. Nuncius is intrigued by their configuration and how you cope with the psyker curse with such non-standard parameters of sacred iron."
e2751efa-1ecb-4f1e-84d6-61b83dad4dcc: Augments cannot be set during combat
57b4ddc3-ef4f-4c4e-872b-a10c2697518a: "And what does it look like? A vicious, colossal monster. It stretches its tendrils everywhere, trying to devour us. It's been this way for as long as I can remember." {n}Batoshski's cheeks flush crimson, and he falls silent for a moment, waiting for the surge of rage to pass. When he speaks again, his voice is almost calm.{/n} "We are simple people. We need to know how to survive an encounter with the Drover, not to understand where it came from."
527965b9-991d-453f-b0a7-79f47667fecc: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "I will hear... Him! Not a punishment... A test! I will endure the torments of the... flesh... My spirit will find a way..."
cd9a53d4-8a7b-4559-82a9-7684cb063cba: The camp's entrance is buried under massive blocks of ice.
e4c1819c-f6a6-4f09-a46b-3a893fbe7b74: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn finally plunged into the depths of insanity.
9a0c6e96-7f16-4c5b-9157-f7d27341bfbf: "We are all servants of the God-Emperor. Must we spill our blood so senselessly?"
8e7207b9-30cc-45eb-a89d-1f40833bdd23: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_SeberianNoSword}If I had my blade on me{/d}... No." {n}Seberian cuts himself off.{/n} "I was so blinded by my own hubris that I forgot where the true power of the Rogue Trader lies. It is in the people who faithfully serve the dynasty. You are my strength. You are the blade that will slay Diodas af Irramon!"
8400177c-88d5-45e5-9c9a-03ef5a062427: "Every day we wage a struggle far more terrible than any other, a war within ourselves, for the purity of the soul. And far more dangerous is the corruption that hides behind a comrade's face. A monster that does not conceal itself is a mercy, for we may smite it without hesitation! Forward, then, no cause for delay!"
f4cabfa4-2608-4d12-a6d6-4e2978e0fc93: {n}Vedka reaches out a hand, then sharply shakes her head and lets it fall.{/n} "As the God-Emperor is my witness, I very much wish to read those logs. But let us leave them with you until the oath-taking. I suspect they will serve you well during the swearing of the oaths."
2f702daa-3086-4f22-a4fc-e0eb6eb4f2ae: [Kill him] "There is nothing else I can do. I am sorry, Eogunn."
134f7b24-1bbc-4b6c-81c0-dc9cdf8f4d6d: "They took a group of scouts and headed for the xenoruins. I think they've decided to strike at their base."
3b5d78f4-0b28-443b-8df9-6db4c9674571: "I seem to have spoiled your plans. What now?"
155ee06e-c52b-42a5-a871-7a5e175ed9d3: [Send a team to investigate the central structure]
12660a84-6be9-4ede-9e87-20173ba5730b: {n}Batoshski shrugs.{/n} "The Trial Match isn't just about brute force. Sometimes your rivals will hand you the win themselves if you've got their respect. And a fool won't last long in the post anyway."
09c3a925-ef36-40e5-bdb6-ac940ffbc5d4: {n}Batoshski looks like a broken man, but at the same time, his face shows a strange relief.{/n} "Well, that's it. The oaths have been renewed. We've put our lives and fates in your hands, Lord Captain. We await your orders regarding Zarkov and the regiment."
27bb989f-1b4b-4d6f-85c4-7e445ddcace8: "Not even the great Oghyr lord was able to keep the Arebennian in bondage..." {n}There is admiration — and horror — in Yrliet's voice.{/n}
d470c916-e74d-40c7-82cf-0f05222510af: "A lie that multiplies itself into infinity. Oh, if only I could reject my deficiency and invoke the reanimation protocols, but..." {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt, staring smugly at the Manipulus.{/n} "The defective logic of the plunderers was sufficient to ensure that they deprived me of that possibility."
8449fd5a-49d2-404a-89cf-0fd4cc890e2b: "A fairly standard start to a mutiny." {n}Solomorne appears bored, but the barrel of the shotgun resting on his forearm is casually pointed at the one-eyed man.{/n} "First they want to 'increase efficiency,' then those who disagree begin to disappear, and now the rampaging locals are already stringing up their own from the nearest girder."
eb7ae2f6-6299-4601-9aa3-a243e254fa84: "Before I make my choice, tell me about the merits of all three."
02375093-d16a-4a9d-b699-70e0fc7386dd: "Nuncius, I am in complete agreement that any interference with the function of the galvanic abdomen will lead to acute hypertension, but I have the situation perfectly under control. A fatal outcome has been excluded as a possibility." {n}Eogunn stares intently at the vid-screen attached to his neck. All his body cavities have been carefully opened — you watch the crimson-pink lump of his augmented heart as it beats in his chest, and you see the faint flickering of his galvanic cell through the whitish film of his peritoneum.{/n}
5c01737b-878f-4a21-9031-642f379c6bfa: "This is my first opportunity to view this entity separate from your ship's systems. What a remarkable... no, unique creature you have managed to bridle, human. It would certainly have a place in my collection..."
f0a40cb4-af06-40da-9823-0c450a3ee6b4: Judging by the blood and soot marks, the body was dragged and thrown off the cliff.
67e300e1-6d74-4d85-bcff-15c6e1c1e3ef: "Batoshski and Dunawski are the senior officers here?"
7f7d909a-50d3-4f5d-aeb3-a9f148a9f1fa: "My mistake. You are right. I apologise."
4c8c7738-36e2-43e1-9acb-7971ab4039f9: "Needless to say, the procedure is highly experimental and demands a certain looseness of interpretation in regard to augmentation canons, as well as integration of components that would incur the Imperium's... disapproval. But the Omnissiah teaches us to surmount any obstacles in the name of knowledge, especially when pursuing a goal of such magnitude!"
5cd3ee46-b424-474c-8242-5eb143372024: {n}Genetor Ferrenz holds a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} in the grip of his steel fingers — Nuncius. A vox-grille has been wired to the skull, from which the binharic hiss of error testing litanies can be heard.{/n}
0a829dfd-7796-45fc-a2af-891db76bd00b: To use the unique {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} called {g|Encyclopedia:HeroicAct}heroic acts{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:DesperateMeasure}desperate measures{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g} is required. Depending on the actions of your party in combat, the momentum bar will increase or decrease. A high momentum value allows a character to use a heroic act. A low value grants access to desperate measures. Both abilities can completely change the course of a battle, but every party member can either use one or the other and only once in a single combat.
102d4ce4-6c4b-481c-b792-79fd9e757e39: "With all due respect, those same articles also state that cowardice and inaction when command is in peril also constitute treason. You may have us shot for insubordination, but we shall not abandon you."
13deafca-e2e7-4a51-be6f-5ce3c2070be0:
When activated, −1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stack is removed from the wearer. Until the end of the turn, their melee attacks deal an additional +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage.
This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped.
1ff90005-6c6d-4172-83dd-4de79d0edbdc: Twice per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, whenever an enemy within an 8-cell radius and in the user's {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} deals damage to an ally, that enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 round.
6152fb6e-e8e9-4a9f-8df8-1b1f82450201: [Kill him] "The experiment is over. It was doomed from the very start."
c899a6a1-cce9-4764-845a-0670928abc7c: "I have taken over management of the sector, but I endeavour to adhere to the wisdom bestowed upon us by the Adeptus Mechanicus. Sacred augmentations are being installed in strict compliance with patient status and efficiency." {n}Martinax shudders and adds quietly,{/n} "I rather sound like Genetor Ferrenz, don't I?"
aac78f09-d0a3-4203-98d5-8416c85ebf48: "To simplify that even further — the Imperium is the meaning of our lives."
c15cc5db-8898-44f2-a3c8-c07210bfbadc: "Thank you, Genetor, but no. The past cannot be outrun with alchemical elixirs and implants. It will always be with us."
db1cf22e-eee0-4e9d-9c65-0df94a1fe100: "Hold your tongue and leave, or I shall have the enforcers throw you out in disgrace."
285bcf14-4cda-49b0-aaf5-1bddd8987f5e: {n}The instant your swords collide, the Crimson Dance of Khaine shatters into myriad shards that vanish in flashes of venomous green light. Silence descends, broken only by the distant echo of gunfire and explosions.{/n}
b301f866-1a6e-4233-a7c6-4dae6aab4279: "I'm not going to try to resist. I'll be back here in a moment anyway."
b8e14a9a-bb03-4bef-bc1a-86fa5e09b8b4: "I believe that, unless I revoke the Final Order, I cannot issue the next one. And that will be an order to redeploy."
1a1c23a2-be1d-49e9-8c5d-14513e1d0880: The Krieg soldiers wear gas masks and are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g}. While in trenches, a Krieg soldier gains +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. When a Krieg soldier dies, it grants {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}salvation in death{/g} to the rest of the Krieg soldiers.
acb6e69e-c1f4-4da4-8153-814b73a3d487: "A worker who perfectly fulfils his function may believe that the meaning of life is to provide for his family. That is for him alone to decide."
631b6fdd-43c6-4e26-99b4-798ce942f338: "I have no intention of continuing. Take Seberian von Valancius away. This part of the Museion has fallen, and I see no reason to remain here."
f1bcc7d0-b6e8-4d4d-8018-09085c729305: {n}They are all fit and strong, which is not surprising. Young and old, male and female, every one of them looks like they stepped straight out of an Astra Militarum propaganda poster.{/n}
244fdaa7-350d-42df-b444-b3b06649f626: As long as the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g} has two swords equipped, the Bladedancer's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} is increased by +{uip|agiB|e8348519866444ad9093c91f9cbc8ba5}.
3b688e18-6d0a-4d34-93de-93096daf47e4: {n}One thing is clear: the lies that the devious xenos used to entangle existence must be sundered, and the time loop must be broken. The Lord Captain will not deign to spend any longer in this trap than {mf|he|she} wishes.{/n}
100745d0-1bfa-41ff-a6a1-29c8af7bca5b: "Get out of my way, creature, or death awaits you."
5a7749c5-6ed4-4ce2-b3e7-1565edd5989b: "Your imitation of the Haemonculus and his perverted interests is thoroughly entertaining... Tervantias's lessons have left their mark on your mind, mon-keigh. I wonder what they will turn you into years from now?"
ab58f916-d51d-4905-bf19-dec9fa269b37: "Artisan Decabalus-4-16 is accused of violating the Ninth Universal Law to the fifth degree! He has corrupted the technology of the Omnissiah with xenotech and must be destroyed as a deviant pattern! His algorithms are poisoning your mind, reject them or die!" {n}Alva-9 lets out a short binharic howl akin to the wail of a combat siren.{/n}
9e750a53-e446-4cac-8baf-ae726f802c02: "Vox-signal lost! Now, what was the litany for this?"
1c707c9d-4d56-4e96-9ebb-1bab47aedd15: Thanks to the Rogue Trader's efforts, the murderer of the Gaprak scion has been found. The killer is Isimond Sauerback, who was acting on the orders of Camilla Drivestem. All of them, however, were simply the victims of an elegant manipulation devised by Juvenna von Valancius.
24f71233-e7f8-401d-abab-e5caad4a1ee6: A sumptuously embellished cloak in the colours of the von Valancius dynasty.
3a3deba9-5118-4ded-9f06-120c07138869: {n}The colonel, who looks like a predator at any other time, does not bare his teeth or smile in bloodthirsty anticipation, nor does he look at you with hatred. He is entirely focused, his gaze cold and calculating.{/n} "Atonement for the one, {mf|lord|lady} heir. Be it for you, or for me."
701f78d5-06fa-4a96-a584-e32691190fa9: "The wax is still warm. You must believe me, no matter how crazy it sounds."
035a21c9-25ba-4d16-b63d-daf12d9748ad: "By the God-Emperor, if this is the recruits' idea of a joke again..."
f02e9b2c-18c9-4b65-b6a0-7c899f1f7515: "Your trust in me has already been shaken — you worked out on your own that there was something amiss with me. If I do not tell you the truth, then it will be irretrievably lost. The scenario in which I tell you everything is the only one where there is a chance of us being on good terms once more."
8bb3f1c1-c87d-4a6e-818c-cada84ed9c97: "By the true blood of von Valancius, may the corruption be washed from the Warrant that was signed by His right hand. Returned to its place of safekeeping, may the relic restore the right bestowed upon the dynasty."
f2e0e65d-ebf1-452c-9ea3-1bdc4659c882: "I can see you are a good, honest soldier. But they're not all like you, are they?"
65e49ec9-10a2-492e-8246-84739b845e47: {n}After a moment, the man looks at you with hollow eyes.{/n} "Lord Captain... All channels are nothing but static. I... I don't understand why, everything is functioning perfectly. It's as if something is jamming the frequency. We cannot contact the flagship. According to the charts, there is a settlement nearby. Perhaps the locals have a more powerful vox-unit?"
3ecd801d-6cdf-4935-88ff-f04cfaf71bf8: "A peculiar pattern of acoustic waves. I have never encountered anything like this before." {n}Eogunn appears utterly serene and even intrigued as he listens intently to something.{/n} "Infrasound alternating with ultrasound, and so naturally too... These frequencies are inaudible, Rogue Trader, yet they evoke a violent reaction from the deep-seated structures of the human brain. I would like to lay eyes on their source."
74c3beb3-a43a-495f-8ba8-b8b68d509b57: "You speak quite cogently for an inferior being. It is amusing, considering the obvious damage to your reasoning. If you are sufficiently deferential, I will reward your curiosity... perhaps."
1099f8f5-b116-4d6f-aeb0-1a37e26633a3: "Your blessing for the examination, esteemed Magi?" {n}The Lexmechanic respectfully awaits the permission of Pasqal and Eogunn.{/n}
fdf71eeb-423e-4011-b8be-8cf6cb5f7f7b: After Eogunn uses the {g|f:5b46732f51a9413bbc94491ac63c807f}magnarail lance{/g}, the next instance of shock or energy damage he deals within 1 round is increased by +{uip|BonusDamage|577cb8202ec3465fbd4821afce831bd7}%.
9b7dafd3-d3f5-406d-b1d2-e9a34af45990: "Here are my orders: take defensive measures and supply the planet from the outside. As for the xenobeasts, they will settle down sooner or later."
1d27304b-f544-4874-b85a-55b7479a9da5: "Observing Drukhari biomechanical patterns without any accompanying risk is very rare, Rogue Trader. I deemed that watching and pict-recording these events would be more than appropriate within the framework of my experiments."
e7da69e4-4979-422e-8233-a7d0a35ec68e: "I should not expect any more surprises from you, I hope?"
76755084-2a73-4835-a7d9-7fdf25c922d4: "Nobody likes it here, not just your dog. It's cold, it's wet... I wouldn't say no to lubricating my own protocols with a glass of amasec."
ad4075d3-bbf4-48db-b8d4-b6351ed75099: [Grant the Emperor's Mercy] "All we can do now is grant him an easy death."
20ca06ce-8b6a-4d0b-866f-f5de252abf4d: "You defeated that unholy thief?" {n}Sauerback asks, as if unable to believe what she is hearing.{/n} "Well, I couldn't have hoped for anything better. Except for the death of that accursed {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} as well."
e64b9bb4-8b8f-4753-8219-64f83b81a424: "One of the Universal Laws states, 'The Knowledge of the ancients stands beyond question.' The Omnissiah has blessed me — an Artisan — by allowing knowledge from external sources to be turned to the benefit of Humanity. Theological debate is inevitable in this matter, but the increased output of the promethium platforms is an indisputable fact."
1883bbca-f7a9-473f-8867-bc761b48d9d9: Eogunn has fled to Footfall without explanation, taking Nuncius with him. Locate the Tech-Priest and uncover the truth behind his erratic behaviour.
ba7ce62a-6e03-40a8-9bc2-f899d5ad23f8: "The machine spirits of the sacred apparatuses of the Sector Bionica are strained beyond measure. Issuing an urgent request to increase the number of Adeptus Mechanicus members on the ship."
b1ed7bbe-0dfa-4364-912a-5c991819095d: [Administer pain relief] "I can only ease her suffering."
693f0977-d3b7-427e-96d5-39ec9e3a1748: {n}Those who had set off to serve on the watch were looked upon as the walking dead. Everyone knew that if the xenos attacked again, those faces would be stretched out over metal bones. And when someone shouted the Merovian motto at their departing backs, a few voices called back, "No, atonement for the many!"{/n}
d76d911f-a03a-4dc7-8ccf-0a308e62fbdd: "For His Lordship, I'll rip that af Irramon apart with my bare teeth!"
d186dcc5-0ddd-4120-8a44-413329dba676: "O wisest of men, your language is so rich and clear, not like the other adepts of the Omnissiah! Do tell me more about this ergonomics of yours... and other mysteries of the Mechanicus..."
d10dc040-a268-4966-a500-099f4bf0159d: Plasma discharges vaporised blood and metal with a hiss. Prism after prism collapsed, until puddles of molten metal were all that was left of those creations of perverse xenos genius.
2249fede-1f85-4f3e-9df5-f09fc46f8fda: {n}Calcazar slowly raises his weapon — you can see it is a struggle for him.{/n} "Enough. I did not risk so much for an enemy of Humanity to confound my plans by finding a hidden heretic traitor among my allies..."
454dcdbd-599e-41e8-9454-9ef393a921d7: "I do not believe in white lies." {n}Laria's hand is resting on the grip of her laspistol.{/n} "Any last words?"
11390786-580d-4eca-b517-e9463b299df3: "I look forward to seeing what new topic of discussion you propose."
c42c3e38-b139-48b1-ac36-dc3665dd2d2a: "From now on, I'll always pray for your health, until the day I die!"
57160ac9-9653-46c2-ba11-43a51fd6becc: "Registering: what exactly are the causes of the doom the xenos prophesises? Geothermal? Economic? What is the likelihood of preventing or harnessing the energy of the catastrophe for the glory of the Omnissiah?"
8f3ba336-d512-4d35-a5d7-78326cc64a7e: [Shake your head in disapproval] "I did not expect to hear such harsh statements from you about the common people."
eccfd076-9f15-4581-8bd0-321ed9b87bda: {n}Jarub is visibly anxious. He speaks quietly, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}, I haven't managed the task yet. Haven't had the chance. I've been on sentry duty — command's orders."
bac90de9-5e26-4a3e-8f8e-bb5a26d2a2e3: The wearer gains +15 {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g} and the {g|f:bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d}Energy Concentration{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}.
a4a80202-a077-4b9c-814c-88ea5f49f4df: {n}When the shells fall, you will be the only one not surprised.{/n}
fde6cfc0-3c23-487e-a5bc-1224b710f0bd: The colony on Zarkov had no hope of resisting the forces of the Shard's divine harbinger: the planet was torn apart by the roots growing under its crust, and all its inhabitants were destroyed.
f4d8e4bc-a431-4b5a-900c-c672613a79d0: {n}The throne's machine spirits instantly erupt in a cacophony of alarms. You count no less than thirty beats of your own heart before the pulsing organ is returned to its owner's chest. The ashen shadow of death slowly leaves Eogunn's face.{/n} "Praise the Omnissiah! Nuncius, this is what we've been searching for. A thirty-second interval is optimal for removing the organ without causing dysfunction!"
ad84b00d-9682-49d9-921f-6ccf96b84ae0: "You massacre an outpost of Merovians, and then boldly present yourself at the gates of my palace... I would admire your reckless valour if you weren't so impudent. What madness compels such agents of the Golden Throne, I cannot fathom, but you shall not get what you came for." {n}The voice coming from the vox-grille sounds weary.{/n}
89dd30bf-271c-4906-b54f-130c92f8b64c: The user can make shots from ring compact weapons once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} instead of once per combat.
bdce92a0-9b6d-451d-994e-dca3caec6fd6: [Hand Seberian's records over to Vedka] "It is not I, but Seberian himself, who revokes it."
5c8cdbb0-728d-4403-8c76-2cf7f745e6c1: "Do you mean stubborn and blunt? A strong alliance could come of that. Or a bloody feud. Either outcome suits me."
5543590a-d600-450c-9f9e-7b56b76aac93: [Make the sign of the Aquila and offer a prayer] "Cast off fear and pain. Eclipse them with His light and let it burn all corruption to dust."
04bf6544-c43c-4873-88f7-2c05742536df: {n}The group of researchers manage to safely reach the obelisk and get what they are looking for. Midway through the return trip, vox-communication with their shuttle is cut off, and the shuttle itself switches to autopilot. Guided by the machine spirit of the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g}, the shuttle docks with the ship shortly after. The interior of the shuttle is strewn with the corpses of the crew, all of which have been bisected with perfect precision. The sample of the obelisk material has vanished without a trace.{/n}
9b5f5146-ef92-4d57-945a-1552da0846bb: "I wish to discuss the missing Gaprak reinforcements."
d5bc3587-ac75-4192-a858-c544c83390f1: "Why haven't you performed your ritual this time?"
7f7d9821-50a0-4a88-b171-2b0d75d4dad6: "The beauty makes up a soft bed, but when you lie down to sleep — wham! You wake up without a head." {n}A mocking cackle escapes Idira before the {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psyker{/g} can clamp both hands over her mouth.{/n} "S-s-sorry... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}..."
85dc0a70-0166-4772-b942-eada88d56965: "'Ad Sanctum Imperialis,' stanza one thousand and five." {n}Seberian looks unfazed and even a little disappointed.{/n} "What were you expecting? You will not leave the palace alive. And even if you manage to do so, my Seneschal will simply change the access litany. What a waste of life..."
0e3ea3c5-5af4-4602-8bca-1f3b33b67e9d: "Not at all, Rogue Trader. I am careful to ensure that my pain level never exceeds borderline values — my objective is not to harm myself, but to learn!"
b1bbef5c-d33a-4af9-a401-b25d3945958c: "Behold: a fossil of rust and corpse starch, here to lecture me on good sense!"
758af777-52a7-424b-9070-a5dcc496cd6d: "I hereby express gratitude to the Lord Captain for saving this life form's vital functions. May the Omnissiah watch over your every step." {n}Genetor Ferrenz stands before you for a few more seconds, as if frozen in place. The visors are the first to show signs of life, flickering erratically.{/n} "I need to go to the operating room immediately. The Martinax life form requires my expertise."
4997ffb2-6ccb-4862-95c3-4f510d874781: "Fangs of Morkai, the xenos will answer for their perfidy! The prisoner was not my brother by blood, but he died a faithful son of the Allfather. The iron dead will pay a wergeld for his death."
5cd5c6ed-ee8a-492c-a8f1-52b4b26c015b: The battle was long. The humans fought to the last, though exhausted by the enemy's incredible might. At the cost of their lives, the soldiers dealt with the vanguard, but countless more xenos were emerging from the corridors. My heir ordered a retreat, and the sappers collapsed the passage behind us with melta charges to hold back the enemy and win us time.
cc90bc29-3dbb-4cec-a235-00d0005b2862: "I am watching you, heretic. Only the Rogue Trader's patronage protects you from the justice of the Lex Imperialis."
cec20768-5d97-4699-99f4-6f7f6da7f0d9: "I shall need a commander for the Zarkovian troops. And the position of Arch-Militant also happens to be open."
6810be0b-8fde-4919-bdd0-a68e76d062a4: {n}Folding his arms over his stomach, the Tech-Priest addresses Nuncius:{/n} "Scepticism is undeniably one of the instruments of Knowledge, dearest colleague. It guards us against many heresies, preventing ego and vanity from clouding reason on the path of service. But as you see, Nuncius, it is not justified in every circumstance." {n}After a moment's silence, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader, Nuncius states that you are a person of rare perspicacity and prudence. I record this as an incontrovertible fact and thank you for your hospitality."
14652552-dc7b-475f-a949-e1cbbac9b7c2: This effect is active only when this character stands outside the highlighted cells. They suffer −11 to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} and deal −{uip|LogicDamage|f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}% less damage. Their {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g} is reduced by −20% against creatures with less than 100% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}.
655cb2ac-ce6b-46ce-af3e-485aa6f901e0: "Fact one. My interest in xenos is easily mistaken for a proclivity. It is not. I find them no more appealing than I would a cadaver being vivisected to ascertain what sickness ended its existence. They are objects that I study in order to answer a simple question: how can they be destroyed most effectively?"
a00f47b4-fd74-48bc-a368-ea8b1eceef91: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}Vivisector Martinax is so overcome with indignation that his voice rings out, filling the air. {/n} "Some patients are deliberately flouting the rules of admission, which is directly affecting the chirurgeons' work. I humbly request your intervention!"
0f653cc9-3592-4e67-a9dc-7167148697a8: {n}From the corner of your eye, you notice Sauerback start moving toward you, shock maul in hand, only to stop in confusion as she recognises the von Valancius colours upon the intruder.{/n}
db0dcbef-5469-4e35-afbf-da128963ae33: "The reaction is evaluated as congruent. In other words — most likely yes, Rogue Trader."
7aae55a4-9351-4314-b312-cc084b6513b4: "We must hurry. Time is against us."
59f8e631-e57e-434b-917b-a61cfb7ef172: "The crux! All three organisms were found in critical condition. I asked myself: is their usefulness and productive capacity truly at an end? Nonsense. To move from a state of being to a state of non-being entails no benefits or meaning. I personally ensured that their vital functions were preserved. Our goal could not be simpler — to vanquish death by creating the perfect righteous man, that which I have dubbed the Triasomata."
f17955a5-46a5-4d5f-b23b-a5a3960518c6: At the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user suffers {unit_stat|WarhammerToughness|bonus} damage.
521bc099-9fbf-453b-988a-f3213891b95f: The awakened machine spirits hum industriously in the casing of the ancient device. Each key is carefully coated with a thin layer of sacred unguent, and the cables spark slightly.
a3e7dceb-f64e-49c5-bd86-e99160560ad2: If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} is within 4 cells of the psyber-raven, whenever the Overseer triggers {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}, it affects a random enemy inside that area instead of the Overseer. Exceptionally powerful enemies can be immune to instant-kill effects. If there are no enemies in this area, perils of the warp affects the Overseer as usual.
e33708dc-3497-4823-943c-b2f9bb8aa27e: Eogunn claims that Genetor Ferrenz is refusing to repair Nuncius. He is waiting on the bridge for the Rogue Trader to take Ferrenz to task over the matter.
7e165aaf-b090-4280-9d42-4150f3e7031c: "How long have you two been together?"
381a6aec-b5a0-4b43-86bc-f1088f0c0558: {g|f:48139b5d8510426fa2d07a55f99236f5}In My Sights{/g} gains additional {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g} equal to {uip|BS|c332d4c355ea40a6b8bb0bd454a2fdac}%.
97574ccd-1c1d-4e4a-97ee-9119f20694c3: "Oh, shereen! What a gorgeous little toy. Not better than mine, of course, but still a hand to inspire envy in all the azhi."
1d3a0bdd-1dc3-4b53-af31-9ddd601af20a: "Just as I taught you! One shot, one hit!"
5348431e-04b2-42de-9ce9-ac030f05e632: "...took it from the ship of a Rogue Trader, who had no idea of the value of the object that had fallen into his hands as part of a routine transaction. I am still to determine the provenance of this intriguing device known as the Brass Prism — when I find the time."
958e0235-c19b-41b7-9f3d-6c3bcac0f3ec: "If one can call it that. Captain Dunawski introduced herself, then began showering me with compliments. Sincere, yet quite artless."
7d701d7a-2212-4f35-afd2-a981926016ab: {n}Eogunn looks in confusion at the servo-skull in his hands, then over his shoulder{/n}. "But... How... No. It cannot be. Because I can hear him." {n}His lips quiver, and his fingers clench and unclench. He looks pitiful, lost. Bringing one hand to his temple, he squeezes his eyes shut, straining desperately to remember something. Suddenly, his eyes fly open and you hear a strangled moan. He looks at you, dumbfounded.{/n}
04af9c0c-6568-4f3c-851d-7d398d640386: "May the God-Emperor protect you, Lord Captain. We'll see to the defences and start purging those iron beasts."
95d8226c-91a8-4e6e-972a-3ae4fe7ea054: "Communing with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} is the remit of Magos Exalt-117, and you would have done better to ask him. But I have memorised the code: it is too important that the gates remain closed." {n}With bold strokes, the Seneschal scribbles the code's digits on a page in her notebook and hands the paper to you.{/n}
0f31029f-86f9-4c8f-a90d-9a26dece5a80: "To my knowledge, the guns are pointed at the coordinates of the main headquarters."
c9807364-dbc1-404a-aaa1-169390887762: "Your blessing for the examination, Magos?" {n}The Lexmechanic waits respectfully until Eogunn nods.{/n}
8cf5d36a-ff6e-428d-8c35-7eea1470015b: "And what, precisely, was this great price you speak of?"
7d073c5f-31f0-4af2-96dc-4580ba35561c: {n}A satisfied hum ripples through the crowd. Vedka thrusts her clawed hand into the air.{/n} "We are born for greater things, and our gratitude to the dynasty knows no bounds!"
b3642310-37c1-4ed4-aaa1-82f96989032a: Enemies attacked by the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g} have their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} reduced by −{uip|debuff|9ad18a41c7e444669fc38fae80ce344d} until the start of the Bladedancer's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}. These {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalties{/g} do not stack.
f9ef2967-b10b-4799-b67c-a4b55d3d1c46: {n}Realising what is about to happen, Juvenna stops resisting and closes her eyes. Her final moments she spends in prayer.{/n}
ce71c1e6-b2e8-48b2-8d97-8450186b265c: "Aren't you afraid that someone close to you will turn against you? Heresy is a serious charge."
32dc15e1-57d7-4cc8-a38d-d26e65f374b2: "The hues of this place are so bright and monochromatic that they blind my eyes. Please, let us not linger here!"
958f2aae-4a43-4b5b-ac45-8525a1988d89:
Until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, all {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonuses{/g} from this {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} are applied regardless of weapon type.
At the end of their turn, the user suffers +1 stack of fatigued until the end of combat.
401be573-97bc-4dff-ab09-c8083f5c2d96: {n}Your interlocutor is silent for a long time, then sighs:{/n} "Poverty of intellect is one of the supreme virtues. However, it seems you cannot claim to possess it. Speak the truth."
9a355b92-7aa5-4136-82b3-d7401f37c8eb: "How fascinating. Mon-keigh who could not subjugate a world have been forced to submit to the planet's laws instead. Your species is remarkably tenacious in its own survival."
75cab7ea-cc0d-4e47-8a8e-3e95758700b7: "Request accepted. The Sector Bionica is fully operational once more and under the oversight of this life form. Augmetics are being installed in accordance with approved protocols."
188665be-9452-482f-86d8-3337a6a78d0c: Further inspection of the bridge helps piece the scattered evidence together into a complete picture. The ship had fallen victim to the Drukhari — after slaughtering the defenders, the xenos had captured the entire crew, with the exception of the officers. Their moans of pain echo from the bridge speakers, a soulless testament to the horrific torture the Drukhari inflicted on the people before they vanished.
d7aadd68-a51e-4ab1-8057-bbea06da5fbf: {n}Cassia stares at the empty podium, struggling to see what the vision just described.{/n} "But..." {n}she trails off, lapsing into confused silence.{/n}
ad55eb67-7ebf-4df9-8eeb-b2284d934942: "You did the right thing. That is an incontrovertible fact."
681bc9e4-ab69-4c9e-8aef-465a0c255c37: {n}Raising his hand, the Tech-Priest snaps his hand closed and the sparks of the Motive Force vanish, almost as if he has caught them in his fist. A corpulent man with a metal abdomen and bulky carapace, he hovers above the deck like a large, crimson beetle. A mature face sits beneath an angular black cap; for a servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}, his visage retains a surprising proportion of organic material, and it is set in a dense beard of cables and pistons.{/n}
6c2e15be-65ac-4aca-bc91-096a03226132: "Expressing consensus. The lamentable pattern of irrational disposal of potential and resources is indeed characteristic of the Inquisition. I also note that the value of some knowledge does not justify the risk that it entails. Genetor Februs, you know this firsthand."
ea31ba41-8065-4714-b691-b4b3eb366fc0: "Cooperation with Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 has brought great relief to the cogitators of this place. All praise to the reliability of the ritual!"
bce27d96-91dc-47b7-aabd-dbe614a5c915: "Do you wish to ask something, iron philosopher?"
f40b4dde-faca-4974-a76e-f1b6f4656b3c: {n}The Seneschal listens silently to the vox-conversation. Her face hardens further with every word she hears:{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Transmitting the coordinates of perimeter..." {n}When she finally notices your presence, Juvenna abruptly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you.{/n} "Throne of Terra, what is the meaning of this? What the—" {n}She sucks in a furious breath, biting back the swear word.{/n} "What are you two doing here?"
e913eda9-3bb6-4064-85de-8c0ebe18c8b3: "You ask to be forgiven? But... Nomos have nothing to forgive you—"
1c7b753a-f374-4ca2-9424-39d175f78180: "I hear you have hands of gold, Jarub. You can lay your nimble fingers on just about anything."
b91aead4-826f-430e-8342-c687174de462: [Yawn] "All this digging through dynastic junk is tiresome. Is it essential that I answer your questions?"
a2afc19d-96a9-4e14-a03d-308471f1bcb1: "And, naturally, there are exceptional individuals, such as Rogue Traders, who can afford the best augments at the wave of their hand... or rather its loss." {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Just think about it — you are one of untold billions, and you succeeded in becoming a statistical improbability. How could one perceive anything in these metaphysical mathematics but the design of the Machine God?"
e23059cd-077c-457a-b376-0a2fff7fce63: "The point of reference... has been accepted as valid. Initiating coordinate reconstruction." {n}The humming of Exalt-117's internal mechanisms grows quieter, and in the rhythmic noise you hear his hushed whisper of surprise:{/n} "The data-index has harmonised. It radiates... cold."
557edb2e-4318-4f91-b696-3c621eb5d010: "You are the most heavily augmented person I have ever seen who was not a servant of the Omnissiah."
57a9be9a-a98e-464f-9415-466b98ad7dcb: Tubes have been plunged into flesh and filled with a foul-looking substance. The strange machine cycles the fluids through the recipient's body. The main, thickest tube has been sewn to his lips — the poor man has suffered for decades, feeding on his own blood.
ae0422dd-0b10-43fa-a2a2-60ec3424766a: "I have been informed that the captain-quartermaster took a group of our finest scouts and headed toward the ruins, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
a05d41f3-b29a-42a2-8b04-a7a400fa5b16: "No, Rogue Trader, I made a vow to you. My mind is too old and anguished. I have no strength left in me to flee — Amsanct awaits."
30c04b62-0ad7-434e-b34e-c1d4a24bc3f9: {n}The icy cold shredding your body into hundreds of frozen particles recedes, and the green glow of Necron technology is replaced by trembling firelight. You are on the deck of your ship, and something soft, rustling and muffling your footsteps bunches beneath your feet. An expanse of thin, beautifully preserved paper, covered in neat {g|Encyclopedia:HighGothic}High Gothic{/g} lettering. A great artefact of antiquity, your dynasty's {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant of Trade{/g}, is spread out beneath your feet.{/n}
8de461b0-4a22-40aa-9327-b002e5de7f1c: "I only stepped away for a minute! My post is right there, you can see it from here!" {n}Jarub points in the direction of the infirmary.{/n} "If I hadn't stood here arguing with you, Master Captain, I could've been back on guard duty by now!"
907cce60-df0c-462f-8daa-4e87811d1155: "The work of the Sector Bionica is suffering because of your research."
3c64ce01-7049-4a2d-8b3e-1d25310a90cd: {n}Your companion responds with a long silence. The Aeldari do not seem to be in a hurry to share their secrets with you.{/n}
c4783a66-2bd3-4c51-9db4-d9573a421082: "Charming. But I could not fail to notice your grumbling, Batoshski. I suggest we continue our conversation when war breaks out. Until then, you may hate me in silence from the other end of the bridge."
4e871374-c99b-4da8-9aff-f42d8ade6571: "Please excuse my close-lipped colleague. This is Nuncius's first time conducting a dialogue with a member of the Adeptus Astartes, and as such, he is somewhat... struggling to verbalise his thoughts."
50985d88-0d59-4220-b2a8-06454d2e9b88: {n}Batoshski circles you, looking for a weakness in your defences before striking. He remains utterly indifferent to the blood flowing from his wounds.{/n}
3a0f43db-873e-41ef-804c-dab5f1c749e6:
The Tech-Priest can use their mechadendrite to restore the {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} of an ally once per combat.
Increased {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} dealt to the target due to the {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} effect is reduced by −5% per stack until the end of combat.
The ally regains +<u>(6 + {uip|Heal|3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf} + number of target's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks)</u> wounds.
87158c4e-cdb5-4ae5-bc92-5529520feb5a: "Juvenna has betrayed you, Laria. This vox-station is her line of communication to the Inquisition. You have seen it with your own eyes."
c9804971-7af3-4e02-be7f-c1c590163079: "That item belonged to my predecessor. She is dead."
11a74d37-1ca0-482d-a40a-79217f356fc9: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "Perhaps. But it is what I truly believe. Only time, the most dispassionate arbiter of all, will be able to judge us."
5a1d11a3-1248-4985-91e6-a3410b83a6bb: "No! Don't touch my legs! They're all I have left!"
423f517b-43f1-454c-9cb7-2931ac4a5204: "Since the thing is so valuable, I would rather keep it in my possession."
d7f785fe-c351-4c94-871b-a95765c748f2: "You said that Nuncius was between life and death — what happened?"
32019cae-806d-4bf5-a96a-f6233d1cb716: The grenade emits gas within a 3-cell radius around the target cell. All creatures without a gas mask suffer the {g|f:fdb59a292d664750a186ee6e61d102c6}Krieg gas{/g} effect.
c637b53f-2934-41f7-9a76-ffafe2eae443: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you have returned... Thank the God-Emperor." {n}Your Seneschal puts his weapon back in its sheath, staring at you with naked relief.{/n}
38f589ca-474c-4c49-9389-8e770f20c32a: {n}Eogunn screws up his face as if seized by intense pain.{/n} "I... No. I cannot. That is a powerful, if utterly sordid, argument on your part, {name}. Commendable! Very well, I will go through with this deception, but solely for Nuncius's sake."
83d73620-cc47-49ae-8a17-5d6ddac7e19b: Until {g|f:9e96c09deef54bc89a0fe5d17545df51}activated{/g}, this obelisk suffers −50% less damage from all sources.
670f2003-71b8-4f6b-9ae1-9e8273cb023f: {n}The Manipulus extends a thin auspex-analyser probe toward the malodorous waters.{/n} "Remarkable! The organic specimens in the water are so diverse that, in a manner of speaking, they lay bare the entire way of life on Footfall."
2731f1d9-32ed-494c-9bb6-07a9270a0e1b: "There is no need to revoke the Final Order. You shall follow it into the Koronus Expanse and complete it there!"
295f29ac-43f9-46f7-916e-74def8c5d178: {n}After listening to Nuncius for no less than a minute, Eogunn solemnly pronounces:{/n} "Yes."
ba6b3625-eb4e-4165-8062-a74335f83415: "Of course, I can wait. However, without the samples, the journey to Amsanct is futile — without them, I cannot help Nuncius."
fe302c1a-0502-4700-8870-c088855f2318: "I knew you would wish to prove your valour by facing the Drover with only your retinue at your side! Bold, risky... Just like all the legends say Rogue Traders should act."
3c8964ad-18a4-45b9-9942-717545a0c600: "Zarkov has changed beyond recognition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {n}Kuravich's voice chimes with heartfelt admiration.{/n} "The wonders we've seen: lumens, data-slates, even talking skulls... And, above all — order and rations! It's clear the God-Emperor has taken a liking to us. We've finally earned His forgiveness."
9be95b35-b912-44ac-8fe0-f49f6d6aa707: "We... we've been on the defensive for many Call-Ups now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I am not challenging your decision, but... one day we will have to counter-attack."
e362ea83-e1aa-4717-aa9c-1df470dbd3b4: {n}The Manipulus claps a hand to his forehead.{/n} "Of course! The main criteria of an experiment are reproducibility and consistency. One failed trial, and I'm ready to give up? Absurd! Is replacing injured subjects with healthy ones truly the answer? A rethink of the selection criteria is most certainly in order."
aa51aa3f-d543-430e-aff9-ecc3b52f6629: Civilisation transformed Zarkov into a world of suspended residential blocks, smoke-spewing factories, and cloud-piercing spires. The tiered root system became the basis for hive cities where millions of workers served the Imperium and the protectorate.
789b447a-654e-4bfd-af68-4fe6b897e75d: The user's Willpower is reduced by −10%.
23d2e538-efb0-4f0a-ae13-ad0fd2ec79cc: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The blessing of the Machine God was granted to many worthy officers, clerics, and functionaries aboard the flagship. The sacred iron that had replaced their weak flesh ensured that their service was long and true, despite causing great suffering to its bearers.
4fed452d-bdb7-438c-817d-a971e4a3ffb2: The user can move through units, dealing {uip|Damage|c46782c71be94869b4022275e1611915} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to them and gaining +3 stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g} for each unit they moved through.
2bba33cd-0f02-4591-a6aa-747a85b2de8e: {n}The servo-skull tactfully remains silent, granting the opposing parties complete freedom to express their views.{/n}
2c530b9f-b227-4a44-bc10-12e1c1de7a5d: I have seen my fair share of battles, but never before have I witnessed anything like that which erupted in the orbit of that accursed dead world. The handful of fighter craft covering the flagship fought an outmatched battle with the unholy enemy's ever-swelling hordes. Yet, sacrificing themselves, the servants of House von Valancius cleared the way for their master, just as they did in days of old.
72837f3c-0d9a-46c1-a330-89cf8a1580d7: {n}Eogunn's fingers, which were nervously fiddling with a bolt on his beard, stop abruptly. He slowly says,{/n} "For every tool shall be rewarded according to its function. Have I scorned the doctrines of operation? It is inconceivable! This calls for thorough analysis and reinterpretation of the sacred texts. I was seeking a righteous man, but I should have calculated the righteousness in myself."
4dc5bae3-0963-4aa8-830b-3c249d8b1353: "A strong assertion, which just as strongly indicates one's fervent adherence to a puritan philosophy. This aligns with the limited data available to me regarding Inquisitor af Irramon."
1ed0d4d3-1811-4c6d-ab8c-c6dc3d19f3fe: "Encouraging words. I hear in them the spirit of a von Valancius heir." {n}Seberian's condescending smile is hidden behind the vox-grille that has replaced his lower jaw, yet it is audible in his voice.{/n} "We shall see whether deeds follow." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."
c3e1c8db-4e14-4a50-ae42-8713f21652ff: "A crude attempt at manipulation. You will see nothing 'fair' in what is about to happen to you."
a06ecd0d-f1f4-482d-b244-9769bf5bbbb5: The lasguns, which have been meticulously anointed with sacred unguents, are revered as holy relics.
f0b9dbe6-cb4e-4423-81e4-d592461627c5: "Just excellent, Lord Captain!" {n}The medicae officer looks tired, but immensely pleased. You notice the newly added insignia on his uniform.{/n}
6d4f151b-ff00-42cf-a667-d123d9895792: "You have no idea! We are caught in a xenos trap, endlessly going around in circles, hopeless to resist their twisted will!"
4ec2dde4-913d-4891-9d57-7a69286dff9b: {n}Unnatural silence reigns in your chambers. The dust motes hang frozen in the air before you, the candle flames cease to flicker, and the two enforcers who came to check your quarters stand still as statues — all in stark contrast to the other silhouette, one that is utterly unlike anything else in the room.{/n}
b4a696da-0a82-4967-9e12-6079c998d86a: "I hope that it was, for your sake. I would really hate to regret my decision to trust you." {n}With this cold, curt retort, Juvenna dismisses you with a graceful sweep of her hand and leaves.{/n}
734b8885-ca33-4ba9-a6e6-858b7b1ff5b2: "Allow me to have a word with her first."
48dee1a8-f4e6-4606-a5ea-26f712d4cdb1: The user can move through allies and enemies. Each creature on their path suffers {uip|Damage|000d41d069204fa98ee5394c060f71ab} {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} with 30% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. The user also gains +3 stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}.
e1fa14a3-850d-490d-b1b5-d8935c6c7419: "Not to worry. We shall restore it later."
4d713da8-592d-4500-b503-5cb02c8d71ec: "Registering a violation. The tech-unit Nuncius is ignoring a request for engagement. Recommending that the unit's labour be allocated to repair tasks."
7e65e911-672c-4367-904c-8bcd2408a240: "The Bloodspun Web also speaks to its departed brothers and sisters. But the answer we receive is the silence granted by the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}."
c867113b-9fd7-4083-b68f-cbf97ce43d74: {n}The huge metal platform is barely moving, but you notice the speed with which the water level is rising under the drain grates.{/n}
a6e5915d-aae6-4e68-9f57-0a546a27574a: "It is time for us to talk about Nuncius."
bb75a7f3-1985-4ce8-945c-8634f3b063e0:
Attacks that always {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} (such as {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} shots) have a 100% maximum hit chance. Other ranged attacks have a maximum hit chance of 95%.
{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Penalties{/g} that reduce maximum hit chance also apply to attacks that always hit, causing the hit roll to still be made.
fa4769ab-69a6-4af7-865c-6901a4418ab0: "If someone is behaving suspiciously and having dealings with ne'er-do-wells, then they should be questioned. Status carries some weight in the matter, but it doesn't grant immunity. Especially under martial law. So, now, what's the connection between you and Sergeant Vukchik?" {n}The captain is unfailingly courteous, but he is clearly intent on continuing his interrogation.{/n}
4a944869-7f74-46b6-9e0f-8e26592f3b39: {n}Upon hearing you, the old man seems to lose all will to resist. A moment ago he was ready to fight, but now he slumps onto the bed listlessly, and the surgical instruments are thrust into his body. Despite the pain, the man no longer screams, but stares at the ceiling with glistening eyes.{/n}
407bb520-ccc2-488c-8641-1f6e92088a82: "With your permission, I will not tell the soldiers that, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Back on Zarkov, we'd have paid the enforcers back in blood for an insult like that. But the rules are different here."
34d7ce7e-1066-4008-a801-662ece6a8c3f: {n}You know of the hive world of Merov, but it is located in the Calixis Sector, which is cut off from the Koronus Expanse by the now impassable Maw.{/n}
20ed2e10-a506-4c73-9e72-449d1f2f7481: "I am willing to show you a certain level of trust if you answer my questions candidly."
a38ad25d-fd78-4cd5-89f5-47aa25dc8142: "Quiet, you lot! No worries, Lord Captain, you'll get it next time."
6300dd52-f28a-4ae6-b5ab-396bd6c64f73: {n}Behind the monstrous augmetics, you suddenly see Seberian for what he is: a tired old man, full of regrets.{/n}
27ec0c0b-e206-41c0-a873-37de6c55b46b: "I suppose I shouldn't be surprised that you know that name. I don't hide it: Amella, Inquisitor Amella, was my patroness. She belonged to the Ordo Xenos and largely shared my views on the technologies of other races. Like me, she believed we should use xenos knowledge for the benefit of Humanity. We formed an excellent partnership, yet our alliance remained secret, largely because of the likes of Diodas."
529d60e4-e192-4a1e-b01a-8628239a3a29: [Order the group to activate the prism]
2ca0443a-9988-44bf-9a5c-a3fe37cd1ba7: "I will defeat you either way, so yield now!"
ebb3ee54-72e4-4c84-9ff6-ee9728ed000d: "Please disconnect from the cogitators and direct your attention to calculating the air attacks. Your tech-trance is hindering your vigilance."
ffb5b14b-49ca-430b-8683-3acb3fa36920: On hit, inflicts burning. Targets hit by this weapon always fail tests to remove burning.
67618663-6601-446b-a97d-b9a6ce6ac87c: "Holy Throne, it's like they're driving red-hot nails into my knee!"
7b2454fe-0674-4089-8c15-9a45f3cf4f08: "Should you break yourself, I will not fix you."
7e4331c0-1e1d-4c7b-936b-ff1b8a4b2390: "Hear me, Guardsmen! Written by the hand of Seberian von Valancius himself: 'Together with my heir they shall venture to the stars, serving as a blade and a shield to my successor!'" {n}The crowd's roar swallows her final words.{/n}
0ee00f08-5650-4428-ba29-ebd9863b35bc: "I was testing the sergeant's loyalty. Do your job, enforcer — I shall observe."
a92cafbe-79a5-4068-94ab-c6849e9ed9db: Whenever the Ministorum Priest uses {g|f:c647c1c4a1a14c9cb31217ee439164ff}War Hymn{/g} or {g|f:85e6ce25a6d64313b9ff39a8013d1b43}Furious Recital{/g}, for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the Priest themselves and their allies in a 5-cell radius deal +{uip|DamageBonus|10a6dc3267d14009a0e302927bb7fcfe}% more weapon damage. This bonus is doubled against daemons, psykers, and xenos.
e6edc6f7-f3b8-43e6-b787-c612e41bd0b6: "Throne of Terra, are these really the sons of Krieg? I last heard of them back when I was an officer, and then they were fighting xenos worlds away from the Koronus Expanse. How did that heinous creature succeed in bringing them to this... museum?"
5836c34c-8da5-4ced-9a8c-6f237ba43184: "Very well. I will discover what has taken place at the station."
92ea8bf7-d146-4784-bfe3-e648eed716ba: [Reflect on the historical significance of the depicted event]
bae0c240-ca7a-471e-a125-0a962c00ffa0: {n}Seberian looks like a statue of himself, head held high, shoulders thrown back, with the folds of his heavy cloak rippling in the wind. He watches his assembled entourage with a resolute gaze, waiting for everyone's attention before he finally speaks. His vox-synth-enhanced voice carries across the square:{/n} "Allies! The servants of the Holy Ordos have ridden roughshod over the covenants of the God-Emperor. Inquisitor af Irramon has threatened the life of the Rogue Trader and the dignity of his loyal servants! For this, the enemy will die by my hand."
e3940ca6-f43f-4237-be8f-e30391166a89: {n}The Inquisitor beckons, and the Sisters of Battle immediately raise their bolters. The ceremonial steel of their sarissas seems to leer at you like the fangs of a ravenous beast. With a glance at Laria, Seberian lunges forward with the same desperation as a voidship hurtling out of warp and into realspace.{/n}
42e04a9a-1684-4949-962c-52dda253452e: {n}They are all fit and strong, which is not surprising. Young and old, male and female, every one of them looks like they stepped straight out of an Astra Militarum propaganda poster.{/n}
c82943fa-c3f5-4ac3-869a-aa1b58c803c2: The triumphal arch at which you made your Magnae Accessio speech should be here. But instead, there is a monument to the House von Valancius.
307e3faa-593f-47da-8c58-980f0d4b7021: "A natural reaction, wholly understandable. Natural, but precipitate. Let me ask you a question: what is Humanity's primary mission? What are we striving for?"
975d2a77-9483-4d0e-88db-bfe6fa3164d9: "Your idea would have merit were there even one working vox-receiver here. Without communications, it will be impossible to aim the ship's guns accurately enough to achieve a result that is in any way satisfactory."
2f87439d-cbbe-4eb3-ab12-c217396873ca: {n}Abelard shakes his head with a look of total astonishment.{/n} "It all looks like a grand hoax, Lord Captain. In the time of your glorious ancestor, Dargonus was besieged by the Saynay pirate clan, and he managed to repel their brazen attacks. I have never come across any mention of a conflict with the Inquisition."
2efe1c55-1399-4370-8178-e1ab9cbe34ef: "A prudent approach. The more bureaucratic procedures that precede an execution, the greater the latitude for manoeuvring afforded to the accused. Such efficiency is impressive."
79c5739e-91b2-4fbc-810b-786a77133330: Camilla reacted suspiciously to the idea of her as governor. Does she covet the position? And by what means might she claim it?
7a7246c8-7689-4a75-b1d2-741f06f113af: {n}Your emotions riot within you, only growing in strength as they fail to find an outlet — in a shout, a movement, even a grimace. All you can hope is that your ability to feel will be exhausted before you lose consciousness from the strain.{/n}
58bd758d-d1b7-455b-b505-91430772e90e: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The High Factotum has taken it upon himself to make the necessary preparations. He will meet you there."
084bc4cd-6342-4419-9640-a4aead3749a7: Find the Triasomata and decide his fate
edd165b2-5654-4196-9203-fc6987e90dd8: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}hate to admit it{/d}, but Lady Juvenna is right, Your Lordship. I respect you and your deeds, but the xenos abomination is slowly driving you mad." {n}Sauerback carefully averts his gaze from his former patron.{/n}
b11f3b55-7bff-497f-b7ee-2b5f5f4993b7: {n}Eogunn tweaks the piston on his beard pensively.{/n} "An unorthodox interpretation of Prefect Sagreras's writings, I dare say, even dangerous. You do like to tread a fine line, Nuncius."
2d5701c2-a4d8-47ef-aa67-f8cc6718f729: "You are going to entrust the fate of the dynasty to a xenos toy? That's a terrible bet, and it reeks of heresy!"
ce2c0298-23fc-4537-9dd8-11befb5adcf4: "Lukha, I understand. Atonement for the one. Go and save some of the others... I'll just... manage... on my own. I don't want... to be... a burden."
02902a43-13d1-45fa-8ccc-334626fa2dbd: The Lord Captain has never had implants as high-grade as the newly acquired ones at {mf|his|her} disposal. To understand the intricacies of their installation, an expert must be consulted.
02c00780-1c46-4199-ac18-aeb32adc0ae3: {n}The xenos nods slowly.{/n} "So satisfying was the vengeance they unleashed upon the other lowly ones after the plunderer's disgraceful flight."
c9672620-f5da-4be6-a369-72b2623ae1cc: {n}The members of the procession bow to you, sending heady fumes of machine unguents wafting in your direction. From above, they resemble a rippling lake of metallic limbs and {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}. At the very tail of the procession, you notice the familiar figures of the medicae officers.{/n}
da47f8f7-9b14-4c6d-a42d-7e0c307446e2:
The wielder and their allies gain +{uip|DoTLevel|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} and always fail {g|Encyclopedia:Test}tests{/g} to remove these effects. While both burning and bleeding, their weapons deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g} equal to {uip|FireDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt and {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} equal to {uip|RendingDamage|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% of damage dealt. Additionally, they gain +{uip|CritChance|8d47cfd429be43e2a4b02a400c3a716a}% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}.
! Can only be used once per combat.
fcfb5d3b-8ee8-421b-9623-7f912402ec9b: "As you instructed, he is being tended to in the Sector Bionica. His cognitive functions have almost entirely failed, and only the Omnissiah's mercy keeps him from losing all mobility. The Triasomata spends his days bowed in prayer — or so we presume, since he has lost all verbal capacity. He appears to be... at peace."
b2a17244-4c25-44a0-b842-aed10dfe536c: "I don't know about you, but seeing those machines turns my stomach. Needles, saws, vials — terrifying. It's like being in an abattoir or a torture chamber. And it probably hurts just as much."
607e93fd-8f05-4451-b202-3d2651b42216: "Janur told me that you possess some sort of defence against the Drover's cry."
f721cda6-e50c-4f13-b2f2-936e46fd8ed3: "The shrine is capable of autonomously healing flesh and blessing it with augmentations under the supervision of a knowledgeable Genetor. Complex procedures can be performed with unimaginable speed and precision, and stimulants administered in the required proportions and combinations. It is a true miracle of the Omnissiah!"
c8237ffa-e043-4284-a2df-8a5caefaa653: [Intervene] "Stop. We admit it. Your supremacy is absolute."
134b7eb6-3602-4216-91f3-aeda60117b03: "One of the Universal Laws states, 'The Knowledge of the ancients stands beyond question.' The sacred mechanisms of this station are based on covenants granted by the Omnissiah to His servants after long and persistent searching." {n}Decabalus gives you a hard, scrutinising look.{/n} "Opposing interpretations of their origins — philosophical contentions — are inevitable, but the increased output of the promethium platforms is an indisputable fact."
c8b35727-caa6-4b10-945e-48f5eb0023ab: "Any thoughts on how we can escape this place?"
1cbcce5e-9530-4c3f-98a9-f1870c8ab47b: {n}The one-armed worker steps forward, pushing the one-eyed man aside.{/n} "One of the lads, a voidsman soldier who got his skull crushed, came back to the lower decks after treatment not long ago. With his new {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceVivisector}metal head{/d}, he's working harder than ever! If they'd let us poor sods put some hardware in, we'd work even better than the healthy ones! We'd toil day and night for the good of the dynasty. The officers say it's not allowed, but you can do anything, even lift this ban! Be merciful, Lord Captain!"
1a4ad1e2-5547-4a95-b957-8753710d8c02: "Hmm... if we had access to an energy concentrator, this gondola could be compelled into motion and reach the upper levels..."
15b89817-89e6-4a5b-9042-bb16f4505d90: Until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, creatures affected by this augment's {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} also trigger this effect once, dealing {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to creatures within a 2-cell radius around themselves. This effect does not trigger again from the new targets.
87d08a30-6bcb-4b42-b8cf-53e67ffecc9f: "What? Wait just a moment, that wasn't part of the agreement!"
e7d10ee5-ed2f-451a-9762-15acc8af97ba: "You lead the Merov regiment, I take it?"
6a3b68d8-7b29-4bd2-a9e1-44595b389a51: "Leave him be, Ferrenz. Let the poor fellow live out his life with his own augmentation. You can still cut it off after he's dead."
6e1479b9-c721-4a76-a9b0-1682d5ee9c7c: {n}His parched vocal cords produce a rattling rasp.{/n} "It is constant suffering, Rogue Trader, you are right. But this is my only chance to survive. Which is better: an end to suffering, or suffering without end? In this dilemma, I chose the latter. The moment the Haemonculus loses scientific interest in me, he will destroy the failed test subject. But while I am still alive... I can learn. Even in my current state."
dc3e74c7-84e1-426b-9b9e-1f57f6e265a9:
At the start of the growth's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, it either grows and matures, gaining an extra stack of this effect, or spawns a carnivorous swarm.
When the growth gains 3 stacks of this effect, the next turn, it bursts into 3 carnivorous swarms.
47e3eccd-0ee7-41ee-b370-b2d58999523e: "{name} to servants of the Golden Throne! I have something to report as well."
0a2abf7a-d1ac-416b-85b7-980ef3682630: "That part of space can only be accessed through a special dimensional gateway. I do not know its exact coordinates or how to activate it — I assume that only the highest ranks of the Inquisition can answer this question."
a8de503b-1d8b-4eba-9fb5-3552a3769d5d: "Escort my ancestor to the Sector Bionica."
84f4118a-1edf-430f-89d6-6e29cf4d8fa6: "Nuncius says that he will leave a channel for enquiries about his biography and personal qualities open for you, Rogue Trader."
bc008052-8af3-4fe7-9d3a-299954a7a66c: {n}Eogunn pensively tightens a bolt on his beard and nods.{/n} "Amazing sincerity, Nuncius. It is gratifying to see that you have not lost your sense of tact over the years."
6a7855c4-1bd5-43aa-996d-59dd854b7f23: {n}Argenta shakes her head in disapproval.{/n} "Memory is the force that drives Humanity and inspires us to deeds worthy of our ancestors. Details are eroded by time, leaving only the essences crystallised within relics and images. We should preserve only that which fortifies us upon His path. The rest must be consigned to oblivion. Unfortunately... this portion of your legacy belongs to the latter."
527f1645-e368-4ffb-8165-b44ed81b4f92: "The screaming is wearing on me. Get rid of the troublemaker and have his implant cut out and brought to my throne. The finest things on this vessel are mine alone."
0e6b4ff9-5cab-4dbb-ac7b-6cb31deb58d3: "Tell me everything you know about the reinforcements."
765caf6a-064d-48f9-953a-28207d12903a: {n}The woman grimly adds as she casts a glance at Eogunn,{/n} "And our work is perfectly lawful, though we are not popular among your fellows."
ab00cd85-6b2c-4889-9418-b3688a203dff: "The enemy's base is at the xenoruins where most holy Seberian von Valancius disappeared, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
30fecfd5-f107-41bf-a4b1-1469a1c85180: Centuries ago, Seberian von Valancius journeyed into the ruins hidden within the world's root system. It is possible that his body still lies there, awaiting repose within a dynastic cenotaph. As soon as the Lord Captain returns to the flagship, {mf|he|she} should scan the presumed site of Seberian's demise using augurs.
