57f794c6-d020-4352-be72-5085b19d124a: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski led his regiment well into old age. After suffering a crippling battlefield injury and resigning from his high-ranking post, Batoshski met his death on Zarkov as a drill sergeant and the sire of a long line of soldiers.
8577837d-7a5b-40ba-9423-ab04194214bb: "And what is there for us here? To chew on vine leaves and shake with fear? I would rather die for the glory of the God-Emperor among the stars!"
ffe1dbab-dad3-4dd7-b641-5ef1b57fa047: "I assess this route out of this situation as {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}the most rational{/d}." {n}Exalt-117's ocular lenses remain fixed, and his augmented face expresses nothing.{/n} "Subject Juvenna von Valancius has been assigned the highest status."
6d7c3ba1-eda1-48c1-8c87-953a0cf9d41d: "There is nothing to fear here, Jae! Suffering is the lot of all who wish to preserve the purity of their souls in His gaze."
19a0d414-e7ce-4282-a3f5-cf29bf6c09b1: "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski snaps his head toward her, and for a moment you imagine you hear the gnashing of fangs, as if a wild beast disciplines a member of its pack. The woman snaps to attention and salutes.{/n}
3350cad1-1c79-41b7-9f2e-701356098d72: {n}Seberian pinches the bridge of his nose and closes his organic eye. You suddenly see the exhausted man underneath all the augmetics.{/n} "Fine. Let these fools pass. Laria, dearest, find these idlers something useful to do. And make sure they do not repeat their stunt from earlier, or I won't be answerable for my actions."
012d9f5a-f954-4b88-bd03-a6cf47305113: {n}The Manipulus exuberantly throws up his many limbs, nearly rolling himself into the water.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I find humour built on a loose translation of Lingua-Technis dispiriting! With the deepest respect, I urge you to be more mindful of my colleague's words!"
7427ac66-7842-4aae-9821-fb09dce8b98e: "And the medicae officers are inspired. Here it is, the God-Emperor's favour! Look, they've given me a better arm than my old one."
7fb98574-7e0b-4f23-ab17-6f3c6cecaf24: At the start of Eogunn's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, this creature restores {uip|HealAmount|1ca137865f7f4d668e2e409bab8ece43} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}.
fdb25dd4-249b-4652-acae-f60de7c12d32: {n}On the operating tables, several bodies are laid out, their mutilations exposed to the chill air. Their chest and abdominal cavities yawn wide, excavated of their augmented organs, which now nestle in flasks, still connected to the bodies by tubes and cables. Judging by the rhythmic contractions, the organs are still functioning. Eogunn hovers beside the tables, assiduously taking measurements and jabbing {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} into the extracted organs or inside the bodies. Nuncius keeps stoic vigil nearby, an impassive observer of this grotesque spectacle.{/n}
47f49e8c-7a03-48f6-b9b0-1733210c16d3: Dargonus is besieged by the forces of the Inquisition. Seberian von Valancius, a man who should have been dead for centuries, was executed mere moments ago. The truth of what is happening must be discovered.
77060b1c-ecfc-4110-af4a-5ef58b4c0c71: "My dearest colleague would never disclose private information about me. Moreover, I have no secrets from you except those pertaining to the mysteries of the Machine Cult."
63a95a18-4fae-4d38-922f-78980fa509cc: The black, sinister ruins of the alien civilisation have lost every trace of life. Now emptiness and the all-destroying passage of time reign supreme.
b884edd2-0e2e-4936-8026-100cd4c804fa: "Glory to the God-Emperor and the Omnissiah, in unity on Terra and Mars."
9a211636-88e7-4a4c-bfac-9e5d5edb3452: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the esteemed {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz requests a vox-audience. It concerns Manipulus Februs and the experiments he is conducting in the Sector Bionica."
57e5cd10-20db-4d5f-a144-025c64ee3e31: "Notably, the semantic capacity of the third category encompasses an extremely wide range of... entities." {n}The Manipulus gives a barely noticeable smile.{/n} "The foresight of the Cognisance Fleet is truly remarkable."
48d9d1aa-fc1e-49b1-9ee5-87817f322a9b: {n}The metal monster makes a sound that is surprisingly similar to a weary sigh.{/n} "Disappointing."
c5478a60-6fd8-449b-9b8d-75d6b1cd8e60: "I feel like I'm falling to pieces, but my head feels like it's about to bubble over, if that's what you mean. Oh. I shouldn't have said that bit about falling apart, right?"
451f2682-33a7-41f0-a6bc-cd26ad6ab1ff: "And how do we save the throne?"
584136af-0b7f-4203-8f9a-7d7ff1bdd7ef: "No von Valancius will be yours — not me, or my ancestor!"
3eccafb2-1afa-4f6e-8831-987cb518dade: "The siege of a Rogue Trader's palace would be a notable event. Why have I heard nothing of it?"
22a1415c-4441-43b5-b142-42ff32d72a8d: "I've been informed that our allies have managed to break through to the palace. But where are they?" {n}The noble looks toward the gates, then at you, and the organic part of his face betrays his slight disappointment.{/n} "Don't tell me... You are all that's left?"
15178560-bc1a-4d7c-9e6a-ce2ef0acbe9f: "If you will permit me to take my leave, Your Lordship."
81f6db43-70e7-4ecd-b98b-53738a26361e: "Who could make for a better colonel-governor than the captain-quartermaster?"
98401184-c7ad-4ea0-8cca-43da7e26cba6: {n}Janur presses a portable vox to his mangled ear, his expression darkening.{/n} "Damn it... They've launched a fresh attack on all fronts. I have to get back to the other level of the roots. I'll hold back as many as I can."
84373a84-b971-48fc-b5d5-d48d9bc99fa1: {n}A figure in grand attire stares down at you from the portrait with an air of regal superiority. The insignia embellishing his lavish cloak leaves no room for doubt — this is a {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} of bygone days. His right hand rests on the hilt of an exquisite blade, and his roguish half-smile radiates majestic condescension.{/n}
9eb3433c-d3cf-47ce-8a02-ba1d0a7764d3: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a theory has emerged about what caused this. The dynasty's agents have investigated and discovered a strange signal that we cannot decipher or locate. However, it seems to affect the nervous system of these 'Drovers' in some way, driving them into a rage. Alas, that is all we know for now."
face6060-60fe-48fb-9efd-0399a61663f1: {n}The Tech-Priest looks stunned.{/n} "Do you think I would dare walk about with an anathema, a profane parody of the human mind, the greatest heresy against the Omnissiah? What an absurd idea!"
8ba7ef1a-cbe5-499a-9244-70d20f97d600: You ordered the Merovians to appoint the governor of Zarkov themselves.
ae7aed38-123b-429e-b6d9-421f8bbbcdd5: If at the end of the creature's turn there are no adjacent enemies, there is a high chance it will attack an adjacent ally instead.
2fc33aba-bc3d-4832-9d6d-60ccd8eca5c4: {n}Vedka freezes in a reverent bow, forming the Aquila over her chest. Her soldiers, however, keep their eyes fixed upon your ancestor, their lasguns set to combat readiness.{/n}
b95c9afd-77bf-4263-8378-9c5284a68f3b: {n}A gloating smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "It galls him beyond measure."
973a4aa5-f4b9-408c-9c8a-d6033df314f7: {n}A stately man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours surveys you haughtily. His bright blue eye, the only organic part of him, stands out prominently on his heavily augmented face.{/n}
2a899c07-9c21-4cce-95ac-65058ff9e212: "Soldiers, I'm powering up the tower! Atonement for the one!"
df294552-402f-4785-b5cf-f2bf35bfdcbf: "Make haste, human. The Primarch's blood in my veins calls out for vengeance."
96d9776a-9543-4f47-91fb-616f4bbb13de: {n}The Triasomata stops — the poor man's shoulders slowly slump and the convulsions steadily subside. His lucidity does not last long. The amalgam's eyes soon go blank and his mouth stretches into a blissful smile. Rocking peacefully and drooling, he murmurs broken snippets from his former life and prayers to the Emperor.{/n}
2800fe89-6df5-47d3-8756-4ad7e3db1268: "Exact numbers are undetermined — unknown. Head of the compromised cell: Senior Adept Alva-9 — she commands the Skitarii. The group's combat strength includes Ruststalkers and several mutinous {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}Enginseers{/g}." {n}Some of the workers behind Decabalus flinch and glance around nervously when they hear his response.{/n}
e1e14ee3-b28b-45e0-9b2b-93a8b0a5cf76: {n}A stream of hissing crackles out of the vox-caster. From time to time, an exhausted male voice breaks through the interference, reciting a series of codes.{/n}
499598c2-9617-4df6-af35-c024146bd420: [Smile] "I have heard much about you. Eogunn is forever talking about you."
9f3fadda-4a67-4bc3-aef7-14386d968b11: {n}The officer takes a breath.{/n} "As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}At the officer's signal, the other wardens take a deferential step back, clearing your path to the door.{/n}
09f1ad95-2a70-4808-a57d-27c962fbd777: The Triasomata lies prostrate, immersed in prayer. With a hollow look in his eyes, he babbles something incoherent, saliva dripping onto the deck.
8a77d9ea-b98d-42a6-9ef3-74ce2e0cda62: "I will carry out your orders immediately... However, I would refrain from broadcasting this to the lower decks — the denizens there are likely to be the target of raids and searches as it is."
9d6ed74d-32aa-4958-bbaf-7fff8ed1a8b7: For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in a target cell.
5f4062d9-2fbe-4cc0-a22d-a5ca02e574e1: Architectonics of the Flesh, Annotated by Genetor Extremis E.F.
aa8947b8-d88f-4692-9bc0-f5f99a191b61: Over the centuries that followed, this powerful archeotech artillery was replaced by small-calibre turrets and ornaments.
de1f6715-bcb3-4869-8998-c0b4cb21d038: "Nuncius is correct, esteemed colleague: Comprehension is the Key to all things. The Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all. Even xenotechnology can yield secrets that will benefit the Imperium. I believe this sacred logic was the basis of the Rogue Trader's decision, and it is not for us to question it."
036dd7ed-53a5-462d-b8be-7403454ffe7c: The knife is driven to the hilt into the unfortunate man's throat. Tears of relief seep from his pus-filled eyes.
7fadcba9-2b81-49a0-8b9c-717a7ef978ed: The flawless balance of this musculoskeletal augment makes it not just expensive, but truly rare.
bc2f0967-9a1f-40a6-942b-0f2d76e6140c: "To what do I owe your attention?" {n}The velvet tone with which Juvenna greets you is impeccably courteous, but cold. Everything about her — her figure, her bearing, even the expression in her bright blue eyes — radiates polite aloofness.{/n}
b1772dd2-4730-4232-8509-cabc2b1c2b01: "For a long time, my heir, the world has belonged to those for whom I have nothing but contempt: embezzlers, paper-pushers, bombastic windbags." {n}Seberian looks past you with tired eyes. Wrinkles cross the scrap of skin pulled over his skull implant.{/n} "You seem quite at home among that lot. You are where you belong. But I am not. I can never be like you and accept rule by bureaucrats."
b2367e09-ff49-4cca-a669-8cdaf9900e77: As long as the Chronomancer is alive, all Flayed Ones are under the effect of {g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}Chrono Punishment{/g}.
dd403ced-1ddc-454a-ab84-6143a867e2db: [Offer a glass to the servo-skull] "Nuncius, drink your fill!"
02d4d305-5cb9-47ca-a3ca-28b51f091c48: "Lady Juvenna has an urgent commission. I'm here to relieve you."
7772c2de-7c94-4c50-9840-6ab81ea398e1: This ancient stasis container is emblazoned with the coat of arms of the von Valancius dynasty. On the surface, you can see the genetic lock — an open-mouthed skull with a small glinting needle in place of a tongue.
cf9c0f06-1a71-46d4-9b21-58cd2f5a234f: "Thank you, thank you! Jovakha... he's like a father to a lot of us, you know? We owe him. And you..." {n}The young sergeant falls into reflection.{/n}
73ca86a7-bae1-449e-8ea6-fde0020b7256: {n}The Manipulus mirrors your actions, draining his goblet.{/n} "I am registering increased catalytic processes in my liver and an acute reaction in my peripheral vasculature. Inhibition processes in my nervous system are suppressed." {n}The Tech-Priest raises an eyebrow in confusion.{/n} "Could this be some sort of premedication for enhanced nutrient absorption?" {n}He shifts his gaze to the servo-skull hovering nearby.{/n} "I don't see what's got you so amused, Nuncius."
97cd7e46-b2d4-48fd-b2ad-2687ebfd8179: "And so, the experiment is complete, and I deem the outcome wholly satisfactory." {n}Eogunn folds his arms over his sizeable stomach, giving you a polite bow.{/n} "Thank you for your so timely arrival, Rogue Trader. You have given me food for thought that will occupy my unquiet mind for a long time to come, and will surely grant me many revelations in the future. Now I must return to the laboratory and discuss the results in detail with Nuncius."
9fc7cc5f-d399-49bf-8f8c-789f933baedf: "Ferrenz and his assistants restored my functionality. I can continue serving in the Sector Bionica in line with my previous capacity." {n}The Vivisector's face remains impassive.{/n}
73f2466c-7320-4ba7-a555-df920cdccaae: "Aren't you being a tad hasty in trusting a stranger?"
b9ef29f4-1bf5-457d-9545-1f53ec46f1ec: "But that was all before I became a Rogue Trader..."
febf8477-df62-46a7-8000-61783411fcd3: "How did one of the Astartes come to be here?"
9ab7601b-8f5d-49c6-af9d-df97e5fd2dae: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:2f8ab5264abc41c98af270f348ec06ba}Mad Calibration: Immaterium Shield{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or has been {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.
39c4f7e8-eb78-45bd-b12b-1e8b3da65fc0: "If this Museion is finished, why do you need Seberian?"
d251d791-f2dc-48ae-b15b-cd21191eed61: {n}You only notice Izdrig's hand was on his knife hilt when he pulls it away. After studying your face, he shakes his head.{/n} "Unlikely. {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}Commissars{/d} don't do anything themselves, they just use their words to goad decent soldiers into every kind of foulness."
b4019aa9-ef11-45d2-afb0-d5361be66e48: {n}Nuncius sits docilely in your hands. His eye is producing a constant flicker, while a grunting sound crackles from the vox.{/n}
1010580a-367a-4f6b-b18e-415cf376d101: {n}The chronometer stops just at the moment when the bombardment of the command headquarters ought to begin. You hear the usual sounds of battle, as well as sentries idly bickering about something or other... but the brass amplifiers of the public address system are silent. It seems there will be no air strike this time around.{/n}
23ae686f-83c6-4e7c-9d2e-fd7f72dcd645: "I am intrigued. I shall proceed to you directly, Genetor."
5ab72449-f72f-4ce6-a65c-bbac768d9a77: "It will cost a great deal... but the cleared territory will be useful in the future. An excellent decision, Lord Captain!"
88edbc47-8eb9-4cf7-b24d-a7cb362c3e61: Check out Owlcats' upcoming game set in the Warhammer 40,000 universe!
5cecd002-25e6-443e-bedf-a83c11cd568c: The shuttles landed on a tiny patch of clear ground that had miraculously escaped the shelling. Around them towered the colossal ruins of xenos structures pulverised by the flagship's relentless orbital cannons. Concealed somewhere beneath a thick layer of molten metal was Trazyn's only abode in the Koronus Expanse — his Museion.
fcfe8dc1-ce67-4ff9-a3fc-8710a1e58692: After several years of service, Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski died at the hands of one of his finest officers, a devout believer who suspected Izdrig of scepticism about sacred Imperial doctrine.
6ace0971-2749-4b7c-9d9b-4b42710178a4: "Nonsense. I would remember if I—" {n}Seberian stops suddenly. He peers intently at you before he speaks again. Confusion rings in his vox-distorted voice:{/n} "Wait a moment. Perhaps... perhaps I have seen you before. Or heard of you."
79a72a18-68dc-4275-ad27-b4cfa2ef00cc: "Ah, shereen! Countless volunteers eager to work with Kais are already lining up outside Tsar-Cage. The Merovians can continue to settle into their new life, and the ashmags can risk their skins all they want."
0fbca00e-2fbe-4c84-aade-4fccff5d29f0: "Traverse what? We were born here. As for the details, you'd best take that up with the captain or the colonel."
96be94e6-bc45-421d-9014-4c285d6ced27: "We just relieved Sauerback and his enforcers. He's a decent commander: keeps everyone in line, but doesn't go looking for things to gripe about. He tries to make himself out to be highborn, though, and my lot can't stomach that. That's why we don't get along better."
3a413e52-85e0-49d3-8ae0-db364bf504bc:
Before taking an action in combat, you can evaluate its effectiveness with a hologram.
Click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on the battlefield to place a hologram in that location. Select actions and {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} to see their expected outcomes. The action will be displayed as if used from the hologram's location to let you assess whether you have picked an effective position for the action you are planning to take.
Click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} again to confirm your choice. Click {mouse_icon|RightMouse} or press the [ESC] key to cancel it.
db146e0d-282b-4c37-afcc-98b3547faa88: "Captain Zorael of the {g|Encyclopedia:DeathWatchGlossary}Deathwatch{/g}." {n}The Astartes looks at you with a heavy, bitter gaze, uttering each word with miserly reluctance.{/n}
2056c834-9ab0-4601-bf06-04256b3f598e: "Did you think I wouldn't find a way to get rid of you, after all the trouble you've caused me?"
0dbc7acf-9933-48d2-b986-c151756d52a9: {n}Idira wraps her arms around herself and begins to rock back and forth. Her lips are ringed with frost.{/n} "Beginning without end, end without beginning, connected, entangled, one after another. And on and on for eternity after eternity after eternity after eternity..."
098657f8-314a-484b-a9ae-9a433279a295: "Would you care to explain why the palace is surrounded by soldiers?"
30127621-ac5d-45f9-a53b-81a797251984: "Some of my retinue accused me of heresy and left. Why have you remained?"
cdeb4b28-3507-40c6-b029-7e71de68a1fc: "Your reasoning is sound. My work is important enough to Humanity to warrant the sacrifice of my dignity. May the Omnissiah grant absolution for my weakness before the foe."
4ca6fb44-9e74-46cb-b8cd-93d62006646a: "Then I will get to work preparing the briefing, Rogue Trader."
a038d02b-03f7-4bfe-9ec7-ef6bfded88ee:
Eogunn gains bonuses when he stands in a straight or diagonal line to this creature.
This effect works even if this creature is {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}unconscious{/g}.
1deb89a1-e026-4d61-a678-becaf0f3d67c: "I dare not defy your wishes. What was it you wanted to talk about?"
89826ef5-d69a-41ed-ab00-915a0120e7dd: {n}Janur's burn-scarred face beams with a smile, though his armour is now riddled with a few more holes.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the attack has been repelled."
7b9eeaea-ab2a-4973-8c78-ff3d891fdb15: "When the coincidences become too great, that means it is already a pattern." {n}Laria is silent for a time, weighing the evidence in her mind once more.{/n} "So, the scion of the Gapraks was slain like a common servant. And it happened in the shadow of the von Valancius palace. We need the name of the murderer. Find the culprit, and I will call you our ally."
1b9c572d-38cc-4791-bfe0-fb27a9e5e137: The Tech-Priests reacted with the same cohesion. Like cogs in a single machine, they closed their ranks, forming an impenetrable barrier with their own augmented bodies. Heavy plasma weapons were raised and a volley hit the Necrons, incinerating them and throwing them back.
5493ca76-4860-4bf9-b820-56da29cb670c: {n}Pasqal straightens up more than usual, as if trying to match the height of his hovering opponent.{/n} "Lord Captain, as an ordained Magos, I bear witness against Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs. He conducts research that negatively impacts the productivity of the holy rites of {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} maintenance and distorts the visage of the Machine God's creations. Such blasphemy tramples the tenets of faith and may lead to critically unpredictable consequences."
07c7ca19-1721-4467-b316-ce3f962e7685: The multilayered cascade of cogitator cores reveals the inordinate power of this augmentation.
88433d17-007d-4a51-a9c1-62b02a085ce5: "Eogunn, care to treat the commoners to a lecture on the importance of upholding the tenets of the Omnissiah?"
99e24854-f2c8-4305-b15f-295c420c3971: "Most holy Seberian von Valancius! Truly, the embodiment of hope and the God-Emperor's will for the entire 32nd Regiment. I... I never dared dream I'd see you in the flesh." {n}Vedka's voice trembles with emotion, yet her remaining eye intently studies every detail of your ancestor's face.{/n}
761c19c8-22b1-459e-a765-811cdc0d4ed5: {n}When you strike, Batoshski's reflexes do not fail him. Steel clashes against steel, throwing off sparks. Several slashing blows strike the colonel's body, but he pays them no heed.{/n}
c0fe09e5-b8eb-4087-92cc-075b51f06d00: "We are almost finished, Lord Captain. I apologise for the inappropriate request, but we just need one more minute."
bb65fcdc-25c8-4fce-9fa6-200a11dab8c6: {n}Idira lets out a choked gasp, then turns, fixing you with an unfocused stare. The voice that speaks is not her own. It is too soft, too high, too sorrowful.{/n} "The grief of a beast whose cub has become a plaything in human hands is not easily softened, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g}. Do you possess enough compassion within you to soothe her sorrows?" {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psyker{/g} falls silent, then is seized by a fit of dry coughing.{/n}
f5459000-dc8c-4518-916b-72191c8dec48: "No, you do not understand. I am your descendant."
4f56b7c9-ac2f-44c2-b5f1-3265b94a9931: "All true, however, I still cannot find an answer to the question of why the Deathwatch are even present in the Koronus Expanse. I'm not sure I will ever receive an answer to that question."
2d980be9-0322-43a4-883d-a96f74a544d5: Try to find the entrance to the Museion
b0f99334-75e5-4ee0-854f-7d85480446dd: {n}Seberian's grim gaze lingers on you.{/n} "Are you the servant who made it through the enemy's outpost? Your information may be useful at the war council. I give you leave to remain."
7bf75b2d-53f1-4dc4-8dea-3a0c9206329d: "A paradox. The auspex scans show nothing. The organic diagnostors are silent. Nuncius! What we have here is an unfathomable site! Make a note of the need to return here... at a later time."
cefc497b-80a2-4c29-aded-8c65d513ebc0: "Descendants of deserters who slew their own commander. That is an exhaustive description of this scum."
0b7afc79-f5bb-40fa-9508-be7a128db7eb: Order the squad to explore the ship.
3bfc23e3-fa2f-4eae-8ed4-b3259c89fc97: "I will commence the reorganisation of our defences immediately, following the sacred tenets of the Tactica Imperialis."
7b82de23-726f-4be8-bec7-48538df62885: {n}Seberian masters his shock and inclines his mutilated head slightly.{/n} "I see that our encounter with the accursed Trazyn has left its mark upon us both, {name}. The hour will come when he repays in full all that he owes the dynasty. Until then, accept my gratitude. There is no doubt that you are a von Valancius, for even amidst the xenos's lying illusions, you made the right choice in supporting Seneschal Voigtvir."
4665b664-9372-4cc4-9e14-c4202ea84264: Whenever an enemy attacks an ally affected by {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g}, that enemy suffers {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} shock damage.
98a386f8-f9d2-4758-853b-60b6dbcb4909: "How many times a day does Eogunn say 'this is an incontrovertible fact'?"
7f292dff-f1e9-493d-8163-127efdd88999: To initiate travel, click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on a system and press the warp travel button.
843da88f-7cb7-4d2e-924a-9389ae583b39: "Have you noticed that there is something strange going on?"
6551c47d-8681-44d1-87cc-343cde8fa119: Eogunn selects the main target and 2 cells within a 4-cell radius around it. All creatures in those cells and in the cells between them and the main target become additional targets. Eogunn unleashes an energy bolt, dealing {uip|DamageAmount|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} shock damage with {uip|ArmorPen|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1}% armour penetration to the main target. Then, lightning bolts from the main target deal the same amount of damage to the additional targets. The main target suffers +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} more damage. Additional targets suffer half of this amount. Damage dealt to the same creature is reduced by −50%. All {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks are removed from Eogunn.
92127568-f9f2-487d-bc7d-c472ba1e6a5b: "My unit arrived on Tirkuaz-4 one planetary cycle ago. During our time here, I, as the commander of the Skitarii, performed a covert-protocols inspection of the station's sacred mechanisms. I detected..." {n}The Tech-Priest's voice shifts to a shrill howl.{/n} "Violations of the Universal Laws to the fifth degree! Artisan Decabalus-4-16 has desecrated the sacred mechanism of the central drill complex of Tirkuaz-4 with a xenogenic heresy identified as the 'anchor-core.' Protocols stipulate the immediate destruction of the mechanisms that have come into contact with this xenotech!"
b203e14e-80ae-45c0-b71b-3b3d33f999a8: "Just as a bandage binds a wound and a patch secures damaged steel, so can words heal a fractured mind. He is bewildered and frightened. He does not understand the gift that has been given to him — talk to him."
813c0de6-af27-4b01-a5e4-76122f0eb3a1: "I am surprised that you would venture to speak with me again." {n}Seberian gives you the subtlest of nods, maintaining a cold demeanour.{/n} "If you have come to continue our recent conversation, {name}, then I must disappoint you: it is not yet time. We should not waste precious minutes on fruitless arguing. However, if you would like to discuss something else, I am listening."
f59293ed-7fcf-4132-8b8b-9d5ed820155b: "Remove the augment. A sacred machine should be put to good use, not employed as a crutch."
415fbad6-493a-4e87-9088-8460e043fab5: When dealt more than {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} damage in one {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, the mace burrows underground. At the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, it emerges in another area. This ability is not triggered if the mace is {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} or if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g}.
d12d0f94-a488-4422-aa61-29bedc630ebd: "What?" {n}Tervantias's mask of civility shatters. Livid, he looms over Eogunn, his many limbs splayed wide and hisses,{/n} "The next experiment will be your very last, mon-keigh."
17849bcb-c7a5-4a2e-86ed-2a55b7540dba: "Request: cease the attempted sabotage of the operation! Protocol stipulates that augments must be removed from ineffective life forms!" {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} tries to reach the patient, but the old man evades his grasp with unexpected spryness.{/n}
9c2db094-8c54-44b8-9dab-506b5f21ada0: {n}Jae chews her lip thoughtfully for a few seconds.{/n} "Whatever that thing is, shereen, I know people who would pay obscene amounts of coin for a trinket like that."
e5f81208-e527-49e1-9e7b-04498121b470: This creature's attacks always ignore blocks from shields.
feb7cb4b-dedd-4cdb-80ed-1bf3270de36f: Juvenna must be persuaded to trust the Rogue Trader.
223ce2c1-4447-42dc-bb21-74530114d78c: Removes {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} and restores 50% of the {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} to the target.
e5bf1c2e-5e06-44e6-b90d-428c1687f3c0:
At the start of the creature's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, it regains +10% of its {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}.
This ability is not triggered if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}.
c94f8a91-38e4-4112-84ee-1eacbdb9d02c: "My gut tells me that all these theories are just Commissar words. This is something else. Something to do with your arrival on Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
10157746-1069-4648-8be7-3cee3cbb6b96: {n}The woman who has lost her child sits on the deck with her head hanging limply. She does not tremble or spit curses. She stares blankly at the floor — into the abyss that only she knows.{/n}
75e815bf-9718-467d-a004-ec141cdb6125: "I will let you go, human. You have... potential. You may yet leave your mark."
dc5ce3e9-66ef-4bf0-a959-6f4aed9a5603: The logbook is a complete mystery: routes have been deleted, encrypted, or else they lead to uninhabited systems; the cargo has been classified; and crew names have been replaced with nicknames. Whoever owns the ship has done their best to cover their tracks.
95d4b6bf-41c2-49d2-9fa9-d04dffff5ffe: Tilt the scales in Laria's favour
5c09030b-5f3f-41de-a24d-c2be9d14d832: "Were you aware that signs of xenotech had been discovered on the platform?"
55f4aa22-c1ac-4e21-85fe-68fdffcb2067: "You attribute excessive sentimentality to Nuncius." {n}Eogunn relents slightly.{/n} "However, loss is an unchangeable part of the human experience. Nuncius and I are no strangers to it."
2312e96b-130d-4361-b2df-879f31d81a30: {n}After half a minute of heated logical clashes, you win — every move of Exalt-117 plays in your head like a pict-recording. The Magos's stunned gasp as he is defeated at his own game hangs in the air like a question.{/n}
0b1fa3b6-d5fb-4602-bc60-6cbe36acfa3e: "By order of Artisan Decabalus 4-16, removal, relocation, or other manipulation of the anchor-core is prohibited. Prohibition level: highest. Access for layperson {name} von Valancius: restricted. Lord Captain, you are advised to leave the station."
91aebc04-7937-4434-a7bb-0b6c98838a2e: "There's nothing wrong with your eye. Just stop sticking your fingers in it."
2de6c72f-a78d-4064-b34b-9edccc8d0cd3: "We are the only ones who have maintained righteousness on this lump of xenofilth!" {n}Glaring with her mechanical eyes, Alva-9 turns her head toward the Ruststalkers, which are stirring with predatory excitement, and thunders:{/n} "Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting! The lies of the traitor Decabalus are at work here. He told you we planned to sink the platform, correct? But did he tell you why?"
7ba1fb2b-6550-4a9c-92b5-48007eb0d225: Jarub is spoken of as a man possessing the requisite talents. The details must be discussed with him.
01c0ab16-7322-453c-8846-02e5f8659884: {n}Your less than pious retinue has no desire to ruin a relic that is valuable to you, but cannot help but view this escapade as a fine story to tell later. Few can tell such a tale and not be proven a liar.{/n}
5d4b3516-fe53-4e12-a7a4-65c6bd777bce: {n}Seberian has excellent reflexes, despite his apparent bulk. In the blink of an eye, his sword rushes to meet your strike, whistling through the air.{/n}
1de0f8fa-169a-461b-a643-9125ea9603b2: You need to obtain the access codes to the palace gates and give them to Juvenna.
8d0c233a-2ac3-4405-9f60-076fabb32050: "You are correct — your assessment is valid, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The time limit on our interaction is not infinite."
4db220af-8df4-4705-a994-f0422ed0c414: Whenever Eogunn deals shock or {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g}, he also deals {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.
1cbecb1f-5758-4504-a5e9-990c1d9b58e3: {n}Almost silently, the Guardsmen disappear into the foliage, taking up attack positions. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}
1bb6b138-c6a1-46ec-8b36-c980ecbffbc2: {n}A few seconds later, the criminal is disarmed and on his knees, pinned down by the guards. Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to his punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself!"
01076fb4-9d29-4a56-a673-0bded0b6f2ae: {n}The settlements' fortifications were designed for flora and fauna, and although the Merovians had learned their lesson after the iron xenos' first attack, there was no time to completely rebuild Zarkov's defences. Nevertheless, the enemy was driven back, despite the fact that the Cage and the other human settlements now resembled a slaughterhouse.{/n}
25630dcc-1ce0-40cc-b544-f57a5f3d4819: "Colonel, I heard a song as I approached the camp. What was it?"
02a9cd30-339d-4b2b-9483-8252a86de3ec: "Maybe the captain-quartermaster was right — we should find new ways to serve the God-Emperor, instead of just clinging to the old ones..."
eec30a83-9315-40b7-b5ef-102f9260d87c: The dried skin stretched taut across the cheekbones amplifies the grotesque look of terror frozen on the corpse's face. A perfectly round hole gapes in its chest. No weapon you know of leaves wounds like this.
ca16ba83-3286-4bb6-8a04-4e46cdd34278: {n}The servitor's creaking voice almost overlaps with the xenos's vibrating words.{/n} "The name... has... faded... in time... lowly one. I was once one... who conquered... the firmament... I was called... Geomancer."
78c99da1-c6a7-4b0e-89ee-6e04a8eb0d1b: Characters with melee weapons can make an {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunity}attack of opportunity{/g} if an opponent in an adjacent cell initiates movement. It can also be triggered by some {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}. All characters with melee weapons, including members of your party, can make attacks of opportunity. The chance to hit and deal {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} is calculated just like a normal attack.
a1b61361-7a2d-48b8-bb88-c0f7300cc3be: {n}With a nauseating smirk, Tervantias looks on as blood spurts from Eogunn's mouth, leaving him nearly drowning in it.{/n} "Good specimen, you know how to please, unlike this wretch. It no longer amuses me; consider it your reward."
b5d9e5e0-e5a6-48ee-b31c-6c09adbb27dc: "You are contemplating the approaching end of your time, are you not? And yet your words are filled with serenity... Remarkable."
79ace43a-1614-41a1-9d4d-4a8299deea62: {n}Seberian nods wearily, and you hear the dull clack of his augmented vertebrae beneath his heavy coat.{/n}
22d880e4-de64-43fa-97af-37b329a83595: The carnivorous swarm is immune to single attacks made with common ranged and {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons. Only {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area attacks{/g}: flamethrower attacks, plasma attacks, explosive attacks, etc. are effective against this enemy.
5f950e6a-14bd-48a9-b341-6007d71e2c78: Governor Janur Batoshski ruled Zarkov for a very short time. Practical but completely lacking vision, he met a predictable end, falling victim to other people's ambitions and intrigues.
006f1565-3d9f-4598-a69a-c47bcac037a2:
Pasqal cannot suffer from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}.
While Pasqal is not on the highlighted cells, he is affected by the {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}severed interface{/g} instead.
820e398c-275a-45a9-920e-02f676869d28: "Vigdis, direct the augurs to the region where the signals were detected."
0bc0fba5-fe8f-4c36-8c05-718608ebd93f: "You are both courageous and irreplaceable. Stand together, shoulder to shoulder, and once again prove yourselves worthy of atonement."
8a1edc95-874f-453f-87b5-bc6b973297c0: The 32nd Merov Regiment became the backbone of the von Valancius dynasty's armed forces for many years. Enlisting in the regiment was open to anyone, but the trial of living and training on Zarkov weeded out many hopefuls.
54eea6b6-9099-4a0a-a938-704fd76f1b6f: "Ah, I see we have found a lacuna in your knowledge of scientific syntax. An organism is—"
34c2ede8-c613-4798-9981-08dec4da8ea1: "The picture is clear. Now the cause of these events must be uncovered."
5c7f7a77-c440-4727-a0ce-afa7c24b15e4: "That's why he said he needed volunteers to support Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, here we stand."
288acb11-65a9-4696-8314-1c18f2634423: "So the modifications to the machines here, that is your doing?"
171f40f2-68a5-49b5-acd7-d2746d9b2d81: "The destruction of heretics is the responsibility of every subject of the Imperium. I was pleased to fulfil my duty."
b41d99b4-b7c4-4369-9384-bc4f9cd2f5a3: "Scanning... Response affirmative. The Vivisector life form regrettably ignores the sacred requirements of efficiency in the service of the Omnissiah, attributing it to rudimentary experiences."
7c8840c0-d1aa-4657-8e7f-38b916d94718: The never-ending hunt for heretics quickly turned the 32nd Regiment against each other. Unrelenting paranoia soon destroyed the regiment from within, and the army of fanatics had to be disbanded and assigned to other corps to avoid a fratricidal massacre.
9057374e-5f89-4d22-9a95-cecff729e679: "Colonel, show some respect. You stand before my great ancestor, the man who once saved your regiment."
524c342a-59d7-4d79-8b7a-0246dbf3ddf2: "So the Adeptus Administratum seeks to increase the efficiency of agricultural production, yet concurrently vetoes all research and remediation of genetic anomalies within the local flora and fauna?" {n}The Manipulus arches his eyebrow sceptically.{/n} "The decision is contradictory at its very foundation. What is to blame — a lack of competence, or deliberate sabotage?"
4302b1ac-8f00-422f-bac3-48fd3a320dc4: The monster confusedly stomps on the spot, working its jaws and tossing its head.
89147e83-a241-4e32-a590-792be7fccd3b: For many, these holy warriors are paragons of virtue and duty, for the Blood Angels unfailingly uphold the precepts of Primarch Sanguinius, which state that only diligence and compassion can make the galaxy a better place than it is today. Each of them strives to be a protector and consoler of the common people, inspiring them through their own deeds.
a2e15d75-1592-4bdd-a1a3-f107aa551b75: This voidship is marked for death by the Wrath of Khaine. The Wrath of Khaine will soon appear behind it.
bdab501a-8158-4f1d-a892-3776f746b705: This creature acts as Trazyn's ally. At the end of every one of its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}, it must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}. On a successful test, the effect is removed.
fdfb744e-a2b8-48ba-a47d-6ee39e81029f: Blocks one instance of damage suffered (except damage-over-time) for each stack.
6a500b3b-847b-4f69-9bbc-0e9f5e1b8c32: "That should have been your answer from the off. Is it not clear that my words are to be heeded?"
55e93c49-fda9-4149-990f-f14e9f038975: {n}Captain Dunawski nods at you.{/n} "32nd Merov Regiment, to renew your oaths to the von Valancius dynasty — faaaaaall in!"
9674409e-4bbc-43e3-bc14-d9ca9ccfa145: "Yeah, right! I can't breathe on the decks from your 'incense' as it is! If more of you turn up, the rest of us will have to be servitorised just to endure the stench!"
24cdc33e-ef23-486f-aa1c-7044672e6b7d:
The user's attacks with a weapon in this hand inflict +{uip|Toxin|9f9e6d9c89804ae185b1b87ceba004b3} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and the {g|f:1b7dfda30e5e4c9d87dcfd0bb9cfefe8}toxic saturation{/g} effect.
This {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} is doubled against {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}prey{/g}.
59f956cd-fbea-45dc-901b-f17145b33c7e: "We've barely set foot on the planet's surface and you've already worked out how much they owe the Imperium. You heartless ashmag, let them off for another fifty years at least!"
8d35e763-c9e3-46ea-a18b-0e12b4d90467: "Succinctly put. I will note that it was only your short-sightedness that necessitated my intervention. Had you devoted more time to governing the protectorate rather than venturing abroad with obscure objectives, matters would have unfolded differently."
83d097b9-2af0-4c15-b034-a0e3584fba71: Find Eogunn in the Sector Bionica
02c372a2-f8af-4624-8ad6-453621db14f3: "The Mad Navigator!" {n}Cassia covers her mouth with her hands, as if embarrassed by her own outcry.{/n} "I have read about him and his research... Though he was deemed a madman, it was his theorising that led to the search for — and discovery of — a safe route between the Calixis Sector and the Koronus Expanse..."
b7f07d84-2df9-42c0-8cbe-d8d0ab392795: "Why shouldn't I simply execute the colonel?"
8cb9c7be-a122-4ad0-8640-45ef7f6fe083: "I see. Alas, this sheds no light on who he really was. Although an elegant appearance is indeed a hallmark of the nobility. And you are no small proof of that."
b9eaa525-f8c7-4cc6-90f7-0eb682ce78ec: {n}The Triasomata lies prostrate before the entrance to the bay, the faint {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Aquila{/g} on the door the only witness to his incoherent babbling. His hysterical wails of the righteous triune man are interrupted from time to time by the clanging of his augmented skull against the deck. A viscous mixture of blood and oil oozes from the staples on his forehead, and his fingernails are chipped from his attempts to dig the implants out of his body.{/n}
b714fdd0-4577-449c-8aa0-d47a7e682c7a: "True statement! The probability is approaching one."
165e7358-f97c-4e69-83ee-d44df94bb079: "Now all together! Come on! Atonement for the one!"
93362979-6fb0-4060-a1bb-5a181286f931: Scorch marks from an unknown energy weapon, probably of xenos origin.
8f4a9a58-cf70-4ec6-94c2-e5adcf8dff0c: {n}A massive, inhuman figure, forged entirely from dark metal, stands towering in the middle of your chambers. Despite your arrival, the uninvited guest's attention seems to have been entirely captured by the trophies on the walls of your study.{/n}
8e13255d-a164-42c9-b143-155abfb3e0a2: "The command headquarters is the priority target."
74f8fd23-d883-410e-88a5-cfe890703424: "Shereen, I may have to agree with this madwoman for the first time in my life. The locals are harsh and ruthless people, but seem to be reliable beyond measure."
452f013b-eb15-4f52-a3ef-a38d68e4d8e1: The Dark Gods' chosen was only too glad to bestow {mf|his|her} patronage upon so powerful a heretek, placing at his disposal all the secret knowledge that had been shared with {mf|him|her} by the Four. Kiava Gamma, formerly a stronghold for the servants of the Machine God, became a bastion of mechanistic horrors that was completely loyal to the fallen Manipulus. In its tunnels and secret workshops, nefarious machines multiplied, bringing death to the enemies of the von Valancius dynasty.
0a8797cf-d094-4f4d-b0cf-a7cd9b11e73c: {n}Yrliet and Marazhai look at the exhibit intently, then exchange glances and a few hushed remarks in their own language, which your Elucidator does not manage to translate in time. It appears that the xenos, in a rare show of unity, do not wish you to be privy to their thoughts.{/n}
4293f7a6-b28d-4cba-be49-70595b843a57: "I see that prosthetics are favoured among you."
626504fb-c24e-44bd-b25b-24ba1e3b6106: {n}You see Vedka swallow the lump in her throat and barely manage to choke out,{/n} "As you command."
ae4ec03a-5c77-4fc8-91ea-7e07c2317e01: A marvellously compact weapon in the form of a ring that allows the wearer to fire an {g|f:c2b9178fec724e679e71467457ed2215}Electric Discharge{/g} once per combat.
413d6497-3147-4f37-897f-48e7c4b7df5e: "I appreciate your restraint, Rogue Trader. In my experience, such words directed at me do not constitute a question, but an accusation. I will not attempt to convince you of my righteousness, but I will articulate a few facts that you can use as a basis for your own conclusions."
1b945791-9052-4b59-a581-88f528818de4: "My dearest colleague is incredibly flattered by the attention. Please ask your questions."
ab6b92d0-dfd5-4d38-a811-e5f477669cfe: "The minions of She Who Thirsts are quaking in terror? Ha! That's the best thing I have heard all day."
4d4d5010-c65b-425d-88ca-bb0e7d9b3b09: Carved into the ground are strange symbols mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor in Low Gothic.
f6cfdc6e-23f8-4d06-8c18-28541683eabf: "Such monsters must be exterminated. I understand, all too well, in fact. It seems that's exactly what we Guardsmen are for."
0f2c8590-e7e4-4709-b3b7-9ae2a80702bb: "Stop arguing and both of you help me."
5ee700bd-bb35-4996-b9c8-bbc1afe85c39: "Who among the palace defenders has access to plasma weapons?"
ece4a10f-49cf-448b-9b8a-dabcd402409b: "An indigenous organism of such formidable size that it can assault Imperial machinery? This world promises to be a true treasure trove of discoveries. A fine observation, Nuncius." {n}He turns toward his silent companion, whose servo-motors emit a phlegmatic buzz.{/n} "It could indeed be a specimen of either megafauna or megaflora."
79d8343c-6e58-49d2-9565-1aa8e09c8d92: "Alas, Lord Captain... The Sector Bionica was severely damaged during the mutiny started by the Master of Whispers. Until the implantation throne is repaired, augmentation is impossible. It pains me to refuse you, but we cannot afford to put your life at such risk."
fae716df-f0ac-452d-92bf-6da95a203d1d: "Are you suggesting that the planet is quite literally a living being, esteemed Genetor?"
8b7f58c2-10e0-476e-9c5c-98436869dc19: {n}You see Vedka close her eyes in relief and exhale.{/n}
fe8b784e-3321-49ef-83af-087496265697: "The von Valancius dynasty once stole a relic from me — the Crimson Dance of Khaine. I deemed it only fitting to claim the head of the von Valancius dynasty in exchange. That very same individual whom you, a representative of said dynasty, have now, centuries later, stolen back from me. Are you even capable of appreciating the elegance of the temporal recursion that now endows this object with unique value? I doubt it. But. at the very least, I have attempted to convey the notion."
0cdd951b-f239-45af-97f8-965b6c18003e: "It bears a monstrous resemblance to something I have seen before... I recognise the hallmarks of the Inquisition, without a doubt. Sacrificing dozens of powerful but untrained minds to grasp the unknown, and then destroying the attained knowledge because it was too dangerous."
60a082a0-0aa5-44dc-a345-44cc63bfe20b: "Let us follow your suggestion, Ulfar. Share your experience and rage with the Merovians."
a5a7458b-caf0-4111-9cb8-031b0820c338: "This statement is false. Efficiency is a consequence of observing proper rites, not a cause for worship. The rejection of standardised methods of service in the pursuit of increased productivity is a Category Five blasphemy. Optimising the labour of technomats is not the prerogative of a Genetor Extremis. Each serves according to their function." {n}Magos Haneumann's visor flashes red for a fraction of a second.{/n} "This alone is an incontrovertible fact."
21c47910-288d-4456-8a32-8566d46db596: {n}The squad sent on the suicide mission managed to get through under cover of fire from the 32nd Regiment. Before the walls of the xenotomb finally blocked the signal, one last {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-message came through, and in it was a distortion of the ancient motto: "Atonement for the many." Long, tense hours followed — and no one knew what fate had befallen the soldiers.{/n}
6d609fd5-22a0-4d83-b736-e7deeb62c26c: The cogitator has captured the strange glyphs etched into the xenos obelisk. Their meaning eludes the human mind, but even cursory analysis shows that the symbols mark certain events destined to occur within the gargantuan exhibit, and that they can be used to calculate the time until these inevitable occurrences.
b2f67689-6dc4-4615-b86e-fba338c26e82:
The servo-skull swarm gains +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}.
At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, allies in a 4-cell radius around the servo-skull swarm have their {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} level reduced by −{unit_stat|WarhammerFellowship|bonus}.
At the end of the Overseer's turn, their servo-skull swarm explodes, mimicking the effects of {g|f:088ba04da57c434b86b65eb603d52608}fire grenade{/g}.
8e5c9446-97d0-44bc-8e54-eae048495e93: {n}Eogunn places a hand on Nuncius's chest.{/n} "Hush, old friend. I have returned to end your agony. You will die by my hand, not of the xenos' filth. Here to witness is {name}, who reunited us."
f416ef03-1b4b-4c8e-815b-5814818beef5:
All battles in the game are {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}-based and take place on a grid. On their turn, a character can move, attack, and use their {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}.
Select a cell within the highlighted area and double-click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on it to move the character there.
527ca0f7-1c1d-4b89-9d80-46ce3a4f4265: "You call it 'penal.' I call it 'redemptive'! You surrendered to the basest impulses and stained your souls, yet you are permitted not to rot in chains but to burn away your transgressions in the heat of battle. So do not dishonour His gift of atonement with wretched shame!"
e4bc1437-8418-494a-913c-0e79b8fcde00: "I have seen how this ends: at the war council, Seberian does not listen to his retinue, relying only on his sword."
a07e62c7-e714-439b-b389-9f6342d98c27: The huge holes of the asymmetrical tunnels stare after your ship like a thousand dark eyes.
35127643-7da5-4433-99bb-57bf6fee9b3d: "This world belongs to us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll tear any intruder to pieces."
7c087fea-7753-463a-9ffc-32ac655f6226: {n}Janur gives Dunawski a long look. Finally, the two of them nod to each other.{/n} "Atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We understand."
fb976722-d3e9-467c-9dd7-75423c843436: "Wait a minute... It wasn't like that! What sorcery is this? No... I refuse to believe it!"
b8d5a61b-a638-4150-97d6-7d139b337095: "Not a chance." {n}The smirk that blossoms on her beautiful face tells you all you need to know.{/n} "My secrets will die with me."
b366d98c-dc4f-4bfd-9e72-54b446d79c10: "Our elders told us that, back when we still had communications, the channels would go dead whenever Drovers were near. What was it they said...? It 'puts the machine spirits to sleep.' That's it!"
0e351466-587c-44d7-b504-324214fb4e7f: "No! Stop!" {n}Juvenna's resistance is broken. Overcome by terror, she hangs limply in your arms.{/n} "I want to live. I will tell you everything."
c4c0a083-c21b-4f79-b956-368d58c2bba1: Their gaze passes through you as if you did not exist at all.
a99a5517-45b3-4d7b-85b4-f2d4318a1f0b: The old, rusted vox-scribe contains the coordinates of the xenoruins where Seberian von Valancius was sighted.
454a99f0-8088-426e-bc49-88536ab96188: "If you need anything else, I will be here."
c0c0b7d9-3d21-4bbd-9e22-da3f25df5d93: {n}Eogunn floats backward, shaking his head.{/n} "He... fears me. Communicating with laity is not my strong suit, and Nuncius refuses to involve himself. I am obliged to place my hopes in you."{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}{/g}
c507d748-6a51-4567-8f50-52696d300eaf: "Hmm, but your colleague claims it is merely the result of overwork, which you yourself are not always able to overcome."
d5247c0a-2ba5-4bec-aa84-c4cda2794a21: "Have you noticed anything unusual of late? Speak plainly — I'll have no demurring."
1a52e267-de53-4525-8d79-0a6ca9a9a2bc: "Colonel Batoshski, you will be my new Arch-Militant."
ad0d9d38-2c1c-4729-9569-9e0bbb95d866: "The neural synapses of my organic cogitator are filled with rapture. The machine's powers have been restored!"
03f8a52f-908d-40e7-9f28-a265fc7f89f0: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Mad Calibration: Blessing of Nurgle{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or has been {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.
20c5307d-b7ab-4e5f-afff-3ed908247a18: The Gaprak scion was slain at the outpost by a plasma weapon discharge. The body was disposed of by throwing it over the precipice. The guilty party must be found.
5904fc74-eccc-4adc-8278-76445a3046d9: "Ha! Freezing cold and salt on the air — this is a place that calls to me. If it weren't for the stench of burning promethium and xenos treachery, it would be just like Fenris when the thaw comes."
ead0d6ea-f0ea-472c-b8d6-c6fad615f4fd: "Why go all that way to sell it? I'll buy it from you here — just name your price. And what's more, I can have my people escort you to Footfall afterward."
6756c8b4-a418-4c3a-826a-6b8f2efcc017: "Really? The founder of our family line was called Kunrad — my great-grandfather. You have crossed paths with my descendant?"
eb7d6a3b-a76b-46a8-8469-ce3dd25ece1f: "Is Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} referring to Alva-9 — the enemy commander? Regrets are unwarranted. The functionality of the cog in the grand machine of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} will be partially restored by creating a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} of a suitable construction. I will process the remains and turn them into a servant of the Machine God. This is sufficient for an adept incapable of distinguishing the Omnissiah's Truth from heresy."
54c06a47-dbf1-4007-9cb3-96fc0f629502: "I am heading to the settlement. Perhaps the vox-signal will break through to the flagship from there."
02d476d5-b333-45c1-88c7-0de26afe44ad: To claim the promised reward, the Rogue Trader must return to the station Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 and speak with the Tech-Priests.
a4b7d4d3-a585-4f12-81ce-db61021881c2: Amsanct lies hidden behind a dimensional gate in another part of space. Find a way to reach it.
93a47650-6b46-406d-9f73-b88bc82342f4: [Try to save the doomed man] "Sergeant-Chirurgeon, you will assist."
5a765528-bea4-4ecc-b4dc-c6d5862a1d0f: "I swear I did everything I could. Landing the thing anywhere else would've been the same as plunging into the open sea! You will have to reach the central drill on foot...
6cc1d5a5-5e32-4cd6-9436-b6d7907f83d9: "That's in the past now. We've put our differences behind us. My thoughts have become much more structured with the installation of the neural implant, and now I don't see the need for conflict."
991eefe6-33cd-472f-813f-7fdb0b7311b0: The conveyor is designed to transport dead bodies to the disposal unit. The metal surface is covered in repulsive-looking stains.
5c220973-b795-4123-9b97-487140f23bff: "A reasonable question, Rogue Trader, and I believe the answer will prove most satisfactory. After the Triasomata reconstruction {nc|failed to confirm my hypothesis|ended in failure}, I spent considerable time drawing conclusions from it. The fruit of my labours is a formula for bionic synergy that enhances the efficiency of augmetic integration with the host."
25880bbd-db16-4930-8966-979fc0510f47: The rot extract that the Rogue Trader risked drinking has granted {mf|him|her} a temporary resistance to poisons.
6c46dd36-d1db-4895-a348-6bf9b59d9c3d: "The Sauerbacks are renowned for their devoutness and loyalty — I think you are similar enough that your alliance would be a strong one."
658290da-070b-4906-9b9e-9ee42cfdf919: "I would advise you to take more care in choosing your subjects, Genetor. For certain phenomena, seeking greater knowledge than what is permitted is not worth the trouble."
c43f5e0d-8795-4246-be03-2d8d3c143f17: The brothers of the Deathwatch are not a permanent standing force — other Astartes Chapters second their warriors to the Deathwatch for a specific mission or a discrete period of time. The Chapter's missions are carried out under the strictest secrecy, and information about the Chapter's existence is known only to a select few. All those who join this mysterious brotherhood are bound by many ancient vows, and these vows maintain the veil of secrecy around the activities of the Deathwatch better than any other protective measures.
46ec15ee-12b1-4ced-8c84-59e5f3be1395: "The hunger of this machine spirit is too great. My offerings will hardly satiate it. It yearns for communion with the blessed galvanics of the generator."
dbc8bd01-1dfc-40c3-94d3-69d48ccc006a: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Pain wracks{/d} Batoshski's body and, for the first time, he screams. Wildly, furiously, frantically. His grip loosens, and blood gushes from his wounds.{/n}
007450c4-7949-4821-9758-7d58184bfd3b: "Notice: further delay by the Rogue Trader will result in the flooding of the station."
d28d31fe-3d5f-4272-abee-ebd739f421af: {n}Vast swathes of Zarkov's territory have been turned into ash or poisoned compost heaps. However, the vanquishers of this world know that, before long, xenoheresy will be replaced by hub-blocks and statues, {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorums{/g} and training grounds. Flesh must be excised before it can receive sacred augments. The same principle applies to planets.{/n}
50195244-05f4-41ff-8f2a-7988e7cad2cb: Through your efforts and those of the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus, this device has been transformed into a masterpiece overflowing with the grace of the Omnissiah.
afb3ae39-ffb0-4216-9f14-8c05435ff3fb: "I am an ally of Juvenna von Valancius. You have nothing to hide from me."
2faf4689-e1b7-41a9-b9fd-7b36f791424a: "You are stronger than this. The pain clouding your mind is merely a trial, one you are more than capable of overcoming. Lay down your weapons, and I promise the medicae officers will ease your suffering."
23ebef6c-b6a6-433e-b222-b4175e614a25: "You will have to bring me in on this plot. If you do not... I heard your transmission and will have no trouble finding someone eager to learn its contents."
981fdcfd-ce73-4efa-a4df-e0381692c972: "You... are casting us out? But why? Nomos only want—"
d3679be7-7720-41d0-b2ea-e142e219ddfc: You do not have enough readily available {g|Encyclopedia:ScrapSpace}scrap{/g} to repair your ship, but you still have options if you are willing to sacrifice some of your ship's upgrades. Open the voidship management screen and choose a component. Click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on it and select downgrade. The current level of the component will be lowered as it is stripped from the ship and turned into spare scrap — a portion of the original investment — that can be used to repair your ship.
f51f4c49-8791-41d5-9213-bd05fcaa6ec6: "So your direct commander is Dunawski, but you're a supporter of Batoshski?"
3b825837-10a7-4a1d-bf2c-63d884e054f7: ...the Arch-Militant's order. "Sons of Zarkov! Stand up and do your duty!"
a8472aed-09b7-4f27-89f4-a7b5b55336f6: "I am not able to resolve your dispute, for I lack sufficient knowledge of the Machine God's mysteries."
4f4cc322-7b4c-4384-b2de-28b75c818f2b: "Unity — we must find worlds that have been lost to time and help them. Together we are stronger."
addbff1e-c5f0-4528-be6c-1d331524c442: "I have. I regret to say it, but he suffered an unenviable fate."
d8776687-4d98-4454-aa0d-56a746e7d6d7: "Before you stands {name} von Valancius {mf|himself|herself}, conqueror of the Koronus Expanse, Sovereign of Dargonus, Janus, and a multitude of other worlds. Bow your heads in awe and reverence, for neither before nor after this moment are you destined to behold anyone of greater majesty!"
7316c24c-0b34-49bb-be67-dc7fb3e31c56: This grenade creates an area of sticky flammable material, lasting for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Whenever a creature enters the area or is present inside it at the moment it appears, it suffers +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. If a creature is in the area at the moment it disappears, it suffers +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. Each stack of this effect increases all fire or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} damage suffered by the creature by +1.
cb2689af-6ccc-4969-a90d-f9363067a156: "Their vigilance is the means by which they fulfil their duty to the God-Emperor."
83042c47-a553-4331-9798-1f7b302b8c41: "Request... denied... with gratitude." {n}Pasqal rasps, yet he raises a hand in a gesture of refusal.{/n} "This... incident... is classified as an act of tech-martyrdom. The Omnissiah's tenets forbid any outside interference. I alone must execute the cleansing." {n}The Tech-Priest's vox emits a choking sound.{/n}
fa863abf-c5c5-4486-8d98-ff66792debc1: "Did you hear that? Our exile on Zarkov has come to its end!"
cecdd876-383d-4f76-8ce2-cae724132e16: "Poison-yellow fear and dark-blue anger, they spill so thickly through the air... and these hues blind me to the empty dais. How grateful I am for this blindness, for I could not look upon such a loss without weeping."
d1650ee1-7d28-4d48-8e5d-5b24551f8660: {n}The door slides to one side with a metallic thud. Stale air rushes out of the hidden room, carrying with it particles of centuries-old dust.{/n}
01c1ef42-3087-4625-a981-46d6d660c549:
The damage dealt by this ability and its {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} are increased by +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} granted by Jae to an ally before using this ability. The extra {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g} are counted starting with the last use of this ability. The damage dealt by this ability cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}.
This ability does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.
2246b814-1403-4b96-bc72-04a8efa55c14: {n}Exclamations of surprise fill the bridge. When you take a break from contemplating the aftermath of the salvo and glance at the auspexes, you see that the pyramid, which was split into pieces a few minutes ago, is becoming whole again. It does not appear that the direct hit from the melta-torpedo did it any harm at all.{/n}
3fe7dbf8-7be7-4583-a17f-4a6089aab151: {n}Pasqal's vox-emitter produces a barely audible sigh of sorrow, one that shifts into a quiet binharic litany.{/n}
f01a9460-2bad-41b3-8a36-dc561c599496: "Good day to you." {n}Juvenna bows her head courteously.{/n}
1d4cb212-dba8-4752-9031-39f82659520c: "Inquisitor af Irramon has truly underestimated the von Valancius dynasty." {n}Sauerback draws out each word with gloating pleasure.{/n} "Once — when he dared to storm the palace. Twice — when he believed that Seberian's subjects would betray their master. And thrice..." {n}He points the plasma pistol at you.{/n} "...when he decided to send a poorly trained spy, who is apparently unaware that House Gaprak has possessed the world of Kiava Gamma for nigh on thirty years!"
dccaa9a6-be21-489b-a9eb-d91ef390b2c4: {n}The colonel's body slumps to the floor. Silence falls over the platform.{/n}
d5c057d1-b0f7-438b-9608-dc7298787d43: {n}The inspired Zarkovians respond in unison with a military salute. Seberian gives you a final nod and strides toward one of the side galleries.{/n}
89ce6b2b-1540-46c9-b895-a55a8993133d: "Hmm. I cannot agree with that assessment. The Sector Bionica has started to look more up to snuff, in my view. And who would say no to more quiet on the ship?"
e58702b8-2fa6-4f20-b4eb-2af12f87d56e: {n}There is truth to the xenos's words, skilfully concealed behind understatement. If the laboratory has become a nesting ground for xenos, their absence is no accident. It seems you are not alone here.{/n}
19378118-d4ee-4316-bc2d-846a1450d9ad: "All heresy must be excised. Do not be mistaken: I will do so again should you give me cause."
be954797-a14a-4475-b82b-e93ad9bd8a2d: "What exceptional loyalty to a final order. Exceptional both in its persistence and in its futility." {n}Jae gives a humourless smile and looks away.{/n}
74b2a1c0-4165-4201-8198-fba0d888a987: [Hand over the journal] "He was a psyker. Vedka was trying to get him to send an Astropathic message."
1c1edbfd-c3d0-4979-82f2-64c119b1c826: "Nuncius, the issue of productive integration of augmetics into the living flesh of a host is the cornerstone of all my endeavours!" {n}Eogunn falls silent for a few seconds, as if processing his interlocutor's response.{/n} "I am disappointed by your attempts to remain neutral in this debate."
19ccaf10-a141-4658-8268-59c7914b2f08: "What became of the woman who attacked you?"
b4cef211-3da3-4589-b9f6-3776817ce97c: The target ally gains +2 stacks of {g|f:922f433968ee442c9216ae622cf7cbca}scarab armour{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
e624f8de-8482-44a4-984a-2c72d4173f3e: {n}The Vox Master's reply is preceded by a distinct pause.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The enforcers, under the direction of the Master-at-Arms, have interrogated everyone associated with Genetor Februs over the past week. No useful information could be obtained, except for the mention of his highly unstable emotional state. An order was issued to force access to his personal servo-skull for inspection, but it was discovered that the esteemed Genetor had taken the unit with him."
8ae9d08b-ac30-4c96-b2dd-c3a94e1d14cc: {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "With all due respect, Rogue Trader, this is not your choice. Nuncius is my responsibility, and I will decide for myself what to do with him. Do not deny me this. And now I must begin."
938c026f-2d21-4260-8ca9-50f68e9cc0de: "The inner perimeter turrets require an immediate inspection."
3aa871a5-e8cc-4f72-b926-677e140b2c1b: {n}Still working the injector, Martinax turns his head to you.{/n} "This young man has suffered a serious head injury that requires immediate intervention. The Genetor Majoris and I are attempting to stop the flesh from dying off while simultaneously deciding on a strategy for further treatment."
7939d3af-6c13-45f7-9f06-3138ec0cc2f8: {n}The Manipulus reflexively clutches his stomach.{/n} "I must assure you that my colleague greatly exaggerates the quantity of profane technologies inside me. As in, the quantity is zero. In any case, my hull would be an entirely suboptimal place to keep them..."
b6599110-e8b1-4801-acaa-58615b655e77: "The naivety of the lowly... is boundless. He hungered... for knowledge. He... stole my instrument. He... destroyed the other... and awakened the sleeping ones." {n}The xenos's metal faceplate does not move, but the play of shadows upon it gives the illusion of a solemn frown.{/n}
1b690a61-f9ee-42d2-a631-03f2efa1e01f:
When psykers reach deeper into the warp to power their abilities, there is always the chance of the Empyrean bleeding into reality, a factor that is invariably destructive and damaging.
At the beginning of combat, veil degradation is usually 0. Veil degradation increases by +1 for each use of a minor {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}psychic power{/g} and by +3 for each use of a major psychic power. Veil degradation decreases by −1 each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
8046f5fa-11bb-44fe-9bac-204928a91b8a: "How do you know this... I see! You've been here before."
1a7c8390-9f4d-4434-8774-4bfa00e78faa: [Ostentatiously listen to Nuncius] "What's that? You think the esteemed Magi are behaving like squabbling children? Yes, I would have to agree."
c492a1d2-3f51-4728-a923-f3b8944c4029: "The {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protects, Lord Captain... and He calls for vengeance for the fallen! Let the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} purge your world of the xenos infestation."
aec67b4e-4a78-4cae-a518-1672490c452c: {n}His vox-modulator lets out a low rumble of displeasure.{/n} "These are not memories I am keen to share with you, my heir. I do not trust you enough for that, bound by dynastic bonds though we may be."
4963a403-f53e-43a6-8c25-a21e532c6a3a: "You were close. I am of the Subord Shaba branch."
3c5cfc67-fb5d-4a76-ba6a-373b748e9f51: {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Precisely. A man chooses what he is made of — regrets for his past mistakes, or the experience he gained from them. Only those who choose the latter course can attain true wisdom."
63a6b50b-c2d1-4b92-b965-5497f98470a8: {n}As though woken by your shout, Seberian raises his weapon with the roar of a wounded beast and rushes forward. But your all-out charge provokes no fear or even disquiet in the xenos. With his attention elsewhere, he absent-mindedly raises his hand and snaps his fingers.{/n}
c3caa672-89c3-4fc9-9c9a-c8fd446d61da: "Yrliet, I do not wish to maim Zarkov any further. Teach the Merovians your ways."
a1de3fe7-61ca-4491-80f6-7e7e1b9b48a8: {n}In the dead starlight, the planet looks like a bizarre artefact whose many sharp facets glimmer mysteriously. A thin, gleaming spiral curls around the planet, changing direction from time to time. If you look closely, you can see that the spiral is composed of many minuscule dots — enemy bombers.{/n}
da83e8a1-4913-4a3a-aee3-3d13093f2c51: "'Artisan'? I have never heard such a title before."
804c36a6-07d9-4f10-bcac-7b4eae42073f: "Right away, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Sector Bionica officers will make all the necessary preparations."
879c3c41-8497-4135-b9db-f1c80e4ceaff: "I hope you have not come empty-handed."
1fa372a8-f106-4bbd-abc4-0fa53824ef4b: "You really are courage, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I'll gather the garrison. We'll check the defences and follow you shortly. Atonement for the one!"
cae04ac7-740c-4338-b987-7eae90645bab:
This cannon grants Eogunn the {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}Transonic Wave{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.
63e91aeb-4b61-4ddd-809e-421b76c208d3: "Let's say he did, in fact, lie. Tell me your side of the story."
f6b0bbef-e295-4520-9875-7c8bc24dc9bc: "That's right." {n}Noticing the confusion on your face, Janur continues.{/n} "That's our cemetery. Even a human corpse is a resource and object of value for us. We inject certain poisons and other extracts into the leaf shrouds to produce... something good. Nutrient paste, camouflage ointment, glue... lots of things."
a5658476-f2db-4692-8c6d-02e861093f9c: The creature suffers −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g}.
87327b66-44c1-40e9-9624-dfadf3172c12: Deemed unity and reclaiming lost worlds to be the greatest mission of Humanity.
faf53a3d-f751-4f62-b9c5-a7b673539c6c: {n}Seberian watches in silence as his daughter loses consciousness, stupefied by the potent medicaments. A surge of the Motive Force flashes in his bionic eye, and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n}
581172c9-4454-4123-a042-560d82d7d982: {n}The weapon in the woman's hands noticeably trembles.{/n} "If anyone else had said this, I wouldn't listen. But you... and your achievements... You command reverence from so many throughout the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}." {n}She falls silent for a time, consumed by her doubts.{/n}
731cd2ce-551e-46ca-8491-19ad86e22c9a: "Allow me, esteemed colleague. Perhaps you have erred within the sacred rites of decryption." {n}Smiling, Eogunn nudges Pasqal aside to repeat the rites of unsealing. The door remains shut. The Manipulus huffs with irritation.{/n}
f4d9b75a-a37d-4434-bde3-3f25f0ee4fb9: "There is no cause for concern, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."
dd16b229-acd0-4f98-85f9-c6ada01d905d:
All group members except the leader can use {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} in ground combat to highlight the icon of an ability or a consumable item on the panel at the bottom of the screen.
Additionally, they can use {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} to highlight choices in dialogues and book events, showing other group members which option they would like to select.
Note: though each group member can express their opinion, it is up to the group leader to make the final decision.
c78ed704-b5f1-46cc-885d-3a5d5c223ad2: {n}Trazyn emits an irritated grinding sound.{/n} "A modicum of patience will not kill you, primitive creature. Your life is fleeting, but not to such an extreme."
f83d2124-9e43-452d-b7e4-82b6bcc50d41: {n}Seberian nods slowly, not averting his gaze.{/n} "I thank you for the head start. When we return to the known reaches of the Koronus Expanse, I shall most certainly take advantage of it."
c67b9723-ca70-4ac0-b2ee-d5323664a61c: This creature suffers 100% more damage from all sources.
556e1e17-2351-452e-88e1-e2752f93fd7e: {n}The extracted vox-recording is delivered aboard your flagship, where your servants manage to restore it. In it, Private Ruban Khroshovach reports that the 32nd Regiment of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Penal Legion{/g}, requisitioned by Seberian, was left without a ship and supplies on GH-89-717 after the Rogue Trader's death. The message ends with the phrase: "Atonement for the one."{/n}
930fd2d0-1aca-4c8f-96e4-a3edee869b16: {n}Caustic laughter cuts through your thoughts.{/n} "It is only a matter of time before the monster breaks free from the humans' powerless grasp. I will await that moment. I am willing to wait an eternity to acquire what will become the jewel of my collection — you will have expired long before that happens, I'm sure."
76620825-a204-4245-b6c8-e24af6cb2230: "That is all I wished to ask."
be397ad4-e3eb-4f13-bd85-f5f32144d2aa: "Can you ease up a little? I'm on duty in half an hour!"
2db8636d-3294-4031-8ea7-fc640d7d1c3e: "From the bits of information I was able to piece together, I came to the conclusion that the Inquisition was interested in that sector of space as a whole, and that Amsanct was only a small part of the operation. We were transported there on a certain Chartist vessel for the purposes of secrecy — I suspect the Chartists were just a cover. Our expertise was invaluable for the study of xenoruins, so Nuncius and I were placed in charge of the research team and provided with all the necessary equipment."
5173d72f-7e7e-4eed-bd46-afef9e0b1bcb: A desiccated mummy lies curled in a foetal position. He met his demise decades ago, not to wounds or disease but to hunger, thirst, and the cold of Amsanct. His frozen hands still clutch a data-slate engraved with the sigil of the Inquisition.
de0cde04-70b2-4c39-a041-5529560cb2f9: {n}Seberian inserts his hand into the gene-lock you remember well from the time of the mutiny on the ship that claimed Theodora's life and laid Kunrad's treachery bare. You see the liquid coursing through your ancestor's plasteen veins change colour. The servitor's eyes come alive, and the doors of the Warrant Chamber begin to open.{/n}
24e261a2-2b6c-489e-8189-508aca371467: "I am overseeing the Sector Bionica in accordance with all the covenants of the Emperor. And your orders, of course. Now, injury will be no bar to any servant of the God-Emperor fulfilling his or her duty — we have breathed new life into all those whom others would have written off as scrap."
3f1c68f5-2333-4386-862e-70e88c901c42: "Cohesion leads to increased potential. The whole is greater than its individual parts. But where does the urge to stand together come from? The answer is extremely simple."
d25739af-8402-4476-becb-9a3c0bcf31fb: {n}Sergeant Dankosh puts every conceivable effort into teaching you to shoot as they do — leading the target with no aiming. To the great disappointment of everyone present, he does not succeed.{/n}
c54fa45b-7823-4543-8cdf-3b1b2d91f1b8: After being given to Trazyn the Infinite by Rogue Trader von Valancius, the C'tan Shard vanished without a trace along with its new owner. And it seemed that all the calamities heralded for the Koronus Expanse with the Star God's impending awakening vanished along with them.
e3b90845-6843-4387-814c-c41bfbced69a: "Do not mistake me, Lord Captain, but I dislike being in this place. My malfunctioning implants cause me to be here too often as it is."
3929d4c9-2cc5-48ab-8b8e-44aa6bbb47c8: [Seize the moment to use the Zarkovian combat technique]
81dfad98-68fe-436d-ba0f-548235d652d5: "I hope you mean it. I won't give you another chance."
f7d78e2f-b25e-438d-a80e-fd49c739049d: {n}Seberian turns his entire body toward you with a soft hiss of hydraulics. The clanking of his implants echoes sharply across the bridge. He inclines his head slightly in greeting, his neck augmetics grinding beneath the collar of his coat.{/n} "Heir. My conduct after our return from Trazyn's trap was unbecoming."
578e3580-e55c-4a26-b5b1-b9e5f067fa0c: "A vector always has a direction, and the most perverse trap always has a design. Try to understand what the purpose of this time trap is, and subvert it."
dd6877fc-a5e9-49ce-ae1a-ca8f1a51164c: "I would go so far as to say that feelings are an interesting phenomenon from the point of view of genetics and psychology, but they should not be used to guide rational decision-making."
c58617d2-290a-4e1e-b7a9-075dd9482454: {n}The hissing that reaches your ears coalesces into the barely discernible words of a vox-transmission. The source of the sound is a {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}vox-bead{/g}, tucked behind the bloody ear of a fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Sister of Battle{/g}.{/n}
419916e9-2d42-46b8-ae1d-6f42ccceb031: This foul creation radiates palpable heat. The air near the leering mouth is searingly hot.
b5b7f75a-401b-41c0-811d-c1427c5ee738: "A most unexpected meeting! For I have been informed that the Gaprak army is, ahem, delayed. I suppose that makes you the advance guard?" {n}With a tinkling click, the Duchess thumbs a bead in her rosary and fixes you with a penetrating look.{/n}
cdb4f6a4-1f15-41ed-abd8-478e2fd3aaa6: The mangled Aquila from the entrance gleams in the puddle of oil and blood, the only reminder of the tragedy.
30ee0a54-e2c5-4416-8457-c81888e53bc5: {n}As you listen to Seberian's monologue, you fail to notice his gestures — he gives a barely perceptible sign, and dozens of lasgun charges pierce through you.{/n}
c17ae249-08fc-401f-a8c2-4e4152eb14c1: The user can move through enemies. Each creature on their path suffers {uip|Damage|66a9d5ea6e034de9944f90d42e352987} {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} with 30% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
dc58c435-b274-478e-ae5d-dba1d5b64456: "What are the circumstances? Where exactly has he gone?"
8464bef1-2ca6-4a6c-b368-91bf9273f38c: "Sleep-water? Hmm. You know, shereen, a draught that helps one forget one's terrors at night regardless of the horrors suffered during the day could have a grand future as an export to other worlds of the Imperium..."
c2911d25-854a-4637-8aad-15f7f7278ec7: The user's Ballistic Skill is reduced by −10%.
c19f0e17-e187-4345-814f-1236e2bb058f: {n}The pupil of Seberian's organic eye dilates to its utmost, almost filling the iris. Seberian leans over the wounded woman, gripping the hilt of his newly recovered sword with such force that the components of his bionic arm howl with the strain. His very posture speaks of the deepest despair.{/n}
98980565-2925-4397-a40f-bba871dd67c4: You notice that the blast crater has grown larger.
f7d29b6a-8566-4536-a36c-dc4f26af19c1: "The vital functions of the Martinax life form have been restored with a high-grade sacred neural implant. Thanks to your timely directives, the necessary equipment was found in a Sector Bionca repository. The Martinax life form also wishes to thank you."
1bab5059-d9c3-4f17-a7cd-f04963ab438f: There is not a scrap of skin left on this person, and almost no flesh.
bc980fb4-75c6-44d8-b79a-27c336852eb4: "I must remind you that the destruction of blasphemous machine modifications is the sacred duty of every devout servant of the Omnissiah. You are sufficiently devout, are you not, Genetor Februs?"
f1d083aa-d226-41fc-970d-03fee8ff351f: "Is it that hard to recharge a power pack?"
