fbe4ff4e-ebaf-4408-8d31-f1bd6f19f66e: {n}Janris takes a tiny step backward, a motion almost imperceptible for a man of his girth.{/n} "As you can see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the unpleasant situation has been resolved in full accordance with the dynasty's interests. I should like to take my leave. Matters of no less importance await my attention."
68b3ed75-4a85-4572-a690-06e5a96c9677: "Seberian has bored me to tears already. Now it is your turn: take him away and let's be done with it."
2c009714-7c4f-4cef-b540-a74ac3849d2a: "Indecision is one of the worst qualities a Rogue Trader can possess. Fortunately, it is not a trait I share."
9954508b-1937-424c-8131-b3b78730017a: {n}Seberian's bionic eye whirrs as it focuses on Ulfar, and the Rogue Trader's voice sounds almost reverent:{/n} "I was not aware that Diodas had managed to secure the support of the God-Emperor's Angels. However, even faced with His Angel, I cannot forsake the duties placed upon me by the Warrant."
80fa73fd-6fa4-4e67-b9d4-b8b21035e604: {n}Eogunn looks grim and anxious.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I must speak with you regarding Nuncius and the events in Commorragh. I... have much to explain. Find me when you are ready to listen."
e90ffe7f-66c9-497f-935f-66fd2cfa5910: "Service to the Omnissiah often manifests in ways beyond the comprehension of those not ordained into the Adeptus Mechanicus." {n}Decabalus betrays no sign of confusion or anxiety, yet an unpleasant rasp creeps into the overtones of his voice.{/n} "For the sub-faction of the Cult Mechanicus that I represent, researching xenotech aligns with our interpretation of the {g|Encyclopedia:UniversalLaws}Sixteen Universal Laws{/g}."
b4d70d87-4592-42ba-ac40-e78d11873ecf: "I am bored with you. You can stay here."
56d9b7ef-60f5-46ab-aeba-9a160458b02c: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I imagine that Seberian was a man of remarkable talents and extraordinary destiny. I regret that I was fated never to see him in the flesh."
16448f7d-c589-4fd9-a823-209eeb29818a: {n}The sergeant thinks, the strain apparent in his feverish eyes. Your question is well beyond the bounds of his understanding of reality.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}! I'm no good at guessing games! I've no clue what force fields you're talking about!"
7a722062-8929-40a1-a1c4-e4c3136ae3a8:
Augments are sacred mechanisms of the Omnissiah, wrought to replace the weakness of flesh and elevate the body beyond its natural limits.
Across the Imperium, they serve both as necessary replacements for broken limbs and as instruments of sanctioned enhancement, binding steel and spirit into a single, enduring form.
484fd6c8-edcd-4bf6-903c-61993a017fc7: "You saw Janus again after several centuries. How did it feel?"
1b313b3e-d267-4052-94aa-b930318a4044: {n}Despite the Inquisitor's formidable presence, Seberian maintains his dignified bearing and bows his head with pointed courtesy.{/n} "Greetings, Inquisitor. I had heard that the rosette opens many doors, and it seems that my door is no exception. Allow me to introduce you to {name}, a loyal {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaSide}servant of my dynasty{/d}. {name}, this is Diodas af Irramon, he who leads the enemy forces. I would not call making his acquaintance an honour, but you can decide that for yourself. Esteemed Diodas, let us put a swift end to this affair: I deny all your accusations, and have no cause for repentance."
f3eca754-8b63-4f74-8d99-81eb7f96b9ed: {n}The disgusting sludge makes your gorge rise instantly. You spit the remnants back into your glass and splutter noisily.{/n}
dc42bd4b-e908-4514-9851-8ebe4007d43c: "I'm still... Yes, Nuncius, yes, endure a little longer, we will be one..." {n}The Manipulus has lost his final shred of rationality — his gaze is now in full thrall to madness. He desperately extracts the distorted augments from the corpse and mercilessly reattaches them inside himself, heedless of the pain and blood. Last of all, he removes the cortical implant from Nuncius's head — a melted piece of dead metal covered in lumps of brain matter. Whispering words you cannot make out, Eogunn solders it next to his heart.{/n}
f82750ad-40f8-49e8-8577-eae778f0ceeb: {n}The Tech-Priest looks gloomier than a cloud.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I am experiencing a cognitive block. I have analysed every possible failure hypothesis and double-checked every step I made — and I have failed to identify a single mistake. The organic parts and the Ferrum Sanctum joined together perfectly, the brain was perfectly preserved. These... complications should never have occurred, and yet the outcome cannot be denied. My calculations are perfectly correct — that is an incontrovertible fact. So, was the flaw in the conditions or in the subjects themselves?"
60128099-fc16-44c6-8e6f-c2091518a9c6: {n}Idira flinches and looks around nervously.{/n} "Whispers, hush... I hear, yes, danger, yes..." {n}She casts a warning glance at you.{/n}
b650fb5c-1243-4e91-b584-f0db4b001e47: {g|f:a020de8978b1475fb024748c37ca1beb}Torpedo Control{/g} grants +25% more damage to the controlled torpedo salvo.
05a28679-7972-4dbb-9c2d-46f14190452d: The shuttles are returning. The voices of the scout pilots reporting over the vox-channel are filled with fear and secret relief.
d48bed74-687f-4129-9612-fd4cff7af15e: {n}Panting, Vedka Dunawski stays well away from the colonel, who glowers at her.{/n}
93400897-5890-4ddb-9c6e-5216ed1adf14: "What knowledge are you seeking this time? Does it warrant this... self-excavation?"
651f937f-9972-4b67-8943-07327b8f2bbc: "I also wish to hear from those who have held their peace thus far. Speak freely, counsellors, do not fear that your words will be misinterpreted. I wish to hear from everyone."
c4af8ad5-f40c-4ee5-a8a3-251091901948: "As you command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Dunawski's chin trembles slightly, but she seems to be holding herself together.{/n}
1d2fda8f-df4a-4c13-a3bd-bb407de9428f: "So... Nuncius. Who is your mysterious interlocutor truly? No need to answer — I simply relish the throb of pain you feel whenever I ask that question."
a7dcc7f5-80b6-47dc-8b29-53bce96c3b20: Amulets cannot be equipped by the user.
21a178b3-1eda-43b2-b072-88981cfb4edc: "You cannot reconstruct them here on the ship?"
10d3f461-8d0d-47bb-9bdc-3714bb928a42: "Aett-Vater, we shall compose fine sagas of battles fierce and victories glorious! How the iron dead paid the vengeance wergeld to the valiant warriors of Zarkov!"
3757a62c-2107-4f1b-b077-cd418706b34d: "I order you both to report to the bridge immediately. I shall settle this."
1bd0b620-251f-4bbe-90f1-b2375c7f5411: At the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the number of stacks of this effect on the block of ice is reduced by −1. When the last stack is removed, it melts, and Necrons with 90% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} appear in its place. Connected Circuit: if an electrical circuit reaches this block of ice, all stacks except one are removed immediately. The Necrons appear at the start of the next round. They have 70% of their maximum wounds. Generator Overload: if a generator overload hits this block, all stacks are removed, and Necrons appear immediately. They have 50% of their maximum wounds and become {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 round.
f0b3ee55-d5c6-4f36-806b-c10bdfbc700a: Partial {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} does not reduce the user's chance to be {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}.
4af6316b-5e6a-4f46-b1a0-79d8ef5e9550: "You don't have much time. Say what you have to say."
9e421590-b7fc-4f62-8e0c-127960a6c66b: "What was he like, the real Nuncius?"
97305ec5-102e-4f89-a7ad-a6b09b5bd647: "Put down your weapon, or my Master-at-Arms will make your pain a thousand times worse."
1cf60bea-66e6-4dec-b6e4-e1e2acf79257: "I require the litany of higher access for the gates."
18b107cc-cb19-4ce3-ad4f-7a5495e0af13: "While the body of the machine remains in dysfunction, its spirit suffers from idleness. The Motive Force cannot nourish it, and its lenses remain blind. Litanies and rituals keep such an ancient creation of the Omnissiah from fading away completely, but these are only palliative measures. And if the spirit abandons its receptacle, the Sector Bionica will fall into decay, for this relic serves the same function as the heart does in human life forms."
dde0db35-f2de-4a05-a275-960eca99d694: "Are you trying to make me afraid? I am not permitted to fear. Whatever nets Seberian has set, I will break them. The God-Emperor leads me, and His will is stronger than any snare."
3df639f9-a1c7-49fa-81f8-aa2938df8624: "Blessed be all the probabilities that have converged under the gaze of the Machine God. I deem Pact TR-3 concluded!"
a9f8ee84-c468-4635-bb6f-5f92ee2d3bbd: "Why do you fight? I pose no threat to you, Izdrig, nor to your people."
c95ab37b-f417-47fe-b184-3e724b3503b1: "Give them alternate coordinates, and I swear no one will find out about this."
fe279d56-cddb-41bb-8d97-0585f5ffa38c: {n}Tervantias's hideous visage twists into a sneer of contempt.{/n} "The specimen with impaired cognitive abilities? When he was brought here, he displayed... a lack of docility. His technomaniacal tendencies border on psychosis, which likely severely reduced his will to survive and provoked a bout of delusional grandeur."
9e4a8c7a-62d6-4340-85ef-4b6cadcb2ab8: The forces of House Gaprak were expected to come to the aid of Dargonus, yet the reinforcements never arrived. Any information concerning their fate must be found.
84212efc-3b2b-49a4-a991-e0ce8ed1f258: "What nonsense is this? You are aboard my flagship and you dare..." {n}The mechanical voice suddenly cuts off. Seberian feverishly shifts his gaze from the faces of the crew to the furnishings of the bridge, recognising nothing. Clutching his head, he repeats,{/n} "This... this is absurd! This cannot be..."
2b7dd760-f2c2-4138-8585-c2298099c9c2: "I'd like to know more about the Drover."
3d85775d-a3c2-41ee-ad39-9c47a2e22b0c: [Nod to Isimond] "The enforcers have inordinate respect for the governor's opinion, do they not?"
aa003ead-9ae3-41ee-806f-3678baeee4c2: "What are people saying about the Gaprak reinforcements?"
b9c63e65-f27b-41d8-864c-f1176337623a: "This is the first I have heard of this uprising, Janris. Is this an error, or have you been concealing something from me?"
d51620c6-c057-4b17-a471-90ba81b07245: {n}Eogunn hovers in mid-air, obsessively examining Nuncius. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} rests in the Tech-Priest's hands, his eye dark and his manipulators still. It seems that Eogunn is performing repair rituals on his companion.{/n} "Butcher. Tech-ravager! That damned xenos fancies himself an expert in matters of sacred engineering! Omnissiah, grant me clarity of thought and cool the righteous fury in my synapses! What could a xenos possibly know about the mysteries of machine spirits? His impoverished mind cannot grasp the importance of maintenance rituals, nor can it perceive that machines are not soulless lumps of metal. Rogue Trader, I demand that the blasphemous hands of this marvel of mediocrity, this utter ignoramus, be amputated at the first opportunity!"
5a3ed6bc-e4fc-44be-93fc-946e657a3431: These crude dwellings resemble the shanties on the lower decks of the ship.
f7908847-741d-41d0-8a2c-264dc08e019e: "You have reminded me of what I lived for, dear heir. And that is a pleasant memory."
38249bf3-332b-4faf-bd75-def4b52ea0af: "Your words... It isn't just fear, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is an abomination in the eyes of the God-Emperor and all of Humanity!"
e4e7cc61-2b28-4b7b-95ae-9e598216e240: "I... I am a corpse! Stitched together... by the c-claws of the... crimson butcher... Out of others' scraps and heresy! I am heresy!"
6ea1309c-b3a9-43fc-be5a-321b9f5e655a: "Soon. I have already {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}begun the extraction{/d}. The phenomenon resists, yet its power is as nothing compared to mine."
c74ed8ef-7ad3-4de6-a216-ed7cc87acc1f: Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski did not leave the Lord Captain to fight the monster alone and personally showed up to help.
1e8924c3-0e42-4c97-abe5-10c2c70ba35b: {n}She instantly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you. Her eyes glinting, Juvenna von Valancius gives you a bright and bloodthirsty smile, devoid of even a hint of warmth.{/n} "I cannot deny that I have been looking forward to this meeting."
e466a763-dac0-4f2b-9f14-e5c53674ba92: "Khhh... Not au-tho-rised. Ac-cess den-ied." {n}The trachea expels a few gelatinous clots of blood, after which the words become clearer:{/n} "Authorisation of unit Eogunn Februs required."
31dd549e-38bb-490b-bdab-7e223e35d7e4: Deep within the mysterious cube, a phantom image is shrouded in a swirling green haze. The image flickers and shimmers, as if trying to solidify, but it disintegrates into a mass of glinting lights before it can take shape.
cf6c1065-c45d-4a0c-b176-12c50fd68f0c: "I am enclosing the phenomenon you call Nomos within a tesseract for subsequent transport to the Museion. The phenomenon will remain confined until I have prepared everything necessary to preserve it permanently as an exhibit, one immune to the ravages of entropy."
d2557867-75f3-49d0-9a5a-a7c0725a57c2: "No thanks are necessary. It grieves me that Laria remains a hostage of Trazyn."
813bc34a-3d6e-48a0-b0f7-77e2bf68ed83: "The xenosect infected the patterns of this place long ago — I would not be surprised to learn that the forbidden technologies were born deep in the bowels of the station, guided by a traitor's hand."
8d950b1e-46e2-40a9-b368-470933decf2b: The Lord Captain has arrived just in time — the Cage, the world's main settlement, has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity.
e3e013b5-8b24-412d-9c28-aeb8fd2f905d: "So, to the topic. I have never understood why some thinkers present this question as something profound, when the answer is utterly trivial. The meaning of life is determined by a person's position in the hierarchy of the Imperium and where he or she is deployed. But, ultimately, what it comes down to is supporting the functioning of the system."
73ce6cd0-6d45-4452-b141-21628036e6df: "I do not think that is the best solution. Shall we hear other opinions?"
55ac5d95-64cb-4c13-9974-9a1abf311e4c: {n}For some time, Seberian is silent, and only the hum of the mechanisms sustaining his body can be heard. At last, he raises a hand and gestures to himself with an elegant flourish.{/n} "The reason stands before you. From the day I obtained the Warrant, everything I have done was for the good of the dynasty. To bring prosperity to our protectorate, I would sacrifice anything — including myself. The countless battles I endured took their toll upon my body, and soon frail flesh was replaced with implants."
2d21a7d2-d3c7-40cb-b71c-579ca9e5207d: {n}Seberian flexes his fingers on his weapon.{/n} "Bold words. Let's see if our dynasty can live up to your braggadocio."
826a6663-21ec-45bd-aed0-8d00640e8a09: {n}The projection fluctuates and begins to dim.{/n} "The time has come to clean up the remnants of the failed exhibit that is the von Valancius breed. And I will see to it personally — now."
6846a089-0ed7-4c4b-94e6-78baff859e2f: "It will be done... Lord Captain, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} are detecting {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} vessels! They're closing in!"
79ecb6a9-de9d-437e-bf93-8e1ab20be06e: "Do you truly believe the meaning of existence can be reduced to one's function?"
93ae710c-b363-402b-8890-ed9b3ba0b6e3: Tip the scales in favour of Laria
0ae91f8c-cc42-49ab-b157-7f0e63e548ff: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "The pain... will fade... The dynasty's banner! My duty..."
660ba038-42bd-43fc-b6d0-702ca44e628a: "I have considered countless combinations of possible actions, circumstances, and probabilities. Alas, thus far the most solid and predictable solution is self-destruction. Note that I am not suggesting that you take this route."
80af06cf-b08f-4351-8f05-08b9e2fd0b5f: {n}You are in your chambers enjoying some long-awaited rest, when you are struck by a strange sensation, something at the level of animal instinct. The doors seem to be locked, and no one could have entered your chambers without your knowledge, and yet... you are not alone.{/n}
aabe860a-97ef-4da3-9965-cb81663c750b:
There was no time to waste. As soon as the guardians saw us, the pyramid's faces lit up with countless chains of glyphs and ripples ran along the walls of the hall as they prepared to release hordes of metal monstrosities.
It was then that...
6c21c114-76de-46b3-9372-4fe01066e1cf: {n}Seberian masters his shock and fixes you with a baleful glare.{/n} "Have your wits returned to you, {name}? Excellent. Now, be so good as to explain why you, who name yourself a Rogue Trader von Valancius, would so readily surrender a kinsman to a mortal enemy? I find it difficult to believe you are truly my descendant."
7e484a88-1f1f-4623-8242-d2a01b534675: "Not long enough to be tired. I only just relieved Sauerback. The one who's been assigned to keep an eye on us all, but who can't even follow the uniform regulations. He got himself all dirty the other day dragging enemy corpses."
7b232bc0-688e-4dc6-90e2-746928912a2d: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} hovering nearby stares silently at the priest.{/n}
21026bb8-0e1e-44df-b991-e26a461ce283: {n}Eogunn turns away, as if he finds it unbearable to watch the creature's torment.{/n}
72323051-4fd9-48c1-840c-1b3d6e254808: The Deathwatch remained only a legend, and for many years none of the powers that be in the Koronus Expanse received so much as a whisper of the mysterious Chapter's activities. If this was connected to Captain Zorael, forever lost among the prismatic galleries of the Infinite Museion, none can say.
c9624e66-1abf-4d09-99cb-a547d5c79ae9: "Wow! Are all the machines operational now? Funnily enough, this place has started to look even creepier than before!"
0a23336a-b82a-4d35-a6fb-40db46eb4071: "This is an order from Juvenna von Valancius."
06a96e29-36a4-4c77-a845-3666931a3be9: This xenos looks like a living chemical manufactorum: viscous fluids pulsate beneath its thick hide.
4fcfedc6-2006-4865-9587-4f553c3af3e7:
Some {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augments{/g} have galvanisation abilities. Using a galvanisation ability allows an augment to operate beyond its normal limits, but at the cost of severe strain on the user.
Only one augment can be set to galvanise at a time.
If a body part with an installed augment suffers {g|Encyclopedia:Traumas}trauma{/g}, that augment malfunctions, losing its positive effects and the galvanisation ability.
095f7003-9581-44db-bcf6-9ede3e663c94:
The user gains the {g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Force Couple (Enemy){/g} and the {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Force Couple (Ally){/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}.
{g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Force Couple (Enemy){/g} allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after the pull.
Using either of those abilities sets both of them on {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g}.
f447beee-7623-41e0-b5c8-d3d263cb4dd5: "It's not worth it. You can try to prolong existence indefinitely, but after a certain point, such existence can scarcely be called life."
a298360b-e911-4497-9c91-a8a58db31af6: {n}The blood instantly soaks through the bandages, staining them a deep crimson. Contrary to expectation, the bleeding does not stop — the viscous fluid continues to ooze from beneath the dressings. Laria pushes your hand aside.{/n} "Leave it. Save the medicae supplies for your people. Wasting them on me is... pointless."
01010b7c-2761-4f91-8afe-fab4ec756f4c: "The trajectory of your curiosity is troubling, Genetor Februs. A few more questions like that, and I will be moved to take an interest in the nature of your research."
3c9305b5-9d6a-48d9-87df-ee30427c36fd: The medicae assessment confirms the Rogue Trader remains in sound health.
b3deffef-9a31-495c-a788-4b57183f249e: {n}Deep bass notes carrying genuine reverence rumble in Ferrenz's hiss.{/n} "I am inclined to conclude that the archeotech augmentation machine harbours a spirit that blesses all things around it with the grace of the Omnissiah." {n}The Genetor sweeps a mechadendrite over the space around him.{/n} "Its nodes and pistons are filled with the wisdom of the Machine God, unfathomable to humble adepts, and if entropy consumes the spirit entirely, such wisdom will be lost."
0294ab42-1fea-45b7-b4b6-7e22ee405516: "And what kind of xenos do you study?"
b79c102a-d07e-4be1-8129-146e6a5cdaac: As soon as the squad captain touches the man, he jerks back his head, ripping his lips from the tube with a sickening snap of skin. The bridge fills with the madman's bloodcurdling howls, but within minutes he breathes his last, convulsing and spewing black foam.
5ade80d1-d52e-477e-a28c-31d7eead57ff: "Do you pretend that my reproaches do not concern you, {name}? A feeble stance. This conversation becomes meaningless, as you stubbornly refuse to see the true state of affairs and instead indulge merely your own illusions. Very well, let us return to this discussion later, in a more suitable setting."
2ab28fd3-7beb-4478-9482-95473c30a1eb: {n}A brief trill of farewell comes from the vox. The Genetor turns away, but the visor on the back of his head keeps watching you.{/n}
c04bbeea-85ec-49fe-9c59-f1b81cbbfddd: "I do not belong in this time. I am a relic now, a vestige of the past whom a freak turn of events landed in the present." {n}A deep, sorrowful resonance fills your ancestor's mechanical voice.{/n} "I am no fool and no madman, so I accept my lot. I want but one final thing, and that is to discontinue this accursed cycle. It is my gift to the protectorate, {name}. The only one this decrepit body of mine can give."
828c0ef3-a1df-4880-a10c-047ab960ea07: {n}It is a stab wound from a glancing blow — a long and narrow blade pierced and tore through the skin. The swelling and various injuries to the blood vessels make the injury look far more gruesome than it is. If a shard from a frag grenade really had struck him, it would have taken out a good third of Sauerback's skull.{/n}
cdf6d830-f1a2-4093-a28d-0f901621b0dd: "Lukha told me what you did for Jovakha. You cannot imagine how important a drill sergeant is to the 32nd Regiment. Thank you."
11154ab0-6d05-4965-b22e-6d297f95db28: "Lord Captain? I'm no layabout... I'll work my shift! Death's no excuse for idleness... But my h-h-heart... give it back, I beg you!" {n}The young man digs his broken nails into his chest augment and makes a pitiful attempt to rip it out. He breaks down weeping, swaying from side to side.{/n}
9e9a206f-bedf-48d1-a364-cf2a77793dae: [Hand over the gate codes to Juvenna] "Here are the codes you were looking for."
71eb5fca-fa4b-49d4-8577-7d19666560c1:
The user gains the {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} ability.
It allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after they are pulled to that enemy.
On kill, the cooldown of {g|f:5c7909d3a860457a811e3bff1e57b509}Maiming Convergence{/g} is reset.
b5caedef-9914-4e7a-b836-353bc5a4b39b: "I understand. I'm just having a little fun, shereen. I can't possibly just say, 'Oh, I like you too, {name}.' Words as dry and dull as a voidsman's dinner. They are unworthy of us."
8537afc9-08bc-4835-8cb3-bc69e0a55591: "Reports say that many of the metal xenos adorned with flesh show signs of terrible damage. It seems other xenos have given them a serious beating."
0a29d1b3-9069-4464-bff2-888173128b40: "Our oath of loyalty, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. When you return victorious from the Drover's lair, Izdrig is going to challenge you... I wanted to warn you. Colonel Batoshski will fight bitterly, and you should prepare well. I once saw him drench himself in promethium and set himself on fire before fighting three of the Drover's shoots unarmed. He's a fearsome enemy."
83058f58-4737-4bd4-a028-c9a50097a607: "What do we know about the xenos?"
199da65f-ac0a-4599-b231-f92b2d58a66c: The augment is embedded in the flesh
3185a3ad-ab40-4d7a-842c-bf0de40a4339: This creature is immune to {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}.
76f6911b-78cc-440e-9d23-16a36f37ebb5: The gargantuan roots have disfigured the face of Zarkov, tearing the planet apart from within. Within the Rogue Trader's manufactorums, titanic braces of blessed adamant shall be cast. They shall bite into the planet's severed flesh and reseal it, restoring its primordial form. The toll for a unified Zarkov shall be paid in years of destructive earthquakes.
f5c0801d-d4c2-4e7a-a003-dd702845a24d: "In that case, I will ask your colleague, the Vivisector. He tends to be more accommodating than you."
8ed84395-c248-4da5-a9d0-c3e6a46903d7: "The greatest!" {n}Dunawski declares in a voice filled with the most profound conviction.{/n}
64a01f5e-7263-40ef-8040-2277eac3b1b8: {n}Great relief shows on Eogunn's face.{/n} "{name}, thank you. I hoped you would understand, though I did not expect such a generous offer. I will only ask for your mercy — do not remind me of the truth. Sooner or later, I will remember it myself. But until then, I prefer to believe that my dearest colleague is still with me. Isn't that so, Nuncius?"
c6e23dc6-78e2-4e30-ad8b-fc2a2d5ba90a: Following your orders, the scouting teams move steadily closer to the planet. The reports become shorter and tenser: radiation counters inside the shuttles are off the scale. One of the ships transmits an unusual signal to the control room: the pilot saw what appears to be an abandoned Imperial shuttle among the void debris. However, you cannot get close to it — the radiation is too strong.
78e97466-c039-49ca-982c-0e1434349567: {n}The procession of {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} and augmented officers stops a dozen paces away from your throne. A female Tech-Priest, whose robe bears marks of high distinction, steps forward, and you recognise her instantly as the ship's Drivesmaster. Her vox-distorted voice rattles solemnly throughout the deck.{/n}
2de709ec-caba-4de9-8df0-e2a8e4bad236: {n}The vox-emitters on both Tech-Priests emit brief binharic arias, signifying the end of the conversation. Pasqal and Eogunn depart swiftly, avoiding any interaction with one another.{/n}
58aba7e5-d708-4e11-908f-6c1f3fbd4bf9: "If she is the one behind all this, we need to catch her in the act passing information to the enemy — nothing less will do."
599ddbcb-66f9-4f5b-adb1-ceff91254911: "It's not for me to know, so I don't listen. But they all say the same thing: without reinforcements, we'll be in trouble. That's why I keep both ears shut — no point in stirring up fear."
ed3c577d-9303-409c-a3c7-ab7cf01419d5: {n}Before Sauerback can answer, a loud voice cuts in.{/n} "No talking among yourselves! Have I not made myself clear? Eyes on me, you bastards!" {n}The guards part slightly, and you see a man clad in voidsman armour. Most of his skull has been replaced with a cortical implant that gleams in the lumen light. The weapon clenched in his hands is aimed directly at the head of the hostage, {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz.{/n}
8f95a1de-a4df-4a44-9cd3-f550e4b77d2a: "Be careful, elantach. This path leads straight into a trap set by the Oghyr. The evil mind that rules this place is waiting for us at the top, and it will take all our strength to withstand him."
e76f3a4a-764a-4e09-8992-188ea7263922: "They are clearly of the same species, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. They resemble iron corpses, covered in vile xenoglyphs. As for their differences: the creatures from the ruins possess long claws, fight with savage ferocity, and, may the Holy Throne preserve us, the reports claim these abominations flay the skin from fallen Merovians and stretch it over their own metal bodies. Those who oppose them are indifferent to human flesh. They fight with cold, calculated precision, incinerating their foes from a distance with cumbersome energy weaponry."
9677bd88-2b89-4544-adf1-ffc3ef07b575: "...an ordinary warrior who brought the curse of Llandu'gor with him into the tomb. By falling into the Great Sleep, Pharakh thus became the source of doom for the entire tomb, turning its inhabitants into flesh-hungry degenerates."
17ab2636-b369-4b70-94b8-9e0aa6d14170: "Xenos — Aeldari in particular — like to hide their dark deeds behind such technology, shereen. Why don't we take a peek at them?"
05193b05-db24-4d72-bb77-5842ceb825e2: "What do you know of the regiment's homeworld?"
89423414-56e4-418f-8541-f7dbb0c78298: "Well, then, Dunawski, are you ready to go to the stars?"
c798669c-752a-448d-be69-44bdd5d7b37b: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve on the lower decks.
a17f9985-a4d6-4038-aa81-6cad52aef197: "You could say that. Nuncius spoke those words to me the first time we met. Now I say them to you in farewell."
4f64a011-e333-4055-a728-8a32185aa41d: While in combat, the user is under the {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} effect. It cannot be removed.
806d618e-71d4-41bd-8d14-48da3b72d45b: "Elana here. Give me a status report."
9b01d91b-f6e4-4477-8396-30c994010328: For a long time, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski managed to strategically distribute the protectorate's vanishingly small military forces, but the poor discipline of her recruits compelled her constant presence on the battlefield. During one such operation, Vedka was killed by her own regiment's misaligned gun.
01c3d856-818a-4fe4-a0ad-f835c6640c6e: "The three star systems in the Cinerus Maleficum that have come into my possession in my journeys shall henceforth be known as the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta. These are new horizons that have never before known Humanity's rule and whose rogue xenos overlords obliged me greatly by having already eliminated each other. The artefacts they left behind, a legacy of sorts, are priceless. A blade I took off a desiccated Aeldari corpse on one of the Fortis Porta worlds carries immense power within it, and it is but one among a wealth of relics."
b3adba99-e1da-460d-93a3-3b5d1ff14f80: {n}By the time you reach the hangar, the shuttle has already been properly readied. A young pilot offers you a respectful bow and makes the sign of the Aquila in greeting. You proceed into the stifling passenger compartment that smells of sacred unguents and leather.{/n}
0e7933c8-6d55-4810-b7c8-24e249794d5a: "I am delighted to see you returned, colleague. The lack of fiery debate has dulled my wits and left my mind unsettled. At Nuncius's insistence, I also encourage you to perform your wound care in a non-laboratory setting insofar as possible."
168f1ec9-ce66-44b7-badb-f91041bbc4d8: {n}Marazhai sweeps his gaze across those assembled. His narrow, gaunt face is filled with barely restrained ecstasy and a hazy veil of euphoria creeps over his eyes.{/n} "If only you knew how sweet your terror and fury are... and how much of it there is... Exquisite!"
428802c2-cdfb-40eb-8731-4ff1cee58864: {n}Eogunn looks in confusion at the servo-skull in your hands, then over his shoulder{/n}. "But... How... No. It cannot be. Because I can hear him." {n}His lips quiver, and his fists clench and unclench. He looks pitiful, lost. Pressing his fingers to his temples, he squeezes his eyes shut, straining desperately to remember something. Suddenly, his eyes fly open and you hear a strangled moan. He looks at you, dumbfounded.{/n}
01ba1bee-9ab7-4640-b989-255a95bac319: {n}The Astartes frowns doubtfully.{/n} "If I have not defeated him, you should not even attempt it. But if you do find yourself in combat with him..."
62ba27c2-dce0-4d17-9cb2-1c530467d804: "I will make you eat your words." {n}Seberian unsheathes his sword, giving you time to assume a defensive stance, and strikes — hard, but slow enough for you to parry it.{/n}
352b4ba3-2e80-40fb-b406-75273815a76f: "Instrument? The very artefact that caused all this?"
cf9b0982-3f90-4339-9946-ca3058fbcd1d: {n}Eogunn rubs his hands together in eagerness.{/n} "Splendid! It has been a long time since I last had a worthy opponent!" {n}He casts a quick glance in Nuncius's direction.{/n} "Not including my dearest colleague, of course."
571e0fbe-efb7-4fef-9edd-6c4729eb048a: {n}Your ancestor lets out a morose chuckle.{/n} "Well. Perhaps none of this has been worth the effort from the start.... I will ask one thing of my heir — protect the dynasty. Protect—"
980bd39a-6190-487e-a197-bf4fb56b3164: This creature marks the target, reducing its {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} by −40%.
eb2a9a3d-7e49-4c43-856e-80b155b90beb: "Dead matter, partially transformed into phantoms, frozen outside the cycle of time. What a strange urge to collect without limit... Why does this Oghyr surround himself with all these objects?"
2fb0a514-af0b-4998-b8dc-63152f1b41d6: {n}You are unsure what mechanisms are embedded within the skull, but even without the necessary expertise, you can clearly tell something is wrong. A viscous, opalescent sludge oozes out of Nuncius's eye sockets, dropping to the floor in globs.{/n}
71894e1f-2914-4124-8e8c-e834c30f1bf1: "You, I see, are adept at playing courtly games yourself. Good. I shall await your sign, my dear."
eb94cc16-639d-4961-b741-c338662d64c5: "On your knees, you negligent worm! You will recount every detail to me, or else you will lose your head."
4234e87c-57dd-47a7-b1c2-5a08d8bfe71e: A crowd of rabble has blocked access to the medicae facility. Investigate what caused the commotion.
ae7c3174-bd5b-4de0-b53b-ba351de80d4f: You entrusted the governance of Zarkov to Captain-Quartermaster Vedka Dunawski.
a4abfd76-a75a-47b9-aacc-0dba636d764e: {n}A cluster of flowers has bloomed across the remains of the unfortunate {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agent of the Golden Throne{/g}, having literally drained the last of his life-fluids. A miraculously unscathed vox-scribe rests within his inner pocket.{/n}
4e74a9ea-eac4-4e10-8908-05fc04250155: You can switch between party members using the arrows at the top of the inventory screen or clicking {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on a character's portrait. Item descriptions contain comparisons with any corresponding items already equipped by the character.
272dd384-fad2-4935-9f2b-400bfd40af1c: "Has the shift back to realspace affected your nervous system as well, impairing your mnemonic abilities? I have made alterations to your mind so that I may observe how you make use of your trophy. No one but you can see or hear my projection. You do not want your subjects to think you have gone mad, so just accept your new role as my viewpoint."
8abe1824-a1db-44bd-919c-2492ca360f79: "Eogunn, to whom are you speaking? You are holding the servo-skull."
cf40128f-8e3a-4c0d-be9e-7dbda0881301: {n}Eogunn gazes benevolently upon the Cold Trader.{/n} "Well, an agile intellect paired with impulsivity, rapid neural reactions, and untainted judgement constitutes a somewhat rare assembly of phenotypic characteristics. Her yearning toward the comprehension of... unorthodox technologies is furthermore indicative of an extraordinary perspective."
588138c3-6634-418b-b307-51be97c7b1fc: "Spare me your petty bickering. Pasqal, what exactly has Eogunn done?"
07c24a1a-b168-45a3-b19b-6cfbe45ba323: "I will create a Triasomata of myself, Nuncius, and xenotechnology. The previous attempt was a failure, but since then, I have realised the true reasons for it — Imperial technology alone is not enough to restrain this corruption. I must resort to forbidden knowledge. There are still samples of our Necron finds here. They will allow me to perform the perfect transfer."
f0100c68-ff1b-4ec5-8b4a-5d5974330353: [Address the skull in Eogunn's hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"
679f1933-56a4-44f4-b51f-1a8399e623e5: {n}Batoshski gives a vicious grin.{/n} "Here in the Cage, we don't even have half a company, it's true, though you haven't seen the whole lot: some have been cut off by the Drover's siege, and others I've stashed away just in case. Still, we have plenty of smaller outposts scattered across the world, transit points for hunting units and all kinds of other strongholds. So even if we all die here by the God-Emperor's will, the rest of the regiment will live."
5f640191-292c-4369-901b-a649bd2b3147: {n}It all looks so real... but if you listen closely, you cannot hear the thrumming of the hive. Even in the thick of war, it should be audible. Such a masterful reproduction! A question arises unbidden in your mind: would it not be easier to live out these hours in blissful ignorance, just as the others do? After all, with each repetition, your actions would only become more familiar, more practised. As if you were slowly turning into a {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g}.{/n}
4802ff2e-9ba4-457b-946b-7bcb044a7f15: "I presume this isn't a ceremonial visit?"
bfa6a6eb-087e-4d82-999c-efe1d94d317e: "A Tech-Priest of the Adeptus Mechanicus, quantity: one. Organic limbs: standard quantity. Mechadendrites: within normative parameters. Head..." {n}The clerk squints at Nuncius.{/n} "One unit in excess of the required complement. I will log this with the annotation 'recommended for removal.'"
14d5cbb3-3841-4b85-8599-44a65cf2f2ff: Jae gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} if she has less than 30% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}.
3b7cd153-afa8-4ea8-b3a4-4f938d98d6fb: You discussed the origins of the servo-skull named Nuncius with the Haemonculus Tervantias.
b1078598-0c45-455d-b69c-acca70076079: {n}A barrage of hissing discharges surges from Eogunn's mechadendrites and hull, enveloping the prisoner in a dazzling, lethal web. The biting smell of ozone drifts through the air, mingling with the thick vapour of burning hair. Strange, livid scars swell up on the man's skin one after another, branching in different directions, as if the current were burning its way through his flesh. {/n}
b5203054-03b0-49dc-9cd9-e727d60f2aaa: {n}The Magos's exhaustive explanation, replete with numbers and obscure terms, takes some time. When your head begins to spin from the volume of information, he makes the first move — just by stating two words.{/n}
85ee0ead-2348-4d06-a77b-f3bbf1d52181: "I've noticed that your common servants are fond of complaining about their lives. The filth, the hunger, sharing a single bunk between several people... My soldiers are asking if they can expect the same living conditions as the rest of the crew?"
e0df6c87-8f5c-4361-8245-451f7c00f8aa: "The Sauerback name should stand beside that of the von Valancius. But only if it does not bear the stain of xenoheresy. I must stand aside so that justice may be done."
395c357c-f063-40b8-9dd9-dc9963cc4b16: {n}An alarming howl echoes through the bowels of the voidship. A few minutes later, the Vox Master reports that every single {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psyker{/g} on the ship has fallen into a strange silent trance, and their life forces are rapidly fading.{/n}
ff015afe-82dd-46d8-a448-28fef0dc8564: The evidence points to Isimond. Whether it is enough to convince Laria of the enforcer's guilt is still to be seen.
8bab5016-c643-4f92-af2c-7f5828220f64: "You have to leave us now, Nomos. We will speak no more."
4c76ad64-edda-466f-b99d-964d6dbea3f1: "Is this some special kind of Tech-Priest self-torture?"
2c565c10-f89f-4568-b85c-50112dba1108: As long as the commissar is alive, this creature gains +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.
fdc9588f-0452-44d6-adb0-6b8e0a31a255: "That explains a great many things. In particular, the fact that no mention of him survives in the official histories." {n}A tense furrow forms on Janris's brow.{/n} "I suppose there must be something dark and nefarious behind all this, far more than we can even guess."
2560adf2-68ec-4303-8156-e58df79626c4: "At last, we can set out for the stars!"
5e6cbb7a-bef2-4b9f-8b2c-1c4dec871c70: "Firstly, I must boldly warn you that, until the relic that powers the Sector Bionica with the miraculous knowledge of the Omnissiah is healed... to my deepest sorrow, the installation of sacred implants cannot be performed." {n}For all his florid speech — more typical of a noble than a chirurgeon — Martinax speaks with genuine sadness.{/n}
3edf2f23-7d1d-48b8-a3f1-7c0b30828da3: "Struggling, striving to be at the top of the food chain. An understandable answer. But at the root of that urge lies another, more primitive one."
5efc7ff7-0e3f-4364-96fc-3f659581abf2: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy. If they have two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
2786325b-b3be-45af-8a5b-5f6cf3f6bac9: "Oksilda Tavanti is primarily interested in the origin of species, the mechanisms of evolution — and in interfering with its course. The vast majority of her interests find no practical application. Then again, her devotion to the Quest for Knowledge sometimes leads to breakthroughs in biological mysteries."
da7318a0-0ae9-4b5c-95fb-5bcdbf14bbf0: A Tech-Priest who carries within their body a galvanic cell, a reservoir of the Motive Force. The Manipulus's mechadendrites control this sacred energy, taking it from some machines and giving it to others.
50ab4a68-e6b6-4f3e-953b-e3ffe6f31a2d: {n}The captain-quartermaster meets the colonel's eyes and steps forward.{/n} "The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment was requisitioned centuries ago by Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. During an expedition to GH-89-717, which is now called Zarkov, the Lord Captain was lost in the roots. His retinue brought the Final Order, boarded the ship, and did not return. We have waited ever since. We have waited for you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"
34e356d6-4eea-47ff-a297-b5ed52bd89e3: One of the most illustrious Chapters in the Adeptus Astartes. Masters of lightning-fast, powerful attacks, the Astartes of this legion are the elite strike force of the Imperium. The divine fury bestowed upon these Astartes by their progenitor transforms the Chapter's assault troops into true angels of vengeance, mercilessly crushing the enemies of the Imperium.
62f1fb1a-5ab9-46bf-8129-f171a25b16c9: {n}The High Factotum sighs in relief.{/n} "I humbly await your arrival."
5386aff7-9c0d-4009-ba53-de6c3e3874ad: {n}The Haemonculus's face betrays nothing but contemptuous arrogance.{/n} "You have but a few moments of my precious time, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Speak."
6620cbf6-5467-42b4-b4d4-bd876dc1eb0b: "Thus we honour our heroes. With each Call-Up, the song grows, line by line, name by name. It began with Sergeant Zarkov, the first commander to rise from the ranks of the common penal conscripts. We named this world in his honour. The greatest honour is to be enshrined in the lines of the Hymn after death."
5b4b8fbe-6f37-48d1-b617-4aa57e90c820: "This life form assesses this as a consequence of the successful application of the reinvigorating litanies that restored potency to the machine spirit."
d0e80fec-d3db-49a4-91f9-fa26e15b8b69: {n}Juvenna's arrest plays out before your eyes once again like a well-rehearsed play, after which you return to the Seneschal's post to continue the conversation.{/n}
ef3ab4b2-515a-44cf-b3ea-7434c1865fd4: {n}The patient's clouded gaze is locked on the woman's face, the corners of his parted lips stretching into the faint semblance of a smile. His mother stares back, almost without blinking.{/n}
b22e6624-ce93-4c42-b8e7-5de126f98194: {n}After Seberian's departure, the bridge remains abuzz for some time with the commotion caused by the sudden appearance of this new member of the von Valancius dynasty.{/n}
fdcefb66-0890-4389-ae0b-9ab5e9c212e1: In the strange light, the bizarre creature seemed to move on its pedestal. The creature's small eyes stare malevolently into space.
a5d63a34-0114-4c10-8649-8730a91cd84e: The Haemonculus showed no mercy even to his own kind. The decapitated Drukhari stands rigidly to attention, as if on duty.
54ae567c-801e-4b8b-a9f3-02deed7c9272: "Janur tells me you've seen them already. You'll recognise it at once, it's a long vine with thorns on the end." {n}The colonel bares several ugly scars on his arm.{/n} "It carves you up deep, you'll bleed to death before you can blink. The creature can also spit its sucker at you — one slip-up and you're a shrivelled husk. If you manage to hack it up good, it'll try to dive back into the roots to regrow elsewhere. But there's a trick to it. Catch it with a burst of fire, and the mace loses its nerve and stays put."
a4a08d87-35cd-452a-bc93-4b7e9685f711: "The Drivestems shall observe this performance from the wings. Juvenna, my dear, let us allow the Inquisitor to clear any superfluous pieces from the board."
3859ae99-0f89-47c0-9a2e-fa39f940be52: Seberian places too much trust in the xenos blade. This prevents him from relying upon his allies.
a6f39c10-ab4c-4b49-9a37-6978137d1134: The Warrant dais is now empty, a silent testimony to the terrible sacrilege committed against the von Valancius dynasty.
0f057ca9-64e3-4143-a6b4-c84f3d4e0b8a: An ancient xenos weapon crafted with breathtaking skill.
5d9d6547-6275-4a29-bd97-5791c654d1a6: The Inquisition needs the Rogue Trader's help to induce Seberian to negotiate.
f53bc9a9-1b8d-4ac7-9df5-07168d01d0a1: "Utter madness. Superior strength does not necessarily make the best commander."
ece51389-a7cf-43ba-af9e-85bcb0467662: "Stray shard. A frag grenade explosion grazed me. Thank the Throne my eye is intact, or the enforcers would have lost one of their few competent commanders."
04c5e252-745b-4d3f-b37d-deee5915b915: "Are there any active alarms? Enemy ships?"
ffb9005e-5cee-428a-bb5a-8330fafa573e: "Sister Argenta, show the Merovians how to properly burn out xenoheresy."
346322eb-bb81-4b0c-9315-204f002e6f87: "It was wise to agree with my decision — I know a thing or two about surviving inside a Kabal and reaching the top of it."
f5949614-0540-4f4e-be67-13d086a6728b: [Reflect on the Processional of the Damned]
6d80a7d7-7d50-4259-baf9-ab413ffd73ef: "Mikosh, can a person who sacrificed himself for others be without a heart? It may beat differently, but it does still beat. I believe in you, and everyone you saved believes in you too. Do you?"
71b27b3b-4875-4006-a855-ac52111da8ba: {n}Coughing up blood, Eogunn collapses heavily to the floor.{/n} "The Triasomata... is complete. Nuncius is in me."
c9f857b1-782e-4301-a93b-723a5dd20f6c: If you look closely, you will notice a subtle engram pattern covering the entire surface of the device. The intricate pattern gleams slightly from within.
92481ec4-5960-4607-a063-0d8b71d7565c: "Why do you believe they are alive?"
24013c83-9321-4fdc-a1e3-3659926b81f5: "Hypothetically, if a lumen burned out in my chambers, could your galvanic cell revive it?"
5e945959-7f20-4479-9aa4-5d0cf3872689: During the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} of combat, the user gains +{uip|DeflectionFirstTurn|420670148c0941c88c9730debf8fa4ca} {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}. {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}Augments{/g} in their somatic insertion are considered to be 2 augments.
ee833f94-0785-4216-a336-673178a58982: Help Governor Batoshski fend off the attack.
ffe70d55-4a63-400a-bca6-600b1418cdcb: "I'm waiting for the promised raid, my {mf|lord|lady}. I'm on tenterhooks here."
fdbfcfad-9fc5-4bbf-a8ff-16be46a13ff2: "Yet more evidence of Seberian's expedition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Another loyal servant of the dynasty who gave his life for his Lord Captain." {n}Abelard's voice resounds with pride at the sight of this deceased retinue member.{/n}
b01138f4-b333-4e70-8e94-eae6bc27c821: "Incoming request from layperson {name} von Valancius: access denied. Priority: continuous implementation of reanimation protocols. Status of patient Genetor Ferrenz: critical."
f617d640-d028-4a38-b41e-1451c87c6548: {n}The guardian's vid-screen flickers just slightly.{/n} "Error. The request is invalid. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."
d4927754-4389-4a56-bc1b-ee45b21d3abc: "Locked away in the laboratory, I tried to find ways to reverse the artefact's effects. None of them worked. I turned to the xenos, demanding information — with threats, requests, pleas. But its only response was contemptuous silence. I was utterly powerless. And then I decided to flee."
095a8213-d48e-4f13-ab52-a51d0e114d4b: "A wise decision, Lord Captain. It is good to see genuine concern for your investm— the protectorate."
2b235516-fbc2-47e8-bde8-81506d3b8467: "Why would supply troops need to know about poisons?"
10ad909b-d491-4d65-a2ef-8efafda7152a: {n}After listening to you, Juvenna matter-of-factly says,{/n} "Sergeant, get rid of them."
fd759749-be72-480b-8d97-07744161ed02: {n}You cannot miss the admiring gaze that glides over your augments. In this moment, Dunawski looks like a devout pilgrim who has suddenly found herself among saints' relics.{/n}
eeadfe03-4e26-4aad-89f4-c6072df3e2a2: {n}Both Tech-Priests turn toward the servo-skull, which has not uttered a single word. Pasqal glares malevolently while Eogunn opens his mouth to object, then thinks better of it.{/n}
4d3f8097-39c4-4df1-befd-9c27cb383921: "She has the will of the God-Emperor on her side. What other support does she need?"
0cdc0599-b35f-4326-a515-7942bc0d607d: "Why do you wish to do this?"
24ba8aa5-5d74-4d23-ba92-bae68e6945d6: "Knowledge received and processed, Protocol 12.1 demands the immediate destruction of the source of the xenoheresy. Object 16, the central drill complex, must be destroyed. Now." {n}The Tech-Priest points an iron claw at the sparking mechanism into the depths of which her other multi-jointed hand is lowered.{/n} "The assistance of the laity is not required."
e92bbea5-b2ad-4bd7-b93c-a706aac11df5: "I am the Triasomata, redemption from death. Nuncius and I are forever one, I will not be parted from him again." {n}Looking somewhere beyond you, Eogunn smiles blissfully.{/n} "I am so glad I was finally able to save you, dearest colleague."
4978afc0-a49e-49e1-9193-61bec7035203: "Perhaps after having the xenos' methods used on you, your appetite for studying them will have dwindled. At least, one can only hope."
97cf98b7-8198-41e9-9650-bc9207223023: Abelard deals +5% more damage for each ally still in combat within a 3-cell radius around him.
784ce009-3e72-4163-b109-db90d2fda62e: "Whoever they are... prepare the shuttle for landing."
4892dcd3-1eb1-4138-a3c6-ff9dd79d94f5: The dynasty's significantly depleted military forces required more and more recruits. Veteran soldiers struggled to train the fresh blood, and discipline and skill deteriorated as a result, turning the army into a chaotic horde of armed commoners.
7f1ac24d-8d3a-42d9-890c-cb7a7d923ab5: {n}The chains of symbols are perversely beautiful, but utterly beyond human comprehension. The technology of the denizens of this place would baffle even an ordained servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}.{/n}
bfd9875f-768f-482e-ab18-cc2620599c59: "I grant you permission to deal with him yourself, but do not trouble me further on this matter."
5ba13375-756e-4e4e-bd3a-8f8918188057: "Is the melodrama over? Can we leave now?"
99b58c29-284e-406e-a6e7-1f1a808aa3d0:
Jae cannot suffer from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}.
At the start of combat, she suffers {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (4).
34f1b9ce-17ff-4e94-962e-48e213a628f1: This creature suffers −10 Weapon Skill and −10 Ballistic Skill for 1 round. Stacks up to 2 times.
7c397652-844e-4580-848c-c44b89741195: "Sergeant, your regiment needs you. My death will not affect its fate. Yours will. Go."
8c1416b7-7534-434f-92a0-1284c320a9d9:
All creatures in a 6-cell cone in front of Eogunn suffer {uip|DamageDealt|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} with {uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3}% armour penetration. The affected targets suffer +{uip|ArmorPen|fbca800b9c8d46c0a22a7cf5982984f3} stacks of {g|f:7e42fcb1d83040e38e8d68d7edd96375}echopulse{/g} until the end of combat.
Eogunn gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} for each target affected.
11a313fc-9ad7-435e-9f87-16a0e77ec9dd: "This is not enough. I need the anchor-core."
696f0846-45ec-4ad4-92f1-90506cb5b69a: "If we accept this statement as truth, we face a dilemma: is this a manifestation of the divine, or... its opposite? I cannot solve it, Rogue Trader."
549e7d7b-67df-4253-bee6-5b725cc3c093: {n}Dunawski bites her lip, her gaze turning distant before regaining that steely look once more. She nods grimly to you.{/n} "You are right, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. May the God-Emperor protect you."
a9c3db8b-e16e-41a2-a609-e8cff3e18633: The design of this antique device is intricate and inscrutable. Judging by the rust on some of its parts, it has not been used to the fullest extent for some time.
e2d88513-24ef-4926-bd31-cead3e56e8d4: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"
2e43bd18-4441-40b2-abff-7bdccf495050: "I'll handle the other settlements, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Best you head to the Cage. Janur and the governor are there, they'll tell you how things stand."
db258f94-d184-4685-ad5d-e28faf834ee3: "Another tin can on board. My little whispers say this one is far more interesting than the old one, but they all look the same to me."
edf37b63-0a51-4336-93b4-7faff9bbc046: The killer has been arrested, but the reasons that drove them to take such a risk remain unclear. The Rogue Trader may yet attempt to find the answer.
bca33581-3811-4904-acaa-0b435e552b77: "Confirming attempted disruption of retrocausality, classified as a minor chronoanomaly. Investigation is impossible due to the tech-heretical nature of the offending entity. Eradication of the anomaly is impossible due to its absence from the field of view."
e3381610-d20b-4ff3-92a8-0bd4992909ed: "As I approached the camp, I heard a song."
36d44d11-7d3b-4ddc-948c-eef0f744f391: "But of course! We simply need to trigger a rapid release of a vast amount of energy in a confined space. To put it plainly, we blow it to the warp!" {n}Eogunn grins with sudden enthusiasm.{/n} "I recommend melta charges. If memory serves, there should be a crate outside; it may still hold a few."
b3990dcd-3fec-40f2-8b89-768a758e8943: The installation of implants in ordinary people became so widespread in the protectorate that the practice ceased to be an oddity. The devotion of the common folk, eager to repay their ruler for the resources {mf|he|she} had spent on them, enabled the dynasty to rebuild and strengthen many of its possessions. But the number of incidents caused by negligently installed or poorly maintained implants soared. The lower decks of the Rogue Trader's flagship teemed with half-decayed subjects seeking salvation in yet more metal. The culmination of this was a plague epidemic that cut down thousands upon thousands of unfortunates in one ill-fated warp jump.
cf5ff37b-46f5-4b4c-a4f5-477e50602061: {n}The creature, which a second ago resembled a humanoid lump of bloody meat studded with metal, suddenly leaps up with unexpected vigour, tossing Eogunn backward and letting out an unintelligible howl of suffering. Before anyone can react, the amalgam man barrels toward the entrance of the Sector Bionica, filling the deserted corridors with his plaintive moans.{/n}
eecef437-53c2-45dd-8ff0-6dacbd8ab720: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Have the Drovers lured into positions that can be fired upon from orbit and destroy them with our lance battery."
697d143d-3f2d-483e-a8d3-9dacdeba3f7d: "It is more than just 'not enough.' It is woefully inadequate, mon-keigh. I want your kinsman to grasp the true depth of his worthlessness and I wish to behold it first-hand."
016810db-4a67-4eb9-a4ed-9681187913ee: "Defeat? You have deprived me of an insignificant branch of my Museion. Your 'victory' is only that you managed to keep my attention on you for too long."
5a535ca6-7e9c-44d0-bf9d-f2ed169bbce7: "The worker produces or processes a resource, the soldier destroys enemies, the governor ensures order and the shipment of tithes. The meaning of my life is to advance the Quest for Knowledge, thus fulfilling the function granted to me by the Omnissiah. As I said, an utterly unoriginal question."
db8d09f4-4f7d-42f6-b098-4f5b115d1ef7: {n}Vigdis addresses you with reserve, almost coldly:{/n} "Lord Captain, the flagship is at the calculated arrival point. No unexpected incidents have been detected during the translation. Full battle readiness has been confirmed. The senior officers are listening and awaiting your orders."
cae9ad0e-38dd-49fa-a5d8-b81914ef7f32: {n}The Tech-Priest caste has ever been poorly understood by ordinary folk, so it is difficult to discern the workings of the heart of one dedicated to serving the Machine God — especially when that servant is treading on a document signed by the God-Emperor, proclaimed as the Omnissiah by Mars itself.{/n}
ccb387fd-d9da-40bd-bc64-26fb92a08c98: "In addition, only the Rogue Trader or persons authorised by the Rogue Trader may use it. It is an invaluable investment in your longevity and... bodily integrity."
c8f5e8ba-ee38-4853-a8e6-aeb2330a664e: "I would like to note that I share their sentiments. Thank you for your diligent attention to augment maintenance for the senior officers and my family personally. Machines replace our flesh in the name of our service to the dynasty, and your regard for us is of incomparable value."
802bdbd2-2d12-4458-a820-4d196019dad1: Until the end of combat, whenever this augment's effect triggers, the user also gains +1 stack of {g|f:ce28ef2855c54dc8a41c2398646b4259}pain incarnate{/g}. If an ally that suffered {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} has less than 50% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, the user also gains +1 stack of {g|f:d228419784924585898297e8f5fbf0fd}restitched flesh{/g}.
b17a76a5-ce27-46c0-80f0-d1be667a4202: "Your time is a resource far rarer than any precious metal, Lord Captain. I dare not detain you any longer."
a040876d-5032-4444-855d-2ef867a30037: "The Vivisector from the Sector Bionica was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."
380c11db-b7e5-4bd4-abcb-8fb477081961: A few pages torn from the diary are covered in hurried lines in Low Gothic.
655206a6-1a62-417c-9452-1d45e11a1d8f: {n}The ominous buzzing of the awakened emitters echoes through the room. The green beams converge concentrically on the figure in the centre of the platform, turning the warrior into an ephemeral, frozen ghost. Until his last second, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} stares at you without making a sound.{/n}
20e05cc9-bda3-4f68-8b1f-9892ea8e5910: A target hit by this weapon suffers −15% armour and −1 deflection for each stack of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}, lasting until the end of combat. This weapon reduces all positive effects granted by {g|f:2abd304b486d4b7c9ab2ee0465388769}Living Metal{/g} by −50%.
cd5d381c-0fb4-49f9-bc67-2cd8aa3f7d69: "Comb every inch of the outpost. If any of the House Gaprak people arrived here with news, but never got past the Merovian outpost, you must find out. I do not trust those soldiers: they are Astra Militarum in uniform only. I hope your search turns up something, or we will have to suspect the worst: that the Gapraks themselves have betrayed us."
b546d987-3684-4d9c-b669-ff121c2097d3: "You have cost us Isimond! Holy Terra, do you have the faintest idea what it took to get my father not only to notice that low-born upstart, but to begin taking him seriously?"
8fa07844-5b22-4e33-a766-71450a42cd77: "That's something. One can learn a great deal about an individual from their personal writings... that is, of course, assuming he was sufficiently truthful in his account. What did the diary entries tell you, Lord Captain?"
e1146241-420b-47a7-8155-6a0a2e777a19: Eogunn's final request. The servo-skull's silence is heavy with the bitterness of an indescribable loss.
175dcf00-4462-4cb1-9c3c-e08354cf5810: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but were remembered as heroes by later generations. Many years later, they bore the first blow, which killed every member of the battalion, but they did not yield to the enemy, giving the dynasty's forces time to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.
4b6be4d9-3f56-4c11-b702-cbbb04856ac9: One of the prime experts has asked the Lord Captain to visit the Sector Bionica and deal with a situation that has disrupted the work of the compartment.
52971830-cb9d-49a1-9ecc-3d9b4e432b78: "Registering an augmetic of unknown construction, probably handmade. Probability of tech-heresy: 54.89355%. Recommending the release of the machine spirit from the torment of this corrupted abode."
48a1c08e-c127-4fb3-beb6-7f4210a751fa: "I have no desire to face this ancient enemy, whomever it is. How may I help you?"
8860575f-bfa9-44b9-b667-247108d6030b: "I suppose I have heard enough. Go."
9375086d-1d58-45c7-9635-bbdbcf833bd6: "From the very xenoruins where your ancestor met his end. The same ones you had us dig up. Those who fled the site told us."
75f442b5-3667-4ef4-ae06-c5a2340990f0: {n}The assembled rows of people all look at you and make the sign of the Aquila over their chests. Some people clumsily render the Aquila because they do not possess hands — they have been replaced with crude metal hooks.{/n}
2cbbab2d-dcce-497f-b282-452f29b7ae11: "We must find Trazyn. He has the Warrant."
9cf64bd1-26f4-4565-8d05-90c2782314b1: {n}In the moment that your body plunges into the transdimensional vortex born of xenosorcery, you sense the echoes of spiteful laughter sounding behind you...{/n}
6314020a-80de-4b24-b111-0085c33d3ab4: This creature cannot act, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}block{/g}, and is immune to all forced movement effects. Whenever the creature suffers damage, a stack of this effect is removed.
005837e9-1b1c-4ca0-acdb-dcb80cd66ab5: "The very sound of these words is laden with entropy, bringing forth ruin to all that exists. In the name of the Omnissiah, may this malevolent information be utterly extirpated!" {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell erupts with a thunderous crackle of the Motive Force.{/n}
b0d06273-31ee-4a45-b0ed-48fbf881921e: "You do not understand. I am {name} von Valancius, and this is my palace. You are obliged to let me pass."
41886fba-a0cd-4f1a-880a-f655bbe12c20: {n}Instead of replying, Magos snorts in surprise and announces his first move loudly. But this time, you know exactly what tactics will be used against you.{/n}
d70c5594-812d-4b0b-811a-ea92971ba2a5: "Those are your reasons? I would call them a pretext!"
e814636d-7dbd-44ac-bc60-40e09bb1cd0a: "I will relay the order, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The soldiers are unlikely to be pleased, but they will follow your will."
199b113c-bfa9-4070-b614-2d528c0241a3: "Yes, yes, the more crude pieces of metal you force into your bodies with your inherent mon-keigh 'skill,' the more pain and suffering each of you on this deck will exude. Truly, you are creating the optimal conditions for me."
69d31d0d-6c5f-4fbf-ab10-1c5de83ad27a: "You belong to the dynasty, and the dynasty never abandons its own."
631bc08e-f3e1-46c4-9dab-7c67c87ad4e9: "The medicae officers are already at their limit. Wait quietly, don't make a fuss!"
994d7880-9404-47f2-82f5-c40b4b164ab6:
Here is a map of your voidship — it consists of several parts, between which you can travel. Some parts are not yet available, but over time your character will be able to access them.
Click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on the active part of the voidship to move there.
4bfdf252-2302-4055-bfa5-fac6315d34cc: The wearer gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}. Whenever a summoned daemon {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g} an enemy, the wearer gains a +1 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g}, or a +5 bonus if the attack scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, lasting until the end of combat. Stacks.
f59c2d91-1527-4333-b0f1-202e2e201239: "I spent my youth in luxury. Von Valancius may not have been the most influential house in the Koronus Expanse, but we were wealthy. I had everything except what I truly desired. I dreamed of distant stars and imagined myself, Seberian von Valancius, exploring unknown worlds, expanding the boundaries of the protectorate..." {n}Seberian's faded lashes flutter, his skin tightening as if he is attempting to smile.{/n} "Yet my dreams remained mere dreams, for I was only fifth in line to inherit the Warrant."
60c69556-9659-462c-b468-daa35d319574: "At least we know exactly where to look for your creation, Eogunn. Vox Master, we are on our way."
d2515a8d-5ea1-4565-84ee-8c7d666c51ed: "I do not wish to deprive you of loyal subjects, Lord Captain. But these people are bloodsuckers, not healers. Heretics, destroying your loyal servants. It will be better without them." {n}For a moment, the woman's voice softens.{/n}
d18e096e-ff61-4e3f-800c-bb89e078be2a: "What gave you the notion that the blade depicted was more than just a ceremonial weapon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
9d4b499d-d315-406d-a49a-2589e4e85b31: "Father." {n}You unmistakably recognise the voice of "Elana" joining the conversation.{/n} "Let me dispel your doubts — these people serve me. The Servitium Dargonus, under the direct command of the governor. Whatever occurred at the outpost with the Merovian scum, my servants must have had their reasons. Why don't I handle the enquiries and you return to more important matters?"
09fed73d-1f4b-4fa2-bbae-f26ae1c01128: "This throne is a creation of the Omnissiah made centuries ago. Even before the unholy desecration of the relic, we were barely able to propitiate its ancient machine spirit to perform sacred augmentation procedures — many litanies and operating protocols did not survive through the ages. Now, with the demise of the keepers of the implantation throne during the mutiny, they have been lost forever. This sacred machine must be saved at all cost."
9d66c7aa-9651-49a5-ab42-7fa0d3a96246: "I understand: when you read out the order, you want to see the eyes of the culprit. But do not delay. I cannot stand by and let that noble-killer remain in the Lord Captain's presence without consequence."
3a536de4-2c52-4ed0-abf6-756a1c067d6d: "I am {name} from House Gaprak. I want to talk."
5fa08822-a46a-4473-9092-00ed927050b4: "What compelled you to conspire with your enemies?"
733ab5fa-8e04-418f-a379-0e1a16f610fb: "Great Throne, preserve us against false steps!" {n}Cassia fearfully lifts one foot off the paper.{/n}
f41e0c39-e522-46d9-ab91-97d119fff157: At the start of combat, the user gains the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.
c6e7b7bd-c46f-4250-aa35-af9d2079cbc4: "What is the essence of the dispute?"
00f0c0ae-b361-4891-b0fb-69defbbed3f6: {n}The affected calm instantly evaporates from Juvenna's face, and her beautiful features twist in rage.{/n} "My father is a half-witted heretic and a madman who has brought the wrath of the Holy Ordos down upon the entire dynasty. If I, the only legitimate heir, do not right his wrong, no one will! But instead of embracing me, he chooses that baseborn upstart Voigtvir, who indulges him in his wickedness. I will put an end to it."
e0282cb7-88fa-4378-8ec9-bf202467ca83: "You ought to thank the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, not me."
9ca826cd-efc4-44d0-a86a-a5dce22bda36: When my vision returned, I found the place utterly transformed. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. We were but one step away from exacting revenge on the thief who had dared to steal the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Sacred Warrant{/g}. The heir of House von Valancius had done the impossible, entering the lair of this most dangerous foe with no harm to {mf|himself|herself}.
12b6a9cf-d6e8-46ec-b7ce-d25a312f9d90: "They're settling in well. The technical corridors aren't much different from Zarkov's roots. My soldiers are on their guard around your servants, but that seems to be the way for every community here. We've had a few scuffles with the locals, but so far it's just been bloody noses and a couple of broken legs."
ab6d27c0-11f9-4642-b727-b46fdf875ac1: <u>(number of {g|f:1b7dfda30e5e4c9d87dcfd0bb9cfefe8}toxic saturation{/g} stacks × target's levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} / 5)</u>
8ae4c14d-891e-4230-b134-7d430b082a8a: {n}Your skull feels like it is about to split under the pressure. A heartbeat later, the agony ebbs, leaving behind only a haunting hum. It smothers your mind, stifling all reason and hindering your ability to think. Your gaze falls on the young pilot, who survived the crash and stumbled out of the wrecked shuttle after you. A wave of sickening fury suddenly swells within you — he is the one who lost control of the vessel!{/n}
8ac4e425-bbdf-43f9-a4a8-713b1d3c057e: {n}The Merovians, of course, were displeased — but the rabble rarely understand the designs of their overlords. They only observed and kept their distance, all while longing to join the fray. Then came the last report: the xenos had made their way to the ruins and had taken the fighting to a den of hideous creatures that wore human flesh as clothing. No matter how their confrontation might end, Humanity and Zarkov will reap the benefits.{/n}
10170dc3-75fa-43f3-87ad-ac08fcba604a: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty truly and faithfully until the day she was treacherously murdered by one of her closest subordinates, who had seen in her fervent love of interstellar travel the beginning of a heretical schism.
dcb77b92-49fd-423b-a92d-282e86acb302: "Are you asking me to adjudicate your theological debate?"
8fe7900b-2383-4460-9dbb-4efef02ce0ff: "Were you truly a master of the flesh, esteemed colleague, you would have reproduced a single self, rather than a multitude of flawed duplicates." {n}Unveiled, malicious triumph rings in the Manipulus's words.{/n}
af7485f1-8ccc-4e8b-b395-010d7434569f: The Miraculous Fusion Reactor was handed over by the Rogue Trader to the blessed abode of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The tech-ascetics lavished the archeotech machine with great reverence and tireless ministrations, turning the might of the Motive Force that filled it to the service of the Machine God. The Reactor's presence had a beneficial effect on the development of the station, which went on to become a thriving bastion of the Cult Mechanicus within several years.
0fd740d2-11cf-436f-a2f4-4f6a3fc8c1d3: "To beg for respite from the fate chosen for them since birth? Perhaps we should hold up the sisters of the Order of the Valorous Heart as an example. They do not even permit the dulling of pain during treatment of their wounds, no matter how grievous..." {n}Argenta stops short, as if shamed by her own severity.{/n} "Yet... that comparison is unfair to common labourers. Perhaps they truly would benefit from some aid."
49641431-6ac4-4af9-9980-14a3b76d87cf: {n}A deep and even voice answers you. The kind of voice that could calm even an angry {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g}.{/n} "Tell me, servant of the Imperium, what drives your desire to help us?"
c57bf438-bfa7-4b36-8467-b48c6ece81dc: The wearer gains +15% armour. Whenever {g|f:60a2011e90b949f2a38fe4a6cefb5100}Press the Advantage{/g} is used, the number of {g|f:b669fe2c03a240fca1b3b2429ca87414}tactical advantage{/g} stacks spent is converted to temporary wounds for the wearer.
aa16a829-586c-4ec3-a363-d40ca92ac2d1: "I will take it upon myself to interpret his words, but I beg your pardon in advance for falling far short of my dearest colleague in terms of rhetorical elegance."
8d325fa5-8cfb-47bc-bace-2d81a1afbc89: "That is everything I have managed to discover. Your thoughts?"
40b524a1-e944-492c-b4f4-b837c3af4817: "I request an audience with the Rogue Trader. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has committed a Category Five blasphemy by violating the precepts of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation. The offender persists in denying his distortion of the Omnissiah's design and insists on resolving the conflict with third-party mediation."
fdc916c1-a35c-4539-83b6-27da6d6ebb8e: "Lord Captain, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has produced some results, and there is finally a chance to secure the possessions of the Omnissiah. I believe he is referring to the colony on Zarkov."
6f42e4e5-4101-4b49-8958-41d6b9a1fb3d: {n}Eogunn lets out a rumbling laugh, as if you had told some ridiculous lie.{/n} "Absurd, {name}! How can he be dead if I can see him before me, feel him within me? Yes, Nuncius, that's what I told {mf|him|her} — you are alive, we are both alive! This is an incontrovertible fact."
a49bdfc2-7c12-4e83-933d-efaca67de551: "I have no intention of currying favour with you, Seberian."
68ec31fc-b4aa-43cc-a192-22b1bb343da1: "Fortunately, I do have the right to insist. We are done here."
47f150ca-e081-4b13-bff8-041965b63687: Whenever the user uses a non-attacking ability, all their allies affected by {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}teamwork{/g} gain +1 stack of {g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}cooperative advantage{/g}.
b3ce1bdf-1db0-4c9a-90cd-63f0908590bd: Whenever the user uses a grenade, they deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>(10% grenade damage × number of stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g})</u>.
8d0fa6ad-c045-41f4-ad88-b560c8058314: Endless, gargantuan roots sprawl all the way to the horizon. Something moves deep within them. Or could it be the plants themselves?
3e80a357-5fc5-46de-abdb-d385052f54b8: "You have chosen life." {n}Eogunn nods.{/n} "Knowledge is but a meagre toll for the chance to pursue your works."
1f000618-ff8d-4624-ba95-fc8e6d394a23: Seberian trusts only in his blade, a faith that deafens him to the counsel of his retinue during the council. While the sword remains at his side, the chances of steering events onto a different course are slim.
8aeb9f95-6b12-4b8c-b8b0-3de25f04a736: "Only a Rogue Trader would make such a claim. Do you really think that your unique position as the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Emperor{/g}'s anointed, which grants you unheard-of liberties, translates so easily to the rest of us?"
ec88b5bf-bb84-447f-a39c-b80bb2b0613c: "Akriel Kalux and his companions, representative of the Black Legion and participant in a conflict called the Gothic War. Possessed heretic Astartes in this region are a rarity in and of themselves, let alone ones involved in a historic conflict between primitive civilisations."
9d36b86f-9cef-417e-8ea5-554847c28928: "Why would he want to fight me? You said yourself that everything has already been decided."
f1c3bc5f-bb13-403c-a168-84752735be42: "Again, you speak in riddles, gothi. What do you mean by 'outrun time'? I've never met an enemy whose head you lop off first, and only then does he run away from you."
399893e1-b5ff-4e58-b174-c5517ca36b65: "Of course, Lord Captain. I will immediately make arrangements for the solemn ceremony and re-consecration."
364d324d-17e6-427a-b81a-f1b0c5838416: "You bring sad tidings, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served me faithfully. I give you leave to join the council — as a valued ally of the dynasty."
a9d8911a-7625-4aa6-82ca-e9bfc4301dff: "You're right, Pasqal. Work with Magos Tau-Phi-0098 to defend the colony."
35634a17-bdd3-4e26-aa8f-ead47765633f: "And in this present age, arrogant xenos once again roam Janus, regarding it as their domain. This is the result of your indulgence. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."
129ed608-944b-42aa-bf2e-707b469f0601: "Thesis two: there are two Nunciuses. This is also an incontrovertible fact. The first Nuncius is a figment of my imagination, the product of my insanity and, at the same time, the anchor that keeps my mind from further degradation. I project it onto a servo-skull, a model with no additional features other than an auxiliary lumen and an autoquill. It is incapable of conducting a conversation or holding an opinion. I do not even know from whose skull it was made."
c43571f2-667e-4f82-9713-7e3b3ec3d820: "Of course. You'll be our commander soon enough, so it's only right that you should know."
3b28cb4d-7ef0-4a5a-93c4-988df4dd50e8: "This whole world couldn't kill us, so what chance do these foul things have?"
71084d6c-7da7-4c6b-8c2c-c2787166461d: "No, I am not. I am simply trying to understand how it's possible to be in here so long."
8cbc00c4-eec6-4c24-a519-cdde733e1121: Each time the user {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} an attack, they must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|54824592a3774dfd8fb898ca6aee0e65} penalty or gain +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
ca4d42af-bc91-4bdf-8797-b87f898f7d29: "I've come to return the mixture you prescribed for my daughter."
de964420-19e8-4bdf-a52e-d3ff95213442: {n}When you share your conclusions with the Seneschal, he nods.{/n} "I agree, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I have had cause to read a good many scrolls from the dynastic archives in the course of my duties, and there was never any mention of Seberian's heretical tendencies."
91cfbf31-385b-421e-93af-c31fe5d1b49f: "The abundance of plant life is assessed as a negative factor in the utility of the planet's surface to the Adeptus Mechanicus. Purification litany 145 followed by four blessings by fire is recommended."
cf0e0810-8cc4-437d-9149-44080dde3a5e: {n}The Haemonculus turns away from Eogunn, instantly losing all interest in him.{/n} "If you value this heap of meat and scrap metal so highly, I will order it reassembled. Never speak of it to me again."
a51a21c6-510e-475c-a4ae-99ebe9008004: {n}Captain Dunawski sets aside a freshly removed stretch of skin and salutes you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, how can I be of service?"
f176446c-7817-4cdd-871f-6785ee05a321: "Interrogator van Calox, I would like to talk to you about... what I saw on Kiava Gamma. How would you characterise that monstrous example of heretical machinery?"
7789bd98-485f-41fe-85d7-1916d25fcf32: The creature attacks each creature in adjacent cells. On {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, it inflicts {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (15) to the target.
095f6a10-753c-4bbb-bda6-0600a3e10b1e: To restore power, you must clear the entrance to the research camp with a melta charge and restart the generator.
7280bb0b-e685-465f-acf7-bb1429974710: "Know it?" {n}Eogunn smiles sadly.{/n} "For Nuncius and myself, this place was long our dwelling place, and our dungeon. Every corridor is etched into my memory's archives with pictographic precision."
c94949e8-1f3b-46c6-9536-6b913e31fef3:
The range at which medkits and stimulants can be used is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When a medikit is used to restore an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it restores +{uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} more wounds.
