When a stimulant is used, it restores {uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} wounds.
4bf69671-030d-459b-b3d4-22402b122873: Whenever a party member falls unconscious, the wearer gains +1 stack of {g|f:61caea50b68340d597461556ebed50d4}salvation in death{/g}
1933abba-6a26-4cff-a8fb-8a3c47b9309c: {n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. You struggle to discern anything unusual in them.{/n}
3e7ef0b0-20fd-4589-b679-4ed33033b3f6: "What did you say he removed from his own body?"
bf108209-e86a-49a1-87ad-74db0959a0fa: "In any proper regiment, you'd be executed for speaking of Commissars that way."
00837231-2b44-498a-9a16-b2398018e8a3:
Void movement points (VMP) determine how far a ship can move on its turn.
1 VMP corresponds to one cell on the battlefield. Moving diagonally is more costly — every second diagonal cell uses 2 VMP.
At the beginning of each turn, void movement points are restored to their maximum value. The higher a ship's {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}speed{/g} rating is, the more VMP it gets.
Note that once your ship starts moving, this order can no longer be cancelled.
28d3cd28-aa14-46ec-a1f3-65bbd10a7965: "There never was any laboratory, or any samples, was there?"
a0ced094-4879-43b2-8972-49594821e9ef: There is no greater transgression before the Undying One than to attempt to challenge his decisions. Rumours of the deeds of the wandering philosopher Eogunn and his followers spread throughout the Expanse, and the verdict of the Bloodspun Web was adamant and unquestionable. Kibellah personally made the Undying One's will a reality, and it is said that Manipulus Februs only smiled bitterly when the spinner's blade severed his head from his body.
6bac4015-a8b1-4a87-9cf3-714b88e59908: "This statement is false. The sacred implant installed in this life form does not support complex social interactions."
d94e6873-e78a-4493-a328-3b3bdd651ab3: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this xenobeast clearly possesses a sophisticated structure, but you cannot detect any weaknesses.
4584964c-2116-4564-ab2c-1b16deeb43df: "I may not look it, but I am a wanderer and a pilgrim. Nuncius and I have led research expeditions with the aim of finding relics and artefacts and advancing the Quest for Knowledge. I have also endeavoured to learn from my colleagues at every opportunity, developing my expertise in genetics, hermetics, and augmetics. We have visited more than one world, voyaged on more than one ship, and got our hands dirty more than once, both literally and figuratively."
b381b1b2-f3b9-42b2-b9c9-39da100b576f: The chainsword is covered in scrapes and notches, the marks of years of faithful service to its former owner.
ef7ecdbd-dda9-4673-8a6e-bdf8488a763a: "For the demise of a great warlord, who once clashed with the enemy in this very sector. Khaine himself deigned to guide his hand, bestowing his own sword upon him. Yet, even that was not enough."
d51f92f7-646a-42bf-9419-6e48e0ad1a16: {n}Eogunn's galvanic cell crackles angrily.{/n} "This is absurd! Appalling! I need to..." {n}Then he notices you.{/n} "Rogue Trader... I..."
212a73ed-ce6c-448d-bb54-95adfbb8db4c: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn Februs returned to the righteous path of service to the Omnissiah.
c56a1664-7571-4d4e-933d-771be4f0fbfb: The cold binds the ancient creature in unyielding chains. Through the heavy ice, dark blemishes stain the Necron's metal skin, while its eye sockets appear to be empty and dead.
5daf45dd-f138-4a8b-804d-974b392fe777: {n}Argenta raises an eyebrow.{/n} "But surely it does not answer you? How truly peculiar!"
57b6662e-1d4a-4bae-88c2-9ca6d826f649: "There is a control node not far behind the central platform. Through it, the Necrons place their victims in shackles and transform them. I could see that the orb on the upper left controls the supply of energy, and that the switch on the far right triggers the transformation."
fabf1887-fb2e-4546-9420-0178a2d524c7: "Forgive me. That was a clumsy joke."
084e21b7-f5c4-4bc9-940c-2ea3d3ab57b7: Seberian's retinue is divided, so he will not heed either side. You must achieve a majority.
c02f8548-1b7c-4b3d-9704-82e38d993f94: "...despite the unsophisticated nature of both its own construction and its crew, the Spear of Tarsus was able to gain a region hitherto presumed beyond their reach. Obviously, this was in great measure the whim of the warp storms that had distorted space and time..."
150abe1e-2141-40f7-8dac-9deaa19da7df: You convinced Seneschal Laria Voigtvir to oppose her father and support the heir Juvenna von Valancius.
a115e27b-81fb-4986-8158-52aef9c4c329: "The use of xenogenic machinery is the tech-heresy that destroyed Tirkuaz-4. May the Omnissiah grant peace to the machine spirits of the lost station."
cdaa6432-8b3a-4c41-8df9-1420db0eab21: "The probability of erroneous deactivation is 99.999 percent." {n}Exalt-117 goes still for a few moments, as if surprised by his own words.{/n} "The result of the probability calculation contains an unacceptable margin for error. The circumstances surrounding the deactivation of the identifier will be clarified during communication."
cb2d6cd5-2637-4ae1-91d0-8ba93dbc6e54: "I do appreciate a rapt audience. Yet it is time to bring this encounter to a close."
22ce230f-965f-421d-9b3b-b37719d4413e: "Attesting to the paradoxical fluctuations of the Motive Force within the machine circuit. This unit is unable to reliably determine if this is a tech-heresy or a Category Three miracle of the Omnissiah. Modification of standard galvanic rituals is required to open the circuit."
e9e144dd-b24f-4f6d-baf1-5a6c5b722d18: Until the end of combat, {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} has no {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g} and can target enemies, but each use deals {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to Eogunn.
6395ad52-2e4c-4c28-9a88-c97144adaa81: "God-Emperor, grant me the strength to survive and seek vengeance..."
20d86471-5228-4764-90c3-ec4accb06cad: "Ha! Of course you do, who would miss the chance to strike up a friendship with the illustrious leader of the equally illustrious Stormbiters? Go on, Halbrandt, recite the saga of my exploits... and make sure to include the landing in the void kraken's mouth. This is Halbrandt the B— the Brave, the most sonorous voice in my pack." {n}Thorbald nods at the tall Wolf, who seems to radiate the proud vigour of a warrior.{/n}
83a6e786-5e3f-441c-a6f9-f56005eef228: They do not spare you a look, a gesture, or even a word.
0c55fc77-d7e6-425a-b358-7e15911265a0: "Do not touch that mechanism, elantach, until you grasp its nature and purpose..." {n}Yrliet casts an appraising glance at you.{/n} "...and accept the fact that perhaps that moment will never come."
5cb77c06-927c-453f-8fde-ec396c218fbd: {n}Eogunn tries to say something, looks back at Nuncius, and bows his head.{/n} "Of course, Rogue Trader, I admit defeat."
6c584565-8801-4edd-b041-0ae51ed8c088: "Sergeant, have you observed the strange light grid in the sky or the force field at the entrance to the residence?"
1025833a-53be-4537-9672-6dedbb6d8e83: {n}Eogunn looks at Nuncius, after which he nods.{/n} "The Tech-Priests of Stygies VIII are most dogged in their acquisition of samples of xenotechnology. Under our doctrine, any methods used to gain an advantage over the enemies of Humanity are justified, so long as they do not cross the line into heresy. As you may have guessed, where exactly that line lies has been the subject of debate and discord for centuries."
1f39f6ad-7652-44a2-bfcc-45d3d11ecda7: {n}The Tech-Priest glowers at you for a few seconds, then shouts out:{/n} "Protocol 21.190! It is your right to do so, Rogue Trader. I will transmit this data to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."
e9e984a7-b4ad-4297-9bdf-fa1fe7a1fc7c: Quelled the Zarkovian troops' distrust of the flagship's enforcers.
40a5ee4c-b98f-4f0a-bde8-31c26af7435a: "I would like to hear Nuncius's position."
58a67573-aa78-4113-a9fc-ca22914eefee: {n}Clutched in his hands — no, fused with his fingers — is a black cube of unnaturally smooth black material. In the endless cycle of excruciating metamorphoses, it is the only object that is unmoving and unchanging.{/n}
25747bb5-c20f-4c22-bc69-eb0317a7a85f: {n}The blow makes Ferrenz stagger. His visors refocus chaotically, as if overwhelmed by conflicting data streams. For a few moments, the Genetor freezes. Then, he slowly bows his head.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}His trembling hands reach for the augment.{/n} "May the Omnissiah forgive me for this coming violation of the sacred machine rites."
e25c4b0d-e587-41c9-95d6-0b9e3b2f0969: "May the Omnissiah bless the Rogue Trader's sound judgement." {n}The Genetor focuses his multiple visors on you and bows his head. Not one of his mechanical eyes dignifies the vivisector with even a glance.{/n}
85f35037-6b9c-4760-8906-2afb6d449d86: "Hmm. Rather meagre, but it will do."
43184e2f-e49e-4946-bf76-a04eb865c501: The wearer gains +15 {g|Encyclopedia:InitiativeGlossary}initiative{/g}. Whenever the wearer uses {g|f:60a2011e90b949f2a38fe4a6cefb5100}Press the Advantage{/g}, the ability also affects daemons summoned by the wearer.
61c2750e-7f04-4968-9472-63223d6fe294:
The weapon's maximum range is increased by +{uip|Range|4edad61ca05849d69e544082933792ae}. Ranged attacks deal +{uip|Damage|4edad61ca05849d69e544082933792ae}% more damage.
{g|Encyclopedia:RangeAreaAttacksGlossary}Ranged area attacks{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
37569c57-d69f-4113-b8ec-b7045610073c: "Almost certainly nothing good. Delayed shipments often mark the beginning of uprisings, civil wars, {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} sabotage, and other undesirable activities." {n}Solomorne's tone is murderously serious.{/n}
22c5cb98-3179-4c4c-b0f4-cec03dc6a28b: "I thought our views on the situation were similar. What do you propose?"
b9fab9c0-ec48-4a22-bfdc-64e5129b2f96: "This shooting's just a waste of bullets. Concentrate!"
4adb9c06-1052-435c-843c-9b9ec7633139: {n}There is nothing to prevent the flagship from entering the dead world's orbit. Now all that is left is to confirm the readiness of those who will accompany you on the difficult mission to restore the Warrant to its rightful owner, and to announce the launch of the operation over the vox-channel.{/n}
0f077655-c5c9-4be4-84b6-68641742673c: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Even these metal beasts are no match for you, eh?"
b52002a4-3a51-4098-8991-47b48f2b88c0: {n}Numbers and symbols dance before your eyes: someone was using this device to communicate on many different waves, but none of these frequencies is familiar to you.{/n}
f8b48762-cd2b-4602-bfa2-a648f0483754: The implantation throne has been restored to service through the efforts of the Rogue Trader.
de7b9366-403d-442b-a720-7163260d10c5: "Bringing the word of the Emperor and kindling His fire in the hearts of others is Humanity's most important mission. He is righteous."
1197d30e-22a3-4c72-a115-e6693fc09ca2: "For Throne's sake, what are you doing? Explain yourself." {n}Juvenna's words ring with irritation.{/n} "Any more of this, and I shall begin to think you are deliberately sabotaging our plan."
c5c05682-b954-40a5-bfbd-60798ab1e534: "Protocol 17.09. Laity worker units that have come into contact with the foulness of xenoheresy will be disposed of along with the station." {n}Alva-9 casts her crimson visors detachedly over the grim faces of the workers. {/n}
c67cc897-4073-4244-b435-129a72d4fa7a: {n}In the gaze the Master-at-Arms fixes upon the stranger, there is a glimmer of recognition and of disbelief. Reluctantly, she gives the enforcers a nod, and they step back.{/n}
dc3d145d-54e5-473a-9ac8-a67644ea6357: Disdainful sneers are frozen on the translucent faces of the Aeldari, provoking the urge to wipe them off in the most brutal fashion.
43662163-28c4-4174-a810-2a6b9ff76fe5: "And {d|Encyclopedia:Ch3_TalkWithHaemunculusAboutNuncius}you believed him?{/d} That xenos couldn't make sense of the workings of my implants, calling them 'primitive' in an attempt to veil his shameful ignorance in insults. How, then, could he possibly understand the highly sophisticated technology that runs through Nuncius? I have dissected xenos like that one, Rogue Trader — their very essence is riddled with lies."
d89716d3-8fd8-4462-878f-7e845891e3f8: "A pious decision, Lord Captain. I will immediately relay your command to purge Zarkov of xenos."
85ab9e62-1870-4a50-b79b-3d3c2cf61b93: "My primary task is to heal the flesh, Lord Captain. I oversee the processes involved in the workings of the body, and in the case of augments, how well they are joined to the flesh. You might say I make sure that the metal sacred to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} becomes a true extension of the living body." {n}The chirurgeon raises his chin proudly.{/n}
4c6de1f3-a44f-4902-9d21-cf824253f65b: "No. We are driven by the wrath of Kaela Mensha Khaine — this world must fall."
b78260b7-eaca-41c8-88a8-1f7b8f7dda9b: "Determinacy in amalgam individuals? Wait, is this related to your previous experiment?"
9e60d7cd-dee2-4362-8c24-b87aef7ab206: "Then, by means of deception and cunning, I managed to stow away on a Chartist vessel that had been delivering supplies and equipment to Amsanct. I disembarked on {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}. I have not returned to Amsanct since. All the experiments you have witnessed, I have conducted them for one purpose — to find a way to save my dearest colleague."
e49bc10d-61c1-47d6-8285-e69d8c4e8d0c: "What?" {n}You hear a note of amazement in Calcazar's voice.{/n} "No. No, the monster imprisoned in Yoke is the key to Humanity's future. Its place is in the hands of humans, not a xenos!"
d00120fc-ddff-47d6-a091-7a7e2e2bd295: {n}While talking to Ravor, you do not immediately notice the familiar otherworldly flicker — Trazyn is examining the fallen Patriarch with moderate interest.{/n} "I have a similar one in my collection, only larger and of a different phenotype. His brood was trying to clear out one of the sleeping tombs... and since I just happened to be there for the purpose of expropriating historical treasures, I thought the moment was worth preserving."
e59bc231-f0c5-41da-ab47-98e0762325dc: [Look at the object] "Some kind of... fragment?"
bc56f6d6-45a0-464e-b05f-4a40dfdb68e5:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
If the user chooses themselves as a target of a combat stimulant, they regain +{uip|Heal|1089f86289fc408ea82057a3e02273bd} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}.
af65f1c2-a587-4480-a724-ddcc919e022e: {n}Seberian lifts his head as if straining against the weight of his numerous implants, and fixes you with an eye burning with righteous fire.{/n} "Our purpose is clear. Let us find the enemy and repay them according to their misdeeds, heir."
e8743501-6f60-4cdf-8852-21c35015c186: {n}The subsequent action repeats, like a well-rehearsed play.{/n}
e4b1730e-231a-457a-8df7-5202812c6155: "The God-Emperor protects me, Captain-Quartermaster. In challenging my orders, you are challenging His will."
d07d2e70-6b04-402a-a641-68e2591582fd: "Nuncius is not a skull, but a highly sophisticated construct and my dearest colleague. Your faith distorts your perception of reality and you see death even where it is absent, Kibellah."
ccb24315-33cd-4e09-be92-02f03f5861c3: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s greyish lips can barely move. Deprived of lungs, his once-resonant voice is reduced to a low whisper.{/n} "The medicae {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} interfaces with... the central nervous system. Spleen... tucked in the left hypochondrium, behind the stomach. Organic. Right lung. Left lung. Connect with the... trachea via the bronchi. Augmented. Heart... four-chambered. Augmented... Medicae mechadendrite interfaces with the central nervous..."
ce19741a-0ffc-4504-8806-7b79e247f657: The mass of levers and tangles of tubes and wires make your head spin. You cannot make sense of the chaotic jumble.
46872a45-7d65-4709-a3ca-4f8eabc8df38: "Now let us speak plainly. Who are you, and how do you possess such intimate knowledge of my affairs?" {n}She appears relaxed, but her gaze is fixed on your face.{/n}
eb87e3e7-192e-414a-9232-d52f83aa100e: "The Lord Captain's special attention to the sacred distribution of blessed augmentation technologies has been registered. This has been preserved for you as a result of judicious installation decisions." {n}A sleek-looking implant appears from beneath the Genetor's crimson robe.{/n} "The Lord Captain life form's status will allow this technology to serve you with maximum efficiency."
3a3e8bda-ca95-43b8-b3fd-d961152dd8b4: "I do not share your fatalist outlook, Seberian."
420dacb0-9431-43eb-b0d1-8a58734d2a8c: "Get that vile thing away from me!"
35a28acb-7046-4074-a3c4-e21d8479bc9d: "The suffering of the sacred machines in the Sector Bionica verges on the heresy of annihilation. Initiating search for a tech-servant capable of third-degree benevolent purification rituals."
72b86486-0270-410e-a43f-b75ba8eefa7c: {n}The vox-station is well hidden from unsuspecting eyes, but someone has been using it regularly. The handle of the voice receiver still retains some warmth from whoever held it last.{/n}
eb935dc2-4e8f-4d28-ae3b-589fc1f9dd29: {n}The Magos's body jolts as the Motive Force sparks through his augmented arm, melting the isolate protruding from his metal shoulder. The nearby Tech-Priests prop up his sagging form and convey him hurriedly him to the infirmary.{/n}
560b5131-6022-4aff-9cc7-859439e9357b: "If your verdict, Magos, does not differ from reality, the best outcome would be the full cessation of the platform's operations. Who knows how the heretical experiments have affected the properties of the supplied promethium? Personally, I would prefer not to find out."
a76c89ab-9a3a-4934-b464-27038d8ecac5: "That world ruled by the Tech-Priests... So that's what the Archenemy is like, is it? Our legends of it back on Zarkov are like child's stories in comparison."
51914511-0dec-4cd1-8dc8-428f1462024b:
In dialogues and book events, you can use {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} + [ALT] to highlight a text line to show other group members which option you would like to choose.
Note: though each group member can express their opinion, it is up to the group leader to make a decision.
abd7e3c5-650e-44c8-b38c-9a30870907a9: "Then again, what do I have to lose? My agents have code phrases for the most vital reports. Say the words, 'The wax is still warm,' and I will listen, even if what you're saying sounds like rubbish. Like what you're saying now, in fact. Farewell." {n}The last thing you hear is the sound of a single gunshot.{/n}
a73e49b0-15b7-498f-9e21-692351ab506c: "You're a forgotten legend now, old man. But the Koronus Expanse will not forget me so quickly, I assure you."
c88bcda6-3066-4e3d-84b1-90a437d8e7a1: "The suggestion makes sense to me. A good xenos is a dead xenos, and a half-living one is still a threat, even if it has been turned into a statue. If this state is reversible, spawn like them could cause a great deal of trouble."
5aa14d33-afe6-47fb-907f-92a638f7c8da: "Even here, far from the filth of bureaucracy and ambition, blood ties are placed above lawful rank. It seems this particular heresy runs in Humanity's very blood."
9cf186e7-e3cf-4aab-b4a6-a9f16a8151bf: A disgusting concoction froths in the flask.
c2be8481-3457-40eb-bd61-16d770c8d9c7: "The sky is covered in symbols. No one here can see them. That means you are part of this eerie anomaly."
74e4fb9d-6abc-40de-9bef-66107763efda: "A remnant of the ancient god that we turned into slaves and weapons..." {n}It takes you a few moments to realise — the xenos is addressing the vanquished C'tan.{/n} "Shadow of the parasite, your place is in the gallery of my Museion, to serve as an eternal monument to our superiority and your insignificance."
06b2caeb-fb9d-4a0c-875a-d975d0057d0e: "Oh, your misgivings are entirely groundless, Genetor. The Gravaz family is well-versed in such intricacies and holds all the relevant clearances."
482e49a8-152c-44a4-b8de-87f0ee2f7da6: "Scanning... Response negative. Vivisector Martinax has restored efficiency to this servant of the Omnissiah, despite the damage being incompatible with work. The ability to create functionality out of non-functioning entities is a supreme talent, highly prized by the Priesthood of Mars, and by myself."
d7893c10-6387-42d7-b0c5-84c79166f2c2: However, the growing influence of the Adeptus Mechanicus within the ship wrenched the legend out of the dynasty's hands. The flagship was confiscated from the Rogue Trader by the Cognisance Fleet in a humiliating deal that could not be refused.
5d6eafce-1bb9-44d3-8cd8-39f78b7fc0ad: "The clergy of the Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 cloister, in gratitude for the tidings of the sacred archeotech, request that you be attended by Magos Eogunn Februs and the unit Nuncius. I seek your leave to employ our skills and knowledge for the benefit of the von Valancius dynasty, including but not limited to tending to the machine spirits of the Sector Bionica and conducting experiments in the name of Knowledge."
4efb2589-b9ff-4605-8b11-431cf9e9f2e0: {n}Your tone is cold enough the chill the bones: the woman flinches and looks at you, as if realising for the first time exactly who is talking to her.{/n}
83e22104-26e4-4df6-8bc5-c5ee723132f1: Restores 50% of the target's maximum wounds and removes {g|f:68ec1bbab36344b69aa8b644ff7c8663}the last gasp of duty{/g} effect.
d2b40f68-0dd0-4c8e-a296-0db4f5164332: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s mouth flattens into a hard line.{/n} "I refute that statement. I have personally checked every articulation in his body, every biological indicator. The procedure was performed without error, all implants and organs are functioning flawlessly! This is merely a problem of adaptation — unpleasant to witness, but wholly predictable. The experiment will have a successful outcome!"
6c0cac04-903d-4628-8a37-28f45e4bd642: {n}Seberian's augment-disfigured face drains of colour, but his voice sounds surprisingly steady as he gives the order:{/n} "Guards! A spy has infiltrated the palace! Open fire!"
8cb83965-bdf2-46ee-8955-a135fc7bcaf5: "I wish to know your name. Who are you?"
c2a390ea-70ed-4e79-bcaa-204495a3a5c1: "Exactly, they seem to be patching up the living here, but the atmosphere is for cogs alone! I hope they're releasing the cured faster than they're coming down with new diseases from breathing in this stuff."
e31f4aa7-b990-4406-aa14-6c921c8dc56d: "Prospects — predicted scenarios — are assessed with moderate optimism. {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Promethium{/g} supplies to Altar-Templum Station will be restored as soon as possible. I also request that Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} accept this gift as an expression of gratitude — material reinforcement — for your assistance." {n}At a gesture from Decabalus, two Enginseers present you with a lavishly adorned {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augment{/g}.{/n}
dc2a4555-5b88-443b-8e55-20d733984572: "I have a great many of them, and most possess rather esoteric functions that are difficult to explain to a layperson. The most obvious is the galvanic cell." {n}The Tech-Priest slaps his metal belly, which lets out a hollow rumble.{/n} "My hull is quite heavy, so it is supported by a gravitic core. {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendrites{/g}, of course; an alembic with an alchemical synthesiser; auxiliary cogitators; an eye with magnifiers and analysers, a respiratory—"
74b83c60-94f1-44f9-8663-9ba9c0dde5b9: The second the squad reached the nearest fork in the passageway, the sepulchral silence was broken by warning signals erupting from the auspexes. The devices' assessments were as precise as they were pitiless: the right-hand branch held unknown gravitational anomalies that might kill the squad, while from the left-hand one enemy forces were inexorably approaching.
28e57ffa-9b30-446b-8109-d76e0e1459d2: "I must say, the Tech-Priests of the Expanse have truly outdone themselves on this occasion."
cae40eb0-e7f8-4789-bd23-600a769f4b2b: {n}The old man's eyelids are closed and his face is serene. He might appear to be sleeping peacefully, were it not for the deathly pallor of his face and his monstrously mangled neck. He had been fitted with a voice implant at some point previously, but it had recently been wrenched from the unfortunate man's body. Every so often, the metal hose now serving as his trachea emits a reedy whistling sound. He is clutching something tightly in his right hand — it is an ornate set of prayer beads, the kind used by ordained servants of the Ecclesiarchy.{/n}
74ca047b-774d-4b63-8aa2-967c6ce58904: "That's enough about you. Let us return to the matter at hand."
cff2568a-c7da-4855-99f2-e72d51b14b10: "How curious, colleague, I never thought you would be drawn to such superficial analysis. Who knows what secrets might be teased out in discussions with the laity who have taken refuge here?"
ee361b7a-4b15-4f1d-9c6d-592e3912e04d: Small xenos swarm around, creating more and more platforms for exhibits and paying no attention to you.
8ee64c82-0348-4d7a-9ef3-d771a362c632: After his death in one of the battles, Izdrig Batoshski became a de facto saint among his people. His likeness, revered as sacred, was rumoured to bring good luck and aid in the fight against one's own weaknesses. For many years after, just speaking his name aloud was believed to be protection against heresy.
6efb7876-6401-445c-ad6f-15ec18f64fec: {n}The fury bursts out of you in a strangled roar. You feel you are watching a stranger as you step toward the pilot and strike him across his bloodied face. The servant of the dynasty meets your eyes with such fierce spite that it seems he might actually strike you back.{/n}
1b8767dd-71bc-43bb-afd9-055d6793c2f3: {n}Noticing you, the Rogue Trader falls silent.{/n} "Your face is unfamiliar to me. Who are you?"
f08e4935-32e5-4efa-9163-9716474cc73f: "Deep within the roots are xenos ruins. We do not venture there as a rule. It is a cursed place. A place of death." {n}Vedka's hand reflexively moves toward her missing eye, then she pulls it back.{/n}
e3af72a0-fb7d-4500-a669-8196f5f3645f: "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Coordinates to strike the command headquarters: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma. Do not target the outpost again: it is not significant."
17209cdf-386a-43ad-9ebd-b3ff835f0cdd: "Excessive rumination on creation is dangerous, for rumination gives rise to doubt. And from doubt to heresy there is but a single step."
c2191162-1007-4d56-8640-a686d70a0166: {n}The recording shows the prism projecting a holographic diorama of stunning clarity in front of it. It depicts the battle of two opposing armies: strange, skeleton-like xenos, outnumbered, fighting for possession of this planet. Assuming the heraldic meaning of the signs borne by the warriors of each side, you understand this to be a confrontation between two great dynasties, during which the planet was destroyed. The artefact you have found is a kind of monument to the deeds of the past.{/n}
2134078f-1604-47bb-ab98-e04826029ddd: All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
d9b67655-543e-4cd9-9ba0-a14dad63efd4: "I promise to practice this art, Rogue Trader." {n}From the captain's tone, it is unclear whether she is being serious.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"
43659e4d-08ad-405c-8b23-b6716b3f0d9d: {n}Recalling your comment, Eogunn disperses some kind of caustic vapour from an alembic on his shoulder. Your nose goes numb for a moment, but the smells no longer trouble you.{/n}
3aa09a7b-c8ac-40f9-a433-b22e884c57a2: Each stack of this effect grants +10% damage, +10% armor, and +10% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}.
a4cfdb73-205b-4428-9a4c-519faefb1a6c: "As you wish." {n}Batoshski mutters sourly in reply, then stares after you as you walk away.{/n}
73abcb58-ff02-4a69-a3ca-a89e8704267f: "For myself, however, a key aspect of the Machine God is His omniscience. I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."
f3c2fa0f-0472-4a50-99c1-ecf458595c25: "You are wrong! Just imagine what we could achieve together."
8e277b1d-9194-483d-a826-7d0f0e1510f3: {n}A rasping growl escapes Batoshski's lips, only to dissolve into laughter.{/n} "Ha! No, don't be foolish. Traditions are there to be honoured and upheld. I'll face you, heir of Seberian, and make no mistake, I'll be fighting for keeps."
7dc1ee95-84f3-4e40-ac0b-51ad0ed46f90: "My duty... Heresy of my own making. I have elevated myself and Nuncius above mere components in a mechanism. Every screw can be replaced by another, no matter how useful it may be. It is my duty to replace the screw, to purge the corrosion from my soul. Even if I must sacrifice... a colleague. The Omnissiah commands it."
0dcceb8c-d173-4949-826e-573a1fdb122f: "I shall give you new ways to serve the God-Emperor!"
1400dac3-9674-4d72-a910-cc208953fa0d: "We discovered a rare specimen in the ruins — a critically injured but still functioning xenos, and some kind of artefact with it. The xenos called it a refractive transmuter. Understanding how this artefact functioned was our primary objective. We imprisoned the xenos and tried to uncover its secrets, but our equipment was incapable of hurting or granting us any insight into the device. We experimented with the refractive transmuter almost blindly."
f7b0f59e-6b33-4a95-b9cd-db99137b0cf2: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And we can only assume that the cause of this sudden silence is far from sacred."
25fe2336-8828-4a1c-a0ef-bba6ca6e2798: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}It can't hurt{/d}." {n}Zarkov hunches his shoulders, scowling.{/n} "Our strength is running low. The God-Emperor has given my soldiers a test — I don't want them to fail it again."
1d097515-50c7-4b55-b301-d32c76a30426: {n}A dry chuckle scrapes like metal on glass.{/n} "It is past time you rid yourself of the illusion of choice."
5402110a-7488-49fc-9a3b-383e45c7aed8: "You wanted to discuss the results of the so-called Triasomata experiment."
9eb43bc8-0b8c-4b79-bdf9-6664b7804b98: "Find me at the back of the inner courtyard. Immediately."
681ae365-7d7d-4a2e-ac0c-d1180d4734c5: "When dwelling on the consequences, we must not forget the cause. If we do not come to understand and destroy xenos like the ones that captured the ship, the loss of Jesevon will be only the first link in a chain of great calamities. If I could lay my hands on a living specimen, if I could find a way to combat their invasive genome..."
132fdb83-c123-4ea0-993b-5e02a21ab9e5: "For once, an intelligent thought from the lips of your kind." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}'s gaze rests intently on the young man, compelling him into sudden silence.{/n} "Then again, implanting such cattle with metal only increases the pain I can derive from them, so I must disagree in this instance."
858c2e36-63cc-441d-870c-e05427478987: At the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}'s command, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} servants accompanying the squad released a swarm of servo-skulls into the air. Guided by binharic hymns, their {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g} unerringly detected usable points of entry.
f5c2961d-d04e-4751-aee7-c4a04339975d: "I wonder what in this place caused you to have such an unusual reaction? It appears we are dealing with some kind of phenomenon that regulates the currents of the Immaterium. We will have to test the hypotheses in the current field conditions."
17437cf4-4fa2-42e8-b804-3787fe906bd1: <u>(user's levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (does not include haemorrhage) + user's levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (does not include warp burn or soul burn) + user's levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g})</u>
9b0b8bf8-ae4f-414e-a499-ee40dc71642d: The weapon of a wrathful leader from the Aeldari Corsairs, taken as a trophy by the Imperial Navy and later stolen from a secret arsenal by Kasballica agents.
ed6f7d40-bea3-48c5-b1ad-e3e282f401ce: You sent the Merovians away before the fight with the Drover, without causing them offence.
e8dc507c-4882-46cf-bc17-33a141dbe810: "An unusual situation — xenos slaying xenos. What do the rest of you think?"
bcee920d-9fb3-45d9-801d-9d9e3b33de2a: "I am Alva-9. I command the Skitarii of mining station Tirkuaz-4. A violation of one of the Omnissiah's sacred commandments has occurred within the territory under my purview. In accordance with Protocol 12.33, delivery of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} to the primary station is impossible until the tech-heresy is eliminated."
1eef6380-97c0-4009-a81d-ab8d9fa6023f: "The concentration of sickly rust in your aura... is guilt, Genetor. And the bitterness of that guilt gnaws at my eyes, dredging up tears unbidden."
f4c5674a-b1e1-4e70-872b-ee3400fa1668: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is time to go on the offensive. Now, under the banner of von Valancius and in the shadow of the {g|Encyclopedia:Aquila}Aquila{/g}'s wings, we are ready to turn Zarkov into a full-fledged world of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."
4d323b95-fc5e-44e7-b771-74fdbb282dd8: The bombardment of the command headquarters presents an excellent opportunity for the theft.
dfdffeaa-7de3-4fbf-ac84-4e9d8c690b7c: "I shall overlook your insolence. For now."
085fe76d-5fbd-4a3d-9f7b-37c1d0625443: "Nuncius has noted that the Sector Bionica of this ship displays reverence for rare augmentations. This is commendable for a place that does not have its own Genetor Extremis."
e113b266-8c31-4177-8150-9501b2d5f50a: "Unwittingly? Weakness is a choice, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Every day you choose to pity yourself is a day gifted to the Archenemy. Pity them all you want, but they are nothing more than targets for our lasguns now."
0c7539c7-bb6e-48c1-9ef5-8ebdf4333755: "Heresy. To dare sever sacred metal from the flesh of the Machine God's servant... Damnation upon those who committed this deed. I will purge the Motive Force from their bodies and grind their flesh into disposable biomatter." {n}With anguish in his eyes, Eogunn levitates beside the poor soul. A gentle mist starts pouring from his alembic, carrying the sweet scent of an anaesthetic.{/n}
1b05cebb-343f-47e6-8ffd-e87a6d18e742: "And the transience of life forms like yours leads to precious knowledge being carried off into the abyss of history yet again..."
131a45a0-e0ac-45f1-9a4c-ae0da9fe334b: "Do you know where to find it?"
9807f579-3bd9-449a-8785-fe48997fad01: [Use the Elucidator to read the inscription]
b14cdb17-9c64-4d7f-92ae-87e206458e54: "Please forgive my colleague's overly wordy phrasing, allow me to present a more concise alternative." {n}The Tech-Priest narrows his eyes in thought.{/n} "I believe the optimal interpretation is as follows: diplomatic duties, commercial ventures including the exchange of data, and the timely expulsion of the laity from the Explorators' sectors of interest."
9625c035-d0b4-4002-8ba5-796e40186b24: The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment once served Seberian. The captain-quartermaster has requested that their oaths be renewed and they be taken back into service. However, Colonel Batoshski is displeased by the prospect. There is still hope that the Lord Captain can win his respect.
b1d75a7a-94ed-4d8e-b6e8-f6029f295dac: "Hmm... this world was once ruled by the wisest servants of the Omnissiah. Now, not one of them could recall even the simple sacrament of identification for Galliverus." {n}Seberian's synthesised voice takes on an irascible note.{/n} "What times you live in..."
beed83e5-cf43-4ff8-a8eb-17bdf3ecf325: "I am not entering that portal. I will not repeat Seberian's mistake."
a8af6649-517b-4307-9f89-c1197e931c69: "And the greatest appetite. Maybe their patronage will prove useful... I should assign a few of my people to watch them. If they decide to betray us, we should know."
349afab2-0b69-4543-81bd-c024bc50e9d2: {n}Pain lances through your entire being. You want to scream in the hope that it will alleviate this unbearable suffering... but then you realise that the agony, at once fleeting and unending, has already stopped. Your vision doubles and splotches of colour seem to swim in the air in front of you.{/n} "I have made a small addition to your physiology — I am eager to observe how you make use of your new trophy. And observe I shall, all the while voicing my opinions directly to your ears — wherever you may be."
79b7f4db-2d9d-4d4a-b2d8-6a0283e7aafc: Camilla Drivestem obstructs the Seneschal's plan. She must be either persuaded to change sides or neutralised by other means.
9015ef4b-862b-4d25-8842-2875b6cc34c4: The water flows deceptively serenely somewhere inside the submerged parts of the platform. You can hear the heavy, low groaning of metal buckling under pressure.
4a9114b1-a7a2-4529-886b-ce2e06d89deb: The traitor operates under the call sign "Elana."
f14934fe-a208-4894-b8ab-0ea21058c3d2: The creature's hit chance with ranged weapons is reduced to 10% or less, with melee weapons — 50% or less.
9d09fd23-1654-4ac2-a5bc-a4ed6602af8c: "Destroy the xenos commander and seize the key to our glorious victory!"
bc1045d0-b623-4d98-8b3b-b874ae63a783: "When the time comes, we shall resolve it as befits people of our status, with a duel, or else a game of regicide. Or perhaps you will succeed in convincing me that the dynasty and the protectorate are in safe hands... and I will abandon my claim."
8e5cff47-4d25-48bc-acec-13c931e94b50: {n}Eogunn looks aged — the {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g} light on his wasted face casts each crease, furrow, and implant scar into stark relief. His hands, usually resting contentedly on his stomach or pensively tweaking the pistons on his chin, now hang limply at his sides. He hovers barely above the floor, as if some unbearable weight were on the verge of crushing him into the deck. He does not look at Nuncius.{/n}
aacb8892-3ca4-47b9-946e-a7b1de181214: "It worked! The machine spirit responds! Starting the lift now."
80c5a448-5597-4131-b7cd-1bc594c0688f: The wearer deals +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} with arc rifles, {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Magnarail Blast{/g}, and {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}Transonic Wave{/g} to targets affected by {g|f:68f3934e6b5345808b49eaea6ce758a1}static field{/g}.
f8bc7f0e-bda2-447e-ac3f-3d36e5b20097: "I am a warrior in defence of His dominion. I am the Sword, Shield and Hammer of the Imperium. My transgressions shall be atoned for in His service..."
2a236b8e-f566-4d11-bcd7-8e08ce1ec007: "Pasqal, I believe this is a task for you."
52e2ed9a-d713-4236-be43-9695ddb0b8da: {n}The cogitator dutifully closes the data-repository and clears its vid-screen, to await further instructions.{/n}
50884d76-03a0-4105-b540-ab3c6d832c98: "Please, I am sick and tired of this game. Even after all these years, after all the modifications..." {n}Seberian raps his fingers against his chest, producing a hollow clanking sound from beneath his uniform.{/n} "...the noble houses have still not given up hope of finding ties to the Rogue Trader dynasty. If you knew how many such 'bastards' I had executed, you would not dare to spew such lies. You should abandon your dreams of the Warrant if you wish to keep your life."
c01f0428-39c9-4ec7-8f1c-5b0443581e13: {n}A moment later, the strange atmosphere in your chambers dissipates, and your frozen enforcers stir into motion once more. Exchanging bewildered looks, the pair hastily make the sign of the Aquila and haltingly mumble words of greeting, clearly ignorant of what has just transpired in these quarters.{/n}
e317af1d-52a1-432f-95d9-d81c06e2bfca: "I will. I will follow her, the first among many."
7e45bd22-c885-475b-b82b-06e847ad1a76: {n}Tervantias pokes his claw into your shoulder, dangerously close to an artery.{/n} "You are forgetting your place, specimen. I have gutted, deconstructed, and reimagined dozens of these pathetic mon-keigh trinkets you call servo-skulls. Not a single one was as insultingly primitive as this one."
425ad3ce-528d-4862-b77b-fdc6900ba28b: "Of course, Lord Captain. It appears that Zarkov is not reporting a full-scale invasion, more like strikes by individual squads. And there are no reports of a void blockade. The Chartist also relayed odd reports of enemies of Humanity forged of metal and clad in rotting flesh... but I am not sure that that part of the message can be trusted at all."
38ecfe02-ea63-49a5-9ded-b2788100687a: "Lord Captain, we have compared our augur readings to the data from the Dargonus cogitator. This world is GH-89-717, mentioned in the diary of Seberian von Valancius."
aea4ce4e-af80-49b7-bdb3-eff2594e13b5: "Prepare yourself, Eogunn. A difficult battle lies ahead — this is an incontrovertible fact."
86cb2aba-de52-46e0-9d08-e2ecc8ed4736: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski tried in vain to save the schism-wracked 32nd Merov Regiment, but was eventually forced to order its disbandment.
ec596f99-a7a7-4999-9732-1f8ef1cc1f87: The control runes on the console do not respond to your touch. The lift is inoperative.
447688f6-c0a8-4423-bd22-da47bbd097cb: "Genetor Februs, I trust you understand how unusual it is to speak to a mere servo-skull like this?" {n}Heinrix studies Nuncius with grim intent.{/n} "Let us pray this is only a sentimental whim on your part, rather than the presence of heresy within your device."
44316848-8b12-4bbc-84e1-e670021604a7: {n}Sparks crackle from the pistons on Eogunn's chin, as his batteries emit a warning growl. The Manipulus stares in fascination at the mechanical monster.{/n} "This construct is extremely dangerous, yet how unfathomable its nature is! If you truly intend to claim it, Rogue Trader, I assert my priority right to study it."
0544318d-bc87-4a40-8e5a-e8c2e5dde84f: "I find our conversations stimulating, and I will look forward to your next visit."
71ede9b4-422f-4eb5-b7e0-3d26ecfd7823: "I will cautiously permit myself to note that during our joint projects, Decabalus 4-16 has not given me a single reason to question his integrity. His rank is quite high, and I would recommend that you think twice before criticising his submitted theses."
cff36a60-b1f5-48ec-84cd-c1f66589145e: "This planet is beautiful in its wildness, but it does not welcome uninvited guests. I can sense something in its depths watching us hungrily."
8fa06831-5aaf-4611-b453-d4846c73ec48:
Using specialised facilities aboard their voidship, a Rogue Trader can replace their own body parts, as well as those of willing companions, with augments.
Once installed, augments cannot be unequipped, as the original body part is permanently lost. However, they can be replaced with standard augments if necessary.
Augments have both positive and negative effects.
4076b751-7aef-4a33-a8b1-283985e1797a: "Seberian von Valancius, I, Inquisitor Diodas af Irramon, name myself your executioner."
7c3599eb-6bb6-444d-a43e-fe3ea1d3167c:
The creature uses the {g|f:a42ec63134464c518f21d63ec6260a20}Crushing Blow{/g} attack if there is an enemy on the right side of it.
Otherwise, it uses {g|f:2c05b1a0654b4e77a6522226930a5619}Acidic Clot{/g}.
7a01179f-a079-4674-b7a5-90f46f2a9916: "One potential cause is a malfunction in the cognitive matrices — thought processes — causing Adept Alva-9 to incorrectly interpret the origins of the upgraded anchor-core — condemn it as devoid of sanctity. The destruction of sacred machines is a violation of all Sixteen Universal Laws. Alva-9's fate is a logical consequence."
431cd9d4-7354-4e08-a22b-7c6dd2c63af5: "I am assembling a war council. Does my retinue have any suggestions?"
6d6bca77-90cc-468d-8237-dc9aa17c48eb: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy if it will allow me to expose Genetor Ferrenz's lies. Access to the logs has been granted."
f08bb1ce-284f-4d65-b782-2669a2d5a721: The Rogue Trader has discovered the route of the gate's power cable. The time has come to deprive it of energy.
a46693c4-0600-4745-8796-b805e3de3376: "Batoshski, Seberian von Valancius. I believe you will get along."
22210a87-4da2-422d-a10c-a95dc259a859: "A thesis that neither Nuncius nor I will dispute. This ship is like an abscess teeming with corruption... and it is just about to burst."
72a35f4c-464f-4824-9765-1d44e4c300f8: The Adeptus Mechanicus looked favourably on the participation of Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs in the Magnae Accessio ceremony, which led to an increase in the efficiency of all industries in the von Valancius protectorate. The resulting labour shortage was addressed by the commissioning of a huge number of new servitors.
aa1268bc-dfec-4794-8758-00570a13c4c6: "I fear I shall be no less of a disappointment than Seberian, Inquisitor, for I too have nothing to repent of before you."
6a7762f9-3c2b-4649-b222-edc5e2a5b05a: "I do not make requests, Tech-Priest. I command."
331573f5-219d-49f3-9b19-95c9c1742992: This mark shows that centuries ago, Seberian landed in another part of the colossal hall.
6c694baa-2ce8-43f9-af3d-fdbb08c14178: All the flagship's weapons gain +5% hit chance.
73624f43-2a09-4276-87ce-9af0ac43a065: "After you left, those iron creatures pinned us down good. One beast crawled out with a sort of plate instead of legs. While I was busy twisting its head off, my boys started shouting that everything was coming down. I was distracted, and the damn thing blew up right under me. Woke up outside, in the shuttle. The lads hauled me out on their backs."
4e88aa24-c1fe-499c-920b-67f89145b2f4: "If you are cut off from command here, how are ranks appointed?"
fd6cd76b-b64b-4897-a40a-1e441f71f2de: "Ha, he's quite the gabbler, all right! Maybe the cog-bellied master hears voices in his head, too? I'm sure my friends from beyond the door would love to get together with them sometime."
b6fbd42e-dbad-4810-800b-fddfca2f70fc: "A guest upon my own ship." {n}Seberian gestures at the view from the bridge and clenches his fist with a grinding sound.{/n} "I will need time to come to terms with this."
e7a8d043-c6b7-428f-8d45-d9ef3b026afe: "I beg you not to pour salt in the wound, Rogue Trader. What that profane abomination did to Nuncius hurt me more deeply than all the blades he used to mistreat my body! I have been keeping a diagnostic vigil over my dearest colleague — I must complete the purification protocols to eradicate any corruption that may have infiltrated him. Thus far, however, the prognosis is optimistic — the integrity of his cogita-circuits is intact, and functionality corresponds to normal measures."
e457853a-c704-41f7-a000-6dd5e691cf90: "Where were Dunawski and Batoshski while the Cage was under attack?"
0d3e885c-84fb-4721-ba44-483279297dde: "Ours is far from a familial relationship, but we will stand together in battle."
36f3009e-e08d-42ee-a731-27d783a21625: {n}Your voice is louder than the rain and the wind, striking at Pask's very heart — he decisively whips around and points his weapon at the squad of Tech-Priests he came with.{/n}
e69fdbfa-9919-4dfa-a7ae-9914712a9546: {n}After breaching the hull with lascutters, the reconnaissance force discovers the skeleton of the lone pilot. Judging by his injuries, he died long before the crash.{/n}
a921deb3-4a5d-4c44-b843-f5e134f5f0d6: The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 have responded to the Rogue Trader's hail and invite you to visit their abode for a mutually beneficial exchange of information.
5365229b-3fb8-4c18-9d4f-37ac03ee7cb2: "Let them come. I do not object to gratitude."
5b2e6a96-f52f-4bef-ab3b-2abb9c49ab28: {n}Your question hangs in the air — and, after a few moments, the thought occurs to you that Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories and Overlord of the Museion, does not wish to admit his unseemly ignorance. After an awkward pause, the Necron mutters waspishly,{/n} "I have several... theories."
e3069b9c-0581-4caf-901f-c2ba8511f689: "Do you see, my heir? I need not demand obedience from underlings. People follow my orders because that is the natural way of things. You, however, are a long way from that."
ef4094e2-c537-491e-bd26-3461e2c1a311: "Oh, wisest of men, I'd never dare ask for more! Please convey my infinite gratitude to your companion. I can't wait to hear the stories behind these items, especially where you acquired them and their market value."
7637b1e5-b5fc-4035-aed6-5a2acd3ebb52: "Sergeant, this is part of our duty. If we make a futile attempt to save one doomed man, we will lose him and a dozen other soldiers we could have helped. Toughen up."
ac61f1fa-6113-452d-974d-cad169694eaa: "It could not have been otherwise, pure-hearted sister. Now the iron xenos will drink from the cup of the Allfather's wrath. Glorious sagas will be written about the captain who was freed by the Aett-Vater!"
4522d521-7ef6-4c15-adbd-d3d874b506f0: "The theory about interference in the evolution of species on Zarkov has been confirmed. In short, all flora and fauna bear the marks of ancient genetic interference. The Drovers possess some sort of psy-sensitivity, though they are utterly warp-inert themselves. The Magos's theory is that the Drovers were bred as a weapon against psykers or to clean up and suppress {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}warp{/g}-infested areas."
5f1d6ee0-4fd4-4b25-9067-8f9a7b98b21a: My heir gave the order just in time, and everyone froze in perfect obedience to {mf|his|her} will. Rapid signals in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} sounded as the Tech-Priests in the rearguard advanced slowly, raising their plasma guns.
bedd3940-d675-4fde-9332-a022f9089d60: "Eogunn, does such an unusual life form not interest you?"
e7436fb6-4721-4a94-a061-bb74fa6b8471: "It is time for Camilla Drivestem to be handed over for interrogation."
2d82ac7f-6344-4737-92f2-53f4d2cb0603: "I require more details about these plans."
9ffc5fae-0271-4cf9-b1e1-2bc937e1872e: Allows you to open the Augmentation menu
ba6ea01f-c040-43be-b9d9-d2bf5883c386: "However, calculating the path to comprehending the anomaly requires complete data."
17e45d74-16a8-4c6e-9c70-0a96dd3bd89f: "Why not just combine all three minds to serve as the basis?"
3f1e88a0-7dd8-4303-9031-573072c9a547:
The user dashes through an enemy within a 4-cell radius to the cell on the enemy's opposite side and makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g}.
This movement does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}, and this attack does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.
1877ea7a-e620-4565-b764-9fb870259e44:
After attacking with a ranged weapon, Eogunn suffers {unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
While Eogunn is suffering from a {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}, the maximum range of his ranged attacks is reduced by −3.
c0e57efe-9ea0-4d7a-8b4e-45f8a1351cca: "When Seberian convenes his war council, I will decide how we should proceed. Wait for a sign."
5f70b68c-1b43-4129-bee4-6a41e58c53da: "Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}, I have a plan. I'll be in and out in thirty minutes, and then we'll meet at the agreed place. I'll be there, you have my word." {n}Jarub perks up noticeably in eager anticipation.{/n}
6735d2d5-20ab-487b-9fbb-e716cc1ae9ad: "The urge to replace flesh with sacred metal is deemed a natural one."
082e9018-5248-4b3a-b5ba-ee5904f58bc4: "An unfortunate outcome. You are well within your rights, but I cannot help but wonder if this was a decision made in haste? Have you exhausted the potential of my knowledge and skills?"
93a67f36-42bd-4e89-a973-98bc0e2a19db: [Kill the Triasomata] "I shall grant you the Emperor's Mercy."
de3b34d2-6076-4309-981a-3c67d8cda47c: "Can anyone other than Batoshski swear the oath? You, perhaps?"
bc2bc879-d2a1-4d04-9af9-2b0e202a2922: {n}Your words leave the Tech-Priest flustered.{/n} "Lord Captain, I am compelled to ask — rhetorically verify — if you fully realise the consequences of such a decision. The station will be irrevocably destroyed along with its entire population."
8f7f291d-c993-4f22-b1ba-8376a58b866a: "First of all, allow me to express my gratitude for permitting me to place a cortical implant in the injured man. Thanks to your mercy, one more person has been able to continue his service to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}." {n}The Vivisector makes the sign of the Aquila with his hands and bows to you again, even more deeply than before.{/n}
177db690-3ad2-4269-b849-8a586fecc9ab: "Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ex-17's tech-clergy sends data of the sacred rituals necessary for a specialist to elevate a machine spirit."
facee0b0-1908-4dc9-9807-249c50201755: "What has gotten into you? Why would you insult the Haemonculus?"
d566b6d5-5e05-45ec-bdda-73129a5d0674: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague, noble Astartes. He is irreplaceable and his contribution to our joint endeavour is utterly invaluable. His loss would be akin to losing a part of myself. This is an incontrovertible fact."
48ea93e2-2572-4438-a613-0fc9ca97541d: The Merovians claim that Isimond recently stood watch at the outpost and insisted the entire guard be replaced with his own men.
3e7a724f-7304-4523-9b88-520e6699d22d: After {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsOverdriveFullGlossary}galvanising{/g} an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g}, the user gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and +3 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.
0709a1a4-9c15-4332-8e76-468b83536417: "Wait. You mentioned two attempts? There was another Triasomata?"
a6f388a3-4824-4d34-9349-7e18734cb25c: {n}With his last vestiges of strength, Nuncius clasps a mangled hand over Eogunn's and nods.{/n}
aa5eafa3-8317-4fff-8797-6c7af0551e56: Exalt-117 can be convinced of the chrono-anomaly's existence and his support in the council secured.
f1756829-dd1a-4e0f-a0d1-7f08cbbb199d: "In that case... Proceeding to Protocol 17.88." {n}In a single motion, Alva-9 takes out some kind of formidable-looking combat device and hands it to you.{/n}
5dcf0b40-c736-41fb-a003-d442b8b1043b: "A superb question! It is quite difficult to explain to a layperson, but I will try. To put it quite crudely, Nuncius helps me to think. He constitutes an exceptionally complex network of algorithms that augment my own. They contain conflicting points of view that seek out flaws in my reasoning, and information that is more useful to me if it is not kept in my own head, so I delegate it to him. He is wholly unique."
c99206d5-bee4-4767-9532-a6cde71f83ab: "You are the quintessence of the will of the Imperium. Your purpose in life is to expand it and strengthen its power where other subjects cannot reach. You do not explore the frontier. You are the frontier."
ceee193c-89b2-4741-a9d2-16d57d018bb4: {n}The Genetor takes some time to respond.{/n} "The noted act of sabotage is classified as having an extremely pernicious effect on discipline in the sector. Priority: critical."
210371e1-0a72-4dd5-a2e4-798d90caa0e6: "Then how do I know that the right armrest of the throne in the palace hall sits slightly higher than the left?"
d38913b4-7304-4794-bc38-b91f49c23748: "How much trouble one piece of paper can bring. And how many opportunities." {n}The eyes of the Cold Trader glint greedily.{/n} "Consider it a favour, a whim, or a risky investment — I'm no fool, my life is not worth a throne to you. But I'll give you everything I have now. And if fortune kisses me on the lips... Well. I've been called many things, but an ingrate? Never."
df94dd58-e7a4-4603-891a-d62b9ef34cd3: "Genetic confirmation of dynastic status required." {n}With an off-putting beep, the analyser needle lengthens slightly.{/n}
dfa3b34a-226d-47bf-9796-2d9362547cdd: {n}Eogunn is absorbed in prayer. Nuncius floats over his shoulder — the real Nuncius now. The shape of Nuncius's skull is somewhat deformed due to the transmutations he has undergone, but it is unmistakably human.{/n} "Mistakes — they shape us, granting knowledge to some while dooming others. But it is wrong to think that our own mistakes alone influence us — sometimes other people's mistakes prove just as instructive or fatal. Mine were the ruin of Nuncius, but they also {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}brought me back to the path of purity of thought and deed{/d}. I grieve and feel grateful. Such is the inescapable duality of being."
2a95d47b-3203-445b-8b70-768b18829b2e: You recognise the shard on the pedestal — it is the mysterious artefact stolen by Trazyn the Infinite from the Rogue Trader's chambers.
46403e05-4467-4a6e-a62b-bf211e59fe7a: {n}Eogunn gleefully throws his hands in the air.{/n} "Nuncius, witness the act of creating a primitive technological idol! Please record everything carefully — this is a unique opportunity to observe how a culture deprived of the Omnissiah's light attempts to interpret His design!"
4e00f3b9-e803-4b53-8ba6-020d26009ee8: "Nothing to report on board, I hope?"
80f34494-8b98-449f-bb7a-945a5a0e3742: {n}Idira casts a reproachful look at you.{/n} "Why did you do that? He will kill her..."
63ec4929-b4fd-449b-ac82-d41d4bdf22b9: "Gnotec Schwartz, sergeant of the second deck's detachment... Or is it third? I can't remember." {n}The criminal clenches his teeth, trying to stifle the pain. Several tiny blisters burst on his temple, but the hands gripping the weapon remain steady.{/n}
03a9a2c0-7af9-4abb-b19d-3ac44abf1e74: "Vigdis, set a course for the planet."
83655eba-9a24-45dd-8272-d29c96332512: All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|46db7d244e84490d991b238b4b5cf837} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|46db7d244e84490d991b238b4b5cf837} {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
4c76a0b2-7ae4-40f5-b76f-97ba14fd7fd0: "The refractive transmuter began to rearrange Nuncius's body on a molecular level. Metal turned to flesh, and flesh to metal in a monstrous cycle of wicked infinity. At times, he would produce a scream, but after a second his vocal cords would turn to lead and his tongue to tin, and the screams would abruptly cut off. I had no time to reflect — to save his life, I had to hastily modify the stasis sacellum and immerse Nuncius in it along with the artefact. It did not stop the agony, but it did stop him from dying. It gave me the chance to find a solution."
dcf441c6-d5d6-425c-8db2-0cf422c25db3: "Esteemed Genetor, I have the highest respect for your craft, but I absolutely refuse to allow experimental rejuvenat procedures to be performed on myself. Be so kind as to find yourself another victim."
4584b472-69b3-4572-83a7-5a0000011346: {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell crackles nervously.{/n} "My hypothesis is... is flawed? But how? It's inconceivable! Or... or have I strayed and committed heresy by believing that I had comprehended the nature of the Machine God, by thinking that we are simpler creatures than Him?"

569dcd69-e17a-4862-b28f-bf2b05646b22: "As has mine. Questions can reveal more about the asker than anything they may say about themselves."
8d19ee12-8e0d-4ca1-9588-eae12db0fa9e: The branches of the plant are so sharp that one look at them causes your palms to tingle unpleasantly.
0faa26ed-0899-4af2-8396-cc77b15d086d: [Leave the device alone] "We will find another way out."
3bcbebee-17c5-4fab-96fa-aaf4ceaaf186: "Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I look forward to our conversation, Rogue Trader."
5771bb04-1102-4b1e-bb36-2b58adaa838e: "The weak and cowardly will rot in the filth. Those who possess strength and determination will ascend to greater things."
9f8bd99b-c63e-4810-8f76-293fe66db359: {n}Nuncius obediently turns on his built-in {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g}, illuminating the subjects on the tables. It seems he is unwilling to divulge the subtleties of the experiment, silently ceding the right to answer to Eogunn.{/n}
8d9ab006-8cb7-4cb2-a7f4-8695f80db9fa: "He requires a few more healing procedures... but he will be fully recovered in no time at all! You can speak to him later in the Sector Bionica." {n}Martinax maintains a gentle grip on his colleague's shoulder, as if fearing he will collapse.{/n}
dbf2e54b-8f0d-42de-b492-5597b88175ed: "Then do not delay. Do what you must."
0718ca9e-22aa-483c-b350-bb2aff3626c1: {n}The crowd erupts with a chilling roar, echoing your words. Batoshski glares around in fury. For a second, you think he will not back down, but then he relaxes his grip and steps away.{/n}
3c5b40f6-6cc3-4fd6-82d7-64850ce7e1b2: "Now that the problem has been resolved, let's talk about future prospects."
d0c38111-82b2-4d8d-997d-e1ec9885444b: "Come now, Lord Seberian, you can't even defeat me with that blade!
efbc7ae4-e227-41df-b862-77bb12a88986: "I believe that life has no meaning."
bcb72aef-f25f-4a01-a2c8-52ac9930b5ba: "We're just like these machines, lads. We'll do whatever those at the top command."
74a1b66b-0b87-4244-b6e0-fc985ecbc1f3: "Can't you see we have fallen into a xenos trap? Everything around you is just a replica!"
6e02a69d-9da6-4043-82f5-da11e0617126: "What do you understand by the term 'righteousness'?"
eda0161a-7243-4882-9264-7003abbb8020: {n}The memory module belonged to the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Exalt-117, the {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}Enginseer{/g} of the von Valancius flagship. It appears that your ancestor made the Enginseer part of his retinue for a landing on the planet. Exalt-117 proceeded to keep meticulous records of the expedition's progress. One can but hope that the surviving entries will lift the veil surrounding Seberian's fate.{/n}
fc3dc87f-1561-4b82-bdb1-b887f29a76a7: {n}The Magos says nothing for a time, the hum of his metal body the only reminder of his presence. Then he sighs, heavily and wearily.{/n} "If there is no other way, I accept this point of reference."
aa6f092b-6336-44f4-8037-beef2f78c818: "What a surprise, Captain-Quartermaster! I got orders from Colonel Batoshski to assist {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}. He didn't mention you."
c01dbd7e-8f2e-4801-ae91-d2e157207ddb: <u>(2 × ({g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}INT{/g} bonus + number of target's {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks))</u>
6425d61c-79c0-45e2-be6a-9d7a37e1f714: {n}A gasp of astonishment escapes Cassia's lips.{/n} "Lord Captain... the fading soul of this man has blossomed anew with colour, the very moment you drew near. The venerable medicae speak truly. Your mere presence instils in this wretch a will to cling to life."
eb023cca-1191-4bb4-bed6-72a14eebb43d: "The reinforcements sent by House Gaprak disappeared on the approach to the residence. Do you know anything more about it?"
d670963a-24c6-4b04-a7d0-358973de9c72: "So be it, holy warrior. The child of the blessed Sanguinius is no longer with us, but the recompense for his death is in our hands. The wrath of the God-Emperor shall fall upon the heads of the faithless!"
f5443b2c-37bb-4469-8f18-96a302c2b577: "I will set foot on the path of redemption. The lessons I have learned from my attempts to create the Triasomata will allow me to direct my skills in a course pleasing to the Omnissiah. I will grant longevity to the worthy, enabling them to defy death in service to the Imperium. In the likeness of the Motive Force, I will nourish the key elements of the Imperium's machinery so that their functions will be carried out to the last."
7c79696b-1453-4b2a-a34b-c13a7bca4a9a: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, most holy Lord Captain! How may I serve you?"
70104009-fcd2-487b-b2b2-bae215c34fab: "The patient disrupted the augment removal procedure and is resisting the accepted treatment protocols."
03353836-0c00-47bc-af04-56838acb48c8: "Unfortunately, after the incident in the Sector Bionica, my colleague is in poor condition. I have heard that Vivisector Martinax is personally treating him, predicting a speedy recovery with the Omnissiah's grace. As soon as you receive word that the Genetor has been restored to functionality, we will return to this conversation."
1a1f7ca8-552c-4dfb-9e7c-2fbc18684d7c: "The Omnissiah's providence did not bring us together. The temple is quite vast and it is no surprise that two learned men never once crossed paths. After all, each of us is blessed with our own function and fulfilling that function is a solitary effort."
144fe723-1618-4e1d-8659-f817bbf521d6: [Taste the game bird] "I bet they don't serve this on forge worlds!"
955994aa-dbe7-40ee-99db-a15b9ef6f1ce:
You will encounter enemies with various {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} and features. An icon next to an enemy's portrait indicates that they are under the influence of some kind of {g|Encyclopedia:CommonStatuses}effect{/g}. Click {mouse_icon|RightMouse} on the effect's icon to see more details.
If you wish to learn more about an enemy, click {mouse_icon|RightMouse} on their portrait or the enemy themselves.
63f0e5bb-d5dd-4875-94dc-da4e3aab6d5d: "I like the idea of mobile units."
0af89794-c772-49e5-bdbd-efda0745446e: Whenever the user {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g}, they use {g|f:1c5f4edca9f64fe0911bc946e0b4ea4a}Shield Bash{/g} against the attacker if they have a shield equipped.
70dbed17-70f7-4cd7-85ef-fc26ea57c1a8: {n}A moment passes, and the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} draws a shuddering breath and startles back to consciousness.{/n} "Twenty percent: hypertension, momentary loss of consciousness. The Motive Force is surging uncontrollably, additional portocaval shunts are required to propitiate it and compensate for the excess pressure... Well, then. You were right, Nuncius. Abdominal extraction is impossible — this is an incontrovertible fact."
dcaa7ea9-771c-44bb-a0b1-aa97666311da: Urged the Arch-Militant to adhere to her own convictions and ignore other people's opinions.
32e0f87c-c687-42b5-ad0e-8a7d159abd4d: "Nuncius and I belong to a secret sect of xenarites. Our path of Knowledge is the study of xenotechnology for the benefit of the Imperium. Many of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Priesthood of Mars{/g}, who interpret the precepts of the Omnissiah very narrowly, deem our path a heretical schism. After our ordination on Stygies VIII, Nuncius and I went searching for samples of Necron xenotech — a nearly impossible task, and thus, a fascinating one. On one such expedition, we came into conflict with other Tech-Priests — we were close to death, but the Inquisition, who had been observing our research in secret, decided that we would be more useful alive. Of course, it was only once we arrived on Amsanct that we learned that the Inquisition had been behind the confrontation."
1dfd853e-1e7a-41b8-b681-966a6ae1eb52: "He must be confident enough in his own impunity that he does not deem the Rogue Traders of the Koronus Expanse to be a threat. I cannot discern if this is down to recklessness, or if it is a sign of extreme power."
fcdd4e1e-1219-44b2-99f3-19a9ca3605b0:
The user deals +{uip|Melee|4b31f1364ad44cb495b94abbfd39b5ff}% more {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and +{uip|Ranged|4b31f1364ad44cb495b94abbfd39b5ff}% more ranged {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical damage{/g}.
The user suffers −{uip|DR|4b31f1364ad44cb495b94abbfd39b5ff}% less damage.
e64337df-bfc8-493d-83e0-4dbbc1394d7f: Explained to the Arch-Militant that the strong can earn themselves a decent existence in the Imperium.
8765e775-f88f-4ce4-af8b-03abfcd24d71: [Examine the coat of arms on the wall]
74739830-d2a9-4ba6-be19-03a287c67a7b: "For research purposes, I hope?" {n}The Tech-Priest tilts his head.{/n} "The long-term effects of bearing such a... thing that you may see before you, Rogue Trader. They are, I believe, depressingly illustrative."
23c97ab3-3b53-4e3d-abae-4566ccb912b3: "Registering a transgression of the fourth... fifth degree? The Warrant of Trade was returned with a serious error in its coordinates." {n}There is disapproval in Pasqal's voice, but it is unclear whether it is due to what happened to the Warrant or the inaccurate calculations for teleportation.{/n}
9c51a8a4-d30b-4f70-a7f8-28627774f0ae: Eogunn is immediately teleported to the target cell.
4f3755bb-06be-4681-ad57-f7b7066ed6b5: {n}Seberian lets out a low, satisfied chuckle.{/n} "Do not delude yourself. You shall need to work much harder than that to instil fear in my heart."
9b4686b1-9289-43f8-ab5e-bef928bdca83: "I will note that this is not the original architectural design. The palace has been reconstructed and upgraded several times to match the dynasty's growing status. You can find more details in the data-repository."
3d0db6f5-f16f-4aa3-a8d5-bfd5913ec5f1: [Hold out the title bestowal order] "Are you planning to recognise the merits of Isimond Sauerback?"
46d8457c-bd95-476f-8c9c-2212359117ab: "Now..." {n}Trazyn raises his hand in an impassioned gesture and pauses theatrically.{/n} "...get out of my Museion."
259094a1-be30-460a-836f-fe5e4604b444: "Why, this is the very place that the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}unfortunate soul in the shuttle{/d} was trying to save. I fear that we will find nothing but a graveyard down on the surface..."
50530031-6631-4999-9677-33953df5f009: Enemies hit by Eogunn suffer +15% more {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} until the end of combat. Does not stack.
a4ffe962-b288-48d5-b49c-af8e03728fee: "I have come to the conclusion that the only correct decision in the context of this experiment was not to conduct it in the first place. My methods were correct and my intentions good, but I clung to my hypothesis to the last, in blind defiance of Nuncius's arguments and objective reality. I was attempting to wring usefulness out of people like charge from a dying battery. But regardless of how well and long a battery served before, when it is finally depleted, isn't the more rational response to dispose of it and replace it with a new one? Righteousness is a trait of these people, but it is not their primary function. I see that now."
8d8b0188-9312-4f26-a90a-9db860db5536: "Impressive! I am indeed of the Noblis Minoris Uratli."
703bb2e8-281a-4368-8755-dc28ebaf01d2: "He leans on his staff to walk. He behaves far more intelligently than other xenos. He is talkative and conceited. None of this is typical of Necrons, which is why I see him as a threat of the highest order."
80fbba3b-76cf-4a4b-9699-5e9c7a37ed52: {n}But the feelings break against the unyielding rock of your will.{/n}
037bc502-f9b3-4dec-a952-5fa3428d3dda: "I fear my rendering will lack the sophistication inherent in Nuncius's {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}, but, to crudely summarise, he is honoured by your attention and records the moment as significant."
f6dcb06b-5477-4991-bfc7-1bc7cf5f1c24: {n}The scouting shuttle rapidly descends toward the pyramid. The team reports via vox-channel that no signs of life have been found near it. The mysterious structure is made of solid stone and shows no hint of any doors or windows. Nearby, the scouts find evidence of an Imperial camp.{/n}
3e0e64e0-551d-4151-8a55-76a00121dea5: The creature explodes when adjacent to an enemy, inflicting {g|f:6984627865854c4b851172d7f7c6a124}soaked in pus{/g} on the target.
05ec0eb3-a53a-41f0-9a2d-6aae99e7406c: "What is so surprising about my desire to be rid of you as soon as possible?" {n}The Necron's voice is even and arrogant.{/n}
96d89968-da1a-4d17-8a24-e75966bb1676: {n}The colonel looks at you in surprise then nods.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
ae6fbba3-0070-432e-910d-012ddef01bb8: "Well, in that case, all that remains is to offer up a prayer of thanks for your survival. May the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} bless the deeds of the most noble House Gaprak, both those already accomplished and those yet to come. I am sure His unseen presence will never leave you."
a5ce3374-667a-4348-89bf-51fab5ce8112: {n}The colonel fixes you with a fierce glare, but nonetheless unclips a pair of hand flamers from his belt.{/n} "Here, weapons of the First Call-Up. Rare and precious. When your time comes, detonate them before you die."
f35faefb-3c2e-4969-8ebc-c24d914a0256: {n}Dunawski's ringing voice makes Batoshski, standing beside her, wince.{/n} "Did you all hear that? Von Valancius is with us now! {mf|He|She} will slay the Drover, endure the Trial Match with the colonel, and accept our oath! The Final Order shall be fulfilled, just as was promised!"
f2fedfb6-d548-475c-a0d1-df4ee105f492: Take the bionic arm to the Sector Bionica on the flagship
c6ea844c-d11d-4010-98ca-8f8f08cf52dc: "We'll be on your trail once we've regrouped."
a14b5234-6126-43ea-b055-9e29b52a6ec1: If there are enemies in front of the maw, it uses the {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} ability. When the flower is killed, or its {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced to less than 75% and 40%, the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used.
d7e046b6-a1b7-4619-9d41-e12de046a358: The great machine has fallen silent. Its cables and conduits snake toward the stasis sacellum sarcophagus as if mourning over Nuncius's solitary body in its final resting place.
8b579df4-5070-4764-be15-27f23d735da2: "I will give you what Calcazar is after in exchange for your help."
b116a87d-9cb1-4fd1-8fb6-39109a0c0fa0: "A fine lesson for all those who tempt fate and try the patience of the God-Emperor. But your lesson is not yet finished. I have a task for you."
3368a660-7b07-4cbc-a92f-ab289617248a: {n}Seberian masters his shock and permits himself a short, grinding chuckle.{/n} "You are an original soul, {name} — and I speak not of your conversations with the void. To blow up the dynastic palace, even an illusory one... a decidedly radical decision, and fortunate it is that we both escaped the consequences. Still, no one could deny you have courage."
e9d4efa4-3a1f-4639-8c4e-3096b3d6b40c: "I do not know what it is."
42c6a6e7-91df-4553-91d2-3bdcca4baff9: "Merovian scum. Thank you for your vigilance, {name}." {n}With a hissed exhale through his teeth, the captain touches his {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g}.{/n} "No, cancel the alarm. The situation is under control. The deserter has been eliminated."
0dbf3ac8-908d-4006-902b-836a36b858f6: "The originally intended target, then?" {n}Juvenna clicks her tongue sarcastically.{/n}
2489aa2a-c0c0-41c6-a997-cc9841faba0f: "Tell your superiors that we are reinforcements sent by Mistress Elana."
10432db8-2a79-4e58-bc2d-acc7ef7bb097: [Gesture for the guards to stand down]
070212dd-35fc-488d-80c3-ee0c65f613a5: "If the God-Emperor wills it." {n}The wounded man slowly makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}
a4f25467-723c-4b0d-8d0d-2368e73a2a2a: {n}The Tech-Priest nods.{/n} "I await the continuation of this stimulating conversation — and your new statements."
ec301c7b-fe44-403a-b5c2-e148d52010c7: "The mon-keigh that came to thank the elantach for showing concern for their bodies were sincere. But a slave caressing their master's hand for a morsel of food is not something I would deem beautiful."
04fbf04b-bfbc-4d30-be57-cbfe8af35cf4: {n}Laria gives you the faintest of nods and closes her eyes. The only sign that she still lives is the rasping gurgle of her pierced lungs in their stubborn struggle to draw breath.{/n}
ccd4b8e7-2b88-44f9-94b5-797131f2a184: The sleek, elongated lines of the supporting structures are intricately intertwined, revealing a rare fusion of functionality and aesthetics. The craftsperson who made this implant was clearly an artist... as well as a freethinker.
774715aa-b310-4a49-a1ea-c9ad0c733482: "Unthinkable... How is this possible?" {n}Seberian raises his astonished gaze to you.{/n} "How did you know? Rest assured, I will demand an answer from you after the battle is over. For now — accept my thanks, I owe you my life."
eff28bc7-7902-4c75-a4c2-c1ef60c864da: {n}The noisy procession, smelling of sacred unguents and sweat, falls silent as soon as you appear. Those at the head of the crowd step forward, one of them waving the wrapped stump of his right arm, while another gawps at you with his one eye. The medicae officers, shielded by a line of enforcers, also stare in your direction.{/n}
860c006b-3e82-4c08-90c0-ee426ed4b21b: "So you share my admiration for Saint Elana's deeds?"{n}Juvenna lets out a soft, charming laugh, as if hoping that anyone around you will mistake your conversation for idle chitchat.{/n}
8b164f92-a5ea-432e-8a23-d35ab999fd83: "If a layperson perceives phenomena in their spatial environment, and these phenomena are not detectable by any other observer, then that layperson is required to triangulate the observed data according to established reference points, and preserve his shame in silence."
e90e4c18-5fe3-44fb-93e0-f82948278bda: "The Merovians are no models of virtue. Seberian had to specifically order that the fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g} be honoured and given a fitting burial. But for any other fallen, the Merovians were permitted to do away with special ceremonies."
73c5c549-1ec2-47a1-94b7-dc653f9abcd7: The creature makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} using its branch.
b7d7aff0-aebb-47e2-9d0b-01cc3fe18261: "Yes, {mf|sir|ma'am}. No good to anyone on solid ground."
257eb250-9bb3-4962-b878-15b4bfe9e475: "They each have their own end goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research for the security of Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."
587cbbd9-18ac-471b-aab3-250fd331ce28: "Wasn't my intention, but what's done is done."
e01e7595-cc80-4981-bd80-82617dab6064: Deals <u>(from 24 to 48)</u> shock damage with 40% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
15ee1874-110d-4488-8760-2e9ddb08b6b8: "Well, I shall readily share my thoughts."
e024baaa-da0e-4812-8fc8-c0ceacd9d579: We were exhausted and wounded but not broken, not even by our encounter with the faceless horrors of the catacombs. We remained determined to exact vengeance on Trazyn for every outrage perpetrated against House von Valancius.
ab78e5e8-6280-43a0-a38d-5355cd1a7151: {n}Nuncius's account remains a mystery to you, safely hidden behind the grin of your interlocutor.{/n}
1b44a059-b1ce-4c86-b638-d619bd4ca98e: {n}Batoshski nods and barks out a few orders.{/n}
33c8e40c-439f-4e11-b0b5-69f9559786d1: "My lord, the Merovians mistook us for the enemy and were the first to open fire."
47a64472-7a6e-459e-924f-c3c07001d05c: {n}Izdrig spits blood and snarls. Now you understand why he resisted the Drover's screams with such ease: the howl of the beast in his mind is far louder. With a roar, he lunges at you, locking you in a crushing embrace. The knife slips from your hand, clattering across the floor.{/n}
