aca20693-3bd4-4a76-947f-9af122d367d3: {n}Eogunn's ponderous body drops to the deck with a clang. The servo-skull he called Nuncius continues hovering silently above him. The machine's empty eye sockets stare blankly into the distance, awaiting new commands.{/n}
d8290e05-f3d7-4ca6-b892-32a603b671f1: "I must urge you not to visit the laboratory in my absence, Interrogator. Nuncius becomes quite unsettled when he cannot find our materials for testing in their proper places."
5047a6e2-4973-4bf1-95ef-5533a21f7ba5: "May the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} bless the Lord Captain for this sanctioned audience! This tech-procession has come reciting the canticles of gratitude. Let us sing of the Lord Captain's concern for those who have forsaken their flesh in the service of the machine spirit! The voices of metal will sing the praises of your piety throughout the decks of the ship. Give us leave to switch to the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Techna-Lingua{/g}, which will convey our admiration more accurately than limited words." {n}Binharic trills ring out across the deck, melding with the hum of the {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitators{/g}.{/n}
bd62385c-f47f-4255-b330-ee8c86408ca0: {n}Laria meets death with a smile of relief and gratitude. Seberian, standing beside you, turns away but does not hinder the Emperor's Mercy that you bestow.{/n}
39ab44fd-a3fa-4837-8bd0-13babbba464b: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I beg your pardon, but this cannot wait. Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar entreats you to visit the Sector Bionica at your earliest convenience. The ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne, is at risk of being lost forever."
60ba62f0-5370-439f-b740-311959d7b0f2: "Do not test my patience, mon-keigh. Unless forming a coherent sentence from a collection of sounds is a task too daunting for a mind as rudimentary as yours?"
8f20cd05-1cc9-455c-850e-a6d1a0dec625: This character has already been back in time this {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Until the next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they can approach the Chronomancer without being sent back again.
bb82b826-48a4-436b-816f-e2de087e9d26: "To continue our conversation about poetry, noble Astartes. I have analysed the verse form recorded from your words and, with the help of Nuncius, slightly corrected the rhythm. Now the even-numbered lines rhyme through assonance and the odd-numbered lines through consonance, which has had a positive effect on its structure."
b7d1e9ca-3a8a-4fea-93f3-21e5a8bcab95: "To become part of a greater cause! Not as despised penal outcasts, but as those who have found atonement! Those who survived! Those who prevailed!" {n}The crowd nods in agreement with Dunawski, their eyes fixed on you with open admiration.{/n}
09516dc1-e56a-4283-b91e-b0d6ee599a4a: {n}A glob of plasma misses you by inches, but still singes your hair. Struck by return fire, the man falls flat on his back. As soon as his body hits the floor, the figures around you spring into action, Sauerback barking out orders.{/n}
6058be98-b3e2-4d30-b8ee-1064c1cbdf17:
The combat {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} of characters differ depending on their archetype. Available abilities are located at the bottom right of the screen on the abilities panel. To read the full description of the ability, hover your cursor over its icon or click {mouse_icon|RightMouse} on it.
Click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on the icon to use the ability. Before the ability is used, you will get to review its estimated outcome while hovering your cursor over a character or an area of your choosing. You will also see the ability's {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g}, and each character in this area will have a number displayed over them denoting the probability of being successfully affected. If the ability's {g|Encyclopedia:CommonStatuses}effect{/g} is guaranteed to work, the ability's icon is displayed instead of a number. When you are ready to use the ability, click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} again to confirm your choice.
During your adventures, your characters will gain new abilities and {g|Encyclopedia:Talent}talents{/g} as their power grows. You can view the full list of available abilities and talents on the features tab in the character menu [{bind|OpenCharacterScreen}].
cb4ea418-4d9a-45e3-aeeb-270cb106eba9: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The heretical research turned the renegade Tech-Priests into immortal monsters fuelled by the humours of still-living servants. After that, no injury was incurable on the flagship — but the price was often the patient's soul and freedom.
296b5129-e79c-43f0-b1b7-ddc8ceba48ec: "Lord Captain, they are blatantly ignoring us. What in the Throne is going on here?"
c63b1be0-05ad-41c3-9475-e9636567b134: "The specimen is permanently damaged, Rogue Trader. Convulsive limb activity and complete desynchronisation of movement prevent us from adopting the hypothesis that the Necron is fully functional. Nonetheless, it is still infinitely dangerous, like all of them."
889c0f4b-caca-412a-83ae-2fb4045169f1: "A strange semblance of a song, harsh and cruel to an unprotected mind — that is what I hear. For you, even perceiving its presence is likely a difficult task. For me, however..." {n}Yrliet grimaces, and it is clear that the mysterious phenomenon is causing her genuine pain.{/n}
d0ca04c3-41fb-4d90-9295-e9d9c20d3b95: {n}Tervantias's lip twitches, and his voice sharply drops an octave, becoming a low, menacing hiss.{/n} "You presume to make choices for me, specimen? Meddle again, and I will graft your lips to your eyelids."
11014d09-d228-4e46-9bde-f91d3d10d62e: {n}The High Factotum clears his throat and grimaces.{/n} "During the uprising instigated by the rebellious Master of Whispers, the Sector Bionica was besieged. The Genetors and medicae officers heroically defended the throne, but eventually the rebels broke through. Most of the defenders fell in the battle, and many machines were lost or damaged. Many were able to be restored, but the throne was particularly badly damaged."
43a29de1-81d4-45d8-8809-1f619e7ff3bf: "It is my creed. The incontrovertible fact that has defined my existence for as long as I can recall, and I recall a great deal. I have devoted myself to the mysteries of flesh and metal, to the processes by which one joins with the other, by which they live in union and how they die. I am intimately familiar with machines such as the one that I restored to life — I will school the members of the priesthood on board in its litanies of maintenance and operation, and reveal the secrets of the command runes so they may operate it themselves."
3488f549-bcf4-48c4-8da2-a6d8f7d471c6: "Of course we get along! It would be unprofessional to involve my personal feelings in our work." {n}Martinax smiles thinly. You get the persistent feeling that he has not told you the whole truth.{/n}
10a48120-8bb8-4cb3-b54d-390ae385bc2a: "You require the Ordos' expert assessment to determine the heretical nature of this mechanism?" {n}Heinrix pauses, then exhales and nods.{/n} "This is heresy. Destroy it."
91427289-f5a8-4749-b994-2c3ca32d217a:
The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed.
If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
The user suffers +1 stack of {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.
da298a3e-6293-4898-9121-65e89ad50d8b: {n}With each of his many ocular implants focused closely on the patient, Genetor Ferrenz is rooting around inside the man's open skull with a thin, sharp, probe-like instrument. Meanwhile, Chirurgeon Martinax's hands, clad in bloodstained gloves, are holding an injector of yellowish solution, which he administers into the patient's brain matter at regular intervals.{/n}
a7e021a8-372b-4d72-a02d-d9c003ea742d: "I will find a worthy place for it within my collection and preserve it unchanged for centuries to come. You and others of your kind can scarcely comprehend the value of this phenomenon. I, however, will mark its significance as it deserves."
bc67e8f9-0209-4f98-ba10-e9e3f6d1b699: {n}The torpedo salvo makes the flagship shudder, and the xenos creation is blown to pieces by its crushing onslaught. The ship's engineers estimate that a direct hit should leave nothing but a melted wreck behind.{/n}
d548a2a1-a608-4421-9688-a807b0d48636: "How did the Merovians get here? Did you manage to traverse the Maw?"
6e383d95-7f98-4c04-a804-331955918719: "Oh, they didn't stick me in the penal legion to end up here..."
7cdbeb03-e860-44c5-a005-36080f1834ac: {n}Three men of differing ages lie before you: young, middle-aged, and old. If you look closely, you can see that they still have a semblance of life about them. Each one has had the top of his skull delicately removed, and electrodes are now attached to the blush-hued brain tissue latticed with blood vessels. Below the neck is one continuous gaping wound, the edges spread and held in place by a complex system of clamps. {/n}
4c63a7ab-185a-4cb2-bb7e-ee9a981ee5e7:
{n}Standing at attention before you — as clumsily as his gawky figure would suggest — is a gangling young fellow, with a neck so long, his head looks like a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} floating above his shoulders.{/n}
"P-private Ruban Khroshovach! Persimmon to— ack, permission to salute!"
8d3221de-1b92-4eab-a0d3-29509ac92185: "My Ruststalkers managed to retrieve an operational shuttle from the flooded hangars. As soon as the xenoheresy is eliminated, we will leave this breeding ground of corruption, make our way to an orbital tech-station, and dispatch a message to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The station's machine attendants cannot be saved — all that is touched by tech-heresy is forever tainted by it. We cannot afford such a risk."
9fd99576-0d74-47d3-a055-5e4477679927: "Isn't Nuncius jealous of your new cyber-companion?"
9e3915ba-904d-48ca-b29b-3f51e4660af4: The user's weapon {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.
e3dfcaf3-0b9d-4e47-8fc5-ca6614a07bb7: "It seems we've angered the entire planet, {name}. It's your decision, of course — the Colonel-Governor will carry out any order. But let me protect my people — don't throw their lives away for nothing."
62f0091e-9719-4c03-822c-eefee504ab77: {n}Eogunn stares after him in amazement. {/n} "Impossible! The calculations were perfectly calibrated, all factors taken into consideration! Was the specimen defective? I must find the Triasomata immediately and determine what went wrong!"
1ad5fa6d-312c-4b64-aa7a-5333aaa6f6db: "Heresy. How often was that most grievous accusation levelled at Nuncius and me. More often than not, it is merely a tool used by those in power to condemn everything they do not understand, or simply do not want to see. Your methods are often unconventional, and that rankles those who believe you are infringing on the established order of things. But isn't that why the Rogue Trader is granted such staggering powers, so that they might conquer those domains that someone who forever toes the line cannot? We live in truly absurd times."
f8c4211c-4fa1-479e-8aaa-a5a564178467: {n}The rage on the pilot's face gives way to a look of panic as he realises how he has just behaved in the presence of the Rogue Trader. With a trembling hand, he reaches for the vox-augment on his head.{/n}
0690f883-baef-4a72-92ee-629e1aa8b4e2: "The Lord Captain was expecting an army, but only you arrived. Let me guess: I am about to hear some bad news?" {n}Though her words sound like a question, there is only weary resignation in them.{/n}
74b86309-4b0e-4b97-83df-0e3ae068c9f0: "I can see this is a dead end for further research. Since you have proven useless for my enquiries, I am ending this pointless conversation. Farewell, human."
32063d95-9e57-45fc-8f83-2fc9d9a625c9: "The whispers say... yes, do it. One out of ten will do for us, {name}. Sounds like a good deal to me, eh?"
2e2c4fed-67fe-49fd-aab7-3a883ed823d5: "I have to agree with Master van Calox's judgement. Cogs are usually far more blunt in their communication. The Artisan... is trying to be cunning."
4a55290a-40da-4e2a-b050-5208bfe4fc18: If, during the war council, the final doubts of Seberian and his retinue are bound to the sword, the blade may be presented as a forgery.
b9b8328d-32df-4a60-a65e-bf30bab61ca2: "I find dialoguing with you quite inspiring." {n}Eogunn clicks his metal fingers, shooting out a spray of sparks.{/n} "Leisure time spent in the company of the Rogue Trader has had a beneficial effect not only on me, but on my colleague as well."
4714afcd-ad5b-4e07-96f1-c1e89c3be0a1: "Pathetic attempts to disguise an ambush won't fool me, xenos."
2618400a-a3e3-4672-a623-d4b6d064164b: "Charming... You will tell me at once what happened on Janus and who dispatched troops there."
d1883833-6a53-49db-9dc6-b88a3da8bc64: "The troops of House Gaprak sent to help the dynasty — what can you tell me about them?"
1f5e28ee-4350-4b2d-a9e1-3fdcc028a456: Vivisector Jaze Martinax attends to the mending of mortal flesh. He awaits the Rogue Trader within the chirurgeon ward of the Sector Bionica.
0ca09c39-e3a2-408e-8679-e228e8840345: "Laria." {n}Seberian's gaze softens.{/n} "My Seneschal. My daughter. For years, I did not know of her existence. She could have been merely the mistake of a chance dalliance with a nameless servant, but instead she became my most loyal ally. From an early age, Laria forged her path to the bridge through faultless service."
3af3c9f8-e21d-491f-a663-8a10f212ea40: {n}Trazyn's laughter assails your ears — the ancient, heavy laughter of a creature of untold centuries. The Necron appears before you in the now painfully familiar projection.{/n} "How... audacious. And how unspeakably naive. Of all the people I've encountered on my journey with you, this little human — this mad, grandiose maniac who pursued his plan to the very end — has come closest to earning a place in my collection. And yet I am here for something else."
99fb9b36-99d2-4538-8b21-247876585635: Find the killer of the Gaprak heir
8a419e2d-ba43-4d06-8125-251d17c6380f: "The search for Eogunn cannot be delayed. Thank you for your vigilance, Vigdis."
56afa9fd-e762-461b-a45e-39bef2f5b402: "Your chosen network of data-coordinates is not within my standard circuit of thought, but I find it necessary to perform the preliminary calculations..."
d28e8dbf-e82d-40af-b2e2-f0f86f6b7ddf: "Request approved for binharic litanies to restore the implantation throne's machine spirit. I request sanction to analyse the Motive Force impulses."
ff6cb55a-c699-4a3b-942a-b3546271a666: {n}Captain Dunawski nods to you, then turns to the people gathered around.{/n} "{name} von Valancius, heir to Seberian and our rightful ruler, has proven {mf|himself|herself} by slaying the Drover! If a seed of doubt still lingers in your hearts, it is time to tear it out by the roots! Watch!"
00a94d32-0c6e-4412-9e6b-2a087a36247b: "I don't think my shereen should worry about that. Everyone knows who is the true — and current — head of the von Valancius dynasty."
14515aa5-7ebf-43d0-862e-82a05c043b87: The target suffers −10 to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}, and −2 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} per {g|Encyclopedia:DifficultyTier}difficulty tier{/g} of the daemon for one {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
acbdf0ec-7196-4a52-8a6c-954396780b7b: Zarkov remained a backwater of the von Valancius protectorate, torn between tradition and new possibilities, never quite able to find a balance between the two extremes.
33f88bd3-3984-4dc0-8e07-c6d679ea30c0: "There are strong arguments in favour of each of them." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} raises a clawed mechadendrite and begins flexing its manipulators in time with his words.{/n} "Firstly, they have all performed their service impeccably, which suggests outstanding human qualities. Secondly, each body is robust enough to receive the Blessing of the Omnissiah. And thirdly, there is no other chance of salvation for any of them."
1869fcbb-faac-4b55-85b6-75d483a2db25: "That is... a rather unusual symptomatology, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Manipulus studies your face with keen curiosity.{/n} "It seems that some of the blessed augments in your body have been subject to some kind of foreign invasion. Galvanic therapy should help the modicum of True Flesh with which you have been gifted to overcome the corruption."
bfc26e9d-231f-4380-bca7-bead52568631: "Not essential, but highly desirable. Though I have no right to insist, Lord Captain."
d2aa8a52-e7ae-41c3-9dda-6d4683c2e7b0: [Watch your chronometer, waiting for the start of the air raid]
cc9aeddb-2982-4e4f-9e46-e11746f2f7cc: "Thank you for indulging my curiosity. Now it is your turn to select the topic of conversation."
020dc033-857d-4f47-9067-66e4e9b1527a: "So not only did the xenos steal the head of the noble creator of the best spot in the Koronus Expanse, but he also wrecked the poor sod's body in the process? And he calls himself a lover of history!"
ef9005b8-bb4f-4ba3-9295-8529acbe6f77: "Enough." {n}Trazyn clicks his fingers, and Seberian von Valancius, legend of the dynasty and illustrious {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, vanishes, in thrall to unknown xenotechnology. The Crimson Dance of Khaine disappears along with its master, only to reappear in your hands a moment later.{/n}
b8661a00-7cea-4a3f-8f2c-8ac079f7e671: Under your influence, Magos Exalt-117 performed timely maintenance on the air defence turrets.
10094d4f-1d7a-46cc-92d9-7dca38ddbb14: "I know you'll think everyone says this about themselves, but if it wasn't for petty nitpicking, I wouldn't be here. 'Unauthorised touching of a consecrated perimeter'? Well, where was I supposed to sit, in mid-air? 'Desecration of a shrine'? It's not like I smoked the place out on purpose." {n}Ruban heaves a sigh, as if coming to terms with his sentence all over again.{/n} "Anyway, I'm not complaining. How else would I have got into the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}? My health's not good. But they're not picky in the penal legion. God-Emperor willing, I won't die before I can prove I'm worth something."
43a82f53-fa94-4fc3-afcb-7a66143fee86: {n}They were requisitioned by Seberian — a crucial detail. It is another trace of your ancestor.{/n}
8fde49c1-26cf-495f-a7f4-b81901e5c3ff: "Haven't you realised yet, my heir? I never give up. Rogue Traders fight to the end, always, until they perish amid stars unknown."
7cf0bbb1-ba85-4935-a8b8-ebee84e97852:
Until the start of their next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the Executioner gains {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonuses{/g} to their parameters for each creature (enemy or ally) in combat suffering from the following damage-over-time effects:
-<indent=5%>{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Bleeding{/g}: +{uip|tghB2|dfd41fb2d75445919683b1ea0c4cc40d}% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} per creature</indent>
-<indent=5%>{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Burning{/g}: +{uip|tghB2|dfd41fb2d75445919683b1ea0c4cc40d}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} per creature</indent>
-<indent=5%>{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Toxin{/g}: +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} per creature up to a maximum of {unit_stat|WarhammerToughness|bonus}.</indent>
632dcb94-c687-429f-b06a-60ff82a3d0fc: {n}His unaugmented eye closes and his mouth relaxes into a serene smile. Crossing his arms over his augmented belly, the Tech-Priest inhales deeply of air infused with ozone and sacred unguents.{/n} "A wise man once said that a machine spirit cannot be looked upon. And he was right, for the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, in His infinite wisdom, has concealed His creation even from the gaze of His most devoted servants. But can the believer come to know the nature of a machine only through an eye of organics or steel? No. For the vapour that brings forth the scent of sacred unguents is the spirit's breath, the rumbling of joints and rods is the beating of its heart, and the Motive Force is the current of its blood."
7090d3d7-56b8-4ea6-aaaa-8dc141897d0d: {n}The Manipulus struggles to focus his clouded gaze on you.{/n} "How peculiar life is, Rogue Trader. I have gone from experimenter to test subject... My esteemed colleague has given me this imperfect form in order to transplant me into his prepared specimens. He seeks to prove that his skills in genetics and augmentation surpass mine. So far, he has proven only his pettiness and inadequacy."
88682591-2601-4a32-a7dd-14799d59c62c: "Its denizens — servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} — apologise for the unfitting reception due to the critical — interrupting — fracture of processes." {n}The sound seems to drift softly from the Tech-Priest's vox-modulator, an almost lulling hum on a single note, lacking any inflection. {/n}
aa9d4238-a272-4103-9eec-4b0ab0be90a3: "What of our current dispute? Shall we simply pretend nothing happened?"
3bff75a2-c27a-419b-9a66-b37eedee70d1: "I doubt this wreck can even be repaired, but since it's so important..."
85970513-9a2a-458e-a499-3580722cfed0: "So, your father still trusts you? Do you value his trust as little as you do your blood ties?"
5bb78e1f-d431-4dbf-b998-75822695f300: The sword's handle is crowned with a gilded eagle, and its hilt is adorned with the weapon's name in High Gothic.
3815b3c8-6c48-4278-8c4c-f64406742041: "Among those present in the palace, is there anyone who owns a plasma pistol?"
71392940-0875-44d8-9f93-b5090975d510: This creature suffers +100% {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g}. At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, while standing in a melted puddle that is a part of an electric chain to the generator, it suffers shock {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and gains {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusLow|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}. If the generator is overcharged, all creatures within the puddle suffer heavy shock damage and gain {uip|PotentialEnergyBonusHigh|15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
48c7bca3-7f5c-4a53-861a-04b1122f38b8: {n}He stabs a mechadendrite into the augmented arm of a nearby technomat: power snakes along the Manipulus's chrome claw into his cell; the technomat's vox stutters and rasps, and then his implant goes limp. Once certain that you have seen the effect, Eogunn sends the power back into the augment and it returns to life.{/n} "Questions?"
73cf1796-e69c-4694-b8da-768538612d8b: "Lord Captain, I have an urgent report. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has left the flagship after breaching all disembarkation protocols. Under the circumstances, his actions must be considered highly suspect. The Master-at-Arms has already opened an internal investigation into the matter."
23e4d1eb-e6f6-4581-8450-81dbc3ae21c6: The technomat's prayers to the turret's machine spirit fill it with holy fury. All projectiles fired by the turret have increased accuracy and penetration. Interrupting the liturgy will perplex the spirit.
409957e1-afac-4072-8151-267b41034f08: "The sayings, you mean? Atonement for the one comes from an old tradition that, if the whole regiment perishes except for one, then all of that person's wrongdoings are forgiven and eternal and faithful service to the God-Emperor awaits them. But atonement takes many forms. Commissar claptrap means lies, because our forebears never got any good from those deceitful, tempting spirits. If you want to know the rest, you should ask Vedka."
8e602c3a-4cbb-484b-8457-291c41c102b6: The creature's armour, and dodge are increased by +15% and its Agility is increased by +15, but base damage is reduced by −1 and armour penetration is reduced by −15%.
2c63f94c-541e-4351-ba85-af091fb30831: "We encountered a strange creature. I would not be wrong, I think, in calling it a metaphor incarnate. Its reactions are completely irrational: I almost burned my cranial implants to a crisp trying to calculate predictive patterns in its behaviour."
1cde2522-480e-4b18-aa09-f9ceb89e6e1d: "Once again I hear empty, misplaced threats. Do not disgrace yourself, {name}. Public quarrels make you a laughing stock in the eyes of your subjects. I shall allow you to save face, so let us return to this discussion later, in a more suitable setting."
1fe56732-2212-4455-8846-09830c140ad6: Whenever the Navy Officer uses the {g|f:f0d6fd0433624181a3a6c9bb6fd60ab5}Brace for Impact!{/g} ability, all enemies in a 5-cell radius around them suffer −{uip|Debuff|8379931fea56440192a660288fada89a} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and −{uip|Debuff|8379931fea56440192a660288fada89a} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}.
e8544529-b3dc-4027-907d-fadaa2b7dbcd: "I struggle to believe it, to be honest. At Seberian's side, I have witnessed many things that would confound even the most sound mind. But if you are not lying, this will outdo them all."
8f25ffc9-3d4f-4332-8fae-100323f97c24: {n}The scene elicits no reaction from Tervantias. The Haemonculus watches your struggles with utter indifference.{/n}
998b979a-2639-49fe-9890-6bed0ff12ca0: "What is this? 'The Litany of the Last Repentance'? You must be joking. It does not befit me to write such words." {n}Despite the fact that Seberian is holding his own diary, his confusion seems genuine.{/n}
166a9767-0a0c-4d52-8f09-f0c842532323: The user deals {uip|Damage|52882ea3bd6841a7823665a4a8bbd7f4} {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}. Then, this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} triggers {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}.
79e76c43-1db7-43a0-9c94-ec2fad42f323: "I do not share your views on ruling the protectorate, but history will sort everything out."
db898206-97a4-4196-8cfe-6edb1585bec9: "Xenotechnology bound Nuncius and me together, and it also doomed us. Believing that it was possible to master the technology of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} and use it for good, I allowed corruption to enter me and I cultivated it for years until it reaped its harvest. This entire place, along with the xenos and his cursed artefact, should have been {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalService}burned to the ground{/d} as soon as we set foot on this world. It was not the xenos that killed Nuncius, or the transmuter, or even the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}'s avarice. It was me. Every choice, every decision I made, ultimately formed an equation with only one possible answer: the death of Nuncius. What is left of him? A mangled shell that has known nothing but torment for these last fifty years."
5809d41f-f334-4ae3-86af-1a75a70897f3: {n}Camilla's wrinkled cheeks flush pink, visible even through the generous layer of powder.{/n} "Oh, come now, my {mf|lord|lady}! I do not know who has led you astray, but that duty lies in the young but most capable hands of Lady Juvenna von Valancius. Of course, when her time comes to take the helm of the dynasty, a loyal ally will be needed to fill the position here. But for now, Dargonus could not wish for a better steward."
dccf73ea-81da-4b8b-8fac-298efe75c383: "This is a lowly little row, unworthy of my attention. I do not want to hear another word about it."
e184d754-a460-4e79-9477-396135e4b007: {n}It is as if a light has gone out inside Eogunn. Visibly repressing a sigh, he turns to his subjects. {/n} "It is frustrating that you failed to understand my intent, but perhaps it was indeed questionable. I accept your verdict, Lord Captain."
0e99942a-8351-4a74-9726-99987b29b970: "The second option involves utilising the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g}'s findings. A small tactical team will escort the {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} deep into the tomb. Psychic echoes are what draw the Drovers. The group's chances of survival are minimal, and we do not know how effective the creatures will be against the iron dead. Or how long they will remain in the tomb before leaving."
e7ca40de-2288-494a-9cd1-c2f195f56396: The Rogue Trader remembers the chamber where flesh dissolved into emerald light. The dynasty's Warrant must be hidden there — and now duty demands finding a way into this unholy vault.
7329e90b-f514-4963-8e8d-cefc0d924117: "Let me help!" {n}Dunawski, giving you a concerned look, rushes after Seberian.{/n}
a54db4f1-d3c8-47c8-b9cf-82d9909a206c: "The medicae officers, they said they would save me. Save me! But this ain't no saving, Captain, this is torture." {n}The man's face twitches uncontrollably again, and his eyelids flutter.{/n} "These {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceVivisector}cranial shackles{/d} keep me awake, muzzle my thoughts. I feel them tightening every waking moment. I cannot think, I cannot give orders. This dead metal makes me a dead shell, Lord Captain, I know this for sure. And so I have decided to share this death."
61257265-194d-47e6-9403-5e56bd5afead: {n}The Vox Master turns off the transmission and the first orders to move to combat readiness begin sounding on the bridge.{/n}
341f4581-b368-47df-a362-c3f1159de0b9: "Thank you, Vigdis. Genetor Februs and I will set out immediately."
ab8d56fe-66d9-41cc-8c30-f08b897ea688: "No, Nuncius, that sounds like too great of an assumption. We cannot accept as fact that the entire biosphere of Janus is a single organism exhibiting an immune response to a stimulus in such a manner. Relying on conjecture instead of proven data is unacceptable."
4ab42e96-840b-4956-a4a6-482ca674fcd6: "You and Ferrenz do not get along?"
1e8890bb-a437-4fcc-9619-c9a1113f20aa: "Eogunn, I am glad that we crossed paths."
161f565a-7975-4817-bf15-3d00972ce75c: Hero of Humanity and the Emperor's beloved son, revered also as the Great Angel, Sanguinius was among the most honourable and mightiest Primarchs, whose leadership, humility, and loyalty forever etched his name in the annals of the galaxy.
19a01a53-1b6f-4bcc-a7dd-181e217dcf48: "Do you seriously believe that I would trust you with sensitive information just like that?"
7680188a-adf6-4308-8a7b-5c1c3a4f6a6d: {n}It is the phrase "intransigence of colleagues" that strikes you. It seems that there was more to his departure than simply a thirst for knowledge.{/n}
19aab17a-fbe9-469c-a3c6-1128ed8af202: {n}His smile is enigmatic.{/n} "An interesting question. I will answer it with another: would I be able to tell a layperson of such an encounter, without breaking my vows to the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}? This question does not require an answer — just food for thought."
fc0f4ece-04a9-4dc8-9596-1129e9c7766d:
You can use a {g|ib:Medikit}medikit{/g} to restore your party members' {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} in battle, treat an {g|Encyclopedia:Injury}injury{/g}, or get rid of certain {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g} (if the character is injured or suffering such an {g|Encyclopedia:CommonStatuses}effect{/g}). If the character has a medikit equipped, its icon will be displayed on the bottom left. If no such icon is present, open your inventory and equip a medikit by double-clicking {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on it. To use a medikit, select its icon at the bottom of the screen, then click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on the character who requires treatment or their portrait. A character can only use a medikit on a target they are adjacent to.
Medikits can only be used by characters who have the {g|f:9aefa8d7db3349358e23b2106578353b}Field Medic{/g} feature, {g|f:37363b46061e46218f40e01ed81e9189}Base Skill: Medicae{/g}, or have taken the {g|Encyclopedia:SkillMedicae}Medicae{/g} skill advancement at least once. A {g|Encyclopedia:SkillMedicae}Medicae{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Skills}skill{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g} determines the number of wounds restored.
Each medikit holds 2 or more charges, with 1 charge being consumed per use. Once used, medikits disappear from the panel on the bottom of the screen, so remember to equip your characters with new medikits regularly.
Note that healing, just like most actions, spends the character's {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}action points{/g} in combat.
4d7dd2ab-70da-4508-af2b-dfea55d2b0cd: "It is not an object. Nor is it a creature. It is a shard from an ancient epoch, vanquished and imprisoned, but still immeasurably dangerous to primitive barbarians like you. You will realise the full truth of my words when you behold it in person."
128b1412-a3db-4d66-a976-fa5864fc7ddd:
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have contacted Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. In accordance with your orders, the Astropathic Choir sent a message to the station about the plight of the implantation throne. Altar-Templum responded to our overture very promptly, which in itself is extremely remarkable for
cloistered servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."
8e686006-6508-452a-b622-0b746505c353: "A cognitively gifted primitive. But that will not save you. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source." {n}Tall, skeletal figures of xenos emerge from the surrounding gloom, weapons clutched in their hands.{/n}
1ebcb0a3-8258-48b8-a0fd-31aa7d10dedf: "Amendment 310 prohibits disclosing information to the laity if the data is subject to the internal investigation protocols. I will only confirm that I have gathered sufficient evidence."
e84bb2f9-aa2d-4d76-9bdc-1992f424cd44: When the flower reaches the 66% and 33% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wound{/g} thresholds, if transforms into a liquid, becoming untargetable from enemy attacks while remaining in this form. Any creature starting their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} in the liquid suffers <u>(15 + (2 × {g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}psy rating{/g}))</u> damage.
15654c6a-26e5-4e51-9470-424d0d82f9ca: "Nuncius was but one of many — the Imperium is full of people whose suffering is unbearable. The Omnissiah has blessed me with skills that can alleviate that suffering, or end it through a merciful death. You have given me the resolve to follow this path. I will embark on my wanderings, and let the inscrutable currents of the Motive Force guide me to those in need."
86285870-f891-4ad6-b8fd-f87be9491aff: "I want to know more about Zarkov."
56910c54-b08d-48a4-9953-9af866563846: Defeated enemies have no further need for their former belongings, but you can discover valuable trophies among them. Click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on a defeated enemy to inspect what is left of them.
5ff2b7ed-cd94-4307-a0be-1f1f5d1ea507: "There is much knowledge, Lady Navigator, that should not confuse and disturb inquisitive young minds. The rubedo you behold is but a fragment of the past that is imprinted on my memory. It serves no useful purpose, and is therefore insignificant."
791f085e-8455-445f-9276-d8538968a816: {n}Argenta stares at you as if struck speechless. Finally, she speaks, quietly but distinctly,{/n} "If the plea of an Angel of the God-Emperor is not enough for you, then hear mine. I beseech you: let us deliver that holy warrior from this abominable machine without delay!"
fbcf2b48-ddd5-481c-b02b-0d8b07fcf1ab: "We will go to the stars! But what will you give us there, beyond this world, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka's voice cracks.{/n}
50245606-9131-402f-88f1-d4f7ad73cc07: "A lot's been forgotten. It's not like our regiment is mentioned somewhere in the Handbook, if you catch my meaning." {n}Izdrig digs a hand into his beard, abruptly yanking out a wriggling stalk.{/n} "We came from Merov. It's the kind of place where the Brother-Generals are constantly looking for an excuse to snatch you up and throw you into a penal legion. Breathe the wrong way or say the wrong thing? Welcome to the service."
a83b84d1-44a2-4e32-a4ba-f17b5d3ad3fc: "I'll give the order to notify the noble houses immediately. Our loyalty belongs to you alone — we won't let anyone question that."
069ee494-2bdb-496f-ae20-07cf93bdb69b: "A long time ago. I'd just become colonel. Out it came — not very close, but still close enough to be a problem. It almost gobbled up one of the outposts. My father and I took a squad and went out to attack it. They all perished and my father took our remaining grenades and leapt into the Drover's maw. The beast ate its fill and slunk away. I should have found my atonement there, but I made it out. If I hadn't been exposed to so much of its poison as a child, I would have died there."
080e2562-b221-4820-99fa-07895ac1bf84: {n}The data-slate's vid-screen displays the following text: "Authorisation received. Last available log — attachment to unit Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. Attachment was effected after the assembly and consecration of unit 17-401's machinery in Workshop Zenta-8. Since then, the logging function has been suspended pending a litany of reactivation."{/n}
492c9d6d-e62d-41eb-8370-1838fbce0d97: "Such is tradition. The finest xenos slayers from all existing Chapters of Astartes are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I accepted this post with pride."
9e3d431d-b852-47f6-9bfd-48e77c21a130: "Why did the Inquisition lay siege to Dargonus?"
469a4a90-8e30-45f3-907d-144982033b04: {n}Whether such technology is the work of Humanity, you cannot say for certain.{/n}
0a90b352-b6f3-4267-81a3-b953e1322c2d: "As you command, Lord Captain. I will share with your troops the knowledge that only the {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} can achieve."
4ed43a28-d6a5-4c98-ba49-3fa284a4202e: {n}The soldier listens in bewilderment to your lamentable tale of {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}the pilot and his pleas that were answered only by the silence of space{/d}.{/n}
5ae5b693-036e-4976-80b1-9aa39725d5f4: {n}Your interlocutor looks at you intently — her eyes are swollen from crying, but her gaze remains steely and focused.{/n} "You're not lying, are you? You wouldn't lie." {n}The autopistol falls from her hands to the deck with a clatter.{/n}
8cf60b65-0f5a-4c64-9983-e7d8040ab59a: {n}The Factotum rises from his knees with noticeable shortness of breath and inclines his now even-paler face.{/n} "Glad to be of service, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
8dca5901-4eee-4736-bdd1-25376b343482: "Multiplying suffering and opposing transcendental entropy with violence, I suppose. I would be lying if I said I did not wish to observe it, but my mind as yet retains a sense of self-preservation."
d338ae65-f81f-4d31-b9f9-0aa2b65dcc1c: "There is a man in possession of a very valuable artefact, and I wish to see him parted from it."
b87b9061-ada4-4df6-94fb-4d23fb2c323e: "What is your connection to my dynasty?"
4686b886-e211-4672-b1b1-7af867f5bff3: "Ahem... That was close. Better call the red robes, let them have a look."
e3e1861c-421b-4ce3-a4b9-4d4ffae569ec: "Because if a machine as functional and multifaceted as the human organism ceases to exist — all practical meaning of it is destroyed." {n}Eogunn's large hands grip the edges of the implantation throne, their knuckles white.{/n} "And I have dared to fathom ways of prolonging life precisely to preserve that meaning. The operational limits of organics can be overcome, the annihilation of flesh and mind averted, and function raised to the absolute. Death is what sustains the Imperium — this is true." {n}He glances at the servo-skull.{/n} "But life is what propels it forward. This is an incontrovertible fact."
99c37a58-d524-489f-84c8-7ff689947f58:
The target creature adjacent to Solomorne must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|SavingThrowBonus|088db872df394b1aaa71781354c48a5b} penalty.
On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, the creature becomes {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} and is considered {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}full cover{/g} for Solomorne. Then, Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} ends.
If the target creature passes the test, there is no effect, and Solomorne's turn does not end.
6a1c3b71-77fb-4d87-9f9b-2fefb6a5f71c: {n}Vigdis pauses for a moment, listening to a parallel transmission, and then reports back,{/n} "Both specialists from the Sector Bionica have been sighted in the procession. It appears the chirurgeons have succeeded in bringing your servant back from the brink of death."
d2945369-4a77-445d-aed4-63111a4632a8: "Forget it. It is more difficult to explain than I thought."
f24ad2fa-a51b-4ed5-9d92-180203743532: The traitor disabled the anti-aircraft battery, opening the path for an aerial assault by the enemy.
8a07bd95-0d4d-45d3-aa7a-bca30c7d4876: "You will die today, xenos. In the name of the God-Emperor!"
7331f27e-02c8-485f-a175-25d660248e1b: "Our agreement is not subject to renegotiation. What you will receive in exchange is significantly more valuable than your own ephemeral existence."
7f2320de-ada9-4aab-8e84-d4ab96e2dc0e: This augmetic's metal surface is elegant engraved: "Verily, verily I say unto thee: may the Omnissiah strengthen the Ferrum Sanctum of those who tread the thorny path of Knowledge."
f6fb5582-5f43-45f0-b128-7768366cce7f: "A final request, {name}." {n}In the moments before death, Eogunn's voice suddenly regains its former strength and resonance.{/n} "Take care of Nuncius."
bf8f43dc-7fe0-429a-b666-ab98cd244aaa: "How did you fall into Trazyn's captivity?"
d1be39bf-824c-4803-919c-9d4f2ad550ea: "Your loyalty is undeniable, Captain. I yield. Your suggestions?"
168eceeb-f866-4f01-8eb8-6917d65711de: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to camp and report to the colonel. Captain-Quartermaster, you're with me."
4ae2bce5-b127-448c-b467-c11a31c084f4: {n}Seberian is silent for a long time, clearly deep in thought. When he speaks, his voice sounds quieter and deeper than usual.{/n} "If our expedition ends in failure, if the risk of the dynasty being left without the Warrant becomes too great, you will have to make that bargain. Not for your own sake. For the dynasty's sake. For those who will inherit the Warrant and the title of Rogue Trader after you."
211cef8a-7e8f-4ca8-a716-2c3627be7fd4: {n}You move the heavy frame aside and rummage through the tangled wires and dried tubes. As you brush decayed scraps of cloth off the body, they reveal a rusted memory module.{/n}
10a417a5-c7c3-451f-a640-426eb0414410: {n}By willpower alone, you pull yourself together. The fury fades, sinking into the depths of your mind, leaving a lingering terror, an urge to flee, and the knowledge that such escape is impossible.{/n}
6b23a4e3-ef1a-41a6-8d26-93c30fe78650: {n}The shadow of a memory passes over Zorael's face.{/n} "Know this: the Necron is skilled at subjugating the will of others. Only those strong in spirit can resist his control."
8955b774-8fca-4677-a02e-ef081f33934d: "This section of the Museion is doomed... There is no point wasting time trying to save it — the most valuable exhibits have already been removed."
c0b9ba05-f2ed-407d-90b7-3d0b2258c0eb: "Certainly not! At that site, the productivity of promethium extraction exceeded one hundred percent of the sacred technologies' capacity, but the cause for this irregularity was not ascertained."
b567d0d0-7f39-47a7-9070-309d6ed1833a: "Lord Captain, a group of the ship's Tech-Priests, lead by the Drivesmaster, requests permission to conduct a gratitude ceremony on deck. As I understand, this relates to the attention you have shown to the Sector Bionica. What are your orders?"
2a8c105e-f973-4b0c-9591-6db65cfe01de: "And Drill Sergeant Jovakha has advanced to protect the red robes in the north-east."
b9cebd49-4974-484a-a003-28aaf2214e14: "Apologies, Rogue Trader. I am not well-versed in contact with laypersons — Nuncius far surpasses me in every way when it comes to communication. I recognise that these individuals have minds, desires, and needs. I have not attempted to interfere with their personalities — on the contrary, I wholly admire each for their own traits. I use the term 'organism' with nothing but the deepest respect for these men and their vital functions."
6b3c1dae-b3cc-414c-8734-e6dda9aa42cb: "You've been trapped in a time loop by the xenos for the last five centuries."
08d2fe2a-82e8-402e-bd6f-a05602793baa: "Identifier accepted. The sacred rank of Magos is confirmed. The subject's status awaits validation." {n}Pasqal gives the Tech-Priest a dry nod, as to an equal, then emits a lilting trill in Techna-Lingua.{/n} "Magos Pasqal Haneumann, Enginseer Prime of the von Valancius flagship." {n}A poorly concealed challenge sounds in the rasp of Pasqal's vox.{/n}
47a01923-131d-4686-9ec0-0e0b46e82302: "Settle yourself, Seneschal. I believe this is but one of the highly sophisticated illusions that abound here."
19506a6c-8b71-4d69-921b-0cf34009bec4:
Whenever the creature suffers damage-over-time effects, it deals the same amount of {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to every creature within a 4-cell radius around it.
When the creature is killed, it inflicts {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (30), or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (30) on all targets within a 2-cell radius around it.
c21b1c8e-9deb-4ca1-9830-6e609261dddb: Branek Zarkov is acting on Laria's orders. Either give him different orders, or remove him from the board.
72c5555d-2859-4f18-9679-0d3a31b01e43: "Organisms? They are not things, Eogunn. You are talking about people."
18a0f084-911b-4e88-9638-dbe8b5050d58: "It seems to me that 'Solomorne Anthar' and 'change' are concepts that lie in diametrically opposed contextual fields."
58fb1db4-99e3-4d16-adfc-93836c90d98d: The human bones are so ancient that they crumble in your hands. Of greater interest, however, is the fact that they are partially burned, as if they were hit by an energy weapon after the flesh had already rotted away.
c2c8714b-6973-46e7-b3c1-b1770f28695a: "My name is {name} Gaprak, Your Lordship. I am the only member of my house's reinforcements to reach the palace."
dce67bfe-4bec-4ff2-900f-15b929cd78c1: Explained to the Arch-Militant that the inequality between servants and masters is part of the God-Emperor's inviolable order.
055afa1d-00f8-4804-9c27-fa168b35183e: "They carried the light of faith through a heavy duty of isolation and abandonment. This service is one of the most difficult and most purifying. You can trust these subjects of the God-Emperor."
ab1d8290-2bcd-4303-bd20-3dfd825ff0cc: Gunfire here is done in single shots only. Every bullet is precious.
13e739d1-9147-4628-a6a6-71c6581763b6: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, you're wrong. I'm hearing all about your future, and I can tell that if you don't come to your senses now, you'll crack and you won't be able to put yourself back together again. They are waiting for you beyond the door, laughing and waiting."
54a07cc2-4138-41a1-98d6-94fc78b3878b: The wearer gains +30 {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLoreWarp}Lore (Warp){/g}. Whenever a target affected by the effect of {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspire{/g} performs a heroic act, the wearer immediately gains an extra turn.
b8a94a36-22e0-4428-99f3-0da6fdd27b0f: To install the highest-grade implants, you must obtain new litanies for the implantation throne. This can be discussed with the Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17.
8ccbd857-72ff-4381-b064-58f5d8552c6a: "...for such is my will as one of House von Valancius." {n}Seberian quietly finishes dictating something to the scribe servo-skull hovering by his head.{/n} "Greetings, my heir." {n}Noticing your presence, your ancestor dismisses the scribe with a casual wave of his hand.{/n} "I was not expecting your visit, but I welcome it regardless. I am beset by heavy thoughts after the theft of the Warrant."
a027b10e-e445-4318-b2ab-b2c26e53feff: "Not a thing. We've been waiting days. Something's happened to them, I guarantee it. We'll have to muddle through on our own. But me and my lads are no strangers to that. We were told to stick it out, so that's what we'll do."
a26a9173-c56d-4319-adad-37a3afd4d8f7: At the start of each of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}, the Chronomancer gains +3 stacks of {g|f:c061d42784cf424ba566b2eb40a1ac9c}Temporal Regression{/g}.
51b88821-934c-4d94-89cd-328a14d29194: "I will ensure the enforcers redouble their vigilance and keep the crowd at such a distance that no assassin hiding among the rabble has any serious chance of inflicting harm upon the Rogue Trader."
2374894f-4e64-4266-9bba-33530b126e90: "Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. We are alarmed by your silence. What is happening in the camp of Heretic Coryphaeus? Report."
739743d8-0f7c-4c38-92dd-aae0354351db:
The user gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} whenever an ally within a 4-cell radius suffers {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} from an attack.
If unequipped, this augment is lost.
767dd819-f577-46ce-be5e-154c56dd7ce2: "I agree, the environment isn't exactly welcoming."
8902462b-4d62-4f3f-a000-b4f227a61de2: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "You'll give... my heart back... I'll earn... the right to work again..."
95255e8b-e3e7-48b5-8761-ba60a7a9963d: While the Defiler is being modified, it cannot act and suffers less damage.
4c227f8b-4640-4457-925e-36de58b3670f: {n}Idira casts a wary glance at you.{/n} "Don't blame them. When that beast shrieks, it smothers even my whispers. What hope do mere mortals have..."
9e97979d-02ff-415e-a498-8b2f6cd538ac: Whenever the user performs a single-target attack against a target in a 3-cell radius, they make a shot with this augment immediately after. It deals {uip|Damage|556c21a347f3447082409ae5a1a8b7aa} {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g} with {uip|Penetration|556c21a347f3447082409ae5a1a8b7aa}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
6fd068c7-9465-42e7-bd93-7b1ec52437d3: "I have no intention of betraying you to an enemy of Humanity."
8f77ebdb-bb89-4e9f-bfef-8fb2efb96882: "I am in charge of the Sector Bionica. I do not mean to belittle the servants of the Adeptus Mechanicus in general, and certainly not Ferrenz in particular, but they have much to learn from the Officio Medicae when it comes to healing." {n}Martinax's voice sounds undeniably smug.{/n}
296c6845-f41f-443f-9e54-c49806854c60: Atop the colossal roots that pierce Zarkov's skies, well out of sight, lies a realm where agonising death claims those lacking a rebreather and void suit. There, hidden vaults accessible only by small shuttles will be constructed. The Cold Traders will gain the right to use them provided they share a portion of their cargo with the Rogue Trader.
8053c935-dd41-4c3e-ba42-998e3e57cd06: {n}Seberian stares, motionless, at the Warrant's empty resting place. His augmented lungs do not inhale once. It is as though he has turned into a statue. The sacred chamber is silent as a crypt, save for the hum of servo-motors in the ancient Lord Captain's augmetics.{/n}
420bba1b-f845-4a20-9065-7b7d28845b67: "So take your revenge: I promise I will find a moment that will be especially painful for Juvenna."
c899ecd1-edd2-4e24-aadd-12bc0329b7be: This creature gains +20 to all characteristics and +15% critical hit chance.
d558b335-9293-45e1-965e-7a7519341b23: "The command headquarters has withstood the enemy strikes and casualties are minimal. This gives us an advantage."
e395fee2-1385-4212-bd48-af4f36792013: {n}Contrary to expectations, Batoshski gives a nod of understanding.{/n} "Straight talk, {mf|lord|lady} heir. However strong your retinue may be, my soldiers outnumber them. And every one of them will lay down their life if you decide to kill me. I'll definitely take a couple of yours with me before I find my atonement. You likely have more people up in the sky, but as I understand it, they are far beyond your reach."
a1b78488-acab-4e88-9e1f-c184637dc69d: You have received a new, more efficient weapon for your character. To upgrade your equipment, open the inventory [{bind|OpenInventory}]. You can either hold {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} and drag the new item to a weapon slot or double-click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on the item's icon. You will find and purchase new equipment often on your travels, so do not forget to update your characters' equipment in order to make them more powerful.
55e6b98a-37f6-4fa4-8bef-11b2e56c0084: "...participants in the battle for the world of Kur'Bys, located in an adjacent star system. Petty quarrels on a galactic scale, a significant episode for this region. As I recall, they got so carried away that they failed to notice I had taken the world and them along with it."
99100a3a-ffaa-47e0-9f85-43a40e671d50: "Give me a chance to prove I'm telling the truth!"
adc8faa5-905a-4552-89a7-5e745a04c52f: Disturbing tidings have come from Zarkov. A certain enemy has treacherously attacked the colony, threatening Humanity's forces on the planet.
e56ee983-377b-4b5f-ae80-95f286b1af1a: "Wet conditions are not good for Glaito's metal components. I will have to do a complete inspection of his protocols once we leave this place."
1d3c1b12-d947-49a3-a15d-643b48cf849e: "Amsanct is a planet in an uncharted sector of space, home to the ruins of a civilisation of technologically advanced xenos — the ordained call them Necrons. There we set up a research camp under the supervision of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and we set about searching for surviving samples of xenotechnology. And we found them. One of them led to the tragedy that resulted in Nuncius being caught between life and death, and me talking to a servo-skull." {n}He says this in an uncharacteristically dry monotone.{/n} "Ask your questions, {name}, I will answer them all."
f7446dc0-6dce-4bce-9bb9-689de499fff5: "Let us leave it at that, Seberian."
cd4ec9e5-9267-4e9b-b705-b2bd70758526: {n}Izdrig Batoshski fixes you with an expectant look.{/n}
920ff8f7-c14a-4285-92c4-3b5b94a87f19: "If we turn back now, they will overwhelm us in our retreat. We will stand and fight here."
4f72fcc7-2adc-45cb-85b6-ae3ca4f59baf: A strange-looking device pulled from the central drilling complex of Tirkuaz-4.
ea48b41a-f634-43f9-81e0-957339691187: "It is true what they say: those who spurn fear are invincible beneath His shadow!" {n}Argenta salutes the somewhat flustered youth.{/n}
0f67b902-0af8-4da9-bf5f-72bf2c6d1773: "I blew them up, all right... Only a shard of black stone took my eye in return. I tried to dig it out, but could not. Neither knife nor needle would do it. I grew used to it in time." {n}Dunawski speaks of it matter-of-factly, but you now understand that the scars around her eye socket were mostly self-inflicted.{/n} "Now the roots have grown over the whole thing. Whether the Drover worked its will, or Zarkov itself hungers to devour those cursed ruins..."
a29451f4-5873-42bd-939c-0273032a2e14: {n}The sergeant's eyes glaze over. Jarub, now pale with terror, backs away from you.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, I... I was just... joking... I've lost the knack for it. Don't waste your anger on a fool like me." {n}He is so frightened that you doubt he will dare to speak of such things again. His trust in you is irretrievably lost... this time.{/n}
2a8d830b-8d91-4aa7-b78e-28ff737ab4e9: "If Tecla-Paradigm-13 had approached research with the same zeal she applied to making my life on the station more difficult, she could have been useful for something. Unfortunately, that was not the case. I decided to leave the station at the earliest opportunity, so as not to jeopardise my and Nuncius's efforts. That opportunity turned out to be you."
7edde8ec-eb16-47d4-8641-21d47050f526: "Two officers who came to the Sector Bionica flatly refuse to comply with the medicae officers' instructions and are openly demanding to be tended out of turn. What is that if not insubordination and sabotage?"
e20759af-f267-4fd1-adcd-8c1997b7f670: The pyramid of black stone, perfectly smooth with gleaming razor-sharp edges, seemed to consume the light around it. At the middle of each of the pyramid's faces, a circular platform hovered in perfect symmetry with the others. Each platform bore a Necron, its casing painted blue and gold. There was no doubt that we were seeing the real guardians of Trazyn's treasure. Hundreds of smaller platforms rose and dipped alternately as they orbited the central pyramid and glided up toward the ceiling, under which could be glimpsed the outlines of the first levels of the Museion's galleries.
bbe8f746-ebfe-45de-bbcb-fa1f3aa7ab82: "Your words are the will of the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'll have them conveyed to the troops. In His name and for the glory of the dynasty, we shall endure."
dbd10068-bcf5-4fdf-be1c-1fcbaa195144: "It's over, Sauerback. You will stand trial for this."
5f09007d-8418-43be-bc29-48abb3d07d7b: Whenever the user uses {g|f:453162d5db644e25a5b22e598128ce0e}Furious Assault{/g}, they suffer +{uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} and immediately suffer an additional instance of damage from this effect.
5a12340e-8566-49a7-a349-1543584a3b38: "He is fully functional. However, the servo-skull's actual functionality is different from {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Eogunn's characterisation of it. A demonstration will show what I mean."
e1f9ec25-b443-468c-9a84-7db3b0b4996c: "...a Khymera with the implanted consciousness of the Archon of the Kabal of the Deathblades, who made enemies among the Haemonculus caste. Despite its condition, the Void Fury has retained his twisted and vengeful mind. The existence of such a creature is in itself worthy of my collection, and I spent a great deal of effort seeking out this piece."
d154e80c-f7e7-48c3-a631-7d54006bffda: {n}Several manipulators dive inside Eogunn's gaping abdomen, extracting from its depths a small lump of maroon-coloured flesh. You see the Genetor's skin rapidly pale to parchment white — the only thing now keeping him conscious are the discharges of Motive Force crackling through his body.{/n} "Splenic extraction... Nuncius, this is, truly, fascinating. Blood flow has slowed, the load on the main arteries has fallen dramatically. I classify my current condition as pre-mortem. Viability minimal."
04f17c95-6033-452f-bf63-1303f2db2c45: "Gone. The Warrant is... gone." {n}Seberian's voice sounds lifeless as he looks back and forth between you and the empty pedestal, and you see the skin-scrap of your ancestor's face tighten in a futile bid to convey his anger.{/n} "My heir, of all the scum in the Koronus Expanse, only one is capable of such a sacrilege — Trazyn!"
86afc5f0-4af2-4999-9186-704f1140cc45: "Does anyone have any counsel to offer?"
a9711daf-d54f-4e4f-8f2d-ce6b3ce2b6b3: {n}Under the astonished gazes of your senior officers, the augmented procession sweeps through the entire deck and stops a dozen paces away from your throne. The procession is hemmed in on all sides by enforcers, but that does not stop the people from shouting blessings in your honour. Most of the procession is made up of low-ranking officers and inhabitants from the lower decks, their scar-hatched faces blazing with unfeigned devotion. A bandaged man of uncertain age and bearing marks of distinction on his chest steps forward.{/n}
52fddc5a-4f36-4b5f-a00f-1fa21456d2eb:
When the user {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} for the first three times in a {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, they use {g|f:22d6c1b32a6d47f4899a370e28cf16f9}Kick{/g} against the attacker.
{g|Encyclopedia:CareerVeteranGlossary}Arch-Militant{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Talent}talents{/g} do not affect this counter-attack.
7b1bb748-45bf-47f7-a275-ff61c110aa23: "Pasqal, what makes Eogunn's experiments so dangerous?"
faedb6b7-87b5-447b-a5c2-27ed43780cc3: If a creature without a gas mask uses an ability or ends its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} within the gassed area, it suffers {uip|GasDamage|5bb1ee95aa1e4c43a7ab03f1636ebbba} {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g}.
97a491a4-25ba-4af2-9d9b-f074b1d8c97c: {n}When Laria's men arrive, Camilla Drivestem does not resist. With silent dignity, the duchess holds out her arms to the enforcers and departs in their wake.{/n}
422f014d-38cd-43eb-b057-d8cd02072c24: "What is there to celebrate? Batoshski speaks the truth. They'll take us all and toss us into the grinder as cannon fodder!"
ad210e40-b19a-4c37-8f87-bad2ac6f2bbb: Amidst the shattered dioramas, the Lord Captain discovered a Drukhari anti-grav transport identical to the one that has elevated {mf|him|her} to the Spire of the Reaving Tempest. At last, the trail leading to the thief.
788343d6-d0c3-440a-9e25-7d161fb54442: [Employ fiery rhetoric: you are both driven by the same motive, devotion to the Golden Throne]
47cb19bf-80f6-45eb-9690-6f25fea62285: "What thinking is there to be done, Aett-Vater? Xenos are the foes of the Allfather, and we must deliver annihilation upon them. Whatever tree bore the fruit of this battle, we do not know if the victor will only grow stronger afterward. Let us fall upon them with all our fury!"
b676ed39-bbdc-4e8d-b900-9194720e3a1f: {n}In this moment, the last sacred thing within you crumbles. The others are too shocked to even notice where you tread. But here and now, you have committed the final blasphemy, this time not only against the God-Emperor but against the very order of the Imperium. Even the dynasty no longer means anything to you — it is no more than a tool for your own ambitions.{/n}
d21463d7-fea0-4df9-af2c-a517aca42411:
In your travels, you will come across containers, crates, and other objects in the environment that you can search. Inside, you can find a variety of loot — from things that are of no use to a Rogue Trader (but may still pique a merchant's interest) to new equipment and important plot items.
Click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on a container to open it.
You will also encounter locked containers. To open such a container, your party members will have to pass the associated {g|Encyclopedia:Skills}skill{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}.
2c8bf665-56fd-4548-a6e4-d442f2acd6e6: "I must have misheard. Are you suggesting that I scurry about the settlement like some sort of servant?"
64ced1b9-ce07-4210-8ea6-a614db1e203c: "What is it you want to discuss regarding the oaths?"
23f4ef34-50a3-4947-83b1-10706956a644: "My name is insignificant, unlike my weapons, which I am ready to aim at the enemy."
1f84e4d5-766f-4976-8ebc-ed50726bdb9e: "Your humiliation of my dynasty and my people is at an end!"
dd4f9a17-acf9-4872-9c98-a8c1c38c145f: "No, Lord Captain. No requests for help, no reports of an attack."
a24d5da5-86a5-48fa-89ac-e1e3f9831440: "I see you have lost your fear. Get out of my sight before I order the enforcers to disperse you by force!"
dff9ac5b-8635-485b-9d8b-2c2faf49544f: Any {g|Encyclopedia:PositiveEffect}positive effects{/g} that boost {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerPowersGlossary}psychic powers{/g} are removed from the creature's enemies. All enemy psykers suffer +<u>(3 × psyker's {g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}psy rating{/g})</u> levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g}.
d8161e03-6d41-4001-8eb2-72e8276699f5: "I... am not certain that anyone here can offer any comment on your — undoubtedly sage — statement."
22c987cd-8346-4148-810f-1105ef2757f2: {n}The grimace fixed on the wounded man's pale face makes it impossible to tell how much attention he is paying to your story. It is not clear if he understands anything you are saying, but you do not hear any more moans.{/n}
68d2bf48-96e3-493f-9c59-61daed7b6e3a: "Let's leave the pleasantries to those who have time for them. You have only just arrived, but you strike me as an intelligent sort, and you seem eager to make your mark. However, I have urgent business to attend to. We weren't expecting you, but rather the House Gaprak army. Find out what happened to it, and perhaps then I'll believe you are on our side."
26dd5086-9a7c-4d8d-8835-3b2a160894ae: Whenever using a weapon or throwing a grenade within the area, a creature has a 25% chance to fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
7732e572-2b3f-40c2-a7ff-74332c48a997: {n}Dunawski's remaining eye widens, while a thin, translucent fluid trickles from the other, ruined socket.{/n} "That is against the Handbook, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It states, 'One must never conspire against a commanding officer!' Your words are a trial I will pass with honour, by rejecting them."
303a66be-1ef9-423d-b657-8e7da6a6e0a9: "I know you're not lying, Lord Captain. You are our guiding light, you won't let them turn me into..." {n}A fresh wave of pain makes the man flinch as if he had been electrocuted. He lets out a muffled cry.{/n}
c1ff87d6-3c25-4564-99c1-98a2bb736c3a: "May we have a chat, as befits those of noble birth, before we cross blades?"
e380a11b-7a32-4bab-80af-4d02b77f1f41: "The enforcers look at us like we're dirt under their boots. My people are getting nervous."
b6148859-41a6-47c9-bdfd-4bfee34ba827: {n}A harsh, unpleasant sound bursts from the vox-grille, briefly deafening you.{/n} "I see the acolytes of Diodas are hard at work! Wagging their tongues, in this case. I hope you have not repeated this absurd rumour to anyone? If false news of my demise reaches my vassals, we may never see any reinforcements!"
baa584b3-b5c3-4190-b468-1fd13cba28ab: "Surely your advisors must have a plan to defend the palace."
3fda2f44-b09e-4efb-9290-a268777cf8a7: "You wished to debate. Let's begin with something simple — what is the meaning of life?"
4e22db45-4e0d-4b3f-9b4b-7bf123dee1ba: {n}It is no exaggeration to describe the lady before you as a beauty. From the porcelain skin on her refined, angular face with its delicate nose, to her sleek, dark hair in its intricate coiffure, everything about Juvenna tells you that she is the true heir to a Rogue Trader dynasty. {nc|Her resemblance to the portrait you saw of a young Seberian is striking.|}{/n}
27d38421-3286-4b1c-b1b5-6b3f3006fa9e: {n}The servo-skull's machine spirit is weakened, but still responds to the diagnostic litany and reveals the contents of the skull. It contains only a control {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}micro-cogitator{/g}, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. A translucent, opalescent liquid oozes from the hoses connecting the skull to the body. All organic components are completely absent — the Haemonculus must have removed them in the course of his monstrous experiments.{/n}
5f17d689-c646-4e8b-b97c-5376a817551b: The black, uneven plasma burn stands out starkly on the paving stones of the outer courtyard.
64a051a9-5271-4271-b087-ec11a33ad600: "An unenviable fate in the twilight of one's life, but it cannot be helped."
469cb500-bab7-4114-86fa-64901ae26a04: "This probability was calculated, but deemed undesirable."
51fc0bd2-9340-4c18-87cb-408f399cbc36: "I will not even attempt such a thing. We have not seen a good fight in such a long time, wouldn't you agree?"
504e25c5-10b7-45d7-bb73-464ee1f6b3b7: "You are mad. And {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} knows what else you will come out with next. I cannot have lunatics roaming the palace during a siege." {n}With a practised motion, the Seneschal draws the laspistol at her hip.{/n}
b4b4b298-cf99-47e1-a5db-e4b2eccfe42c: [Strike the Genetor] "Here, my will is above even the Omnissiah's tenets. Obey. Now."
25371d19-8e57-4ea1-b4d0-fbc97083cb70: "Thank you, Genetor Februs. I am more concerned about you — not only has your body been torn to pieces, but your colours... they are different, as if something has shattered and can never be put back together."
616a2ff5-6f91-48c3-84b3-c1f184349166: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} is increased by +{uip|tghB|2516c27aa5f442fa865e659886386fb0}%. An attacker's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g} bonus determined by the difference between the attacker's and the Bladedancer's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristic{/g} is halved.
c8a72e03-1411-4e8d-9ebe-b2805de4ab31: On {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, attacks with weapons inflict {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. This effect deals {uip|Damage|3f52842cd8774f2392b68a40916670ef} {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|353735efe162410a8c720ef26ad6bd1b}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
c622dc56-9046-4759-8271-befadd01cacb: "Why sow empty doubts, Aett-Vater? Burn that abomination and be done with it. And if it angers the xenos, so much the better."
023e8b46-f8ee-40fc-9239-844ee7961984: "What you have done here is not the answer. You will not achieve anything with your stunt. Let the hostage go."
8f14bcb9-e247-42b3-b230-f5c8e6e0edc0: Each day, the God-Emperor's servants suffer the loss of limbs and organs in unceasing conflict with the planet's xenoflora. By the grace of the Rogue Trader, manufactorums dedicated to sacred augmetics will be established in the settlements, where Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah shall fuse the sacred iron of the augments with the flesh of wounded soldiers, thereby granting them the chance to resume their service to the dynasty.
2033e3b3-be64-4511-8d1f-8c7a69db2d5f: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started firing on everyone. We blocked her escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. She is only willing to talk to you, and the sniper needs time to get into position. Sector Bionica staff have been injured." {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz, lying on the deck by the enforcers' feet. His body has been crushed and his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} have nearly been severed from him by the shockwave.{/n}
034d643b-ffbb-41da-81a4-4c1a269594f6:
{n}You hear a male voice, but you detect no trace of human feeling in it.{/n}
"You are absolutely right, lost child. Seberian has betrayed his dynasty, and the God-Emperor has already passed judgement on him. He should expect no mercy, and neither should you."
a471d3ec-3502-4bb7-99ec-d36374c54662: "Enforcer! Fetch victuals and amasec for me and the esteemed Genetor."
bd372d21-be8c-4884-ba2c-dc7af5a16ed9: "You pronounce the words of our speech almost correctly, but you still make errors of intonation. Few humans can master our tongue. Why would you attempt this?"
7288ad4d-17c9-4a7e-b2c4-83ab019b25a7: "How dare you..." {n}Spots of bright scarlet appear high on Laria's cheeks. She breathes heavily, clenching her fists.{/n} "How dare you all!" {n}Laria glances around with a hunted look, but the hand resting on the hilt of her bolt pistol remains where it is.{/n} "Your Lordship, I... have failed you."
9edd3805-c1a6-47a2-b0c9-c73f2143c06a: "I will not be swayed by your excuses."
2cfc2624-db89-421a-ace1-1c3e448d2636: {n}Eogunn decorously alters the pitch of his torso's hovering to make a bow{/n} "I will depart the ship at the first opportunity. My path of Knowledge has changed its trajectory yet again — that is the way of things. You have been a waymark on my path, Rogue Trader. I hope that, in time, you will gain much wisdom that I have been unable to comprehend."
db1d0b21-a31d-44f0-a2e4-77d0200d2fcd: "Permission to report. Your {g|Encyclopedia:ProctorGlossary}Proctor{/g} has arrested my voidsman and is demanding his execution. A repeat offender, he says. Please do something, Lord Cap'n!"
35c83333-ab9f-45bb-947d-9df6ea248241: {n}Nomos's voice falls silent, this time forever. You hear nothing but the familiar hum of the ship's systems around you. Despite the seemingly familiar surroundings, you feel the absence with terrible clarity — the disappearance of something fundamental from the vessel's very core. As if the ship's soul has been torn from its heart.{/n}
e0ac163f-d935-43a6-ac6c-97af817bf03c: "Poison, Colonel? That doesn't seem like fair play."
85ebfbd9-5fc4-4f3e-aa5e-bfdcc1772c40: Whenever Pasqal uses one of his unique {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}, he suffers 5-10 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. Pasqal's unique abilities: -{g|f:95cdd5f42ef5480d9fadd9e0acee641b}Machine Spirit Communion{/g} -{g|f:0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}Machine Spirit Banishment{/g} -{g|f:3a3b073676b24e7ead880363fef1bbaf}Medicae Mechadendrite{/g} -{g|f:95c75fde7c314366b771bcd0b116feee}Manipulator Push{/g}
ddddd7c8-e8c9-4edc-bedd-93bd1893e9b6: "However, your loyalty to the von Valancius court grants you access to acquire this knowledge."
378b7c4c-ae8d-4863-ac9c-578f1e308ddf: "Correct, entirely correct! Rarely do I meet such astute interlocutors among the laity." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s eyes light up. There is no hint of sarcasm or condescension in his praise — Eogunn is genuinely pleased, like a proud mentor commending a student on their insight.{/n} "I respectfully initiate a request for an audience — I must discover what other gems of knowledge are hiding within your rich mind."
4a2639ee-7bd1-4ba7-8bbd-82f697a33960: "I do, and I command you to acknowledge my victory in this debate."
1e7a59a3-d567-4a1e-bc84-8858ef9971e1: "For life is so fleeting, after all, why encumber it with more fears and regrets? This is the answer of a person rooted in reality and with a thirst for life."
d053b31c-2814-43f3-a41b-d1a47d5cd180: "Farewells? What, do you intend to die?"
6ee7332e-4b9a-44fe-8ac1-8d8bddb142c9: Thanks to the Rogue Trader, the scales tipped in favour of Laria Voigtvir.
4e59e340-d72a-43ab-8a6d-7bd84309f7df: "You were just going on about the importance of discipline and hierarchy, and now you dare to oppose the Lord Captain's orders?"
32a04c81-4a5f-49c5-bbf7-b7736ec3da59: Set this augment in order to galvanise its ability in combat
9139c9bd-21e4-4661-bc62-ae924e7784bd: The Inquisition forces are rapidly closing in around the palace.
03d14b4c-f8bb-4e83-a5db-96da4ba79e5d: [Look at the traitor Astartes in dark blue armour]
625998ff-a4d2-4b12-a2c5-4b34961e046b: {n}A whirlwind of emotions flickers across Vedka's face for a moment before she composes herself.{/n} "During the journey, I familiarised myself with the Astra Militarum Handbook I found in the ship's library, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's... It's significantly different from the Handbook on Zarkov. Over centuries of copying, we have unwittingly changed so much. It has unsettled many, but otherwise, we are well, Lord Captain."
5f15bea4-0469-469e-aa2f-f5b26b4747c4: "Enough. I have heard enough." {n}A frustrated trill erupts from Seberian's vox-grille.{/n} "Look at yourselves. This entire 'council' is a farce, a despicable sham that has forced me to waste precious time. My retinue is incapable of finding a consensus. Counsellors! Retreat to the palace. I will dispatch the traitor myself."
2a802616-a58b-4794-bf2f-2baaed3e1750: {n}Letting his gaze rest on you, Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served the dynasty faithfully. I expect you to aid me now with your valuable counsel as well."
ac30c957-b12e-4fc6-bb60-8a776e4c7f64: "Alas, there are too few organic components in these artefacts for my diagnostors to shed any light on their true age, and archaeological research has never been my strong suit."
cead9e59-9ef4-42b8-a6d5-730ea886f03c: "He stood watch impeccably to the end. Righteousness is giving one's life in the service of the Golden Throne."
b0f86004-e879-428c-b135-08b82016170c: ...my own voice. "Fear is but a phantasm spawned by the enemy! Do not let it crush you!"
ffdd706d-d8aa-40bc-a207-e047f7e9e48e: "The associative series you set forth does not appear random to me somehow, but the solution eludes me. Nuncius? Why have you gone quiet?"
dc075b3c-66e2-4d7f-baac-2bb50550e212:
Idira has joined your party, which now consists of several characters. To select one character, click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on their portrait. To select multiple characters, hold {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} and drag a box around them.
To select the entire party and issue commands to all your characters at once, press [{bind|SelectAllCharacters}].
2c7a8d7c-89fd-4dfd-a4b5-0a168ccf3c40: The mysteries of Zarkov tempted many explorers, and over time the planet became the source of an endless stream of weapons of war, poisons, and stimulants.
1e7e05b6-43b6-4784-a6ec-a90e6d3d9010: "Run along now, soldier. Tell your commanders to prepare a welcome befitting a Rogue Trader."
85082ab6-db94-4558-82f6-e3c77b804382: "You have endured a great deal. There will be no more suffering. I promise to spare you — just let the hostage go."
a2db7257-c57c-4ca1-b0b9-13b3277d3e66: "I am not afraid of torture, Lord Captain. You can do whatever you want to me. The worst nightmare of my life is already over."
f8ac90f3-5b2f-4292-b688-0e26c87b35d0: "He is playing with death, in fact, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. He keeps trying to catch it, but it runs away from him, and flies over his shoulder, but it will never leave him completely. I thought I was cracked in the head, but no, that tin can must have bigger problems than me, if he can't decide whether to live or die."
69351763-47b4-40bc-a262-b0108281be2b: "The very thought repels me. But if I must sacrifice my sanity and support my sister's scheme for the Lord Captain's sake, I will do it. You have my word."
44b06b75-1e7c-4b8b-8432-201423c4d7d7:
{g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g} is one of Eogunn's abilities that protects a selected ally from his attacks and allows that ally to be used as a ricochet point: Eogunn's single-target ranged attacks ricochet from the ally to a random nearby enemy and gain increased critical hit chance. To use {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}, Eogunn must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.
Eogunn's unique augment weapon, the {g|f:5b46732f51a9413bbc94491ac63c807f}magnarail lance{/g}, allows him to perform the {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Magnarail Blast{/g} attack. Eogunn selects the main target and several cells within range. He strikes the main target with an energy bolt, then additional energy bolts burst from the main target toward the selected cells, damaging all creatures in their path, which are considered additional targets.
When used, {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Magnarail Blast{/g} removes all {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks from Eogunn. Each removed stack increases the additional damage dealt to the main target. Additional targets suffer half of that additional damage.
