54c31d38-8ea7-4cfa-b192-52a8e87de6df: [The madman endlessly cradling his own severed head]
c2b5c395-f6e9-4c06-a517-516846654287: For 1 round, Eogunn creates an energy wall that occupies {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cells in a straight line. Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal an additional +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armour penetration. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. ! Can only be used once per combat.
69b1ddbc-a99d-49c9-8eac-4f7a1d82b174: "There is a priceless blade, and if you apply your talents correctly..."
21a8a08b-495c-4430-ae00-78f7dc58ed6d: "One of the few mon-keigh whose conversation was actually diverting. Never mind, his pain shall dispel my boredom one last time."
e4b29106-f530-46f8-ba96-f0c0d1421fb4: {n}He simply grunts in response.{/n} "It costs me nothing to give it."
eae5fb80-051c-404c-a941-7a10b0c8ac7b: "I am ecstatic! Now that Nuncius is with me forever, together we can refine the triasomia procedure. How many triumphs await us, how much good we will deliver to Humanity! And for that we have you to thank, {name}. Isn't that right, Nuncius?"
91e31ee6-0939-404d-b7ad-17ba89eaa9aa: "I find myself disappointed in your communication abilities. However, you still have the chance to answer my question."
7c5b1846-4523-4617-acf2-4e48741a5e7a: Whenever the creature deals damage, it restores <u>(from 20 to 25)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} to a random ally.
bf5dfaaf-95aa-431e-bbfc-9266b1c5c310: "It will be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will relay the orders to the Colonel-Governor."
45b4e54b-a415-47a5-869c-dc586a197fdb: {n}The mumbling and head thumping stop. The man shifts his clouded gaze to you, and you see recognition in his eyes.{/n}
9b00810a-aba8-4375-8be0-061fdcd81e84: {n}An enormous gate clearly wrought by inhuman hands. The doors are emblazoned with a multitude of shimmering sigils. The skill evident in the carved xenos inscriptions both awes and disgusts you.{/n}
ae6cfd90-500f-4d27-8c3e-ed29558cf70d: "The fellow in the portrait was rather handsome and sumptuously dressed."
6d22b481-25fd-4b2a-a3e2-5e0fe55d368a: "Thank you for talking some sense into my colleague, Lord Captain. We will send this man back to where the Tech-Priests found him and retrieve the augment when the time comes."
3502edab-4eb3-4f80-a829-ddd98e6ddc43: "You will go no further, primitive creature." {n}The Necron's weapon swings sharply, but not in your direction. It is aimed at the Guardsmen.{/n} "Your existence ends here." {n}The tip of the staff flashes, and a cascade of green sparks passes over the bodies of the captive fighters, bending them to the xenos's malevolent will.{/n}
1a9f8c21-9bbb-42c3-891d-f3438c811d68: "Hmm... These codes seem familiar. I think I recall what they signify..."
1e1af207-c0ca-40e2-bb69-78f46ec3069c: "Look, Nuncius: an atypical formation within the servitor, but it is functional." {n}Eogunn addresses the servo-skull in his characteristically eccentric manner, while briskly inspecting the growth.{/n} "Moreover, this teratoma is a very recent formation, yet it has already succeeded in obstructing multiple critical control nodes, binding the machine spirit in fetters of organic matter. Mere coincidence, or malevolent intent?"
07532cd8-4896-40ea-88d5-482f88172470: "If there is any xenos filth on you at all, I will find it."
de63d338-b87e-41fe-afef-fc1ae9531a38: {n}After a brief pause, the Tech-Priest begins to speak:{/n} "This statement is true. I laid the {g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}Artisan{/g}'s hand upon many machines on this platform. The alterations to the sacred circuits have increased the productivity of the main mining units by one hundred and fifty-three... correction, one hundred and fifty-four percent — a considerable margin."
a040c4e8-a161-44b5-a561-43e50a961b95: "Juvenna has already ended her conversation with the Inquisition, but I personally heard them, believe me!"
6c0c4017-1c07-4188-9b8b-1ebee6c1faef: "A commendable effort at manipulation. But if you intend to exploit my emotions to sway my judgement, then no, you will not succeed. I am convinced Nuncius would act precisely as I have."
7b3e9b53-85ee-4022-8bc2-d1888bd6ad8b: "I admit, I do observe some successes, yet they are insufficient." {n}Seberian clenches his augmetic fist with a grating crunch.{/n} "The very first enemy to arise, one such as Diodas af Irramon, shall grind all your achievements to dust with a mere wave of their hand."
15640b23-0e94-4888-b1b6-a13c56ed9223: {n}Pasqal's visors flare crimson and his voice rasps with a grating, plasteel edge:{/n} "I call for the activation of the algorithm for smiting tech-heretical filth! The Omnissiah demands the disposal of the unhallowed xenomechanisms!"
09b5889d-24af-4c4b-98f0-a6d8d2ba5756: "I have gone to great lengths to appear before you, Diodas af Irramon. May I ask you a few questions?"
b4a97cd5-2028-44a8-a853-d3ade2360175: Grants {g|f:f7c442d4d3c444a99d7411cb83c95c1e}rallied{/g} to all allies within a 5-cell radius of the creature using the ability.
902c042d-56e6-4baa-aec0-a38eecb631b2:
The user's weapon damage is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.
The user's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} against {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}prey{/g} gain +{uip|Pen|47e2502cae69411689d491291a9fbf43}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
2c7a63b5-298b-41bb-b5c3-1554a89588ff: Huge rings of varying hues drift slowly past the lancet windows of the captain's bridge.
51fbfd91-9f36-4f04-9e77-a3ec6b6fb872: The {g|f:9b090810169e4a42b22afd5995d3720d}Death Cult assassin{/g}'s allies deal +{uip|2agiB|64cf497f9dd64631b348f31668e7b957}% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to enemies if both the ally and their target stand on the blood-covered cells.
2ac27706-63f4-4a19-9b5b-720c76343605: "We have entered the station's orbit, Lord Captain. Awaiting a signal from Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}For a few seconds, the vox-frequency carries only trepidatious silence, which is soon broken by a rattling voice.{/n}
ed8bf41d-7b38-41cc-9f42-31b73070600e: The very existence of Zarkov became more rumour than fact. A terrifying world from legend, a mysterious planet of lawlessness, Cold Trade, and secrets. Those in the know could easily track down the source of the tales — but for the rest, the planet remained nothing more than a story overheard on the streets of Footfall.
b3cde38a-0c23-401d-a19f-57b62107810e: "A laudable aspiration. It is especially curious that I am learning of it here and now." {n}The von Valancius heir looks at you with keen interest.{/n} "We should discuss the details."
873e8b1f-da2d-47c2-8a3d-7e1e319412a4: {n}Nuncius seizes the Tech-Priest's hand with immense effort.{/n} "Eo... gunn... Just... let... me... go..."
4b963d25-ac52-450c-8e9d-b5217242598c: The tortured bodies were curled up in a variety of poses, each one reflecting a different facet of unbearable agony. The flesh of these unfortunates seemed to serve as a canvas for the Drukhari's cruel experiments, from barely perceptible, shallow cuts to sanity-destroying burns. One of the corpses held an Inquisitor's insignia in its ossified fist.
06739685-da36-4fff-aa46-dd4e0cb68fc2: {n}Colonel Batoshski lets out a low, guttural growl to catch your attention.{/n} "When you return, we fight. That is the law of our regiment. There is no other way."
274abdee-8251-4386-abd7-f576961a6297: {n}The humming of the inner workings of the Magos's augmented body grows quieter — and sounds almost disappointed.{/n}
b6e3f7fc-bf52-4afd-bbc4-3c7237838b0e: "The knowledge of the ancients is undeniable! The scenario of voluntary transfer of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor to our cloister is recognised as the least labour-intensive, and the probability of preserving its usefulness in our hands approaches one! The consequences of other outcomes are deemed undesirable."
9bef00c1-4e0d-4b7d-8f3f-85d2930d843f: {n}Eogunn raises his mechadendrites in anticipation.{/n} "Who will form the basis of the Triasomata?"
d0a7b835-0650-40d5-8b02-50b4e2fa8b76: "Something is wrong here. Your people... are they sick, Colonel?"
d2e51448-559d-427e-bfad-0613ef2e4df6: "A difficult question, and thus an interesting one! From the perspective of the Cult Mechanicus, augmentation is an unalloyed good — flesh is weak, and replacing it brings us closer to the Omnissiah. But this good is also a supreme privilege. Every augmetic is a man-made miracle that glorifies the Machine God, and not every layperson is worthy of such a blessing."
d7ef1984-0a2a-429c-9657-df2bd5c7fbb9: {n}You hear Trazyn's voice again — devoid of even a hint of the ringing mirth from moments ago.{/n} "Our agreement. I am ready to fulfil my part."
429b5bf5-f283-4a6e-8380-78482fe79ef3: "By the Machine God, be careful, Rogue Trader!" {n}Grimacing with pain and exertion, Eogunn struggles to extend one of his manipulators to the numerous toggle switches on the apparatus.{/n} "The throne circuit is overloaded with galvanic energies and so the current is rampaging. If you interfere, the course of the experiment will be unpredictable!"
e9da7753-aff7-4d5d-9ec3-7963d22754eb: "The Emperor will hear your pleas, heretic! Accept his merciful answer!"
750f106f-25f1-4a9a-adb8-2131c025224b: "One way or another, we must see the experiment through to the end."
b8d53cbb-f62e-478b-a9b1-c7e3b5437276: "Interest in these ruins awakened the first xenos once already. We do not know what the consequences will be if we keep delving deeper and deeper. At a minimum, we need time to identify the enemy's weaknesses and find a way to eliminate them. I recommend the creation of an isolation zone — this will limit the risk to the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g} and give us time to study the enemy. The Holy Ordos is well versed in managing such... highly restricted areas."
3274c4a0-8d9a-4068-bf04-9ecb8987cda0: {n}The xenos nods slowly, drawing out the words of its strange language. The grinding of the Elucidator servitor echoes them:{/n} "How... satisfying... vengeance... after the flight of the... plunderer."
43879ff1-4847-45bb-9292-f0a10602c980: "Careful partitioning of the situation will facilitate a satisfactory conclusion to the confrontation." {n}The Tech-Priest emits a low binharic trill.{/n} "My cogitational capacity {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}will be redirected{/d} to calculating optimal defensive tactics."
3ca661cc-efcd-4549-bff6-ad4e3f17e855: "Nuncius is an incredibly sophisticated creation of sacred algorithms, interlaced with my own. It is difficult for a layperson to grasp their inner workings, yet not a single one violates the commandments of the Omnissiah."
138ca087-7906-48b3-af21-17499956fdab: This fearsome weapon deals {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}mental damage{/g} to all enemies around the main target, inflicting {g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}melting{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g} on {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}.
9b560c66-4793-49d9-ab29-569459c78315: {n}The Drukhari eases his stance, resting his hand atop his weapon's hilt.{/n} "Go on, mon-keigh. Give me a reason."
00d35046-9dc2-47b9-93b0-151481de378b: "You worry needlessly, Master Proctor. That the people are showing their sincere appreciation for their ruler is a sign of their respect. What's more, I personally ensure that such processions are conducted in strict accordance with regulations, and, as such, your personal intervention is not required."
63cabd10-14fe-4342-9bb5-cb4a36833879: "At the infirmary, later, my {mf|lord|lady}. Give me time and keep your head down for now."
312883d1-29d6-45b7-acc6-f8411906fac9: Voidships shall fill their holds with the dregs of the protectorate and offload them upon Zarkov. In this crucible of the human spirit, the weak shall burn and the strong shall be purified and tempered, joining the Rogue Trader's elite forces.
40d1a7e2-f4f8-44ae-9b2a-bbc46bd1ddf0: "The mythical kind, shall we say. The subject of my research is an ancient, unusually advanced xenocivilisation. Some among the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}tech-clergy{/g} call them Nephilimechs, believing them to be the first creations of the Omnissiah. Others call them iron anathemas, considering them to be the spawn of Abominable Intelligence. But the initiated know them as Necrons, and believe me, the hand of the Machine God has never touched these monstrous creatures."
a3b41ece-b067-4d9f-957c-ec2e0fd6dcd0: {n}The cadaver's slit throat lets out a few squelching wheezes, coming together to form recognisable words:{/n} "Err-rrr-orr. Re-quessss-ted dessss-igna-ttion no... rrr... cognised..."
90dea304-f4bf-4632-837c-157b5aaa0c7b: "As you will. Let us be off, Rogue Trader. We have nothing more to seek in the realm of the dead. The deeds of the living await us."
0d662175-b50e-4138-b3a3-dbecb4ed4186: {n}Cassia considers the captive, her eyes alight with unexpected superiority.{/n} "A vibrant soul... Rust-hued malice, golden faith, and a lust for power that drapes all in noble purple. This woman is incredibly dangerous, Lord Captain." {n}She steps forward, touching the covering over her third eye.{/n} "Will you speak honestly, as befits the von Valancius heir, or shall I look at your essence... more closely?"
4196a7bd-c5b5-45ee-b602-1e61d586127c:
As long as this obelisk is standing, the Chronomancer gains +1 stack of {g|f:c3b38d719f744d56ad27b8cf48c8ef1d}obelisk-protected{/g}.
When destroyed, this obelisk deals {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to all Necrons equal to 5% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}.
848bb8de-d732-41e2-b1c4-1d265b1b6c36:
This character is using a melee weapon. {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacks}Melee attacks{/g} require the character to be adjacent to the enemy. To make a melee attack, click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on the {g|f:be721a48e3614ddbb86bf18503511c2c}Strike{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}, then on the enemy you wish to attack. Unlike {g|Encyclopedia:SingleRangedAttacks}single shots{/g}, melee attacks hit automatically with no need for a roll. The enemy will try to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} the attack if they are using a melee weapon of their own.
Melee weapons can be used to make {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area attacks{/g} — all creatures in the area will suffer damage unless they succeed on a dodge {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g} (or a parry test if they are armed with a melee weapon). Damage dealt by melee weapons depends on the weapon's parameters and the attacker's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} score.
a53a1bc9-80f6-495b-8748-7677373b5bed: "Seberian von Valancius. Most holy patron of the 32nd Merov, now Zarkov, Regiment. A hero of legends and songs." {n}Izdrig offers a lopsided bow.{/n} "I never imagined I would see you in the flesh."
d9927262-f5bf-474c-ae04-2977578b0708: "It seems that Seberian von Valancius was indeed the one erased from the official chronicles. I wonder what deed prompted such a step... I do hope that, when the machine spirit of the ancient cogitator on Dargonus sheds light on this mystery, we will not have to consign what we learn to oblivion as well, Lord Captain."
2c249ffb-225b-48e4-ae16-af5f94b7f159: "We will carry out a thorough examination of each organ suitable for augmentation, Lord Captain, and replace whichever is least efficient."
764388bc-a2cb-4bdb-bfa4-b0cd13abe091: "I will think of something. And you, be prepared to follow my instructions."
803d36e4-62c8-40d7-94cb-5a2a57835e9e: "What is a layperson doing here? Protocol 12.49 dash 5!" {n}After a second's pause, the Tech-Priest continues a little more calmly, {/n} "This protocol stipulates that if you or your group take another step toward Object 16, my Ruststalkers will attack."
cd1fc150-fee7-4370-b7d5-5d61d5fb03ed: "I still wish to hear the details, Danrok."
6834d15d-b4f3-4558-a630-f2ecf3e78f84: {n}A crimson spark of anger flashes in Seberian's augmented eye.{/n} "Do not ask me of her. Juvenna was my daughter, yet everything that once tied us together has vanished into the abyss of ages. All has turned to dust. That is all you need to know."
9d1fb835-c946-437a-86a5-ff456df21a75:
Eogunn gains the {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g} ability.
Eogunn's {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Logic{/g} is increased by +{uip|LogicBonuss|b836bde711ec44379330e442a48704be}.
fcbba5a8-f50b-463d-a277-8bfaae3c4f27: "The welcoming ceremony is over. Regiment, dismissed!" {n}Following Batoshski's command, the soldiers seem to vanish into thin air. Yet dozens of wary eyes continue to track your every move.{/n}
3dabd0f1-e05c-4268-8540-047d102c77ac: A fragment of an Ork energy weapon capable of teleporting targets using warp energy. Roughly sawed off with a lascutter, cannot be repaired.
cee7f694-c65b-4bc2-a143-6d402e6cdc71: {n}The Triasomata obediently allows himself to be led away. The man keeps his eyes fixed on the Aquila, murmuring prayers until he is lost to your sight.{/n}
1ad318d3-2d5c-45cd-b93e-a11b2c94e0d2: "Lord Captain, I am but one of the many servants of the dynasty who have come to your aid."
f3c03ba6-4b1d-4b0b-8376-3796152b6165: "Are you finished? I have matters to attend to."
a01f60ff-5aee-44fa-9cad-e54b4b2b560c: This attack ignores the target's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}.
47a9eb6e-50f1-41c4-ad32-240bc040941d: {n}The vox-synthesiser emits a bitter trill.{/n} "I surmised where your ambitions lay... But conspiring with the enemy against your own father?" {n}Failing to find an ounce of remorse in his daughter's face, the Rogue Trader juts out his chin and turns away. When he issues the order, his voice sounds calm:{/n} "Seneschal Voigtvir. Deal with this traitor."
88531116-6b0d-429a-ae10-dcb03e8ca7bf:
With a crash and a roar, the world fell back into place. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. That joy, it turned out, was somewhat premature.
No sooner did we stir from our spots than sinister glyphs began to glimmer along the entire perimeter of the hall. The xenos had obviously made thorough preparations for this meeting.
b0ac5ca3-25eb-4cd6-9de9-638a66ae736c: {n}The portrait remains silent. Perhaps because, despite the vividness of the person depicted, it is only an object that has been hanging on this wall for centuries.{/n}
12fa79d1-4d55-485d-9ac6-0a396c74fc11: "It was one of the most complex procedures I have ever performed! We replaced the majority of his head augments, but it was only thanks to the knowledge of the crimson priesthood that a neural implant capable of replacing the damaged parts of the brain was found in the repositories of the Sector Bionica. They had been keeping it in storage all this time, withholding it from the laity — and for good reason, as it turns out. Isn't that right, Ferrenz?"
8fd7e1a2-3e2f-4171-ade2-b787b7ed4fa6: "Zarkov's squads of runners managed to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."
10c96680-476d-4a75-8945-b4c235cbec10: "Ah, well, in that case, I am interested more in your philosophical outlook rather than in your practical skills. I do not doubt the extent of your knowledge, but I myself will handle the technical aspects of the process. If you want to know about my focus and objectives, my research is dedicated to the extension and optimisation of the vital processes that occur in organic flesh. Key to this endeavour will be deriving a formula to quantify righteousness. Your assistance in this matter will be invaluable!"
e751010b-7551-48b2-bf43-cd101af41baf: "I do not know of what you speak, visitor. There is nothing here that belongs to you or your {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, and that is an inviolable truth." {n}The tip of the Warden's staff points straight at your chest, casting a menacing glow.{/n} "Any attempts to dispute this truth will result in your annihilation."
14730fbe-e625-4dbd-885e-3b6a943ea1b6: {n}The last words sound rehearsed and unfamiliar, as if he's using them for the very first time. Yet, upon hearing them, the people around you grip their weapons tighter, and the blond man grows noticeably more confident.{/n}
0b0bbad6-82ee-4688-9079-e72d37a9ce4f: Seberian's retinue is divided, so he will not heed either side. You must achieve a majority.
8d017cb6-ff2e-4c16-9224-8569484c2371: "Stay where you are, intruder, or you will be annihilated!"
32d3a1d1-fc98-4f5c-84cd-ff6416776163: "Their brains have been thoroughly scrambled here. They look like they might start howling with rage."
297f2317-749e-4255-825a-1014cf896c1c: Eogunn's deep knowledge and brilliant mind were put to good use by the Koronus Conclave. All his knowledge of xenos, accumulated over many years in the ranks of the xenarites, was now turned against the enemies of Humanity. The punitive operations conducted under the aegis of the Ordo Xenos gave the Imperium one outstanding victory after another.
b507535d-076a-45b1-aefd-5de47cf54837: "I have always liked Isimond for his discipline and his skills as an enforcer. However, your words immediately make him a suspect. But we must have complete certainty, or else we may cause turmoil in the palace by acting rashly. Continue your investigation."
d0b735bd-6281-4959-92b3-05d862aad0de: "I will... temporarily overlook the Rogue Trader's lack of a {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, which would, in essence, mean the revocation of {mf|his|her} high station and all attendant privileges. Let us just rectify this 'minor inconvenience' as swiftly as possible, {name}."
7cc4a772-e7ed-4f0c-a456-067d6f305f90:
All allied characters gain {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g}. Does not stack.
Eogunn's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} is permanently reduced by −10. Whenever an enemy {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g} him, he suffers an additional {uip|Damage|288d109443a6496592a9b14b88993522} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 30% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
1c10802f-156c-4bf4-8b23-b002bb8ba814: "I serve the Seneschal, Laria, Your Lordship."
b0e39621-dbf2-4151-a272-b950702cd249: "Cease this madness at once! We cannot afford such a waste of life!"
c17fd7be-5e80-49af-a388-5fdd3629b65c: {n}The Manipulus looks up, his eyes filled with a focused scorn that verges on rage. In a heartbeat, he will put that scorn into words; unless you step in now, any hope of freeing Eogunn will be completely destroyed.{/n}
d68dd071-17f1-4b57-8e40-32fc3705c9be: {n}Trazyn's soft laughter is accompanied by an icy chill running down your spine.{/n} "I know well what this servant speaks of. I am aware of these ancient gates and what is hidden behind them. This path shall lead you to me."
0db618a3-a9c2-4f5d-9c37-b6789351dc7b: "So, as you see it, I am confusing cause and effect. Faith, as the supreme directive, grants meaning to our every action. The Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all, and we make it the meaning of our lives to emulate Him. I am impressed by your arguments. They have given me fertile ground for reflection."
fa6b9fb4-9510-4f03-a35a-739b8d7ca6f7: "Juvenna actually betrayed Father?" {n}Laria's face turns ashen.{/n} "Do you have proof?"
1cd79648-25c0-4d32-a9cb-c65ce67c368a: "What do you intend to do after we prevail?"
263a20fb-8f0e-440b-b1c7-0db3f8269f18: "...strain known as the Pauper Princes. This Patriarch is the progenitor of the local Genestealer Cults. His presence was uncovered, and I found it necessary to take this unique individual before the humans found a way to dispatch the parasite living beneath their settlement."
be4978b6-641c-4065-ab2d-c33ae8bf80de: "And there is one more thing. My agents have code phrases for the most vital reports. Say the words, 'The wax is still warm,' and I shall listen, even if what is being said sounds like rubbish. If there are many more cycles to come, this will save us a lot of unnecessary arguing."
cb1929de-fd1c-4683-969e-c4c41248e7e7: <u>(number of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} stacks on the user)</u>
9c3a21ec-b9aa-431d-8123-60aba4e0b7bb: The user gains +3 levels of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}.
7be4e471-25c4-478e-b371-5addac5c1602: "A stark demonstration of the irrational thinking inherent to xenos of your species. Augur scans have given no indication whatsoever that the celestial body carrying the station possesses some... spark of life. Stop explaining natural phenomena through the prism of your own primitive views, it is profanity at its most flagrant."
106be6c8-fb69-4552-9017-424dc0d78da0: "By the God-Emperor's grace, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. After you left, we repelled several waves of the enemy. Then the whole place started coming down, and the heretical iron things shut down. We gathered the wounded and ran. We made it out just as the place collapsed. A shuttle picked us up outside. I have already ordered the names of those who fell in that cursed place to be carved into the memorial wall."
19e2a5a2-b761-496a-9d6e-6c7039a7ec28: Deals <u>(from 6 to 18)</u> shock damage with 25% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
67a3c553-9ac9-49c7-b8c2-04fec5c53a47: "Light of my eyes, I beg you, go and poke your head out on the lower decks for a fresh dose of inspiration. I fear your quivering heart may not be able to bear it."
c660096d-08e2-420e-98fb-1c76a097d338: "A search of the subject's suspected burial site yielded no results — no body was found. It appears it was never buried. No traces of heresy requiring cleansing. We continue to search for traces of Seberian von Valancius and to purge possible new traces of his heresies. The next marker is the xenoruins at the coordinates recorded in the vox-scribe's memory. Seberian reportedly surveyed them shortly before his death."
3f039939-768e-4b12-af0c-497a4b792404: "Eogunn, you have been granted a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in the study of Footfall's wastewater."
9e67b7e3-758e-4dd7-ac53-ede065fa5eaa: "And what would we do without a bloodhound with such amazing instincts? Oh yes, we'd be spared the priceless opportunity to appreciate the primitiveness of your thinking."
5de8c260-1fe4-4a5a-a7ea-ce1381559a59:
A character has 6 augment insertions: 1 optical and 1 cortical insertion in the head, 1 somatic insertion in the torso, 2 insertions in the arms (sinistral and dextral), and 1 musculoskeletal insertion in the legs.
Some companions possess unique augments. They can be replaced, but other characters cannot install them.
Cassia, Space Marine companions, and xenos companions cannot install augments.
76a8203b-75aa-4fc1-b1d9-7d572e152549: "Registering Category Three and Category Five manifold sacrilege. I demand a review of Genetor Februs's status and the implementation of expiative diagnostics to eradicate heretical thoughts."
a541eba7-b923-4a7e-8237-3fd3f34a977e: Laria has revealed the code phrase intended for her trusted agents.
83ca5d07-c0bf-4b16-961d-258c25f51df0: "It seems we are finally speaking the same language..."
314b9895-56d5-4482-b69f-f5c13cd0c269: "I am as perplexed as you by what is going on. But in order to find answers, I must go inside."
de5a5dc3-21b3-4008-9e38-387da9f11260: "Is this some kind of test? No thanks, I don't play at politics."
737b143e-6f60-4be4-9cf0-d7e9c3cfe705: "A peculiar noise, yet one that leaves no psychic trace. I suspect that prolonged exposure could lead to emotional volatility. It would be wise to monitor one's own state of mind and not give in to rash impulses."
3c7b7ff5-b0df-4acb-8aea-c5882df21c1a: "Did you crawl out of a cave or something? Dargonus is under attack. The enemy claims to be acting in the name of—" {n}The sergeant falters, beads of sweat gathering on his brow. After several painful seconds, he forces himself to continue:{/n} "In the name of the Inquisition. The 32nd has been guarding the gates here for days now." {n}He furrows his bushy eyebrows: your question has rubbed him the wrong way.{/n} "I don't give briefings — that's not why I was deployed here. Move along, before you're mistaken for spies. All expected reinforcements are in the cogitator log — there's nothing there about you." {n}The sergeant nods at a panel nearby.{/n}
b6ff0b47-5b42-4cd4-b339-d1885ee1acca: "Truth be told, Nuncius and I predicted this outcome. We must go after him!"
e8f366a8-ce1d-4fdf-b057-ed29cf062a1f: "Suffering is only worthwhile if you have a truly well-planned capture strategy. If you've wound up here, you made a mistake somewhere along the way, and this is your punishment."
1f5c63f2-c36b-4452-b935-09d8362ce718: {n}A dense ring of people surrounds a platform suspended on chains. No one shouts any encouragement to you or the colonel. In grim, solemn silence, the Merovians keep their eyes on you and Batoshski, armed with traditional knives.{/n}
4a849ab3-9ef2-41fe-9fff-3b4bae3f346a: "The flesh of the laypersons admitted here is weak, but the augmentation level of the crew is increasing. Optimisation of the crew for the glory of the Omnissiah is progressing satisfactorily."
9d9ce0af-6aa3-4583-9e46-a232bd16887e: Genetor Majoris Ferrenz was wounded in the attack on the Sector Bionica, and you failed to prevent it.
651a8890-f5a7-4bae-aee7-38e6fefea440: "What have you done to my subjects?"
3286f191-7a4a-4df9-ae9c-6b113baab30a: "Glaito is a tried and trusted tool for pursuit and punishment. Anything else is irrelevant."
e1cf1d90-73d8-4a5b-874d-17839861125b: "You have betrayed my trust. I want you to leave my retinue."
b183705f-5a17-4a85-96f2-8ae20c425dc2:
Until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user gains the {g|f:1061649559ed40f2bc253acd1ad9a9c7}Simulacrum Projection{/g} ability with 3 charges.
At the end of the turn, the user suffers a {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}.
2018e9aa-3689-44c0-9c44-3cfafcdc6344: "The Gapraks are servants of the Adeptus Administratum. Our blood is unsullied by the psyker taint."
2c30b2af-44c9-46d5-82a9-22aa82a6bd86: A crude arrow and the letter C have been carved into the metal.
eb34e283-63d8-4486-98fa-448cf90b34c1: {n}The wounded man turns his head toward you, staring at you in disbelief out of his one good eye. The other eye is buried under clotted blood and swelling, which flanks a deep gash cutting across his eyebrow and temple. His pale face, with its sharp and delicate features, cannot possibly be the face of a commoner.{/n} "Isimond Sauerback. To what do I owe the pleasure?"
bffe2d46-2573-4690-a591-38fbdccd8547: The Inquisition soldiers gain +50 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, +50 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}, +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}, +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}, and +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}.
a3d08a24-8d00-4e1e-9916-a3f6debe656e: {n}The curse echoes through the spacious study, but it brings no comfort to you in your agitated state.{/n}
3d0303cc-b615-45af-accc-effa0f969044: {n}The Tech-Priest twists the bolt on his beard one final time, then nods politely.{/n}
2d61b96d-ed24-4960-9bf0-744c7b6e3a6c: "What is the Adeptus Mechanicus view on augmentations among the laity?"
9f245054-0f94-46b0-bbee-a0a3522d24bd: The pernicious ideas spawned by Manipulus Februs took deep root among the Explorator Fleet, sprouting countless disputes and strife within the ranks of the Omnissiah's servants. More and more members of the Adeptus Mechanicus were seduced by the xenarites' philosophy, redirecting their limitless passion for knowledge into the study of xenotechnology.
4b7a8e79-3be7-441a-892a-157ad585a049: {n}Your ancestor nods with a hint of relief.{/n}
008c0ce1-6696-4439-b9f0-adee6fcd6215: "I have the honour of being a friend of Juvenna von Valancius. May I have a word?"
7d648f10-d99e-4fc0-8bf3-721d2b1c8dec: "Juvenna is untouchable, but she is playing too much into the hands of the enemy. There is a spy in our camp, and I now suspect that spy is connected to my sister. If she is behind this, we must catch her in the act — nothing less will do. And one more thing: 'The wax is still warm' is the code phrase of my most trusted agents. From now on, it belongs to you too, as my ally."
1b51bd09-840a-4cf0-b4eb-5ca415dfc22f: "...just as I was preparing the Mother of Shadows' extraction. I must admit, I was amused by the audacity of the simple creatures who attempted to kill my future exhibit in the middle of her acquisition, and so, I found it acceptable to complement the display with these Aeldari..."
5515e54a-4fde-4a4b-987b-ecec6ab0bb50: {n}Heinrix pinches the bridge of his nose wearily.{/n}
0d7ce529-6b45-425e-b043-fabef093b4cc: "I have good news: the Haemonculus is willing to grant you freedom. First, however, he demands an apology and acknowledgement of his genius."
67ad4c40-e6f0-4660-b160-b2ece68f15fd: "Hail, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}." {n}Eogunn's sonorous voice fills the channel.{/n} "As you know, there are no unsolvable dilemmas — only poorly formulated questions. You strike me as someone who knows how to ask the right questions, and so I would like to invite you to participate in my scientific research. Will you honour me with your presence in the Sector Bionica?"
a782ce94-45c4-4ffa-8c61-880a26bad1a7: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, if I may be so bold as to point out that this learned man possesses a rare combination of skills and is almost certainly proficient in the creation of blessed augments. This is a true boon for the flagship and you personally!"
d68ce9ce-091a-40c9-979f-b7872c861a9a: Try to break down the barrier
0420caeb-03ed-4b38-a6a7-ecc4856ed599: {n}Jarub looks around before he answers, as if checking whether there are any listening ears nearby. His voice drops to almost a whisper:{/n} "Captain Isimond Sauerback is the only one I know of. I heard the plasma pistol was given to him personally by the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} for his loyal service to the dynasty. As you can imagine, it's an expensive piece, engraved with his initials and all. Guns like that aren't for the likes of me, or ordinary enforcers either. If I'd been given a reward like that, you can be sure I'd put it to good use. I just might improve my lot."
bdf33e81-5305-4074-b554-efaf445b4772: Standard Astra Militarum vox headphones, but the pads are finished with a thick and oddly whitish bark that cuts deeply into the skin.
5d682a53-b04b-48ae-b81e-5f4ae9735b16: "I accept doom along with the sacred complex. May the spirit of the Omnissiah guard its spirit, no matter what torment awaits us."
dafbe7c9-e0e2-4c0f-b45f-8e8e04164350: "I have been there several times, searching for relics among the ancient wrecks. It may be possible to find something of real historical value in their depths, but without strong evidence of their significance, such finds are of little interest to me."
b2bc6d02-076b-461d-829f-4b35b09d8fd0: "We have allowed our feet to touch the Warrant. We must flay our feet, make purity seals from the skin, and wear them until our wounds heal!" {n}Fire blazes in Incendia's eyes and voice.{/n}
3f8a1713-6ed4-4741-a1ef-5d67f8064574: "I received reports that the Gapraks ought to have arrived at the palace by now. Perhaps something happened on the way, or perhaps the noble house has decided that defending Dargonus is not one of its priorities."
f9bb376e-fb79-4c37-8482-ecdfe9fda9f9: Restores the turret's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} and grants it the {g|f:2b822f5f71d0476fa975e5dff7092cd3}overclock{/g} effect.
f855deb8-7b68-4665-b0db-07a3f5f60b84: "A person can change their function if they are willing to fight for a different existence. Even if the price is unrest and the risk of death."
96c9f147-67f7-4034-bd3f-58d1f254b650: Even at first glance, you notice many differences between this giant exhibit and the real palace on Dargonus.
b57097cf-7cc2-4c48-b83a-ee22a5c97625: "Pasqal, do not hinder Eogunn in his research."
00012f38-137c-4c46-9fc6-daaf677a1f83: "I'm afraid that is all I know."
036652ef-f0fe-45c3-aa81-03c6a089f5f7: {n}Unable to help himself, Jarub runs a hand through his tousled, straw-coloured hair in puzzlement.{/n} "This has to be a joke. My {mf|lord|lady}...?" {n}Then something seems to click in his mind, and he nods.{/n} "Deal. But His Lordship keeps the blade under guard. We need to somehow lure the guards away from the treasure, and then I can handle the rest. After it's done, I'll be waiting outside the infirmary with the... precious cargo. I'll definitely be there — the guard shift change is coming up."
892eeef9-aba2-4f27-988b-a4b15f9d0c26: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague. His eagerness, inquisitive mind, and ability to view a problem from a variety of angles are invaluable to our research. He is also rather loquacious himself."
6f086323-e018-45a5-b354-478fc57f55cd: "A bizarre tapestry of metaphors, yet containing a surprisingly deep meaning." {n}Eogunn listens closely to the Harlequin's recital, counting off on his fingers in rhythm with the stressed syllables of the poem.{/n} "Iambic pentameter. An unexpected choice, yet pleasing to my auditory receptors."
0d29cc90-2082-4a82-b465-eb2caec77ab3: A certificate bestowing a noble title on Isimond Sauerback, authenticated by two seals.
518b569a-c68f-434e-a32f-c514c536a769: "Countless more. Some contain artefacts from the farthest reaches of the galaxy. Others serve as transcendent dungeons for beings of unfathomable power who once drank the stars dry. Access to them is denied to you, as it is to other specimens of inferior races."
52159fd6-d8a3-4b69-acc2-703af2b3e90f: "Please do not violate my disciplinary and hierarchical radius, layperson."
542f068a-9302-429a-bf84-3ac48bad40e1: "I doubt that the Sector Bionica will be able to meet the needs of everyone and anyone in the crew of an entire voidship. If that were the Rogue Trader's goal, we would have to dedicate half of another deck to such compartments."
f5aeb73c-0c18-470e-ba23-fea7f1ef4bf1: "Would you like to see the merchandise, my {mf|lord|lady}?"
b255b214-ac3b-49ee-9267-d48ebc03b02c: Creatures within a 2-cell radius around the Inquisitor (including himself) cannot become the target of {g|f:394672f56f1649cb84de6a8377d492d1}Bombarding{/g}.
02e05996-8ee3-4e87-8b0b-fcf1f7607abf: Isimond claims to have suffered a shrapnel wound, but the injury was inflicted by a bladed weapon.
cc6a7fd6-0201-4c8e-b4e3-9fa91c169dd6:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, for every 10 points of their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, 1 Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell, adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.
An enemy that destroys a Tactical Simulacrum suffers +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g}.
0e83609c-1316-4134-85a6-4fce6d8bfb90: "Is it really so hard to just say what Tervantias wants to hear?"
3a5305d4-dcfc-4a0f-bb17-174a09d48e18: ...came up to a gateway where blast-damaged gates were blocking the entrance to one of the pyramids.
1fbb57f4-2de2-4807-a601-14ec9088c1ac: "I advise you to take every conceivable precaution, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janris sighs heavily, steeling himself.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous."
96bf8a30-143d-4fcd-92ff-7d8c2f69d358: [Convince Camilla to do as you command]
1fd018fe-1423-434b-8d97-e584f9543d48: "It is my sacred duty to be a faithful servant of the God-Emperor in the struggle against xenoheresy."
a18db931-4302-44be-b112-b9fad889940d: "From what I know about you, Seberian, you are hardly the one to accuse me of excessive radicalism."
7abe43ca-4674-40cd-9619-c6516ce02e4e: "The time has come to strike back at the planet itself! Burn and poison this world. Reclaim Humanity's territory with promethium and chem-bombs."
9f039937-feaf-42c0-ba41-19c1a1d5ac59: "Your histrionics are pointless, Seberian. Your truth was an intricate work of artifice, frozen in eternity..."
25d91f39-89f3-46c2-9993-4e0cb488f926: "You have undergone a grave operation — the implants need time to settle, and your body and mind need time to adapt. I promise you will feel better."
172b27b5-eedb-4f3e-81d5-62b8e215ae12: "Nuncius states that this conversation has stimulated and enriched him."
5b0e7c7f-fdb1-4f69-a4e2-71b2e04d72a0: Genetor Ferrenz may know the requirements for fitting unique augmentations. He can be found in the Sector Bionica.
cdca7f0c-fb1d-4e08-86c4-0abe6ef347d2: "Vivisector Martinax is a medicae ready to lay down his life for his patients. I stake my honour on this."
8726e4fd-1c88-48b9-bab5-ea8a64d58ee2:
A sheet of paper covered in tiny handwriting.
"I, Seberian von Valancius, the God-Emperor's anointed one, His instrument in the Koronus Expanse and tamer of all things xenos, commit these words to vellum, lest I be lost to the heart of this savage world.
To Colonel Zbrestshchysh, commander of 32nd Merov Regiment: I order the penal regiment to decamp and proceed to Dargonus, to surrender to the authority of the next scion of the dynasty. Together with my heir they shall venture to the stars, serving as a blade and a shield to my successor.
My retinue is to assist the colonel and expend every conceivable effort in the search for my heir.
Further instructions shall be left in locations separately agreed upon with the parties concerned."
6ede6139-3fc9-4ba4-99a2-82813a351108: Despite the stale air in the small chamber, the richly jewelled display case looks as if it has been meticulously maintained all this time. There is not a single mote of dust on the clear, gleaming glass.
1c002d4b-5345-4d7b-8db6-8f65e5c0ec88: {n}Eogunn nods curtly.{/n} "Perhaps that is for the best. I thank you for everything, {name}. I hope one day I can find the answer that eludes me, and tell Nuncius of your outstanding qualities. Farewell." {n}He turns around and beckons 'Nuncius' after him. The servo-skull's empty eye sockets express nothing.{/n}
2533f72b-4582-4d19-808c-c8747f56fd9e: "You have chosen a curious time for court intrigue."
b5f739fb-cc11-436c-90d4-7c266e1c5505: "There it is, Lord Captain... God-Emperor protect us, this is the first time I've ever seen it this close." {n}Captain Dunawski regards the monstrosity with mingled terror and fascination.{/n} "I see two lines of attack. One to the flower, the other to the growth. The flower sprays poisonous pollen, while the growth spews out flesh-eating flies. Which approach do you want me to take, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
41136af7-3ca4-4bb7-a82a-c65bb0d145f9: "I'm listening." {n}The sergeant leans toward you conspiratorially.{/n}
2dab5e2e-825f-4474-9b0f-a7945a26a35c: {n}You hide a hand behind your back and make a subtle movement with your fingers. A shot rings out, and the man in front of you collapses.{/n}
768865c9-7f0c-418f-ac85-9fcf81929759: {n}You instantly {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Commissar}recognise the lines of the Handbook{/d}. It is the mandatory protocol for Astra Militarum sentries to challenge anyone approaching the perimeter of a secured site in exactly this manner.{/n}
fef44da5-6b62-4f34-b9c5-46e6c9b9fcb9: "I have come to a decision. The workers will continue to make do with primitive prosthetics — the Omnissiah's gifts are intended for officers only."
fe809145-2bc2-4f62-a0f9-fa9998ff196b: "Autoscribe servo-skull, designation one-seven-dash-four-zero-one. System status: pending."
e6bcbdd6-7c15-489e-95b1-51ea573d6d1c: "The news of the Gaprak lord's death is tragic, but the loss of those reinforcements... Perhaps your timely notification has forestalled our defeat. We will speak about your reward once this war is over."
3682f91b-fc63-4465-bca6-ed573569634d: "So it's true? You are all that is left of House Gaprak's reinforcements?" {n}Seberian is stunned into silence for several moments, and when he speaks again, his distorted mechanised voice is quieter and more strained.{/n} "Disregard that. I appreciate your loyalty, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. It is unfortunate that our meeting is taking place under such lamentable circumstances. I will see that you are provided with quarters — war or no, I will not allow anyone to accuse House von Valancius of lacking in hospitality."
f58330d7-0c47-477c-bc83-0e426163ba70: "Esteemed Genetor, maybe we can do without the non-standard reasoning? We don't have a clue how this... thing works. I'd rather collect statues in my luxurious quarters than be a new addition to someone else's collection."
41fae103-b8f4-490a-b17a-39ffeae28185: "My appearance horrifies you, doesn't it? When I had not yet renounced the innate limitations of humanity, the von Valancius dynasty was fading, but now look — the protectorate is thriving! I have had to sacrifice some of my human nature, yes, but what have I gained in return? New worlds, new horizons... I do not expect you to understand, you are not a Rogue Trader after all. Your world is too small to appreciate the scale of my conquests."
f6f6a0d6-bfa9-4854-b6f5-eb597e33dfed: "Kais-torr-Shaiga is teetering on the brink of being declared a heretek. I've also come across references to his ties to the {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Cold Trade{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:KasballicaMissionGlossary}Kasballica Mission{/g}. However, he has never crossed the line — or, at least, he's never been caught."
0e0d8a45-b1e3-4caf-b723-92631e8ddcb8: "Truly, the God-Emperor has revealed a miracle to me! The heir of Seberian has opened the container!"
d07b162f-3f7c-4c6c-b409-2999d57d2ee8: The master code for the gates has been found. This development should be reported to Juvenna.
ccb68873-1ee1-4808-b786-1541bd97b1e4: ...headed toward a bottomless pit that gaped at the foot of the nearest menhir.
be30d13f-f66a-4308-af72-a6cfce979324: The master code for the gate has been found. Juvenna should be informed.
00f92cea-8a17-4d9f-9399-fcb2fb89b500: {n}The precious find vanishes into the folds of the Tech-Priest's crimson robe, as if Ferrenz fears that someone might spy the object in his hands.{/n}
c72eb9c3-356c-4a5a-b14d-e8d025e53bb3: "You will not have Seberian. Together, we shall wrest the Warrant from your foul clutches, xenos!"
a0b0d7e8-a931-4d1a-8fcd-93c5b46a9edd: "Such precision of vector calculations is impossible. It appears that your perspective must be incorporated into the accepted mapping of reality, however much I may find this reference point abhorrent. After all, you have surpassed me at my own game. Not even Seberian ever managed that."
36759fa6-fffe-4be8-83e3-8fec46938093: "We have restored your honour, Aett-Vater, and that is what matters most. The Allfather's blessing is stamped on your dynasty from on high, and you need not mourn this... paper." {n}Despite his bravado, Ulfar is still careful not to tread heavily on the Warrant of Trade.{/n}
63138fca-9aa4-4c7d-a2df-8c35440e45ff: "Dealing with a xenos sits even worse with me than dealing with you."
83b201f7-8dc1-48e4-a152-0fd7a2b1fb92: "In the First Call-Up, the rank of colonel was a lifetime post — he granted all other promotions and demotions unilaterally. The rank passed to his son, then to his grandson, who turned out to be a weakling. The others slit his throat, and the strongest and most cunning of them took the colonel's position. He set the rule that if you want a promotion, you prove your worth. You fight the Trial Match against others with the same ambition. It's the same for every rank: if you're aiming to become sergeant, you head into the roots with the other candidates. If you make it back, you've earned the rank."
cf30814f-6dad-440b-b1a0-4022f2bad7b3: Genetor Februs dedicated the rest of his life to atoning for his gravest act of wickedness. Absorbed in his righteous toil, Eogunn used the knowledge and experience he had accumulated to extend the days of the worthiest of the Imperium's servants so that they might continue to perform deeds fruitful and blessed for the glory of Humanity. Those martyrs were denied death, and their lives were prolonged in terrible suffering and eternal service against their wishes and expectations. The servo-skull, which Eogunn had created as a reminder of his unfulfilled debt to his closest friend and colleague, accompanied him until the final seconds of his mortal journey.
7e07af6b-fc05-4736-a98e-478ca21fc85b: "Yes, you will. That is an incontrovertible fact."
311c0e60-5326-4739-8ab4-d8c575bfa528: "I'm afraid there is no such branch, poor dear."
a663d621-e6b7-4042-ad88-7dec79431cea: {n}The giant says nothing. You almost feel the waves of disappointment rolling off his figure.{/n}
94d86e4a-1dd4-4817-a9b1-d88b6c6a7ab4: "Comprehension of the sacred mystery of technology is a path that not all can follow."
19ac898d-3d86-41f8-bd59-5b0ece071183: At the start of combat, the wearer gains {uip|Charges|9b89d418269b476d8d5c82afb5dfffb7} charges of the {g|f:152b9cb5ecef4a5cbd402e2fd3ade6b8}Project Hardlight Cover{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}.
c80160ec-9b4b-4263-a007-4410f2163022: [Lower your voice] "Tell the Seneschal, 'The wax is still warm.'"
b44358de-1bde-40f0-a67f-365163677d33: The pale light of the lumens dispels the darkness. There are signs of a struggle everywhere: gunshot marks, destroyed furniture, and faded stains of dried blood. The fate of the crew remains a mystery — the ship's compartments are empty. The latest report from aboard the mysterious ship comes after an unusually long pause: the echo of a high-pitched cry has been heard coming from the ship's bridge.
7a4689c9-651f-480b-8e4a-d81cd3590fea: "Advising that we save time and proceed with the execution of Protocol 17.0."
e001cf05-2888-4347-9cd4-ad3e74a267cd: "The most significant finding is that the Drovers prey on {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g}, and they are attracted to warp-active areas. These creatures were probably created specifically to destroy anything that exhibits warp activity. We can use this against them."
4a410166-f45b-431f-8918-22d9f724668c: {n}Seberian is silent for a long moment, then a grinding sound, like a chuckle, escapes from the vox-grille.{/n} "You are indeed a von Valancius."
d0985bd2-f015-43e2-8165-8f1c8464de5f: "I have chosen to systematise the experience I gained and make use of it. Tervantias, for all his worthlessness, demonstrated several interesting techniques of vivisection, organ separation, and tissue splicing in his experiments on me. I believe I can replicate and even improve upon them. Little by little, this rational processing of my experiences of torture will allow me to recover from the shock inflicted upon my mind."
9b28c6a3-6b91-4f10-839e-638e147fad45: {n}Your eye is drawn to the head of the predatory creature behind the man. Its beastly face, distorted in mortal rage, is vaguely familiar, and its gaze — too intelligent for a dead thing — is fixed on something very specific outside the painting.{/n}
b31fa07c-822c-4fc2-81e5-9508c6b86854: The wearer gains +5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} and +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}. The wearer does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} when moving, and the {g|f:c38007425a35422eb2a93d28e690d039}Kick{/g} ability costs 0 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}.
74821a12-2ea2-4c7f-b506-2b85e875dcf3: "Even if Isimond did duel with the Gaprak scion, without the latter's sword, we can prove very little."
ec8aa30a-5af5-4179-a1b0-29ddc38061b6: "What does the symbol on your pauldron signify?"
5fd6b196-294a-4b8e-9471-2ca4e53259a1: "Lighting levels are critically low. Nuncius, if you would be so kind, activate the lumen. It is better to see what is hidden in the dark, however unsightly it may be."
8339e744-f4f2-46d9-ad2f-a3a3a920abea: Magos Exalt-117 and Branek Zarkov support the Seneschal's plan. Their backing must be preserved.
d7e6fdb0-498b-4fec-8455-0a9e6d720977:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, any stimulants used by that ally during this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} do not inflict negative effects.
9d4ee077-be16-4f3f-8f25-6d6b3006c10c: [draft] Jae and I are looking for Falco.v
e21753db-e53f-46a3-9dd0-0c91688f2fee: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VedkaGovernor}Governor Dunawski{/d}, according to the latest reports, is holding ground to the east, at the main gate. They say she's fighting as if the Drover itself is screaming right in her ear."
e5503a4b-4a46-4903-95fd-7754835f2093:
The range at which medikits and stimulants can be used is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When a medikit is used to restore an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it restores +{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} more wounds.
When a stimulant is used, it restores {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} wounds.
If the target is within the {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} area, this value is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}.
7c29e5fa-375e-42ef-aee9-dd39459f81e1: {n}Eogunn touches the sacellum delicately with the tips of his fingers, as though fearing that the machine and its contents will crumble to dust.{/n} "We meet again, dearest colleague. I would give anything to have you look at me now, your eyes brimming with reproach, resentment, even hatred. But all I see in them is pain and yearning. Is it yearning for life or for oblivion? I do not know. I stopped understanding myself long ago — madness and guilt are bewildering, they muddle the brain. I have grown accustomed to it. But that I stopped understanding you — I can never forgive myself for that."
e590df0d-a6d7-43e7-a7b8-204f845a48b7: {n}The enemy's onslaught has abated. The xenos continue to offer feeble opposition, but the main forces of their guard squadron have been irrevocably destroyed thanks to the valour and skill of the pilots of the Imperium. In this battle, victory is yours.{/n}
cdbf99bd-67bc-4c6f-bf94-da1284825eb4: "Does anyone in my retinue have any ideas on how to use this?"
a45579ee-6e4f-4955-9e3e-568da3620f25: "Two ordained servants of the Omnissiah can resolve their differences themselves."
a8759553-5168-4345-987f-7a5cd147356a: Whenever the user performs a single-target attack against a target in a 3-cell radius, they make a shot with this augment immediately after. It deals {uip|Damage|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g} with {uip|Penetration|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
73a20004-370a-40e6-b4a4-3218ddecea54: {n}You are interrupted by the sound of metallic laughter — erratic and jagged, like a weak vox-signal. And then, just as suddenly, it cuts off.{/n} "Bow my head? I, an anointed steward of the God-Emperor whose servants you proclaim yourselves to be? I, whom you are sworn to obey until your dying breath? When He bestowed upon my ancestors the Warrant of Trade, He distinguished the name of my dynasty and charged it with expanding the borders of His Imperium. Know this: today, you oppose the God-Emperor's will. Today, I name you traitors."
ee2f0b97-7e3a-476f-b670-10db0c7d49f2: Every last detail of this terrifying machine is an affront to the Omnissiah.
f931122b-d52d-4d93-a2cc-92920e0e8016: {n}A dozen bullets pierce your body with a repulsive crunch. The last thing you see is the departing figure of that mechanical monster, unaware that it has spilled the blood of its own kin.{/n}
344e2670-b9fb-489d-9af9-4813be5277aa: The creature gains +80% {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g} reduction, +3 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}, +20% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}, +25% damage, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}, and +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.
14f03016-49c8-45c6-b548-1bae4c92c462: {n}The man's gaze clears for a moment. It seems as though, for the first time in a while, he truly understands who is speaking to him.{/n}
dd7ea547-48fc-404b-9355-6f81206edf91: Your marksmanship impressed the Merovian Guardsmen.
0ee66ef9-3d37-4e02-bc3e-7dc834b805af: {n}You turn and walk away, hearing behind you the groans of pain and the lamentations of the young chirurgeon trying to do something, but to no avail. {/n}
aead99a8-ba1b-4492-aff1-600d590c4afd: "Eogunn, why did you conduct this experiment outside the laboratory?"
d5301a57-7130-486e-bde7-db12e578752a: You agreed to give Nomos to Trazyn the Infinite.
15fca2fe-7f9d-44c7-95ef-f1cb9da03a32: "He does not have one and never has, Lord Captain. No member of the Adeptus Mechanicus has ever granted this servo-skull the sacred boon of personal authorisation, despite Eogunn Februs's claims to the contrary. To retain information, much less mimic personality characteristics, requires a far more sophisticated {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} and organic base. These are absent here. For the past several decades, this 17-401 model has been operating on basic settings."
5718866d-9879-41df-ae0f-07502311a1f1: {n}It seems Trazyn never intended to wait for your reaction. After giving Seberian one last look, the vision fades away.{/n}
21a4b72c-256b-4fe3-a86a-acb97a60eefb: "May the wisdom of {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} be with us." {n}With a strangely quiet sigh, Eogunn ends the vox-session.{/n}
2269acc9-155f-4876-9329-a55887f5e988: "I come from a noble line on Janus. Family legend has it that my ancestors knew the secret of the planet's terraforming technology. I, on the other hand, have chosen the path that allows me to transform the person, rather than the planet. Advanced terraforming, in a way. Augmentation makes Humanity stronger than any phenomenon in nature. Isn't that what the God-Emperor wants us to be?"
d6d0eda2-1ea9-4dbe-9137-2b3f04e6e4cb: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core was found destroyed in the forges of Altar-Templum. Only hundreds of years later was it discovered in the remains of the tech-temple as silent proof that a xenoheretical schism had taken root in the minds of the station's inhabitants.
b9e52fcb-6e74-4658-afc8-8599d3fb3ffd: "Absolutely. You may perceive that as a cynical view, but I am merely cutting away all that is superfluous. Humans are not simple creatures — I could regale you for hours with the nuances of the structure of the body and consciousness, and cite theosophical and philosophical musings. But it makes no difference — as long as a person fulfils their function, their life has meaning."
314f14aa-8c64-4000-bb95-137b110963c3: "The Manipulus has modified the ship's servitors in ways that deviate from the permissible standards for their construction. The arguments he has presented are heretical, the results are blasphemous, and his speech is profane."
20211c88-2e35-463a-a406-01cea85697ad: {n}Suddenly, Nuncius begins thrashing around in convulsions — a seizure so intense that he bites off his mutated tongue and begins choking on his own blood.{/n} "No, blast it, no!" {n}Eogunn roars gutturally, sending his mechadendrites swarming in panic. After a moment, Nuncius's body goes still.{/n}
af399a51-364e-439c-ba83-617e40487572: You removed the xenos blade from Seberian's possession.
4b1b5703-7210-4dd5-b29a-c95f089caf68: "I think I shall postpone my visit for now."
7c726a59-a6f8-4b89-8c5a-3507ffea7071: {n}Seberian bows his head in thought.{/n} "Indeed. The God-Emperor knows I can hardly claim credit for bringing that about, but you found a way to impress an old man."
231d36be-98f4-4014-a188-a5b416681c27: {n}You detect a certain longing in Eogunn's gaze — nostalgia for his time spent on the station.{/n}
0d8f17e2-2411-4857-b3d5-75e8664f242a: "If we know where and when this thing will appear, and we also know how to lure it to a convenient location... There is nothing that can withstand a direct hit from an orbital lance, Lord Captain."
84fddb2f-ee2a-4d8d-971b-bff47cad751c: The creature shoots an acidic clot at range.
54312b4e-1d86-4751-9f5c-f48c172d4942: "When this is over, you will realise that I am doing this for your own good, Seberian."
e7e15c3c-f121-47c0-97fd-1b2ec5623fe1: "Juvenna favours Isimond, and there's nothing wrong with that. But to prepare such documents unbeknownst to me and Father... I do not like it at all."
4cd99ae6-5155-4089-9050-37e82142362b: [You know the way to the end result. But which one this time?]
f51becb2-0d5d-405d-9d7d-194190fb375d: "Rogue Trader, what disputation will you honour Nuncius and me with today?"
48ec9bcf-7fc5-4ec9-a9ed-54850d1a17a1: "Use of your characteristic primitive heuristics is absent. I am surprised. The potential danger level of the phenomenon has been revised upward."
7408167f-953b-42c3-b545-93fb556364e0: "It took me fifty years to understand that Nuncius was doomed as soon as he touched that artefact. All my searching for a panacea was not for his sake, but for mine. I could not let him go, so instead I lulled my conscience into a false quest — anything to rid my soul of this pain, all the while ignoring the very real suffering of the person I had forsaken. It is time I learned to say goodbye." {n}A sad smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "That is an incontrovertible fact."
52ce6c5e-d8cc-4624-be5f-6dcea64dc940: "Then let us not delay. Do me the favour of inviting my esteemed colleague over — I am, as is evident, in no position to do so myself."
8cd308d3-c073-4d70-96f3-16f4137142e3: "After triangulating the data received, I propose that the cause is the lack of cognitive processing on the part of the operator. You have seriously disrupted the unseen data indexing of the anomaly."
ff23abc6-6556-4f27-a8fe-5eae27fabf83: "These three are doomed. If you tell me to stop the experiment, I will obey without question and terminate their life functions. But then their sacrifice will have been in vain. If you allow me to see this through to the end, one of them will survive — no, he will become something greater than he was before."
bfa57f86-e4f1-4669-b798-e56884bfcf9b: Serving in the dynasty's military forces became a genuine opportunity for the common people. Although such an honour came at a high price, the prestige of the regiment only increased, and within decades the army of the von Valancius dynasty would become a model "fist of the Imperium" for the entire Koronus Expanse.
076b91b8-cbe0-4eac-adfa-ceeae1b66979: {n}Eogunn's complexion, far from healthy to begin with, drains of colour entirely, but he speaks firmly.{/n} "I honour the tenets of the Omnissiah and do not stray from His truths."
5f2c3a92-7489-4173-bacc-4e41f798c8d3: "I grant you clemency. Jocasta, take him back to his deck and give him the strongest painkillers we have."
44a96489-9fe0-40f6-9d29-9122772b9a43: "I am beginning to suspect a conspiracy. If that proves true, retribution awaits you."
590188c3-9b1a-4f7a-927f-f3144a374fe5: "No authorisation, access denied. Authorisation required by unit Eogunn Februs."
decef461-1c91-43ba-b437-e862a4b34545: "Do not be so hasty, colleague. Heal with the mind, not with medicaments — that's one of the key wisdoms of the Officio Medicae." {n}The Vivisector stares at the wounded man's face for a few seconds.{/n} "Perhaps Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence will lend strength to the patient. Try to support the patient while we attempt to stabilise his condition."
bb136870-aa5b-482d-8740-a70cd7fa1314: When moving through cells within a 1-cell radius around the Defiler, the enemy must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −15 penalty or be forced to flee 4 cells away from the Defiler. This effect can only be activated once per turn.
9fd2f309-11fd-4e84-aef4-319d16e7efb9: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Penal Legion{/g}. Desperate thugs rounded up from the prisons of the hive world of Merov in {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} and commanded by brutal officer-wardens. You have heard tales of these regiments.{/n}
4aeb283c-a627-4246-a938-f10e0cd73532: "Excellent, Lord Captain!" {n}The man looks up, and you see the gold-plated implant replacing the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_VivisectorWounded}ear that was shot off{/d}.{/n}
e5f94b11-2120-4f37-bdfa-0b5f1e2696d8: "But, if my daughter is alive, in whatever state the abominable xenos's captivity may have left her, I will take her with me to the cold stars." {n}Seberian breaks off.{/n} "But hope is a foolish sentiment, {name}."
f9561e74-af9b-400e-9b9d-5343a78e5658: The user automatically fails to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} the next attack. Then, if they do not have a {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}, this effect is removed, and they gain the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.
de44624d-f4b6-4afc-a2f5-06bea9f1e3c5: "Request accepted. The Sector Bionica is fully operational once more and under the oversight of this life form. Augmetics are being installed in accordance with approved protocols."
303ce56f-906a-4823-83bf-0c9814bdfdc6: {n}The woman standing beside him bows, her single eye fixed on you. Her voice rings out, piercing the heavy buzz of the crowd.{/n} "Have you come to renew our oaths, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
6d37b3ee-b717-4f88-a9ea-37d7f037c305: The carnivorous swarm envelops the target, vanishing into it, dealing <u>(from 15 to 30)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g} and inflicting {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (15) and {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
4e61a4f0-0cac-49ab-8683-ae41189d70e2: "And now with Exalt-117 wounded, we risk being left unarmed as well. He is the only one capable of taming the machine spirit of those turrets..." {n}Seberian drags his augmented fingers over his face as if brushing off a cobweb.{/n} "Enough. Speak and get it over with."
0486cd30-9feb-445f-97e6-779e444c47f2: The scout's death was but the first of many, as the soldiers following him did not fall back in time. Their blood turned the black stone under our feet a rusty scarlet. Only a salvo from the plasma guns of the flagship's Tech-Priests, who were marching in the rear, made everyone freeze in place.
5aa585ab-ff62-48cc-85b0-5a4301a277af: "The expendable life form performed its function of destroying the enemy. Retaliatory fire naturally damaged its casing. The life form's approximate effectiveness is equal to 1/300 of the effectiveness of a ship's cannon charge. However, we do not refurbish charges."
9c79a89c-7243-4eb3-b116-997986487915: The user's attacks with force swords and psyker staves deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:WarpDamage}warp damage{/g} equal to {uip|Damage|bab2df33e1684f20b5d41f20c8334e56}% of their base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
433d7e52-fe7d-4420-8981-47370d01db44: "Please register my gratitude for sparing the sacred cortical implant from being installed in a low-efficiency life form. May the Omnissiah bless your prudence."
3c7a3b7c-c71d-43d5-b31c-721aada27c71: Vindicated those who had fallen victim to the Archenemy's influence.
e3bffad5-3462-4679-90fb-b735f7d4a842: {n}Tucking your hand behind your back, you make an imperceptible movement with your fingers. A shot rings out, and the woman in front of you drops to the deck.{/n}
bc228108-f7de-4e17-874a-36699cb447fa: "As my ancestor once said: even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds."
28a3bbde-7505-44bd-b710-8fd0a929ea45: "Lord Captain, I have recalled several other matters requiring my atten—" {n}Danrok, who had stirred, wisely falls still upon meeting your gaze. For a few seconds, a heavy silence reigns, broken only by the low hiss of Seberian's augmetic lungs.{/n}
1d0bbd32-e039-49a2-8e66-85ca56b9128c: "Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. Will you report on the movements of Heretic Coryphaeus?" {n}The deep, steady voice of the speaker is almost hypnotising.{/n}
3aafe155-5823-4d46-bdc4-0ed5db838cf3:
This unit's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced:
-<indent=5%>to 50% of maximum if a generator overload {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g} this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 70% of maximum if an electrical circuit reached this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 90% of maximum if neither event occurred.</indent>
994d75f5-d837-4e48-8d2e-d23c7a8f911f: "...capable of guiding their crude ships through the warp. This particular exemplar, named Abenicus Benetek, was able to theorise the potential existence of a route to this sector. Alas, I was unable to acquire a live specimen, so I contented myself with the remains..."
431e73b9-229c-4bb7-b62e-28cb76d59ee4: "The theological discussion can wait. I will deal your issue later."
b5bf847c-4b17-4d19-8e94-2fede4ebd9a0: The turncoat must be hidden among Seberian's inner circle, else they would hold little value to the Inquisitor.
105d7ea0-1f22-4a3a-b3f3-a4379bf4127a: You manage to extract the access codes from the depths of the cogitator.
acd37b43-cce9-4e3a-b9a5-7603de03bf9c: "I would be pleased to go with you."
4442aefe-529d-45e9-bc82-a6244ebff8f8: "What, you too!" {n}Sauerback's reaction time is excellent — your shots sound almost simultaneously. The plasma burns a grisly wound in your side, and a bloody hole appears in the captain's chest. He collapses to the ground, glaring at you with all the hate he can muster.{/n}
1b5264d5-ca62-4932-a993-ee5e5ade4ae3: "Tervantias said that Nuncius was an empty shell. Incapable of communication and lacking any algorithms."
c320b8ed-004d-4e59-b1c3-65e33e68542d: {n}With a look of triumph, Marazhai thrusts his hand forward, seizing the servo-skull.{/n} "Whining is futile, though your pleas are music to my ears, mon-keigh. This bauble belongs to me now. As does your pathetic life."
d9fa56f4-60b9-4e80-8df4-86a5428089c3: "This hypothesis is extremely subjective, but it has a right to exist, colleague. I believe that the calculations that underpin the xenomachinery generating the anomaly have not accounted for one variable: the Rogue Trader. In other words, the unholy machine construct simply has no power over your mind, {name}."
44d75c60-9e8e-4c48-a213-59490f56ced4: "The cursed xenos has sealed his own doom by insulting the von Valancius dynasty."
84874ec4-9414-42b1-a996-850f9069892b: "Oh really? But I haven't even got to the most important part — shooting half this wriggling worm's head off! Let him feel what it was like for my son to live out his last days."
167c2830-a2ab-4188-8d3b-5c5bcf7a3277: "What was it like living on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17?"
d1990ff1-2b19-45ef-a229-6e9704536f90: "We brew it up from those killed by the Drover's poison. If you're not so badly poisoned that you die or wish you'd died, then for a while all kinds of poisons won't be any more dangerous to you than water — if."
4241c138-7af5-4c42-9ae1-9f0a9dd27609: "A worthy answer. Truly, whatever differences may stand between us, we must not show weakness before the true enemy. Duty to Humanity and to the dynasty outweighs all else."
13f19617-d2d1-4036-a540-0e977323052e: "Seneschal, if given free rein, the phantoms of the past can swallow a man whole. I experienced it myself, but since then the Omnissiah has impelled me to comprehend the means of mastering them. I am willing to share the knowledge."
58fc06f1-fe17-4194-9bcf-a15f096893f0: "Keep your claws to yourself, Master Cogbelly — Lady Theodora gave me these augments! Speaking of the psyker curse, some friends on the other side send Nuncius their warmest greetings. They're curious about him, too."
64304013-3a93-4b93-805a-db23b6a0f40f: "Like a bunch of abscesses, they are. They ripen right on the roots, then a swarm of carnivorous midges bursts out. Smash the growth early, otherwise more of the bastards will hatch." {n}A web of small bites on the man's shoulders alludes to the size of the insects.{/n}
280d13e9-f686-49ee-87c4-23c370840415: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this creature cannot have formed spontaneously — thousands of years ago, someone must have interfered in its development, guiding it in the right direction.
0e69c376-48d0-465c-8927-6b8709124dbc: "You are in a shrine, not in a butcher's hall. Show respect for our sacred objects."
af74aea7-cbd5-4510-93ef-df30f29c3fe1: {n}With sudden clarity, you {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}realise{/d} that the image has been significantly embellished. What you have before you is a ceremonial portrait intended to cast its subject in the most favourable light possible. Either that, or... the artist whose brush produced this work truly did see your ancestor as some kind of idol.{/n}
6d1768cd-e974-4a9b-9b02-352c01c010f0: {n}Your cry is drowned out by the sound of the wind and rain. Pask and his workers are pointing their weapons at Alva-9 — and you.{/n}
010cf2a5-e4b8-4cf6-8fcb-cb9c3e7caf9e: "I am actually somewhat relieved to discover that noble squabbles are at the root of this. I feared something more dangerous lay behind it."
04fd749e-d614-49ec-9d70-8b377964a421: "I do not think I can tell you any more than you already know. The reinforcements should have arrived no later than half a day ago, but instead only you appeared and, judging by your words, you were fully expecting to find them here. We are unable to find out any more: the vox-frequency of the Gapraks is silent even in the rare moments when we can get through the interference." {n}Laria squeezes the vox-transmitter in her hand in irritation, as if it were the one being stubborn and refusing to answer.{/n}
74d9c60c-e43e-4dcf-8293-fd61be4dec42: {n}The Drivesmaster's vox-grille emits a ringing binharic phrase that you interpret as thanks. She bows her head respectfully again.{/n}
607d9ee2-c93a-497d-98c9-72166a39a509: "The whole matter of Seberian's return was... problematic. The restoration of the status quo is the safest solution to this situation."
be765e75-acdb-4d51-a026-27687f79e543: "I'll give you a pistol. But lose your combat weapon again and I'm telling Batoshski!"
681d53a7-a48f-4ee3-8b5c-05f92a467e5e: {n}Eogunn raises a finger, appearing delighted.{/n} "Ah, so I was the subject of your experiment! A most infrequent occurrence, indeed. I hope you are satisfied with the result."
544fd16c-dd6a-476f-a15a-2250eb18224f: {n}The vox-frequency hisses quietly through the speakers.{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Repeat: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma."
548e6ee9-42e2-464f-bf69-b4d7d4c8468e:
A creature affected by {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}blessing of the Omnissiah{/g} gains +{uip|BonusCritChance|c49f6ede0ecd44f1aa996e9300513c17}% critical hit chance.
Critical hit chance on attacks made against this creature is reduced by −{uip|BonusCritChance|c49f6ede0ecd44f1aa996e9300513c17}%.
564640e9-2c98-4c2c-920c-8117dc5a13be: "You are a soldier, Janur. Soldiers do not debate orders."
7a55f125-d452-4819-85a9-d06a59412d45: {n}Glaito seems to materialise out of thin air, like a ghost, and clamps his jaws down on her leg with a crunch. As she falls, she manages to point her autopistol at you and fire — before a round from Solomorne's weapon turns her head into a fountain of bloody shreds.{/n}
8537e396-bccc-43a5-9491-8f009183baf2: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski faithfully served the dynasty until one fateful warp jump in which her life was cut short by a monster that penetrated the deck from beyond the veil. The Arch-Militant died desperately defending a group of unarmed people. The group was able to hang on until reinforcements arrived and were ultimately saved thanks to the Zarkovian woman's sacrifice.
ca03c728-aa3c-46dd-a5fe-1408ab170e3a: This creature is considered partial cover for adjacent allies.
fa3874c9-47da-4191-956f-705ff06f68d3: "Signs of xenoheresy have been detected on the station Tirkuaz-4. For what reason was the decision made to leave it intact?"
f4a6023d-3361-4e41-9a79-143a465368ca: "I'm still not sure what 'influence' is, nor how you get it. It seems only wise to learn from those who actually understand it."
2a635637-981e-4835-bd1a-da7470c050b6:
Each attack against the Vanguard grants them +1 stack of {g|f:fc83a8ac57e54db59c3bb70083dc385c}unyielding beacon{/g}. Each stack increases their {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} by +1, up to a maximum of +15. All allies in a 2-cell radius around the Vanguard gain 1/5 of that {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g}.
{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}Temporary wounds{/g} applied to the Vanguard now stack, but only remain stacked until the start of the Vanguard's turn. At the start of their turn, the remaining temporary {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced to the largest amount granted by one applied effect. If the remaining number of temporary wounds is less than the number of stacks of unyielding beacon, it becomes equal to the number of those stacks even if the Vanguard has no temporary wounds at the start of their turn.
e61b1588-6c83-497d-9a34-acf225ca4142: "A quintessential fanatic from your primitive kind. That is why there are so few exhibits of Humanity in my collection: you are all the same. You are all like this 'Chorda,' differing only in the degree of delusion as to your uniqueness. Dull, deplorably dull..."
91cf8a71-fce7-408a-ab50-b8e852a9b7d3: "Destroyers of xenos. We rarely make contact with humans, and there are many reasons for that. For now, that is all you need to know, human."
22f453d4-fc92-4497-9776-5bc00620fe77: "You anticipate my thoughts, Rogue Trader. I was just about to remark that this specimen of flora is quite remarkable." {n}The Manipulus's alembic hisses, spraying an unknown compound onto the plant; its leaves wither even further under the mist, yet do not fully die. Looking thoroughly pleased, Eogunn cuts away a few stems, deftly working his manipulators.{/n}
f27b9687-d1d6-47c6-ab05-102db1274cd1: "While clearing out one of the xenos-infested planets, our unit was ambushed. Blood of {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, we fought to the bitter end, but we lost. The Necrons did not finish off the wounded, instead taking them as trophies. Why, I do not know."
218c03b0-a7e1-4cef-8d74-aecfd04e8c75:
At the end of its turn, the Wrath of Khaine inflicts {g|f:e9b7d61b678049b9b9b305e7a81699a8}marked for death{/g} on the Rogue Trader's {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}flagship{/g} or their allied ship. The Wrath of Khaine then disappears.
In 2 rounds, it appears behind the marked ship and attacks it. The next turn, it can inflict the {g|f:e9b7d61b678049b9b9b305e7a81699a8}marked for death{/g} effect again.
88fc99f0-f842-4234-a44b-4042942b78aa: "You are making it worse. Stand aside and do not tamper with the sacred machine's navigation system."
3f60aad1-11e2-4e57-8b56-650e31b508ef: "I received it from your agent as a token of supreme trust and came here to offer my assistance."
