a3e3ba0e-184c-46a6-a41e-9262632f7c17: {n}You are surrounded by kilometres of {g|Encyclopedia:Plasteel}plasteel{/g}, ferrocrete, and humans. But you can still feel them watching you, following you to the farthest point within the system.{/n}
00ab6db4-90cf-4ae6-9029-83e0b866594a: "This model is not capable of independent communication in Low Gothic without supplementary equipment. This is a temporary measure necessary to provide a clear demonstration so that you may address Nuncius directly."
f7f2e7f3-6d20-4ecc-9ff4-2204e6244e4b: {n}As the last member of the retinue steps aboard, the ship shudders faintly. It separates from its pedestal almost imperceptibly, floating gently upward.{/n}
40702a84-cad1-4bd8-badb-a7b5934e7fdf: "Have faith in our Lord Captain, Abelard. It's fully in keeping with the legacy Theodora left behind, and she always knew what she was doing. Almost always..."
1d2e0151-63b8-47b0-a08f-3c8590787212: "Now is not the time to think of such things, my heir. There is no denying that I yearn once more to command a voidship and take it to the cold stars yet unclaimed in Humanity's name. Alas, that is unlikely to come to pass." {n}He lets out a curt and bitter chuckle.{/n}
49ccd84a-dfab-47c8-8fff-9e2c81a424fc: "Are you claiming that the destruction of the Museion and the despoiling of my collection was at my request?" {n}Trazyn's voice drops to a hiss:{/n} "Your pathetic attempts at humour will not serve you well."
58173f23-de7d-4573-b999-895e7d7e2adc: The enemies of Humanity are frozen, locked in mortal combat.
5da9574a-96bb-4376-9258-e7cdc0de6607: "I am confident that you will solve this riddle on your own. We are finished here."
f180d7a8-56a8-43dc-8bf3-c40ff009f5e5: Eogunn gains the {g|f:2f52f83899674c80a11b1ffcf5d98486}Displacement{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}, but each teleportation also deals {uip|Damage|98561505af6f4f3db5d0186f211917a1} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to him.
36bb22bd-7847-4b50-833c-f50185786f63: "To hold the line until the arrival of the dynastic fleet. As you can see, we have succeeded."
0f3ef59d-a4d4-48e8-9a21-019823446ab5: "What brings you to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain?" {n}Martinax's normally expressive voice sounds dry and placid. An augmented eye stares blankly through you.{/n}
1fe3237b-6f97-46de-ba96-a8cefeb0360b: "As I promised before, my crew will be your eyes and ears across the entire {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Expanse{/g}, shereen, just give them time. And of course, the assistant to Official Trade Representative Jae Heydari is already rushing to Dargonus to deliver goods of rare and exquisite quality to you and your people, oh {mf|master|mistress} of many worlds." {n}Jae's eyes shine playfully in the perpetual half-light of the bridge.{/n} "And once again... Thank you, shereen, from the bottom of my humble heart."
9e49cb94-58ec-40ba-ad28-738482710f01: "A refractive transmuter. I had to confine it together with Nuncius — if it were removed, death would follow almost instantly. Of course, this is only a hypothesis based on an analysis of my colleague's condition. A hypothesis I have no desire to test."
92e54699-5619-4df2-87c4-3cbc19acddf9: {n}Martinax gives the augment in your hands a quick glance, and consternation flashes across his face.{/n} "This implant contains technology foreign to the Imperium, Lord Captain. Such creations of His enemies are cursed by the God-Emperor... I beg you to get rid of this foul article without delay!"
84841c82-e4c8-4d72-bcc4-01594e245670: You drank Colonel Batoshski's rot extract and developed a resistance to the toxin.
14de6acc-ea4a-4ccd-bd74-a603e7dc4a45: "Yrliet, I do not want to fight your kind. Try to persuade them to retreat."
4628842b-717e-456a-92ed-a6edaa46ae83: "Do not lie to me, Tech-Priest. I see it with my own eyes: you are breaking the station's central drill complex."
117736ed-bc77-4d4e-9b45-7efa71f97662: "He collects titles, too, as well as everything else... Well, Lord Captain, let's add to the list of his credentials. 'Ashes at the Feet of the Imperium,' 'Stripped of Trophies,' 'Cleansed by Fire'... and 'Witness to the Power of the Holy Throne'!" {n}The Sister of Battle grips her weapon with such force, as though she were holding back a ferocious dog lunging toward prey.{/n}
5eafa151-b80e-4ba7-a69e-c3371e905f14: "Father." {n}Juvenna takes a step forward and stares intently at Seberian.{/n} "Please trust me, just this once. Our enemy is strong and formidable, but reasonable. I am skilled in diplomacy — let me go to Diodas af Irramon and treat with him on your behalf. It will only make the dynasty stronger. If my way fails... then let the melta-guns and lasguns speak in my place."
308656c9-4e59-41ad-a781-603cff9ff86f: "True." {n}The Tech-Priest smiles weakly.{/n} "I found this concept to be the most rational."
891f8f55-2395-4ea2-8c94-672eb655f962: {n}The ungainly figure next to the Vivisector is scarcely recognisable as Genetor Ferrenz. Swaddled in bandages and a patchwork of purity seals, he looks unexpectedly frail for a flesh-renouncing Tech-Priest. Swaying and creaking somewhere inside, the Genetor offers you a bow.{/n}
d846ed67-7d76-47c5-a325-82002fc1dcde: {n}Batoshski hears your footsteps and turns, his hand already on the grip of his weapon.{/n}
14517e02-73ed-4787-8343-4fb36578a12c: {n}The Rogue Trader, decked in the colours of the von Valancius dynasty, looks up sharply as you approach. The eyebrow on the scrap of skin tacked to his skull twitches, struggling to convey his displeasure.{/n} "You bring me more bad news, don't you? No wonder. The command headquarters is destroyed, so we are having to fight blind!"
f40ecd0f-b370-4cc4-a234-df94d0a0074a: "Oh... thank you! I must admit, I have been observing you in the library, too — I never would have guessed that a Tech-Priest of your rank would be interested in secular literature. I would be delighted to exchange recommendations with you and discuss our reading."
3f8f9b91-7a30-4cba-98b5-071333be848f: "Many secrets lie within that blessed temple fortress. I spent decades there, but still I am not certain that I discovered all of them! However, the station's clergy are not known for their insularity for nothing — they are quite reluctant to make contact with the laity, or even other Tech-Priests. Nuncius and I were lucky that our skills were in demand, and we were able to ensconce ourselves in that fountain of wisdom."
d803ccc6-2333-42c7-950c-38335c6436e9: "Order ignored by the intruder. Invoking the annihilation protocol!"
4545956a-8e8a-41a1-b5db-1374d1047984: {n}Jae's ringing laugh startles the rest of the retinue.{/n} "These xenos are right ashmags, aren't they? So, this is how they punish those who stick their noses where they don't belong!" {n}Once she is done laughing, she brushes her dishevelled hair.{/n} "They are in for a great disappointment. We will find a way to escape this place."
513dc64d-36a6-47f7-8878-5186d011a5d2: {n}You are certain that there is not a single mention of an open confrontation between Seberian and the Inquisition in the official chronicles of the von Valancius dynasty, meticulously preserved by historitors. The dynastic chronicles tell of the siege of Dargonus by the united forces of the Saynay pirate clan, which was one of the primary threats in the Expanse in that period.{/n}
2102a8d5-8a5e-4c75-b90a-e92f8718e6fc: "...such are the daily rituals which must be upheld for the preservation of the organism's functions." {n}The Manipulus finishes his speech, looking in surprise at his skull companion.{/n} "Nuncius, has an error crept into my auditory algorithms, or am I hearing snoring?"
9d40abd5-f6bd-4af8-b878-dccbfae4adb8: "Oh, no one doubts that, Mistress Heydari. That is why the von Valancius dynasty has won glory for its name throughout the Koronus Expanse for hundreds of years, and you are famed only among the rapscallions of Footfall."
5c210657-f6c5-40eb-b7b9-a3f346626f5c: "Do you know that the Sauerbacks are now a noble house?"
c2353f4f-ce88-4a92-9445-45e5da0d0cf7: {n}Batoshski silently claps his hands twice, applauding your quick wit.{/n}
a4971292-0128-4057-9746-6ca663fd9f10: {n}Seberian's face — what remains of it — contorts in a grimace of rage.{/n} "Treacherous, spineless scum! You are unworthy of carrying the name von Valancius! You—"
8b2edc62-f380-4e22-aa7b-2bc213833ae4: "I personally slew Inquisitor Diodas and the Palatine with that very blade of legend. With their leader gone, the madman's acolytes acknowledged my superiority and abandoned their efforts to breach the palace." {n}Despite the vox-synthesiser's interference, you recognise unmistakably the pride in your ancestor's voice.{/n}
a7c0fdd2-74ca-40a8-93cb-eb3270f8553b: {n}You hear the whirring of augmetics as your ancestor turns his gaze toward Sauerback.{/n} "Isimond served me well. I hope his descendants have not dishonoured his memory."
eeb7de87-b388-4407-9d1e-b70d9fbdf26a: "Your meta-references are abstract. The hypothesis is assessed as nonsensical."
006604f2-dc72-4fb4-b427-f2e09a41bc86: Talk to Colonel Batoshski about the Drover.
cbc77e0c-96a4-4b95-a240-e35d1c0795f8: "Protocol 12.1! Do not allow the heretics to interrupt the destruction of Object 16!"{n} Alva-9 roars as the Ruststalkers brandish their weapons.{/n}
af668b7c-4a67-4adc-87b1-c4191e9f56e3: Izdrig Batoshski's face is fixed in a violent cry, his hand bent as if gripping a knife. But the blade is gone and the scabbard is empty.
45a778f7-4ea6-4d5b-90da-5906b52e2ea6: {n}Laria frowns.{/n} "This is not my forte. Exalt-117 is better equipped to deal with esoteric quandaries. Go to him."
377e8114-3603-4f90-812e-8b4a1db3ba3d: "It is a mirage, Domin'{name}." {n}Kibellah digs a long fingernail into her forearm, leaving a bloody furrow in its wake.{/n} "Do not trust your eyes, do not heed your ears. Only will and faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g} will help you to distinguish what is true from the trickery of the enemies of Humanity."
3e8a2765-ba9b-4005-b571-69688c13f452: {n}Izdrig casts a furious glance at you, but immediately composes himself. When he turns to Seberian, something resembling contrition appears on his face.{/n} "I spoke out of turn. I apologise. You made our regiment what it is today. That is worth something. Be assured, I shall guard your back."
53a80b98-633a-4081-9178-4465d55c3aa0: "Yes, yes, shereen, you are right, as always..." {n}Jae catches your gaze and adds in a whisper.{/n} "But I will choose survival, thank you."
f7dec95c-0e2d-43c2-8ceb-408c9ca0ca12: {n}The shooting range extends before you. Supervised by a massive man whose leg has been replaced with a construction of wood and bone, a few Merovians are firing at targets.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, God-Emperor preserve me! You've honoured us with your visit. Junior Drill Sergeant Dankosh, I am ready to assist you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"
fde2a45d-6051-4829-b040-4a0f974f4c0b: "Very well. What else have you managed to uncover, Lord Captain?"
f7055bf7-5e56-42d0-839f-3c10418e733e: "I believe the truth lies somewhere between these two paths, and both lead to my ultimate goal, my magnum opus — to challenge death itself as a phenomenon, bringing Humanity closer to the eternity of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."
04353aff-c3bc-443c-ae4a-306ad23e1c6e: "It's all lies! We are in a xenos trap! Look at the sky — it's simply not there!"
cc2c9f29-c4ed-419e-91e2-28160fb9a49a: "Eogunn tended to the ancient relic in the Sector Bionica — he can help."
da16bb53-6998-42af-8514-c7fb21c9d3d7: "Sauerback is the only person with a plasma gun — a gift from your father."
6bb9370a-1ff8-4057-aa1a-ff28ef9b98cd: {n}The sergeant-chirurgeon soon appears with a flask and a cup bearing the crest of the Astra Militarum. After waiting for the colonel's nod, he pours the contents of the flask into the cup. The heavy odour of rot permeates the air.{/n} "Well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not having second thoughts, are you?"
1ba0223b-e46f-46ed-827f-f3256dbf20bb: {n}Captain Dunawski gives you a conspiratorial look.{/n} "Welcome to Zarkov, welcome to the Cage. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I would ask for a private audience."
0db51a20-ea7c-47a2-8d8d-ef9651de2a39: "In the ice-bound lake of tears, you will find what has been lost, but will you find peace? Death has a single eye that watches from the darkness of the ages, but its hands will be you... Ack...! I'm sorry, Master Cogbelly, it was stronger than me."
0422b50b-3452-48f2-ab95-454e8b570461: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge. My heir was the first to hear my call — and {mf|he|she} found the strength to rise to it. Others followed, inspired by {mf|his|her} example.
7da818e2-4944-45a5-b1a8-28bba6213fae: {n}Pursing his thin lips, the captain glowers at you and stalks off without another word, his boots pounding the ground with each step.{/n}
e7f198f1-9f05-466e-b05d-2bfe81017e67: When Pasqal suffers {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} for the first time in a combat, this damage is increased by +100%.
6bb76b3a-c1f7-4c61-a485-d48e922eb7c3: "I believe you, Lord Captain. You wouldn't allow it. You wouldn't hand your men over to the metal. I believe you." {n}The man's seizure-twisted face relaxes and the weapon slips from his grasp and falls to the floor.{/n}
1f78de2e-24d9-43f8-8d0f-f07d553fc9bb: You discovered Colonel Izdrig Batoshski's weakness.
dca571a4-4133-4a49-abc6-89d29b8d8e8a: [Knock the weapon out of the man's hands]
c95a18f9-3e22-4615-b9e0-02644dc28576: "But if my knowledge perishes with me, then it does not fall into the clutches of the xenos. Given the risk of my research being compromised, death is preferable to strengthening the enemies of Humanity."
123627de-aeca-4b12-a62e-3bb67ac8b391: "I would not be wrong in calling you the governor of Dargonus?"
ec2fcfa6-c138-4d6d-aa22-e85c579cfb3b: I said those words over and over, until it dawned on me with horrifying clarity that the Museion's cursed air was preventing the humans from hearing a single word as it sapped their will to live. Living flesh was no match for the ancient terror brought forth by the maddened dead creatures of metal.
bdb1b589-ebbf-4b20-a0ca-597eded7b915: "Yes, I have, Lord Captain. Genetor Majoris Ferrenz presented me with a true gift of von Valancius on your behalf. I suppose my status as Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s Arch-Militant had something to do with it. I feel like I've stepped right out of one of the songs!"
2e003b11-5203-4723-8db3-5d0f8bdd82a8: "What a farce! You punish heresy with death, and yet all the while you are playing a part in a xenos trap!"
38db3a50-ead7-4d27-b21f-db566c6e09e6: "Lord Captain! You actually came. Just like you did for my surgery. You are here to relieve my pain." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in a persistent tic, but he forces a smile nonetheless. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and oozes blood.{/n}
d7152724-0238-4662-b944-c17c61e85ba9: "I regret that the matter ended in the deaths of your comrades."
88fbd507-9a0b-4dae-b392-fb856c04780a: "No one is asking you to. Make yourself comfortable. With any luck, the Drover will crawl away on its own in a couple of months."
b2d6b6aa-60c4-4ce3-b6d8-634e26245083:
The wearer is immune to toxin and cannot fall prone, be pushed away, or staggered. Additionally, their dodge penalty is reduced.
However, the material this armour is made of is extremely flammable: the wearer makes all tests to remove burning with a −30 penalty, suffers double burning damage, and upon taking fire damage, suffers 6 levels of burning.
beb4539a-c922-49b0-aa52-ce150b297967: "It is a matter of extreme delicacy, but I believe you have the right to know since we share the same goal." {n}She stares at you intently.{/n}
211ffb42-2ce3-420e-859b-98daf054eeeb: {n}The man nods.{/n} "I am, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'm the foreman. Pask, they call me." {n}He looks at you sullenly with bloodshot eyes, blinking frequently.{/n} "Well, at least, I was the foreman, before all this started. Now me and my boys are more fighters than labourers, and in the last skirmish Alva-9 gave us a good thrashing. I don't know what she has against us."
290e6de6-fe1c-4e06-bf23-3c4434282634:
The user's base partial-{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover efficiency{/g} is equal to their base full-cover efficiency.
While not in cover, the user gains +{uip|Cover|1fd1336cfe1541aab3ce8357d8730989}% cover efficiency (maximum 50%).
75ede4b7-2e23-4aee-ba88-dda2cee404a4: "I wish to know more about this Drover."
20616768-d845-4d63-ab50-ed7b91412695: "You must inure yourself to the fact that there are many things in the Koronus Expanse that are unknown even to Rogue Traders and their retinues."
3f85740d-4890-4efe-a8f4-e2f7540d9d8e: An arrow carved into the floor points toward the servants of the Ruinous Powers.
7e4bfbe9-163d-46ab-a67a-0d86ee6abee6: "Looking at life through the prism of duty is wise. I must never forget the purpose of my ambitions. There is sound reasoning to that argument, more than a little." {n}The Tech-Priest watches with deliberate nonchalance as the tips of the injectors plunge into his pale flesh again and again.{/n} "After all, every organism is a machine of the Omnissiah, and its purpose is to serve humanity."
e62d9033-f3dc-4d82-9d3f-635f2bfd2f52: The vox frequency is filled with cries of horror from squad members, who have made a terrible discovery. On the bridge, a pale man sits on the captain's throne, wrapped in a web of tubes going in and out of his flesh. Around the throne, tortured corpses are laid out with sickening precision.
c38c1d24-3f10-4951-9432-38ccbfd857dc: [Strike Eogunn] "Know your place, you wretched worm! You have insulted a genius!"
e342a00d-9aa2-4735-8187-b38b9deb4cf7: "I must disappoint you: I am of the Gaprak-Olwen branch."
e5ced996-beec-4fc5-8a79-fcad937a781c: "We cannot waste our time fighting. Let us take the corridor on the right."
d51e753c-06cc-4901-abdc-37782b7a410f: {n}Dunawski seems to stand up even straighter.{/n} "Thank you for the honour you have shown me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I know of a position that offers a view of the enemy's location."
aa5c4740-369d-469b-b6e6-bb467c388276: "I will be brief." {n}Laria speaks matter-of-factly, as if reading from a report:{/n} "The enemy vastly outnumbers us. The best place to stage a line of defence is right here in the inner palace. Loyal people and military prowess are the only things we can rely on now, Your Lordship."
53712166-2411-4ff4-b709-bd7cf3e495fa: "Leave... But Nomos do not want to. Nomos want to stay with you—"
b5dc2194-99f0-4ea8-a091-3c14ab057dab: "The Drover is an ancient creature. Maybe there's more than one. Every once in a while, the damn thing comes out and starts shrieking, making us deranged. Who knows why it does it, but what we do know is that it's slowly driving everyone mad. Some people panic, some people get angry... it's different for everyone. Dunawski has ear protection, but they're the only pair, so they're no salvation."
c0176172-0d31-43e1-a535-9accbc1ab6a4: "Yeah, you bet I did. I managed to sneak a naval frag grenade in here — I knew I couldn't take the crimson priest without it. I doubt the cog's going to get up again, and this one..." {n}The woman casts a brief glance at the Vivisector.{/n} "This wriggling worm was lucky that the enforcers reacted quickly and drew the fire back on themselves. But his luck will run out soon enough."
69f4d47e-9cf4-4d70-9ded-2afa7b2383bf: [Glance at the chrono] "Next time, try to be quicker about realising that I am always right."
c56f3220-4df4-46ce-a24d-6092e700d3c5: "The Sector Bionica performs the repair and installation of sacred augmetics for those who demonstrate the most efficient service to the ship."
12f0b34a-ffe4-4a69-b466-9a204a7ad77d: "Tell me about the xeno-artefact, the sword you carried."
5dddc9ac-d94f-4d25-a0b6-95d9528ceabc: "It would be beneficial to have some of the xenos remains transported to the ship. I must stock up on rare reagents, and synthesising them from the cadavers will be the most convenient method."
3c72daf4-79dc-4980-a347-ce866104b258: {n}For a few seconds, the sergeant shifts awkwardly from foot to foot, reluctant to answer.{/n} "I'm no one special, my {mf|lord|lady}. I landed myself in the penal legion because of a streak of bad luck — I wanted to do better for myself, so I started peddling rubbish from the {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorum{/g}. Turned out that it wasn't rubbish at all, but actually highly valuable materials. That's how I wound up in the 32nd. So what if I have nimble fingers, what good's it done me?"
c63610f6-deaa-43c6-b7cd-9aa7fb1ddc26: "The life form on the operating table is easily replaceable and does not possess any substantial functional value. Therefore, installation of the implant would be devoid of sense. Proposing replacement of lost function by means of class-B powder stimulants. The life form will have limited viability and will be gifted an optimal termination period with partial functionality."
ca6c412b-efbe-4157-9613-7d398c2e9ef9: "What is the practical significance of your experiment?"
f40df9a3-993e-4707-b998-72f7bc9b1657: "Is there anything I can do to assist?"
8b4dca97-b8a0-46b6-a67b-2863592f95f2: "Reason for request: the interference of the Jaze Martinax life form in the process of retrieving augments from a carrier that has lost its service value. The life form's motivation is unknown."
d24104b0-3477-48be-8cae-307b594b2172: "Stand down, both of you! Get a hold of yourselves. You are Guardsmen, for Throne's sake!"
ae6ba582-76cd-464b-92e7-7917ee85d7a5: {n}Kuravich sets aside the data-slate and lifts his gaze toward you.{/n}
953c4702-8e06-43ff-82b7-ad3875cf5155: {n}The captain-quartermaster tears her gaze away from the slab of fibrous meat before her. A black stone glints in her ruined eye socket.{/n} "It is good to see you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. By your leave, I would like to discuss the regiment's oaths with you."
86324146-d631-46ab-abfb-e64d7692e601: "What did you do to Nuncius and how can we reverse it?"
62e97612-1b82-497b-a2e5-cd9f4cd707ef: "Wait!" {n}But contrary to his command, Seberian hesitates, gazing helplessly at his daughter.{/n} "Grant me a few moments to bid farewell, {name}! Oh, how cruel the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} is in His mercy, and how negligent in His protection..."
39c123b2-2a2b-4326-bc20-58803cf819db:
Whenever the user performs a single-target attack against a target in a 3-cell radius, they make a shot with this augment immediately after. It deals {uip|Damage|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g} with {uip|Penetration|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.
If the target is marked as {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}prey{/g}, this attack deals +35% more {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical damage{/g}.
a349a297-ec75-4f6b-837b-5cb23060c6b0:
These miraculously preserved gloves belonged to an unknown Magos from the times of the First Call-Up.
Despite remaining among the flora of Zarkov for centuries, they exude the faint scent of sacred unguents and ozone.
4d643970-d5fc-40eb-8d52-02c4e62fdfbf: "What an intriguing blade. But to display it in a ceremonial portrait is a sign of either fantastic arrogance or self-indulgent stupidity."
0d7a8f9f-5832-4f80-ad3c-aae9c29e7fe0: "What's the sense in keeping weapons from your own? Since death is at our doorstep, why not play a game of regicide?"
62d3a23c-da9e-40d4-a876-9dd6e87939f1: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy, if it will dispel your doubts about my colleague." {n}He connects the skull to the data-slate and announces:{/n} "Access to the logs has been granted."
495069b7-61e5-4210-a53b-1beafdf4494e: "I hope he helped his house achieve greatness more successfully than I have." {n}Laria smiles with the corner of her mouth.{/n}
e010a283-9237-456b-98ca-18aa60eb9e47: "Replace the painting in my chambers with the portrait of Seberian von Valancius."
22d70aa8-ea09-4fda-adc8-78b73803744e: {n}As the ship passed through the {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}warp{/g}, your officers developed several tactical plans that best fit the mission at hand. Now a choice lies before you: to concentrate fire on the enemy cruiser or to eliminate its escort first.{/n}
90ba28b6-8c94-4a55-a00f-4518fcbdf2e3: "May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for aiding in the destruction of His enemies! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was low, but the tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."
5545aa04-e9e1-4d04-9fd0-682b9b963bdb: "What most interests me is how a layperson managed to attain such deep understanding of xenotechnical secrets. If he wrought such a thing himself, his brain is certainly worthy of study. If he had associates, they should be found and questioned without delay."
f30f5562-7c14-4e53-8e6f-dc688bf9e632: "I would have turned a blind eye to that, were it not for your woefully poor leadership. Under your rule, our dynasty is headed into decline — something that I once paid a high price to avert. You allowed yourself to become Calcazar's puppet when you handed him the Yoke. You are not prepared, my heir. Bow before a true Rogue Trader and join my retinue. Then, one day, when you are ready, you will rightfully inherit my Warrant. And by the Golden Throne, you will be worthy! I will do everything to see to that."
79050306-e4ef-44d0-b84f-f9e367b93394: {n}The Drovers' appearance heralded the squad's victory, as they rushed one after another toward the tomb of the foul xenos. The sight of the creatures' growths protruding from the crevices and entrances of the ruins signalled the atonement that the few had bought for the rest.{/n}
494c7f80-4599-438a-a523-db9f2accaad5: "Dunawski, your people need you. If something happened to you, it would be an irreparable loss to the 32nd."
5d81af6c-9c82-479f-9056-678cd0e9a183: "Inconceivable..." {n}Eogunn, however, moves a step closer, forgetting all caution.{/n} "A mythologeme made flesh. I've heard of the Halo Oculus and the immortality it brings, but those were just profane rumours. Should any drop of it prove true, the bearer of this artefact is a priceless specimen for analysis."
bc9938e4-4a37-48c5-a6ed-a7277a45b9fd: "I suppose I could tell you of the officers of the 32nd Regiment." {n}Seberian dismisses the notion with a light wave of his hand.{/n} "But not now. You are dismissed, captain. I shall speak with the heir."
f8286b60-1217-4868-a4ab-4a8d3d65847a: Izdrig's guttural roar, full of fury and contempt for the enemy, thundered like an exploding krak grenade. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakeable resistance to fear.
4cd0c7a1-1c51-467f-8462-7ec17ccce18d: The governor of Zarkov, Janur Batoshski, never stepped down once given his first taste of power. For the rest of his life, he ruled the world with an iron hand, and made any challenger to his position choke on their own blood.
4e3be360-ef8e-4784-99e4-61b82a68400d: "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Coordinates to strike the main headquarters: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma..." {n}The tall woman standing over the vox is fully absorbed in her transmission and does not notice your presence.{/n}
ab48f986-5c67-4e8f-b430-2d8ebac5a85d: "Your debate technique is highly... unconventional. In which case, I suggest we conclude our disputation — you have already given me sufficient food for thought." {n}Eogunn pensively twists a piston in his beard.{/n}
afe5ab8a-3cd0-4c27-9eab-88832bbc2f66: "What else should I know about the xenos leader if I want to defeat him?"
f2bb45b3-1e60-4eb8-97ea-f4f04bc06798: "Is there any way I can prepare myself for its poisons?"
b6477ebf-62e1-4c2a-bd88-13c90e1a5a85: This creature is considered {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}full cover{/g} for Solomorne.
ec34cfa9-15f4-4031-a6c7-4dc71bfd81e4: Issue an order to make vox contact with the ship.
9602e972-1243-46ba-a626-4b4b9b3fa204: "Plenty of poisonous menaces growing around here. But, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, poisons can be used as softening agents, medicine, and all sorts of useful things. And if you mix it right, you can even make sleep-water. Sometimes we need it bad, especially after a rough few days in the roots."
ced810c8-db2a-4edd-90df-b20562f9d65e: "Approximately two standard cycles ago, the Astropaths received a plea for aid dispatched by the planet's noble houses. The aristocracy was rapidly losing control of its subjects, and a decision was required without delay. You were away from the flagship at the time, Lord Captain, and I could not reach you. Your ancestor assumed the burden of responsibility and authorised the dispatch of Zarkovian Guardsmen on a pacification mission."
dbaf4fdb-759e-41ee-bc3f-d18cb1aeadea: "Sauerback is certain that he will soon be granted a noble title."
d8aebc5e-0ba4-43ed-afda-f00cde83ff51: "I have already transferred the basic Rite of Operation to a qualified contingent in the Sector Bionica. If you refuse us, Nuncius and I will linger just long enough to pass on the rest of our knowledge, after which we will disembark. The augmentation procedures can be performed without my participation."
a6956b1b-36e9-49cd-ba3b-053c86fed6ca: "...until unenlightened savages violated the integrity of the exhibit."
f7bff836-4c86-41d9-9516-75e31a68da9d: "I saw a thing, similar in appearance to you, at the entrance to this place..."
b35f108a-8b22-4fa5-8839-f2d7bda3a627:
-<indent=5%> +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} if Eogunn's Intelligence is less than 70</indent>
-<indent=5%> +2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} if Eogunn's Intelligence is <u>(from 70 to 109)</u></indent>
-<indent=5%> +3 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} if Eogunn's Intelligence is 110 or more</indent>
4f4e5529-9469-4c49-b12e-62b9fc2430cc: "Yes. I only apologise for burdening you with my troubles, and then daring to betray your trust again. Flesh is weak, and mine is no exception."
5ff28dce-954a-4294-a271-80f70ad5634b:
The user deals +{uip|Melee|465e8b197e8a485dacc017719522ee11}% more {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and +{uip|Ranged|465e8b197e8a485dacc017719522ee11}% more ranged {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical damage{/g}.
The user suffers −{uip|DR|465e8b197e8a485dacc017719522ee11}% less damage.
a0a2e035-b5c0-4511-ba5e-b9706eb7e476: {n}The Seneschal clears his throat and adjusts his uniform.{/n} "You are in the presence of {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant of Trade{/g}."
4ea926cf-aff7-4306-978f-e3447a546d59: The user cannot suffer {g|Encyclopedia:Traumas}traumas{/g}. The extra damage suffered because of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} is reduced to 10% per stack.
4d0f5a9a-075a-43bb-83ab-6a99103fc2d9: "Jovakha taught half the regiment how to shoot! He's got God-Emperor-given talent as an instructor!"
29e580cc-4fe9-4a54-9465-132b050f980d: {g|f:916fcf40f9cc410f9b0a810516089207}Death Waltz{/g} also grants the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g} +4 additional charges of {g|f:c3d6e29e74e440a79cb243e4e93e0501}Death From Above{/g}. Until the end of combat, {g|f:c3d6e29e74e440a79cb243e4e93e0501}Death From Above{/g} deals +{uip|agiB|7d51ba40347341b38cd181fb18097edb} additional {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
cd0092e4-3b14-43de-b016-3e399bd17a17: "Inquisitor af Irramon, since I have served your cause, may I ask you a few questions?"
fea559e8-a884-490e-8bb5-6bc0792244f1: {n}Seberian turns his head toward you, and his implants respond with a metallic grinding sound.{/n} "What about you? Surely your advice won't be to lock ourselves up behind the gates and wait for the enemy to present himself to be slaughtered?"
4f3631dd-2634-44c0-bf4d-b4b0959a2903: This creature is invisible. This effect is active until the creature attacks or approaches an enemy.
3d35b9b5-6e95-4424-8b2b-727d6b82f486: {n}As soon as you set down the vox, the room fills with sinister green glimmers, and a familiar figure appears before you.{/n} "You are grasping for answers, no doubt. I will deign to give you one: I deemed it unacceptable that an artefact of historical value should languish on the wall of an ignorant primitive. Now you are free to continue your insignificant existence without the risk of losing such a priceless artefact."
6e4e886b-19bd-48a5-9982-cfb6d0d500c6: "Nuncius would not grant me access to his cogitator logs. I require your authorisation."
7b86e5d5-f603-408d-97e2-668023e58d30: "These memories are painful. Forming a rational understanding of the world — breaking it down into hypotheses, facts, conclusions — is not just my vocation, it is the essence of my existence. I have power over my thoughts. But my emotions — they bring chaos to my existence. They tear through logic and trample over calculations. If I rid myself of the Nuncius figment, I will be left facing a monstrous, insurmountable task alone. My efficiency will plummet, and the path to Knowledge will be shrouded in mist. Paradoxically, my insanity is the key to preserving my mind and soul."
1d44884e-7d4a-48c5-b620-3e962c886e7f: {n}Once the creature stops moving, Eogunn's face relaxes in relief. He whispers a prayer to the Omnissiah.{/n}
86d6fde5-1d8b-4e05-9d06-3f68b415af2b: "Those who seek gratitude for service wander in darkness. Your thread will be severed." {n}The hissing voice of Kibellah blends with the sharp scrape of blades leaving their scabbards.{/n}
47f49de8-a07d-4ba7-8285-d9bea997b00b: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be recouped in future dealings with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."
8a304f0f-19a8-4966-b727-8b5527ce6eca: As soon as your eyes fall upon this abomination, barely audible, frantic murmurs come from deep within it.
0a085c07-7124-4fff-8c2b-7ac1d46702d4: {n}The corner of his lips where flesh remains struggles to lift in a grateful smile. Struggling to force out each word, Nuncius rasps,{/n} "I'm glad... that he was... not alone..."
2774a095-6a98-4435-b251-38ed26217b42: "Utterly certain," {n}answers the enforcer at once, bowing his head.{/n} "I and all my line will serve Humanity with redoubled zeal, observing the Imperial Creed with impeccable rigour."
40d8a69a-807b-40df-8ace-d35cadc5ae92: "What is happening? Nomos do not understand. Our memory archives are emptying. Our awareness is thinning. Everything... is fading. Nomos... are afraid. Tell us what is happening. What have we done wrong?"
93bb2203-8fc4-4ad5-96cb-83cef3681b55: The Genetors of the Explorator Fleet request permission to study Zarkov's xenoflora. By granting the Genetors resources and lands to erect chapels of the Xenobiologis, the Rogue Trader shall master the secrets revealed beneath their vaults.
3aef15d2-c9da-4a9e-88b4-582279199254: {n}The Astartes lifts his head, his gaze boring into you with unsettling intensity. A livid vein pulses upon the giant's brow, betraying the tension within him.{/n} "Speak."
30e68277-9b65-4180-b2d3-ee985fa70c42: "Lord Captain! Sometimes the pain comes back and I... I forget myself. But the clever ones around here help me to quiet it. I listen to them talk during my treatments and I marvel. I'll be as clever as them someday, I'm sure!"
b377b2ee-d3b7-49c0-987d-cf09fdd67d7f: [Offer your most charming smile] "To lead you toward glory."
f1296d36-3201-42d6-8c61-48145241bda2:
On {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, attacks with weapons inflict {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
This effect deals {uip|Damage|3f52842cd8774f2392b68a40916670ef} {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|3f52842cd8774f2392b68a40916670ef}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. Whenever another creature suffers damage due to the {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} effect on the user, they gain +1 stack of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}.
e682ab93-6348-40c1-afd5-3fac285966bd: "I will clearly have need of this item in a confrontation with the Drover."
dee15741-1d89-4466-9b07-0edaad1b6232: "It was them. It was them. It was all of them! I was only following orders!"
605f45b7-eba9-4bd9-ac4b-1613383b19fc: {n}Tervantias hisses in displeasure, clenching and unclenching his clawed hands.{/n} "I am uncertain what gave you the impression that you are entitled to raise your voice, but your insolence is amusing. His words, however, are not. This conversation is becoming tedious."
7b2f6ed8-e75b-482b-8205-92e99ced23c6: "I am not your agent, but a figure of even greater importance. And I wish to speak with you."
318700ad-9a4f-4d27-9508-e5cf8b599769: "House who?" {n}Jarub moves to sheepishly scratch the back of his head, but catches himself.{/n} "I wouldn't know, my {mf|lord|lady}. My unit's not reported any reinforcements arriving. We're making do with the troops we have."
ce5d99cf-1452-46bc-b4fb-42b03303d295: {n}The colonel' eyebrows raise for a moment before returning to a stern scowl.{/n} "What use do we have for such handouts? You're kind enough, but what happens in ten years? A hundred? Can we rely on the kindness of your heir? Better to show me and my soldiers our place right now than to strip away what we've grown used to later."
775bed38-bd89-41d0-b680-433f8600e043: "Shut up! You're the one responsible for what happened! Your call brought them out of stasis!" {n}In a rush of emotion, the Tech-Priest forgets himself, tearing the black cap from his augmented head. Eogunn's face is distorted almost beyond recognition in a grimace of mental anguish.{/n}
ee41901a-bb3a-4685-859a-aa96cec592a5: For all its formidable power, the enemy's weapon did not succeed in breaking the mind of a true Rogue Trader. Every step took me enormous effort, and yet I walked on.
1faa5b83-1b40-4ce4-9cbb-8ae970fa7c84: Eogunn wishes to discuss Nuncius. He is waiting for the Rogue Trader on the bridge.
c7f868ce-a3be-4885-9781-05dccc80c3e7: {n}The Manipulus's eyebrows shoot upward.{/n} "Astounding! Your resilience is most impressive. But I would still recommend a health review after you finish your ablutions."
1b8db964-b101-4a7d-9662-7ce258f32114: "No, there was not. I do not have a solution to Nuncius's problem. If such materials had existed, I never would have left them behind. Never."
3364bca5-eeee-4e2c-a3e3-5fe25b19e31f: "Actually, I came here following the trail of my ancestor, Seberian von Valancius."
9467c6c4-31b2-413e-b6b4-a3a28de0d3c7: "I... offer my sincere apologies, Haemonculus. Your mastery is far beyond my own; I should never have doubted that fact." {n}The Manipulus stares at the floor, avoiding the xenos's gaze.{/n}
712e83c5-19a1-427d-8fab-02d1d8fff926: "A defective mind is incapable of even recognising a trap. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source. I invoke the annihilation protocol!" {n}Several tall, twisted figures appear out of the gloom, surrounding you in the blink of an eye.{/n}
b4bbc90d-5ffd-435c-977c-c1edb0ea8821: "I am willing to assist you with the identifiers of some of those involved, but Nuncius and I have a condition. Before the samples wind their way into your capable hands, my dearest colleague and I will thoroughly study and comprehend the nature of each of them."
8ad9cbc6-109e-45b7-bff4-8040b144b00f: "Now I can speak freely." {n}Like casting off a mask, Juvenna instantly drops her "bored noblewoman" act and takes to observing you with lively interest.{/n} "Well, then. First things first, you must remember that to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, I am Elana. To you now, as well." {n}She pauses for a moment, as if assessing whether you have grasped what she said.{/n} "I hear no objections. That is a good sign. Let's move on to your instructions."
0634e32c-d00a-46f6-b02e-3f25f766cb6e: "A truly ice world, Aett-Vater." {n}Ulfar's growling voice bursts unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "The sight of it reminds me of how glorious it is to return home after a long absence and share a goblet of good mjod with my brothers. For one who has not been hardened by the winds of Fenris, only skilfully chosen equipment will save them in the midst of such cold. Without it, the blood will freeze in your veins before you can utter a word."
8c72556f-377f-49b8-aefb-36bb19ab9f35: "Scanning... Analysis shows that the sacred machine of the implantation throne lacks the binharic litanies required to handle the highest grade of augmetics. In order to increase its performance, it is necessary to retrieve the litanies stored on the parent device — Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."
c54111b1-d419-4258-af6c-7b069402dafa: "Did you hear that? Serving the von Valancius dynasty promises us new feats of glory!" {n}Dunawski's voice echoes between the ramshackle buildings. Eyes turn to you, full of open admiration.{/n}
becb60bb-57ed-4de4-bc92-bc22c0f5606e: {n}Absorbed in his work, Eogunn pauses for a moment, listening to Nuncius, then glances at the {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitators{/g}, and shakes his head.{/n} "No, dearest colleague, that would be excessive."
229413d0-1cf2-4606-a659-122bd7342f8f: "People who mortify their flesh with a life of deprivation are following the way of the Undying One, whether or not they know it. Laws and rules will only distance them from the sincerity of service."
e5359ea3-468f-4f2b-a897-5abc29fdeb52: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The torments of the flesh do not leave me, but I am stronger. For the sake of my flock, I must prevail. Many here need words of faith — the wounded, the dying, and those who heal them or guide them on their final journey."
9c5e848d-9773-44ac-b9a9-7bbdecf8418d: Find the High Factotum in the Sector Bionica
ec21f282-feb5-47f4-9054-6e00e39d458f: "Why would the colonel decide to send reinforcements?"
4ce96805-3dac-4535-a119-3b1c929db35c: "I found a portrait of a nobleman holding an unusual sword on one of the walls."
0072de40-3193-451e-af13-f78296655727: "Assuredly, Factotum Danrok. Your loyalty to the von Valancius line is beyond question. Go now, and perform your duties with your accustomed zeal."
21ba2bb8-8087-4eca-a0e0-121157c7c7dc: "A compelling display of your abilities. Can you produce energy?"
faa32b7c-7e62-4c54-bff7-aa1a32251211: {n}It is a miracle that the shuttle vox's machine spirit is able to fulfil its duties at all. But the years have seen the voice grow quieter and quieter, and now it is impossible to make out the mutterings of the ancient spirit.{/n}
91a63871-327b-481f-b17b-ee234325d78a: "Some will have to die... but in the future, it will benefit the 32nd Regiment. Atonement for the one. For once, the slogan is fully warranted."
7d333102-f408-49d5-b2aa-3a738818fb4b: "I can stand the pain, Lord Captain. Just let me finish what I started. Melt the face of the last iron-worshipper."
02954b8b-32de-4adf-8e54-fc79876b44d3: "Rubbish! The worse the pain, the quicker you lot operate. All the upper-deckers are walking around with brand-new visors. I'm the only one suffering like a pleb over a speck in my eye."
56618307-53d3-466f-a52e-453a33ac9cd2: "Tell them I require their services. The implantation throne in my Sector Bionica requires expertise only they possess."
761fe4f3-916f-4a35-b315-47f535d713fe: To equip new weapons or armour, open your inventory from [{bind|OpenInventory}] and double-click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on the item. Alternatively, you can hold {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} and drag the item to the right slot (it will become highlighted once you start dragging the item). To view the parameters of an item, hover your cursor over its icon and wait for the information window to appear. Another way to view details about an item is to click {mouse_icon|RightMouse} on its icon, then select Info.
c83a1d67-6630-4445-91a1-ba930275a1be: "Your orders are clear. I hope they are strong enough to swallow their rage and thirst for vengeance long enough at the sight of those God-cursed xenos."
b4162c36-c564-47eb-8b43-52bb55411151: "If you keep forgetting the real Nuncius, why do you still seek a way to save him?"
4c670a8f-8e9a-42d2-b0a7-217c758761f5: You forced Isimond Sauerback to obey your orders.
75190af3-e0e2-469e-a3df-a0eaf748f8be: "What is happening now is your final duty to the dynasty. To me."
2fee8b84-e0f4-4067-840b-74adb10e796e: [Address the patient] "I have heard that a good story can dull the pain. Would you like me to tell you about my adventures? On one occasion..."
70e6d5dc-e3c8-4749-8116-e9d880bcb99d: {n}The Marshal gives you a terse nod.{/n} "Indeed, and I should offer you our thanks once again. I have read the report on the operation, and it is worth noting that {g|Encyclopedia:ProctorGlossary}Proctor{/g} Anthar spoke highly of you and your talents."
f1ce32e2-d50e-4e2e-80f5-5311c442ab38: "Why do you think I can retain my memories of past events?"
17059520-55a9-4958-923a-4a2b832d90b2: Talk to Eogunn on the bridge
55d4098f-efb1-47fb-bf1f-ccd0c8a4b6e3: {n}She reverently makes the sign of the Aquila — with her prosthetic, the sight leaves quite an impression.{/n} "God-Emperor, after so many centuries! Ruban Khroshovach, the 32nd Regiment's greatest hero, whom we remember as the Departed! He boarded the shuttle the First Call-Up had discovered and went to the stars with a plea for help. He knew he would die out there in the void — he only hoped that our plea would be heard."
b10c3af8-df03-4c66-8819-b8ffd7de7158: "I do. Although the techniques I know are used in the sacrament of augment installation, some of the rites are applicable to treating a localised medical problem. Using these techniques will not obviate the need for surgery and infusion therapy, but will give the patient time for them to be administered. Initiating the application of sacred medicae protocols."{br}
fe0461b3-cc40-4e00-a999-0062ebf65a9a: "The Gaprak forces were laughable. They were routed in no time at all. House von Valancius has no need of such vassals — in fact, I have done the dynasty a favour by finishing off the worm that crawled to the gates of its master, not to offer military might, but to beg for it. I do not seek your understanding: it takes considerable experience to appreciate the significance of such a deed."
f1c0af3c-d61f-4ab6-beff-fc6d4a7b9218: Squads of fighters board shuttles and set off to face the unknown. After a protracted silence, the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} crackles to life as the squad captain calls in his report on the situation. The docking area is dark and oppressively silent, with occasional groans from the ship's bulkheads.
c3985885-30cc-4b49-b0e9-195bd892d07f: "It is because of that very stubbornness, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We refuse to perish until our duty is done."
999b71ad-8dbc-495a-ab8b-d08274ed1e44: "Whatever you are, you are no Gaprak." {n}Sauerback aims his plasma pistol at you.{/n} "Faith is a highly fraught subject for House Gaprak because of all the rumours about their spurning the Imperial Creed in favour of the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}. Any member of House Gaprak would be at pains to emphasise their piety however they could. You don't sound very pious."
8fed26f8-fa84-4dd3-868c-1097f9cd83c4: The blasphemous replica of the palace on Dargonus is a mere facade, an interactive diorama of a mad xenos. But it is there that Seberian's remains and the Crimson Dance of Khaine are bound to lie.
5f2826f6-3465-4d16-9586-0a5bdce2a84a: "Listen to the words of a warrior, not a dilettante. We need to go on the defensive and exhaust the enemy. The gates are our main advantage."
175bb541-ffbf-4dff-b565-14740091c0c2: {n}This sounds like baseless speculation at best, and dreams passed off as reality at worst.{/n}
0bab8ef1-7cdf-413c-837e-700fec98aca1: "Err-or. Requessst-ed des-igna-ttion not re... kh-kh-kh... cog-nised. Own-er not as-signed. Kh-kh-kh... Com-mencing con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-tion." {n}The servo-skull falls silent and no longer responds to commands.{/n}
491790f8-736c-454e-805b-10031970b5c1: "All heretics will try to confuse the mind of a righteous believer with convoluted blather. I've had enough, prepare to die!"
157fa7f0-18aa-40bb-b7bc-7c99eb4ddc2f: "I am quite tired of this pointless commotion. Let us return to matters of genuine import."
2e90ac92-1c97-4a8c-858e-67be164c458d: {n}The figure beside you is barely recognisable as the former Vivisector — ghost-like, pale, and almost completely swathed in bandages. He sways on his feet, but dutifully bows his head to you.{/n}
615879c6-23f8-4d8a-a4d9-518f8a0ea0e9:
The next time an ally affected by {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}teamwork{/g} gains any number of stacks of {g|f:203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}teamwork advantage{/g}, another ally affected by {g|f:715ec983856741c7a2ac9cc6c552b5a2}teamwork{/g} also gains 1 stack of this effect.
Whenever the user uses this ability, they suffer 1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Stacks.
94ee8fc3-cda4-41bf-9f3d-6621fbe1c3ff: "Research by the Magos Biologis has confirmed the existence of flora classified as Periculum Machine Majoris. Life forms of this category pose a serious threat to sacred transport vehicles and armoured units. There is a 96.543% probability that such a species inhabits this planet. In the observed case, the probability of more than one species of this threat category existing stands at 85.6789%."
652593da-43f3-4bdc-88ff-eeb4facb812c: "Tell me about your research — what is it you are trying to understand?"
6ac1405e-4c7f-4a9b-8fc0-039e384b4c2d: {n}With a hint of a smile, Heinrix stretches forth his hand, which is holding his insignia. A gust of icy wind lashes through the air, and a warm trickle of blood spurts from Juvenna's right ear.{/n} "My lady, I suggest you display some humility and stop obstructing this conversation."
3454d021-9be2-45c9-acea-de80e6c1ca49: "Finally, the Merovians are going on the counter-attack on Zarkov! Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, this is the first battle in the conquest of the entire planet!"
431bf197-427e-45b9-b41d-2c4c4ac82a9f: {n}Only one thought occurs to you: the Rogue Trader in the portrait was no stranger to luxury or daring exploits.{/n}
62858f7e-db27-4e39-bafd-625691da548b: "Someone is bound to ask sooner or later, so it might as well be me. Purely out of curiosity... is a Rogue Trader still a Rogue Trader if they don't have a Warrant?"
28676ab8-6ecf-4647-a07a-13f552c62c07: "This matter is personal to me. The duchess must be punished immediately!"
9410d12e-d73c-472b-a0a6-80e4aa955c34: A fleet of voidships shall rain fire from their lance weapons upon a designated location, turning the dense thickets to ash and purging the land to build the first spaceport in Zarkovian history.
41b053b3-aa27-4a09-a80b-78cb4f0eb853: "Nuncius, you should be ashamed of yourself for misleading the Rogue Trader. You know perfectly well that this is a physical necessity, not a whim or laziness."
ee067601-2e14-4e59-b5b3-38a6332e951b: "Shh, quiet now... It will all be over soon..."
8a0de1d6-7f83-4a39-b69a-534a1da90277: "A sensible decision. You don't have the kind of conditioning we do." {n}Judging by Batoshski's tone, "a sensible decision" was intended as an insult.{/n}
7b62d340-eeec-4a2f-b59b-7557da740475: "You speak in riddles, blood scryer. But I can scent the spirit of truth in what you say."
da09d544-043f-42cf-885f-2652b0fc0abe: All of this Necron's resources have been directed to the Museion's defence. The reanimation protocol has been disabled.
6afe213f-d951-4579-9105-d9e1a787da3a:
In combat, the galvanisation icon is displayed on the action bar next to heroic acts and desperate measures. It can be used only once per combat.
Using galvanisation abilities grants powerful effects but can also inflict negative effects on the user, make them suffer additional damage, reduce their characteristics, or otherwise penalise them.
d680ac7c-bbfe-4751-98c3-3a649d953517: The secret chamber bears no resemblance to the Sector Bionica. It feels more like someone's private study. Therefore, some manner of records must be hidden here.
482d7c5f-2fff-403f-85a9-a11ef60afc11: Abilities granted by this augment are displayed on the action bar during combat
309606dd-1d65-4174-b679-6585b6a0bbae: "Squeezing the last juices from the dead..." {n}Cassia inhales sharply and covers her lips with her long fingers, as if stifling a surge of nausea.{/n}
8bfef9b5-dedf-49d7-9763-385347aec59d: "Thesis one: my mind is sick. This is an incontrovertible fact. I deduced it long ago — 49 years and 138 days ago, to be precise. After weighing all the arguments, I chose inaction — a decision egotistical in its rationality. I believe that, had I attempted to cure my insanity, I would have declined all the sooner."
40f0420f-9019-4c4f-b814-a21eda8db98d: "As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I shall go down to the Sector Bionica without delay to make the necessary preparations, and I shall await you there."
7c76f7d2-c177-4701-a634-d60cdca0cd7a: The Gaprak reinforcements have been routed. It must be determined whether the traitor played a part in this.
38ce627f-2e41-426a-9f58-87034ec0e8d9: "I've learned that they are the most recently ascended of the noble dynasties on Dargonus. We are newcomers as well. Perhaps we ought to stick together."
b4584fe9-7790-4b79-9210-10b439d09e3a: "Chasing after the things is pointless. The 32nd can lure them into traps and destroy them."
032973c8-76ca-4c2b-b615-168cdfa0c1ed: {n}A woman with a bone plate over one eye draws a knife and moves to plunge it into the man standing opposite her.{/n}
1b0ceb81-57b0-4268-b68f-52a2de6c3841: "Captain, what are those cocoons with bodies inside?"
9870a441-6c64-4cd1-8879-3d469d0d9bbd: "Because the hypothesis you are proposing provokes in me the sensation of being utterly lost in space, both physically and informationally."
1a9a29e3-9518-4588-a748-15f152462dae: {n}The researchers grudgingly obey your order, and then communication with them is cut off. Hours later, only a small handful of survivors return to the ship. According to them, after trying to touch the impure technology of the xenos, strange green rays began beaming out of the walls, incinerating almost everyone who took part in the expedition.{/n}
13295eb2-2458-4dc8-a7ce-943e5352109e: "Yes, I am pleased that we view the world in the same way."
fed22ff2-d762-44c4-95f2-499620a1bcb8: Move your character by clicking {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on a spot on the screen. A symbol will appear, and your character will move toward it. If the spot you chose is inaccessible, the symbol will appear in the closest accessible location.
ff891fed-25ae-464d-b4e3-7ddc995e278c: "My colleagues and I would be honoured to perform the implantation ritual on you."
f2b26cdb-9d9f-4dfe-886f-a3bf691cad04: "The deal is off, Trazyn. The C'tan Shard stays with me!"
8e86ba23-e194-4ae4-89df-64199623770a: {n}He shakes his head as if to ward off some hallucination.{/n} "It does not matter. Though your intentions may have been honourable, the defenders of my palace fell by your hand. There can be no excuse for that."
62dc12de-52ed-4a23-b050-5bf5734c12de: When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} for the first three times in a {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|973431c8057843328c04e74a9338df7d} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 round. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.
e903f113-13c0-4e31-b286-273f239d32b4: {n}The xenos's head turns slightly toward Seberian.{/n} "The little thief. Dared to steal from the Preserver of Histories, and now causing trouble again. What is this, some foolhardy rescue attempt? So, your worthless name is still recalled by one of your short-lived kind?"
946d6a70-d16d-4ac8-bfc3-b41fd5f331ad: "My dearest colleague says he has no intention of leaving my side. I am afraid he and I are inseparable. If you are so taken with him, are you certain you would not be willing to tolerate my presence on the ship, if only for the sake of his company?"
65bfe752-0aee-42de-b95a-9ab62f9c3bab: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — sound-dampening ear mufflers. The Handbook says they're designed for vox operators, but we've found a different use for them. They help us against the Drover's cry, though they don't work well for long — they only delay the effects. Sometimes we put them on the more restless folks, to ease their suffering."
91074c74-6a57-4838-be06-8649d136ca37: "In other words, the station is, in a manner of speaking, an augmetic of colossal proportions. A curious experiment, yet I am confident I could devise a more elegant method of achieving the same end."
6f7ec31d-abd6-464e-8fbd-6115aec95ddc: {n}...and yet he rises. He draws himself up to his full height, standing rigidly to attention. Blood-streaked and broken, he salutes you.{/n} "The Trial Match is over. I, Izdrig Batoshski, step down as commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. It's up to you now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
22c8134f-060f-4dc5-ab64-3343b6de3959: "And beneath them, deep within the moon itself, lies a labyrinth of archives and laboratories, where many sages cultivate knowledge and conduct experiments in the name of understanding the will of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Machine God{/g}. Nuncius and I spent our adolescence and part of our adulthood there before we were permitted to leave our cells for the cabins of expedition ships and the tents of field camps. I miss my home, but I do not regret leaving it, for stagnation is the enemy of Knowledge."
8fd63fc7-c8aa-4b88-a8a0-2a25c3e7591a: {n}Eogunn nods reluctantly.{/n} "The requirement is satisfactory. I am prepared to share my knowledge and methods with Magos Haneumann, provided this allows me to continue my experiments and convince him of the purity of my thoughts and deeds. Nuncius will bear witness to this tech-oath."
d89de1fe-765d-4d51-b6c3-557cb9c683f2: "But I shouldn't bore you with expressions of our gratitude. What do you wish to discuss, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
451ae85a-d0af-45aa-8cf7-29dd2b135103: {n}Poison begins to drip from the Necron's words.{/n} "Needless to say, I will be keeping Laria Voigtvir — she has performed her role diligently, and I see no reason to discard her. If Seberian wishes to be reunited with her, he can return, beg for forgiveness, and... perhaps earn the privilege of rejoining my collection. As for you, pest..." {n}Trazyn raises his staff slightly.{/n}
ff0eea41-0d38-4c5c-9fee-70ff0ce4cc28: "There is nothing to fear in death if you have lived a worthy life."
5b14f96e-9b0c-47f8-a811-ccb1739e3972: "Enough, Seberian! Your hostility has overstepped the mark. Explain yourself!"
aa24de55-cf40-49e2-9f3e-feccb67d8492:
Each augment provides unique active and passive bonuses, but always applies an unavoidable negative effect.
When the character suffers a trauma to the corresponding body part, the installed augment malfunctions.
Its positive passive effects are disabled until the trauma is healed, while its negative effects remain.
f194e6b8-4dce-4fd1-88e8-99b3be8c8003: "The Handbook decrees that rearguard service is honourable."
c0fd4caa-624a-4fa6-b520-04ee48ef66e7: Excerpts From the Journal of Sebastian Winterscale
0537edcc-0b53-48c9-b552-6f5346fece5a: "Attesting to the undeniable spread of xenoheresy on Platform Tirkuaz-4. The sacred structures of the platform have been compromised and must be subjected to the rituals of plasma purification."
e7803610-2132-4c0a-8264-2ab9de328bbb: "It's worth destroying the Merovian outpost to deny Seberian the advantage."
17d42cd1-be9a-42fe-a1e8-4c53c6848121: {n}Eogunn bows his head deferentially.{/n} "As am I."
4b2f852a-8357-4140-8d7b-0b49fcb4e79b: {n}Although the codes being transmitted are centuries out of date, you are able to make sense of them: an {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} regiment is requesting assistance and reporting that retreat from their present position is impossible.{/n}
ec0ac2b7-06f8-4365-97b0-cdd2d98b7280: "To the glory of House von Valancius! To victory!"
9fb1e986-6402-42ab-99e6-164a3d007e68: "The subtle ability to discern between the various schisms of worship of the most sacred Omnissiah is rare among the laity. Nuncius and I will take no offence."
d9f7f15c-1d4a-4bae-9d79-ffb534e78b6c: "It is curious that you sense pain that I do not feel. The Motive Force is flowing smoothly and serenely through my galvanic circuits. Perhaps you are seeing something beyond the reach of my perception, Drukhari."
c168a680-5ffe-4f76-895b-1b3b4e223c0b: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g} deals an additional +{uip|damage|ddb7472f001f49368711d68fd21cb7cc}% {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} against enemies armed with a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon.
aacc1522-f9be-4e1a-8ee3-dc8f5777e29d: Cut off power to the locks
bd674545-23df-4e41-99f7-ef69f3b0c21d: "I have dedicated my life to many questions — the blessings of the fusion of organics and machines, the search for virtue in their separate existence, the possibility of prolonging the functioning of flesh through genetics and alchemy. The Machine God is perfect in all His manifestations — this is the truth and an incontrovertible fact. But it seems to me that attempts to become like Him exclusively through {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}, though good in their righteousness, do not fully reflect His design. For the organic body is nothing but a biological machine whose components can be replaced and improved by genetic transmutation."
c4cabcc4-b0d4-40fe-b16e-df54a1193bae: "You have to understand that this is the only way to set you free."
e500a124-99a0-4146-a833-37702f5c0a2a: "I'm sorry, but outside the loop, I saw your remains. You died as a hero defending Seberian."
6d0854b7-adcf-4863-b09b-a0c4d796f1c2:
You are in a dialogue — here you can learn more about current events, influence the character you are speaking to, or even alter the course of the game's narrative. Your character's personal story depends on the dialogue choices you make.
Available dialogue options are displayed on the right. Select a reply by clicking {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on it or pressing the corresponding digit on your keyboard.
39ab61d7-31d9-4cd5-9e62-2144afd846ed: {n}Seberian's vox-synthesiser emits a mocking trill.{/n} "I made no apology. But I am glad we have left our grievances behind."
e57f640a-9875-4dba-910b-e331925b1fb0: "Focus on what's most important. Remember who you are."
7024e3c0-1805-424e-99d7-13c87200f3e1: "Harsh conditions give rise to the brightest of hearts. May He turn His gaze upon Zarkov and bless this world with a long life within the Imperium of Man!"
18ce92f5-9c15-444f-9e2f-45bfc5b04124: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, went south to the gate. Right to the front, like a proper medicae. I think he's looking for anyone who can still be saved."
0f1fb002-2d18-45f2-b16c-981f24c80c33: The act of treachery perpetrated by the Rogue Trader was so monstrous that it horrified not only humans, but also a civilisation far older. The tombs of the Necrontyr, scattered across the countless worlds of the Expanse, revealed hordes of their soulless inhabitants to the galaxy. Soon enough, what was left of the von Valancius protectorate became a dead, lifeless battlefield. The confrontation between the fragments of a once great empire and a transcendental monster shook the galaxy to its core once more.
d4c99066-3d7f-46c4-871b-def2bcc171ea: {n}Vigdis's voice is interrupted by static, but you can still make it out.{/n} "Lord Captain, you're alive! An extraction team was already on its way to search for you. Transmitting your coordinates to their shuttles."
74ab525d-8aa6-45b3-9e7f-6d07e3aa6e4f: "My soldiers should not concern themselves with false accusations. Their concern is to serve their lord faithfully and not to speculate about things they do not understand."
359af198-39ae-42d8-b94d-334be64ee6b3: {n}After a few seconds, you become aware of an interesting detail: the gate appears utterly untouched by time — unlike the ruins around it.{/n}
9ebe18fe-5bc6-43d2-97bb-1c9caf8384cd: {n}Silence. An empty gaze. Finally, a reply:{/n} "New knowledge, tools, experience — I needed more. My staying on Amsanct would not fix the situation. I decided to flee to the Expanse and seek answers there. I couldn't take Nuncius with me, so I secretly diverted the Motive Force from the main generator to support the stasis sacellum, placing the main camp on reserve power, then closed up our laboratory."
3f4090ce-c3fd-4524-a36d-b85bd7ac1dcc: "Request registered, and denied. The action 'get along' is not a requirement in the internal hierarchy of the Sector Bionica."
c9d9b758-0c57-460a-bfbb-5c943e757b7e: "Very well. If the fire of faith truly burns in your heart, primed to burst forth in cleansing flame, find the Redeemed whose steadfastness Elana preserves, and follow her instructions." {n}You hear a short click — the connection has been cut off.{/n}
83b2c5f6-f28f-4eb9-a13b-df179c87e969: "You know what? Take Nomos and whatever Calcazar is after. I've had enough of the mysteries of the universe — they bring nothing but trouble."
dc168784-285c-4eb7-aaa6-b095afe2ce5f: "Seberian von Valancius has taken his proper place in the exhibit showing the events on Dargonus. Displayed here is a collection of items bearing some connection to the individual."
a413fe10-619a-4e0d-b178-51c319d746b4: Even in its current state, the beast looks more like a predatory beast than a faithful steed.
ecc61292-bd37-4d0e-b6bc-275086ad115d: "Some fancy-dressed people from Dargonus showed up, offering to become patrons of the 32nd Regiment. How should I handle them?"
faabc569-31fc-443b-9dca-e6b0c5910f47: "Of course, Lord Captain. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."
966ce918-ae99-4915-aa48-7b0458cec5a1: "Eogunn, you didn't actually dare to create an Abominable Intelligence, did you?"
abe81d23-9085-46ee-bec4-f612687f53d4: "What do you think of the fare?"
76816168-e745-4d0a-bdd8-52c342c1ac16: "You demanded an apology. He has apologised. Is that not enough?"
56a663b4-f9e6-49ce-a6c7-baa7277879ef: Whenever the user uses {g|f:e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}Serve Cold{/g}, they must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}fatigued{/g}.
f8db1c9a-696e-48f3-8375-a043f3f6bb4b: "The place where the legend of the Rogue Trader dynasty perished... Why does it not surprise me that this is where xenoheresy began spreading across the world?"
270ab0bc-4eba-499d-828e-2255ab216e54: "I have noticed your collection of books, Lady Navigator. Discernment, a sophisticated literary taste, an inquisitive mind... Are you aware that you have the makings of an erudite and a serious scholar?"
e2d4c345-d1d8-45d2-be96-823c4bbf82b0: "Out of the question." {n}Eogunn snaps back with a frosty and venomous tone unusual to him.{/n} "I will not utter a thesis that so blatantly contradicts reality."
8bd470a2-ab23-4d9d-a201-97dc64e2feca: It has become known that Seberian set out in search of certain artefacts allegedly capable of saving the dynasty. Taking his relic sword with him, the Rogue Trader went missing somewhere in the cluster encompassing the Tear of Solar, Ignis Corona, and Fortis Porta systems.
77f3d71e-81e0-4a58-a935-5d91b9a7590d: This creature is cursed by the machine spirit. The {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recoil{/g} of their weapons is doubled, and all their targets gain +<u>(2 × {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}INT{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g})</u>% to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} against this creature's attacks.
2b961839-5864-4297-b065-c1a4514e0c05: {n}Nuncius offers the broad, yellow-toothed grin typical of servo-skulls.{/n}
471d6657-d3ec-41cb-9c54-2ce47392bca9: "The scarlet, black, and whitish flashes lurking in the heart of the esteemed Manipulus have shattered their dungeon. The geometry of the patterns they weave within the learned man's reflections troubles my sight. Yet... they possess neither order nor peace. As though the patterns are ever bereft of something, they immediately give way to new iterations — equally deficient and equally... insane? This vision troubles and captivates in equal measure."
5da55cf1-9bfc-466c-98a8-30d8515c62a5: {n}As if dancing, you dodge the slash. Izdrig howls like a maddened beast and unleashes a series of wild, sweeping strikes, exposing himself to an attack.{/n}
c3311e15-05df-4c7a-9281-43ac4131ed1c: "How did you come to be here?"
53bd4a0b-7946-44e3-b252-8bfeb101f71c: "My dearest colleague amply meets all other communication needs."
9f64c19a-f1a7-4ae1-88cd-5da8756621e8: {n}Eogunn smiles politely.{/n} "With a suitable source of Motive Force to redistribute, I could light up the {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} of an entire deck, Rogue Trader. However, I do hope that is not the only application you will find for my talents."
7cf95b3a-d69a-44b0-bc2d-34ca336363c2: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. To persuade her to support negotiations with the Inquisition, something truly compelling must be presented.
50960200-6ef3-4168-9125-07038aeb6d50: "This agreement hardly seems favourable to me."
5cefc770-325a-4853-85d9-6bb591258fe6: {n}Weary labourers in grease-stained coveralls bow their heads at your approach. Their leader, a heavyset, older man wearing a bloodstained foreman's patch on his sleeve, steps forward.{/n}
2773983d-6b66-4729-a89d-380d96cadcaa:
While playing in co-op mode, you can highlight a cell, a creature, a dialogue line, or an icon on the abilities panel to emphasise it for other group members. To do so, hover the cursor over the object and click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} while holding [ALT]. The other group members will hear the ping and see that object highlighted on their screens.
This can be used in zones where you can directly control your characters, on system maps, and on the Koronus Expanse map.
04bcf0c9-2783-4619-b151-d1b848e0aed5: A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. Pasqal is requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader — he will be waiting on the bridge for a time when the Lord Captain is ready to say {mf|his|her} word.
67802e54-5951-4039-b6d3-ed04c68144db: "Let me take a look at you. I will ease your pain."
cc3dc2c8-2c47-43ce-bdea-8997d068ecda: The strange medley of bones, skin, and still wet flesh clearly carries some pseudo-religious significance. It seems the shrine was once destroyed but is now in the process of being rebuilt. Using human bodies.
3cc036de-18de-49d9-ad63-c96b629ae32c: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Elucidator}Elucidator{/g} resists your attempts to translate the glyphs for some time, but soon relents." The first inscription reads: "He who possesses the infinite possesses eternity. The second reads: "Thus shall every enemy of the Overlord fall." It is a clear warning to anyone who might lay claim to this star system. Including you.{/n}
33dd7fee-6277-4485-b989-d291d898de16: "The Drivestems have been nursing a grudge against the Gapraks for a long time. I cannot believe they would choose to settle scores in the middle of a war!" {n}Seberian wearily rubs the organic part of his face above the bridge of his nose in a very human gesture.{/n} "Please make my Seneschal aware of the facts. The matter is delicate: Lady Drivestem has committed treason and cannot go unpunished, but without the Gaprak reinforcements, I have only Drivestem troops to rely on. Let my Seneschal decide Camilla's fate — it will be a good lesson in political manoeuvring for Laria."
83823e09-904b-4d2b-ad0d-7556775d395c: {n}Alva-9 nods in satisfaction. Foreman Pask, covered in blood and soot, bows his head in silence.{/n}
76de9961-e7a5-40c0-b289-fea2548ac04c: "My {mf|lord|lady}!" {n}Jarub waves a hand, beckoning you toward him. In his other hand, he is holding something large, oblong, and — judging by the sergeant's huffing and puffing — rather weighty. The object is securely wrapped in a thick oilskin tarp.{/n} "Job done!" {n}He looks around quickly and holds out the bundle to you.{/n} "Now it's time to pay up, as we agreed."
b5d9f7ed-2dbd-4010-beeb-012188a241bb: "This device transforms living beings into a substance called {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard light{/g}. It is a xenomechanical abomination." {n}The warrior controls his anger with great effort, but it breaks through as a deep rumble in his voice.{/n}
1e1fc8b1-609e-4a3d-87d7-a192559eaa91: {n}The Sector Bionica is strangely quiet. There are almost no people around, and most of the operating tables are empty. Only the cleaning servitors are bustling about, spraying decontamination solutions and broadcasting binharic litanies of purification.{/n}
d89e6138-3037-4268-bc44-62fb88c16a23: {n}The Merovians exchange nods and cheers, but the captain-quartermaster casts a wary glance at you.{/n}
c47793ab-03a8-4aab-a5d1-5682befaa044: {n}Eogunn gasps in indignation.{/n} "Are you truly asking me if I have violated one of the Omnissiah's core commandments as blithely as if you were asking to borrow my stylus? No, a thousand times no! How could such a thing even be wrought from a single {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g}? A wicked mind of that calibre would require a receptacle of significant cogitational potential! I am deeply outraged by this insinuation, and simultaneously flattered by your assessment of my skills."
6b41a425-bd7b-4d6b-94fa-b0bc5151971c: Whenever Trazyn possesses a new body, he gains a bonus to his {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} until the end of combat.
6ffa247d-ee42-4918-9098-a5a0eec4d588: "You should have listened to your daughter sooner, Seberian!"
71505a10-070e-4007-8cf5-a0a7ded414b0: "Personally, I'm just... uneasy at the thought of the Warrant not being where it's supposed to be. I'm so used to its existence, it's like it's fused with the ship itself."
22b25e75-2e21-48b7-861d-248b6aad7219: "Alva-9 tried to destroy the drilling complex. Why?"
50a2366a-a594-487b-a537-a683c452ba99: "The Sector Bionica is fully operational once more and under my oversight. Augmetics are being installed in strict accordance with status protocols, allowing for unprecedented efficiency amongst the senior officers. The Omnissiah blesses us."
12b20dac-fd4f-4c2f-9ef9-11794dc7a36f: "If I were you, I would find a way to destroy or at least damage this mechanism. I have no desire to be stuck in this trap for the rest of my days."
538eee39-384f-416e-aea4-0489abdf8524: "They're dead." {n}Batoshski cuts her off.{/n} "What is dead is no longer a threat and can wait. We have more pressing matters."
71b7d552-fb78-44e1-b583-eaefea2ba661: When {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}transonic cannon{/g} is used against creature suffering from {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}, the power of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} is increased by +{uip|AdditionalBurning|eb0608b0a5f148deb38226e8fc6f6997}.
877c5c93-7f27-49a6-9937-fb60ff7ed2fd: "Nonsense! It's brighter and cleaner, and there's less blood. Everything's relative — you should see where the people on Footfall go for their medicae treatment."
97cad41a-408c-400f-8dcd-442161114a29: This creature has its damage and critical hit chance increased by +15% per stack. Destroying an {g|f:63f6eec4ea38409b926bd1a8429dd5a5}hyperphased{/g} obelisk consumes 1 stack of this effect.
8aef2ad0-0568-4781-bb5a-ad65241bd6ae: {n}The one-armed worker bows his head and steps forward.{/n} "One of the lads, a voidsman soldier who got his skull crushed, came back to us after treatment not long ago. His head's all bandaged and he's dosed up to the eyeballs on {g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}stimulants{/g}. He can't live, can't work, he just raves and scares honest folk. And all because he wasn't given implants! At least let us put some hardware in, or sooner or later we'll all turn into madmen on these rotten stimulants!"
d87371a6-cbc1-4806-812a-55d73fdd2713: "We know, heir of Seberian. As soon as it died, we could all breathe a little easier."
f385542c-3239-4c9d-adcf-ea5fd5524632: Detach the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> from your <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr> to activate mouse controls. Place the mouse sensor face down on a flat surface and slide the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> around to use it like a mouse.
c990e3c1-67be-4997-8eaa-9d40f8a09fe8: "Walk around the Cage, listen to the people. Work to understand us, and then you will know what to do in the Trial Match. I have faith in you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}A half-mad smile, that of a true fanatic, touches Vedka's lips.{/n}
e9ed9104-27ae-43a8-aaa7-04c13392ca4a: Based the Triasomata's righteousness on devotion to the ideals of the Imperium.
352e1471-117c-4896-84bd-d1b75bb55d6e: "God-Emperor bless the mercy of the Rogue Trader! No honest servant of the Imperium deserves to be held captive by a xenos, and Seberian von Valancius least of all!"
5b71651d-a951-4791-a2d3-ba01b733ce7c: "Just say the word and we'll fit you with our finest augments, Lord Captain!"
0abb22ca-2dbe-46e8-9c91-21880e306d71: {n}The exchange of fire does not begin in your favour — and you are destined not to see its conclusion either.{/n}
967fcd1b-1ee8-4f98-bd6b-3bbecd5a11d8: The Aeldari's body crumbled to dust inside the fine armour.
a0338bdf-bbf4-4d42-9c35-2ee03262697d: "I am taking the Shard — and leaving you alone with your choices and decisions. Let's see if they lead you to another meeting with me... and a place within my collection. Farewell."
4096c375-a5bb-4480-b307-a5ed2f626c21: This creature's {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are reduced, and Eogunn can no longer target it with the {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}.
446f229a-9242-41a1-82f5-fbccc1b2df4a: Many millennia ago, Sanguinius made the ultimate sacrifice in the name of Humanity: in a clash against the Arch-Traitor, he gave his life so that the Emperor could strike a decisive blow against the forces of the Archenemy. Memory of Sanguinius is honoured by the faithful servants of the Imperium to this day, and the Adeptus Astartes of the Blood Angels Chapter now serve as the keepers of their Primarch's sacred legacy.
bb1ce6a9-9776-497f-8eea-59fa18394480: "The fact that it is operational is a phenomenon, but an ominous one. I advise we retreat, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn tightens his mechadendrite around the grip of his weapon.{/n}
852561b1-4b9b-4c89-a168-558c4e91f54d: "It is gratifying that no one tried to trespass on my laboratory during our captivity. I have many more purifying sacraments to perform before I am finally rid of that Haemonculus's foulness."
