c57ab72d-6bcc-4fa0-9d4d-bd30431c2947: This machine is so old that it can hardly move. Its armour and dodge are reduced by −40%.
9ed7e46f-817d-4041-bfd3-92599d150846: "Disgusting. Can't breathe in the corridors because of lower-deck scum. If it was up to me, I'd boot every last one of them out of here, load of time-wasters... Ow! Damn wound."
be45745d-e4ee-4c08-b4b1-eb60cad8e511: {n}Though the defensive battles were harsh, they saved many lives. The bloodthirsty xenos scaled the fortifications without fear of death, but the breaching of the defensive lines gave the Guardsmen time to thin out the horde of iron dead.{/n}
f5804c4c-597f-4a1c-9e93-cdf35d738869: "Have you managed to repair the air defence system?"
726982cf-b142-4ad8-adff-7dc253b2b463: {n}A loud voice cuts Sauerback off mid-sentence:{/n} "No talking among yourselves! Did you bastards not hear me the first time? All eyes on me!" {n}The enforcers part slightly, and you see a woman in voidsman armour. The autopistol in her hands is pointed directly at the head of the hostage, Vivisector Martinax. Her gaze rests on you — for a moment, she seems surprised, as if she did not expect such a lofty personage to agree to speak to her.{/n}
3a8327c3-ea28-4670-a7f4-bce5a886ecdf: {n}The ancient {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} before you is a true work of art. Obedient to your commands, its machine spirit awakens with a soft hum of greeting.{/n}
6f248abc-e560-4771-b691-97807d4ae246: {n}You twist the hand clutching the weapon, and Juvenna's wrist breaks. She manages to fire off a round, but the needle, whistling through the air, misses its mark. Juvenna struggles in vain to break free, shrieking in pain and fury.{/n}
8fe4e72a-37f6-4ab8-bd2e-7944228c51fd: [Search the logs for the owner's name]
dfa2170b-610c-4767-b7ec-85f4523d40f4: "If we survive, what will you do after?"
c363aa59-6f4e-425d-a860-26df8a646c46: When a creature takes {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} in a trench, all ranged attacks from weapons and turrets fired outside the trench at the creature are made with an extra penalty to hit chance and damage.
b6632aa5-299a-4ff1-943b-cd05c21d5def: For several cycles, nothing was heard about the mysterious temple that the Rogue Trader had discovered deep in Zarkov's root system. But soon, rumours of the silent shadows that would creep out at night to hunt and skin their victims alive spread across the planet once more.
9572e68b-996a-49a3-814a-d8553054c127: {n}The Magos's body hums louder still, his mechanical shoulders shuddering.{/n} "The duplication of a mechadendrite of unique configuration indicates a calculation error. Searching for the causes. Allow me... 0.6 seconds."
675b2d7b-f772-4cd3-a862-d8e0348f0311: Order the squad to find the source of the sounds.
9b8232dc-796b-4f3f-87b5-3c69e00ab638: "The results of visual diagnostics on the central platform confirm the use of unauthorised technologies by the unit Artisan Decabalus 4-04. I insist on the immediate confiscation of the platform's anchor-core for the purpose of conclusively establishing its xenoheretical origins."
bae791af-587e-44cc-9897-155fb91ad09c: "Everyone's hospitality has its limits — I will leave your retinue and continue my research. I have learned much on your ship, but my hunger for knowledge is not yet sated; it draws me onward. Thank you, Rogue Trader, may the Omnissiah light your path."
04139993-809f-4b92-8d75-8b7a58d65357: {n}Jarub lifts his gaze to you with lively curiosity, as well as some distrust.{/n} "I'd be very interested to hear how someone like me can be of use to my {mf|lord|lady}."
385d6791-1c2a-4136-bc86-cb744ec6c6ec: "In the usual way... A dalliance between the powerful. If you want titillating stories or sordid tales, I am afraid I cannot oblige." {n}Tired creases form at the corners of Laria's lips. This is not the first time she has had this conversation, it seems.{/n}
5fd2cd73-dce5-400f-878c-152cf098113b: {n}For a moment, malicious triumph twists Tervantias's already mutilated features into a grotesque mask.{/n} "Oh, finally I hear a shred of reason from your lips, you miserable creature. But you lack zeal. Repeat it once more, loudly and clearly. So that I may catch your babbling without having to strain my ears."
8d63e7e5-cf4d-489a-9ae8-643289b6d049: Those trapped within the temporal loop do not comprehend where they are. Something hinders their perception of anything that falls outside this monstrous spectacle. They labour to weave the Rogue Trader into their own reality.
8ac0b222-8639-498b-a999-460b81245f3b: A bloodstained signet ring bearing the Gaprak house crest has been found at the outpost.
9451fda7-4c16-4b35-9e5f-76b1ed04c067: Each star system contains objects you can interact with. Such objects are marked as points of interest. Move your ship to a point of interest, then click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on it to initiate the event or open the planet view.
6a386973-58ef-4918-99ed-3531cafa13f4: {n}Leaving Jarub in the shadows, you approach the gilded display case, where the blade, the Crimson Dance of Khaine, sits gleaming inside a casket of thick, clear glass. A guard in uniform bearing the Drivestem crest greets you with a questioning look and steps forward.{/n} "Hail. How may I serve you?"
9b7f4641-752d-4976-87dc-6fedca03f8c4: {n}Perhaps it is just a glint or a reflection from one of the devices, but for a moment, a shaft of light seems to illuminate Nuncius's face. His pupils dilate, and his hand reaches up, as if trying to touch something. His breathing becomes clearer and more even. Barely audibly, he whispers:{/n} "Omnissiah... at last... I comprehend..."
70342965-9433-4019-bd4f-eb2d0c7ec1ee: After the use of {g|f:b6fa6a9130a64255933ca0144f28dd03}Combat Locus Stratagem{/g}, one of the areas removed by {g|f:b6fa6a9130a64255933ca0144f28dd03}Combat Locus Stratagem{/g} can be recreated immediately.
6c19b67e-fc3e-415e-8cb9-7e669c8bcdc7: With a single tug, the frozen flesh tears with a crunch, leaving the augment in your hands.
2e89bca3-9eef-46d8-afe5-81eee1219a07: "No offence intended, my {mf|lord|lady}, but if you're walking in here under your own power, you're too early."
86cc35fd-4626-42c3-8839-39293c7f565c: "It was operational this morning. Damn it! Talk to {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Exalt-117, have him check the turrets again."
983d3219-df9d-4870-b66d-60ca68395dde: "Do not even think about it, Governor. In the Imperium, we do not fashion blades from the xenos."
fa4e94c1-b763-4f44-b2dd-057e02df500f: "I no longer have the strength to endure this horrible tear in my eyeball! Medicae, replace it, I'm begging you!"
88b3a688-a503-4774-896d-295be46d3219: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the first single attack the user makes scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} and deals +50% more critical damage if the user has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in their optical insertion.
29ace6cf-08c0-4b6c-a94d-e526750f615a: "So let's play. I know the rules."
5ad7f2b1-60a5-4ef5-aaac-762a03b600df: "Your path will not lead you to your goal. This experiment is entirely irrational, and its repercussions will be purged here and now."
f0dc748e-0471-4eca-aa64-7a4030f208eb: "No one has heard mention of the Merov Penal Legion in over a hundred years. Even the oldest books in the von Valancius library consider them a legend forgotten by history."
5f1d99c0-d4d0-4888-8ccf-11a7875a8ecc: On {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, this weapon inflicts +3 stacks of the {g|Encyclopedia:MeltingEffect}melting{/g} effect for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. The wielder can perform {g|Encyclopedia:DeadeyeShot}deadeye shots{/g} with this weapon. It is considered a sniper rifle.
e2b9c67a-56f8-497c-9fe6-114a5ef2a6b3: The user suffers {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} when they use the {g|f:0306640e7eec44c8a4146a496826c6d9}Suppression{/g} ability.
21a9bd0d-5dcb-477a-9121-4eb44d1a2de6: {n}The pitch of the skull's servo-motors rises by two notes as it makes a sweeping bank around your head. Nuncius is silent on the results of his research.{/n}
d9861cd8-02b9-4a8b-98b7-244143713571: "Nuncius believes so, colleague. Pay it no mind, it is merely an unverified hypothesis."
080f2ae5-3cdc-447d-8d2e-b613e77f9ba5: "You are in no position to demand explanations, Seberian. You did the same when you first drew Trazyn's attention to the dynasty."
4f0374b9-c92e-4105-a075-fa95db638897: "Off you go, you have taken up enough of my time."
ffe5a7fb-074c-4a3b-862d-f7f3b18cf326: "Leave Camilla Drivestem to me, she will play her part yet."
0c53e7c3-4155-44d1-8027-a223b2f214fd: "To put it simply, yes, the technology of other races is used here, but you are not meant to know." {n}Marazhai does not lift his mocking gaze from the Tech-Priest.{/n} "Sometimes I'm amazed at how primitive the art of deception is among the {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Just a few esoteric words, a hint of mystery, and any threadbare lie can inspire fear and awe."
f72a2f95-bbaa-4110-abeb-5eec6b5e7460: "Let the xenos fight — and we shall wait for the God-Emperor to reveal the right moment through Kibellah's Tarot."
924e81d1-437d-4026-a898-3850c1617c46: {n}The captain's face beams with an inner light.{/n} "I've been preparing for this my whole life, Lord Captain!"
1cef5a66-b748-4637-a1a9-4a6eee5a950e: "Upon awakening, the sacred archeotech brought several more machines back to wakefulness. After performing diagnostic rituals, the Tech-Priests discovered a secret door behind one of the devices — it was inscribed with an ancient von Valancius coat of arms. As soon as the Tech-Priests tried to enter, a genetic guardian blocked the way. It refused to open the door to anyone but Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius or his heir."
5aee69f0-0e88-4057-a557-9adcd9bef09f: "My heart rate is higher than usual, and my mind is awash with grief. But I also feel... relieved. It may sound strange or cynical, but now that I have let him go, I feel that I can go on living. But I will never dare to forget Nuncius ever again — it is a pain I will carry inside me until the end, and I will be... glad to have it with me."
adc5ddf0-ad1f-4109-aade-6781999f0f03: "Genetor Ferrenz, you're here as well! How are things in the Sector Bionica?"
6fe27e79-2a82-4a6d-9b57-dbb4ccb807eb: "I ordered you to repair it, not argue with me! Now do it."
8eb7eea6-83de-4ea2-a299-12f488200500: {n}Seberian's face — the part of it that remains — is frozen in a grimace. You are not even sure that the Rogue Trader still breathes — it is as if the xenos has stopped time for him.{/n}
397b3bc9-73af-45b0-8157-77ab31b82f4b: The mysteries of Zarkov tempted many explorers, and over time the planet became the source of an endless stream of weapons of war, poisons, and stimulants.
211f0f3d-655e-4e31-bd4c-bfd933303e3b: {n}Batoshski radiates an almost tangible fury.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? You're here. Truth be told, it's good to see you."
3ae193d8-4cef-415a-9e3e-2301f62bab74: Janris Danrok has invited the Rogue Trader to come down to the Sector Bionica to personally inspect the ailing apparatus.
28ff8954-3e50-49bf-96c3-f86ec8f7b1c5: {n}The faces of both officers tense. The young man tries to step forward and block his father, but the older officer hurriedly speaks up:{/n} "We beg forgiveness for our insolence, Lord Captain, and will accept our punishment with humility!"
3dd5ea1a-a693-43d3-98da-5b90c42c657d: Eougunn restores wounds to an ally and also regains his own wounds.
72355553-acde-4fb2-b2e0-3d580d1a714f: "Your regiment served Seberian? Tell me, what kind of man was he?"
4de2d243-4e10-4def-ab53-71f4bd277e33: "Request that the strike be called off. It is no longer needed."
f8068226-4285-4a5e-8c2d-b580916d1581: "I'm no help to you there. You need to head to the Cage. It's our camp and the biggest outpost on Zarkov. Our capital, I suppose, or whatever it is you call large settlements."
5db35d1e-9692-4970-8505-2282a9d3faee: {n}Juvenna decides that a dim-witted but malleable zealot could be of use to her.{/n}
66b0dc7f-3767-4d23-b54d-26f10eb5dbd2: When this creature dies, it explodes, dealing {uip|Damage|9ffde7adf91e4dd6b2f6fe90e7ebfc1e} {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g} (minimum 1) with 30% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures in a 3-cell radius.
cafffb21-d529-4f87-ae88-c00acdf9e4c0: "Why would anyone want to imprison us in this moment? It would take a grotesque mind to conceive of such a thing, but to what end? Unless... the goal is torture. But who is the intended victim?"
bd57743e-4c4f-4239-a506-aeea6182f027: "I found a shuttle on one of the neighbouring worlds. It contained a recorded message from a Merovian regiment."
47085eac-607c-44fc-ade3-d4e039ae5e66: "Then we should honour their service to Him and accept their suspicion as a given. I'll tell the soldiers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll cause no more trouble."
4fda08b4-66f3-470a-a6c7-c19b4f396707: {n}Eogunn picks up the injector with his mechadendrite and expels the remnants into the alembic on his shoulder, as the liquid inside instantly turns a sombre black.{/n} "A nerve agent of peripheral action. Neutralisation is impossible outside the ship's infirmary. Estimated time until death... is a matter of minutes. I am sorry."
80433b62-f0f0-4fdd-a79e-a5199749192c: To learn more about negative effects and other details, see augment info.
73782fde-cd14-43c5-8a63-7de10bbc4296: Every stack of this effect grants +2% damage, +2% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}, and +2% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}.
f9d545ce-426e-4acf-b2f8-af1599685fa6: "The sound seems barely audible, but also so loud that it drowns out even my whispers. I wonder how long we can endure this cacophony before we start slaughtering one another..."
2b3dcc41-74da-4c5c-9d6e-9dfa4e002460: {n}Argenta stares at the vessel as if it were a flesh-and-blood enemy standing before her.{/n} "Does the enemy seek to sow doubt at our every step? Then let us go without hesitation — as befits His faithful!"
cb5e4784-f5a8-4013-a34c-b8b5dbbe6f6a: [Carefully step off the Warrant, trying not to damage it]
cb06f722-36b7-4832-b5e6-8b3e7c744c96: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.
b858d599-f2fe-4f2e-bff9-c651b5f1cc12: "I believe forced galvanisation of the nervous system will serve as sufficient impetus to arrive at a consensus. If you don't wish to kill this... person, then the current level of severity is enough."
1dd9ecd3-9fdf-4d17-9b28-ef4a029f6909: {n}Janur tears his attention away from his carving with a grunt and looks up at you expectantly, one eyebrow raised.{/n}
75271e4c-3e8a-4409-80b5-60a8446cb9cd: {n}A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments. In a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the life form's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."
aa91a080-c1ed-4f2c-a3d4-129ae5a5d135: "Like on Zarkov, where a single mistake costs lives. Only here, it is souls. The Merciful God-Emperor, now I even feel pity for those who have fallen in thrall to the Archenemy. But I also know how important it is to protect people from their own mistakes."
e94bf329-74d8-421d-86e2-954e58a6ad68: "I do not... I do not understand, elantach. Everyone knows who you are. The crew, the retinue. What tragedy is there in the loss of some piece of paper?"
0e0122ad-e16f-4ea3-9eea-6e746b2b2ff5: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s entire face lights up with enthusiasm. Eogunn's mechadendrites extend toward the mutant's abdomen with perfect precision, bristling with needles and lancets.{/n} "What a fine specimen of genetic corruption, Nuncius! Take note: all these changes are by no means random. They have structure and inherent evolutionary purpose... Metamorphosis has been planted within him, but of what kind? Indeed, Nuncius, xenos origin is highly probable."
ed02cc79-2849-4754-96f1-ed6b97f45923: The rift in the Adeptus Mechanicus camp is deeper and more complex than it might first appear. The Rogue Trader should investigate more deeply to make the right decision.
7b05b7cb-c6e5-49ec-8b80-47d688cdaf63: "We just fought its tendrils, and those weren't even the largest. Can you imagine the size of the thing itself? Exactly." {n}The soldier wipes the sweat from his brow.{/n} "Anyway, let's hold off on any more idle talk for now. It's not safe here."
e03aa48f-a8f0-440f-b295-0033681114ab: {n}Ferrenz cuts Eogunn off in a calm voice:{/n} "Pride is not included among my operating variables. I register any error or lack of competence in my logs as meticulously as I do successful procedures. The diagnostic rites were performed in accordance with the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation. The possibility of error has been excluded — this servo-skull has no defects or failures. I am here to demonstrate this personally in the presence of the Lord Captain."
e4f2672e-0280-465e-bdf5-72eed776095b: {n}Hours became days, but the xenos showed no activity. Eventually, the tomb of iron skeletons fell silent, and the sickly green lights went out. But no one disbanded the watch. The men who served in it became ghosts guarding the dead.{/n}
8ce70720-4f1c-4208-b364-a411676e0f0f: "Do you know the master code for controlling the gates?"
d8ef6d29-eb02-4f91-9855-37b703acf13c: Centuries of exposure to Zarkov's corrosive environment have not left a single mark upon this augmetic.
fb1df631-442d-46a2-9f19-e3454c481320: "You have been instrumental in securing the approaches to the enemy, Rogue Trader. But I am aggrieved... no, disappointed in the decision you have made."
850833db-e8d6-47a3-8721-a568bd8bfb10: {n}Years of hibernation have taken their toll on the machine spirits and a flood of errors turns the screen red. The long list of journal entries left by the owner is all but completely corrupted. With luck, you might piece together useful information from the surviving fragments.{/n}
f0e084b3-4cec-43a4-b6b8-08ac795d22ec: {n}Pasqal's vox emits a binharic trill, solemn and oppressive.{/n} "Confirmed: the sacrament of tech-relic maintenance has been performed correctly. Protocol for exchange of sacred regalia initiated." {n}The Tech-Priest's gaze fixes on Eogunn's robe.{/n} "Registering the affiliation of this blessed tech-unit to the clergy of the {g|Encyclopedia:ForgeWorldGlossary}forge world{/g} Stygies VIII." {n}A scarlet spark flickers in his blue optical augmetic, almost as if Pasqal has narrowed his eyes in suspicion.{/n} "Requesting confirmation of the unit's familiarity with the standards of the Catechism of Maintenance and Safety in effect on this vessel."
170aba29-fea5-4122-ac54-4793f6163a47: "You fear the death of another, sage, I can smell it. The sour stench is in the air whenever the servo-skull called Nuncius is in peril. Tell me, then, why do you fear the demise of one long since dead?"
7c7d13f2-9d56-4e6d-a4f8-7617ef8cf07c: "Well, let us proceed. I declare us ready for landing."
c89829c9-7971-4525-bb9e-3c88cd0cb84d: "I shall give you the chance to be part of Humanity, rather than its enemies!"
b9e804ed-d715-4ece-b194-415eef280260: "If this is what you call 'under control,' then I'm a clerk in the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratum{/g}," {n}bursts Solomorne's voice unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "I've heard enough to know that intervention is needed immediately, Rogue Trader. And I would very much like to go with you."
d738d515-0338-4e9b-a6a8-b5ea95f4dcfc: {n}There can be no doubt about the weapon's origins: the sword depicted by this unknown artist's brush was not forged by human hands. The fluid curves, the exceptional lustre of the blade, and the gem at the hilt show the weapon to be the work of an Aeldari artisan.{/n}
8c7743a2-d9b6-4248-a6be-daf4a1a42ac2: "An interesting way of evading awkward questions. The most notorious bribe-takers often cower behind their status and regalia — and they always have something to hide. Artisan, you are clearly not telling the truth." {n}Solomorne delivers this provocation in a dry, matter-of-fact tone.{/n}
ac7e422d-c2c6-46e8-9576-2bf84913b777: "I, Rogue Trader von Valancius, will take them back to my ship. They helped to fend off Decabalus's attack."
290fb6c4-4714-4fc5-b9e4-8f29c74e283b: "God-Emperor, fortify our courage against the delusions of the xenos, ignite within us a hatred strong enough to shatter their sorceries!" {n}Argenta prays without pause, shocked by what has occurred.{/n}
85cf999b-9146-48ef-888b-34a05c10c219: "'Heresy' — that was what Diodas said when he first encountered me. From that moment, he was always on my heels, hunting me, trying to prove I had betrayed the Imperium. The narrow-minded fool! Diodas believed the Inquisition had the authority to judge me, the anointed of the God-Emperor!"
062d5003-3ee1-4172-acca-9ba377b11d98: "Given the 'esteemed Genetor's' heretical leanings, I see nothing surprising in such a stunt. My recommendations: conduct a thorough search of the fugitive's laboratory and private quarters, and set a course for Footfall. It is likely the ship can be intercepted if its {g|Encyclopedia:NavigatorGlossary}Navigator{/g} takes long routes through the {g|Encyclopedia:WarpGlossary}warp{/g}."
bb2cd04c-5042-44c4-983d-e920a0b8cc20: "What do you know about the central complex?"
c3316f8e-e410-4098-827f-00ea319cb76a: {n}The young man stutters out prayers interspersed with fearful lamentations to an unseen interlocutor:{/n} "L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, let, let, let me... get up and wooork..." {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Do I have a ch-choice? Hunger's pawing at my door... I will wor-work my shift, and die before I betray the dy-dynasty!" {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}
056e2d3b-3b7f-44de-bd69-7abbf342fdef: "By ancient tradition, the finest xenos slayers from all existing Astartes Chapters are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I originally belonged to the Blood Angels Chapter, and after many battles I was nominated to join the Deathwatch."
4ccfd068-073c-4c9b-b789-699c9f7a69bd: "One-seven-four-zero-one, how many components did the xenos extract from you?"
c70e59f9-3bcc-4c9d-ae3f-3c7896c879c4: "I found reference to a certain cogitator in the Palace of Dargonus, as well as a data-key that grants access to its archives."
efad6014-4252-453f-9779-44aecf27aa2c: "It seems I am looking to find the same sword."
7e80c39d-d91a-4da6-83b2-ce4529396c1d: "I no longer wish to see you in my retinue."
a163e08c-d5c3-4024-bcfb-51173d9122a3: "Kibellah has acquired a skull companion of her own. Do you think he and Nuncius will get along?"
05246107-85da-4387-b93c-3099c620ef2d: Help Quartermaster Kuravich fend off the attack.
a5ec91e7-dac0-4d84-8ea5-885fb58408aa: "I see no need for urgency here. Vigdis, I shall deal with this problem later."
0ca05c31-bdb3-460d-920d-f52289fba5aa: This poor fellow never found his way out of the Museion. The scarabs have swarmed over him, coating his stripped bone in strange liquid metal.
0fac44fe-cde0-461a-b44d-8b81efb022f0:
The user immediately deals {uip|fire_damage_xenos_daemons|510cfc47d3d040daa9d85c879943f174} damage with 40% armour penetration.
At the end of their turn, the user suffers +1 stack of {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.
eec6eba1-2785-489f-bc16-c5771333fb57: "How can this be...? " {n}The Lady Navigator blinks in puzzlement, her lashes fluttering as she stares dazedly ahead.{/n} "The Sea of Souls is placid, yet the very canvas of the {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Materium{/g} has disintegrated and reformed, filling up with other images. I... cannot describe it. It is something strange. Something other."
90ee0106-d2c1-48bd-9e77-7f879e9b1bbe: "Your thanks are accepted, but my service is not yet at an end."
0fa51ba0-e6ab-4aa8-bba1-93e7356a9ecc: "In the name of Seberian von Valancius, you will be executed for treason!"
3f4d67e5-ebce-430c-ac82-a36970da8b38: Send a squad to board the ship.
15cdf1dd-2549-47d2-ad77-42e41d5b7a01: "I believe the least-biased participant should speak first. Nuncius?"
0fca9e77-78f2-4a3e-bb21-6d19f26bbf96: "In the name of the God-Emperor and Humanity, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We will bring the flames of His fury down upon Zarkov."
3162bba7-55fd-46f0-a19b-ec5804c771d3: "Faith in Him has a thousand faces. Yours is one. But not everyone believes that the God-Emperor can be worshipped in different ways."
8fa88d86-6ee5-4417-9062-8ca0b3c0f08f: The platform, obeying some unknowable consciousness and logic, seems to be keeping its distance from unsanctioned visitors.
50e3a511-6f34-46f7-9076-717a4fc55b7f: "The penal soldiers were punished for the unforgivable insolence. They were a hair's breadth away from rioting."
53bd6ce3-9b65-41f6-87b1-41fa04b8f883: "In all my years serving the Imperium, this is the first time I've seen anyone so eager to rush headlong into the jaws of a monster. Then again, all criminal filth... I mean, unsavoury elements, think alike. I won't try to stop you."
a84107e7-2a07-4826-b98f-c4ca24940854: "Plasma. Burned straight through." {n}The wounded man grudgingly bites out each word.{/n} "Wanted to catch him unawares and hit him from behind, but the scoundrel was waiting for me — and he managed to leave me a small memento with his sword. That didn't save him from my second shot. I tossed the body off the bridge to avoid leaving any evidence."
f471a7d7-73a2-4fde-8cf0-735b4cf3125d: "Everything that is happening is the fault of Seberian von Valancius. Turn him over to the enemy, and cleanse the palace of heresy!"
2006a735-b98f-4344-b7fa-804c1506ba3e: The remains of a great hero of the Imperium, sealed within an ornate reliquary casket.
f38a1afa-a464-4826-8b0a-435d68dc617f: The palace gates are locked, which means Juvenna cannot take decisive action. The solution is to learn the gate litany or find another way to open them.
c69a0817-16b8-4708-adab-366fba810f87: [Call the soldiers to arms] "Soldiers of Zarkov, the time has come to serve the dynasty!"
74aad2d3-4668-41d3-9cd3-1c4d3f5d293d: [Cover your nose with a handkercher] "Such... pungent odours and unsightly carcasses. What heinous acts are taking place here?"
c3dd38a4-3a57-4056-855a-e2dbee69fece: "They're commanders not officers. There's a difference. My uncle — I mean, the colonel — has been in charge of the regiment for over ten seasons. You won't find anyone on Zarkov who is more decent or tougher than him. I once saw him covering a retreat for the wounded. Three suckers from a mace latched onto him, but he didn't even blink until he got the wounded soldier to the Cage. They say the suckers just shrivelled up and died later."
0e31e182-3aac-4201-8734-d12f29b4d1bb: [Leave this cursed place as soon as possible]
77eb5781-b828-4330-b6e4-d1c9549a77ce: "Rogue Trader, your timing is impeccable! I am ready to discuss the fascinating experiment we have been conducting in the Sector Bionica... and on other decks."
69b18768-75c2-42ca-a56b-b003fae2c0f9: The Rogue Trader's way is blocked by barricades. Fortunately, there is nothing a sufficient amount of fyceline — or a tank — cannot clear.
f9e72d55-0a6b-4f75-b4e3-14db9f3d3dfb: "I would advise against engaging in any debates with Master Februs. And that goes for you, esteemed Magos, and everyone else on this ship."
94567aca-7290-4c67-8e63-4a61ddde07bc: "No sense in hiding it now, I suppose." {n}Juvenna is clearly vexed by your unceremonious intrusion.{/n} "Yes, I am."
297b3535-b0a8-413e-bf50-b52fd639f082: {n}The Factotum takes to absent-mindedly twirling the autoquill in his hand.{/n} "Let me think... That is strange indeed. I have studied the history of the dynasty in enough detail to recall all the major battles of the last millennium, and none took place on the capital world."
4ed635d3-ba18-4dec-a00c-7fe6c2339629: {n}It seems to you that Vedka's dark eye gleams with inner light as she raises her fierce gaze toward you. Her voice rings out clearly over the battlefield.{/n} "Lord Captain! I knew you would come, that you would not leave us in our time of need."
fe285002-b821-448b-8123-6b7c1f7e4465: "Correct, Lord Captain! Nothing worthy of your attention has happened since your landing. The ship is still orbiting the dead world."
31facb5c-eae4-4fea-83ee-d07e6e7a81a9: {n}The colonel strikes — but you attack a fraction of a second earlier, forcing him to go on the defensive.{/n}
8685d809-1bbe-4c43-a671-38f28f1586f5: "They are true sons of the Undying One. Even in such a pitiful state, their souls cry out in the rage He bestowed upon them, while their bodies are... frozen in torment. A sorrowful fate for dedicated and valiant warriors, Domin. It would be wrong to leave them before first granting them deliverance."
d0894fdb-afd1-40d4-aa91-f22322f8b50a: "I am Diodas af Irramon, and I demand a private meeting with Seberian!"
733467b4-2cc1-4367-9abe-0a51a3628982: {n}Over the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}, Laria orders that the duchess be detained immediately. A short confirmation comes from the transmitter, and then the Seneschal adds:{/n} "And be gentle with her."
7c8ecdd8-507d-4d4f-a941-70cbcea792ff: "Speak for yourself, will you? My gut tells me that any Cold Trader with a nose for profit would jump at the chance to get their hands on anything on those pedestals."
d0f757bf-6077-4fe9-863c-4db3012d2948: {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}Mental damage{/g} suffered by the wearer is reduced by −50%. Can re-roll failed {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Test}tests{/g} once.
bc72052b-3453-4307-ace2-fb7df3ed7518: Some might say it is foolish to spend a fortune on a mere neck implant. Jae Heydari would counter that wearing a mere neck implant while being the Princess of Efreet is simply beneath her dignity.
92d22abf-b987-4c4f-a7ff-86cb33be4b8f: "Accept the absurdity of existence, reject attempts to categorise it, and thereby find spiritual equilibrium. A highly unique way of viewing the world, one that goes against just about every dogma in the Imperium." {n}A rebellious smile plays on Eogunn's lips.{/n} "I would like to experience it for myself."
b6f89526-107a-426a-87e1-7fc45a93fb7a: "I must say, this piece of organic material looks better as a rug. It is quite pleasant to trample the relics of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. I must do it again if I have the chance." {n}Marazhai utters these words with murderous seriousness — unsavoury pleasure glitters in the depths of his eyes.{/n}
58ac3dd8-ce07-4b6e-8f58-f6093110b4dc: "I think I shall heed your advice. Take it and destroy it."
538f4e81-c4bf-4f4f-b9fe-0d98d53d0332: The wearer uses {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} if their Intelligence is higher.
cf9666ad-4698-4d29-9c1a-24a263c5eb1e: {n}Your question alarms the Duchess: she immediately interlaces her dry fingers, trying to hide her agitation.{/n}
9125e1b5-c133-45b0-8e92-13f333b47a34: {n}Turning to Nuncius, Eogunn raises his eyebrows.{/n} "Really? My dearest colleague states that Magos Haneumann and I once passed each other in Service Conduit 91-R. The esteemed Magos chided me for some minor neglect in the presentation of my augments, after which, having each voiced our opinions, we parted ways. It seems I considered this event to be inconsequential, and it has escaped my memory."
89cada7f-f225-4287-a4b7-dc244147bb61: "House Gaprak? If what you say is true, your noble title does not exonerate you of your transgression. Still, I fear the intervention of a handful of vassals is not enough to turn the tide of battle."
ae12467e-521c-4c7a-a0b2-dfb1fed55616: "My answer is no, and there are two reasons for it. First: you resist reasonable criticism, from which it follows that no one but me has ever pointed out your weaknesses to you. Second: this flagship belongs to the von Valancius dynasty, just as I do. Within its confines, I am entitled to do as I see fit."
c4faf621-07e6-497e-8f9e-67aed9a7333d: {n}Eogunn's organic eye is closed. With fingers steepled, he rests his hands on his stomach. There is an expression of deep peace on his face. Without opening his eye, he says,{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Biologis Eurystheus Octo-Rubedo declaimed: 'Every organism, naturally born, flesh from flesh, knows fear. But the supreme terror of an organic organism is invariably evoked by the threat of annihilation.'"
aa505df2-19b6-4a85-bfa8-bdc2b1cd6ec4: You have obtained a prime augment. The current Implantation Throne lacks the capacity for such an invasive augmentation of the flesh. It requires an improved Implantation Throne.
c48cc7d9-0187-4432-8dce-d23369fd99c5: The machine spirits are calm, which means the air defence battery is functioning without issue.
5d314f3d-9f64-4415-aba3-a82661310191: "What are you planning to do, Seberian?"
1a6d6fc8-fce9-4569-a3e2-6c6120fd327c: {n}Kuravich's expression darkens and he studies your face.{/n} "You didn't know? Izdrig sentenced her to death after that psyker incident. He carried out the sentence himself."
763bd3b9-e2d4-4e30-b090-7083a2f288d6: The wielder gains a +5% chance to reduce incoming {g|Encyclopedia:WarpDamage}warp damage{/g} by half for each point of {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}.
62cb9d66-6c49-4e89-b027-9fac7301b5f9: "Janur, this creature is my prey. My glory. And my challenge. And I do not plan to share any of it with those who have looked upon me with distrust."
d3eb5567-ab4a-4e8f-8023-610b1016afef: This is either a Legio Cybernetica automaton or a pilot's sarcophagus. And, still, you feel as though it is watching you.
f893db55-9fe9-446f-873e-79c3fd7143ac: "You don't say! He only levitates because he is too lazy to walk?"
1943a8f7-2e3b-4d00-b490-2ff689d336de: A pool of cooling slag is all that remains of the ancient enemy of Mankind.
c9283938-0a52-4fdd-a83e-9c54629112d3: "We will swear our oaths to you, heir of Seberian, no doubt. But first, we must be certain that the blood of the noble Rogue Trader truly runs through your veins. We may have gone feral, but we haven't lost our wits, and we're accustomed to judging people by their deeds."
81579b90-15cb-40c9-86d4-597debdad431: "Lord Captain! I don't know how to thank you for your timely intervention. These people still don't understand that there are some things that can't be bought with a noble name or a lofty position."
1004cf59-9d7d-456b-a21d-39705318fd68: "If you so command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll aim them right at our own guts."
7e90f667-fe6e-446a-a35d-759fbde03e14: "The analysis of the situation has been performed incorrectly. Genetor Februs, you failed to prove your position unequivocally, even though your arguments create the semblance of rectitude. I have suspended the argument in order to aggregate the information necessary to eradicate your misconceptions."
9aa829ef-39e5-43ae-b17d-c8b8726639ea: [Go with Laria to the wall and arrest Juvenna]
f411a7bd-6e6b-4afc-a249-342db84af4dc: "Tervantias dismisses Nuncius as nothing more than a common servo-skull, claiming there is nothing noteworthy about him."
2c535f1e-7395-4df9-aa79-ee528e2610ef: "When my poor Gnotec regained consciousness, he said he saw the figure of the Lord Captain in the medbay, clothed in light. It {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took all the pain from his body{/d}... Your presence really did help him." {n}The woman grits her teeth, not allowing the emotions overwhelming her to break free. The autopistol shakes in her hands.{/n}
d90c17ce-1355-4e5d-bd2f-330a6fc8dfdf: "I believe that is all I wished to discuss with you."
18f98559-0e56-4ebd-9419-2dd2844c973e: "The opinion of the Vivisector life form carries the most weight. The request for a review of the chain of command has not been granted."
ae9eb334-cfea-4c57-8ed6-92446fea9a67: {n}Eogunn takes Nuncius's hand gently in his own. He leans closer and whispers something, then pulls away:{/n} "It's time. You were not always right, and neither was I, but you were never wrong about the things that truly matter. Forgive me, and farewell, dearest colleague."
d0f7874e-f920-4bb7-894c-fb9535e1c25e: {n}Eogunn breaks off, looking at Nuncius:{/n} "My dearest colleague suggests that my answer is becoming tiresome. If you are curious, I would be pleased to attempt to compose a treatise on my construction, but the more difficult task will be to give it a form comprehensible to a layperson..."
6677987e-9557-447d-b234-6417cea6af7f: "I have made enquiries into your background, Genetor, and the records are remarkably patchy. In particular, the fifty years preceding your appearance in Furibundus seem to have been assiduously scrubbed out. Who are you really, Februs?"
be0d7609-3015-4a3f-8046-412d3d42eed1: "Betray my father? No. Your assurances alone are not enough for that. Prove that you are a friend to the dynasty: solve the Gaprak case. In the meantime, I will consider how far I am willing to go."
9a5b4f01-4d4a-4513-9aba-a2cb42f6edbf: "I can't go on, Father." {n}Laria looks not at you, but at Seberian.{/n} "Allow me to die with dignity." {n}She extends her hand, positioning it beneath the injector, and closes her eyes.{/n}
898f2ff1-eb53-4dce-a96b-15efce6e2511: {n}After finishing his unusually long tirade, Batoshski falls silent and seems to deflate slightly. For a fleeting moment, you see in him a weary leader rather than a hardened veteran.{/n} "If it puts your mind at ease, I took her life personally, looking her in the eye. We placed her body in a shroud-leaf so that it may serve the Cage. She will get her atonement for the one. And we will live on and remember her."
5f72d47d-92ea-4a99-9210-bf85feb51935: {n}Pask's already grim face darkens still further. He rubs his eyes wearily before answering.{/n} "Tech-Priest Alva-9 was in charge of matters related to security on the station. A couple of weeks ago, she and Decabalus had a mighty row—" {n}The foreman hastily cuts himself off and falls silent.{/n} "I mean, yes. Some still follow her orders, and right now they're all at the drilling complex."
5ccc2687-7c0e-4d91-a14c-45ee32553d8b: Due to extensive experience and ample {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augmentation{/g}, Seberian's {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are increased.
3c53534b-f824-4a16-a282-4cfa34a0bce7: The Crimson Dance of Khaine terrifies the retinue too much for them to dare oppose Seberian.
336169f1-4097-4d59-b928-4936a4c2b0b0: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Disaster! Zarkov has again been overwhelmed by metal {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} draped in flesh. And this time there are more of them. Reports say their old lair, those ruins, are glowing with a strange green light... It's a full-scale invasion, Lord Captain."
4cd0006c-0369-4810-b088-76087df981da: The hall is filled with countless floating dioramas. The only way to move between them is by using the anti-gravity transport slabs.
9a1de88d-0ff1-4aac-ac9b-49e1f071dff6: "Fact two. Certain species of xenos exhibit technological proficiency. Their weapons and artefacts possess destructive and utilitarian properties that could elevate the power of the Imperium. In studying these properties, I find ways to translate them to the technologies bestowed upon us by the Machine God. No wicked deed of innovation is committed — I liken this research to the creation of new production patterns."
b033cb7b-2585-48c9-8166-c38b67046dd1:
Eogunn can now gain {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks.
At the start of combat, Eogunn gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
3e9709cb-6ce4-4d54-acf3-e60fe8f829fe: {n}It is impossible to tell whether the servo-skull shares his colleague's excitement.{/n}
7e53e1dc-2ae3-4ed1-9f62-7e4ef7e02f24: [Point at the bloodstains] "The Gaprak scion was here. Tell me what you have done to him!"
4d5558ce-31e8-43e8-915b-b0ee6f030ba4: "You sewed my companion's colleague to someone else's body. Why would you do that?"
6cd6009b-6547-400c-8e99-bf7e3b92f563: It was a chilling sight to behold. Necron warriors emerged from the darkness, moving in geometrically perfect, impeccably synchronised formation. Their metal faces were expressionless; only the eye slits were aglow with a malice that spelt death to any living thing in their way. The xenos in the front ranks raised their weapons, preparing to attack.
7af46692-7a7a-488e-aa8b-d842476b3725: "By the power conferred on me by the Seneschal, I grant you leave to preserve your honour and confess your crime."
4008af6a-e6f6-433a-8d9a-1857f0d96534: "The gaze of the Undying One does not turn on those who avoid suffering. Nor does He grant revelation to those who fear to shed blood for His sake."
68261add-d3a6-4eef-a689-75efe0a684a7: Led by the iron hand of its righteous ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the scourge of the Emperor's enemies.
3f349d2b-f32e-455f-9455-f28b0c2c8cba: {n}This mechanism reeks of antiquity, inhuman precision, and cold menace. Even momentary interference in its operation would seem to be not harmless exploration, but rather an outrage provoking immediate retribution.{/n}
b891877c-c71a-4701-8876-4bd846f19d7f: "Enough of this. I'll defeat him on my own."
52b6a5ca-659a-4b73-9960-9d96aae99d6a: {n}And of the distant planet Zarkov, where the people honour his memory.{/n}
7bbe1d69-3bf8-4301-9e9c-37dcb7f565e6: [Slap the water angrily] "You have no heart! You can't reduce everything to just flesh and chemistry."
98e16b07-754b-4568-be2d-ba8924009c5a: "Eogunn, be honest with me. Is Nuncius an Abominable Intelligence?"
b0887410-5da3-4b18-815f-6ad4936f9786: "An interesting piece. It appears to have been made by someone more capable than a typical {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} craftsman."
e32c850d-2ff5-4fe8-8cd1-c3d517a8fa95: "Interesting choice for a contest. Very unorthodox for people who consider themselves descendants of a penal regiment."
b60d11d2-77b0-4172-a969-72ad3e0a94e4: "I believe that no one's opinion carries more weight than yours, Lord Captain."
34993e3b-06f7-42e2-a748-9790bb339e9b: {n}The very air between the two {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} seems to crackle with tension. The glares Eogunn and Pasqal exchange could melt steel.{/n}
f646ce5b-5b01-4b1f-a7cb-696a106647e2: The planet around which the asteroids are orbiting is incredibly radioactive. The closer the shuttles get to it, the more they will be irradiated — the only safe option is to gather anything useful that is far enough away from the exposed core of the ruptured planetary body.
a9490ace-c7a5-47ae-b37e-a9e3ba5f2fa5: "I wish to communicate with Nuncius, and I will not require an interpreter! Let's see how well I understand your colleague."
495e3804-0431-4558-888c-4b1081d6c34d: It seems the prolonged presence of an uninvited guest within the temporal loop has damaged the trap's once-precise mechanism. A breach has appeared in the replica masonry.
d8c72e14-c776-4440-b114-4752f32d2c0b: {n}A large collection of crude Aquilas made from bark, wood, and bone lie before the sergeant. Each varies slightly from the next, however — some clutch an Astra Militarum sigil in their talons, others have the number 32 carved into their wings, while another group have one head depicted as a mechanical bird skull.{/n} "Is there something you wanted, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
ea920a16-93c4-4399-96a7-a397bb8813a7:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, 1 Tactical Simulacrum appears in each {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} area for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. For every 10 points of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, +1 more Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.
5c7b82a5-7f0f-4e6a-9092-8f1b1a7976e2: "And yet there is the Warrant. Seberian must be put to death — but to exterminate an entire dynasty...?"
1ca3a6b5-0e4b-4481-91dc-89d160593e52: {n}Seberian gently lifts the wounded woman, gazing into the gaunt face of his daughter.{/n} "Then I wish to bid her farewell, {name}."
05869074-adc2-4e26-af10-2da4989f8eb1: "My intentions follow the dogmas of my order, and the dogmas of my order forbid me from divulging my plans to outsiders unless doing so would serve the cause." {n}Zorael falls silent and fixes you with a meaningful gaze.{/n}
32636fa5-7da7-4bfd-860c-ff657d23534c: "Have you lost your mind? I am weary of listening to your elderly ravings about glories long past!"
3e284633-f3b7-4bde-8f85-ff5ff8b3b185: {n}Marazhai makes a pensive sound.{/n} "I believe I have heard the name — long ago, in passing. Which means that this Oghyr is... most very prominent among his own kind, to be known even in the Dark City."
06dc149a-7d07-4364-a42c-b4fd1e0e9fe9: Trazyn's attacks cause all other enemies within a 2-cell radius around the target regain <u>(from 40 to 50)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}.
3635a9fe-ebe0-4ce7-a58a-8080d449cefe: "Are you the Master-at-Arms serving the von Valancius dynasty?"
fae9bd93-7d35-4ccb-8b14-2cea79665da4: "Give the annihilation protocol the highest status! Destroy the intruder immediately!"
bc9e7ad2-b90b-4f39-8f16-927cf600c2a4: Governor Vedka Dunawski found herself unable to accept the betrayal of her Lord Captain. For seven long years, she successfully defended Zarkov against the forces of Chaos, but with each battle she lost more and more faith. At the end of the seventh year, Vedka disappeared from her office without a trace — mere days before the Zarkov army was struck by a deadly disease that had never been seen before. It is said that shortly afterward, a horrifying priestess of the dark powers appeared on Zarkov — the one-eyed, ulcer-riddled Hope Breaker, who turned the souls of the righteous away from the God-Emperor with her words of salvation in despair.
55ee2420-ce61-4012-8e9a-a5f7cec5e8de: The user gains +3 stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}.
f02ec302-b3e3-4ab7-a89a-09f56ea1186d: [Aim your weapon at Sauerback] "Take one more step — and you die."
24a18187-a917-4c74-a126-58b7f237e046: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is going around in a circle. You can decide whether to follow it or to try to break it completely.]
262ec4a2-a65c-4539-b488-a9d4f15455f1: {n}At the sound of your voice, the woman instantly cuts off the vox-transmission and wheels around. It appears you have just interrupted an exchange with the Inquisition forces.{/n}
ff0248e7-2de5-463e-8788-41d501d8de1c:
Plasteel plates protect the vessel from harm, negating 7 points of {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} on each side.
At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}flagship{/g}'s turn, the most {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damaged{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} restores 10% of its strength.
e6b2c419-f781-4ebf-b10f-f7ae75bf9acf: "I have spoken plainly enough for you to understand the essence of my question. Perhaps I should speak more slowly."
07c9be1e-55f0-4acc-b128-4bd0a96f8b50: The tomb transformed, sealing away the path behind. The Lord Captain stands stranded on a floating slab.
43bcd900-f5fc-4524-9d2d-d162961c8fa8: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to the Sector Bionica to be studied.
fbd59ce2-6143-4a47-8101-3b3f72189c78: "I know the medicae officers are cutting you up too, piece after piece! They will drive you mad, Lord Captain, turn you into a machine. You will see! I have to stop this. Stop the pain." {n}The criminal's eyes lose their focus.{/n}
405b387e-44ac-4c10-a642-bc6fef758414: {n}The humming in the Tech-Priest's mechanical organs fades, leaving you in sepulchral silence. For a moment, Exalt-117 becomes an unmoving, dead mechanism.{/n} "This explains the limitations of my memory map. The falsity of the data-index. The dysfunction. The ways by which such a thing is possible lie beyond my knowledge circuits. But I thank you for clarifying the coordinates."
c051b684-e8b3-44d4-ba15-f03b8fca308e: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started spraying plasma in every direction. We blocked his escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. Our sniper needs time to get into position. The perpetrator is only willing to talk to you — perhaps you can stall him for a few minutes?" {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to the floor, to the bloodied body lying at the enforcers' feet.{/n}
200bcb15-1f3f-4f73-9b24-d5a43cf510ff: You reduced Colonel Izdrig Batoshski to the rank of private.
938488d3-9775-4293-93e1-1bfb049d0a32: As soon as the squad stepped into the passage, a wall descended with a whoosh behind us, cutting off our way back. Prisms shimmering a sinister green were set on the floor and walls of the narrow corridor — too large and obvious to be mere decoration. A scout who led the way made the mistake of drawing too close to the glowing artifact: there was a sickening crunch as the man was crushed into a shapeless mass of flesh and bone.
e6eff721-0415-495d-a3f0-a08795094030: "Colleague, I register regrettable lacunae in your knowledge which the sacred diagnostics of this xeno-object are unlikely to ever complete. However, if you will permit it, I stand ready to transmit a portion of my wisdom to you, provided you swear the appropriate data-vows."
6d893dec-f924-452b-9701-e6b8cb0e34a5: {n}Upon seeing the face of the slain traitor, Laria pales, clenching her fists convulsively.{/n} "You killed Seberian's heir?" {n}Without waiting for your response, she gestures to the enforcers, who swiftly fan out around you, pointing their weapons at you and your retinue.{/n}
3fcad76e-1343-4ef4-bbd6-26a318745ea2: "One enemy of Humanity helped to defeat another. A strange quirk of fate..."
87869a48-349f-412e-8a6d-03d7d718372d: {n}The Seneschal issues the order over the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}: to take Sauerback into custody and send interrogators to him. Her tone brooks no argument.{/n}
1e7a4f12-d6cc-4269-b6d3-1ce2c5e98121: Even though the abominable creature has lost its eye, you cannot shake the feeling that the gaping wound still stares right at you with a cold, inextinguishable malice.
0958f413-5476-4d2d-9e43-e7b798dc0023: "For the purpose of this conversation, I stand before you as {g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}Artisan{/g} Decabalus-4-16. I lead the Adeptus Mechanicus mission — servants of the Machine God — ensuring the operation of the sacred mining machines on this station. Further clarification..." {n}The Tech-Priest pauses for a few seconds. His optical sensors slowly scan each of your retinue from top to bottom.{/n} "...is available — presentable in Low Gothic form — upon request. What interests Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} at the observed station?"
54297205-d791-4963-8521-f6a56756b713: "We'll see about that, heir of Seberian. I don't want you dead, but I'm not going to hold back."
2b5678f7-896e-4ede-ae0d-d5e2113df8dd: {n}An autopistol round lightly singes your hair, but misses you. The woman falls to the ground, hit by the return shot. As her body hits the deck, the figures around you move, Sauerback barking orders.{/n}
1de8cf2d-3662-4222-8275-3efcf9ca46ba: {n}You hear Danrok's silken voice in your comm-bead:{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I humbly and with great haste request an audience with you on the bridge. We must discuss a situation on one of the protectorate's key worlds. Your esteemed ancestor, Lord Seberian, wishes to resolve it single-handedly, yet I thought it my sacred duty to notify you. I can assure you that this will not take much of your time."
4e550cd2-bccb-49e2-a48e-57260189916e: {n}The old officer smiles and bows low to you. The young man behind him casts a sneering look at Martinax and walks to the vacated spaces with his nose in the air.{/n}
296840ba-20ab-4cfa-ba42-9888fc80fbd7: "Atonement for the one. For you, uncle..."
00ecf0dd-2fd9-4684-bce8-d93c6173a514: "I do not want to see this... thing again. Servitorise him and send somewhere out of my sight."
3c56e132-0492-4d2d-8967-864666dfba00: The symbols on the ground hold no sorcerous power. Their creator attempted to invoke both the God-Emperor and the forces of the warp, but was ignorant of how to do either.
bbe179e6-71ac-4c44-a61d-9fc603f80c6e: "The combination of countless factors that unite the thoughts and deeds of a person into the quintessence of the worth of his being within his specific society. I am at a loss to provide a less broad definition, but no matter. Much more important is how you define righteousness. The subject you choose will determine the answer to that question."
c6960996-3dae-430a-acd4-7e26f30196e3: Using {g|f:7ae09bd99a7f4fa8842d64fb001af19b}Bayonet Strike{/g} with this lasgun inflicts +18 levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g}.
e49fb20c-5164-4fb5-bae4-f8e519b13405: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to the camp and report to the colonel."
67722110-c2b7-4271-b3d5-32fc94824fbf: {n}The Triasomata suddenly stops mumbling and begins spasming violently as bloody foam spills from his mouth. He turns his face, contorted with hatred, toward the Manipulus.{/n}
be1f6ffb-fcb7-4929-a340-c06a86104b7e: "My laboratory. Well, former laboratory, to be precise. According to the coordinates, it is on the dark side of the planet, in the fifth segment of the northern hemisphere." {n}Each word the Manipulus utters is precisely enunciated to the point of lifelessness. His speech, usually rich in nuance, seems drained of all colour.{/n} "I recommend that you bring sufficiently powerful {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} with you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I fear the level of insolation on the surface is unlikely to satisfy you."
61167733-4285-4bf2-968f-03267bd592f3: {n}Jaе rolls her eyes briefly.{/n} "I suppose even a mighty ashmag from the throng of soulless metallic xenos is not immune to such simple frailties as megalomania."
c47fbad4-ed0a-44c6-9e9f-b8e46777ea82: "Protocol—" {n}Alva-9 swallows the end of the sentence, staring at her blackened hand. The xeno-artefact clutched in her melted fingers continues to emit a low hum. The Tech-Priest scowls and, with a loud binharic trill, tosses the object to you.{/n}
c0f2bfdb-be2e-44e8-9a90-c55596b0c130: "What qualities should a good Rogue Trader possess?"
8207b4a5-feac-41c4-9fc7-cc76d0ffd4b5: "We shall go to the place where Seberian keeps his sword. I'll distract the guards, the rest is up to you. Come along."
13a0063e-0e47-4a08-83f9-670f330ff5a5: Trazyn marks up to 3 targets. At the end of a marked target's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, lightning emanates from it, striking other conscious targets, removing their {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} and dealing 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. This ability can be used even if Trazyn uses {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternity Protocols{/g}
5df3e5a6-a217-4023-bb5d-6ea5e29c2e37: "Oh, all those machine smells... ever since the Sector became fully operational, the stench in here has made breathing pure torture. And the stuffiness... Some of the more delicate patients might faint!"
316a2373-b06a-4c05-a11b-3e3dc618c3d6: Eogunn's body is carelessly dumped among the refuse. His metallic abdomen has been cut open, some augmetics dangle by their wires, and his skin is covered in incisions. His head is missing, removed along with part of the spine.
70029567-506c-46c1-bb69-106fc31a50e9: {n}Nodding absent-mindedly, Eogunn continues to mutter,{/n} "One cannot comprehend an error through mere speculation. The experiment will have to be repeated, with more rigorous selection of subjects... Yes, yes, that is the only way. But first, the criteria must be thoroughly reworked."
b7dc6113-c6b3-4df3-b575-09e5e05c425a: In the star system known as the Tear of Solar, the Lord Captain discovered an ancient shuttle bearing the insignia of the Inquisition and a pilot from the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. The surviving vox-recording revealed that the regiment's patron died, leaving the unit on world GH-89-717.
f8054529-6c99-4598-9c15-1a865c170db6: "My time is valuable, so please do not waste it. With the loss of the Gaprak forces, the Drivestem army has been left as the dynasty's only source of support, and as the marshal of the dominion, I have much to plan."
c29e0e27-9f3d-4940-ae5a-ad66f87bdaa3: Cannot be used because of the effect: {text}
aab25246-ca2b-4ecb-959a-07bba23288ff: "Attention all! Remove yourselves from the sacred Warrant of Trade immediately! We are quite literally standing on the dynasty's pride and glory!" {n}The Seneschal's face reveals genuine horror.{/n}
023bad05-112a-4640-bf3f-37bf24dc072b: A mysterious fragment made of a strange material that looks like unusually strong bone.
8f6108c0-da30-402e-8d27-783a6541df30: "It will be done, Lord Captain! Let's go."
a6856b97-5ff9-4515-9e36-f89a7bb14be4: {n}Idira touches her temples and says, in a hoarse voice,{/n} "They're flooding the air with their psychic whispers. There's... so many of them!"
e6aae80f-9480-4862-b1cf-4a05063ee762: {n}Kuravich grins, baring his sharp teeth.{/n} "Nothing good. We thought no one could hide better than our scouts, but these tin cans came out of nowhere. Tough bastards they are! You'd sooner kill ten Drovers than one of those beasts! They even drape themselves in our flesh. I've seen a lot, but that was something else..." {n}The governor shudders.{/n} "What else? Those blades on their limbs are not bad at cutting, I'll give them that..."
6c69f67c-9eb2-417f-b28a-37d99a210b3c: "You are blinded by your fatherly feelings like an old fool. Come, and I shall open your eyes to the truth."
0d96dd33-b894-4a61-accd-bb5f58588507: "I do not," {n}she says, with an elegant shrug.{/n}
b3b4940a-20d2-4f7b-af1b-ea81f78d7534: "The words of a true {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d}! As long as you are with us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not even the slightest seed of fear or doubt will take root in our souls! I will remind the soldiers of this."
3a5c5a7f-68a9-41e4-87bd-d087f4f48260: You hear the piteous rattle of the damaged mechanism. Now the gate will not close.
34c4a3f4-0119-4bf9-97af-69d96ecc153a: {n}You command the search for the xenoruins located at the coordinates in the vox-scribe found near the sarcophagus, yet the augurs fail to penetrate the tangle of colossal roots. If the coordinates are indeed correct, it can only be confirmed by sending scouts.{/n}
85110065-bfec-4054-8b70-0e61b2e2b719: Deemed conquest and domination to be the greatest mission of Humanity.
2794fb3c-ad13-4e26-bfbe-09aa65059526: {n}Eogunn waves his hand dismissively.{/n} "The kind of bickering about interpretation of ancient dogma that is bound to arise in any place where two Tech-Priests cross paths. A layperson who tries to fathom these arguments will gain nothing but a headache."
026999e7-5004-4c4c-9ff4-aa213442a6d6: Explained to the Arch-Militant that death is better than serving the Ruinous Powers.
45687505-3e1a-4ef7-b2da-8f4ad79259b4: Based the Triasomata's righteousness on usefulness to the dynasty.
6bc7e437-29ba-4c7f-a387-546fce5bfd0b: [Set a melta charge] "It's time to dispose of this xenos filth!"
0a532a20-999f-4a60-805c-376a70c415f6: The damage dealt by this character is increased by +{uip|dmg %|203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d}%, and all their {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are increased by +{uip|stats|203ee372474748a19f5a96a538d23c1d} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. Stacks up to 6 times.
c369b000-b730-42a7-8336-da26d7788e75: "It appears the xenos has not personally checked his collection in some time..." {n}Abelard grins into his moustache, visibly pleased that he has caught the enemy of Humanity in this oversight.{/n}
0760d34c-98e0-4a94-9149-3e91b5360329: {n}He clasps his trembling hands over his chest, and smiles.{/n} "I can feel it... struggling... The Lord Captain... believes? Sorting Hub 10... I won't bring shame! I will wor... work my shift, I won't betray the dy-dynasty!"
a9451c51-0047-41f8-bf9a-74e82673c70f: "Would you care to discuss the deeds of Saint Elana in private?"
4249fbb0-e1d3-4a67-817b-bc80c4d164c0: "This is where I must take my leave of you and your retinue. We will meet again, if we are so destined by the God-Emperor's will. And if we are not," {n}Seberian bows his head.{/n} "Then our farewells are best said now."
3a2e2a87-6778-4649-9d46-2ddc4e447486:
The {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect is removed, and the user gains the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.
For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect does not cause the user to automatically fail to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}.
After 1 round, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} until the end of combat.
e1a23042-935c-4124-bb05-3d78aa147f44: "I would like to know more before I agree."
d0699014-939f-492b-a5a5-03dcb9bf6800:
This modified lance grants Eogunn the upgraded version of the {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Magnarail Blast{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.
892df536-49a2-4ab6-90dd-e7735303fc3b: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh has been pushed back to the road to the xenoruins, north-west of the landing pad."
44ba8d9c-1f73-4841-adfa-13404a476642: "Whoever you are, allow me to put a stop to your scurrilous thoughts at once. I am Juvenna von Valancius, the sole and, of course, legitimate heir of my dynasty. Remember that, and perhaps our little misunderstanding can still turn into a pleasant conversation. We must be discreet and not draw the attention of the guards. Otherwise, we shall both have to explain ourselves — but unlike me, you will have mere seconds to do so... before being shot on my command."
beace624-6bd4-4b81-a748-c7bdc083e606: "However, the trajectory of the Gaprak army did not intersect with the sector of events inside the headquarters, meaning that the probability that you are responsible for what happened is zero."
fe5de4af-e47d-4295-bd40-5f0803743585: "I will take him to another vault in my collection and place him in a new exhibit. I will have to select a new moment in history, in which the Rogue Trader will play the protagonist... Perhaps I will recreate the scene that is unfolding around us right now. The crumbling Museion, the phantom hope of victory that slips through his fingers at the last moment..."
414f0baa-71b1-4ea3-b55e-520d3d1e1786: The user targets an adjacent creature. The target becomes {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} and is considered to be {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}full cover{/g} for the user.
c37ca5d3-ea44-4c9e-8859-b4f2713f5e01: Expertly placed shaped charges have caved in the glacier and sealed off the entrance, suggesting a demolition specialist was behind it.
d6fb3ff9-3ca3-4985-9345-a033fa4ed3d6: "Your ancestor was a great man. Our songs still carry the tales of our campaigns at his side. Then we were stranded here. The Rogue Trader vanished into the roots, leaving us with the Final Order: hold this world. And hold it we did."

dddb6b16-1a45-4f41-971c-f9cd997cfc6c: "Good point." {n}Seberian turns to the soldiers.{/n} "Soldiers of Zarkov! I, Seberian von Valancius, call on you to follow me! Do your duty and crush every enemy in your path! For House von Valancius!"
770a4b55-08dc-43d7-b7f2-dda7a49b7165: "The plan is solid. Let's move out."
74ded250-b876-42ea-89f0-77d64ae4012e: "It is only because of the good fight in which we fought shoulder-to-shoulder that I will not take this as an insolent challenge, mortal! Treasure the mercy Ulfar has granted you!"
450a41ab-9315-4ea2-98a7-5175ab6b0320: "Your companions may wait here. Alas, I am willing to extend my trust to you alone."
70213381-a1ff-4f8e-8d5c-5a552380f61c: {n}A low, threatening growl rolls out of Glaito's muzzle. Solomorne raises his hand in a warning gesture. {/n} "There is danger inside, Rogue Trader. Type of threat: unknown, the augur scan is inconclusive. Consequences of entry are at your own risk."
a246a6d9-4c0f-4e36-a9fd-137314992376: The user's attacks with a weapon in this hand inflict +{uip|Toxin|ca558ef4fa53439da50353ceeaa5fc72} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and the {g|f:1b7dfda30e5e4c9d87dcfd0bb9cfefe8}toxic saturation{/g} effect that stacks.
972ddc87-bbce-451d-877f-60681b457eb4: "You are right, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. No better way to atone for the deeds of our forebears than turning your weapons on a xenos. Janur?"
3c9112a5-583f-4880-b415-963df3b630a9: {n}The Necron holds out a hand with a staff clutched in it in front of him, more warning than threatening.{/n} "Visitor, you are of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to bar entry to any who might damage the exhibits."
33cfd871-0a41-4123-b74b-b9ed373d620e: {n}His green eyes widen. Feral rage gives way to another, deeper feeling. He releases his iron grip and takes a step back.{/n}
cc7b421a-754e-4e56-b6e3-1835e956abf3: "We have songs about the God-Emperor's secret servants, but we would never have been able to recognize them. But why—"
17f1c5b0-88ab-4dc6-ac91-c932e336b8c1: "The Trial Match is over! It is time for the oath. Your orders, Commander?" {n}Tears glisten in Vedka's remaining eye.{/n}
c5066f06-f731-4223-bb21-b47cf76a8bad: {n}Distant sounds of bombardment come from the vox.{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Targeting: Four-Xi, Rho-Omicron."
ace46ee6-02d2-42a3-94b5-dc106c0e47c2: Floating transport slabs defy gravity through advanced xenotech. Though it is not for Humanity to fathom their principles, these very mechanisms may yet deliver the Rogue Trader from the trap.
f4e4bf72-fe0a-443b-abe6-9cfde6bb0d68: "His entire experiment is designed to make you suffer as much as possible."
786f63c1-9ed9-4211-a588-f64f78be648e: "Juvenna, but of course... She always calculates her moves several steps ahead. In dispatching the Gaprak scion, she has killed two groxes with one shot: she equalised our troop numbers with the enemy's, and she has sown discord in my camp. While everyone was preoccupied searching for the missing reinforcements, that traitor was spinning a web of lies around me!"
9359d571-0600-40ab-b771-0f5aa6f07a73: "Tell us then, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}: do you revoke the Final Order of your most holy ancestor, Seberian?"
abe767b3-b9e3-4832-8d01-8782b70b1530: {n}Seberian waves his hand in a benevolent gesture.{/n} "Rise, child. The 32nd Regiment? It cannot be..."
396d55d3-bbfe-47a1-b331-f922a050ec08: {n}The immobilised servo-skull shows no signs of life.{/n}
6bedb451-82d2-411d-a96f-df46903866d3: {n}The implantation throne stands before you in all its glory, illuminated with discharges of the Motive Force. A massive body is laid out upon it, and it takes you a moment to recognise it as Eogunn.{/n}
ab3e1111-95fc-4a9c-ae60-5f592d77c3e8: "Incredible... How are you able to endure something like this?"
8d61a399-3a9d-4493-bb79-b4aaecc9e65c: {n}The xenos lets out a derisive clicking sound that changes to a clang.{/n} "Pathetic... idle... nonentity."
752b3d25-a68d-4619-adb2-a758bb70133d: {n}After nodding to the servo-skull several times, Eogunn says,{/n} "Your presumption is incorrect. Nuncius is really rather chatty and holds strong views on every conceivable topic, which he does not hesitate to express at the first opportunity. Alas, you, as a layperson, are unable to hear his fiery declarations and witty remarks. Nuncius categorises this fact as regrettable."
c6ad051b-d595-40dd-a7ca-28462ecf2402: "One xenoconstruct cursed by the Omnissiah and that subjugates this station's original function!" {n}corrects Alva-9. Discontent rattles in her voice.{/n}
bdd8e068-786b-4c3f-af27-9f66244b66ef: "I have come across xenos devices on the platform. Is this also the work of Decabalus?"
281fa2e5-d7dc-463a-976e-f2f0103d6693: "A rudimentary space-time stasis. It eliminates the possibility of a pointless confrontation, which would be a waste of my time. Now — focus on my question."
37ec0ed6-dffe-4d7a-9f40-b1f93988800a: "The remark has been logged by Nuncius and committed to the long-term vox-archive. The hypothesis about Magos Haneumann's ability to understand and apply humour has been put forth, but not definitively confirmed."
25363884-6fc3-490d-8e93-07f912485fee: "This is ridiculous! Diodas sent you, didn't he? Were you hoping to sow discord between me and my daughter? You should have come better prepared, {name}. "
5cfd0a52-5bca-4f89-8bef-64d6bc851283: To attack, first click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on the {g|Encyclopedia:SingleRangedAttacks}single shot{/g} icon on the weapons panel at the bottom of the screen. Hover the cursor over an enemy — a tooltip will appear showing your chances of hitting that enemy and the possible damage you can deal on a successful hit. Click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on the enemy to fire. The amount of damage your characters deal depends on the parameters of the weapon they are using. The effectiveness of the shot depends on the distance between the character and their enemy — when you target an enemy with a single shot, you will see two areas denoting the weapon's effective and maximum firing ranges.
717d41b8-01a1-4257-b902-3d47f1497fe8: The user automatically {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the next attack. Then, this effect is removed, and they suffer the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect.
429c4915-fa2f-47cf-b07d-5722b4a12c2f: Platform Tirkuaz-4 sank to the ocean floor, taking with it resource extraction technologies unknown to Humanity. The promethium crisis severely affected Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, interrupting sacred meditation and the lives of more than a third of the Tech-Priests on the station.
a3d75a07-ef2f-4ee7-851e-d5406bc96408: "A disagreement arose with the cloister's arch-chemist, Tecla-Paradigm-13. She stubbornly refused to understand the importance of my research and would not authorise access to the sacrarium of alchemical reagents. Since her arguments were invalid and her theoretical basis flawed, I decided to disregard her prohibition and grant myself access."
c43d4ebc-cb47-4f14-9ed8-769b648a8751: The user's attacks with a weapon in this hand inflict +{uip|Toxin|0b96dbee74e84c8d866307a8fbf85338} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and the {g|f:1b7dfda30e5e4c9d87dcfd0bb9cfefe8}toxic saturation{/g} effect.
1c141e18-df3f-441c-96ca-1d2dd3d7fa19: "You may punish me as you see fit, Lord Captain. But I truly did everything within my power." {n}The pilot bows his head meekly.{/n}
42deae42-9a29-4f22-85a5-7240129f3967: "We can also design any augmetics you wish."
d617ec1b-eaf1-4520-a905-3f42e4c46daa: {n}Pasqal's visor flashes red, and the grille of his vox-synthesiser emits a belligerent binharic hymn.{/n}
c0cc2011-dadf-415b-a66f-ea1f07163634: {n}Eogunn's mechadendrite moves gently, almost tenderly, across the hull of the cogitator, releasing a few galvanic flashes.{/n} "The will of the Machine God has held back this device from the brink of death, Rogue Trader. Treat it gently."
613ec8ef-d2b4-45d8-b4f9-e78e3d883333: Nomos left the von Valancius flagship, bound for the icy hands of their new master. Their brief life was caught in an eternal loop and put on display among the countless other exhibits of the mysterious Museion, which had become a tomb for many other unique wonders of the universe.
d03d9a30-98f9-41f4-8657-dcca4a7505e6: "According to the reports received, the work of the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica has caused this commotion among the workers. It appears the rabble are seeking access to sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g}."
0c8a3348-3465-4a86-8f99-dde96d102b4b: "He sacrificed himself for many. Selflessness is the highest expression of righteousness."
4af8d46a-1afb-4ac2-b478-ed6bf8b452bb: {n}Through the bloody foam on his lips, the prostrate man whispers,{/n} "God-Emperor bless you, Lord Captain!" {n}Barely exhaling the words, he takes a deep, pure breath.{/n}
7e39d7a9-1dbc-4a4a-bacb-b49c8c29b3c3: "I want to learn more about the Deathwatch."
bc351c9f-6251-4cf8-ad97-3f5ab4dd4194: "Do we know what has riled the Drover?"
01c4338e-e360-41f4-a714-6a247708b424: "I wish to discuss your hidden talents, Jarub."
e084f937-07ae-4ce6-8ca3-b2b843a29822: "We're not afraid of them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's just that if they pull something stupid, we'll react the way we've always done. You just be sure to remember your promise of protection when the time comes."
2cb47354-7f00-4b07-a957-aabe87d989c4: The banners of the three great dynasties look like hostages here.
caa267b8-8e89-40f0-b34b-acc1af0cd981: "Lord Captain, urgent report. Lord Seberian is on his way to the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g} Chamber, accompanied by those personally loyal to him. Any attempts to ascertain his intentions or to hail His Lordship have failed."
86fe8a6c-0149-461f-a150-19b7b5b33682: "This is no time to be hasty. Better to be prepared for the unknown waiting below."
1da0099f-f6c7-4a4a-aaa2-a5ca6e7b6fa3: "I have heard your terms. Time shall be the judge between us."
c35ec867-d65d-46d1-adaa-b8ce62b6ed0a: Jae suffers −50% less damage from {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g}. Her {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} cannot drop below 0 because of those effects.
86795f9b-3446-4c9e-a697-d32881046671: "Lady Navigator, while that xenos wretch was dissecting me, it boasted about your torture mechanism. I am sorry you had to endure that."
d672b06e-d7ce-4c58-ac78-2f2dce852f9a: "With all due respect to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, leave the operation area! Vivisector Martinax is in critical condition, there is no time for polite chitchat!"
62fd4743-b734-445e-ae80-e647b65191ef: "The Vivisector was not responsible for your son's death. You may consider your revenge complete."
6061d680-b05d-492a-9aba-fcda4b61beba: "I do not care about dying. I am too busy living."
45f876c0-e8e8-42e8-a733-931ee6fdf87b: "Malignant, blasphemous sorcery, supplanting the pure current of the Motive Force." {n}Wrathful sparks of static flare across Eogunn's beard, and you hear a metallic groan echoing from everywhere. As though the very arches of the manufactorum chime in with the Manipulus, raising a wail fraught with fury and anguish.{/n}
1ebcf1e6-5512-495f-9905-307c2bea8f45: "Authorisation received. Last available log — attachment to unit Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. Attachment was effected after the assembly and consecration of unit 17-401's machinery in Workshop Zenta-8. Since then, the logging function has been suspended pending a litany of reactivation."
37398b43-9868-4a82-aa2a-91e4ee3b62d6: {n}Surprised at the lack of response from his retinue, Seberian raises his hand in a questioning gesture.{/n} "Advice usually pours out of you in a torrent, so why are you all staying silent when it truly matters? I expected you to condemn the very thought of negotiations. Still, in these circumstances, I will accept even your telling silence."
7b286556-efea-491d-b01e-b141d9a0c2ee: "I will relay that you have agreed to visit the station." {n}The vox-transmission ends with a click.{/n}
71cee4c0-248a-4951-ae5a-25c5887afe5a: "Do you know what happened to the Gaprak army?"
7518bf76-afc9-4d5d-a0fc-3adbcfa14b50: [Silently drink the contents of the cup]
84101b0a-190c-425f-ba69-30eb71ab412c: {n}Camilla immediately loses interest in you, sinking into contemplation.{/n}
169fa90c-3055-477d-82a1-67027442440d: {n}Something is enveloped within the sarcophagus's stasis field, something that one would struggle to identify as a human being. The body is locked in a foetal position, the mouth open in mute agony, and only the tears streaming from the eyes, reminiscent of some weeping holy statue, reveal that the person is alive. Merciless waves of transmutation slowly and inexorably remake the body — the augmented fingers are covered with veins, vessels, and bones, and the blood that drips from them turns to mica. All in sepulchral silence, broken only by the breathing of the stasis sacellum apparatus. A funeral dragging on for half a century, attended by no one. Until today.{/n}
3e4d97b7-125b-42d1-9b2e-d9b930ace88a: "I myself did." {n}From beneath the vox-grille, a corner of Seberian's torn mouth becomes visible as it stretches into a smile.{/n} "Five centuries ago, the regiment swore its oath of fealty to me in its entirety, and such an oath, my heir, cannot be undone."
84ce2e7b-e4e0-4afd-9cb3-4fb8a8742e41: "Eogunn, if Nuncius's cogitator has not been processing information all this time, how can he carry on a debate with you?"
9eb3df2c-e89e-4fa9-aecf-d13b0a3c1ac2: {n}Eogunn reverently descends lower, almost touching the floor, and folds his hands in a gesture of respect.{/n} "This machine is the forebear of the Elucidator we employed on Amsanct. Had we possessed the full scope of knowledge that it comprehended, who knows, perhaps everything would have turned out differently. However, my sentimentality correlates poorly with statistical probabilities."
6daced6c-98e8-4f57-b097-4bfb9d0b272e: "The machine spirit has gone rogue and butchered Dragan and Wojciech, no doubt about it..."
a645693d-d0d6-4f47-95f2-96dee84ec881: "May you be blessed by the Omnissiah as a statistically significant factor! The airlocks of our cloister are open! May reciprocal gifts increase the probabilities of your triumph!"
ed99fa30-ada9-42ab-aacf-d8222c273c53: "Hmm..." {n}Trazyn gives you and your weapon a cursory look.{/n} "A typical specimen of your kind — your ability to draw even the simplest logical conclusions is limited. I will simplify the terms so that you might understand: do you wish for the same treatment your fellow received?"
02755c22-3e53-4485-87ec-e8cc699f7732: "Seberian has personally assigned me to guard his blade. You are relieved of your post."
894adef3-b648-441f-b1f5-ae419636a9eb: "And so, we arrive at the first sensible question." {n}With servo-motors humming steadily, Seberian positions himself opposite the throne, staring defiantly into your face.{/n} "You are unfit to rule this dynasty. You are weak. You occupy yourself with everything save your direct responsibilities, and the unrest on Janus is proof of that. I paid a great price to bring that world into the protectorate, and I could not stand idly by and watch it be ruined. There have been far too many unacceptable failures, my heir."
f7d97126-78ad-4561-8b8c-cca802c8e683: "Since you are incapable of doing it yourselves, I shall be the one to finish it."
0f1a70b7-cb97-4c94-a25c-7f1b3290f285: "Eogunn. I am in a philosophical mood."
