62c8516a-f6d0-4bf4-9c37-4800bc1b14cf: "The Tenets of the Bloodspun Web teach that pain is the scripture of the Undying One, carved into the skin and mind of His faithful servant. You should not seek deliverance from it, Amic'Abelard."
0e87c8ae-928e-4f44-8cb7-06afe019e45e: "Vigdis, requesting a status update on the Adeptus Mechanicus preparations."
034eaf34-2d13-4e15-b51f-38d89cc6cd68: "Registering the launch of a cargo shuttle on a course for our ship."
55490970-a5cd-4d8f-b5c9-5f6ce92ca590: "You shall be freed from the Final Order and together we shall strengthen the power of House von Valancius!"
d4352c84-aa16-4972-80e1-a29f70394771: Let the Zarkovian troops start a knife fight.
a7534ff3-2bc6-47fb-b47c-c7ca33499d3d: One by one, the scouting teams send their shuttles even closer to the planet core. Minutes later, contact ends with all of them. The scouting shuttles continue to orbit the murderous planet forever.
159c54a7-5964-4e32-b419-67e44e65b285: {n}The tall creature resembles a human only remotely. Held upright on the metal tentacles that serve as its legs, it stares at you with a single eye that glows dimly in the gloom.{/n}
6ab9627f-23b3-4105-9739-55948d3230ea: "You mean to sow discord between us? A pathetic ploy. She is his daughter, I am the Seneschal. And unlike Juvenna, I have not forgotten my duty. I sentence you to death for false testimony and for daring to besmirch the name of von Valancius."
b0fd62c6-b41d-4dee-8c3b-dc5816da3ffc: {n}The galvanic cells embedded within Eogunn's core emit a warning thrum, glowing with a blue light. The Manipulus studies the contours of the mechanism with keen interest.{/n} "The machine spirit of this device is overflowing with emanations of a nature unknown to me. The currents of the Motive Force coursing through it have revealed this to me. Its hunger to be heard is truly immense! I propose we perform an exploratory act of communication with the spirit inhabiting this vox."

a17d31f8-ea79-48d0-90e8-0c25bb1193b2: {n}You recognise the voice of the Aeldari whose vessel you once engaged in a neighbouring system. The augur vid-screens highlight unpatched hull breaches — a testament to your victory.{/n}
b963378d-5473-4118-8523-9e07a3567468: "I don't understand, I don't understand anything. The voices... they all just cried out and then stopped. They're silent now. This place is empty, dead..."
869568d7-a523-4a9e-9c6c-c38bf8573b7f: "I opened Seberian's stasis container. His logs were inside and, within them, orders for your regiment."
9495bbc4-7ed7-434a-80c1-51a498d89d5f: {n}You pass over several corrupted entries, until one, titled "The Truth Prevails", freezes your data-slate.{/n} "For hours upon hours, I prayed to the Omnissiah while devising patterns of xenos glyphs on my mental map, until finally my processing nodes experienced an epiphany. Although the xenos language is untranslatable, a comparative analysis of the glyphs provided me with a coordinate system sufficient for the purpose, enabling me to progress. Using it helped me reduce the range of images to only three. Seberian tried each of them in turn, and one opened the desired door." {n}A description of the glyph follows. You memorise it.{/n}
f81df666-bce3-411f-aef5-5ab5ca8ad7f1: "Your survival was a mistake, Seberian. Your era has passed and become history. This time, irrevocably."
3fd14fef-4212-45c6-88be-c031974af732: {n}Nuncius, his countenance a reminder of the inevitable end, stares at you with his empty eye sockets.{/n}
dcbc1670-a261-4be1-b6ce-acd2da5849dc: "The hypothetical act of concern on the part of the servo-skull 'Nuncius' is attested. The request for surgical intervention is categorically rejected, as the proposed patient is unwilling to undergo a second act of tech-violation."
a010f1c6-32f4-46c4-af6d-3c9350bdf9be: "An unexpected means of passing the time, my friend, but why not? It has been a long while since I last preached to the uninitiated." {n}Eogunn solemnly folds his hands over his stomach.{/n} "Hear me, loyal subjects of the Imperium!" {n}The Manipulus's booming voice, amplified by a vox-coder, instantly commands the crowd's attention.{/n}
d631c589-2131-42b9-9096-ac40d33818cc: On the feral world of Zarkov, a clash with a dangerous enemy awaits the Rogue Trader. It would be wise to prepare by gathering information from the locals.
97b215c4-b2e5-478a-9538-993f31a2a73b: "Welcome to the bridge of my flagship."
43e10f9c-db56-46cc-a06f-ea2a3451ec24: "The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 are willing to provide the necessary litanies in return for a favour. The station will receive the Rogue Trader again if {mf|he|she} agrees to the deal."
1e4e897f-c4d0-424e-97a0-dc901116004d: [Try to injure Exalt-117 by energising the bulkheads]
46130226-bd20-4cce-b602-f62bdd48dd68: "I dare not waste any more of our precious time on idle chatter."
7da206c3-de6b-4c15-a65a-860e86a843ef: "It was a mistake to trust you." {n}Juvenna narrows her eyes. She pulls a needle pistol from its holster and, a second later, a sharp pain pierces your body.{/n}
142f9a10-a8ff-43d4-9a4c-5b200644613f: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "There is no need for that, esteemed colleague. Each of us sooner or later meets the limits of our functions, there is no shame in that. However, if the Rogue Trader will permit, I am willing to shoulder burdens that are beyond you."
2be8e3c9-5110-4d29-9f71-2df9042bf078: "The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics. According to diagnostic logs, the last update occurred..." {n}A startled exhalation escapes the Magos's vox-grille.{/n} "Five hundred cycles ago? No, that is impossible..."
674cf91d-8173-4aad-84be-16741393d8f4: "I treated you with respect, one foe to another, and gave you the chance to speak your last. And I find myself underwhelmed." {n}Seberian's tone becomes flat, as if this entire situation has bored him.{/n} "I believe I have fulfilled my minimal obligations to etiquette. Guards, shoot them."
12b44882-e25a-49d0-b8aa-56c6b6fb77d6: {n}The servo-skull is silent. Perhaps true love cannot be described in words.{/n}
859bb176-aec9-437c-b6d2-8941e5261b35: "Distortion of the Imperium's immutable laws always begins with the little things. Such as these beliefs in 'tempting spirits' without a proper understanding of the consequences of such words." {n}The Interrogator smiles coldly at the now-wary Izdrig.{/n}
306af26d-bf9a-4d07-aaeb-fb0b8128fe90: "A tragic turn of events leading to a new beginning. May your path of Knowledge, which lies through the thorns of entropy, be blessed by the Machine God."
6438e8f2-f8f4-420e-823b-6c20697c5309: "Eogunn. His implant has melted, you carry only his remains inside you. Nuncius is dead."
0f5f52a9-e3e9-417e-98c2-4a7f3cc21f41: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski led the righteous army of the von Valancius dynasty with unprecedented zeal. After her heroic death in battle against Chaos cultists, her likeness was revered as a holy icon and placed on the regimental banner of the 32nd. After that, fellow soldiers believed that just speaking her name aloud was enough to keep them safe from heresy and corruption.
5944426a-b19d-44a1-868b-7b98ee807798: "Stop this madness!" {n}Juvenna leaps up in righteous fury, her voice suddenly powerful and commanding.{/n} "I, Juvenna von Valancius, sole heir of Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius, accuse my father of heresy. Because of this crime, his title as the God-Emperor's anointed is now forfeit! The sacred Warrant cannot remain in the hands of one so impure! From this moment forth, I will assume the great and holy burden of serving as the head of House von Valancius! I give you my word that all who follow me will not be accused of condoning heresy." {n}She takes a breath to address her father again.{/n} "The gates will not protect you, Father. {name} helped me open them to the truth."
578d59ab-0c07-44f6-aaaa-0b054007b2c9: A strange radiation Necrons use to transform material objects into lifeless holographic replicas.
46d566d7-4597-4660-8157-f5b0e2145ae7: "Yes, I must have misremembered." {n}Sauerback shrugs.{/n} "You're right, the Gapraks' ancestral spaceport on Vheabos VI was erected under the aegis of the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}." {n}The captain's healthy eye narrows slightly.{/n}
7a923a27-9115-47d5-b82f-eab731d01059: "Where did this Drover come from, and what is it?"
04b6a6d8-992f-4f63-a7d3-f3e2d26da9cd: {n}This body, unlike the other three, is devoid of modifications — at least those noticeable to the naked eye. The neck ends in an off-putting tangle of tubes, and mounted on top is the now familiar {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g}. The Haemonculus's creation shows no signs of activity, but the human chest is rising and falling steadily, a semblance of life still lingering in the cadaver.{/n}
b04c43c8-869d-4de2-a0cb-fc29046e2a73: "Could you perhaps refrain from offering counsel, honoured ancestor?"
e9e6df20-2929-4fdb-a9fa-ce5456b0b00c: "Then again, I don't think I'm quite willing to grant this position to anyone from Zarkov. My enforcers are dependable — the same cannot be said of you."
f670d898-6eeb-4f39-8c00-a6fe14938e64: "You say you subsist on certain formulations? Let me try."
da001b01-932d-48c4-980b-2910cdeca5ce: "Unsettling words. Especially coming from someone with your... specialism."
3974b7b6-4420-4b9a-9af1-9f5aeabe4f6c: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:SkillMedicae}Medicae{/g} is now determined by {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} (if their Weapon Skill is higher). The Bladedancer deals +{uip|crit_damage|8b435fb7e4bb42d0951171f008bfd98a}% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical damage{/g} and can use medikits as if having Medicae skill advancement or the corresponding feature or {g|Encyclopedia:Talent}talent{/g}.
a8799a05-b61a-40c6-a327-8457e651ffd8: "Pray continue your experiment, Rogue Trader. After all, what are the torments of the flesh if they serve the Quest for Knowledge? Nuncius and I can always furnish you with worthy augmetics in the event of loss of limb or irreversible nervous degradation."
edf375d2-c93a-49a6-8dca-e8cbcf910022: "Execute Protocol 17.0!" {n}Alva-9's booming voice sounds somewhat surprised.{/n} "I will leave Tirkuaz-4 and report to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}After thinking for a moment, the Tech-Priest takes another step toward you and nearly deafens you with her exclamation:{/n} "Your assistance in resolving the xenoheresy crisis will be cited in my report."
6bca4cd9-2d23-4cd4-9d61-2b1522fa3b9c: "Understood. I'll send them a message that the 32nd has only one patron. Delivered with a krak grenade." {n}Catching your eye, Izdrig grins.{/n} "An unarmed one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
9db26250-72d6-4ffd-aff7-6ebf48ffaa63: Isimond was spurred to commit the murder by Camilla. It must be determined why the duchess set this conspiracy in motion.
a8afdb75-9d48-47e8-b8c7-e202c7db822f: The Line of Support {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in the optical insertion monitors allies' positions.
a899ecdc-211a-4573-a1a9-915f65be33ce:
Whenever a target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
The user also grants this effect to allies within the user's Combat Tactics areas.
d8a97c8f-7d40-4848-90dc-810bf69d5196: Order that the man be freed.
0a75f5c6-d469-44f0-96e7-7da13399ae6c: "I am seeking the limit, Rogue Trader. The limit that Ferrum Sanctum can withstand, but living tissue cannot. I am trying to perceive the extent to which reverse augmentation can be accomplished without killing the recipient. And I myself, as the bearer of a large number of implants, am the ideal specimen.
18864a00-09b3-49d2-9a1e-099b8f575bf2: Go up to the observation platform
394bae50-9b64-4fc1-b1c9-76e619399c50: {n}The guardian of the secret room looks far less menacing than the gargoyle that guards the entrance to the Warrant Chamber — this is just a recess in the wall, framed in metal, with an analyser needle inside and a small vid-screen beside it. Lines of mechanically indifferent text appear on the screen:{/n} "Access is forbidden. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."
aca1e877-78a7-47ff-9b02-73caad5ec01e: "I wish to know more to ensure that it is worth my time."
d35a9a30-b4fd-4101-bcd8-a877bb43c369: "It is not just a question of discipline, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Vivisector speaks quietly but confidently, weighing each word.{/n} "It is also a question of the Sector Bionica's standing among the crew. And the strength of the rules you have established."
381852d5-23b4-4485-aab5-350d4542c0bb: "This world is my domain. Leave and I will spare your lives."
52855f76-bdf3-4cc6-95e8-0c83fc90bdac: You handed the psyker's journal found near Seberian's crypt over to Izdrig Batoshski.
49040323-be26-47f5-ab75-c72453e2312f: "How has your life changed since your return to the fold of the Imperium?"
cfbd99bc-39e5-4df3-a088-2307f8fd13d7: "Fine, whatever you say. Just tell me where to find this irritating creature so I can end it."
e1cc5a97-9959-48d4-b0bc-ac9538dc9966: {n}With a loud clang, the two beds tip over, sending their still living occupants hurtling into the corpse pit. One of them screams briefly before his body lands on the conveyor belt with a crunch.{/n}
3205c2a5-ccfa-4225-b50d-0d15f7777f2a: "The Handbook states that cowardice is punishable by death!" {n}With a practised, fluid motion, the woman slits her comrade's throat, spits, and then stalks away.{/n}
65e5c2f5-ff39-4bd0-a441-8cf465e7b5b8: "Wait. I will shut down something in the settlement and return."
396ee564-694d-4060-9a79-61046647a814: "I would prefer thanks of a more... material nature."
a27d1d16-429e-4456-9aa3-e4b9ca6fa2a9: "I am ready to consider your reasoning."
85aa7aa5-a710-4202-a80d-7295faeaf29c: For centuries, Zarkov's military affairs languished without proper oversight by the Astra Militarum. The planet shall see the construction of infrastructure required to quarter and supply troops, while the protectorate's best drillmasters arrive to train the fighters of the 32nd Regiment in accordance with the Tactica Imperialis.
b4a160d9-3b36-4d1f-b2a7-f5d5ada35e30: "An interesting choice. As you wish." {n}Juvenna stares at you intently, her eyes narrowed.{/n}
ff56a7b8-c363-4b75-a40a-06c911621c1d: "Are you out of your mind? You dare doubt the heir of Seberian?"
90ebc10d-5472-41a6-99b9-8737eabc2445: "I thought the reinforcements were already here! I, too, would like to know what happened to them."
bc5058f4-dcba-435d-aeca-ba371b7f201b: "Initial hypothesis: an atypically high level of processes within the organic mind."
c7a840a1-a562-4a76-86fa-ef93376d433d: {n}The colonel strokes his beard and nods thoughtfully.{/n} "You're right about that... Becoming stronger is a good thing, we know. Using the enemy's own strength against it — the same way we used bones and scraps of plants back on Zarkov — that makes sense too."
bd87c2bd-ab76-48a1-ac8e-60e944b71b0c: Captain Zorael, who miraculously escaped a terrible fate through the intervention of the Emperor's anointed, survived the fall of Museion and returned to his brothers-in-arms. The knowledge he brought with him to the Chapter aided the xenos slayers in the battles to come.
37ed08c8-ecf4-4306-ac61-18ea2d481fdf: {n}Seberian raises his hand with the Crimson Dance of Khaine in his grasp and studies the blade for a while.{/n} "The origin of all my troubles, and a witness to my final victory... This weapon should belong to you, {name}. Accept it, for none are fit to possess it but a Rogue Trader of House von Valancius."
679f59ea-c228-4266-9868-941e858c0e40: Whenever damaged, this creature gains a +1 damage bonus until the end of combat. Stacks.
fffecab1-91b2-4ef4-8e28-856775def21e: "It is my pleasure to confirm the protocol for the exchange of sacred regalia and greet my brother in ministry." {n}There is no tension detectable in Eogunn's voice — rather, there is inexplicable excitement.{/n} "The vows taken in this temple are known to me, and I promise to honour them. I request a meeting with my esteemed colleague to facilitate knowledge exchange and to discuss values."
d2c416fd-6a75-4087-a1f5-e5e00638835e: "There will soon be an air strike on the main headquarters. No one will notice you in the ensuing commotion."
b3653ca6-4344-436a-ac27-14e575b890d2: If an enemy affected by an {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g} within 5 cells from the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} attacks the Operative or their ally, that enemy suffers +{uip|INT|d28f54bddb8d46f3b0a3ed239d985492} more exploits.
a62f0e0e-35e9-4fe8-b01e-035a425b25c4: "The humming noise, the pain that comes and goes — is that a result of its cry?"
0326c2bf-d82d-425b-9dbd-42d3950ed8e1: "Lord Captain, I propose that you examine the skull personally and try to ask him any questions you may have. It will prove most instructive." {n}Ferrenz politely carries the skull up to the command throne.{/n}
00d64e68-af2a-487d-8df7-434dccd4b599: "You hope for pardon? You will find none. Nevertheless, I have some questions to ask you."
cc6db833-bca9-4ee8-8c80-3c8dc9452ec8: {n}Heinrix's eyes narrow as he stares at the gate in grim contemplation{/n}: "What lies beyond this gate is unlikely to please me... or you, for that matter."
6aaeb0de-3252-44ab-9f42-31934b5d7ab7: [Raise your weapon] "Fight and meet your doom, xenos!"
063b0a98-552a-4a0d-916e-bca584f1bf06: Can be installed in the Sector Bionica
350cfe84-68e7-449f-9a1d-41f3c83c43a6: "The sacred mechanism has lain dormant for many years. It is our duty as servants of the Omnissiah to continue to invoke it, trusting in the benevolence of the Machine God. Initiating beginning of the rite."
25bf4cac-c5a8-4387-832d-d7799838b1ce: {n}After a brief pause, Eogunn adds, addressing the servo-skull,{/n} "Yes, Nuncius, bone tissue is no less vital and stable, but it would have been less convincing in this particular case."
880e164c-113a-4d1b-a1ab-5d297e6f5b63: "A member of House Gaprak has been killed along with his men. Was this the work of... Elana?"
5a2ebd88-8e76-4be7-9fd8-a91d1a041398:
The user deals +{uip|Melee|0c10fd9857dd46e0a0d41f7e9ad31321}% more {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and gains +{uip|Deflection|0c10fd9857dd46e0a0d41f7e9ad31321} {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}.
The user suffers −{uip|DR|0c10fd9857dd46e0a0d41f7e9ad31321}% less damage.
c2fab658-5711-400c-a87c-1c914db5e2e1: "Lord Captain, your arrival... The regiment's loyalty is now dictated by more than just oaths."
99ef7820-ac93-44ca-9911-ca2446b9c209: "Indeed, Nuncius, you and the esteemed Eogunn are right. It cannot be a trick of my imagination."
ff53ec43-971f-43b5-a984-d728cc546f7c: {n}Izdrig Batoshski lets out a strained growl as blood bubbles in his pierced lungs. The old soldier catches your eye and smirks, then gives you a nod. With one final movement, the colonel salutes, and his eyes close forever.{/n}
295da36a-938d-4c54-a01c-e6202cb9ea3f: "A pejorative definition is semantically inappropriate in your utterance, primitive creature." {n}The metal plate replacing the xenos's face shows no emotion, but you read displeasure in the movements of his many limbs.{/n} "You have indeed beheld the Warden to whom the Infinite has entrusted the protection of the outer gates of the Museion."
552bf3d2-1ac9-46e7-b677-35b39492cfd7: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I would be honoured to hear more." {n}Vedka's voice, once ringing and full of inner reverence, now sounds hollow.{/n}
66b1347c-079c-4af2-a7e8-2d3da5d953b4: {n}With a whirring sound, Ferrenz's optical augment focuses on you.{/n} "Scanning for the potential utility of the life form... Encephalic healing skill is lacking. At present, nothing can be done."
ced80869-2dd5-4033-b83a-fbd61dc051a2: For a moment, the sheer desperation in Vedka's sonorous voice overcame even the crypt's deadly dirge. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakeable resistance to fear.
6b612406-c811-4f04-ae12-2edc3c054232: The newfound world requires the Lord Captain's aid.
92a9644e-3286-4951-b72e-511fb368c471: "Mercy ends where the estimation of an individual's efficiency begins. This is an incontrovertible fact."
d9a067a3-8696-4496-8fb9-a43e6d3fdc0d: "I do apologise, Rogue Trader. I forget that Nuncius's speech may be difficult for laypersons to understand."
db9de83f-bd59-4dd7-9e56-6334c815a75b: "As I see it, you have no right to make any claims against a member of the nobility, Sauerback."
86156f02-d134-4175-ac56-29594efc00bc: "Lord Captain! The Cage is under attack. We are detecting active vox-communications on the 32nd Regiment's frequencies. I have already given word of our arriv—"
f141339b-9afa-4d1d-8f1a-c15bd01adbb4: "Thank you for your help and farewell, xenos."
781a9707-f38f-4da5-be06-8bfcc012e8fd: "This is blasphemy against the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}. An insult to the Domin. And a dishonour to all of the Bloodspun Web." {n}Kibellah retrieves one of her many knives and slowly draws the blade across her face, leaving a crimson trail in its wake.{/n}
62048356-e577-4f43-9d05-4296f31f3142: "You have no authority to give me orders. The Warrant of Trade is rightfully mine, more so than it is yours."
03e9c702-89b1-43db-9b74-f8de52a2167c: {n}You sense the foreman Pask's eyes on you. He has a rifle in his hands, but he does not seem fully convinced that he should shoot you. The workers standing on either side of him look at each other in confusion, awaiting his command.{/n}
3d86260c-d38e-47d8-abbe-5cd6b47681fc: Encased in a block of ice, the xenos appears unscathed. Its metal limbs grip a peculiar weapon, and faint green flashes ripple across its body. A dim, ominous light flickers within the narrow slits of its eyes.
53950f21-837d-4efc-87fa-b904b860177b: "Nuncius and I will continue to refine the triasomia procedure. In order to do so, I will require a great deal of technologies that are... not Imperial in origin. I will seek them out, continuing to experiment on myself, and I will achieve perfection! Even if the Imperium misunderstands me, I will defy death — it is my duty."
58d689a3-32fc-4f26-b98b-e870837605b2: {n}With his well-developed musculature and strong bones, this man presents a stark contrast to the others. His left arm is missing, along with part of his shoulder. Shreds of major vessels protrude from the neatly trimmed stump — they have been closed off with bizarre-looking endcaps that are wired to a metal arm lying nearby. The enforcers' emblem is tattooed on the man's neck, topped with the von Valancius coat of arms.{/n}
af16f566-dd38-4f77-9c2c-05f2d30f6ac6:
The rest of the journey has been expunged from my memory — and likely from the memories of all who made that nightmarish odyssey into the heart of the Necron world. When the squad finally reached the Museion's antechamber, the sight of it shocked me almost more than anything I had ever experienced before.
A gargantuan structure towered in the middle of a vast hall.
d51a1665-fafc-48f8-9b25-3b6147e3a109: "You mean to tell me that you left a man in agony for fifty years and still haven't gone back to him? A fine friend you are."
855c829a-431d-4441-99b6-93d23a3c0e2a: "Adhering to dogma truly does simplify matters, Sister Argenta. However, my art does not tolerate simplification. I fear it is you who will have to be humble, for I have no intention of ceasing my research, nor will I abandon my usual methodologies and canons merely to satisfy your demands."
0a781fc2-83b1-4f64-8332-62eb46438ce7: "I should have introduced myself earlier. {name}, a loyal servant of the dynasty."
bace7b20-79d6-46a6-89ee-8b2acbc6a7a2: "At ease! The palace is captured. Our enemies lie rotting. Glory to the God-Emperor!"
ce551e8f-06ca-4866-84b2-7d2d3a166052: "Is this some kind of joke? Dargonus is in danger. Father is in danger! And you want to discuss palace decor?" {n}Laria clenches her fists so tightly that her knuckles turn white.{/n}
33c1e8d2-4e7d-40c1-83b6-a2d828dd167a: "If you dislike me so much, why did you bother helping me?"
f50dc8ce-e5da-419a-bb06-1e7965f0f935: Magos Exalt-117 does not support Juvenna's plan. He must be persuaded, or eliminated by other means.
3e15fa49-b3ae-4bc9-b69f-fd80f4f308e8: "Enough. I am ready to adjudicate between you."
02d4213a-1340-4fcf-9408-448bc93c06d0: {n}With the grace of a predator, the colonel rolls from heel to toe.{/n} "Shall we have some fun, {mf|lord|lady} heir?"
0bdd2292-0b12-4636-a862-c375c8745d7e:
This lance grants Eogunn the {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Magnarail Blast{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.
16ac753b-c0b6-4b47-b837-fdefb600f969: "Why do you think killing the leader of the xenos is a fruitless endeavour?"
9c15acc6-dd6b-4dfd-ae6c-44a36d8c736a: "I have ceded the position of Sector Bionica Chief to Ferrenz. His approach to augmentation... is more in line with present requirements." {n}The medicae officer winces as if he has a toothache, but tries to keep his tone light.{/n}
8a107612-cf38-4e0e-8bf3-2cfb07dcf517: "A fascinating question, indeed, from an anatomical standpoint. If only everyone shared your scholarly interest, Mistress Heydari! I trust you will record any findings in detail and share them with me. What? Nuncius, no more of your abhorrent insinuations!"
a3ac6545-6eb7-4e96-b7a5-a98047d68dc3: "Yes, Nuncius, I am sure. Now propitiate the Motive Force with the offering of the Second Galvanic Hymn. Conducting the rite of voltage multiplication. Ten percent, steady. Twenty percent..." {n}Eogunn's eyelids close, and his head drops limply onto his chest.{/n}
c1766491-4713-45c1-b76b-69ae37f57c85: The way seemed clear and free of perils. The squad advanced at a swift pace, moving ever deeper into the intricate web of passageways.
b575ec28-6938-47bf-af8b-222e1fbee95a: {n}The man chained to the bed is missing the top part of his skull: the moist pink contents glisten in the {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g} light. The patient is conscious — his eyes are open and his parched lips are constantly moving as he mumbles. The man's terrified gaze meets yours, and he falls silent.{/n}
f66bcecc-9b52-4492-9b9c-96b1b6b37ef3: [Resist] "I will not give in without a fight!"
7efa0154-3aa7-4d4c-9fd4-7801a0f1e05c: "Decabalus himself installed a xenos device in the central drill complex?"
f4b19eae-f056-47df-a073-16a291bfa0a7: "I understand that my opinion may strike you as strange, for the mere fact that this poor soul has found his way to the Sector Bionica might itself be regarded as a blessing. Yet hear me out. The installation of a cortical augmentation will restore the patient to health, serving as an example for the rest of us through his heroism. This will inspire the people and strengthen their faith in the Lord Captain, and let them know that the Rogue Trader's mercy will not abandon them in their hour of need."
e6134de2-1444-4c0e-8900-2a25fe8c48f7: {n}With a low roar, a wing of Valkyries emerges from over the horizon, hurtling toward the palace like raptors. The air raid siren sounds in time with their appearance. Within seconds, you hear the whistling of bombs as fire rains down from the sky.{/n}
afcda56f-fee3-4d81-81f4-33a5fb17e252: "Nuncius is baffled at the sight of the dread and exhaustion of all who attend the Administratum. I share in his bafflement. Is waiting so onerous, even when one can spend the time in contemplation and other salutary occupations of the mind?"
11a08181-5266-4f62-a8f4-96e6f04586bb: ...the surviving Tech-Priests overloaded their generators, creating a barrier of Motive Force.
4920643c-4d0c-4d41-9dc0-cc85ca73957d: "Every believer in the God-Emperor practices the rites in accordance with their own understanding and the established canons. But out of respect and the obligations conferred upon me by my rank, I must inform you, Kibellah, that constant brutalisation of the flesh is rarely beneficial."
5bc81f47-bfec-4005-9d70-049d5b98ddba: The deathly cold that grew more intense as we delved deeper into the pit was a terrifying trial for every one of us. It felt like the bone-chilling breath of death itself. It was only thanks to the soldiers' brutal training and rigorous discipline that we avoided unnecessary casualties.
b3aea189-916e-494e-b622-c9e6a0f9c46e: {n}The colonel raises an eyebrow and looks at you with grim amusement.{/n} "We prepare while we're still recruits, but you can try the rot extract. But it'll be really foul. Even if you don't give your soul to the God-Emperor, your body still might not adapt."
bc30f7f5-daa7-4f75-8350-26c9ba19c48c: {n}The triune man sinks noisily to the floor. His {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} shudder for a while, then stop forever. A strange expression is fixed on his face — a smile of liberation.{/n}
ccb302f9-f303-44ad-9acb-d45d0a0a2811: After teleportation, the user must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −20 penalty or suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. On a successful {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, they suffer {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} instead.
ac3f853b-1994-4dde-8f24-2ab0f1d3e74c: {n}You drink the liquid in a gulp. The mixture leaves an unpleasant chemical aftertaste on your tongue, and your stomach twists in knots, but you hold it all in, proudly placing the emptied goblet on the edge of the bath.{/n}
71f25b56-9f77-4b35-818e-a44d7443a28a: "But you forget: I possess a blade that has no equal!" {n}Seberian grips the hilt, unsheathes the sword, and swings — it cuts through the air with a whistle. A shadow of fear passes over the faces of the retinue.{/n} "I am not a coward who hides behind his people. I am Seberian von Valancius, and I will lead you into battle to cut down the traitor who has defied the will of the God-Emperor! Diodas will answer for this insult to His anointed!"
7c6fbad3-eaba-4b9e-9450-718d1ab4e0df: "That's not quite true. There is evidence that the planet was far more dangerous in the months after the First Call-Up landed. No one was carrying out any comprehensive surveys at that time, of course — or, at least, they didn't share them with the regiment. But after that, everything settled down. Now the appearance of the God-Emperor's chosen ones has struck terror into Zarkov's xenocurse, that must be it."
4ae28419-e5f3-4902-8daf-3123a04cc2a4: "Duty? Nomos... are sad, but Nomos understand. Nomos will do this du—"
b8e69afe-84ef-4688-8a22-741b35f337e5: "Striking at the right moment is a fine art, Domin. The Undying One teaches us to wait, not to give in to impulse. Let the xenos beat each other, and the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialTarotGlossary}God-Emperor's Tarot{/g} will tell us when to do His will."
ee6e6118-dba9-46d3-be28-3f6ed4792d9d: "I can sense the confusion all around me. It is as if a full bottle of paint has been splashed onto a huge canvas. It's because of Warrant, I know. But why the commotion? Isn't the very blood of the Rogue Trader sacred?"
a8e1f5cc-f49b-4bb8-9e2a-416dde9415b2: "Elantach, do not succumb to the mindless drive toward destruction inherent to your kind. I can teach your servants many things, and they will disappear from the baiting zone long before one of the Drovers appears. This will hone their skills and keep the world intact."
d5e4c31b-e68f-4448-b49c-3fa472cc51f8: "Pasqal, you will oversee the righteousness of Eogunn's experiments. Together, you will stabilise and improve the servitors."
91394beb-c8c4-4714-9a1e-25829c062b16: "The siege is over. But it takes more than a single battle won to snuff the flames of war. They are showering me with their artless praise, they are lauding me as the saviour of the dynasty... and yet I cannot shake the thought that it may be my hand that signed its death warrant. What if the artefact in front of me now is not enough? Yet the place where I found this relic may hold still more. The God-Emperor willing, I shall find them. No one must know about the cluster I discovered. No one must interfere in my search. I will order Abrosio not to record the warp routes in the archives of his esteemed House. And should I fail... Then perhaps my descendants might finish what I started. The dynasty's private cogitator on Dargonus seems ancient and loyal enough for me to entrust it with the coordinates. The access identifier is 'Laria.' This will open the secret areas of the machine spirit's memory. I hope I will be the one who reads this journal upon my return... and I hope I will destroy this evidence of my inexcusable faintness of heart."
22927462-6818-4e13-ab66-5d0e3538b258: "In a way, my decisions are already history. All that I strove for has been carried away by the winds of time. Only a single mistake stands between me and oblivion, and once I correct it, I may lay myself to rest. Perhaps the God-Emperor will accept me after my death, and I will accomplish more glorious deeds at His side, fighting His enemies."
21c33beb-01c0-40f4-8f7f-12a22fcfd358: {n}Eogunn nods and returns to examining the servo-skull.{/n}
12884bd6-0d67-4e09-a570-d790916674b0: "Seems too much like a trap to me. I refuse to be caught in it. Ravor, set a course away from this place."
3c996d24-944a-439b-aa63-04363c39dd79: When an enemy enters a 4-cell radius around the user, the user uses {g|f:ad7bde40de224aeca7c9807e67f5c16b}Flamer Shot: Spray{/g} at the target. This effect is active only during other creatures' {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}.
ba274fb7-1f9a-4f83-a877-af3a878ca0a5: "That is why we fight the Archenemy. Better to die than to let its corruption taint us."
1d29044b-09a8-40b1-a773-f3d26fdcf61e: "...No reinforcements are expected. Heretic Coryphaeus is in the courtyard with his followers."
39506616-8290-4878-bdcc-ca7a57c209c9: A half-length portrait hangs on one of the room's walls. Perhaps the figure depicted will shed light on the room owner's identity.
adbe15e3-0c90-4824-a020-6d9b1f293c8b: "May the Omnissiah grant you His blessing for helping to open His eyes! The probability of violating the Universal Laws at the site was extremely high, but Altar's tech-clergy demanded that the estimate be specified to a tenth of a third of a degree."
ee4a19c9-84e4-4a18-b773-8052bd641de2: "We cannot simply drop everything and hare off to Footfall. I will attend to this."
5ea9c77f-b0e6-486b-8d96-6d6545619ffd: {n}Eogunn examines the stump of his mechadendrite.{/n} "It is dangerous. The risk of a similar situation happening again is high. I suggest we bury it here. But if you decide otherwise, I believe I could study its properties and develop a weapon based on it. I will trust your decision."
ba1f228d-a85b-4dd1-bd3d-92bea0f2ca69: {n}Eogunn raises a finger in a didactic manner.{/n} "My intervention did not violate the protocols of servitorisation. Their minds still follow the machine algorithms. No heresy has been committed. Colleague, you are overly accustomed to relying upon the cold orderliness of the Ferrum Sanctum and you perceive organic matter as something mutable and unreliable. Yet the living cell is one of the most perfect and stable aggregates created by the Omnissiah."
23f856ed-88aa-4fd8-bd79-d7afc24320ff:
Eogunn gains the {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g} ability.
Eogunn's Logic is increased by +{uip|LogicBonuss|2567694d8ff449b3b3f341ebb42e836e}, and his Tech-Use is increased by +{uip|TechUseBonus|2567694d8ff449b3b3f341ebb42e836e}.
d4e79ef2-b9cc-4157-b645-90d1eba19013: {n}The noblewoman's expression turns pained, as if she were suffering from toothache.{/n} "I suppose. After all, you seem to know what you're doing."
baa616ad-c8b3-4de6-9504-31cec866b002: "I don't hear anything strange. I think you should get your hearing checked, too."
b078cc1d-c329-41ba-a060-f1a82b7577e5: {n}An eerie feeling leaves your mind restless, as if something foul and alien crept onto your voidship, only to disappear — carrying away what was yours. Your intuition tells you that the answer to this mystery awaits in your private chambers.{/n}
ee10e59e-9acd-47ad-b95f-7c39484aa500: [Draw your weapon] "This was a mistake. I shall end his suffering."
dc710ca5-8042-4a68-b5cc-4bf0078e0a6c:
During ground or space combat, you can use {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} + [ALT] to highlight a selected object to emphasise it for other group members will focus on it. You can highlight:
-<indent=5%>a creature model</indent>
-<indent=5%>an icon on the abilities panel</indent>
-<indent=5%>a cell on the battlefield</indent>
f5223358-2c10-4ccc-a2b0-f26894fd4ac1: {n}Your {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g} crackles to life, carrying the Vox Master's anxious voice:{/n} "Lord Captain, an urgent report from Mistress Sauerback. A strange creature resembling a malfunctioning {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} is heading toward the lower decks, shouting pleas that make reference to you and Genetor Februs. Enforcers have been dispatched to intercept it, but they assumed that you would prefer to assess the situation personally."
945e4bd4-d9b8-41ee-b7cf-96cf6e08c30c: Whenever Solomorne uses {g|f:088db872df394b1aaa71781354c48a5b}Forceful Pledge{/g}, he suffers {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} until the end of his next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
d9de67f6-153d-4561-bb05-e7744c4faf50: "I will deliver it to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, where the corruption will be anathematised and destroyed."
8545dc4f-d335-4031-a03a-e87f0b68d19a: "What makes you think I am heading to some gate?"
dfa3195e-b00c-481f-a80d-6c4718c4f645: {n}The newly sworn-in regiment stares at you, awaiting one of the first appointments in centuries.{/n}
23648c4e-426a-44ad-9148-61899b8f30cd: "I can easily decipher them for you, esteemed Genetor Ferrenz. What you are experiencing is joy and gratitude. Certain basic components of the flesh cause these feelings."
d46c8991-1ffb-4528-a79b-06980db906a1: The 32nd Merov Regiment was destroyed along with the von Valancius protectorate. The Zarkovians, who had returned from obscurity to serve the Rogue Trader, met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.
9f625a66-b0cc-4867-86ad-78e6364e0dfd: Now that Seberian's blade has been taken from him, it will be easier for him to see his retinue as a real source of support.
df874581-5bc7-4720-933c-2ff9cb1ae14c: "You'll have to forgive our people. They're simply afraid..." {n}The woman makes to leave, then hesitates.{/n} "Listen, when you fight the colonel, try to strike him under the left ribs. A local beast got hold of him once, tore a rib clean out. He took that rib back and used it to stab the beast dead... Now he has a weak spot there. Thought it might help you."
deb06348-e3ac-44b9-b85b-272e4f171984: {n}The governor huffs angrily, his broad chest rising and falling rapidly. At last, the stubborn spark in his dark eyes fades. He averts his gaze and swallows heavily.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I forgot myself... Yasik! Forget the knives."
779ae007-c320-4871-a260-72b7fdf595ea: "I will save Nuncius. Fifty years of searching, calculating, and experimenting cannot have been for nothing — I have travelled too far to surrender at the very end. This is a debt I owe to my colleague. No, to humanity. If I master death here and now, then I will pave the way for a new age in the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalMadness}The methods do not matter{/d}. Does anyone remember the hundreds of failed attempts and sacrifices that are made in the search for a solution to a problem, if that solution ends up being the only correct one?" {n}Eogunn asks vehemently, without looking at Nuncius.{/n}
84fbb104-2efb-4d64-8d77-93f86ab0f64c: {n}Their movements and stances look peculiar. Then you realise — there is simply no flat terrain anywhere on the planet. Even the massive roots are covered in lumpy bark. The Merovians' odd gait and slightly stooped posture are products of their constant effort to maintain their balance.{/n}
66bbd70a-e1e0-4257-9f7d-1a23c5b8dae1: {n}The buzz inside the memory module grows louder.{/n}
820f57e0-6478-4218-9d0b-ec21c0f55f65: "Soldiers, to me! Cover His Lordship's flank!"
65e91fa5-3084-4f5a-b6c1-37d569845599: "You lament that I remind you of Juvenna. Why is that?"
9d5a2d49-6e69-4e85-8bca-e8caa3b4357f: "This new domain reminds me of my homeworld, Aett-Vater. Mark my words: the people who come from here will become your staunchest allies, and the fiercest foes to anything that stands against Humanity."
d3a3fb01-b7b5-4779-8064-36683b69bb5d: [Find the pressure point under the colonel's left ribcage and press down hard]
ea028672-9778-4b02-90f9-dce4d21932c6: When a creature affected by {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified strikes{/g} ends its turn, each creature damaged by this effect triggers it again.
c42bf6a5-3e23-4f35-a8a8-1c849ec3079d: {n}He nods slowly.{/n} "You must have had good reason to bring a stranger to the council. Very well. I give {mf|him|her} leave to remain."
623cfc65-5774-4b69-aaca-e2b281773c01: The wearer of this item is unaffected by {g|f:fdb59a292d664750a186ee6e61d102c6}Krieg gas{/g}.
2e204e63-5b7a-44a4-924a-d1322f66f717: "Captain. Sergeant. Both of you get back to camp."
9d7d816a-4a73-4cfb-86e8-2414703d1ad0: "...of a band of Aeldari Corsairs called the Crow Spirits. Unusually aggressive for their species. My working theory is that belonging to the craftworld Lu'Nasad, which perished in this sector of the void, has affected their mental structures and resulted in this altered behaviour."
c5ca84b1-a03e-4bae-9601-9c0818a67c31: {n}The woman shoots without thinking, but you are faster. The autopistol round veers off to the side, and, within seconds, the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."
cb7fe3db-8fc2-4747-b274-8b01f33f7e6a: "Attempting an emergency landing! Hold fast, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! God-Emperor, have mercy upon us..."
9c638e4a-d2c3-4e6b-b816-53ab3ae9b388: The value is determined by the {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} selected .
6aad4143-3fa1-4b98-bc8e-3cfeaf94d97e: {n}Yrliet stands motionless with her eyes closed and arms folded. Her serenity is almost unnatural.{/n} "Oghyr magic lies beyond the bounds of your kind's understanding, elantach. If you hope to resist it, giving in to your temper is the last thing you should be doing."
055069e0-8a50-4218-be44-a1931643c2ba: "I have no idea what you're talking about. The only spaceport belonging to my house is the one located on Kiava Gamma."
facfc6b0-dd01-439d-83ba-2c65940ea894: {n}The Merovians begin chanting your name. It is soft, the whisper of hunters accustomed to silence, yet it cuts to your core. Oddly, Vedka does not rush to join the collective surge.{/n}
ca38f77e-b283-403f-b8e4-2027b8d265de: {n}The plaque reads, "Seberian von Valancius Massimo af Koronus, Rogue Trader of the Imperium and Guiding Light of his dynasty."{/n}
762a3780-0ca4-48fa-b905-8f9252269a58: The wearer has +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g}. When {g|f:874c1ff6e51945a0ae4d4e33f3dc1b49}Orchestrated Firestorm{/g} or {g|f:7a6c78a5bc854a2b95aa9b3cc3e2a094}Last Volley{/g} is active, all attacks made by summoned daemons deal +100% more damage and all attacks made by other allies deal +25% more damage.
154e33a8-642e-47b7-a901-83843f140bf3: "Of course... I have been plagued by doubt for so long, but why? Is it because I have lost my mind that I have lost my ability to think? I am Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, sage and alchemist. The Omnissiah has granted me knowledge and the ability to comprehend, and I dare not doubt. For I am a conduit of His design, and if I doubt myself, I doubt the Machine God. I have spoken."
b2cf5b81-6ec2-471f-b2b8-532ce73cee0b: {n}The Drukhari's thin lips stretch into a nasty smile.{/n} "Such a creature would be to the taste of any arena owner in Commorragh... but this particular 'drover' has no chance of winding up there — it will die much sooner than that."
a0ba251e-1ba5-4f55-baad-1f65181b45f0: "G-{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protect you!" {n}The old man sighs in relief.{/n}
53d02f14-61f7-4c05-8bc4-1a85b3e9e9af: "Without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will discuss the fate of the watch with you another time, but you may consider this a major step toward strengthening relations with the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}."
7dc80bc8-d88f-4049-a294-e5f33b968956: "Commoners are easier to bring to heel. They are dumb, but they are hardy and dutiful. Obedience is your righteousness!"
b3c64a0f-d647-442d-9888-ae1f344307b8: "I, Juvenna von Valancius, exercising the right granted to me by the Warrant, in accordance with Law 8913-12-4 of the 6213th Volume of the Lex Dargonus, by decree this day hereby bestow a title of nobility upon Isimond Sauerback and all his lawful heirs until the end of the age. May they serve faithfully and not disgrace the honour of their lords."
bdbf5b82-42bd-4063-94a4-0364105247e5: "Aeldari... an obsolete instrument whose masters perished in the darkness of the ages. The tenacity with which these creatures cling to their meaningless existence is nothing short of pitiful."
9d28f940-549e-4f71-accf-f44f0a499628: "Release the hostage — that is an order from the Rogue Trader."
f2bdf5a1-e241-402b-a807-cb0964ccb649: {n}At the sight of the ring, Sauerback audibly grits his teeth.{/n} "Is that so? Well, I will not obstruct the will of one acting under the aegis of the Seneschal."
b5025a1b-3d01-463d-9327-489ad6162553: "Lord Captain, Zarkov should already be steeped in black and red. There is no sense in increasing the saturation of those hues. The Drovers are drawn to warp energies. If that hypothesis holds — we could create a permanent warp lure inside the tomb, and then the Drovers would simply never leave."
5f03c0ee-55e6-4719-b083-59820e67db22: {n}The giant's icy stare pierces through you, and your palms become treacherously clammy.{/n} "No, human."
e211815c-cdf8-489f-ad1a-f084e5c8b855: "Do not interfere, Seberian. I did not grant you permission to speak."
d4aa91d0-499d-4705-95b1-e287665b6e58: "I managed to remove the reactor from the planet."
